authors_text: Jean Y. Song,Sangwook Lee,Jisoo Lee,Mina Kim,Juho Kim
title: ModSandbox: Facilitating Online Community Moderation Through Error Prediction and Improvement of Automated Rules
title_zh: ModSandbox：通过错误预测和自动化规则改进促进在线社区审核
abstract: Despite the common use of rule-based tools for online content moderation, human moderators still spend a lot of time monitoring them to ensure that they work as intended. Based on surveys and interviews with Reddit moderators who use AutoModerator, we identified the main challenges in reducing false positives and false negatives of automated rules: not being able to estimate the actual effect of a rule in advance and having difficulty figuring out how the rules should be updated. To address these issues, we built ModSandbox, a novel virtual sandbox system that detects possible false positives and false negatives of a rule to be improved and visualizes which part of the rule is causing issues. We conducted a user study with online content moderators, finding that ModSandbox can support quickly finding possible false positives and false negatives of automated rules and guide moderators to update those to reduce future errors.
summary: Despite the common use of rule-based tools for online content moderation, human moderators still spend a lot of time monitoring them to ensure that they work as intended. Based on surveys and interviews with Reddit moderators who use AutoModerator, we identified the main challenges in reducing false positives and false negatives of automated rules: not being able to estimate the actual effect of a rule in advance and having difficulty figuring out how the rules should be updated. To address these issues, we built ModSandbox, a novel virtual sandbox system that detects possible false positives and false negatives of a rule to be improved and visualizes which part of the rule is causing issues. We conducted a user study with online content moderators, finding that ModSandbox can support quickly finding possible false positives and false negatives of automated rules and guide moderators to update those to reduce future errors.
abstract_zh: 尽管在线内容审核普遍使用基于规则的工具，但人工审核员仍然花费大量时间监控它们，以确保它们按预期工作。根据对使用 AutoModerator 的 Reddit 版主的调查和采访，我们发现了减少自动化规则误报和漏报的主要挑战：无法提前估计规则的实际效果以及难以弄清楚规则应该如何更新。为了解决这些问题，我们构建了 ModSandbox，这是一种新颖的虚拟沙箱系统，可以检测需要改进的规则可能出现的误报和漏报，并可视化规则的哪一部分导致了问题。我们与在线内容审核员进行了一项用户研究，发现 ModSandbox 可以支持快速查找自动化规则可能存在的误报和漏报，并指导审核员更新这些规则以减少未来的错误。

AI.tldr: 开发ModSandbox系统，通过预测和改进自动化规则来辅助在线社区的内容审核。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化审核工具存在无法预估规则效果和难以更新规则的问题，导致人工审核负担重且效率低。
AI.method: 开发ModSandbox虚拟沙箱系统，通过检测规则的潜在错误并可视化问题部分，辅助审核员优化规则。
AI.result: 用户研究表明，ModSandbox能有效帮助审核员快速识别规则中的错误并指导其更新，从而减少未来的误判。
AI.conclusion: ModSandbox通过预测和可视化规则错误，有效提升了在线社区内容审核的效率和准确性，为自动化审核工具的改进提供了新思路。

authors_text: Pu Hua,Yubei Chen,Huazhe Xu
title: Simple Emergent Action Representations from Multi-Task Policy Training
title_zh: 多任务策略训练的简单紧急动作表示
comment: 22 pages, 14 figures, 18 tables, Accepeted by ICLR2023
comments: 22 pages, 14 figures, 18 tables, Accepeted by ICLR2023
abstract: The low-level sensory and motor signals in deep reinforcement learning, which exist in high-dimensional spaces such as image observations or motor torques, are inherently challenging to understand or utilize directly for downstream tasks. While sensory representations have been extensively studied, the representations of motor actions are still an area of active exploration. Our work reveals that a space containing meaningful action representations emerges when a multi-task policy network takes as inputs both states and task embeddings. Moderate constraints are added to improve its representation ability. Therefore, interpolated or composed embeddings can function as a high-level interface within this space, providing instructions to the agent for executing meaningful action sequences. Empirical results demonstrate that the proposed action representations are effective for intra-action interpolation and inter-action composition with limited or no additional learning. Furthermore, our approach exhibits superior task adaptation ability compared to strong baselines in Mujoco locomotion tasks. Our work sheds light on the promising direction of learning action representations for efficient, adaptable, and composable RL, forming the basis of abstract action planning and the understanding of motor signal space. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/emergent-action-representation/
summary: The low-level sensory and motor signals in deep reinforcement learning, which exist in high-dimensional spaces such as image observations or motor torques, are inherently challenging to understand or utilize directly for downstream tasks. While sensory representations have been extensively studied, the representations of motor actions are still an area of active exploration. Our work reveals that a space containing meaningful action representations emerges when a multi-task policy network takes as inputs both states and task embeddings. Moderate constraints are added to improve its representation ability. Therefore, interpolated or composed embeddings can function as a high-level interface within this space, providing instructions to the agent for executing meaningful action sequences. Empirical results demonstrate that the proposed action representations are effective for intra-action interpolation and inter-action composition with limited or no additional learning. Furthermore, our approach exhibits superior task adaptation ability compared to strong baselines in Mujoco locomotion tasks. Our work sheds light on the promising direction of learning action representations for efficient, adaptable, and composable RL, forming the basis of abstract action planning and the understanding of motor signal space. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/emergent-action-representation/
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习中的低级感觉和运动信号存在于图像观察或运动扭矩等高维空间中，理解或直接用于下游任务本质上是具有挑战性的。虽然感官表征已被广泛研究，但运动动作的表征仍然是一个积极探索的领域。我们的工作表明，当多任务策略网络将状态和任务嵌入作为输入时，就会出现一个包含有意义的动作表示的空间。添加适度的约束以提高其表示能力。因此，插值或组合嵌入可以充当该空间内的高级接口，为代理提供执行有意义的动作序列的指令。经验结果表明，所提出的动作表示对于动作内插值和交互动作组合是有效的，并且需要有限的或不需要额外的学习。此外，与 Mujoco 运动任务中的强大基线相比，我们的方法表现出卓越的任务适应能力。我们的工作揭示了学习动作表征以实现高效、适应性强和可组合的强化学习的有前途的方向，形成了抽象动作规划和运动信号空间理解的基础。项目页面：https://sites.google.com/view/emergent-action-representation/

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过多任务策略网络训练，从高维感官和运动信号中生成有意义的动作表示，以提升强化学习中动作序列的插值与组合能力。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习中高维感官和运动信号（如图像或力矩）难以直接用于下游任务，而现有研究对动作表示的探索不足，需寻找高效且可组合的动作表征方法。
AI.method: 设计多任务策略网络，输入状态和任务嵌入，并加入适度约束以增强表征能力，使插值或组合后的嵌入可作为高层接口指导动作序列执行。
AI.result: 实验表明，该动作表示在动作内插值和跨动作组合中效果显著，且无需额外学习；在Mujoco运动任务中表现出优于强基线的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高效、可适应的强化学习提供了动作表示的基础，推动了抽象动作规划与运动信号空间理解的发展。

authors_text: Decheng Liu,Zhan Dang,Chunlei Peng,Yu Zheng,Shuang Li,Nannan Wang,Xinbo Gao
title: FedForgery: Generalized Face Forgery Detection with Residual Federated Learning
title_zh: FedForgery：利用残差联邦学习的广义人脸伪造检测
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/GANG370/FedForgery. The paper has been accepted in the IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security
comments: The code is available at https://github.com/GANG370/FedForgery. The paper has been accepted in the IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security
abstract: With the continuous development of deep learning in the field of image generation models, a large number of vivid forged faces have been generated and spread on the Internet. These high-authenticity artifacts could grow into a threat to society security. Existing face forgery detection methods directly utilize the obtained public shared or centralized data for training but ignore the personal privacy and security issues when personal data couldn't be centralizedly shared in real-world scenarios. Additionally, different distributions caused by diverse artifact types would further bring adverse influences on the forgery detection task. To solve the mentioned problems, the paper proposes a novel generalized residual Federated learning for face Forgery detection (FedForgery). The designed variational autoencoder aims to learn robust discriminative residual feature maps to detect forgery faces (with diverse or even unknown artifact types). Furthermore, the general federated learning strategy is introduced to construct distributed detection model trained collaboratively with multiple local decentralized devices, which could further boost the representation generalization. Experiments conducted on publicly available face forgery detection datasets prove the superior performance of the proposed FedForgery. The designed novel generalized face forgery detection protocols and source code would be publicly available.
summary: With the continuous development of deep learning in the field of image generation models, a large number of vivid forged faces have been generated and spread on the Internet. These high-authenticity artifacts could grow into a threat to society security. Existing face forgery detection methods directly utilize the obtained public shared or centralized data for training but ignore the personal privacy and security issues when personal data couldn't be centralizedly shared in real-world scenarios. Additionally, different distributions caused by diverse artifact types would further bring adverse influences on the forgery detection task. To solve the mentioned problems, the paper proposes a novel generalized residual Federated learning for face Forgery detection (FedForgery). The designed variational autoencoder aims to learn robust discriminative residual feature maps to detect forgery faces (with diverse or even unknown artifact types). Furthermore, the general federated learning strategy is introduced to construct distributed detection model trained collaboratively with multiple local decentralized devices, which could further boost the representation generalization. Experiments conducted on publicly available face forgery detection datasets prove the superior performance of the proposed FedForgery. The designed novel generalized face forgery detection protocols and source code would be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习在图像生成模型领域的不断发展，大量生动的伪造人脸被生成并在网络上传播。这些高真实性的文物可能会对社会安全构成威胁。现有的人脸伪造检测方法直接利用获得的公共共享或集中数据进行训练，但忽略了现实场景中个人数据无法集中共享时的个人隐私和安全问题。此外，不同的工件类型造成的不同分布将进一步对伪造检测任务带来不利影响。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种新颖的用于人脸伪造检测的广义残差联邦学习（FedForgery）。设计的变分自动编码器旨在学习鲁棒的判别性残差特征图来检测伪造的人脸（具有多种甚至未知的伪影类型）。此外，引入通用联邦学习策略来构建与多个本地分散设备协作训练的分布式检测模型，这可以进一步提高表示泛化性。在公开的人脸伪造检测数据集上进行的实验证明了所提出的 FedForgery 的卓越性能。设计的新颖的通用人脸伪造检测协议和源代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedForgery方法，利用残差联邦学习进行通用化人脸伪造检测，解决隐私保护与分布差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法依赖中心化数据训练，忽视隐私保护问题，且难以应对多样化的伪造分布差异。
AI.method: 设计变分自编码器学习鲁棒残差特征，并引入联邦学习策略实现多设备协同训练以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在公开数据集实验中验证了FedForgery的优越性能，且将公开协议与代码开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡隐私保护与模型泛化，为实际场景中多样化伪造检测提供可行解决方案。

search_text: FedForgery: Generalized Face Forgery Detection with Residual Federated Learning FedForgery：利用残差联邦学习的广义人脸伪造检测 With the continuous development of deep learning in the field of image generation models, a large number of vivid forged faces have been generated and spread on the Internet. These high-authenticity artifacts could grow into a threat to society security. Existing face forgery detection methods directly utilize the obtained public shared or centralized data for training but ignore the personal privacy and security issues when personal data couldn't be centralizedly shared in real-world scenarios. Additionally, different distributions caused by diverse artifact types would further bring adverse influences on the forgery detection task. To solve the mentioned problems, the paper proposes a novel generalized residual Federated learning for face Forgery detection (FedForgery). The designed variational autoencoder aims to learn robust discriminative residual feature maps to detect forgery faces (with diverse or even unknown artifact types). Furthermore, the general federated learning strategy is introduced to construct distributed detection model trained collaboratively with multiple local decentralized devices, which could further boost the representation generalization. Experiments conducted on publicly available face forgery detection datasets prove the superior performance of the proposed FedForgery. The designed novel generalized face forgery detection protocols and source code would be publicly available. 随着深度学习在图像生成模型领域的不断发展，大量生动的伪造人脸被生成并在网络上传播。这些高真实性的文物可能会对社会安全构成威胁。现有的人脸伪造检测方法直接利用获得的公共共享或集中数据进行训练，但忽略了现实场景中个人数据无法集中共享时的个人隐私和安全问题。此外，不同的工件类型造成的不同分布将进一步对伪造检测任务带来不利影响。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种新颖的用于人脸伪造检测的广义残差联邦学习（FedForgery）。设计的变分自动编码器旨在学习鲁棒的判别性残差特征图来检测伪造的人脸（具有多种甚至未知的伪影类型）。此外，引入通用联邦学习策略来构建与多个本地分散设备协作训练的分布式检测模型，这可以进一步提高表示泛化性。在公开的人脸伪造检测数据集上进行的实验证明了所提出的 FedForgery 的卓越性能。设计的新颖的通用人脸伪造检测协议和源代码将公开。 本文提出FedForgery方法，利用残差联邦学习进行通用化人脸伪造检测，解决隐私保护与分布差异问题。 Decheng Liu,Zhan Dang,Chunlei Peng,Yu Zheng,Shuang Li,Nannan Wang,Xinbo Gao cs.CV

authors_text: Gitaek Kwon,Eunjin Kim,Sunho Kim,Seongwon Bak,Minsung Kim,Jaeyoung Kim
title: Bag of Tricks for Developing Diabetic Retinopathy Analysis Framework to Overcome Data Scarcity
title_zh: 开发糖尿病视网膜病变分析框架以克服数据稀缺的技巧
abstract: Recently, diabetic retinopathy (DR) screening utilizing ultra-wide optical coherence tomography angiography (UW-OCTA) has been used in clinical practices to detect signs of early DR. However, developing a deep learning-based DR analysis system using UW-OCTA images is not trivial due to the difficulty of data collection and the absence of public datasets. By realistic constraints, a model trained on small datasets may obtain sub-par performance. Therefore, to help ophthalmologists be less confused about models' incorrect decisions, the models should be robust even in data scarcity settings. To address the above practical challenging, we present a comprehensive empirical study for DR analysis tasks, including lesion segmentation, image quality assessment, and DR grading. For each task, we introduce a robust training scheme by leveraging ensemble learning, data augmentation, and semi-supervised learning. Furthermore, we propose reliable pseudo labeling that excludes uncertain pseudo-labels based on the model's confidence scores to reduce the negative effect of noisy pseudo-labels. By exploiting the proposed approaches, we achieved 1st place in the Diabetic Retinopathy Analysis Challenge.
summary: Recently, diabetic retinopathy (DR) screening utilizing ultra-wide optical coherence tomography angiography (UW-OCTA) has been used in clinical practices to detect signs of early DR. However, developing a deep learning-based DR analysis system using UW-OCTA images is not trivial due to the difficulty of data collection and the absence of public datasets. By realistic constraints, a model trained on small datasets may obtain sub-par performance. Therefore, to help ophthalmologists be less confused about models' incorrect decisions, the models should be robust even in data scarcity settings. To address the above practical challenging, we present a comprehensive empirical study for DR analysis tasks, including lesion segmentation, image quality assessment, and DR grading. For each task, we introduce a robust training scheme by leveraging ensemble learning, data augmentation, and semi-supervised learning. Furthermore, we propose reliable pseudo labeling that excludes uncertain pseudo-labels based on the model's confidence scores to reduce the negative effect of noisy pseudo-labels. By exploiting the proposed approaches, we achieved 1st place in the Diabetic Retinopathy Analysis Challenge.
abstract_zh: 最近，利用超宽光学相干断层扫描血管造影（UW-OCTA）进行的糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）筛查已在临床实践中用于检测早期 DR 的迹象。然而，由于数据收集困难且缺乏公共数据集，使用 UW-OCTA 图像开发基于深度学习的 DR 分析系统并非易事。由于现实的限制，在小数据集上训练的模型可能会获得低于标准的性能。因此，为了帮助眼科医生减少对模型错误决策的困惑，即使在数据稀缺的情况下，模型也应该是稳健的。为了解决上述实际挑战，我们对 DR 分析任务进行了全面的实证研究，包括病变分割、图像质量评估和 DR 分级。对于每项任务，我们通过利用集成学习、数据增强和半监督学习来引入强大的训练方案。此外，我们提出了可靠的伪标签，根据模型的置信度分数排除不确定的伪标签，以减少噪声伪标签的负面影响。通过利用所提出的方法，我们在糖尿病视网膜病变分析挑战赛中获得了第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分析框架的开发方法，旨在克服数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 由于超广角光学相干断层扫描血管造影（UW-OCTA）数据收集困难且缺乏公开数据集，基于深度学习的DR分析系统在小数据集上表现不佳，需提升模型在数据稀缺场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过集成学习、数据增强和半监督学习构建鲁棒训练方案，并提出基于模型置信度的可靠伪标签筛选方法以减少噪声伪标签的负面影响。
AI.result: 所提方法在糖尿病视网膜病变分析挑战赛中获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效应对数据稀缺问题，提升了DR分析模型的鲁棒性和实用性。

authors_text: Chen Wang,Yuchen Liu,Boxing Chen,Jiajun Zhang,Wei Luo,Zhongqiang Huang,Chengqing Zong
title: Discrete Cross-Modal Alignment Enables Zero-Shot Speech Translation
title_zh: 离散跨模态对齐实现零样本语音翻译
comment: Accepted by the main conference of EMNLP 2022
comments: Accepted by the main conference of EMNLP 2022
abstract: End-to-end Speech Translation (ST) aims at translating the source language speech into target language text without generating the intermediate transcriptions. However, the training of end-to-end methods relies on parallel ST data, which are difficult and expensive to obtain. Fortunately, the supervised data for automatic speech recognition (ASR) and machine translation (MT) are usually more accessible, making zero-shot speech translation a potential direction. Existing zero-shot methods fail to align the two modalities of speech and text into a shared semantic space, resulting in much worse performance compared to the supervised ST methods. In order to enable zero-shot ST, we propose a novel Discrete Cross-Modal Alignment (DCMA) method that employs a shared discrete vocabulary space to accommodate and match both modalities of speech and text. Specifically, we introduce a vector quantization module to discretize the continuous representations of speech and text into a finite set of virtual tokens, and use ASR data to map corresponding speech and text to the same virtual token in a shared codebook. This way, source language speech can be embedded in the same semantic space as the source language text, which can be then transformed into target language text with an MT module. Experiments on multiple language pairs demonstrate that our zero-shot ST method significantly improves the SOTA, and even performers on par with the strong supervised ST baselines.
summary: End-to-end Speech Translation (ST) aims at translating the source language speech into target language text without generating the intermediate transcriptions. However, the training of end-to-end methods relies on parallel ST data, which are difficult and expensive to obtain. Fortunately, the supervised data for automatic speech recognition (ASR) and machine translation (MT) are usually more accessible, making zero-shot speech translation a potential direction. Existing zero-shot methods fail to align the two modalities of speech and text into a shared semantic space, resulting in much worse performance compared to the supervised ST methods. In order to enable zero-shot ST, we propose a novel Discrete Cross-Modal Alignment (DCMA) method that employs a shared discrete vocabulary space to accommodate and match both modalities of speech and text. Specifically, we introduce a vector quantization module to discretize the continuous representations of speech and text into a finite set of virtual tokens, and use ASR data to map corresponding speech and text to the same virtual token in a shared codebook. This way, source language speech can be embedded in the same semantic space as the source language text, which can be then transformed into target language text with an MT module. Experiments on multiple language pairs demonstrate that our zero-shot ST method significantly improves the SOTA, and even performers on par with the strong supervised ST baselines.
abstract_zh: 端到端语音翻译（ST）旨在将源语言语音翻译成目标语言文本，而不生成中间转录。然而，端到端方法的训练依赖于并行ST数据，获得这些数据既困难又昂贵。幸运的是，自动语音识别（ASR）和机器翻译（MT）的监督数据通常更容易获取，这使得零样本语音翻译成为一个潜在的方向。现有的零样本方法无法将语音和文本的两种模态对齐到共享语义空间中，导致与有监督的 ST 方法相比性能更差。为了实现零样本 ST，我们提出了一种新颖的离散跨模态对齐（DCMA）方法，该方法采用共享的离散词汇空间来容纳和匹配语音和文本的模态。具体来说，我们引入了矢量量化模块，将语音和文本的连续表示离散化为一组有限的虚拟令牌，并使用 ASR 数据将相应的语音和文本映射到共享码本中的同一虚拟令牌。这样，源语言语音可以嵌入到与源语言文本相同的语义空间中，然后可以通过机器翻译模块将其转换为目标语言文本。对多个语言对的实验表明，我们的零样本 ST 方法显着提高了 SOTA，甚至表现与强监督 ST 基线相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种离散跨模态对齐方法（DCMA），通过共享离散词汇空间实现零样本语音翻译。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音翻译依赖难以获取的平行数据，现有零样本方法因无法有效对齐语音与文本模态导致性能不足。
AI.method: 引入向量量化模块将语音和文本的连续表示离散化为共享代码本中的虚拟标记，利用ASR数据实现跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在多语言对实验中显著超越现有零样本方法，部分性能接近监督式语音翻译基线。
AI.conclusion: DCMA通过离散化跨模态对齐有效解决零样本语音翻译的数据依赖问题，为无监督翻译提供新思路。

In order to enable zero-shot ST, we propose a novel Discrete Cross-Modal Alignment (DCMA) method that employs a shared discrete vocabulary space to accommodate and match both modalities of speech and text. Specifically, we introduce a vector quantization module to discretize the continuous representations of speech and text into a finite set of virtual tokens, and use ASR data to map corresponding speech and text to the same virtual token in a shared codebook. This way, source language speech can be embedded in the same semantic space as the source language text, which can be then transformed into target language text with an MT module. Experiments on multiple language pairs demonstrate that our zero-shot ST method significantly improves the SOTA, and even performers on par with the strong supervised ST baselines. 端到端语音翻译（ST）旨在将源语言语音翻译成目标语言文本，而不生成中间转录。然而，端到端方法的训练依赖于并行ST数据，获得这些数据既困难又昂贵。幸运的是，自动语音识别（ASR）和机器翻译（MT）的监督数据通常更容易获取，这使得零样本语音翻译成为一个潜在的方向。现有的零样本方法无法将语音和文本的两种模态对齐到共享语义空间中，导致与有监督的 ST 方法相比性能更差。为了实现零样本 ST，我们提出了一种新颖的离散跨模态对齐（DCMA）方法，该方法采用共享的离散词汇空间来容纳和匹配语音和文本的模态。具体来说，我们引入了矢量量化模块，将语音和文本的连续表示离散化为一组有限的虚拟令牌，并使用 ASR 数据将相应的语音和文本映射到共享码本中的同一虚拟令牌。这样，源语言语音可以嵌入到与源语言文本相同的语义空间中，然后可以通过机器翻译模块将其转换为目标语言文本。对多个语言对的实验表明，我们的零样本 ST 方法显着提高了 SOTA，甚至表现与强监督 ST 基线相当。 本文提出一种离散跨模态对齐方法（DCMA），通过共享离散词汇空间实现零样本语音翻译。 Chen Wang,Yuchen Liu,Boxing Chen,Jiajun Zhang,Wei Luo,Zhongqiang Huang,Chengqing Zong cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Abida Sanjana Shemonti,Emanuele Plebani,Natalia P. Biscola,Deborah M. Jaffey,Leif A. Havton,Janet R. Keast,Alex Pothen,M. Murat Dundar,Terry L. Powley,Bartek Rajwa
title: A novel statistical methodology for quantifying the spatial arrangements of axons in peripheral nerves
title_zh: 一种量化周围神经轴突空间排列的新统计方法
abstract: A thorough understanding of the neuroanatomy of peripheral nerves is required for a better insight into their function and the development of neuromodulation tools and strategies. In biophysical modeling, it is commonly assumed that the complex spatial arrangement of myelinated and unmyelinated axons in peripheral nerves is random, however, in reality the axonal organization is inhomogeneous and anisotropic. Present quantitative neuroanatomy methods analyze peripheral nerves in terms of the number of axons and the morphometric characteristics of the axons, such as area and diameter. In this study, we employed spatial statistics and point process models to describe the spatial arrangement of axons and Sinkhorn distances to compute the similarities between these arrangements (in terms of first- and second-order statistics) in various vagus and pelvic nerve cross-sections. We utilized high-resolution TEM images that have been segmented using a custom-built high-throughput deep learning system based on a highly modified U-Net architecture. Our findings show a novel and innovative approach to quantifying similarities between spatial point patterns using metrics derived from the solution to the optimal transport problem. We also present a generalizable pipeline for quantitative analysis of peripheral nerve architecture. Our data demonstrate differences between male- and female-originating samples and similarities between the pelvic and abdominal vagus nerves.
summary: A thorough understanding of the neuroanatomy of peripheral nerves is required for a better insight into their function and the development of neuromodulation tools and strategies. In biophysical modeling, it is commonly assumed that the complex spatial arrangement of myelinated and unmyelinated axons in peripheral nerves is random, however, in reality the axonal organization is inhomogeneous and anisotropic. Present quantitative neuroanatomy methods analyze peripheral nerves in terms of the number of axons and the morphometric characteristics of the axons, such as area and diameter. In this study, we employed spatial statistics and point process models to describe the spatial arrangement of axons and Sinkhorn distances to compute the similarities between these arrangements (in terms of first- and second-order statistics) in various vagus and pelvic nerve cross-sections. We utilized high-resolution TEM images that have been segmented using a custom-built high-throughput deep learning system based on a highly modified U-Net architecture. Our findings show a novel and innovative approach to quantifying similarities between spatial point patterns using metrics derived from the solution to the optimal transport problem. We also present a generalizable pipeline for quantitative analysis of peripheral nerve architecture. Our data demonstrate differences between male- and female-originating samples and similarities between the pelvic and abdominal vagus nerves.
abstract_zh: 需要对周围神经的神经解剖学有透彻的了解，才能更好地了解其功能以及神经调节工具和策略的开发。在生物物理模型中，通常假设周围神经中有髓鞘和无髓鞘轴突的复杂空间排列是随机的，但实际上轴突组织是不均匀且各向异性的。目前的定量神经解剖学方法根据轴突的数量和轴突的形态特征（例如面积和直径）来分析周围神经。在本研究中，我们采用空间统计和点过程模型来描述轴突的空间排列和 Sinkhorn 距离，以计算各种迷走神经和骨盆神经横截面中这些排列之间的相似性（就一阶和二阶统计而言）。我们利用了高分辨率 TEM 图像，这些图像已使用基于高度修改的 U-Net 架构的定制高通量深度学习系统进行了分割。我们的研究结果展示了一种新颖且创新的方法，可以使用从最佳运输问题的解决方案中导出的指标来量化空间点模式之间的相似性。我们还提出了一种用于周围神经结构定量分析的通用流程。我们的数据证明了男性和女性来源的样本之间的差异以及骨盆和腹部迷走神经之间的相似性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间统计和最优运输问题的新方法，用于量化周围神经中轴突的空间排列模式。
AI.motivation: 现有神经解剖学方法仅关注轴突数量和形态特征，忽略其空间排列的非均匀性和各向异性特征，限制了神经调控技术的发展。
AI.method: 结合空间统计学、点过程模型和Sinkhorn距离算法，利用高分辨率透射电镜图像与深度学习分割系统分析轴突空间分布特征。
AI.result: 发现性别间样本存在差异，盆腔神经与腹腔迷走神经排列模式相似，验证了方法对空间模式相似性量化的能力。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可推广的周围神经结构定量分析框架，为神经调控策略开发提供了新的空间特征分析工具。

authors_text: Ruijun Li,Weihua Li,Yi Yang,Hanyu Wei,Jianhua Jiang,Quan Bai
title: Swinv2-Imagen: Hierarchical Vision Transformer Diffusion Models for Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: Swinv2-Imagen：用于文本到图像生成的分层视觉变换器扩散模型
abstract: Recently, diffusion models have been proven to perform remarkably well in text-to-image synthesis tasks in a number of studies, immediately presenting new study opportunities for image generation. Google's Imagen follows this research trend and outperforms DALLE2 as the best model for text-to-image generation. However, Imagen merely uses a T5 language model for text processing, which cannot ensure learning the semantic information of the text. Furthermore, the Efficient UNet leveraged by Imagen is not the best choice in image processing. To address these issues, we propose the Swinv2-Imagen, a novel text-to-image diffusion model based on a Hierarchical Visual Transformer and a Scene Graph incorporating a semantic layout. In the proposed model, the feature vectors of entities and relationships are extracted and involved in the diffusion model, effectively improving the quality of generated images. On top of that, we also introduce a Swin-Transformer-based UNet architecture, called Swinv2-Unet, which can address the problems stemming from the CNN convolution operations. Extensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of the proposed model by using three real-world datasets, i.e., MSCOCO, CUB and MM-CelebA-HQ. The experimental results show that the proposed Swinv2-Imagen model outperforms several popular state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Recently, diffusion models have been proven to perform remarkably well in text-to-image synthesis tasks in a number of studies, immediately presenting new study opportunities for image generation. Google's Imagen follows this research trend and outperforms DALLE2 as the best model for text-to-image generation. However, Imagen merely uses a T5 language model for text processing, which cannot ensure learning the semantic information of the text. Furthermore, the Efficient UNet leveraged by Imagen is not the best choice in image processing. To address these issues, we propose the Swinv2-Imagen, a novel text-to-image diffusion model based on a Hierarchical Visual Transformer and a Scene Graph incorporating a semantic layout. In the proposed model, the feature vectors of entities and relationships are extracted and involved in the diffusion model, effectively improving the quality of generated images. On top of that, we also introduce a Swin-Transformer-based UNet architecture, called Swinv2-Unet, which can address the problems stemming from the CNN convolution operations. Extensive experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of the proposed model by using three real-world datasets, i.e., MSCOCO, CUB and MM-CelebA-HQ. The experimental results show that the proposed Swinv2-Imagen model outperforms several popular state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，多项研究已证明扩散模型在文本到图像合成任务中表现非常出色，立即为图像生成提供了新的研究机会。 Google 的 Imagen 遵循了这一研究趋势，并且优于 DALLE2，成为文本到图像生成的最佳模型。然而Imagen仅仅使用T5语言模型进行文本处理，并不能保证学习到文本的语义信息。此外，Imagen 利用的 Efficient UNet 并不是图像处理的最佳选择。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Swinv2-Imagen，这是一种基于分层视觉转换器和包含语义布局的场景图的新型文本到图像扩散模型。在该模型中，提取实体和关系的特征向量并参与扩散模型，有效提高生成图像的质量。除此之外，我们还引入了一种基于 Swin-Transformer 的 UNet 架构，称为 Swinv2-Unet，它可以解决 CNN 卷积运算带来的问题。通过使用三个真实世界数据集（即 MSCOCO、CUB 和 MM-CelebA-HQ）进行了大量实验来评估所提出模型的性能。实验结果表明，所提出的 Swinv2-Imagen 模型优于几种流行的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层视觉Transformer和场景图的新型文本到图像扩散模型Swinv2-Imagen，以提升生成图像的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有模型如Imagen在文本语义理解和图像处理上存在不足，仅使用T5语言模型和Efficient UNet架构，无法充分捕捉文本语义和优化图像生成效果。
AI.method: 通过结合场景图的语义布局提取实体和关系特征向量，并引入基于Swin-Transformer的UNet架构（Swinv2-Unet）替代传统CNN操作。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO、CUB和MM-CelebA-HQ三个真实数据集上的实验表明，Swinv2-Imagen优于多种先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Swinv2-Imagen通过融合语义布局信息和改进的UNet架构，有效提升了文本到图像生成的质量和性能。

authors_text: Maozhen Wang,Aykut Ozgun Onol,Philip Long,Taskin Padir
title: Contact-Implicit Planning and Control for Non-Prehensile Manipulation Using State-Triggered Constraints
title_zh: 使用状态触发约束的非预先操纵的接触隐式规划和控制
comment: 16 pages, The International Symposium on Robotics Research 2022
comments: 16 pages, The International Symposium on Robotics Research 2022
abstract: We present a contact-implicit planning approach that can generate contact-interaction trajectories for non-prehensile manipulation problems without tuning or a tailored initial guess and with high success rates. This is achieved by leveraging the concept of state-triggered constraints (STCs) to capture the hybrid dynamics induced by discrete contact modes without explicitly reasoning about the combinatorics. STCs enable triggering arbitrary constraints by a strict inequality condition in a continuous way. We first use STCs to develop an automatic contact constraint activation method to minimize the effective constraint space based on the utility of contact candidates for a given task. Then, we introduce a re-formulation of the Coulomb friction model based on STCs that is more efficient for the discovery of tangential forces than the well-studied complementarity constraints-based approach. Last, we include the proposed friction model in the planning and control of quasi-static planar pushing. The performance of the STC-based contact activation and friction methods is evaluated by extensive simulation experiments in a dynamic pushing scenario. The results demonstrate that our methods outperform the baselines based on complementarity constraints with a significant decrease in the planning time and a higher success rate. We then compare the proposed quasi-static pushing controller against a mixed-integer programming-based approach in simulation and find that our method is computationally more efficient and provides a better tracking accuracy, with the added benefit of not requiring an initial control trajectory. Finally, we present hardware experiments demonstrating the usability of our framework in executing complex trajectories in real-time even with a low-accuracy tracking system.

Last, we include the proposed friction model in the planning and control of quasi-static planar pushing. The performance of the STC-based contact activation and friction methods is evaluated by extensive simulation experiments in a dynamic pushing scenario. The results demonstrate that our methods outperform the baselines based on complementarity constraints with a significant decrease in the planning time and a higher success rate. abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种接触隐式规划方法，可以为非复杂操作问题生成接触交互轨迹，无需调整或定制初始猜测，并且成功率很高。这是通过利用状态触发约束 (STC) 的概念来捕获由离散接触模式引起的混合动力学而无需明确推理组合来实现的。 STC 能够通过严格的不平等条件以连续的方式触发任意约束。我们首先使用 STC 开发一种自动接触约束激活方法，以根据给定任务的接触候选者的效用来最小化有效约束空间。然后，我们引入了基于 STC 的库仑摩擦模型的重新表述，该模型比经过充分研究的基于互补约束的方法更能有效地发现切向力。最后，我们将所提出的摩擦模型纳入准静态平面推动的规划和控制中。基于 STC 的接触激活和摩擦方法的性能通过动态推动场景中的大量模拟实验进行评估。结果表明，我们的方法优于基于互补约束的基线，规划时间显着减少，成功率更高。然后，我们在仿真中将所提出的准静态推动控制器与基于混合整数编程的方法进行比较，发现我们的方法在计算上更有效，并提供更好的跟踪精度，并且具有不需要初始控制轨迹的额外好处。最后，我们提出了硬件实验，证明了我们的框架即使在低精度跟踪系统的情况下也能实时执行复杂轨迹的可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于状态触发约束（STC）的接触隐式规划与控制方法，用于非抓取操作中的接触交互轨迹生成，无需调参或初始猜测，且成功率高。
AI.motivation: 传统非抓取操作规划方法依赖复杂接触模式组合推理或需要人工调参/初始猜测，导致效率低且成功率不足。
AI.method: 1. 利用STC自动激活接触约束以降低有效约束空间；2. 基于STC重构库仑摩擦模型提升切向力求解效率；3. 将改进模型应用于准静态平面推挤的规划与控制。
AI.result: 仿真与硬件实验表明：相比互补性约束基线方法，规划时间减少且成功率显著提升；与混合整数规划方法相比，计算效率更高且跟踪精度更优，且无需初始控制轨迹。
AI.conclusion: STC框架有效解决了非抓取操作中的接触隐式规划难题，在保证实时性的同时提升了复杂轨迹执行的可行性。

search_text: Contact-Implicit Planning and Control for Non-Prehensile Manipulation Using State-Triggered Constraints 使用状态触发约束的非预先操纵的接触隐式规划和控制 We present a contact-implicit planning approach that can generate contact-interaction trajectories for non-prehensile manipulation problems without tuning or a tailored initial guess and with high success rates. This is achieved by leveraging the concept of state-triggered constraints (STCs) to capture the hybrid dynamics induced by discrete contact modes without explicitly reasoning about the combinatorics. STCs enable triggering arbitrary constraints by a strict inequality condition in a continuous way. We first use STCs to develop an automatic contact constraint activation method to minimize the effective constraint space based on the utility of contact candidates for a given task. Then, we introduce a re-formulation of the Coulomb friction model based on STCs that is more efficient for the discovery of tangential forces than the well-studied complementarity constraints-based approach. Last, we include the proposed friction model in the planning and control of quasi-static planar pushing. The performance of the STC-based contact activation and friction methods is evaluated by extensive simulation experiments in a dynamic pushing scenario. The results demonstrate that our methods outperform the baselines based on complementarity constraints with a significant decrease in the planning time and a higher success rate. We then compare the proposed quasi-static pushing controller against a mixed-integer programming-based approach in simulation and find that our method is computationally more efficient and provides a better tracking accuracy, with the added benefit of not requiring an initial control trajectory. Finally, we present hardware experiments demonstrating the usability of our framework in executing complex trajectories in real-time even with a low-accuracy tracking system. 我们提出了一种接触隐式规划方法，可以为非复杂操作问题生成接触交互轨迹，无需调整或定制初始猜测，并且成功率很高。这是通过利用状态触发约束 (STC) 的概念来捕获由离散接触模式引起的混合动力学而无需明确推理组合来实现的。 STC 能够通过严格的不平等条件以连续的方式触发任意约束。我们首先使用 STC 开发一种自动接触约束激活方法，以根据给定任务的接触候选者的效用来最小化有效约束空间。然后，我们引入了基于 STC 的库仑摩擦模型的重新表述，该模型比经过充分研究的基于互补约束的方法更能有效地发现切向力。最后，我们将所提出的摩擦模型纳入准静态平面推动的规划和控制中。基于 STC 的接触激活和摩擦方法的性能通过动态推动场景中的大量模拟实验进行评估。结果表明，我们的方法优于基于互补约束的基线，规划时间显着减少，成功率更高。然后，我们在仿真中将所提出的准静态推动控制器与基于混合整数编程的方法进行比较，发现我们的方法在计算上更有效，并提供更好的跟踪精度，并且具有不需要初始控制轨迹的额外好处。最后，我们提出了硬件实验，证明了我们的框架即使在低精度跟踪系统的情况下也能实时执行复杂轨迹的可用性。 本文提出一种基于状态触发约束（STC）的接触隐式规划与控制方法，用于非抓取操作中的接触交互轨迹生成，无需调参或初始猜测，且成功率高。 Maozhen Wang,Aykut Ozgun Onol,Philip Long,Taskin Padir cs.RO

authors_text: Eli Bronstein,Mark Palatucci,Dominik Notz,Brandyn White,Alex Kuefler,Yiren Lu,Supratik Paul,Payam Nikdel,Paul Mougin,Hongge Chen,Justin Fu,Austin Abrams,Punit Shah,Evan Racah,Benjamin Frenkel,Shimon Whiteson,Dragomir Anguelov
title: Hierarchical Model-Based Imitation Learning for Planning in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 用于自动驾驶规划的基于分层模型的模仿学习
abstract: We demonstrate the first large-scale application of model-based generative adversarial imitation learning (MGAIL) to the task of dense urban self-driving. We augment standard MGAIL using a hierarchical model to enable generalization to arbitrary goal routes, and measure performance using a closed-loop evaluation framework with simulated interactive agents. We train policies from expert trajectories collected from real vehicles driving over 100,000 miles in San Francisco, and demonstrate a steerable policy that can navigate robustly even in a zero-shot setting, generalizing to synthetic scenarios with novel goals that never occurred in real-world driving. We also demonstrate the importance of mixing closed-loop MGAIL losses with open-loop behavior cloning losses, and show our best policy approaches the performance of the expert. We evaluate our imitative model in both average and challenging scenarios, and show how it can serve as a useful prior to plan successful trajectories.
summary: We demonstrate the first large-scale application of model-based generative adversarial imitation learning (MGAIL) to the task of dense urban self-driving. We augment standard MGAIL using a hierarchical model to enable generalization to arbitrary goal routes, and measure performance using a closed-loop evaluation framework with simulated interactive agents. We train policies from expert trajectories collected from real vehicles driving over 100,000 miles in San Francisco, and demonstrate a steerable policy that can navigate robustly even in a zero-shot setting, generalizing to synthetic scenarios with novel goals that never occurred in real-world driving. We also demonstrate the importance of mixing closed-loop MGAIL losses with open-loop behavior cloning losses, and show our best policy approaches the performance of the expert. We evaluate our imitative model in both average and challenging scenarios, and show how it can serve as a useful prior to plan successful trajectories.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了基于模型的生成对抗性模仿学习（MGAIL）在密集城市自动驾驶任务中的首次大规模应用。我们使用分层模型增强标准 MGAIL，以实现对任意目标路线的泛化，并使用带有模拟交互式代理的闭环评估框架来衡量性能。我们根据在旧金山行驶超过 100,000 英里的真实车辆收集的专家轨迹来训练策略，并展示了一种可操纵的策略，即使在零样本设置中也能稳健地导航，并推广到具有现实世界驾驶中从未出现过的新颖目标的合成场景。我们还证明了将闭环 MGAIL 损失与开环行为克隆损失混合的重要性，并展示了我们的最佳策略接近专家的表现。我们在一般和具有挑战性的场景中评估我们的模仿模型，并展示它如何在规划成功的轨迹之前发挥作用。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于分层模型的生成对抗模仿学习方法，用于提升自动驾驶在复杂城市环境中的路径规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶方法在复杂城市环境中泛化能力和零样本适应性不足，需更有效的模仿学习框架。
AI.method: 通过引入分层模型结构增强MGAIL，结合闭环评估与开环行为克隆损失，利用真实世界数据训练策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，策略在多种场景下表现接近专家水平，有效泛化至未见过的合成目标路线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了分层模型结合模仿学习在自动驾驶规划中的有效性，为复杂场景提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Junjie Yang,Ling Liu,Shengjie Zheng,Lang Qian,Gang Gao,Xin Chen,Xiaojian Li
title: The Brain-Inspired Cooperative Shared Control Framework for Brain-Machine Interface
title_zh: 脑机接口的类脑协作共享控制框架
comment: This article need to update the content
comments: This article need to update the content
abstract: In brain-machine interface (BMI) applications, a key challenge is the low information content and high noise level in neural signals, severely affecting stable robotic control. To address this challenge, we proposes a cooperative shared control framework based on brain-inspired intelligence, where control signals are decoded from neural activity, and the robot handles the fine control. This allows for a combination of flexible and adaptive interaction control between the robot and the brain, making intricate human-robot collaboration feasible. The proposed framework utilizes spiking neural networks (SNNs) for controlling robotic arm and wheel, including speed and steering. While full integration of the system remains a future goal, individual modules for robotic arm control, object tracking, and map generation have been successfully implemented. The framework is expected to significantly enhance the performance of BMI. In practical settings, the BMI with cooperative shared control, utilizing a brain-inspired algorithm, will greatly enhance the potential for clinical applications.

The framework is expected to significantly enhance the performance of BMI. In practical settings, the BMI with cooperative shared control, utilizing a brain-inspired algorithm, will greatly enhance the potential for clinical applications.
abstract_zh: 在脑机接口（BMI）应用中，一个关键挑战是神经信号信息含量低、噪声水平高，严重影响机器人的稳定控制。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于类脑智能的协作共享控制框架，其中控制信号从神经活动中解码，机器人负责精细控制。这允许机器人和大脑之间灵活和自适应的交互控制相结合，使复杂的人机协作成为可能。所提出的框架利用尖峰神经网络（SNN）来控制机器人手臂和轮子，包括速度和转向。虽然系统的完全集成仍然是未来的目标，但用于机械臂控制、对象跟踪和地图生成的各个模块已经成功实现。该框架预计将显着提高 BMI 的性能。在实际环境中，具有协作共享控制的BMI，利用类脑算法，将大大增强临床应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脑启发智能的协作共享控制框架，通过解码神经信号并结合机器人精细控制，提升脑机接口（BMI）的性能。
AI.motivation: 脑机接口应用中神经信号信息量低且噪声高，导致机器人控制不稳定，需通过协作共享控制提升稳定性与灵活性。
AI.method: 采用脉冲神经网络（SNN）解码神经活动，控制机械臂和轮式运动（速度与转向），并实现机械臂控制、目标追踪和地图生成等模块。
AI.result: 成功实现机械臂控制、目标追踪和地图生成等模块，为完整系统集成奠定基础，预期显著提升BMI性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过脑启发算法增强BMI的临床应用潜力，为复杂人机协作提供可行方案。

search_text: The Brain-Inspired Cooperative Shared Control Framework for Brain-Machine Interface 脑机接口的类脑协作共享控制框架 In brain-machine interface (BMI) applications, a key challenge is the low information content and high noise level in neural signals, severely affecting stable robotic control. To address this challenge, we proposes a cooperative shared control framework based on brain-inspired intelligence, where control signals are decoded from neural activity, and the robot handles the fine control. This allows for a combination of flexible and adaptive interaction control between the robot and the brain, making intricate human-robot collaboration feasible. The proposed framework utilizes spiking neural networks (SNNs) for controlling robotic arm and wheel, including speed and steering. While full integration of the system remains a future goal, individual modules for robotic arm control, object tracking, and map generation have been successfully implemented. The framework is expected to significantly enhance the performance of BMI. In practical settings, the BMI with cooperative shared control, utilizing a brain-inspired algorithm, will greatly enhance the potential for clinical applications. 在脑机接口（BMI）应用中，一个关键挑战是神经信号信息含量低、噪声水平高，严重影响机器人的稳定控制。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于类脑智能的协作共享控制框架，其中控制信号从神经活动中解码，机器人负责精细控制。这允许机器人和大脑之间灵活和自适应的交互控制相结合，使复杂的人机协作成为可能。所提出的框架利用尖峰神经网络（SNN）来控制机器人手臂和轮子，包括速度和转向。虽然系统的完全集成仍然是未来的目标，但用于机械臂控制、对象跟踪和地图生成的各个模块已经成功实现。该框架预计将显着提高 BMI 的性能。在实际环境中，具有协作共享控制的BMI，利用类脑算法，将大大增强临床应用的潜力。 本文提出一种基于脑启发智能的协作共享控制框架，通过解码神经信号并结合机器人精细控制，提升脑机接口（BMI）的性能。 Junjie Yang,Ling Liu,Shengjie Zheng,Lang Qian,Gang Gao,Xin Chen,Xiaojian Li cs.RO,cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Yiming Li,Zhifang Guo,Zhirong Ye,Xiangdong Wang,Hong Liu,Yueliang Qian,Rui Tao,Long Yan,Kazushige Ouchi
title: A Hybrid System of Sound Event Detection Transformer and Frame-wise Model for DCASE 2022 Task 4
title_zh: DCASE 2022 任务 4 的声音事件检测变压器和逐帧模型的混合系统
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, accepted for publication in DCASE2022 Workshop
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, accepted for publication in DCASE2022 Workshop
abstract: In this paper, we describe in detail our system for DCASE 2022 Task4. The system combines two considerably different models: an end-to-end Sound Event Detection Transformer (SEDT) and a frame-wise model, Metric Learning and Focal Loss CNN (MLFL-CNN). The former is an event-wise model which learns event-level representations and predicts sound event categories and boundaries directly, while the latter is based on the widely adopted frame-classification scheme, under which each frame is classified into event categories and event boundaries are obtained by post-processing such as thresholding and smoothing. For SEDT, self-supervised pre-training using unlabeled data is applied, and semi-supervised learning is adopted by using an online teacher, which is updated from the student model using the Exponential Moving Average (EMA) strategy and generates reliable pseudo labels for weakly-labeled and unlabeled data. For the frame-wise model, the ICT-TOSHIBA system of DCASE 2021 Task 4 is used. Experimental results show that the hybrid system considerably outperforms either individual model and achieves psds1 of 0.420 and psds2 of 0.783 on the validation set without external data. The code is available at https://github.com/965694547/Hybrid-system-of-frame-wise-model-and-SEDT.
summary: In this paper, we describe in detail our system for DCASE 2022 Task4. The system combines two considerably different models: an end-to-end Sound Event Detection Transformer (SEDT) and a frame-wise model, Metric Learning and Focal Loss CNN (MLFL-CNN). The former is an event-wise model which learns event-level representations and predicts sound event categories and boundaries directly, while the latter is based on the widely adopted frame-classification scheme, under which each frame is classified into event categories and event boundaries are obtained by post-processing such as thresholding and smoothing. For SEDT, self-supervised pre-training using unlabeled data is applied, and semi-supervised learning is adopted by using an online teacher, which is updated from the student model using the Exponential Moving Average (EMA) strategy and generates reliable pseudo labels for weakly-labeled and unlabeled data. For the frame-wise model, the ICT-TOSHIBA system of DCASE 2021 Task 4 is used. Experimental results show that the hybrid system considerably outperforms either individual model and achieves psds1 of 0.420 and psds2 of 0.783 on the validation set without external data. The code is available at https://github.com/965694547/Hybrid-system-of-frame-wise-model-and-SEDT.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们详细描述了 DCASE 2022 Task4 的系统。该系统结合了两个截然不同的模型：端到端声音事件检测变压器 (SEDT) 和逐帧模型、度量学习和焦点损失 CNN (MLFL-CNN)。前者是事件级模型，学习事件级表示并直接预测声音事件类别和边界，而后者基于广泛采用的帧分类方案，将每个帧分类为事件类别，并通过阈值和平滑等后处理获得事件边界。对于SEDT，应用使用未标记数据的自监督预训练，并使用在线教师进行半监督学习，使用指数移动平均（EMA）策略从学生模型更新，并为弱标记和未标记数据生成可靠的伪标签。对于逐帧模型，使用DCASE 2021任务4的ICT-TOSHIBA系统。实验结果表明，混合系统的性能明显优于任一单独模型，并且在没有外部数据的验证集上实现了 0.420 的 psds1 和 0.783 的 psds2。该代码位于 https://github.com/965694547/Hybrid-system-of-frame-wise-model-and-SEDT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合声事件检测Transformer（SEDT）和帧级模型的混合系统，用于DCASE 2022任务4的声事件检测。
AI.motivation: 通过结合事件级模型与帧级模型的优势，弥补单一模型在事件边界预测和分类精度上的不足，提升整体检测性能。
AI.method: 融合端到端SEDT（采用自监督预训练和半监督学习）与帧级MLFL-CNN模型（基于DCASE 2021任务4的ICT-TOSHIBA系统），通过EMA策略生成伪标签并集成两种模型输出。
AI.result: 混合系统在验证集上达到psds1=0.420、psds2=0.783的指标，显著优于单一模型且无需外部数据。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型有效结合了事件级与帧级方法的优势，验证了多模型集成在声事件检测任务中的有效性。

search_text: A Hybrid System of Sound Event Detection Transformer and Frame-wise Model for DCASE 2022 Task 4 DCASE 2022 任务 4 的声音事件检测变压器和逐帧模型的混合系统 In this paper, we describe in detail our system for DCASE 2022 Task4. The system combines two considerably different models: an end-to-end Sound Event Detection Transformer (SEDT) and a frame-wise model, Metric Learning and Focal Loss CNN (MLFL-CNN). The former is an event-wise model which learns event-level representations and predicts sound event categories and boundaries directly, while the latter is based on the widely adopted frame-classification scheme, under which each frame is classified into event categories and event boundaries are obtained by post-processing such as thresholding and smoothing. For SEDT, self-supervised pre-training using unlabeled data is applied, and semi-supervised learning is adopted by using an online teacher, which is updated from the student model using the Exponential Moving Average (EMA) strategy and generates reliable pseudo labels for weakly-labeled and unlabeled data. For the frame-wise model, the ICT-TOSHIBA system of DCASE 2021 Task 4 is used. Experimental results show that the hybrid system considerably outperforms either individual model and achieves psds1 of 0.420 and psds2 of 0.783 on the validation set without external data. authors_text: Zuheng Kang,Jianzong Wang,Junqing Peng,Jing Xiao
title: SVLDL: Improved Speaker Age Estimation Using Selective Variance Label Distribution Learning
title_zh: SVLDL：使用选择性方差标签分布学习改进说话者年龄估计
comment: Accepted by SLT 2022. The 2022 IEEE Spoken Language Technology Workshop (SLT 2022)
comments: Accepted by SLT 2022. The 2022 IEEE Spoken Language Technology Workshop (SLT 2022)
abstract: Estimating age from a single speech is a classic and challenging topic. Although Label Distribution Learning (LDL) can represent adjacent indistinguishable ages well, the uncertainty of the age estimate for each utterance varies from person to person, i.e., the variance of the age distribution is different. To address this issue, we propose selective variance label distribution learning (SVLDL) method to adapt the variance of different age distributions. Furthermore, the model uses WavLM as the speech feature extractor and adds the auxiliary task of gender recognition to further improve the performance. Two tricks are applied on the loss function to enhance the robustness of the age estimation and improve the quality of the fitted age distribution. Extensive experiments show that the model achieves state-of-the-art performance on all aspects of the NIST SRE08-10 and a real-world datasets.
summary: Estimating age from a single speech is a classic and challenging topic. Although Label Distribution Learning (LDL) can represent adjacent indistinguishable ages well, the uncertainty of the age estimate for each utterance varies from person to person, i.e., the variance of the age distribution is different. To address this issue, we propose selective variance label distribution learning (SVLDL) method to adapt the variance of different age distributions. Furthermore, the model uses WavLM as the speech feature extractor and adds the auxiliary task of gender recognition to further improve the performance. Two tricks are applied on the loss function to enhance the robustness of the age estimation and improve the quality of the fitted age distribution. Extensive experiments show that the model achieves state-of-the-art performance on all aspects of the NIST SRE08-10 and a real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 从一次演讲中估算年龄是一个经典且具有挑战性的话题。虽然标签分布学习（LDL）可以很好地表示相邻的不可区分的年龄，但每个话语的年龄估计的不确定性因人而异，即年龄分布的方差不同。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了选择性方差标签分布学习（SVLDL）方法来适应不同年龄分布的方差。此外，该模型使用WavLM作为语音特征提取器，并添加性别识别的辅助任务以进一步提高性能。在损失函数上应用了两个技巧，以增强年龄估计的鲁棒性并提高拟合年龄分布的质量。大量实验表明，该模型在 NIST SRE08-10 和真实世界数据集的各个方面都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出SVLDL方法改进说话人年龄估计，通过适应不同年龄分布的方差并结合辅助任务提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LDL方法无法适应不同个体的年龄分布方差差异，导致估计不确定性，需改进以提升准确性。
AI.method: 提出选择性方差标签分布学习（SVLDL），结合WavLM特征提取、性别识别辅助任务及损失函数优化技巧，以适应年龄分布方差并增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 模型在NIST SRE08-10和真实世界数据集上均达到最先进水平，表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过适应年龄分布方差及多任务学习，SVLDL显著提升年龄估计准确性和鲁棒性，验证了方法的有效性。

tldr: 提出SVLDL方法改进说话人年龄估计，通过适应不同年龄分布的方差并结合辅助任务提升性能。
motivation: 现有LDL方法无法适应不同个体的年龄分布方差差异，导致估计不确定性，需改进以提升准确性。
method: 提出选择性方差标签分布学习（SVLDL），结合WavLM特征提取、性别识别辅助任务及损失函数优化技巧，以适应年龄分布方差并增强鲁棒性。
result: 模型在NIST SRE08-10和真实世界数据集上均达到最先进水平，表现优异。
conclusion: 通过适应年龄分布方差及多任务学习，SVLDL显著提升年龄估计准确性和鲁棒性，验证了方法的有效性。
search_text: SVLDL: Improved Speaker Age Estimation Using Selective Variance Label Distribution Learning SVLDL：使用选择性方差标签分布学习改进说话者年龄估计 Estimating age from a single speech is a classic and challenging topic. Although Label Distribution Learning (LDL) can represent adjacent indistinguishable ages well, the uncertainty of the age estimate for each utterance varies from person to person, i.e., the variance of the age distribution is different. To address this issue, we propose selective variance label distribution learning (SVLDL) method to adapt the variance of different age distributions. Furthermore, the model uses WavLM as the speech feature extractor and adds the auxiliary task of gender recognition to further improve the performance. Two tricks are applied on the loss function to enhance the robustness of the age estimation and improve the quality of the fitted age distribution. Extensive experiments show that the model achieves state-of-the-art performance on all aspects of the NIST SRE08-10 and a real-world datasets. 从一次演讲中估算年龄是一个经典且具有挑战性的话题。虽然标签分布学习（LDL）可以很好地表示相邻的不可区分的年龄，但每个话语的年龄估计的不确定性因人而异，即年龄分布的方差不同。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了选择性方差标签分布学习（SVLDL）方法来适应不同年龄分布的方差。此外，该模型使用WavLM作为语音特征提取器，并添加性别识别的辅助任务以进一步提高性能。在损失函数上应用了两个技巧，以增强年龄估计的鲁棒性并提高拟合年龄分布的质量。大量实验表明，该模型在 NIST SRE08-10 和真实世界数据集的各个方面都实现了最先进的性能。 提出SVLDL方法改进说话人年龄估计，通过适应不同年龄分布的方差并结合辅助任务提升性能。 Zuheng Kang,Jianzong Wang,Junqing Peng,Jing Xiao cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Lisa Dunlap,Clara Mohri,Devin Guillory,Han Zhang,Trevor Darrell,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Aditi Raghunathan,Anja Rohrbach
title: Using Language to Extend to Unseen Domains
title_zh: 使用语言扩展到未见过的领域
abstract: It is expensive to collect training data for every possible domain that a vision model may encounter when deployed. We instead consider how simply verbalizing the training domain (e.g. "photos of birds") as well as domains we want to extend to but do not have data for (e.g. "paintings of birds") can improve robustness. Using a multimodal model with a joint image and language embedding space, our method LADS learns a transformation of the image embeddings from the training domain to each unseen test domain, while preserving task relevant information. Without using any images from the unseen test domain, we show that over the extended domain containing both training and unseen test domains, LADS outperforms standard fine-tuning and ensemble approaches over a suite of four benchmarks targeting domain adaptation and dataset bias.
summary: It is expensive to collect training data for every possible domain that a vision model may encounter when deployed. We instead consider how simply verbalizing the training domain (e.g. "photos of birds") as well as domains we want to extend to but do not have data for (e.g. "paintings of birds") can improve robustness. Using a multimodal model with a joint image and language embedding space, our method LADS learns a transformation of the image embeddings from the training domain to each unseen test domain, while preserving task relevant information. Without using any images from the unseen test domain, we show that over the extended domain containing both training and unseen test domains, LADS outperforms standard fine-tuning and ensemble approaches over a suite of four benchmarks targeting domain adaptation and dataset bias.
abstract_zh: 为视觉模型部署时可能遇到的每个可能领域收集训练数据的成本很高。相反，我们考虑如何简单地表达训练领域（例如“鸟类照片”）以及我们想要扩展到但没有数据的领域（例如“鸟类绘画”）可以提高鲁棒性。使用具有联合图像和语言嵌入空间的多模态模型，我们的方法 LADS 学习图像嵌入从训练域到每个未见过的测试域的转换，同时保留任务相关信息。在不使用来自未见测试域的任何图像的情况下，我们表明，在包含训练域和未见测试域的扩展域中，LADS 在针对域适应和数据集偏差的一组四个基准测试中优于标准微调和集成方法。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出通过语言描述扩展视觉模型到未见过的领域，提升其在新领域的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 收集所有可能部署领域的训练数据成本高昂，且传统方法在无目标领域数据时效果有限。
AI.method: 利用多模态模型构建图像与语言联合嵌入空间，通过LADS方法学习训练领域到未见过测试领域的图像嵌入转换，保留任务相关特征。
AI.result: 在四个领域适应基准测试中，LADS在无需目标领域图像的情况下优于标准微调和集成方法。
AI.conclusion: 语言引导的领域适应方法有效，为无监督跨领域学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ryu Hirai,Atsumoto Ohashi,Ao Guo,Hideki Shiroma,Xulin Zhou,Yukihiko Tone,Shinya Iizuka,Ryuichiro Higashinaka
title: Team Flow at DRC2022: Pipeline System for Travel Destination Recommendation Task in Spoken Dialogue
title_zh: DRC2022团队流程：口语对话旅游目的地推荐任务的Pipeline系统
comment: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: To improve the interactive capabilities of a dialogue system, e.g., to adapt to different customers, the Dialogue Robot Competition (DRC2022) was held. As one of the teams, we built a dialogue system with a pipeline structure containing four modules. The natural language understanding (NLU) and natural language generation (NLG) modules were GPT-2 based models, and the dialogue state tracking (DST) and policy modules were designed on the basis of hand-crafted rules. After the preliminary round of the competition, we found that the low variation in training examples for the NLU and failed recommendation due to the policy used were probably the main reasons for the limited performance of the system.
summary: To improve the interactive capabilities of a dialogue system, e.g., to adapt to different customers, the Dialogue Robot Competition (DRC2022) was held. As one of the teams, we built a dialogue system with a pipeline structure containing four modules. The natural language understanding (NLU) and natural language generation (NLG) modules were GPT-2 based models, and the dialogue state tracking (DST) and policy modules were designed on the basis of hand-crafted rules. After the preliminary round of the competition, we found that the low variation in training examples for the NLU and failed recommendation due to the policy used were probably the main reasons for the limited performance of the system.
abstract_zh: 为了提高对话系统的交互能力，例如适应不同的客户，举办了对话机器人大赛（DRC2022）。作为团队之一，我们构建了一个包含四个模块的管道结构的对话系统。自然语言理解（NLU）和自然语言生成（NLG）模块是基于GPT-2的模型，对话状态跟踪（DST）和策略模块是基于手工规则设计的。初赛结束后，我们发现 NLU 训练示例的低变化以及由于所使用的策略而导致推荐失败可能是系统性能有限的主要原因。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DRC2022竞赛中用于口语对话旅游目的地推荐任务的管道系统设计。
AI.motivation: 为提升对话系统的交互能力以适应不同用户需求，参与DRC2022竞赛并构建推荐系统。
AI.method: 采用四模块管道结构：基于GPT-2的NLU/NLG模块与规则设计的DST/策略模块。
AI.result: 初赛表现受限于NLU训练样本多样性不足及策略模块推荐失败问题。
AI.conclusion: 需优化NLU数据多样性并改进推荐策略以提升系统性能。

authors_text: Maurizio Parton,Marco Angelone,Carlo Metta,Stefania D'Ovidio,Roberta Massarelli,Luca Moscardelli,Gianluca Amato
title: Artificial intelligence and renegotiation of commercial lease contracts affected by pandemic-related contingencies from Covid-19. The project A.I.A.Co
title_zh: 受 Covid-19 疫情相关突发事件影响的人工智能和商业租赁合同的重新谈判。 A.I.A.Co 项目
comment: Presented at CRCL 2022: Computational 'law' on edge, https://www.cohubicol.com/about/conference-crcl-2022. Version v2 is a major revision after the conference feedback
comments: Presented at CRCL 2022: Computational 'law' on edge, https://www.cohubicol.com/about/conference-crcl-2022. Version v2 is a major revision after the conference feedback
abstract: This paper aims to investigate the possibility of using artificial intelligence (AI) to resolve the legal issues raised by the Covid-19 emergency about the fate of continuing execution contracts, or those with deferred or periodic execution, as well as, more generally, to deal with exceptional events and contingencies. We first study whether the Italian legal system allows for ''maintenance'' remedies to cope with contingencies and to avoid the termination of the contract, while ensuring effective protection of the interests of both parties. We then give a complete and technical description of an AI-based predictive framework, aimed at assisting both the Magistrate (in the course of litigation) and the parties themselves (in out-of-court proceedings) in the redetermination of the rent of commercial lease contracts. This framework, called A.I.A.Co. for Artificial Intelligence for contract law Against Covid-19, has been developed under the Italian grant ''Fondo Integrativo Speciale per la Ricerca''.
summary: This paper aims to investigate the possibility of using artificial intelligence (AI) to resolve the legal issues raised by the Covid-19 emergency about the fate of continuing execution contracts, or those with deferred or periodic execution, as well as, more generally, to deal with exceptional events and contingencies. We first study whether the Italian legal system allows for ''maintenance'' remedies to cope with contingencies and to avoid the termination of the contract, while ensuring effective protection of the interests of both parties. We then give a complete and technical description of an AI-based predictive framework, aimed at assisting both the Magistrate (in the course of litigation) and the parties themselves (in out-of-court proceedings) in the redetermination of the rent of commercial lease contracts. This framework, called A.I.A.Co. for Artificial Intelligence for contract law Against Covid-19, has been developed under the Italian grant ''Fondo Integrativo Speciale per la Ricerca''.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在研究使用人工智能 (AI) 解决因 Covid-19 紧急情况而引发的有关持续执行合同或延迟或定期执行合同命运的法律问题的可能性，以及更广泛地处理异常事件和突发事件的可能性。我们首先研究意大利法律体系是否允许采取“维持”补救措施来应对突发事件并避免合同终止，同时确保有效保护双方利益。然后，我们对基于人工智能的预测框架进行完整的技术描述，旨在协助治安法官（在诉讼过程中）和当事人本身（在庭外诉讼中）重新确定商业租赁合同的租金。这个框架称为 A.I.A.Co。针对 Covid-19 合同法的人工智能，是在意大利拨款“Fondo Integrativo Speciale per la Ricerca”下开发的。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用人工智能（AI）解决新冠疫情对商业租赁合同执行产生的法律问题，提出名为A.I.A.Co.的AI框架以协助租金重新确定。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情引发的不可抗力事件导致大量商业租赁合同面临履约困境，需通过法律手段平衡合同双方权益，同时探索AI在法律领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 首先分析意大利法律体系对不可抗力事件的应对机制，继而构建基于AI的预测框架A.I.A.Co.，通过技术手段辅助法院诉讼和庭外协商中的租金重新评估。
AI.result: 开发出A.I.A.Co.框架，可为法官和合同双方提供租金调整的量化分析工具，该成果获得意大利专项科研基金支持。
AI.conclusion: AI技术能有效应对疫情等突发事件引发的合同纠纷，通过算法模型实现法律救济的精准化和效率化，为未来类似危机提供可复用的解决方案。

search_text: Artificial intelligence and renegotiation of commercial lease contracts affected by pandemic-related contingencies from Covid-19. The project A.I.A.Co 受 Covid-19 疫情相关突发事件影响的人工智能和商业租赁合同的重新谈判。 A.I.A.Co 项目 This paper aims to investigate the possibility of using artificial intelligence (AI) to resolve the legal issues raised by the Covid-19 emergency about the fate of continuing execution contracts, or those with deferred or periodic execution, as well as, more generally, to deal with exceptional events and contingencies. We first study whether the Italian legal system allows for ''maintenance'' remedies to cope with contingencies and to avoid the termination of the contract, while ensuring effective protection of the interests of both parties. We then give a complete and technical description of an AI-based predictive framework, aimed at assisting both the Magistrate (in the course of litigation) and the parties themselves (in out-of-court proceedings) in the redetermination of the rent of commercial lease contracts. This framework, called A.I.A.Co. for Artificial Intelligence for contract law Against Covid-19, has been developed under the Italian grant ''Fondo Integrativo Speciale per la Ricerca''. 本文旨在研究使用人工智能 (AI) 解决因 Covid-19 紧急情况而引发的有关持续执行合同或延迟或定期执行合同命运的法律问题的可能性，以及更广泛地处理异常事件和突发事件的可能性。我们首先研究意大利法律体系是否允许采取“维持”补救措施来应对突发事件并避免合同终止，同时确保有效保护双方利益。然后，我们对基于人工智能的预测框架进行完整的技术描述，旨在协助治安法官（在诉讼过程中）和当事人本身（在庭外诉讼中）重新确定商业租赁合同的租金。这个框架称为 A.I.A.Co。针对 Covid-19 合同法的人工智能，是在意大利拨款“Fondo Integrativo Speciale per la Ricerca”下开发的。 本文探讨利用人工智能（AI）解决新冠疫情对商业租赁合同执行产生的法律问题，提出名为A.I.A.Co.的AI框架以协助租金重新确定。 Maurizio Parton,Marco Angelone,Carlo Metta,Stefania D'Ovidio,Roberta Massarelli,Luca Moscardelli,Gianluca Amato cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Themos Stafylakis,Ladislav Mosner,Sofoklis Kakouros,Oldrich Plchot,Lukas Burget,Jan Cernocky
title: Extracting speaker and emotion information from self-supervised speech models via channel-wise correlations
title_zh: 通过通道相关性从自监督语音模型中提取说话者和情感信息
abstract: Self-supervised learning of speech representations from large amounts of unlabeled data has enabled state-of-the-art results in several speech processing tasks. Aggregating these speech representations across time is typically approached by using descriptive statistics, and in particular, using the first- and second-order statistics of representation coefficients. In this paper, we examine an alternative way of extracting speaker and emotion information from self-supervised trained models, based on the correlations between the coefficients of the representations - correlation pooling. We show improvements over mean pooling and further gains when the pooling methods are combined via fusion. The code is available at github.com/Lamomal/s3prl_correlation.
summary: Self-supervised learning of speech representations from large amounts of unlabeled data has enabled state-of-the-art results in several speech processing tasks. Aggregating these speech representations across time is typically approached by using descriptive statistics, and in particular, using the first- and second-order statistics of representation coefficients. In this paper, we examine an alternative way of extracting speaker and emotion information from self-supervised trained models, based on the correlations between the coefficients of the representations - correlation pooling. We show improvements over mean pooling and further gains when the pooling methods are combined via fusion. The code is available at github.com/Lamomal/s3prl_correlation.
abstract_zh: 从大量未标记数据中进行语音表示的自监督学习已经在多项语音处理任务中取得了最先进的结果。通常通过使用描述性统计，特别是使用表示系数的一阶和二阶统计来跨时间聚合这些语音表示。在本文中，我们研究了一种基于表示系数之间的相关性从自监督训练模型中提取说话者和情感信息的替代方法 - 相关池。我们展示了平均池的改进以及通过融合组合池方法时的进一步收益。该代码可在 github.com/Lamomal/s3prl_correlation 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出通过通道间相关性从自监督语音模型中提取说话人和情绪信息的方法
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖均值池化等统计量可能忽略通道间相关性，而相关性包含更丰富的说话人/情绪特征
AI.method: 基于表示系数间的相关性池化方法，并结合多种池化方法的融合策略
AI.result: 在说话人和情绪识别任务中，相关性池化方法优于均值池化，融合策略进一步提升性能
AI.conclusion: 通道间相关性池化能有效提取说话人和情绪信息，结合多种池化方法的融合策略可进一步提升效果

authors_text: Saket Dingliwal,Monica Sunkara,Sravan Bodapati,Srikanth Ronanki,Jeff Farris,Katrin Kirchhoff
title: Towards Personalization of CTC Speech Recognition Models with Contextual Adapters and Adaptive Boosting
title_zh: 使用上下文适配器和自适应增强实现 CTC 语音识别模型的个性化
abstract: End-to-end speech recognition models trained using joint Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC)-Attention loss have gained popularity recently. In these models, a non-autoregressive CTC decoder is often used at inference time due to its speed and simplicity. However, such models are hard to personalize because of their conditional independence assumption that prevents output tokens from previous time steps to influence future predictions. To tackle this, we propose a novel two-way approach that first biases the encoder with attention over a predefined list of rare long-tail and out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words and then uses dynamic boosting and phone alignment network during decoding to further bias the subword predictions. We evaluate our approach on open-source VoxPopuli and in-house medical datasets to showcase a 60% improvement in F1 score on domain-specific rare words over a strong CTC baseline.
summary: End-to-end speech recognition models trained using joint Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC)-Attention loss have gained popularity recently. In these models, a non-autoregressive CTC decoder is often used at inference time due to its speed and simplicity. However, such models are hard to personalize because of their conditional independence assumption that prevents output tokens from previous time steps to influence future predictions. To tackle this, we propose a novel two-way approach that first biases the encoder with attention over a predefined list of rare long-tail and out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words and then uses dynamic boosting and phone alignment network during decoding to further bias the subword predictions. We evaluate our approach on open-source VoxPopuli and in-house medical datasets to showcase a 60% improvement in F1 score on domain-specific rare words over a strong CTC baseline.
abstract_zh: 使用联合连接主义时间分类（CTC）-注意力损失训练的端到端语音识别模型最近很受欢迎。在这些模型中，由于其速度和简单性，非自回归 CTC 解码器通常在推理时使用。然而，此类模型很难个性化，因为它们的条件独立假设阻止了先前时间步骤的输出标记影响未来的预测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的双向方法，首先将编码器的注意力集中在预定义的罕见长尾和词汇外（OOV）单词列表上，然后在解码过程中使用动态增强和音素对齐网络来进一步偏置子词预测。我们在开源 VoxPopuli 和内部医学数据集上评估了我们的方法，结果显示，与强大的 CTC 基线相比，特定领域的稀有词的 F1 分数提高了 60%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过上下文适配器和自适应增强技术改进CTC语音识别模型个性化能力的方法，重点提升领域特定罕见词的识别效果。
AI.motivation: 传统CTC模型因条件独立性假设导致难以个性化，尤其在处理罕见长尾词和OOV词时表现不足，需解决输出上下文依赖问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：1）通过预定义罕见词列表的注意力机制偏置编码器；2）结合动态增强策略与音素对齐网络优化解码阶段的子词预测。
AI.result: 在VoxPopuli和医疗数据集上，领域特定罕见词的F1分数相比强CTC基线提升60%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效突破CTC模型的条件独立性限制，显著提升个性化识别能力，尤其适用于专业领域语音识别场景。

authors_text: Dong Chen,Xinda Qi,Yu Zheng,Yuzhen Lu,Zhaojian Li
title: Deep Data Augmentation for Weed Recognition Enhancement: A Diffusion Probabilistic Model and Transfer Learning Based Approach
title_zh: 用于增强杂草识别的深度数据增强：基于扩散概率模型和迁移学习的方法
abstract: Weed management plays an important role in many modern agricultural applications. Conventional weed control methods mainly rely on chemical herbicides or hand weeding, which are often cost-ineffective, environmentally unfriendly, or even posing a threat to food safety and human health. Recently, automated/robotic weeding using machine vision systems has seen increased research attention with its potential for precise and individualized weed treatment. However, dedicated, large-scale, and labeled weed image datasets are required to develop robust and effective weed identification systems but they are often difficult and expensive to obtain. To address this issue, data augmentation approaches, such as generative adversarial networks (GANs), have been explored to generate highly realistic images for agricultural applications. Yet, despite some progress, those approaches are often complicated to train or have difficulties preserving fine details in images. In this paper, we present the first work of applying diffusion probabilistic models (also known as diffusion models) to generate high-quality synthetic weed images based on transfer learning. Comprehensive experimental results show that the developed approach consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art GAN models, representing the best trade-off between sample fidelity and diversity and highest FID score on a common weed dataset, CottonWeedID15. In addition, the expanding dataset with synthetic weed images can apparently boost model performance on four deep learning (DL) models for the weed classification tasks. Furthermore, the DL models trained on CottonWeedID15 dataset with only 10% of real images and 90% of synthetic weed images achieve a testing accuracy of over 94%, showing high-quality of the generated weed samples. The codes of this study are made publicly available at https://github.com/DongChen06/DMWeeds.
summary: Weed management plays an important role in many modern agricultural applications. Conventional weed control methods mainly rely on chemical herbicides or hand weeding, which are often cost-ineffective, environmentally unfriendly, or even posing a threat to food safety and human health. Recently, automated/robotic weeding using machine vision systems has seen increased research attention with its potential for precise and individualized weed treatment. However, dedicated, large-scale, and labeled weed image datasets are required to develop robust and effective weed identification systems but they are often difficult and expensive to obtain. To address this issue, data augmentation approaches, such as generative adversarial networks (GANs), have been explored to generate highly realistic images for agricultural applications. Yet, despite some progress, those approaches are often complicated to train or have difficulties preserving fine details in images. In this paper, we present the first work of applying diffusion probabilistic models (also known as diffusion models) to generate high-quality synthetic weed images based on transfer learning. Comprehensive experimental results show that the developed approach consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art GAN models, representing the best trade-off between sample fidelity and diversity and highest FID score on a common weed dataset, CottonWeedID15. In addition, the expanding dataset with synthetic weed images can apparently boost model performance on four deep learning (DL) models for the weed classification tasks. Furthermore, the DL models trained on CottonWeedID15 dataset with only 10% of real images and 90% of synthetic weed images achieve a testing accuracy of over 94%, showing high-quality of the generated weed samples. The codes of this study are made publicly available at https://github.com/DongChen06/DMWeeds.
abstract_zh: 杂草管理在许多现代农业应用中发挥着重要作用。传统的除草方法主要依靠化学除草剂或人工除草，往往成本低、环境不友好，甚至对食品安全和人体健康构成威胁。最近，使用机器视觉系统的自动/机器人除草因其精确和个性化杂草处理的潜力而受到越来越多的研究关注。然而，开发稳健有效的杂草识别系统需要专用的、大规模的、带标签的杂草图像数据集，但获得它们通常很困难且昂贵。为了解决这个问题，人们已经探索了生成对抗网络（GAN）等数据增强方法来为农业应用生成高度逼真的图像。然而，尽管取得了一些进展，这些方法通常训练起来很复杂，或者难以保留图像中的精细细节。在本文中，我们提出了应用扩散概率模型（也称为扩散模型）基于迁移学习生成高质量合成杂草图像的第一项工作。综合实验结果表明，所开发的方法始终优于几种最先进的 GAN 模型，代表了样本保真度和多样性之间的最佳权衡，以及常见杂草数据集 CottonWeedID15 上的最高 FID 分数。此外，具有合成杂草图像的扩展数据集可以明显提高用于杂草分类任务的四个深度学习（DL）模型的模型性能。此外，仅使用 10% 的真实图像和 90% 的合成杂草图像在 CottonWeedID15 数据集上训练的深度学习模型就实现了超过 94% 的测试准确率，显示了生成的杂草样本的高质量。本研究的代码已公开发布于 https://github.com/DongChen06/DMWeeds。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散概率模型和迁移学习的方法，生成高质量合成杂草图像以增强杂草识别系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统杂草管理方法成本高且环境友好性差，而自动化识别系统需要大量标注数据，但获取困难。现有生成对抗网络（GAN）等数据增强方法存在训练复杂或细节保留不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用扩散概率模型结合迁移学习生成高保真合成杂草图像，并在CottonWeedID15数据集上验证效果，对比多种深度学习模型性能。
AI.result: 所提方法在FID指标上优于主流GAN模型，合成数据使四类深度学习模型性能显著提升，仅用10%真实图像+90%合成图像即可实现94%以上测试准确率。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型与迁移学习结合能有效生成高质量杂草图像，为数据稀缺场景下的农业视觉识别提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Deep Data Augmentation for Weed Recognition Enhancement: A Diffusion Probabilistic Model and Transfer Learning Based Approach 用于增强杂草识别的深度数据增强：基于扩散概率模型和迁移学习的方法 Weed management plays an important role in many modern agricultural applications. Conventional weed control methods mainly rely on chemical herbicides or hand weeding, which are often cost-ineffective, environmentally unfriendly, or even posing a threat to food safety and human health. Recently, automated/robotic weeding using machine vision systems has seen increased research attention with its potential for precise and individualized weed treatment. However, dedicated, large-scale, and labeled weed image datasets are required to develop robust and effective weed identification systems but they are often difficult and expensive to obtain. To address this issue, data augmentation approaches, such as generative adversarial networks (GANs), have been explored to generate highly realistic images for agricultural applications. Yet, despite some progress, those approaches are often complicated to train or have difficulties preserving fine details in images. In this paper, we present the first work of applying diffusion probabilistic models (also known as diffusion models) to generate high-quality synthetic weed images based on transfer learning. Comprehensive experimental results show that the developed approach consistently outperforms several state-of-the-art GAN models, representing the best trade-off between sample fidelity and diversity and highest FID score on a common weed dataset, CottonWeedID15. In addition, the expanding dataset with synthetic weed images can apparently boost model performance on four deep learning (DL) models for the weed classification tasks. Furthermore, the DL models trained on CottonWeedID15 dataset with only 10% of real images and 90% of synthetic weed images achieve a testing accuracy of over 94%, showing high-quality of the generated weed samples. The codes of this study are made publicly available at https://github.com/DongChen06/DMWeeds. 杂草管理在许多现代农业应用中发挥着重要作用。传统的除草方法主要依靠化学除草剂或人工除草，往往成本低、环境不友好，甚至对食品安全和人体健康构成威胁。最近，使用机器视觉系统的自动/机器人除草因其精确和个性化杂草处理的潜力而受到越来越多的研究关注。然而，开发稳健有效的杂草识别系统需要专用的、大规模的、带标签的杂草图像数据集，但获得它们通常很困难且昂贵。为了解决这个问题，人们已经探索了生成对抗网络（GAN）等数据增强方法来为农业应用生成高度逼真的图像。然而，尽管取得了一些进展，这些方法通常训练起来很复杂，或者难以保留图像中的精细细节。在本文中，我们提出了应用扩散概率模型（也称为扩散模型）基于迁移学习生成高质量合成杂草图像的第一项工作。综合实验结果表明，所开发的方法始终优于几种最先进的 GAN 模型，代表了样本保真度和多样性之间的最佳权衡，以及常见杂草数据集 CottonWeedID15 上的最高 FID 分数。此外，具有合成杂草图像的扩展数据集可以明显提高用于杂草分类任务的四个深度学习（DL）模型的模型性能。此外，仅使用 10% 的真实图像和 90% 的合成杂草图像在 CottonWeedID15 数据集上训练的深度学习模型就实现了超过 94% 的测试准确率，显示了生成的杂草样本的高质量。本研究的代码已公开发布于 https://github.com/DongChen06/DMWeeds。 本文提出基于扩散概率模型和迁移学习的方法，生成高质量合成杂草图像以增强杂草识别系统的性能。 Dong Chen,Xinda Qi,Yu Zheng,Yuzhen Lu,Zhaojian Li cs.CV

authors_text: A. Ali Heydari,Naghmeh Rezaei,Daniel J. McDuff,Javier L. Prieto
title: No Pairs Left Behind: Improving Metric Learning with Regularized Triplet Objective
title_zh: 不让任何对落下：通过正则化三元组目标改进度量学习
comment: Main manuscript and supplementary material are all as one PDF
comments: Main manuscript and supplementary material are all as one PDF
abstract: We propose a novel formulation of the triplet objective function that improves metric learning without additional sample mining or overhead costs. Our approach aims to explicitly regularize the distance between the positive and negative samples in a triplet with respect to the anchor-negative distance. As an initial validation, we show that our method (called No Pairs Left Behind [NPLB]) improves upon the traditional and current state-of-the-art triplet objective formulations on standard benchmark datasets. To show the effectiveness and potentials of NPLB on real-world complex data, we evaluate our approach on a large-scale healthcare dataset (UK Biobank), demonstrating that the embeddings learned by our model significantly outperform all other current representations on tested downstream tasks. Additionally, we provide a new model-agnostic single-time health risk definition that, when used in tandem with the learned representations, achieves the most accurate prediction of subjects' future health complications. Our results indicate that NPLB is a simple, yet effective framework for improving existing deep metric learning models, showcasing the potential implications of metric learning in more complex applications, especially in the biological and healthcare domains.
summary: We propose a novel formulation of the triplet objective function that improves metric learning without additional sample mining or overhead costs. Our approach aims to explicitly regularize the distance between the positive and negative samples in a triplet with respect to the anchor-negative distance. As an initial validation, we show that our method (called No Pairs Left Behind [NPLB]) improves upon the traditional and current state-of-the-art triplet objective formulations on standard benchmark datasets. To show the effectiveness and potentials of NPLB on real-world complex data, we evaluate our approach on a large-scale healthcare dataset (UK Biobank), demonstrating that the embeddings learned by our model significantly outperform all other current representations on tested downstream tasks. Additionally, we provide a new model-agnostic single-time health risk definition that, when used in tandem with the learned representations, achieves the most accurate prediction of subjects' future health complications. Our results indicate that NPLB is a simple, yet effective framework for improving existing deep metric learning models, showcasing the potential implications of metric learning in more complex applications, especially in the biological and healthcare domains.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的三元组目标函数公式，可以改进度量学习，而无需额外的样本挖掘或管理成本。我们的方法旨在明确地规范三元组中正样本和负样本之间相对于锚负距离的距离。作为初步验证，我们表明我们的方法（称为 No Pairs Left Behind [NPLB]）改进了标准基准数据集上的传统和当前最先进的三重目标公式。为了展示 NPLB 在现实世界复杂数据上的有效性和潜力，我们在大规模医疗数据集（英国生物银行）上评估了我们的方法，证明我们的模型学习的嵌入在测试的下游任务上显着优于所有其他当前表示。此外，我们提供了一种新的与模型无关的单次健康风险定义，当与学习到的表示结合使用时，可以实现对受试者未来健康并发症的最准确预测。我们的结果表明，NPLB 是一个简单而有效的框架，用于改进现有的深度度量学习模型，展示了度量学习在更复杂的应用程序中的潜在影响，特别是在生物和医疗保健领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外样本挖掘的正则化三元组目标函数，以改进度量学习并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统三元组损失函数依赖复杂样本挖掘策略，计算成本高且效果受限，需更高效且普适的优化方法。
AI.method: 设计名为NPLB的正则化三元组目标，通过显式约束正负样本间距离与锚点-负样本距离的关系，避免冗余计算。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和UK Biobank医疗数据集上，NPLB均优于现有方法，且结合新型健康风险定义后，下游任务预测准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: NPLB为度量学习提供简单有效的改进框架，尤其适用于生物医学等复杂场景，展现跨领域应用潜力。
