search_text: No Pairs Left Behind: Improving Metric Learning with Regularized Triplet Objective 不让任何对落下：通过正则化三元组目标改进度量学习 We propose a novel formulation of the triplet objective function that improves metric learning without additional sample mining or overhead costs. Our approach aims to explicitly regularize the distance between the positive and negative samples in a triplet with respect to the anchor-negative distance. As an initial validation, we show that our method (called No Pairs Left Behind [NPLB]) improves upon the traditional and current state-of-the-art triplet objective formulations on standard benchmark datasets. To show the effectiveness and potentials of NPLB on real-world complex data, we evaluate our approach on a large-scale healthcare dataset (UK Biobank), demonstrating that the embeddings learned by our model significantly outperform all other current representations on tested downstream tasks. Additionally, we provide a new model-agnostic single-time health risk definition that, when used in tandem with the learned representations, achieves the most accurate prediction of subjects' future health complications. Our results indicate that NPLB is a simple, yet effective framework for improving existing deep metric learning models, showcasing the potential implications of metric learning in more complex applications, especially in the biological and healthcare domains. 我们提出了一种新颖的三元组目标函数公式，可以改进度量学习，而无需额外的样本挖掘或管理成本。我们的方法旨在明确地规范三元组中正样本和负样本之间相对于锚负距离的距离。作为初步验证，我们表明我们的方法（称为 No Pairs Left Behind [NPLB]）改进了标准基准数据集上的传统和当前最先进的三重目标公式。为了展示 NPLB 在现实世界复杂数据上的有效性和潜力，我们在大规模医疗数据集（英国生物银行）上评估了我们的方法，证明我们的模型学习的嵌入在测试的下游任务上显着优于所有其他当前表示。此外，我们提供了一种新的与模型无关的单次健康风险定义，当与学习到的表示结合使用时，可以实现对受试者未来健康并发症的最准确预测。我们的结果表明，NPLB 是一个简单而有效的框架，用于改进现有的深度度量学习模型，展示了度量学习在更复杂的应用程序中的潜在影响，特别是在生物和医疗保健领域。 本文提出一种无需额外样本挖掘的正则化三元组目标函数，以改进度量学习并提升模型性能。 A. Ali Heydari,Naghmeh Rezaei,Daniel J. McDuff,Javier L. Prieto cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Md Mahmudur Rahman,Mahta Mousavi,Peri Tarr,Mohammad Arif Ul Alam
title: Enabling Heterogeneous Domain Adaptation in Multi-inhabitants Smart Home Activity Learning
title_zh: 在多居民智能家居活动学习中实现异构域适应
abstract: Domain adaptation for sensor-based activity learning is of utmost importance in remote health monitoring research. However, many domain adaptation algorithms suffer with failure to operate adaptation in presence of target domain heterogeneity (which is always present in reality) and presence of multiple inhabitants dramatically hinders their generalizability producing unsatisfactory results for semi-supervised and unseen activity learning tasks. We propose \emph{AEDA}, a novel deep auto-encoder-based model to enable semi-supervised domain adaptation in the existence of target domain heterogeneity and how to incorporate it to empower heterogeneity to any homogeneous deep domain adaptation architecture for cross-domain activity learning. Experimental evaluation on 18 different heterogeneous and multi-inhabitants use-cases of 8 different domains created from 2 publicly available human activity datasets (wearable and ambient smart homes) shows that \emph{AEDA} outperforms (max. 12.8\% and 8.9\% improvements for ambient smart home and wearables) over existing domain adaptation techniques for both seen and unseen activity learning in a heterogeneous setting.
summary: Domain adaptation for sensor-based activity learning is of utmost importance in remote health monitoring research. However, many domain adaptation algorithms suffer with failure to operate adaptation in presence of target domain heterogeneity (which is always present in reality) and presence of multiple inhabitants dramatically hinders their generalizability producing unsatisfactory results for semi-supervised and unseen activity learning tasks. We propose \emph{AEDA}, a novel deep auto-encoder-based model to enable semi-supervised domain adaptation in the existence of target domain heterogeneity and how to incorporate it to empower heterogeneity to any homogeneous deep domain adaptation architecture for cross-domain activity learning. Experimental evaluation on 18 different heterogeneous and multi-inhabitants use-cases of 8 different domains created from 2 publicly available human activity datasets (wearable and ambient smart homes) shows that \emph{AEDA} outperforms (max. 12.8\% and 8.9\% improvements for ambient smart home and wearables) over existing domain adaptation techniques for both seen and unseen activity learning in a heterogeneous setting.
abstract_zh: 基于传感器的活动学习的领域适应在远程健康监测研究中至关重要。然而，许多域适应算法在存在目标域异质性（现实中始终存在）的情况下无法进行适应，并且多个居民的存在极大地阻碍了它们的泛化性，从而为半监督和看不见的活动学习任务产生了不令人满意的结果。我们提出了 \emph{AEDA}，一种新颖的基于深度自动编码器的模型，可以在存在目标域异质性的情况下实现半监督域适应，以及如何将其合并到任何同质深度域适应架构中以实现跨域活动学习的异质性。对从 2 个公开可用的人类活动数据集（可穿戴设备和环境智能家居）创建的 8 个不同领域的 18 个不同异构和多居民用例进行的实验评估表明，在异构环境中可见和不可见的活动学习方面，\emph{AEDA} 优于现有的域适应技术（环境智能家居和可穿戴设备的最大改进为 12.8\% 和 8.9\%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AEDA的深度自编码器模型，用于在存在目标域异质性和多居民的场景下实现半监督域适应，以提升跨域活动学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应算法在目标域异质性和多居民场景下表现不佳，导致半监督和未见过的活动学习任务结果不理想，亟需一种能处理异质性的新型域适应方法。
AI.method: 设计基于深度自编码器的AEDA模型，通过整合异质性特征到任意同质化域适应架构中，实现跨域活动学习的半监督域适应。
AI.result: 在8个领域共18个异质性和多居民场景的实验中，AEDA在环境智能家庭和可穿戴设备数据集上分别较现有方法提升12.8%和8.9%。
AI.conclusion: AEDA有效解决了域异质性和多居民带来的挑战，显著提升了跨域活动学习的泛化能力，为实际远程健康监测提供了更可靠的解决方案。

search_text: Enabling Heterogeneous Domain Adaptation in Multi-inhabitants Smart Home Activity Learning 在多居民智能家居活动学习中实现异构域适应 Domain adaptation for sensor-based activity learning is of utmost importance in remote health monitoring research. However, many domain adaptation algorithms suffer with failure to operate adaptation in presence of target domain heterogeneity (which is always present in reality) and presence of multiple inhabitants dramatically hinders their generalizability producing unsatisfactory results for semi-supervised and unseen activity learning tasks. We propose \emph{AEDA}, a novel deep auto-encoder-based model to enable semi-supervised domain adaptation in the existence of target domain heterogeneity and how to incorporate it to empower heterogeneity to any homogeneous deep domain adaptation architecture for cross-domain activity learning. Experimental evaluation on 18 different heterogeneous and multi-inhabitants use-cases of 8 different domains created from 2 publicly available human activity datasets (wearable and ambient smart homes) shows that \emph{AEDA} outperforms (max. 12.8\% and 8.9\% improvements for ambient smart home and wearables) over existing domain adaptation techniques for both seen and unseen activity learning in a heterogeneous setting. 基于传感器的活动学习的领域适应在远程健康监测研究中至关重要。然而，许多域适应算法在存在目标域异质性（现实中始终存在）的情况下无法进行适应，并且多个居民的存在极大地阻碍了它们的泛化性，从而为半监督和看不见的活动学习任务产生了不令人满意的结果。我们提出了 \emph{AEDA}，一种新颖的基于深度自动编码器的模型，可以在存在目标域异质性的情况下实现半监督域适应，以及如何将其合并到任何同质深度域适应架构中以实现跨域活动学习的异质性。对从 2 个公开可用的人类活动数据集（可穿戴设备和环境智能家居）创建的 8 个不同领域的 18 个不同异构和多居民用例进行的实验评估表明，在异构环境中可见和不可见的活动学习方面，\emph{AEDA} 优于现有的域适应技术（环境智能家居和可穿戴设备的最大改进为 12.8\% 和 8.9\%）。 本文提出了一种名为AEDA的深度自编码器模型，用于在存在目标域异质性和多居民的场景下实现半监督域适应，以提升跨域活动学习的性能。 Md Mahmudur Rahman,Mahta Mousavi,Peri Tarr,Mohammad Arif Ul Alam cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kai Yan,Alexander G. Schwing,Yu-Xiong Wang
title: CEIP: Combining Explicit and Implicit Priors for Reinforcement Learning with Demonstrations
title_zh: CEIP：将强化学习的显式和隐式先验与演示相结合
comment: 27 pages; published as NeurIPS 2022 poster paper
comments: 27 pages; published as NeurIPS 2022 poster paper
abstract: Although reinforcement learning has found widespread use in dense reward settings, training autonomous agents with sparse rewards remains challenging. To address this difficulty, prior work has shown promising results when using not only task-specific demonstrations but also task-agnostic albeit somewhat related demonstrations. In most cases, the available demonstrations are distilled into an implicit prior, commonly represented via a single deep net. Explicit priors in the form of a database that can be queried have also been shown to lead to encouraging results. To better benefit from available demonstrations, we develop a method to Combine Explicit and Implicit Priors (CEIP). CEIP exploits multiple implicit priors in the form of normalizing flows in parallel to form a single complex prior. Moreover, CEIP uses an effective explicit retrieval and push-forward mechanism to condition the implicit priors. In three challenging environments, we find the proposed CEIP method to improve upon sophisticated state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: Although reinforcement learning has found widespread use in dense reward settings, training autonomous agents with sparse rewards remains challenging. To address this difficulty, prior work has shown promising results when using not only task-specific demonstrations but also task-agnostic albeit somewhat related demonstrations. In most cases, the available demonstrations are distilled into an implicit prior, commonly represented via a single deep net. Explicit priors in the form of a database that can be queried have also been shown to lead to encouraging results. To better benefit from available demonstrations, we develop a method to Combine Explicit and Implicit Priors (CEIP). CEIP exploits multiple implicit priors in the form of normalizing flows in parallel to form a single complex prior. Moreover, CEIP uses an effective explicit retrieval and push-forward mechanism to condition the implicit priors. In three challenging environments, we find the proposed CEIP method to improve upon sophisticated state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 尽管强化学习已在密集奖励环境中得到广泛应用，但训练具有稀疏奖励的自主代理仍然具有挑战性。为了解决这个困难，先前的工作不仅使用特定于任务的演示，而且使用与任务无关的演示（尽管有些相关），都显示出了有希望的结果。在大多数情况下，可用的演示被提炼成隐式先验，通常通过单个深度网络表示。可以查询的数据库形式的显式先验也被证明可以带来令人鼓舞的结果。为了更好地从可用的演示中受益，我们开发了一种结合显式和隐式先验（CEIP）的方法。 CEIP 以并行标准化流的形式利用多个隐式先验来形成单个复杂先验。此外，CEIP 使用有效的显式检索和前推机制来调节隐式先验。在三个具有挑战性的环境中，我们发现所提出的 CEIP 方法可以改进复杂的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合显式和隐式先验的方法（CEIP），以改进稀疏奖励环境下的强化学习。
AI.motivation: 稀疏奖励环境下训练自主代理具有挑战性，现有方法仅利用任务相关或无关的演示数据，未能充分结合显式与隐式先验信息。
AI.method: CEIP通过并行的归一化流构建复杂隐式先验，并引入显式检索与推前机制，动态调节隐式先验条件。
AI.result: 在三个复杂环境中，CEIP方法优于现有的先进技术。
AI.conclusion: 结合显式与隐式先验能有效提升稀疏奖励场景下的强化学习性能。

authors_text: Noriaki Ota,Shingo Yokoi,Shinsuke Yamaoka
title: 5th Place Solution to Kaggle Google Universal Image Embedding Competition
title_zh: Kaggle Google 通用图像嵌入竞赛解决方案第五名
abstract: In this paper, we present our solution, which placed 5th in the kaggle Google Universal Image Embedding Competition in 2022. We use the ViT-H visual encoder of CLIP from the openclip repository as a backbone and train a head model composed of BatchNormalization and Linear layers using ArcFace. The dataset used was a subset of products10K, GLDv2, GPR1200, and Food101. And applying TTA for part of images also improves the score. With this method, we achieve a score of 0.684 on the public and 0.688 on the private leaderboard. Our code is available. https://github.com/riron1206/kaggle-Google-Universal-Image-Embedding-Competition-5th-Place-Solution
summary: In this paper, we present our solution, which placed 5th in the kaggle Google Universal Image Embedding Competition in 2022. We use the ViT-H visual encoder of CLIP from the openclip repository as a backbone and train a head model composed of BatchNormalization and Linear layers using ArcFace. The dataset used was a subset of products10K, GLDv2, GPR1200, and Food101. And applying TTA for part of images also improves the score. With this method, we achieve a score of 0.684 on the public and 0.688 on the private leaderboard. Our code is available. https://github.com/riron1206/kaggle-Google-Universal-Image-Embedding-Competition-5th-Place-Solution
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了我们的解决方案，该解决方案在 2022 年 kaggle 谷歌通用图像嵌入竞赛中排名第五。我们使用来自 openclip 存储库的 CLIP 的 ViT-H 视觉编码器作为主干，并使用 ArcFace 训练由 BatchNormalization 和 Linear 层组成的头部模型。使用的数据集是 products10K、GLDv2、GPR1200 和 Food101 的子集。并且对部分图像应用TTA也可以提高分数。通过这种方法，我们在公共排行榜上获得了 0.684 的分数，在私人排行榜上获得了 0.688 的分数。我们的代码可用。 https://github.com/riron1206/kaggle-Google-Universal-Image-Embedding-Competition-5th-Place-Solution

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在Kaggle Google通用图像嵌入竞赛中获得第五名的解决方案，主要任务是通过优化图像嵌入模型提升竞赛排名。
AI.motivation: 旨在探索更有效的图像嵌入方法，在竞赛中取得更高排名，通过结合先进视觉编码器与优化策略提升模型性能。
AI.method: 以CLIP的ViT-H作为视觉编码器骨干，使用ArcFace训练包含BatchNormalization和Linear层的头部模型，并结合TTA技术及多数据集（products10K、GLDv2、GPR1200、Food101）进行训练。
AI.result: 在公共测试集得分为0.684，私有测试集得分为0.688，最终获得竞赛第五名。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合预训练视觉编码器、ArcFace优化及TTA技术，有效提升了图像嵌入性能，验证了模型架构与数据增强策略的重要性。

The dataset used was a subset of products10K, GLDv2, GPR1200, and Food101. And applying TTA for part of images also improves the score. Our code is available. https://github.com/riron1206/kaggle-Google-Universal-Image-Embedding-Competition-5th-Place-Solution 在本文中，我们提出了我们的解决方案，该解决方案在 2022 年 kaggle 谷歌通用图像嵌入竞赛中排名第五。我们使用来自 openclip 存储库的 CLIP 的 ViT-H 视觉编码器作为主干，并使用 ArcFace 训练由 BatchNormalization 和 Linear 层组成的头部模型。使用的数据集是 products10K、GLDv2、GPR1200 和 Food101 的子集。并且对部分图像应用TTA也可以提高分数。通过这种方法，我们在公共排行榜上获得了 0.684 的分数，在私人排行榜上获得了 0.688 的分数。我们的代码可用。 https://github.com/riron1206/kaggle-Google-Universal-Image-Embedding-Competition-5th-Place-Solution 本文介绍了在Kaggle Google通用图像嵌入竞赛中获得第五名的解决方案，主要任务是通过优化图像嵌入模型提升竞赛排名。 Noriaki Ota,Shingo Yokoi,Shinsuke Yamaoka cs.CV

authors_text: Md Mahmudur Rahman,Rameswar Panda,Mohammad Arif Ul Alam
title: Semi-Supervised Domain Adaptation with Auto-Encoder via Simultaneous Learning
title_zh: 通过同时学习使用自动编码器进行半监督域适应
abstract: We present a new semi-supervised domain adaptation framework that combines a novel auto-encoder-based domain adaptation model with a simultaneous learning scheme providing stable improvements over state-of-the-art domain adaptation models. Our framework holds strong distribution matching property by training both source and target auto-encoders using a novel simultaneous learning scheme on a single graph with an optimally modified MMD loss objective function. Additionally, we design a semi-supervised classification approach by transferring the aligned domain invariant feature spaces from source domain to the target domain. We evaluate on three datasets and show proof that our framework can effectively solve both fragile convergence (adversarial) and weak distribution matching problems between source and target feature space (discrepancy) with a high `speed' of adaptation requiring a very low number of iterations.
summary: We present a new semi-supervised domain adaptation framework that combines a novel auto-encoder-based domain adaptation model with a simultaneous learning scheme providing stable improvements over state-of-the-art domain adaptation models. Our framework holds strong distribution matching property by training both source and target auto-encoders using a novel simultaneous learning scheme on a single graph with an optimally modified MMD loss objective function. Additionally, we design a semi-supervised classification approach by transferring the aligned domain invariant feature spaces from source domain to the target domain. We evaluate on three datasets and show proof that our framework can effectively solve both fragile convergence (adversarial) and weak distribution matching problems between source and target feature space (discrepancy) with a high `speed' of adaptation requiring a very low number of iterations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的半监督域适应框架，它将新颖的基于自动编码器的域适应模型与同步学习方案相结合，提供了对最先进域适应模型的稳定改进。我们的框架通过在单个图上使用新颖的同步学习方案和优化修改的 MMD 损失目标函数来训练源和目标自动编码器，从而保持强大的分布匹配特性。此外，我们通过将对齐的域不变特征空间从源域转移到目标域来设计半监督分类方法。我们对三个数据集进行评估，并证明我们的框架可以有效地解决源特征空间和目标特征空间之间的脆弱收敛（对抗性）和弱分布匹配问题（差异），并且具有需要非常低的迭代次数的高适应“速度”。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自编码器和同时学习的半监督域适应框架，解决源域与目标域间的分布差异及收敛问题。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应模型存在收敛不稳定和分布匹配不足的问题，需设计更稳健的框架提升适应效率。
AI.method: 通过改进的MMD损失函数在单一图上联合训练源域和目标域自编码器，并设计半监督分类方法实现特征空间对齐。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上验证框架能有效解决收敛与分布差异问题，适应速度快且所需迭代次数极少。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过同时学习机制和优化损失函数，显著提升了域适应的稳定性与效率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Darren Lyles,Patricia Gonzalez-Guerrero,Meriam Gay Bautista,George Michelogiannakis
title: PaST-NoC: A Packet-Switched Superconducting Temporal NoC
title_zh: PaST-NoC：分组交换超导临时 NoC
comment: 14 pages, 18 figures, 2 tables. In press in IEEE Transactions on Applied Superconductivity
comments: 14 pages, 18 figures, 2 tables. In press in IEEE Transactions on Applied Superconductivity
abstract: Temporal computing promises to mitigate the stringent area constraints and clock distribution overheads of traditional superconducting digital computing. To design a scalable, area- and power-efficient superconducting network on chip (NoC), we propose packet-switched superconducting temporal NoC (PaST-NoC). PaST-NoC operates its control path in the temporal domain using race logic (RL), combined with bufferless deflection flow control to minimize area. Packets encode their destination using RL and carry a collection of data pulses that the receiver can interpret as pulse trains, RL, serialized binary, or other formats. We demonstrate how to scale up PaST-NoC to arbitrary topologies based on 2x2 routers and 4x4 butterflies as building blocks. As we show, if data pulses are interpreted using RL, PaST-NoC outperforms state-of-the-art superconducting binary NoCs in throughput per area by as much as 5x for long packets.
summary: Temporal computing promises to mitigate the stringent area constraints and clock distribution overheads of traditional superconducting digital computing. To design a scalable, area- and power-efficient superconducting network on chip (NoC), we propose packet-switched superconducting temporal NoC (PaST-NoC). PaST-NoC operates its control path in the temporal domain using race logic (RL), combined with bufferless deflection flow control to minimize area. Packets encode their destination using RL and carry a collection of data pulses that the receiver can interpret as pulse trains, RL, serialized binary, or other formats. We demonstrate how to scale up PaST-NoC to arbitrary topologies based on 2x2 routers and 4x4 butterflies as building blocks. As we show, if data pulses are interpreted using RL, PaST-NoC outperforms state-of-the-art superconducting binary NoCs in throughput per area by as much as 5x for long packets.
abstract_zh: 时态计算有望减轻传统超导数字计算的严格面积限制和时钟分配开销。为了设计可扩展、面积和功率高效的片上超导网络 (NoC)，我们提出了分组交换超导临时 NoC (PaST-NoC)。 PaST-NoC 使用竞赛逻辑 (RL) 在时域中操作其控制路径，并结合无缓冲偏转流控制来最小化面积。数据包使用 RL 对其目的地进行编码，并携带一组数据脉冲，接收器可以将其解释为脉冲序列、RL、串行二进制或其他格式。我们演示了如何将 PaST-NoC 扩展到基于 2x2 路由器和 4x4 蝶式结构块的任意拓扑。正如我们所展示的，如果使用 RL 解释数据脉冲，对于长数据包，PaST-NoC 的单位面积吞吐量将优于最先进的超导二进制 NoC 多达 5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间计算的包交换超导网络芯片（PaST-NoC），旨在解决传统超导数字计算中的面积和时钟分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统超导数字计算面临严格的面积限制和时钟分配开销，亟需设计一种可扩展且高效能的超导网络芯片架构。
AI.method: 通过时间域中的竞争逻辑（RL）控制路径，结合无缓冲区的偏转流控制，利用2x2路由器和4x4蝶形结构构建可扩展拓扑。
AI.result: 当数据脉冲通过RL解析时，PaST-NoC在长包场景下单位面积吞吐量较现有超导二进制NoC提升高达5倍。
AI.conclusion: PaST-NoC为超导网络芯片提供了高能效、可扩展的解决方案，尤其适用于长包通信场景。

authors_text: Ramchander Rao Bhaskara,Manoranjan Majji
title: FPGA Hardware Acceleration for Feature-Based Relative Navigation Applications
title_zh: 用于基于特征的相对导航应用的 FPGA 硬件加速
comment: Proceedings of 2022 Astrodynamics Specialist Conference, Charlotte, USA
comments: Proceedings of 2022 Astrodynamics Specialist Conference, Charlotte, USA
abstract: Estimation of rigid transformation between two point clouds is a computationally challenging problem in vision-based relative navigation. Targeting a real-time navigation solution utilizing point-cloud and image registration algorithms, this paper develops high-performance avionics for power and resource constrained pose estimation framework. A Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) based embedded architecture is developed to accelerate estimation of relative pose between the point-clouds, aided by image features that correspond to the individual point sets. At algorithmic level, the pose estimation method is an adaptation of Optimal Linear Attitude and Translation Estimator (OLTAE) for relative attitude and translation estimation. At the architecture level, the proposed embedded solution is a hardware/software co-design that evaluates the OLTAE computations on the bare-metal hardware for high-speed state estimation. The finite precision FPGA evaluation of the OLTAE algorithm is compared with a double-precision evaluation on MATLAB for performance analysis and error quantification. Implementation results of the proposed finite-precision OLTAE accelerator demonstrate the high-performance compute capabilities of the FPGA-based pose estimation while offering relative numerical errors below 7%.
summary: Estimation of rigid transformation between two point clouds is a computationally challenging problem in vision-based relative navigation. Targeting a real-time navigation solution utilizing point-cloud and image registration algorithms, this paper develops high-performance avionics for power and resource constrained pose estimation framework. A Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) based embedded architecture is developed to accelerate estimation of relative pose between the point-clouds, aided by image features that correspond to the individual point sets. At algorithmic level, the pose estimation method is an adaptation of Optimal Linear Attitude and Translation Estimator (OLTAE) for relative attitude and translation estimation. At the architecture level, the proposed embedded solution is a hardware/software co-design that evaluates the OLTAE computations on the bare-metal hardware for high-speed state estimation. The finite precision FPGA evaluation of the OLTAE algorithm is compared with a double-precision evaluation on MATLAB for performance analysis and error quantification. Implementation results of the proposed finite-precision OLTAE accelerator demonstrate the high-performance compute capabilities of the FPGA-based pose estimation while offering relative numerical errors below 7%.
abstract_zh: 在基于视觉的相对导航中，两个点云之间的刚性变换的估计是一个计算上具有挑战性的问题。本文针对利用点云和图像配准算法的实时导航解决方案，开发了用于功率和资源受限姿态估计框架的高性能航空电子设备。开发了基于现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的嵌入式架构，以在与各个点集相对应的图像特征的帮助下加速点云之间相对位姿的估计。在算法层面，位姿估计方法是用于相对姿态和平移估计的最佳线性姿态和平移估计器（OLTAE）的改编。在架构层面，所提出的嵌入式解决方案是一种硬件/软件协同设计，可在裸机硬件上评估 OLTAE 计算以实现高速状态估计。将 OLTAE 算法的有限精度 FPGA 评估与 MATLAB 上的双精度评估进行比较，以进行性能分析和误差量化。所提出的有限精度 OLTAE 加速器的实现结果证明了基于 FPGA 的姿态估计的高性能计算能力，同时提供低于 7% 的相对数值误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于FPGA的嵌入式架构，用于加速基于特征的相对导航中的点云姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 基于视觉的相对导航中，两点云间刚性变换估计计算复杂度高，需在资源受限环境下实现实时解决方案。
AI.method: 算法层面改进OLTAE估计器，架构层面采用硬件/软件协同设计，在FPGA上实现有限精度计算并与MATLAB双精度结果对比。
AI.result: FPGA实现的OLTAE加速器在保持姿态估计数值误差低于7%的同时，展示了高性能计算能力。
AI.conclusion: FPGA硬件加速为资源受限环境下的实时相对导航提供了高效可行的解决方案。

search_text: FPGA Hardware Acceleration for Feature-Based Relative Navigation Applications 用于基于特征的相对导航应用的 FPGA 硬件加速 Estimation of rigid transformation between two point clouds is a computationally challenging problem in vision-based relative navigation. Targeting a real-time navigation solution utilizing point-cloud and image registration algorithms, this paper develops high-performance avionics for power and resource constrained pose estimation framework. A Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) based embedded architecture is developed to accelerate estimation of relative pose between the point-clouds, aided by image features that correspond to the individual point sets. At algorithmic level, the pose estimation method is an adaptation of Optimal Linear Attitude and Translation Estimator (OLTAE) for relative attitude and translation estimation. At the architecture level, the proposed embedded solution is a hardware/software co-design that evaluates the OLTAE computations on the bare-metal hardware for high-speed state estimation. The finite precision FPGA evaluation of the OLTAE algorithm is compared with a double-precision evaluation on MATLAB for performance analysis and error quantification. Implementation results of the proposed finite-precision OLTAE accelerator demonstrate the high-performance compute capabilities of the FPGA-based pose estimation while offering relative numerical errors below 7%. 在基于视觉的相对导航中，两个点云之间的刚性变换的估计是一个计算上具有挑战性的问题。本文针对利用点云和图像配准算法的实时导航解决方案，开发了用于功率和资源受限姿态估计框架的高性能航空电子设备。开发了基于现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的嵌入式架构，以在与各个点集相对应的图像特征的帮助下加速点云之间相对位姿的估计。在算法层面，位姿估计方法是用于相对姿态和平移估计的最佳线性姿态和平移估计器（OLTAE）的改编。在架构层面，所提出的嵌入式解决方案是一种硬件/软件协同设计，可在裸机硬件上评估 OLTAE 计算以实现高速状态估计。将 OLTAE 算法的有限精度 FPGA 评估与 MATLAB 上的双精度评估进行比较，以进行性能分析和误差量化。所提出的有限精度 OLTAE 加速器的实现结果证明了基于 FPGA 的姿态估计的高性能计算能力，同时提供低于 7% 的相对数值误差。 本文提出一种基于FPGA的嵌入式架构，用于加速基于特征的相对导航中的点云姿态估计。 Ramchander Rao Bhaskara,Manoranjan Majji cs.RO,cs.AR,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Dani Valevski,Matan Kalman,Eyal Molad,Eyal Segalis,Yossi Matias,Yaniv Leviathan
title: UniTune: Text-Driven Image Editing by Fine Tuning a Diffusion Model on a Single Image
title_zh: UniTune：通过在单个图像上微调扩散模型来进行文本驱动的图像编辑
abstract: Text-driven image generation methods have shown impressive results recently, allowing casual users to generate high quality images by providing textual descriptions. However, similar capabilities for editing existing images are still out of reach. Text-driven image editing methods usually need edit masks, struggle with edits that require significant visual changes and cannot easily keep specific details of the edited portion. In this paper we make the observation that image-generation models can be converted to image-editing models simply by fine-tuning them on a single image. We also show that initializing the stochastic sampler with a noised version of the base image before the sampling and interpolating relevant details from the base image after sampling further increase the quality of the edit operation. Combining these observations, we propose UniTune, a novel image editing method. UniTune gets as input an arbitrary image and a textual edit description, and carries out the edit while maintaining high fidelity to the input image. UniTune does not require additional inputs, like masks or sketches, and can perform multiple edits on the same image without retraining. We test our method using the Imagen model in a range of different use cases. We demonstrate that it is broadly applicable and can perform a surprisingly wide range of expressive editing operations, including those requiring significant visual changes that were previously impossible.
summary: Text-driven image generation methods have shown impressive results recently, allowing casual users to generate high quality images by providing textual descriptions. However, similar capabilities for editing existing images are still out of reach. Text-driven image editing methods usually need edit masks, struggle with edits that require significant visual changes and cannot easily keep specific details of the edited portion. In this paper we make the observation that image-generation models can be converted to image-editing models simply by fine-tuning them on a single image. We also show that initializing the stochastic sampler with a noised version of the base image before the sampling and interpolating relevant details from the base image after sampling further increase the quality of the edit operation. Combining these observations, we propose UniTune, a novel image editing method. UniTune gets as input an arbitrary image and a textual edit description, and carries out the edit while maintaining high fidelity to the input image. UniTune does not require additional inputs, like masks or sketches, and can perform multiple edits on the same image without retraining. We test our method using the Imagen model in a range of different use cases. We demonstrate that it is broadly applicable and can perform a surprisingly wide range of expressive editing operations, including those requiring significant visual changes that were previously impossible.
abstract_zh: 文本驱动的图像生成方法最近显示出令人印象深刻的结果，允许临时用户通过提供文本描述来生成高质量的图像。然而，编辑现有图像的类似功能仍然遥不可及。文本驱动的图像编辑方法通常需要编辑蒙版，难以处理需要显着视觉变化的编辑，并且无法轻松保留编辑部分的具体细节。在本文中，我们观察到，只需在单个图像上进行微调，图像生成模型就可以转换为图像编辑模型。我们还表明，在采样之前使用基础图像的噪声版本初始化随机采样器，并在采样后从基础图像中插入相关细节，可以进一步提高编辑操作的质量。结合这些观察结果，我们提出了 UniTune，一种新颖的图像编辑方法。 UniTune 获取任意图像和文本编辑描述作为输入，并在保持输入图像高保真度的同时进行编辑。 UniTune 不需要额外的输入，例如蒙版或草图，并且可以在同一图像上执行多次编辑，而无需重新训练。我们使用 Imagen 模型在一系列不同的用例中测试我们的方法。我们证明它具有广泛的适用性，并且可以执行令人惊讶的广泛表达编辑操作，包括那些需要以前不可能的重大视觉变化的操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单图像微调扩散模型的文本驱动图像编辑方法UniTune，无需额外输入即可实现高质量编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有文本驱动图像编辑方法依赖编辑掩码、难以处理显著视觉变化且无法保留细节，亟需一种无需掩码且能处理复杂编辑的方案。
AI.method: 通过在单张图像上微调扩散模型，结合采样前的噪声基图像初始化和采样后的细节插值技术，实现文本描述引导的图像编辑。
AI.result: UniTune在多种场景下验证了其广泛适用性，可执行包括显著视觉变化在内的复杂编辑操作，且无需掩码或重新训练。
AI.conclusion: UniTune通过创新性微调策略和细节保留机制，为文本驱动图像编辑提供了无需掩码、支持多轮编辑的新范式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单图像微调扩散模型的文本驱动图像编辑方法UniTune，无需额外输入即可实现高质量编辑。

authors_text: Seongmin Park,Dongchan Shin,Jihwa Lee
title: Leveraging Non-dialogue Summaries for Dialogue Summarization
title_zh: 利用非对话摘要进行对话摘要
abstract: To mitigate the lack of diverse dialogue summarization datasets in academia, we present methods to utilize non-dialogue summarization data for enhancing dialogue summarization systems. We apply transformations to document summarization data pairs to create training data that better befit dialogue summarization. The suggested transformations also retain desirable properties of non-dialogue datasets, such as improved faithfulness to the source text. We conduct extensive experiments across both English and Korean to verify our approach. Although absolute gains in ROUGE naturally plateau as more dialogue summarization samples are introduced, utilizing non-dialogue data for training significantly improves summarization performance in zero- and few-shot settings and enhances faithfulness across all training regimes.
summary: To mitigate the lack of diverse dialogue summarization datasets in academia, we present methods to utilize non-dialogue summarization data for enhancing dialogue summarization systems. We apply transformations to document summarization data pairs to create training data that better befit dialogue summarization. The suggested transformations also retain desirable properties of non-dialogue datasets, such as improved faithfulness to the source text. We conduct extensive experiments across both English and Korean to verify our approach. Although absolute gains in ROUGE naturally plateau as more dialogue summarization samples are introduced, utilizing non-dialogue data for training significantly improves summarization performance in zero- and few-shot settings and enhances faithfulness across all training regimes.
abstract_zh: 为了缓解学术界缺乏多样化对话摘要数据集的问题，我们提出了利用非对话摘要数据来增强对话摘要系统的方法。我们将转换应用于文档摘要数据对，以创建更适合对话摘要的训练数据。建议的转换还保留了非对话数据集的理想属性，例如提高对源文本的忠实度。我们在英语和韩语方面进行了广泛的实验来验证我们的方法。尽管随着引入更多对话摘要样本，ROUGE 的绝对增益自然会趋于稳定，但利用非对话数据进行训练可显着提高零镜头和少镜头设置中的摘要性能，并增强所有训练方案的忠实度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用非对话摘要数据（如文档摘要）来增强对话摘要系统，通过数据转换方法生成适配对话场景的训练数据。
AI.motivation: 学术界缺乏多样化的对话摘要数据集，而现有非对话摘要数据（如新闻文档）具有丰富的文本结构和忠实性特征，可作为补充资源。
AI.method: 对文档摘要数据对进行结构化转换，包括对话化改写和上下文重构，同时保留原文忠实性等关键属性，生成适配对话场景的训练样本。
AI.result: 在英韩双语实验中，使用非对话数据训练的模型在零样本和少样本场景下ROUGE指标显著提升，且在所有训练条件下文本忠实度均优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 非对话摘要数据通过合理转换可有效提升对话摘要性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下能显著增强模型的泛化能力和内容忠实度。

The suggested transformations also retain desirable properties of non-dialogue datasets, such as improved faithfulness to the source text. We conduct extensive experiments across both English and Korean to verify our approach. Although absolute gains in ROUGE naturally plateau as more dialogue summarization samples are introduced, utilizing non-dialogue data for training significantly improves summarization performance in zero- and few-shot settings and enhances faithfulness across all training regimes. 为了缓解学术界缺乏多样化对话摘要数据集的问题，我们提出了利用非对话摘要数据来增强对话摘要系统的方法。我们将转换应用于文档摘要数据对，以创建更适合对话摘要的训练数据。建议的转换还保留了非对话数据集的理想属性，例如提高对源文本的忠实度。我们在英语和韩语方面进行了广泛的实验来验证我们的方法。尽管随着引入更多对话摘要样本，ROUGE 的绝对增益自然会趋于稳定，但利用非对话数据进行训练可显着提高零镜头和少镜头设置中的摘要性能，并增强所有训练方案的忠实度。 本文提出利用非对话摘要数据（如文档摘要）来增强对话摘要系统，通过数据转换方法生成适配对话场景的训练数据。 Seongmin Park,Dongchan Shin,Jihwa Lee cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Sreehari Sankar,Zhihang Dong
title: Adversarial and Safely Scaled Question Generation
title_zh: 对抗性和安全扩展的问题生成
abstract: Question generation has recently gained a lot of research interest, especially with the advent of large language models. In and of itself, question generation can be considered 'AI-hard', as there is a lack of unanimously agreed sense of what makes a question 'good' or 'bad'. In this paper, we tackle two fundamental problems in parallel: on one hand, we try to solve the scaling problem, where question-generation and answering applications have to be applied to a massive amount of text without ground truth labeling. The usual approach to solve this problem is to either downsample or summarize. However, there are critical risks of misinformation with these approaches. On the other hand, and related to the misinformation problem, we try to solve the 'safety' problem, as many public institutions rely on a much higher level of accuracy for the content they provide. We introduce an adversarial approach to tackle the question generation safety problem with scale. Specifically, we designed a question-answering system that specifically prunes out unanswerable questions that may be generated, and further increases the quality of the answers that are generated. We build a production-ready, easily-plugged pipeline that can be used on any given body of text, that is scalable and immune from generating any hate speech, profanity, or misinformation. Based on the results, we are able to generate more than six times the number of quality questions generated by the abstractive approach, with a perceived quality being 44% higher, according to a survey of 168 participants.
summary: Question generation has recently gained a lot of research interest, especially with the advent of large language models. In and of itself, question generation can be considered 'AI-hard', as there is a lack of unanimously agreed sense of what makes a question 'good' or 'bad'. In this paper, we tackle two fundamental problems in parallel: on one hand, we try to solve the scaling problem, where question-generation and answering applications have to be applied to a massive amount of text without ground truth labeling. The usual approach to solve this problem is to either downsample or summarize. However, there are critical risks of misinformation with these approaches. On the other hand, and related to the misinformation problem, we try to solve the 'safety' problem, as many public institutions rely on a much higher level of accuracy for the content they provide. We introduce an adversarial approach to tackle the question generation safety problem with scale. Specifically, we designed a question-answering system that specifically prunes out unanswerable questions that may be generated, and further increases the quality of the answers that are generated. We build a production-ready, easily-plugged pipeline that can be used on any given body of text, that is scalable and immune from generating any hate speech, profanity, or misinformation. Based on the results, we are able to generate more than six times the number of quality questions generated by the abstractive approach, with a perceived quality being 44% higher, according to a survey of 168 participants.
abstract_zh: 问题生成最近引起了很多研究兴趣，特别是随着大型语言模型的出现。就其本身而言，问题生成可以被认为是“人工智能难题”，因为对于问题“好”或“坏”的原因缺乏一致认可的认识。在本文中，我们并行解决两个基本问题：一方面，我们尝试解决扩展问题，其中问题生成和回答应用程序必须应用于没有真实标签的大量文本。解决这个问题的通常方法是下采样或汇总。然而，这些方法存在错误信息的严重风险。另一方面，与错误信息问题相关，我们试图解决“安全”问题，因为许多公共机构所提供的内容都依赖于更高水平的准确性。我们引入了一种对抗性方法来大规模解决问题生成安全问题。具体来说，我们设计了一个问答系统，专门修剪掉可能生成的无法回答的问题，并进一步提高生成的答案的质量。我们构建了一个可用于生产的、易于插入的管道，可用于任何给定的文本正文，该管道可扩展且不会生成任何仇恨言论、脏话或错误信息。根据对 168 名参与者的调查，基于结果，我们生成的质量问题数量是抽象方法的六倍多，感知质量高出 44%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性且安全扩展的问题生成方法，解决大规模文本处理中的信息错误风险及内容安全性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有问题生成方法在处理海量文本时存在信息错误风险，且公共机构对内容准确性要求更高，需同时解决扩展性与安全性问题。
AI.method: 设计对抗性问答系统，过滤不可答问题并提升答案质量，构建可扩展的生产级管道，防止生成仇恨言论、粗俗内容或错误信息。
AI.result: 生成的问题数量为抽象方法的6倍，感知质量提升44%（基于168名参与者的调查）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了大规模文本处理的扩展性与安全性，生成高质量问题并适用于任意文本场景。

authors_text: Mohammad Farazi,Wenhui Zhu,Zhangsihao Yang,Yalin Wang
title: Anisotropic Multi-Scale Graph Convolutional Network for Dense Shape Correspondence
title_zh: 用于密集形状对应的各向异性多尺度图卷积网络
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables. Accepted as a conference paper to WACV2023
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables. Accepted as a conference paper to WACV2023
abstract: This paper studies 3D dense shape correspondence, a key shape analysis application in computer vision and graphics. We introduce a novel hybrid geometric deep learning-based model that learns geometrically meaningful and discretization-independent features with a U-Net model as the primary node feature extraction module, followed by a successive spectral-based graph convolutional network. To create a diverse set of filters, we use anisotropic wavelet basis filters, being sensitive to both different directions and band-passes. This filter set overcomes the over-smoothing behavior of conventional graph neural networks. To further improve the model's performance, we add a function that perturbs the feature maps in the last layer ahead of fully connected layers, forcing the network to learn more discriminative features overall. The resulting correspondence maps show state-of-the-art performance on the benchmark datasets based on average geodesic errors and superior robustness to discretization in 3D meshes. Our approach provides new insights and practical solutions to the dense shape correspondence research.
summary: This paper studies 3D dense shape correspondence, a key shape analysis application in computer vision and graphics. We introduce a novel hybrid geometric deep learning-based model that learns geometrically meaningful and discretization-independent features with a U-Net model as the primary node feature extraction module, followed by a successive spectral-based graph convolutional network. To create a diverse set of filters, we use anisotropic wavelet basis filters, being sensitive to both different directions and band-passes. This filter set overcomes the over-smoothing behavior of conventional graph neural networks. To further improve the model's performance, we add a function that perturbs the feature maps in the last layer ahead of fully connected layers, forcing the network to learn more discriminative features overall. The resulting correspondence maps show state-of-the-art performance on the benchmark datasets based on average geodesic errors and superior robustness to discretization in 3D meshes. Our approach provides new insights and practical solutions to the dense shape correspondence research.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了 3D 密集形状对应，这是计算机视觉和图形学中的关键形状分析应用。我们引入了一种新颖的基于混合几何深度学习的模型，该模型以 U-Net 模型作为主要节点特征提取模块，然后是连续的基于谱的图卷积网络，学习几何有意义且与离散化无关的特征。为了创建一组多样化的滤波器，我们使用各向异性小波基滤波器，对不同方向和带通都敏感。该滤波器组克服了传统图神经网络的过度平滑行为。为了进一步提高模型的性能，我们添加了一个函数，该函数会扰乱全连接层之前最后一层的特征图，迫使网络整体上学习更多的判别特征。生成的对应图显示了基于平均测地误差的基准数据集的最先进性能以及对 3D 网格离散化的卓越鲁棒性。我们的方法为密集形状对应研究提供了新的见解和实用的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种各向异性多尺度图卷积网络，用于解决3D密集形状对应问题，旨在提升形状分析的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络在处理3D形状对应时存在过平滑问题且对离散化敏感，需更有效的几何特征学习方法。
AI.method: 结合U-Net提取节点特征，采用谱图卷积网络与各向异性小波滤波器增强方向性和频带选择性，并通过扰动函数提升特征判别性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上达到最先进水平，平均测地误差更低且对3D网格离散化具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过几何感知的多尺度特征学习为密集形状对应研究提供了新思路和实用方案。

We introduce a novel hybrid geometric deep learning-based model that learns geometrically meaningful and discretization-independent features with a U-Net model as the primary node feature extraction module, followed by a successive spectral-based graph convolutional network. To create a diverse set of filters, we use anisotropic wavelet basis filters, being sensitive to both different directions and band-passes. authors_text: Damien Dablain,Kristen N. Jacobson,Colin Bellinger,Mark Roberts,Nitesh Chawla
title: Understanding CNN Fragility When Learning With Imbalanced Data
title_zh: 了解 CNN 在学习不平衡数据时的脆弱性
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved impressive results on imbalanced image data, but they still have difficulty generalizing to minority classes and their decisions are difficult to interpret. These problems are related because the method by which CNNs generalize to minority classes, which requires improvement, is wrapped in a blackbox. To demystify CNN decisions on imbalanced data, we focus on their latent features. Although CNNs embed the pattern knowledge learned from a training set in model parameters, the effect of this knowledge is contained in feature and classification embeddings (FE and CE). These embeddings can be extracted from a trained model and their global, class properties (e.g., frequency, magnitude and identity) can be analyzed. We find that important information regarding the ability of a neural network to generalize to minority classes resides in the class top-K CE and FE. We show that a CNN learns a limited number of class top-K CE per category, and that their number and magnitudes vary based on whether the same class is balanced or imbalanced. This calls into question whether a CNN has learned intrinsic class features, or merely frequently occurring ones that happen to exist in the sampled class distribution. We also hypothesize that latent class diversity is as important as the number of class examples, which has important implications for re-sampling and cost-sensitive methods. These methods generally focus on rebalancing model weights, class numbers and margins; instead of diversifying class latent features through augmentation. We also demonstrate that a CNN has difficulty generalizing to test data if the magnitude of its top-K latent features do not match the training set. We use three popular image datasets and two cost-sensitive algorithms commonly employed in imbalanced learning for our experiments.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved impressive results on imbalanced image data, but they still have difficulty generalizing to minority classes and their decisions are difficult to interpret. These problems are related because the method by which CNNs generalize to minority classes, which requires improvement, is wrapped in a blackbox. To demystify CNN decisions on imbalanced data, we focus on their latent features. Although CNNs embed the pattern knowledge learned from a training set in model parameters, the effect of this knowledge is contained in feature and classification embeddings (FE and CE). These embeddings can be extracted from a trained model and their global, class properties (e.g., frequency, magnitude and identity) can be analyzed. We find that important information regarding the ability of a neural network to generalize to minority classes resides in the class top-K CE and FE. We show that a CNN learns a limited number of class top-K CE per category, and that their number and magnitudes vary based on whether the same class is balanced or imbalanced. This calls into question whether a CNN has learned intrinsic class features, or merely frequently occurring ones that happen to exist in the sampled class distribution. We also hypothesize that latent class diversity is as important as the number of class examples, which has important implications for re-sampling and cost-sensitive methods. These methods generally focus on rebalancing model weights, class numbers and margins; instead of diversifying class latent features through augmentation. We also demonstrate that a CNN has difficulty generalizing to test data if the magnitude of its top-K latent features do not match the training set. We use three popular image datasets and two cost-sensitive algorithms commonly employed in imbalanced learning for our experiments.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在不平衡图像数据上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但它们仍然难以推广到少数类别，并且它们的决策也难以解释。这些问题是相关的，因为 CNN 泛化到少数类别的方法需要改进，但被封装在黑匣子中。为了揭开 CNN 对不平衡数据决策的神秘面纱，我们重点关注它们的潜在特征。尽管 CNN 将从模型参数中的训练集中学习到的模式知识嵌入到模型参数中，但该知识的效果包含在特征和分类嵌入（FE 和 CE）中。这些嵌入可以从经过训练的模型中提取，并且可以分析它们的全局类属性（例如频率、幅度和身份）。我们发现有关神经网络泛化到少数类的能力的重要信息位于类 top-K CE 和 FE 中。我们表明，CNN 在每个类别中学习有限数量的类 top-K CE，并且它们的数量和大小根据同一类是平衡还是不平衡而变化。这就让人质疑 CNN 是否已经学习了内在的类特征，或者仅仅是采样类分布中碰巧存在的频繁出现的特征。我们还假设潜在类别多样性与类别示例的数量一样重要，这对重采样和成本敏感方法具有重要影响。这些方法通常侧重于重新平衡模型权重、类别数量和边际；而不是通过增强来多样化类别潜在特征。我们还证明，如果 CNN 的前 K 个潜在特征的大小与训练集不匹配，则它很难泛化到测试数据。我们使用三个流行的图像数据集和两种在不平衡学习中常用的成本敏感算法进行实验。

AI.tldr: 本文研究卷积神经网络（CNN）在处理不平衡数据时的脆弱性，通过分析其潜在特征（FE）和分类嵌入（CE）来揭示其泛化能力不足的原因。
AI.motivation: CNN在不平衡数据上对少数类泛化能力差且决策不可解释，现有方法未能解决其潜在特征学习机制的问题，需深入分析FE和CE以改进模型。
AI.method: 从训练好的CNN中提取FE和CE，分析其全局和类别特性的频率、幅度及身份，对比平衡与不平衡数据集的差异，并验证特征幅度不匹配对测试数据泛化的影响。
AI.result: 发现少数类的泛化能力与top-K CE/FE的数量和幅度相关，CNN可能仅学习高频特征而非本质特征；特征幅度与训练集不匹配时泛化性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 潜在特征多样性比样本数量更重要，现有重采样方法应转向增强特征多样性，而非仅调整类别权重或样本数量。

search_text: Understanding CNN Fragility When Learning With Imbalanced Data 了解 CNN 在学习不平衡数据时的脆弱性 Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved impressive results on imbalanced image data, but they still have difficulty generalizing to minority classes and their decisions are difficult to interpret. These problems are related because the method by which CNNs generalize to minority classes, which requires improvement, is wrapped in a blackbox. To demystify CNN decisions on imbalanced data, we focus on their latent features. Although CNNs embed the pattern knowledge learned from a training set in model parameters, the effect of this knowledge is contained in feature and classification embeddings (FE and CE). These embeddings can be extracted from a trained model and their global, class properties (e.g., frequency, magnitude and identity) can be analyzed. We find that important information regarding the ability of a neural network to generalize to minority classes resides in the class top-K CE and FE. We show that a CNN learns a limited number of class top-K CE per category, and that their number and magnitudes vary based on whether the same class is balanced or imbalanced. This calls into question whether a CNN has learned intrinsic class features, or merely frequently occurring ones that happen to exist in the sampled class distribution. We also hypothesize that latent class diversity is as important as the number of class examples, which has important implications for re-sampling and cost-sensitive methods. These methods generally focus on rebalancing model weights, class numbers and margins; instead of diversifying class latent features through augmentation. We also demonstrate that a CNN has difficulty generalizing to test data if the magnitude of its top-K latent features do not match the training set. We use three popular image datasets and two cost-sensitive algorithms commonly employed in imbalanced learning for our experiments. 卷积神经网络（CNN）在不平衡图像数据上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但它们仍然难以推广到少数类别，并且它们的决策也难以解释。这些问题是相关的，因为 CNN 泛化到少数类别的方法需要改进，但被封装在黑匣子中。为了揭开 CNN 对不平衡数据决策的神秘面纱，我们重点关注它们的潜在特征。尽管 CNN 将从模型参数中的训练集中学习到的模式知识嵌入到模型参数中，但该知识的效果包含在特征和分类嵌入（FE 和 CE）中。这些嵌入可以从经过训练的模型中提取，并且可以分析它们的全局类属性（例如频率、幅度和身份）。我们发现有关神经网络泛化到少数类的能力的重要信息位于类 top-K CE 和 FE 中。我们表明，CNN 在每个类别中学习有限数量的类 top-K CE，并且它们的数量和大小根据同一类是平衡还是不平衡而变化。这就让人质疑 CNN 是否已经学习了内在的类特征，或者仅仅是采样类分布中碰巧存在的频繁出现的特征。我们还假设潜在类别多样性与类别示例的数量一样重要，这对重采样和成本敏感方法具有重要影响。这些方法通常侧重于重新平衡模型权重、类别数量和边际；而不是通过增强来多样化类别潜在特征。我们还证明，如果 CNN 的前 K 个潜在特征的大小与训练集不匹配，则它很难泛化到测试数据。我们使用三个流行的图像数据集和两种在不平衡学习中常用的成本敏感算法进行实验。 本文研究卷积神经网络（CNN）在处理不平衡数据时的脆弱性，通过分析其潜在特征（FE）和分类嵌入（CE）来揭示其泛化能力不足的原因。 Damien Dablain,Kristen N. Jacobson,Colin Bellinger,Mark Roberts,Nitesh Chawla cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhan Xu,Yang Zhou,Li Yi,Evangelos Kalogerakis
title: Morig: Motion-aware rigging of character meshes from point clouds
title_zh: Morig：从点云对角色网格进行运动感知绑定
abstract: We present MoRig, a method that automatically rigs character meshes driven by single-view point cloud streams capturing the motion of performing characters. Our method is also able to animate the 3D meshes according to the captured point cloud motion. MoRig's neural network encodes motion cues from the point clouds into features that are informative about the articulated parts of the performing character. These motion-aware features guide the inference of an appropriate skeletal rig for the input mesh, which is then animated based on the point cloud motion. Our method can rig and animate diverse characters, including humanoids, quadrupeds, and toys with varying articulation. It accounts for occluded regions in the point clouds and mismatches in the part proportions between the input mesh and captured character. Compared to other rigging approaches that ignore motion cues, MoRig produces more accurate rigs, well-suited for re-targeting motion from captured characters.
summary: We present MoRig, a method that automatically rigs character meshes driven by single-view point cloud streams capturing the motion of performing characters. Our method is also able to animate the 3D meshes according to the captured point cloud motion. MoRig's neural network encodes motion cues from the point clouds into features that are informative about the articulated parts of the performing character. These motion-aware features guide the inference of an appropriate skeletal rig for the input mesh, which is then animated based on the point cloud motion. Our method can rig and animate diverse characters, including humanoids, quadrupeds, and toys with varying articulation. It accounts for occluded regions in the point clouds and mismatches in the part proportions between the input mesh and captured character. Compared to other rigging approaches that ignore motion cues, MoRig produces more accurate rigs, well-suited for re-targeting motion from captured characters.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MoRig，一种自动装配角色网格的方法，该方法由捕获表演角色运动的单视点云流驱动。我们的方法还能够根据捕获的点云运动对 3D 网格进行动画处理。 MoRig 的神经网络将点云中的运动线索编码为可提供有关表演角色的关节部分信息的特征。这些运动感知功能指导输入网格推断适当的骨骼装备，然后根据点云运动进行动画处理。我们的方法可以对不同的角色进行装配和动画处理，包括人形机器人、四足动物和具有不同关节的玩具。它考虑了点云中的遮挡区域以及输入网格和捕获字符之间的部分比例不匹配。与其他忽略运动提示的绑定方法相比，MoRig 可以生成更精确的绑定，非常适合从捕获的角色重新定位运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoRig方法，通过单视角点云流自动为角色网格生成骨骼绑定并实现动画化。
AI.motivation: 传统角色绑定方法难以处理动态捕捉数据中的遮挡和比例差异，且缺乏对运动信息的利用，导致绑定效果不佳。
AI.method: 采用神经网络从点云中提取运动特征，识别角色关节部位并生成骨骼绑定结构，结合点云运动数据驱动网格动画。
AI.result: 成功处理人形、四足动物和玩具等多样化角色，有效应对点云遮挡和网格与捕捉对象比例不匹配问题，绑定精度优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于运动感知的绑定方法能显著提升角色动画的准确性，为动态捕捉数据的重定向应用提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Daniel Bolya,Cheng-Yang Fu,Xiaoliang Dai,Peizhao Zhang,Christoph Feichtenhofer,Judy Hoffman
title: Token Merging: Your ViT But Faster
title_zh: 代币合并：您的 ViT，但速度更快
comment: Accepted ICLR 2023 Oral (top 5%) [final v2]. This version includes stable diffusion experiments. See code at https://github.com/facebookresearch/ToMe
comments: Accepted ICLR 2023 Oral (top 5%) [final v2]. This version includes stable diffusion experiments. See code at https://github.com/facebookresearch/ToMe
abstract: We introduce Token Merging (ToMe), a simple method to increase the throughput of existing ViT models without needing to train. ToMe gradually combines similar tokens in a transformer using a general and light-weight matching algorithm that is as fast as pruning while being more accurate. Off-the-shelf, ToMe can 2x the throughput of state-of-the-art ViT-L @ 512 and ViT-H @ 518 models on images and 2.2x the throughput of ViT-L on video with only a 0.2-0.3% accuracy drop in each case. ToMe can also easily be applied during training, improving in practice training speed up to 2x for MAE fine-tuning on video. Training with ToMe further minimizes accuracy drop, leading to 2x the throughput of ViT-B on audio for only a 0.4% mAP drop. Qualitatively, we find that ToMe merges object parts into one token, even over multiple frames of video. Overall, ToMe's accuracy and speed are competitive with state-of-the-art on images, video, and audio.
summary: We introduce Token Merging (ToMe), a simple method to increase the throughput of existing ViT models without needing to train. ToMe gradually combines similar tokens in a transformer using a general and light-weight matching algorithm that is as fast as pruning while being more accurate. Off-the-shelf, ToMe can 2x the throughput of state-of-the-art ViT-L @ 512 and ViT-H @ 518 models on images and 2.2x the throughput of ViT-L on video with only a 0.2-0.3% accuracy drop in each case. ToMe can also easily be applied during training, improving in practice training speed up to 2x for MAE fine-tuning on video. Training with ToMe further minimizes accuracy drop, leading to 2x the throughput of ViT-B on audio for only a 0.4% mAP drop. Qualitatively, we find that ToMe merges object parts into one token, even over multiple frames of video. Overall, ToMe's accuracy and speed are competitive with state-of-the-art on images, video, and audio.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了令牌合并（ToMe），这是一种无需训练即可提高现有 ViT 模型吞吐量的简单方法。 ToMe 使用通用且轻量级的匹配算法逐渐将类似的标记组合在变压器中，该算法与修剪一样快，同时更准确。现成的 ToMe 可以将图像上最先进的 ViT-L @ 512 和 ViT-H @ 518 模型的吞吐量提高 2 倍，将视频上 ViT-L 的吞吐量提高 2.2 倍，而每种情况下的准确度仅下降 0.2-0.3%。 ToMe 还可以在训练期间轻松应用，将视频 MAE 微调的实践训练速度提高高达 2 倍。使用 ToMe 进行训练进一步最大限度地减少了准确性下降，使 ViT-B 的音频吞吐量提高了 2 倍，而 mAP 仅下降了 0.4%。定性地，我们发现 ToMe 将对象部分合并为一个标记，甚至在视频的多个帧上也是如此。总体而言，ToMe 的准确性和速度在图像、视频和音频方面可与最先进的技术相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Token Merging（ToMe）的方法，通过合并相似token来加速视觉Transformer（ViT）模型的推理和训练过程。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT模型在处理高分辨率图像和视频时计算量大、速度慢，而传统剪枝方法精度损失较高。ToMe旨在无需重新训练即可提升ViT吞吐量，同时保持较高准确率。
AI.method: 采用轻量级匹配算法动态合并相似token，该算法在推理和训练阶段均可应用，通过将物体部件跨帧合并为单个token实现计算优化。
AI.result: 在图像任务中ViT-L/H吞吐量提升2倍（仅损失0.2-0.3%精度），视频任务提升2.2倍，音频任务ViT-B吞吐量提升2倍（mAP下降0.4%），且训练速度提升达2倍。
AI.conclusion: ToMe在保持模型精度的前提下显著提升ViT模型的推理和训练效率，在图像、视频、音频任务中均表现出与现有最优方法相当的性能。

search_text: Token Merging: Your ViT But Faster 代币合并：您的 ViT，但速度更快 We introduce Token Merging (ToMe), a simple method to increase the throughput of existing ViT models without needing to train. ToMe gradually combines similar tokens in a transformer using a general and light-weight matching algorithm that is as fast as pruning while being more accurate. Off-the-shelf, ToMe can 2x the throughput of state-of-the-art ViT-L @ 512 and ViT-H @ 518 models on images and 2.2x the throughput of ViT-L on video with only a 0.2-0.3% accuracy drop in each case. ToMe can also easily be applied during training, improving in practice training speed up to 2x for MAE fine-tuning on video. Training with ToMe further minimizes accuracy drop, leading to 2x the throughput of ViT-B on audio for only a 0.4% mAP drop. Qualitatively, we find that ToMe merges object parts into one token, even over multiple frames of video. Overall, ToMe's accuracy and speed are competitive with state-of-the-art on images, video, and audio. 我们引入了令牌合并（ToMe），这是一种无需训练即可提高现有 ViT 模型吞吐量的简单方法。 ToMe 使用通用且轻量级的匹配算法逐渐将类似的标记组合在变压器中，该算法与修剪一样快，同时更准确。现成的 ToMe 可以将图像上最先进的 ViT-L @ 512 和 ViT-H @ 518 模型的吞吐量提高 2 倍，将视频上 ViT-L 的吞吐量提高 2.2 倍，而每种情况下的准确度仅下降 0.2-0.3%。 ToMe 还可以在训练期间轻松应用，将视频 MAE 微调的实践训练速度提高高达 2 倍。使用 ToMe 进行训练进一步最大限度地减少了准确性下降，使 ViT-B 的音频吞吐量提高了 2 倍，而 mAP 仅下降了 0.4%。定性地，我们发现 ToMe 将对象部分合并为一个标记，甚至在视频的多个帧上也是如此。总体而言，ToMe 的准确性和速度在图像、视频和音频方面可与最先进的技术相媲美。 本文提出了一种名为Token Merging（ToMe）的方法，通过合并相似token来加速视觉Transformer（ViT）模型的推理和训练过程。 Daniel Bolya,Cheng-Yang Fu,Xiaoliang Dai,Peizhao Zhang,Christoph Feichtenhofer,Judy Hoffman cs.CV

authors_text: Yuhong Li,Jiajie Li,Cong Han,Pan Li,Jinjun Xiong,Deming Chen
title: Extensible Proxy for Efficient NAS
title_zh: 高效 NAS 的可扩展代理
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has become a de facto approach in the recent trend of AutoML to design deep neural networks (DNNs). Efficient or near-zero-cost NAS proxies are further proposed to address the demanding computational issues of NAS, where each candidate architecture network only requires one iteration of backpropagation. The values obtained from the proxies are considered the predictions of architecture performance on downstream tasks. However, two significant drawbacks hinder the extended usage of Efficient NAS proxies. (1) Efficient proxies are not adaptive to various search spaces. (2) Efficient proxies are not extensible to multi-modality downstream tasks. Based on the observations, we design a Extensible proxy (Eproxy) that utilizes self-supervised, few-shot training (i.e., 10 iterations of backpropagation) which yields near-zero costs. The key component that makes Eproxy efficient is an untrainable convolution layer termed barrier layer that add the non-linearities to the optimization spaces so that the Eproxy can discriminate the performance of architectures in the early stage. Furthermore, to make Eproxy adaptive to different downstream tasks/search spaces, we propose a Discrete Proxy Search (DPS) to find the optimized training settings for Eproxy with only handful of benchmarked architectures on the target tasks. Our extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of both Eproxy and Eproxy+DPS. Code is available at https://github.com/leeyeehoo/GenNAS-Zero.
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) has become a de facto approach in the recent trend of AutoML to design deep neural networks (DNNs). Efficient or near-zero-cost NAS proxies are further proposed to address the demanding computational issues of NAS, where each candidate architecture network only requires one iteration of backpropagation. The values obtained from the proxies are considered the predictions of architecture performance on downstream tasks. However, two significant drawbacks hinder the extended usage of Efficient NAS proxies. (1) Efficient proxies are not adaptive to various search spaces. (2) Efficient proxies are not extensible to multi-modality downstream tasks. Based on the observations, we design a Extensible proxy (Eproxy) that utilizes self-supervised, few-shot training (i.e., 10 iterations of backpropagation) which yields near-zero costs. The key component that makes Eproxy efficient is an untrainable convolution layer termed barrier layer that add the non-linearities to the optimization spaces so that the Eproxy can discriminate the performance of architectures in the early stage. Furthermore, to make Eproxy adaptive to different downstream tasks/search spaces, we propose a Discrete Proxy Search (DPS) to find the optimized training settings for Eproxy with only handful of benchmarked architectures on the target tasks. Our extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of both Eproxy and Eproxy+DPS. Code is available at https://github.com/leeyeehoo/GenNAS-Zero.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 已成为 AutoML 最近趋势中设计深度神经网络 (DNN) 的事实上的方法。进一步提出了高效或接近零成本的 NAS 代理来解决 NAS 苛刻的计算问题，其中每个候选架构网络仅需要一次反向传播迭代。从代理获得的值被认为是对下游任务的架构性能的预测。然而，两个显着的缺点阻碍了 Efficient NAS 代理的扩展使用。 (1)高效代理不能适应各种搜索空间。 (2) 高效代理无法扩展到多模态下游任务。根据观察结果，我们设计了一个可扩展代理（Eproxy），它利用自我监督、少样本训练（即反向传播的 10 次迭代），产生接近于零的成本。使 Eproxy 高效的关键组件是一个称为屏障层的不可训练的卷积层，它将非线性添加到优化空间中，以便 Eproxy 可以在早期阶段区分架构的性能。此外，为了使 Eproxy 适应不同的下游任务/搜索空间，我们提出了离散代理搜索（DPS），以在目标任务上仅使用少量基准架构来找到 Eproxy 的优化训练设置。我们的大量实验证实了 Eproxy 和 Eproxy+DPS 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/leeyeehoo/GenNAS-Zero 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的高效神经架构搜索（NAS）代理（Eproxy），以解决现有代理在适应不同搜索空间和多模态任务上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有高效NAS代理存在两个关键缺陷：无法适应不同搜索空间，且难以扩展到多模态下游任务。
AI.method: 设计包含不可训练的屏障层的Eproxy，通过自监督少量训练（10次反向传播）实现近零成本；提出离散代理搜索（DPS）优化训练参数以适配目标任务。
AI.result: 实验验证了Eproxy和Eproxy+DPS在多种任务和搜索空间中的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Eproxy通过屏障层和DPS机制，解决了高效NAS代理的适应性与可扩展性问题，为多模态任务提供新思路。

The values obtained from the proxies are considered the predictions of architecture performance on downstream tasks. However, two significant drawbacks hinder the extended usage of Efficient NAS proxies. (1) Efficient proxies are not adaptive to various search spaces. (2) Efficient proxies are not extensible to multi-modality downstream tasks. Our extensive experiments confirm the effectiveness of both Eproxy and Eproxy+DPS. authors_text: Jinkun Cao,Hao Wu,Kris Kitani
title: Track Targets by Dense Spatio-Temporal Position Encoding
title_zh: 通过密集时空位置编码跟踪目标
abstract: In this work, we propose a novel paradigm to encode the position of targets for target tracking in videos using transformers. The proposed paradigm, Dense Spatio-Temporal (DST) position encoding, encodes spatio-temporal position information in a pixel-wise dense fashion. The provided position encoding provides location information to associate targets across frames beyond appearance matching by comparing objects in two bounding boxes. Compared to the typical transformer positional encoding, our proposed encoding is applied to the 2D CNN features instead of the projected feature vectors to avoid losing positional information. Moreover, the designed DST encoding can represent the location of a single-frame object and the evolution of the location of the trajectory among frames uniformly. Integrated with the DST encoding, we build a transformer-based multi-object tracking model. The model takes a video clip as input and conducts the target association in the clip. It can also perform online inference by associating existing trajectories with objects from the new-coming frames. Experiments on video multi-object tracking (MOT) and multi-object tracking and segmentation (MOTS) datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed DST position encoding.
summary: In this work, we propose a novel paradigm to encode the position of targets for target tracking in videos using transformers. The proposed paradigm, Dense Spatio-Temporal (DST) position encoding, encodes spatio-temporal position information in a pixel-wise dense fashion. The provided position encoding provides location information to associate targets across frames beyond appearance matching by comparing objects in two bounding boxes. Compared to the typical transformer positional encoding, our proposed encoding is applied to the 2D CNN features instead of the projected feature vectors to avoid losing positional information. Moreover, the designed DST encoding can represent the location of a single-frame object and the evolution of the location of the trajectory among frames uniformly. Integrated with the DST encoding, we build a transformer-based multi-object tracking model. The model takes a video clip as input and conducts the target association in the clip. It can also perform online inference by associating existing trajectories with objects from the new-coming frames. Experiments on video multi-object tracking (MOT) and multi-object tracking and segmentation (MOTS) datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed DST position encoding.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的范例，使用变压器对视频中目标跟踪的目标位置进行编码。所提出的范例，密集时空（DST）位置编码，以像素密集方式编码时空位置信息。所提供的位置编码通过比较两个边界框中的对象来提供位置信息，以在外观匹配之外跨帧关联目标。与典型的 Transformer 位置编码相比，我们提出的编码应用于 2D CNN 特征而不是投影特征向量，以避免丢失位置信息。此外，设计的DST编码可以统一表示单帧物体的位置以及帧间轨迹位置的演化。与 DST 编码相结合，我们构建了一个基于 Transformer 的多目标跟踪模型。该模型以视频片段作为输入，并在片段中进行目标关联。它还可以通过将现有轨迹与新帧中的对象相关联来执行在线推理。视频多目标跟踪（MOT）和多目标跟踪和分割（MOTS）数据集上的实验证明了所提出的 DST 位置编码的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于密集时空位置编码的多目标跟踪方法，利用Transformer模型提升视频中目标跟踪的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer位置编码在目标跟踪中存在位置信息丢失的问题，难以有效关联跨帧目标。现有方法依赖外观匹配，无法充分捕捉时空位置信息。
AI.method: 设计密集时空（DST）位置编码，直接作用于2D CNN特征而非投影向量，以像素级密度编码单帧目标位置及轨迹演化信息，并集成至Transformer多目标跟踪模型中。
AI.result: 在MOT和MOTS数据集上的实验表明，该方法在跟踪精度和鲁棒性上优于现有方法，支持视频片段处理和在线推理。
AI.conclusion: DST编码通过统一表示单帧位置与轨迹演化，有效提升了时空关联能力，为多目标跟踪提供了新的技术路径。

ai_content_json.conclusion: DST编码通过统一表示单帧位置与轨迹演化，有效提升了时空关联能力，为多目标跟踪提供了新的技术路径。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于密集时空位置编码的多目标跟踪方法，利用Transformer模型提升视频中目标跟踪的准确性。
motivation: 传统Transformer位置编码在目标跟踪中存在位置信息丢失的问题，难以有效关联跨帧目标。现有方法依赖外观匹配，无法充分捕捉时空位置信息。
method: 设计密集时空（DST）位置编码，直接作用于2D CNN特征而非投影向量，以像素级密度编码单帧目标位置及轨迹演化信息，并集成至Transformer多目标跟踪模型中。
result: 在MOT和MOTS数据集上的实验表明，该方法在跟踪精度和鲁棒性上优于现有方法，支持视频片段处理和在线推理。
conclusion: DST编码通过统一表示单帧位置与轨迹演化，有效提升了时空关联能力，为多目标跟踪提供了新的技术路径。
search_text: Track Targets by Dense Spatio-Temporal Position Encoding 通过密集时空位置编码跟踪目标 In this work, we propose a novel paradigm to encode the position of targets for target tracking in videos using transformers. The proposed paradigm, Dense Spatio-Temporal (DST) position encoding, encodes spatio-temporal position information in a pixel-wise dense fashion. The provided position encoding provides location information to associate targets across frames beyond appearance matching by comparing objects in two bounding boxes. Compared to the typical transformer positional encoding, our proposed encoding is applied to the 2D CNN features instead of the projected feature vectors to avoid losing positional information. Moreover, the designed DST encoding can represent the location of a single-frame object and the evolution of the location of the trajectory among frames uniformly. Integrated with the DST encoding, we build a transformer-based multi-object tracking model. The model takes a video clip as input and conducts the target association in the clip. It can also perform online inference by associating existing trajectories with objects from the new-coming frames. Experiments on video multi-object tracking (MOT) and multi-object tracking and segmentation (MOTS) datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed DST position encoding. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的范例，使用变压器对视频中目标跟踪的目标位置进行编码。所提出的范例，密集时空（DST）位置编码，以像素密集方式编码时空位置信息。所提供的位置编码通过比较两个边界框中的对象来提供位置信息，以在外观匹配之外跨帧关联目标。与典型的 Transformer 位置编码相比，我们提出的编码应用于 2D CNN 特征而不是投影特征向量，以避免丢失位置信息。此外，设计的DST编码可以统一表示单帧物体的位置以及帧间轨迹位置的演化。与 DST 编码相结合，我们构建了一个基于 Transformer 的多目标跟踪模型。该模型以视频片段作为输入，并在片段中进行目标关联。它还可以通过将现有轨迹与新帧中的对象相关联来执行在线推理。视频多目标跟踪（MOT）和多目标跟踪和分割（MOTS）数据集上的实验证明了所提出的 DST 位置编码的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于密集时空位置编码的多目标跟踪方法，利用Transformer模型提升视频中目标跟踪的准确性。 Jinkun Cao,Hao Wu,Kris Kitani cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Kangning Liu,Weicheng Zhu,Yiqiu Shen,Sheng Liu,Narges Razavian,Krzysztof J. Geras,Carlos Fernandez-Granda
title: Multiple Instance Learning via Iterative Self-Paced Supervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过迭代自定进度监督对比学习进行多实例学习
comment: CVPR 2023 camera-ready version. The first two authors contribute equally. The last two authors are joint last authors
comments: CVPR 2023 camera-ready version. The first two authors contribute equally. The last two authors are joint last authors
abstract: Learning representations for individual instances when only bag-level labels are available is a fundamental challenge in multiple instance learning (MIL). Recent works have shown promising results using contrastive self-supervised learning (CSSL), which learns to push apart representations corresponding to two different randomly-selected instances. Unfortunately, in real-world applications such as medical image classification, there is often class imbalance, so randomly-selected instances mostly belong to the same majority class, which precludes CSSL from learning inter-class differences. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework, Iterative Self-paced Supervised Contrastive Learning for MIL Representations (ItS2CLR), which improves the learned representation by exploiting instance-level pseudo labels derived from the bag-level labels. The framework employs a novel self-paced sampling strategy to ensure the accuracy of pseudo labels. We evaluate ItS2CLR on three medical datasets, showing that it improves the quality of instance-level pseudo labels and representations, and outperforms existing MIL methods in terms of both bag and instance level accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Kangningthu/ItS2CLR
summary: Learning representations for individual instances when only bag-level labels are available is a fundamental challenge in multiple instance learning (MIL). Recent works have shown promising results using contrastive self-supervised learning (CSSL), which learns to push apart representations corresponding to two different randomly-selected instances. Unfortunately, in real-world applications such as medical image classification, there is often class imbalance, so randomly-selected instances mostly belong to the same majority class, which precludes CSSL from learning inter-class differences. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework, Iterative Self-paced Supervised Contrastive Learning for MIL Representations (ItS2CLR), which improves the learned representation by exploiting instance-level pseudo labels derived from the bag-level labels. The framework employs a novel self-paced sampling strategy to ensure the accuracy of pseudo labels. We evaluate ItS2CLR on three medical datasets, showing that it improves the quality of instance-level pseudo labels and representations, and outperforms existing MIL methods in terms of both bag and instance level accuracy. Code is available at https://github.com/Kangningthu/ItS2CLR
abstract_zh: 当只有包级标签可用时，学习单个实例的表示是多实例学习（MIL）中的一个基本挑战。最近的工作已经显示出使用对比自监督学习（CSSL）的有希望的结果，它学习推开与两个不同的随机选择的实例相对应的表示。不幸的是，在医学图像分类等现实应用中，经常存在类不平衡，因此随机选择的实例大多属于同一多数类，这妨碍了 CSSL 学习类间差异。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新颖的框架，即用于 MIL 表示的迭代自定进度监督对比学习（ItS2CLR），它通过利用从袋级标签派生的实例级伪标签来改进学习表示。该框架采用新颖的自定进度采样策略来确保伪标签的准确性。我们在三个医学数据集上评估 ItS2CLR，表明它提高了实例级伪标签和表示的质量，并且在包和实例级准确性方面优于现有的 MIL 方法。代码可在 https://github.com/Kangningthu/ItS2CLR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ItS2CLR的新框架，通过利用袋级标签生成实例级伪标签，解决多实例学习中因类别不平衡导致的实例表示学习难题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比自监督学习方法在医疗图像分类等实际应用中因类别不平衡问题无法有效学习类间差异，需通过更精准的伪标签生成策略改进表示学习。
AI.method: 提出迭代自定步长监督对比学习框架（ItS2CLR），结合袋级标签生成实例伪标签，并采用自定步长采样策略确保伪标签准确性，通过迭代优化实例表示。
AI.result: 在三个医疗数据集上验证，ItS2CLR显著提升了实例级伪标签质量与表示效果，在袋级和实例级准确率上均优于现有MIL方法。
AI.conclusion: ItS2CLR通过有效利用袋级标签生成可靠伪标签，成功缓解了类别不平衡问题，为多实例学习中的实例表示学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Pranjal Bhardwaj,Prajjwal Gupta,Thejineaswar Guhan,Kathiravan Srinivasan
title: Early Diagnosis of Retinal Blood Vessel Damage via Deep Learning-Powered Collective Intelligence Models
title_zh: 通过深度学习驱动的集体智能模型早期诊断视网膜血管损伤
comment: ef:Hindawi Computational and Mathematical Methods in Medicine Volume 2022, Article ID 3571364, 13 pages
comments: ef:Hindawi Computational and Mathematical Methods in Medicine Volume 2022, Article ID 3571364, 13 pages
abstract: Early diagnosis of retinal diseases such as diabetic retinopathy has had the attention of many researchers. Deep learning through the introduction of convolutional neural networks has become a prominent solution for image-related tasks such as classification and segmentation. Most tasks in image classification are handled by deep CNNs pretrained and evaluated on imagenet dataset. However, these models do not always translate to the best result on other datasets. Devising a neural network manually from scratch based on heuristics may not lead to an optimal model as there are numerous hyperparameters in play. In this paper, we use two nature-inspired swarm algorithms: particle swarm optimization (PSO) and ant colony optimization (ACO) to obtain TDCN models to perform classification of fundus images into severity classes. The power of swarm algorithms is used to search for various combinations of convolutional, pooling, and normalization layers to provide the best model for the task. It is observed that TDCN-PSO outperforms imagenet models and existing literature, while TDCN-ACO achieves faster architecture search. The best TDCN model achieves an accuracy of 90.3%, AUC ROC of 0.956, and a Cohen kappa score of 0.967. The results were compared with the previous studies to show that the proposed TDCN models exhibit superior performance.
summary: Early diagnosis of retinal diseases such as diabetic retinopathy has had the attention of many researchers. Deep learning through the introduction of convolutional neural networks has become a prominent solution for image-related tasks such as classification and segmentation. Most tasks in image classification are handled by deep CNNs pretrained and evaluated on imagenet dataset. However, these models do not always translate to the best result on other datasets. Devising a neural network manually from scratch based on heuristics may not lead to an optimal model as there are numerous hyperparameters in play. In this paper, we use two nature-inspired swarm algorithms: particle swarm optimization (PSO) and ant colony optimization (ACO) to obtain TDCN models to perform classification of fundus images into severity classes. The power of swarm algorithms is used to search for various combinations of convolutional, pooling, and normalization layers to provide the best model for the task. It is observed that TDCN-PSO outperforms imagenet models and existing literature, while TDCN-ACO achieves faster architecture search. The best TDCN model achieves an accuracy of 90.3%, AUC ROC of 0.956, and a Cohen kappa score of 0.967. The results were compared with the previous studies to show that the proposed TDCN models exhibit superior performance.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病视网膜病变等视网膜疾病的早期诊断引起了许多研究人员的关注。通过引入卷积神经网络进行深度学习已成为分类和分割等图像相关任务的重要解决方案。图像分类中的大多数任务都是由在 imagenet 数据集上预训练和评估的深度 CNN 处理的。然而，这些模型并不总是能转化为其他数据集上的最佳结果。基于启发式方法从头开始手动设计神经网络可能不会产生最佳模型，因为存在大量超参数。在本文中，我们使用两种受自然启发的群算法：粒子群优化（PSO）和蚁群优化（ACO）来获得TDCN模型来对眼底图像进行严重程度分类。群体算法的强大功能用于搜索卷积层、池化层和归一化层的各种组合，以为任务提供最佳模型。据观察，TDCN-PSO 优于 imagenet 模型和现有文献，而 TDCN-ACO 实现了更快的架构搜索。最好的 TDCN 模型的准确率达到 90.3%，AUC ROC 为 0.956，Cohen kappa 得分为 0.967。与之前的研究结果进行比较，表明所提出的 TDCN 模型表现出优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习与群体智能算法的模型，用于早期诊断视网膜病变中的血管损伤。
AI.motivation: 传统预训练模型在视网膜图像分类任务中表现不佳，手动设计神经网络难以优化超参数，需探索更高效的自动模型搜索方法。
AI.method: 采用粒子群优化（PSO）和蚁群优化（ACO）算法，自动搜索卷积、池化和归一化层的组合，构建TDCN模型进行视网膜图像分类。
AI.result: TDCN-PSO模型在准确率（90.3%）、AUC ROC（0.956）和Cohen kappa（0.967）指标上优于现有方法，TDCN-ACO模型则实现了更快的架构搜索。
AI.conclusion: 群体智能算法驱动的TDCN模型在视网膜病变分类任务中展现出优越性能，为早期诊断提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Early Diagnosis of Retinal Blood Vessel Damage via Deep Learning-Powered Collective Intelligence Models 通过深度学习驱动的集体智能模型早期诊断视网膜血管损伤 Early diagnosis of retinal diseases such as diabetic retinopathy has had the attention of many researchers. Deep learning through the introduction of convolutional neural networks has become a prominent solution for image-related tasks such as classification and segmentation. Most tasks in image classification are handled by deep CNNs pretrained and evaluated on imagenet dataset. However, these models do not always translate to the best result on other datasets. Devising a neural network manually from scratch based on heuristics may not lead to an optimal model as there are numerous hyperparameters in play. In this paper, we use two nature-inspired swarm algorithms: particle swarm optimization (PSO) and ant colony optimization (ACO) to obtain TDCN models to perform classification of fundus images into severity classes. The power of swarm algorithms is used to search for various combinations of convolutional, pooling, and normalization layers to provide the best model for the task. It is observed that TDCN-PSO outperforms imagenet models and existing literature, while TDCN-ACO achieves faster architecture search. The best TDCN model achieves an accuracy of 90.3%, AUC ROC of 0.956, and a Cohen kappa score of 0.967. The results were compared with the previous studies to show that the proposed TDCN models exhibit superior performance. 糖尿病视网膜病变等视网膜疾病的早期诊断引起了许多研究人员的关注。通过引入卷积神经网络进行深度学习已成为分类和分割等图像相关任务的重要解决方案。图像分类中的大多数任务都是由在 imagenet 数据集上预训练和评估的深度 CNN 处理的。然而，这些模型并不总是能转化为其他数据集上的最佳结果。基于启发式方法从头开始手动设计神经网络可能不会产生最佳模型，因为存在大量超参数。在本文中，我们使用两种受自然启发的群算法：粒子群优化（PSO）和蚁群优化（ACO）来获得TDCN模型来对眼底图像进行严重程度分类。群体算法的强大功能用于搜索卷积层、池化层和归一化层的各种组合，以为任务提供最佳模型。据观察，TDCN-PSO 优于 imagenet 模型和现有文献，而 TDCN-ACO 实现了更快的架构搜索。最好的 TDCN 模型的准确率达到 90.3%，AUC ROC 为 0.956，Cohen kappa 得分为 0.967。与之前的研究结果进行比较，表明所提出的 TDCN 模型表现出优越的性能。 本文提出基于深度学习与群体智能算法的模型，用于早期诊断视网膜病变中的血管损伤。 Pranjal Bhardwaj,Prajjwal Gupta,Thejineaswar Guhan,Kathiravan Srinivasan eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Stefano B. Blumberg,Daniele Raví,Mou-Cheng Xu,Matteo Figini,Iasonas Kokkinos,Daniel C. Alexander
title: Deformably-Scaled Transposed Convolution
title_zh: 变形缩放转置卷积
abstract: Transposed convolution is crucial for generating high-resolution outputs, yet has received little attention compared to convolution layers. In this work we revisit transposed convolution and introduce a novel layer that allows us to place information in the image selectively and choose the `stroke breadth' at which the image is synthesized, whilst incurring a small additional parameter cost. For this we introduce three ideas: firstly, we regress offsets to the positions where the transpose convolution results are placed; secondly we broadcast the offset weight locations over a learnable neighborhood; and thirdly we use a compact parametrization to share weights and restrict offsets. We show that simply substituting upsampling operators with our novel layer produces substantial improvements across tasks as diverse as instance segmentation, object detection, semantic segmentation, generative image modeling, and 3D magnetic resonance image enhancement, while outperforming all existing variants of transposed convolutions. Our novel layer can be used as a drop-in replacement for 2D and 3D upsampling operators and the code will be publicly available.
summary: Transposed convolution is crucial for generating high-resolution outputs, yet has received little attention compared to convolution layers. In this work we revisit transposed convolution and introduce a novel layer that allows us to place information in the image selectively and choose the `stroke breadth' at which the image is synthesized, whilst incurring a small additional parameter cost. For this we introduce three ideas: firstly, we regress offsets to the positions where the transpose convolution results are placed; secondly we broadcast the offset weight locations over a learnable neighborhood; and thirdly we use a compact parametrization to share weights and restrict offsets. We show that simply substituting upsampling operators with our novel layer produces substantial improvements across tasks as diverse as instance segmentation, object detection, semantic segmentation, generative image modeling, and 3D magnetic resonance image enhancement, while outperforming all existing variants of transposed convolutions. Our novel layer can be used as a drop-in replacement for 2D and 3D upsampling operators and the code will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 转置卷积对于生成高分辨率输出至关重要，但与卷积层相比却很少受到关注。在这项工作中，我们重新审视转置卷积并引入一个新颖的层，该层允许我们有选择地在图像中放置信息并选择合成图像的“笔划宽度”，同时产生少量的额外参数成本。为此，我们引入三个想法：首先，我们将偏移量回归到转置卷积结果所在的位置；其次，我们在可学习的邻域上广播偏移权重位置；第三，我们使用紧凑的参数化来共享权重并限制偏移。我们证明，简单地用我们的新颖层替换上采样算子可以在实例分割、对象检测、语义分割、生成图像建模和 3D 磁共振图像增强等各种任务中产生显着的改进，同时优于转置卷积的所有现有变体。我们的新颖层可以用作 2D 和 3D 上采样运算符的直接替代品，并且代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型可变形缩放转置卷积层，通过引入偏移回归和紧凑参数化方法，提升图像生成任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 转置卷积在高分辨率输出生成中至关重要，但相比普通卷积层研究不足，现有方法缺乏对信息放置位置和合成精细度的灵活控制。
AI.method: 提出三种创新：1) 回归转置卷积结果的位置偏移量；2) 将偏移权重扩展到可学习邻域；3) 采用紧凑参数化实现权重共享和偏移限制。
AI.result: 在实例分割、目标检测、语义分割等任务中显著优于现有转置卷积变体，且可作为2D/3D上采样操作的即插即用替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过灵活控制信息放置位置和合成精度，在多种任务中实现性能提升，代码将公开可用。
