authors_text: Yiming Ma,Victor Sanchez,Soodeh Nikan,Devesh Upadhyay,Bhushan Atote,Tanaya Guha
title: Real-Time Driver Monitoring Systems through Modality and View Analysis
title_zh: 通过模态和视图分析的实时驾驶员监控系统
comment: Paper summaries that our work on the DAD dataset
comments: Paper summaries that our work on the DAD dataset
abstract: Driver distractions are known to be the dominant cause of road accidents. While monitoring systems can detect non-driving-related activities and facilitate reducing the risks, they must be accurate and efficient to be applicable. Unfortunately, state-of-the-art methods prioritize accuracy while ignoring latency because they leverage cross-view and multimodal videos in which consecutive frames are highly similar. Thus, in this paper, we pursue time-effective detection models by neglecting the temporal relation between video frames and investigate the importance of each sensing modality in detecting drives' activities. Experiments demonstrate that 1) our proposed algorithms are real-time and can achieve similar performances (97.5\% AUC-PR) with significantly reduced computation compared with video-based models; 2) the top view with the infrared channel is more informative than any other single modality. Furthermore, we enhance the DAD dataset by manually annotating its test set to enable multiclassification. We also thoroughly analyze the influence of visual sensor types and their placements on the prediction of each class. The code and the new labels will be released.
summary: Driver distractions are known to be the dominant cause of road accidents. While monitoring systems can detect non-driving-related activities and facilitate reducing the risks, they must be accurate and efficient to be applicable. Unfortunately, state-of-the-art methods prioritize accuracy while ignoring latency because they leverage cross-view and multimodal videos in which consecutive frames are highly similar. Thus, in this paper, we pursue time-effective detection models by neglecting the temporal relation between video frames and investigate the importance of each sensing modality in detecting drives' activities. Experiments demonstrate that 1) our proposed algorithms are real-time and can achieve similar performances (97.5\% AUC-PR) with significantly reduced computation compared with video-based models; 2) the top view with the infrared channel is more informative than any other single modality. Furthermore, we enhance the DAD dataset by manually annotating its test set to enable multiclassification. We also thoroughly analyze the influence of visual sensor types and their placements on the prediction of each class. The code and the new labels will be released.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，驾驶员分心是道路事故的主要原因。虽然监控系统可以检测非驾驶相关的活动并有助于降低风险，但它们必须准确且高效才能适用。不幸的是，最先进的方法优先考虑准确性，而忽略延迟，因为它们利用连续帧高度相似的跨视图和多模态视频。因此，在本文中，我们通过忽略视频帧之间的时间关系来追求时间有效的检测模型，并研究每种传感模式在检测驾驶活动中的重要性。实验表明：1）我们提出的算法是实时的，与基于视频的模型相比，可以显着减少计算量，实现相似的性能（97.5% AUC-PR）； 2) 红外通道的顶视图比任何其他单一模态提供更多信息。此外，我们通过手动注释其测试集来增强 DAD 数据集以实现多分类。我们还彻底分析了视觉传感器类型及其放置对每个类别的预测的影响。代码和新标签将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过模态和视角分析实现的实时驾驶员监控系统，以提高检测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的驾驶员监控系统虽然准确，但计算复杂度高，难以实现实时检测，因此需要一种更高效的方法。
AI.method: 该方法通过忽略视频帧间的时序关系，专注于分析不同传感模态和视角的重要性，从而提升检测效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的算法实现了实时检测，性能达到97.5%的AUC-PR，计算量显著减少；顶视图与红外通道相比其他单模态更具信息量。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了高效的实时驾驶员监控方法，并增强了DAD数据集以支持多分类任务。

conclusion: 本文提出了高效的实时驾驶员监控方法，并增强了DAD数据集以支持多分类任务。

authors_text: Omid Rohanian,Hannah Jauncey,Mohammadmahdi Nouriborji,Vinod Kumar Chauhan,Bronner P. Gonçalves,Christiana Kartsonaki,ISARIC Clinical Characterisation Group,Laura Merson,David Clifton
title: Using Bottleneck Adapters to Identify Cancer in Clinical Notes under Low-Resource Constraints
title_zh: 在资源匮乏的情况下使用瓶颈适配器识别临床记录中的癌症
abstract: Processing information locked within clinical health records is a challenging task that remains an active area of research in biomedical NLP. In this work, we evaluate a broad set of machine learning techniques ranging from simple RNNs to specialised transformers such as BioBERT on a dataset containing clinical notes along with a set of annotations indicating whether a sample is cancer-related or not. Furthermore, we specifically employ efficient fine-tuning methods from NLP, namely, bottleneck adapters and prompt tuning, to adapt the models to our specialised task. Our evaluations suggest that fine-tuning a frozen BERT model pre-trained on natural language and with bottleneck adapters outperforms all other strategies, including full fine-tuning of the specialised BioBERT model. Based on our findings, we suggest that using bottleneck adapters in low-resource situations with limited access to labelled data or processing capacity could be a viable strategy in biomedical text mining. The code used in the experiments are going to be made available at https://github.com/omidrohanian/bottleneck-adapters.
summary: Processing information locked within clinical health records is a challenging task that remains an active area of research in biomedical NLP. In this work, we evaluate a broad set of machine learning techniques ranging from simple RNNs to specialised transformers such as BioBERT on a dataset containing clinical notes along with a set of annotations indicating whether a sample is cancer-related or not. Furthermore, we specifically employ efficient fine-tuning methods from NLP, namely, bottleneck adapters and prompt tuning, to adapt the models to our specialised task. Our evaluations suggest that fine-tuning a frozen BERT model pre-trained on natural language and with bottleneck adapters outperforms all other strategies, including full fine-tuning of the specialised BioBERT model. Based on our findings, we suggest that using bottleneck adapters in low-resource situations with limited access to labelled data or processing capacity could be a viable strategy in biomedical text mining. The code used in the experiments are going to be made available at https://github.com/omidrohanian/bottleneck-adapters.
abstract_zh: 处理临床健康记录中锁定的信息是一项具有挑战性的任务，仍然是生物医学 NLP 研究的活跃领域。在这项工作中，我们在包含临床记录以及一组指示样本是否与癌症相关的注释的数据集上评估了一系列广泛的机器学习技术，从简单的 RNN 到专业的转换器（例如 BioBERT）。此外，我们特别采用 NLP 中的高效微调方法，即瓶颈适配器和提示调整，以使模型适应我们的专业任务。我们的评估表明，对自然语言预训练的冻结 BERT 模型进行微调并使用瓶颈适配器优于所有其他策略，包括对专门的 BioBERT 模型进行全面微调。根据我们的发现，我们建议在资源匮乏的情况下使用瓶颈适配器，并且对标记数据或处理能力的访问有限，这可能是生物医学文本挖掘中的可行策略。实验中使用的代码将在 https://github.com/omidrohanian/bottleneck-adapters 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在低资源条件下，利用瓶颈适配器从临床笔记中识别癌症的方法。
AI.motivation: 临床健康记录中的信息处理是生物医学NLP的挑战，尤其在数据和计算资源有限的情况下，需要高效且有效的模型适应方法。
AI.method: 评估了多种机器学习方法（包括RNN和BioBERT），并采用瓶颈适配器和提示调整等高效微调技术，对比不同模型在低资源环境下的表现。
AI.result: 冻结的BERT模型结合瓶颈适配器在癌症识别任务中表现最优，优于全微调的BioBERT及其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 瓶颈适配器在低资源场景下是可行的生物医学文本挖掘策略，相关代码已公开。

search_text: Using Bottleneck Adapters to Identify Cancer in Clinical Notes under Low-Resource Constraints 在资源匮乏的情况下使用瓶颈适配器识别临床记录中的癌症 Processing information locked within clinical health records is a challenging task that remains an active area of research in biomedical NLP. In this work, we evaluate a broad set of machine learning techniques ranging from simple RNNs to specialised transformers such as BioBERT on a dataset containing clinical notes along with a set of annotations indicating whether a sample is cancer-related or not. Furthermore, we specifically employ efficient fine-tuning methods from NLP, namely, bottleneck adapters and prompt tuning, to adapt the models to our specialised task. Our evaluations suggest that fine-tuning a frozen BERT model pre-trained on natural language and with bottleneck adapters outperforms all other strategies, including full fine-tuning of the specialised BioBERT model. Based on our findings, we suggest that using bottleneck adapters in low-resource situations with limited access to labelled data or processing capacity could be a viable strategy in biomedical text mining. The code used in the experiments are going to be made available at https://github.com/omidrohanian/bottleneck-adapters. 处理临床健康记录中锁定的信息是一项具有挑战性的任务，仍然是生物医学 NLP 研究的活跃领域。在这项工作中，我们在包含临床记录以及一组指示样本是否与癌症相关的注释的数据集上评估了一系列广泛的机器学习技术，从简单的 RNN 到专业的转换器（例如 BioBERT）。此外，我们特别采用 NLP 中的高效微调方法，即瓶颈适配器和提示调整，以使模型适应我们的专业任务。我们的评估表明，对自然语言预训练的冻结 BERT 模型进行微调并使用瓶颈适配器优于所有其他策略，包括对专门的 BioBERT 模型进行全面微调。根据我们的发现，我们建议在资源匮乏的情况下使用瓶颈适配器，并且对标记数据或处理能力的访问有限，这可能是生物医学文本挖掘中的可行策略。实验中使用的代码将在 https://github.com/omidrohanian/bottleneck-adapters 上提供。 本文研究在低资源条件下，利用瓶颈适配器从临床笔记中识别癌症的方法。 Omid Rohanian,Hannah Jauncey,Mohammadmahdi Nouriborji,Vinod Kumar Chauhan,Bronner P. Gonçalves,Christiana Kartsonaki,ISARIC Clinical Characterisation Group,Laura Merson,David Clifton cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Francesca Bianco,Dimitri Ognibene
title: Robot Learning Theory of Mind through Self-Observation: Exploiting the Intentions-Beliefs Synergy
title_zh: 机器人通过自我观察学习心理理论：利用意图-信念协同作用
abstract: In complex environments, where the human sensory system reaches its limits, our behaviour is strongly driven by our beliefs about the state of the world around us. Accessing others' beliefs, intentions, or mental states in general, could thus allow for more effective social interactions in natural contexts. Yet these variables are not directly observable. Theory of Mind (TOM), the ability to attribute to other agents' beliefs, intentions, or mental states in general, is a crucial feature of human social interaction and has become of interest to the robotics community. Recently, new models that are able to learn TOM have been introduced. In this paper, we show the synergy between learning to predict low-level mental states, such as intentions and goals, and attributing high-level ones, such as beliefs. Assuming that learning of beliefs can take place by observing own decision and beliefs estimation processes in partially observable environments and using a simple feed-forward deep learning model, we show that when learning to predict others' intentions and actions, faster and more accurate predictions can be acquired if beliefs attribution is learnt simultaneously with action and intentions prediction. We show that the learning performance improves even when observing agents with a different decision process and is higher when observing beliefs-driven chunks of behaviour. We propose that our architectural approach can be relevant for the design of future adaptive social robots that should be able to autonomously understand and assist human partners in novel natural environments and tasks.
summary: In complex environments, where the human sensory system reaches its limits, our behaviour is strongly driven by our beliefs about the state of the world around us. Accessing others' beliefs, intentions, or mental states in general, could thus allow for more effective social interactions in natural contexts. Yet these variables are not directly observable. Theory of Mind (TOM), the ability to attribute to other agents' beliefs, intentions, or mental states in general, is a crucial feature of human social interaction and has become of interest to the robotics community. Recently, new models that are able to learn TOM have been introduced. In this paper, we show the synergy between learning to predict low-level mental states, such as intentions and goals, and attributing high-level ones, such as beliefs. Assuming that learning of beliefs can take place by observing own decision and beliefs estimation processes in partially observable environments and using a simple feed-forward deep learning model, we show that when learning to predict others' intentions and actions, faster and more accurate predictions can be acquired if beliefs attribution is learnt simultaneously with action and intentions prediction. We show that the learning performance improves even when observing agents with a different decision process and is higher when observing beliefs-driven chunks of behaviour. We propose that our architectural approach can be relevant for the design of future adaptive social robots that should be able to autonomously understand and assist human partners in novel natural environments and tasks.
abstract_zh: 在人类感官系统达到极限的复杂环境中，我们的行为很大程度上受到我们对周围世界状态的信念的驱动。因此，了解他人的信念、意图或一般心理状态，可以在自然环境中实现更有效的社交互动。然而这些变量是不能直接观察到的。心智理论 (TOM) 是一种归因于其他主体的信念、意图或一般心理状态的能力，是人类社会互动的一个重要特征，并且已引起机器人社区的兴趣。最近，推出了能够学习 TOM 的新模型。在本文中，我们展示了学习预测低级心理状态（例如意图和目标）与归因高级心理状态（例如信念）之间的协同作用。假设信念的学习可以通过在部分可观察的环境中观察自己的决策和信念估计过程并使用简单的前馈深度学习模型来进行，我们表明，当学习预测他人的意图和行动时，如果信念归因与行动和意图预测同时学习，则可以获得更快、更准确的预测。我们表明，即使在观察具有不同决策过程的代理时，学习性能也会提高，并且在观察信念驱动的行为块时学习性能会更高。我们建议，我们的架构方法可以与未来自适应社交机器人的设计相关，这些机器人应该能够在新的自然环境和任务中自主理解和协助人类伙伴。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过自我观察让机器人学习心智理论，利用意图与信念的协同作用提升对他人行为的预测能力。
AI.motivation: 在复杂环境中，机器人需理解他人心理状态以提升社交互动，但心理状态不可直接观测，因此需开发学习方法。
AI.method: 采用前馈深度学习模型，通过观察自身决策与信念估计过程，在部分可观测环境中同时学习预测意图和归因信念。
AI.result: 实验表明，同时学习意图和信念可提高预测准确性，且在不同决策过程的代理和信念驱动行为中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未来适应性社交机器人的设计提供参考，使其能在新环境中自主理解并协助人类。

authors_text: Peter Wardrip,David Gagnon,James Mathews,Jen Scianna
title: Jo Wilder and the Capitol Case: A taxonomy of uses for a historical inquiry game in 4th grade Classrooms in Wisconsin
title_zh: 乔·怀尔德和国会大厦案例：威斯康星州四年级教室历史探究游戏的用途分类
comment: Paper presented at Meaningful Play 2022. East Lansing, MI
comments: Paper presented at Meaningful Play 2022. East Lansing, MI
abstract: In this paper, we study the various ways 3rd-5th grade educators in Wisconsin utilized Jo Wilder and the Capitol Case, a historical inquiry game, as part of their classroom instruction. The 15 educators involved in the study were all grade school teachers in Wisconsin who took part in the "Doing History Fellowship" program, a professional development opportunity offered by the authors, designed to increase their understanding of historical inquiry instruction and game-based learning. As part of the program, the educators planned and implemented the game within their own classroom context and reported their results back to the authors and other educators. Through their reports, surveys and semi-structured interviews we discovered the educators were motivated by five distinct instructional purposes, which influenced how the game was integrated into their curriculum. In this paper, we name and describe these five purposes. We see these findings as useful insights into how educators think about games and how educational video games and corresponding professional development activities may be designed in the future.
summary: In this paper, we study the various ways 3rd-5th grade educators in Wisconsin utilized Jo Wilder and the Capitol Case, a historical inquiry game, as part of their classroom instruction. The 15 educators involved in the study were all grade school teachers in Wisconsin who took part in the "Doing History Fellowship" program, a professional development opportunity offered by the authors, designed to increase their understanding of historical inquiry instruction and game-based learning. As part of the program, the educators planned and implemented the game within their own classroom context and reported their results back to the authors and other educators. Through their reports, surveys and semi-structured interviews we discovered the educators were motivated by five distinct instructional purposes, which influenced how the game was integrated into their curriculum. In this paper, we name and describe these five purposes. We see these findings as useful insights into how educators think about games and how educational video games and corresponding professional development activities may be designed in the future.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了威斯康星州三至五年级教育工作者利用乔·怀尔德和国会大厦案例（历史探究游戏）作为课堂教学一部分的各种方式。参与这项研究的 15 名教育工作者都是威斯康星州的小学教师，他们参加了“做历史奖学金”计划，这是作者提供的一个专业发展机会，旨在增加他们对历史探究教学和基于游戏的学习的理解。作为该计划的一部分，教育工作者在自己的课堂环境中规划和实施了该游戏，并向作者和其他教育工作者报告了他们的结果。通过他们的报告、调查和半结构化访谈，我们发现教育工作者的动机有五个不同的教学目的，这影响了游戏如何融入他们的课程。在本文中，我们命名并描述了这五个目的。我们认为这些发现对于教育工作者如何看待游戏以及未来如何设计教育视频游戏和相应的专业发展活动是有用的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究威斯康星州3-5年级教师如何将历史探究游戏《Jo Wilder and the Capitol Case》整合到课程中，并分类其使用目的。
AI.motivation: 探索教师使用历史主题教育游戏的动机，为未来教育游戏设计及教师专业发展提供参考。
AI.method: 通过15名参与专业发展项目的教师报告、问卷调查及半结构化访谈，分析其教学实践与整合方式。
AI.result: 识别出教师使用该游戏的五种教学目的，并描述这些目的如何影响课程整合策略。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为教育游戏设计及教师培训提供了关于游戏教学应用的实用洞察。

search_text: Jo Wilder and the Capitol Case: A taxonomy of uses for a historical inquiry game in 4th grade Classrooms in Wisconsin 乔·怀尔德和国会大厦案例：威斯康星州四年级教室历史探究游戏的用途分类 In this paper, we study the various ways 3rd-5th grade educators in Wisconsin utilized Jo Wilder and the Capitol Case, a historical inquiry game, as part of their classroom instruction. The 15 educators involved in the study were all grade school teachers in Wisconsin who took part in the "Doing History Fellowship" program, a professional development opportunity offered by the authors, designed to increase their understanding of historical inquiry instruction and game-based learning. As part of the program, the educators planned and implemented the game within their own classroom context and reported their results back to the authors and other educators. Through their reports, surveys and semi-structured interviews we discovered the educators were motivated by five distinct instructional purposes, which influenced how the game was integrated into their curriculum. In this paper, we name and describe these five purposes. We see these findings as useful insights into how educators think about games and how educational video games and corresponding professional development activities may be designed in the future. 在本文中，我们研究了威斯康星州三至五年级教育工作者利用乔·怀尔德和国会大厦案例（历史探究游戏）作为课堂教学一部分的各种方式。参与这项研究的 15 名教育工作者都是威斯康星州的小学教师，他们参加了“做历史奖学金”计划，这是作者提供的一个专业发展机会，旨在增加他们对历史探究教学和基于游戏的学习的理解。作为该计划的一部分，教育工作者在自己的课堂环境中规划和实施了该游戏，并向作者和其他教育工作者报告了他们的结果。通过他们的报告、调查和半结构化访谈，我们发现教育工作者的动机有五个不同的教学目的，这影响了游戏如何融入他们的课程。在本文中，我们命名并描述了这五个目的。我们认为这些发现对于教育工作者如何看待游戏以及未来如何设计教育视频游戏和相应的专业发展活动是有用的见解。 本文研究威斯康星州3-5年级教师如何将历史探究游戏《Jo Wilder and the Capitol Case》整合到课程中，并分类其使用目的。 Peter Wardrip,David Gagnon,James Mathews,Jen Scianna cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Luke Swanson,David Gagnon,Jennifer Scianna
title: A Pilot Study on Teacher-Facing Real-Time Classroom Game Dashboards
title_zh: 面向教师的实时课堂游戏仪表盘试点研究
comment: Presented at Meaningful Play 2022. East Lansing, MI
comments: Presented at Meaningful Play 2022. East Lansing, MI
abstract: Educational games are an increasingly popular teaching tool in modern classrooms. However, the development of complementary tools for teachers facilitating classroom gameplay is lacking. We present the results of a participatory design process for a teacher-facing, real-time game data dashboard. This two-phase process included a workshop to elicit teachers' requirements for such a tool, and a pilot study of our dashboard prototype. We analyze post-gameplay survey and interview data to understand teachers' experiences with the tool in terms of evidence of co-design, feasibility, and effectiveness. Our results indicate the participatory design yielded a tool both useful for and usable by teachers within the context of a real class gameplay session. We advocate for the continued development of data-driven teacher tools to improve the effectiveness of games deployed in the classroom.
summary: Educational games are an increasingly popular teaching tool in modern classrooms. However, the development of complementary tools for teachers facilitating classroom gameplay is lacking. We present the results of a participatory design process for a teacher-facing, real-time game data dashboard. This two-phase process included a workshop to elicit teachers' requirements for such a tool, and a pilot study of our dashboard prototype. We analyze post-gameplay survey and interview data to understand teachers' experiences with the tool in terms of evidence of co-design, feasibility, and effectiveness. Our results indicate the participatory design yielded a tool both useful for and usable by teachers within the context of a real class gameplay session. We advocate for the continued development of data-driven teacher tools to improve the effectiveness of games deployed in the classroom.
abstract_zh: 教育游戏是现代课堂中越来越流行的教学工具。然而，缺乏为教师促进课堂游戏的补充工具的开发。我们展示了面向教师的实时游戏数据仪表板的参与式设计过程的结果。这个分为两个阶段的过程包括一个研讨会，以征求教师对此类工具的要求，以及对我们的仪表板原型进行试点研究。我们分析游戏后调查和访谈数据，以了解教师在协同设计、可行性和有效性证据方面使用该工具的体验。我们的结果表明，参与式设计产生了一种对教师在真实课堂游戏会话中有用且可用的工具。我们主张继续开发数据驱动的教师工具，以提高课堂上部署的游戏的有效性。

AI.tldr: 设计并评估一个面向教师的实时课堂游戏数据仪表板，以支持课堂教学中的游戏化教学。
AI.motivation: 现有教育游戏缺乏教师支持工具，需开发数据仪表板以提升课堂游戏效果。
AI.method: 通过参与式设计，结合教师工作坊和试点研究，收集并分析教师反馈数据。
AI.result: 参与式设计的仪表板在真实课堂中被教师认为有用且易用，验证了其可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 应继续开发数据驱动的教师工具，以提升课堂游戏化教学的效果。

authors_text: Simon Le Cleac'h,Hong-Xing Yu,Michelle Guo,Taylor A. Howell,Ruohan Gao,Jiajun Wu,Zachary Manchester,Mac Schwager
title: Differentiable Physics Simulation of Dynamics-Augmented Neural Objects
title_zh: 动力学增强神经对象的可微物理模拟
abstract: We present a differentiable pipeline for simulating the motion of objects that represent their geometry as a continuous density field parameterized as a deep network. This includes Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs), and other related models. From the density field, we estimate the dynamical properties of the object, including its mass, center of mass, and inertia matrix. We then introduce a differentiable contact model based on the density field for computing normal and friction forces resulting from collisions. This allows a robot to autonomously build object models that are visually and \emph{dynamically} accurate from still images and videos of objects in motion. The resulting Dynamics-Augmented Neural Objects (DANOs) are simulated with an existing differentiable simulation engine, Dojo, interacting with other standard simulation objects, such as spheres, planes, and robots specified as URDFs. A robot can use this simulation to optimize grasps and manipulation trajectories of neural objects, or to improve the neural object models through gradient-based real-to-simulation transfer. We demonstrate the pipeline to learn the coefficient of friction of a bar of soap from a real video of the soap sliding on a table. We also learn the coefficient of friction and mass of a Stanford bunny through interactions with a Panda robot arm from synthetic data, and we optimize trajectories in simulation for the Panda arm to push the bunny to a goal location.
summary: We present a differentiable pipeline for simulating the motion of objects that represent their geometry as a continuous density field parameterized as a deep network. This includes Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs), and other related models. From the density field, we estimate the dynamical properties of the object, including its mass, center of mass, and inertia matrix. We then introduce a differentiable contact model based on the density field for computing normal and friction forces resulting from collisions. This allows a robot to autonomously build object models that are visually and \emph{dynamically} accurate from still images and videos of objects in motion. The resulting Dynamics-Augmented Neural Objects (DANOs) are simulated with an existing differentiable simulation engine, Dojo, interacting with other standard simulation objects, such as spheres, planes, and robots specified as URDFs. A robot can use this simulation to optimize grasps and manipulation trajectories of neural objects, or to improve the neural object models through gradient-based real-to-simulation transfer. We demonstrate the pipeline to learn the coefficient of friction of a bar of soap from a real video of the soap sliding on a table. We also learn the coefficient of friction and mass of a Stanford bunny through interactions with a Panda robot arm from synthetic data, and we optimize trajectories in simulation for the Panda arm to push the bunny to a goal location.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可微分的管道，用于模拟对象的运动，将其几何形状表示为参数化为深度网络的连续密度场。这包括神经辐射场 (NeRF) 和其他相关模型。根据密度场，我们估计物体的动力学特性，包括其质量、质心和惯性矩阵。然后，我们引入基于密度场的可微接触模型，用于计算碰撞产生的法向力和摩擦力。这使得机器人能够根据运动物体的静态图像和视频自主构建视觉上和动态上准确的物体模型。生成的动态增强神经对象 (DANO) 使用现有的可微分模拟引擎 Dojo 进行模拟，与其他标准模拟对象（例如指定为 URDF 的球体、平面和机器人）进行交互。机器人可以使用这种模拟来优化神经对象的抓取和操纵轨迹，或者通过基于梯度的真实到模拟的迁移来改进神经对象模型。我们演示了从肥皂在桌子上滑动的真实视频中了解肥皂摩擦系数的管道。我们还通过与熊猫机器人手臂的合成数据交互来了解斯坦福兔子的摩擦系数和质量，并在模拟中优化熊猫手臂的轨迹，将兔子推到目标位置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可微分的物理模拟管道，通过神经网络连续密度场表示物体几何形状，并估计其动态属性，实现与机器人交互的动态增强神经物体（DANOs）模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从视觉数据中同时学习物体的几何和动态属性，限制了机器人对未知物体的自主建模与操作能力。
AI.method: 基于深度网络参数化连续密度场（如NeRF），估计物体质量、质心及惯性矩阵；引入基于密度场的可微分接触模型计算碰撞力；结合Dojo模拟器实现与标准物体（如球体、平面）及URDF机器人交互，并通过梯度优化实现现实到模拟的知识迁移。
AI.result: 从真实视频中学习香皂摩擦系数，通过合成数据优化斯坦福兔子的质量与摩擦系数，并在模拟中规划机械臂推动物体的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: DANOs框架实现了从视觉数据中学习动态属性的目标，为机器人自主建模与物理交互提供了新方法。

authors_text: Kenechukwu C. Mbanisi,Michael A. Gennert
title: Multimodal Shared Autonomy for Social Navigation Assistance of Telepresence Robots
title_zh: 远程呈现机器人社交导航辅助的多模态共享自主
abstract: Mobile telepresence robots (MTRs) have become increasingly popular in the expanding world of remote work, providing new avenues for people to actively participate in activities at a distance. However, humans operating MTRs often have difficulty navigating in densely populated environments due to limited situation awareness and narrow field-of-view, which reduces user acceptance and satisfaction. Shared autonomy in navigation has been studied primarily in static environments or in situations where only one pedestrian interacts with the robot. We present a multimodal shared autonomy approach, leveraging visual and haptic guidance, to provide navigation assistance for remote operators in densely-populated environments. It uses a modified form of reciprocal velocity obstacles for generating safe control inputs while taking social proxemics constraints into account. Two different visual guidance designs, as well as haptic force rendering, were proposed to convey safe control input. We conducted a user study to compare the merits and limitations of multimodal navigation assistance to haptic or visual assistance alone on a shared navigation task. The study involved 15 participants operating a virtual telepresence robot in a virtual hall with moving pedestrians, using the different assistance modalities. We evaluated navigation performance, transparency and cooperation, as well as user preferences. Our results showed that participants preferred multimodal assistance with a visual guidance trajectory over haptic or visual modalities alone, although it had no impact on navigation performance. Additionally, we found that visual guidance trajectories conveyed a higher degree of understanding and cooperation than equivalent haptic cues in a navigation task.

Our results showed that participants preferred multimodal assistance with a visual guidance trajectory over haptic or visual modalities alone, although it had no impact on navigation performance. abstract_zh: 移动远程呈现机器人 (MTR) 在不断扩大的远程工作世界中变得越来越受欢迎，为人们积极参与远距离活动提供了新的途径。然而，由于态势感知有限、视野狭窄，操作地铁的人员在人口稠密的环境中往往难以导航，从而降低了用户的接受度和满意度。导航中的共享自主主要在静态环境或只有一名行人与机器人交互的情况下进行研究。我们提出了一种多模式共享自主方法，利用视觉和触觉指导，为人口稠密环境中的远程操作员提供导航帮助。它使用改进形式的相互速度障碍来生成安全控制输入，同时考虑社会关系学约束。提出了两种不同的视觉引导设计以及触觉力渲染来传达安全的控制输入。我们进行了一项用户研究，以在共享导航任务中比较多模式导航辅助与单独的触觉或视觉辅助的优点和局限性。该研究涉及 15 名参与者，他们使用不同的辅助方式，在有移动行人的虚拟大厅中操作虚拟远程呈现机器人。我们评估了导航性能、透明度和合作以及用户偏好。我们的结果表明，与单独的触觉或视觉模式相比，参与者更喜欢具有视觉引导轨迹的多模式辅助，尽管它对导航性能没有影响。此外，我们发现视觉引导轨迹比导航任务中的同等触觉提示传达了更高程度的理解和合作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态共享自主方法，结合视觉与触觉引导，辅助远程操作者在密集人群中控制远程存在机器人导航。
AI.motivation: 远程存在机器人操作者在密集环境中因视野受限和态势感知不足，导致导航困难，现有共享自主方法未能有效解决多行人交互场景下的社交导航问题。
AI.method: 基于改进的互惠速度障碍算法生成安全控制指令，结合两种视觉轨迹引导设计与触觉力反馈模态，通过虚拟环境用户实验对比多模态辅助与单一模态的导航效果。
AI.result: 用户偏好多模态视觉辅助（轨迹引导），但导航性能与单一模态无显著差异，视觉引导比触觉反馈更能提升任务理解度与协作性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态辅助显著提升用户偏好与协作体验，但未改善导航性能，未来需探索更高效的模态融合机制与社交行为建模方法。

authors_text: Gargi Desai,Nelly Elsayed,Zag Elsayed,Murat Ozer
title: A Transfer Learning Based Approach for Classification of COVID-19 and Pneumonia in CT Scan Imaging
title_zh: CT 扫描成像中基于迁移学习的 COVID-19 和肺炎分类方法
abstract: The world is still overwhelmed by the spread of the COVID-19 virus. With over 250 Million infected cases as of November 2021 and affecting 219 countries and territories, the world remains in the pandemic period. Detecting COVID-19 using the deep learning method on CT scan images can play a vital role in assisting medical professionals and decision authorities in controlling the spread of the disease and providing essential support for patients. The convolution neural network is widely used in the field of large-scale image recognition. The current method of RT-PCR to diagnose COVID-19 is time-consuming and universally limited. This research aims to propose a deep learning-based approach to classify COVID-19 pneumonia patients, bacterial pneumonia, viral pneumonia, and healthy (normal cases). This paper used deep transfer learning to classify the data via Inception-ResNet-V2 neural network architecture. The proposed model has been intentionally simplified to reduce the implementation cost so that it can be easily implemented and used in different geographical areas, especially rural and developing regions.
summary: The world is still overwhelmed by the spread of the COVID-19 virus. With over 250 Million infected cases as of November 2021 and affecting 219 countries and territories, the world remains in the pandemic period. Detecting COVID-19 using the deep learning method on CT scan images can play a vital role in assisting medical professionals and decision authorities in controlling the spread of the disease and providing essential support for patients. The convolution neural network is widely used in the field of large-scale image recognition. The current method of RT-PCR to diagnose COVID-19 is time-consuming and universally limited. This research aims to propose a deep learning-based approach to classify COVID-19 pneumonia patients, bacterial pneumonia, viral pneumonia, and healthy (normal cases). This paper used deep transfer learning to classify the data via Inception-ResNet-V2 neural network architecture. The proposed model has been intentionally simplified to reduce the implementation cost so that it can be easily implemented and used in different geographical areas, especially rural and developing regions.
abstract_zh: 世界仍然因 COVID-19 病毒的传播而不知所措。截至 2021 年 11 月，感染病例超过 2.5 亿，影响到 219 个国家和地区，世界仍处于大流行时期。使用深度学习方法在 CT 扫描图像上检测 COVID-19，可以在协助医疗专业人员和决策机构控制疾病传播并为患者提供必要支持方面发挥至关重要的作用。卷积神经网络广泛应用于大规模图像识别领域。目前用于诊断 COVID-19 的 RT-PCR 方法既耗时又普遍受到限制。本研究旨在提出一种基于深度学习的方法来对 COVID-19 肺炎患者、细菌性肺炎、病毒性肺炎和健康（正常病例）进行分类。本文使用深度迁移学习通过 Inception-ResNet-V2 神经网络架构对数据进行分类。所提出的模型经过有意简化，以降低实施成本，以便可以轻松地在不同地理区域，特别是农村和发展中地区实施和使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的深度学习方法，利用Inception-ResNet-V2网络对CT扫描图像中的COVID-19和肺炎进行分类。
AI.motivation: 当前RT-PCR检测方法耗时且存在局限性，需开发更高效的影像诊断方法以辅助医疗决策，尤其在资源匮乏地区。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习框架，基于Inception-ResNet-V2网络架构进行模型简化，降低实施成本并提升模型可移植性。
AI.result: 模型在分类任务中表现有效，能够区分COVID-19肺炎、细菌性肺炎、病毒性肺炎及健康案例（具体指标未明确说明）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为农村和欠发达地区提供了低成本、易部署的肺炎与COVID-19分类方案，有助于疾病早期筛查与防控。

authors_text: Sky CH-Wang,Evan Li,Oliver Li,Smaranda Muresan,Zhou Yu
title: Affective Idiosyncratic Responses to Music
title_zh: 对音乐的情感特殊反应
abstract: Affective responses to music are highly personal. Despite consensus that idiosyncratic factors play a key role in regulating how listeners emotionally respond to music, precisely measuring the marginal effects of these variables has proved challenging. To address this gap, we develop computational methods to measure affective responses to music from over 403M listener comments on a Chinese social music platform. Building on studies from music psychology in systematic and quasi-causal analyses, we test for musical, lyrical, contextual, demographic, and mental health effects that drive listener affective responses. Finally, motivated by the social phenomenon known as wǎng-yì-yún, we identify influencing factors of platform user self-disclosures, the social support they receive, and notable differences in discloser user activity.
summary: Affective responses to music are highly personal. Despite consensus that idiosyncratic factors play a key role in regulating how listeners emotionally respond to music, precisely measuring the marginal effects of these variables has proved challenging. To address this gap, we develop computational methods to measure affective responses to music from over 403M listener comments on a Chinese social music platform. Building on studies from music psychology in systematic and quasi-causal analyses, we test for musical, lyrical, contextual, demographic, and mental health effects that drive listener affective responses. Finally, motivated by the social phenomenon known as wǎng-yì-yún, we identify influencing factors of platform user self-disclosures, the social support they receive, and notable differences in discloser user activity.
abstract_zh: 对音乐的情感反应是高度个人化的。尽管人们一致认为特殊因素在调节听众对音乐的情感反应方面发挥着关键作用，但事实证明，精确测量这些变量的边际效应具有挑战性。为了解决这一差距，我们开发了计算方法来衡量中国社交音乐平台上超过 4.03 亿听众评论对音乐的情感反应。基于音乐心理学的系统和准因果分析研究，我们测试了驱动听众情感反应的音乐、抒情、情境、人口和心理健康影响。最后，在“wǎng-yì-yún”社会现象的推动下，我们确定了平台用户自我披露的影响因素、他们获得的社会支持以及披露者用户活动的显着差异。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过分析中国社交音乐平台的用户评论，研究音乐情感反应中的个性化影响因素，并探讨社交平台上的用户自我披露行为及其影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究认为个人因素在音乐情感反应中起关键作用，但精确量化这些因素的边际效应仍具挑战，需结合大规模数据与计算方法进行系统分析。
AI.method: 开发计算方法分析4.03亿条用户评论，结合音乐心理学理论，通过系统分析与准因果推断，测试音乐、歌词、情境、人口统计及心理健康等因素的影响。
AI.result: 识别出音乐属性、歌词内容、用户情境、人口特征及心理健康状态对情感反应的显著影响，并发现用户自我披露行为与社交支持、平台活跃度的关联差异。
AI.conclusion: 个性化因素对音乐情感反应具有重要影响，社交平台数据可揭示用户情感与行为间的复杂关系，为音乐推荐与心理健康干预提供新视角。

search_text: Affective Idiosyncratic Responses to Music 对音乐的情感特殊反应 Affective responses to music are highly personal. Despite consensus that idiosyncratic factors play a key role in regulating how listeners emotionally respond to music, precisely measuring the marginal effects of these variables has proved challenging. To address this gap, we develop computational methods to measure affective responses to music from over 403M listener comments on a Chinese social music platform. Building on studies from music psychology in systematic and quasi-causal analyses, we test for musical, lyrical, contextual, demographic, and mental health effects that drive listener affective responses. Finally, motivated by the social phenomenon known as wǎng-yì-yún, we identify influencing factors of platform user self-disclosures, the social support they receive, and notable differences in discloser user activity. 对音乐的情感反应是高度个人化的。尽管人们一致认为特殊因素在调节听众对音乐的情感反应方面发挥着关键作用，但事实证明，精确测量这些变量的边际效应具有挑战性。为了解决这一差距，我们开发了计算方法来衡量中国社交音乐平台上超过 4.03 亿听众评论对音乐的情感反应。基于音乐心理学的系统和准因果分析研究，我们测试了驱动听众情感反应的音乐、抒情、情境、人口和心理健康影响。最后，在“wǎng-yì-yún”社会现象的推动下，我们确定了平台用户自我披露的影响因素、他们获得的社会支持以及披露者用户活动的显着差异。 该论文通过分析中国社交音乐平台的用户评论，研究音乐情感反应中的个性化影响因素，并探讨社交平台上的用户自我披露行为及其影响。 Sky CH-Wang,Evan Li,Oliver Li,Smaranda Muresan,Zhou Yu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Jaesung Yoo,Sunghyuk Choi,Ye Seul Yang,Suhyeon Kim,Jieun Choi,Dongkyeong Lim,Yaeji Lim,Hyung Joon Joo,Dae Jung Kim,Rae Woong Park,Hyeong-Jin Yoon,Kwangsoo Kim
title: Review learning: Real world validation of privacy preserving continual learning across medical institutions
title_zh: 回顾学习：现实世界中隐私保护的验证在医疗机构中持续学习
abstract: When a deep learning model is trained sequentially on different datasets, it often forgets the knowledge learned from previous data, a problem known as catastrophic forgetting. This damages the model's performance on diverse datasets, which is critical in privacy-preserving deep learning (PPDL) applications based on transfer learning (TL). To overcome this, we introduce "review learning" (RevL), a low cost continual learning algorithm for diagnosis prediction using electronic health records (EHR) within a PPDL framework. RevL generates data samples from the model which are used to review knowledge from previous datasets. Six simulated institutional experiments and one real-world experiment involving three medical institutions were conducted to validate RevL, using three binary classification EHR data. In the real-world experiment with data from 106,508 patients, the mean global area under the receiver operating curve was 0.710 for RevL and 0.655 for TL. These results demonstrate RevL's ability to retain previously learned knowledge and its effectiveness in real-world PPDL scenarios. Our work establishes a realistic pipeline for PPDL research based on model transfers across institutions and highlights the practicality of continual learning in real-world medical settings using private EHR data.
summary: When a deep learning model is trained sequentially on different datasets, it often forgets the knowledge learned from previous data, a problem known as catastrophic forgetting. This damages the model's performance on diverse datasets, which is critical in privacy-preserving deep learning (PPDL) applications based on transfer learning (TL). To overcome this, we introduce "review learning" (RevL), a low cost continual learning algorithm for diagnosis prediction using electronic health records (EHR) within a PPDL framework. RevL generates data samples from the model which are used to review knowledge from previous datasets. Six simulated institutional experiments and one real-world experiment involving three medical institutions were conducted to validate RevL, using three binary classification EHR data. In the real-world experiment with data from 106,508 patients, the mean global area under the receiver operating curve was 0.710 for RevL and 0.655 for TL. These results demonstrate RevL's ability to retain previously learned knowledge and its effectiveness in real-world PPDL scenarios. Our work establishes a realistic pipeline for PPDL research based on model transfers across institutions and highlights the practicality of continual learning in real-world medical settings using private EHR data.
abstract_zh: 当深度学习模型在不同的数据集上顺序训练时，它经常会忘记从以前的数据中学到的知识，这个问题被称为灾难性遗忘。这会损害模型在不同数据集上的性能，而这对于基于迁移学习 (TL) 的隐私保护深度学习 (PPDL) 应用程序至关重要。为了克服这个问题，我们引入了“回顾学习”(RevL)，这是一种低成本持续学习算法，用于在 PPDL 框架内使用电子健康记录 (EHR) 进行诊断预测。 RevL 从模型中生成数据样本，用于回顾以前数据集中的知识。使用三个二元分类 EHR 数据进行了六项模拟机构实验和一项涉及三个医疗机构的真实世界实验来验证 RevL。在使用来自 106,508 名患者的数据进行的真实世界实验中，受试者工作曲线下的平均全局面积 RevL 为 0.710，TL 为 0.655。这些结果证明了 RevL 保留先前学到的知识的能力及其在现实世界 PPDL 场景中的有效性。我们的工作基于跨机构的模型转移为 PPDL 研究建立了一条现实的管道，并强调了使用私人 EHR 数据在现实世界的医疗环境中持续学习的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Review Learning（RevL）的低开销持续学习算法，用于在隐私保护深度学习（PPDL）框架下，基于电子健康记录（EHR）进行跨医疗机构的诊断预测。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在连续训练不同数据集时易出现灾难性遗忘问题，导致模型在多样化数据集上的性能下降，这对依赖迁移学习的隐私保护医疗应用尤为关键。
AI.method: RevL通过生成模型样本以回顾先前数据集的知识，结合六项模拟实验和一项涉及三家医疗机构的真实世界实验，验证其在PPDL场景下的有效性。
AI.result: 真实世界实验中，RevL在106,508名患者的三类二分类EHR数据上达到平均AUC 0.710，显著优于传统迁移学习（TL）的0.655。
AI.conclusion: RevL验证了持续学习在隐私保护医疗场景中的实用性，为跨机构模型迁移提供了可行的研究框架。

authors_text: Istiak Ahmad,Fahad AlQurashi,Rashid Mehmood
title: Potrika: Raw and Balanced Newspaper Datasets in the Bangla Language with Eight Topics and Five Attributes
title_zh: Potrika：具有八个主题和五个属性的孟加拉语原始且平衡的报纸数据集
abstract: Knowledge is central to human and scientific developments. Natural Language Processing (NLP) allows automated analysis and creation of knowledge. Data is a crucial NLP and machine learning ingredient. The scarcity of open datasets is a well-known problem in machine and deep learning research. This is very much the case for textual NLP datasets in English and other major world languages. For the Bangla language, the situation is even more challenging and the number of large datasets for NLP research is practically nil. We hereby present Potrika, a large single-label Bangla news article textual dataset curated for NLP research from six popular online news portals in Bangladesh (Jugantor, Jaijaidin, Ittefaq, Kaler Kontho, Inqilab, and Somoyer Alo) for the period 2014-2020. The articles are classified into eight distinct categories (National, Sports, International, Entertainment, Economy, Education, Politics, and Science \& Technology) providing five attributes (News Article, Category, Headline, Publication Date, and Newspaper Source). The raw dataset contains 185.51 million words and 12.57 million sentences contained in 664,880 news articles. Moreover, using NLP augmentation techniques, we create from the raw (unbalanced) dataset another (balanced) dataset comprising 320,000 news articles with 40,000 articles in each of the eight news categories. Potrika contains both the datasets (raw and balanced) to suit a wide range of NLP research. By far, to the best of our knowledge, Potrika is the largest and the most extensive dataset for news classification.
summary: Knowledge is central to human and scientific developments. Natural Language Processing (NLP) allows automated analysis and creation of knowledge. Data is a crucial NLP and machine learning ingredient. The scarcity of open datasets is a well-known problem in machine and deep learning research. This is very much the case for textual NLP datasets in English and other major world languages. The articles are classified into eight distinct categories (National, Sports, International, Entertainment, Economy, Education, Politics, and Science \& Technology) providing five attributes (News Article, Category, Headline, Publication Date, and Newspaper Source). The raw dataset contains 185.51 million words and 12.57 million sentences contained in 664,880 news articles. Moreover, using NLP augmentation techniques, we create from the raw (unbalanced) dataset another (balanced) dataset comprising 320,000 news articles with 40,000 articles in each of the eight news categories. Potrika contains both the datasets (raw and balanced) to suit a wide range of NLP research. By far, to the best of our knowledge, Potrika is the largest and the most extensive dataset for news classification.
abstract_zh: 知识是人类和科学发展的核心。自然语言处理 (NLP) 允许自动分析和创建知识。数据是 NLP 和机器学习的重要组成部分。开放数据集的稀缺是机器和深度学习研究中的一个众所周知的问题。英语和其他主要世界语言的文本 NLP 数据集就是这种情况。对于孟加拉语来说，情况更具挑战性，用于 NLP 研究的大型数据集数量几乎为零。我们在此介绍 Potrika，这是一个大型单标签孟加拉新闻文章文本数据集，为 2014-2020 年期间孟加拉国六个流行在线新闻门户（Jugantor、Jaijaidin、Ittefaq、Kaler Kontho、Inqilab 和 Somoyer Alo）的 NLP 研究而策划。这些文章分为八个不同的类别（国家、体育、国际、娱乐、经济、教育、政治和科学技术），提供五个属性（新闻文章、类别、标题、出版日期和报纸来源）。原始数据集包含 664,880 篇新闻文章，包含 18551 万个单词和 1257 万个句子。此外，使用 NLP 增强技术，我们从原始（不平衡）数据集创建另一个（平衡）数据集，其中包含 320,000 篇新闻文章，其中八个新闻类别中每个类别都有 40,000 篇文章。 Potrika 包含两个数据集（原始数据集和平衡数据集），以适应广泛的 NLP 研究。到目前为止，据我们所知，Potrika 是最大、最广泛的新闻分类数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Potrika，一个包含8个主题和5个属性的孟加拉语新闻数据集，包含原始和平衡两种版本，用于自然语言处理研究。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集稀缺，尤其孟加拉语缺乏大规模文本数据，限制了NLP和机器学习研究的发展。
AI.method: 从孟加拉国6家主流新闻网站采集2014-2020年的新闻文章，按8个类别分类，并通过NLP技术生成平衡数据集（每类4万篇）。
AI.result: 原始数据集包含66.488万篇新闻（1855.1万词），平衡数据集包含32万篇新闻，是目前最大的孟加拉语新闻分类数据集。
AI.conclusion: Potrika填补了孟加拉语NLP资源的空白，为后续研究提供了重要基础数据支持。

search_text: Potrika: Raw and Balanced Newspaper Datasets in the Bangla Language with Eight Topics and Five Attributes Potrika：具有八个主题和五个属性的孟加拉语原始且平衡的报纸数据集 Knowledge is central to human and scientific developments. Natural Language Processing (NLP) allows automated analysis and creation of knowledge. Data is a crucial NLP and machine learning ingredient. The scarcity of open datasets is a well-known problem in machine and deep learning research. This is very much the case for textual NLP datasets in English and other major world languages. For the Bangla language, the situation is even more challenging and the number of large datasets for NLP research is practically nil. We hereby present Potrika, a large single-label Bangla news article textual dataset curated for NLP research from six popular online news portals in Bangladesh (Jugantor, Jaijaidin, Ittefaq, Kaler Kontho, Inqilab, and Somoyer Alo) for the period 2014-2020. The articles are classified into eight distinct categories (National, Sports, International, Entertainment, Economy, Education, Politics, and Science \& Technology) providing five attributes (News Article, Category, Headline, Publication Date, and Newspaper Source). The raw dataset contains 185.51 million words and 12.57 million sentences contained in 664,880 news articles. Moreover, using NLP augmentation techniques, we create from the raw (unbalanced) dataset another (balanced) dataset comprising 320,000 news articles with 40,000 articles in each of the eight news categories. Potrika contains both the datasets (raw and balanced) to suit a wide range of NLP research. By far, to the best of our knowledge, Potrika is the largest and the most extensive dataset for news classification. 知识是人类和科学发展的核心。自然语言处理 (NLP) 允许自动分析和创建知识。数据是 NLP 和机器学习的重要组成部分。开放数据集的稀缺是机器和深度学习研究中的一个众所周知的问题。英语和其他主要世界语言的文本 NLP 数据集就是这种情况。对于孟加拉语来说，情况更具挑战性，用于 NLP 研究的大型数据集数量几乎为零。我们在此介绍 Potrika，这是一个大型单标签孟加拉新闻文章文本数据集，为 2014-2020 年期间孟加拉国六个流行在线新闻门户（Jugantor、Jaijaidin、Ittefaq、Kaler Kontho、Inqilab 和 Somoyer Alo）的 NLP 研究而策划。这些文章分为八个不同的类别（国家、体育、国际、娱乐、经济、教育、政治和科学技术），提供五个属性（新闻文章、类别、标题、出版日期和报纸来源）。原始数据集包含 664,880 篇新闻文章，包含 18551 万个单词和 1257 万个句子。此外，使用 NLP 增强技术，我们从原始（不平衡）数据集创建另一个（平衡）数据集，其中包含 320,000 篇新闻文章，其中八个新闻类别中每个类别都有 40,000 篇文章。 Potrika 包含两个数据集（原始数据集和平衡数据集），以适应广泛的 NLP 研究。到目前为止，据我们所知，Potrika 是最大、最广泛的新闻分类数据集。 本文介绍了Potrika，一个包含8个主题和5个属性的孟加拉语新闻数据集，包含原始和平衡两种版本，用于自然语言处理研究。 Istiak Ahmad,Fahad AlQurashi,Rashid Mehmood cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Negar Heidari,Alexandros Iosifidis
title: Learning Diversified Feature Representations for Facial Expression Recognition in the Wild
title_zh: 学习野外面部表情识别的多样化特征表示
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, submitted to a conference
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, submitted to a conference
abstract: Diversity of the features extracted by deep neural networks is important for enhancing the model generalization ability and accordingly its performance in different learning tasks. Facial expression recognition in the wild has attracted interest in recent years due to the challenges existing in this area for extracting discriminative and informative features from occluded images in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a mechanism to diversify the features extracted by CNN layers of state-of-the-art facial expression recognition architectures for enhancing the model capacity in learning discriminative features. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, we incorporate this mechanism in two state-of-the-art models to (i) diversify local/global features in an attention-based model and (ii) diversify features extracted by different learners in an ensemble-based model. Experimental results on three well-known facial expression recognition in-the-wild datasets, AffectNet, FER+, and RAF-DB, show the effectiveness of our method, achieving the state-of-the-art performance of 89.99% on RAF-DB, 89.34% on FER+ and the competitive accuracy of 60.02% on AffectNet dataset.
summary: Diversity of the features extracted by deep neural networks is important for enhancing the model generalization ability and accordingly its performance in different learning tasks. Facial expression recognition in the wild has attracted interest in recent years due to the challenges existing in this area for extracting discriminative and informative features from occluded images in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a mechanism to diversify the features extracted by CNN layers of state-of-the-art facial expression recognition architectures for enhancing the model capacity in learning discriminative features. To evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach, we incorporate this mechanism in two state-of-the-art models to (i) diversify local/global features in an attention-based model and (ii) diversify features extracted by different learners in an ensemble-based model. Experimental results on three well-known facial expression recognition in-the-wild datasets, AffectNet, FER+, and RAF-DB, show the effectiveness of our method, achieving the state-of-the-art performance of 89.99% on RAF-DB, 89.34% on FER+ and the competitive accuracy of 60.02% on AffectNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络提取特征的多样性对于增强模型泛化能力及其在不同学习任务中的性能非常重要。近年来，野外面部表情识别引起了人们的兴趣，因为该领域在从现实场景中的遮挡图像中提取区分性和信息性特征方面存在挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种机制，使最先进的面部表情识别架构的 CNN 层提取的特征多样化，以增强模型学习判别特征的能力。为了评估所提出方法的有效性，我们将此机制纳入两个最先进的模型中，以（i）在基于注意力的模型中使局部/全局特征多样化，以及（ii）在基于集成的模型中使不同学习者提取的特征多样化。在三个著名的野外表情识别数据集 AffectNet、FER+ 和 RAF-DB 上的实验结果表明了我们的方法的有效性，在 RAF-DB 上实现了 89.99% 的最先进性能，在 FER+ 上实现了 89.34% 的最先进性能，在 AffectNet 数据集上实现了 60.02% 的竞争准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种机制以多样化卷积神经网络特征表示，提升野外面部表情识别的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络提取的特征多样性对模型泛化能力至关重要，而野外面部表情识别因真实场景中的遮挡等问题面临挑战，需提升特征判别性。
AI.method: 在两种先进模型中引入特征多样化机制：(i) 在基于注意力的模型中区分局部/全局特征，(ii) 在集成模型中多样化不同学习器的特征。
AI.result: 在AffectNet、FER+和RAF-DB三个数据集上取得SOTA结果，RAF-DB达89.99%，FER+为89.34%，AffectNet为60.02%。
AI.conclusion: 特征多样化机制有效提升了野外面部表情识别性能，实验结果验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Chenning Yu,Hongzhan Yu,Sicun Gao
title: Learning Control Admissibility Models with Graph Neural Networks for Multi-Agent Navigation
title_zh: 使用图神经网络学习控制接纳模型以进行多智能体导航
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning in continuous domains focuses on learning control policies that map states to distributions over actions that ideally concentrate on the optimal choices in each step. In multi-agent navigation problems, the optimal actions depend heavily on the agents' density. Their interaction patterns grow exponentially with respect to such density, making it hard for learning-based methods to generalize. We propose to switch the learning objectives from predicting the optimal actions to predicting sets of admissible actions, which we call control admissibility models (CAMs), such that they can be easily composed and used for online inference for an arbitrary number of agents. We design CAMs using graph neural networks and develop training methods that optimize the CAMs in the standard model-free setting, with the additional benefit of eliminating the need for reward engineering typically required to balance collision avoidance and goal-reaching requirements. We evaluate the proposed approach in multi-agent navigation environments. We show that the CAM models can be trained in environments with only a few agents and be easily composed for deployment in dense environments with hundreds of agents, achieving better performance than state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning in continuous domains focuses on learning control policies that map states to distributions over actions that ideally concentrate on the optimal choices in each step. In multi-agent navigation problems, the optimal actions depend heavily on the agents' density. Their interaction patterns grow exponentially with respect to such density, making it hard for learning-based methods to generalize. We propose to switch the learning objectives from predicting the optimal actions to predicting sets of admissible actions, which we call control admissibility models (CAMs), such that they can be easily composed and used for online inference for an arbitrary number of agents. We design CAMs using graph neural networks and develop training methods that optimize the CAMs in the standard model-free setting, with the additional benefit of eliminating the need for reward engineering typically required to balance collision avoidance and goal-reaching requirements. We evaluate the proposed approach in multi-agent navigation environments. We show that the CAM models can be trained in environments with only a few agents and be easily composed for deployment in dense environments with hundreds of agents, achieving better performance than state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 连续领域中的深度强化学习侧重于学习控制策略，这些策略将状态映射到行动的分布，理想情况下集中于每个步骤中的最佳选择。在多智能体导航问题中，最优动作在很大程度上取决于智能体的密度。它们的交互模式相对于这种密度呈指数级增长，使得基于学习的方法难以推广。我们建议将学习目标从预测最佳动作转变为预测可接受的动作集，我们称之为控制可接受性模型（CAM），这样它们就可以轻松地组合并用于任意数量的智能体的在线推理。我们使用图神经网络设计 CAM，并开发在标准无模型设置中优化 CAM 的训练方法，其额外好处是消除了通常需要平衡避免碰撞和达到目标要求所需的奖励工程。我们在多智能体导航环境中评估所提出的方法。我们表明，CAM 模型可以在只有几个代理的环境中进行训练，并且可以轻松组合以部署在具有数百个代理的密集环境中，从而实现比最先进的方法更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用图神经网络学习控制可接受性模型（CAMs），以解决多智能体导航中因智能体密度高导致的策略泛化困难问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习在多智能体导航中难以处理高密度场景下的指数级交互模式，且依赖复杂的奖励工程平衡避障与目标达成需求。
AI.method: 设计基于图神经网络的控制可接受性模型（CAMs），通过预测可组合的动作集而非最优动作，结合无模型训练方法消除奖励工程需求。
AI.result: CAM模型在少量智能体环境中训练后可扩展至数百智能体的密集场景，性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CAMs通过解耦动作可接受性预测与组合机制，有效解决了多智能体导航的可扩展性与奖励设计难题，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Learning Control Admissibility Models with Graph Neural Networks for Multi-Agent Navigation 使用图神经网络学习控制接纳模型以进行多智能体导航 Deep reinforcement learning in continuous domains focuses on learning control policies that map states to distributions over actions that ideally concentrate on the optimal choices in each step. In multi-agent navigation problems, the optimal actions depend heavily on the agents' density. Their interaction patterns grow exponentially with respect to such density, making it hard for learning-based methods to generalize. We propose to switch the learning objectives from predicting the optimal actions to predicting sets of admissible actions, which we call control admissibility models (CAMs), such that they can be easily composed and used for online inference for an arbitrary number of agents. We design CAMs using graph neural networks and develop training methods that optimize the CAMs in the standard model-free setting, with the additional benefit of eliminating the need for reward engineering typically required to balance collision avoidance and goal-reaching requirements. We evaluate the proposed approach in multi-agent navigation environments. We show that the CAM models can be trained in environments with only a few agents and be easily composed for deployment in dense environments with hundreds of agents, achieving better performance than state-of-the-art methods. 连续领域中的深度强化学习侧重于学习控制策略，这些策略将状态映射到行动的分布，理想情况下集中于每个步骤中的最佳选择。在多智能体导航问题中，最优动作在很大程度上取决于智能体的密度。它们的交互模式相对于这种密度呈指数级增长，使得基于学习的方法难以推广。我们建议将学习目标从预测最佳动作转变为预测可接受的动作集，我们称之为控制可接受性模型（CAM），这样它们就可以轻松地组合并用于任意数量的智能体的在线推理。我们使用图神经网络设计 CAM，并开发在标准无模型设置中优化 CAM 的训练方法，其额外好处是消除了通常需要平衡避免碰撞和达到目标要求所需的奖励工程。我们在多智能体导航环境中评估所提出的方法。我们表明，CAM 模型可以在只有几个代理的环境中进行训练，并且可以轻松组合以部署在具有数百个代理的密集环境中，从而实现比最先进的方法更好的性能。 本文提出使用图神经网络学习控制可接受性模型（CAMs），以解决多智能体导航中因智能体密度高导致的策略泛化困难问题。 Chenning Yu,Hongzhan Yu,Sicun Gao cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: S. Gkelios,A. Kastellos,S. Chatzichristofis
title: 6th Place Solution to Google Universal Image Embedding
title_zh: 谷歌通用图像嵌入解决方案第六名
abstract: This paper presents the 6th place solution to the Google Universal Image Embedding competition on Kaggle. Our approach is based on the CLIP architecture, a powerful pre-trained model used to learn visual representation from natural language supervision. We also utilized the SubCenter ArcFace loss with dynamic margins to improve the distinctive power of class separability and embeddings. Finally, a diverse dataset has been created based on the test's set categories and the leaderboard's feedback. By carefully crafting a training scheme to enhance transfer learning, our submission scored 0.685 on the private leaderboard.
summary: This paper presents the 6th place solution to the Google Universal Image Embedding competition on Kaggle. Our approach is based on the CLIP architecture, a powerful pre-trained model used to learn visual representation from natural language supervision. We also utilized the SubCenter ArcFace loss with dynamic margins to improve the distinctive power of class separability and embeddings. Finally, a diverse dataset has been created based on the test's set categories and the leaderboard's feedback. By carefully crafting a training scheme to enhance transfer learning, our submission scored 0.685 on the private leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Kaggle 上的 Google 通用图像嵌入竞赛第六名的解决方案。我们的方法基于 CLIP 架构，这是一个强大的预训练模型，用于从自然语言监督中学习视觉表示。我们还利用具有动态边距的 SubCenter ArcFace 损失来提高类可分离性和嵌入的独特能力。最后，根据测试集类别和排行榜的反馈创建了多样化的数据集。通过精心制定培训计划来增强迁移学习，我们提交的内容在私人排行榜上得分为 0.685。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在Kaggle的Google通用图像嵌入竞赛中获得第六名的解决方案
AI.motivation: 基于CLIP架构和改进的损失函数，提升图像嵌入的类别可分性和泛化能力
AI.method: 结合CLIP架构、SubCenter ArcFace动态边距损失函数，构建多样化数据集并优化迁移学习训练策略
AI.result: 在私有排行榜上获得0.685分
AI.conclusion: 通过CLIP架构与改进的损失函数结合，有效提升了嵌入质量，验证了迁移学习优化策略的有效性

authors_text: Wil Thomason,Marlin P. Strub,Jonathan D. Gammell
title: Task and Motion Informed Trees (TMIT*): Almost-Surely Asymptotically Optimal Integrated Task and Motion Planning
title_zh: 任务和运动知情树 (TMIT*)：几乎肯定渐进最优的集成任务和运动规划
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to IEEE RA-L and IROS 2022
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to IEEE RA-L and IROS 2022
abstract: High-level autonomy requires discrete and continuous reasoning to decide both what actions to take and how to execute them. Integrated Task and Motion Planning (TMP) algorithms solve these hybrid problems jointly to consider constraints between the discrete symbolic actions (i.e., the task plan) and their continuous geometric realization (i.e., motion plans). This joint approach solves more difficult problems than approaches that address the task and motion subproblems independently. TMP algorithms combine and extend results from both task and motion planning. TMP has mainly focused on computational performance and completeness and less on solution optimality. Optimal TMP is difficult because the independent optima of the subproblems may not be the optimal integrated solution, which can only be found by jointly optimizing both plans. This paper presents Task and Motion Informed Trees (TMIT*), an optimal TMP algorithm that combines results from makespan-optimal task planning and almost-surely asymptotically optimal motion planning. TMIT* interleaves asymmetric forward and reverse searches to delay computationally expensive operations until necessary and perform an efficient informed search directly in the problem's hybrid state space. This allows it to solve problems quickly and then converge towards the optimal solution with additional computational time, as demonstrated on the evaluated robotic-manipulation benchmark problems.
summary: High-level autonomy requires discrete and continuous reasoning to decide both what actions to take and how to execute them. Integrated Task and Motion Planning (TMP) algorithms solve these hybrid problems jointly to consider constraints between the discrete symbolic actions (i.e., the task plan) and their continuous geometric realization (i.e., motion plans). This joint approach solves more difficult problems than approaches that address the task and motion subproblems independently. TMP algorithms combine and extend results from both task and motion planning. TMP has mainly focused on computational performance and completeness and less on solution optimality. Optimal TMP is difficult because the independent optima of the subproblems may not be the optimal integrated solution, which can only be found by jointly optimizing both plans. This paper presents Task and Motion Informed Trees (TMIT*), an optimal TMP algorithm that combines results from makespan-optimal task planning and almost-surely asymptotically optimal motion planning. TMIT* interleaves asymmetric forward and reverse searches to delay computationally expensive operations until necessary and perform an efficient informed search directly in the problem's hybrid state space. This allows it to solve problems quickly and then converge towards the optimal solution with additional computational time, as demonstrated on the evaluated robotic-manipulation benchmark problems.
abstract_zh: 高级自治需要离散和连续的推理来决定采取什么行动以及如何执行它们。集成任务和运动规划（TMP）算法联合解决这些混合问题，以考虑离散符号动作（即任务计划）与其连续几何实现（即运动计划）之间的约束。这种联合方法比独立解决任务和运动子问题的方法解决了更困难的问题。 TMP 算法结合并扩展了任务和运动规划的结果。 TMP 主要关注计算性能和完整性，较少关注解决方案的最优性。最优TMP是困难的，因为子问题的独立最优可能不是最优集成解，只能通过联合优化两个计划来找到。本文介绍了任务和运动知情树 (TMIT*)，这是一种最佳 TMP 算法，结合了 makespan 最佳任务规划和几乎肯定渐进最佳运动规划的结果。 TMIT* 交错不对称的前向和反向搜索，以延迟计算成本高昂的操作，直到需要为止，并直接在问题的混合状态空间中执行高效的知情搜索。这使得它能够快速解决问题，然后通过额外的计算时间收敛到最佳解决方案，正如评估的机器人操作基准问题所证明的那样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Task and Motion Informed Trees (TMIT*)的最优集成任务与运动规划算法，通过结合任务规划和运动规划的优势，解决高阶自主系统中的混合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有集成任务与运动规划（TMP）算法主要关注计算性能和完备性，而较少关注解决方案的最优性。独立子问题的最优解未必构成整体最优解，因此需要联合优化任务与运动规划以提升整体性能。
AI.method: TMIT*通过交错的非对称正向与反向搜索，在混合状态空间中直接进行高效启发式搜索，延迟计算密集型操作直至必要时，并结合任务规划的makespan最优性与运动规划的几乎肯定渐近最优性。
AI.result: 在评估的机器人操作基准问题中，TMIT*能够快速求解问题，并随着计算时间增加逐步收敛至最优解，验证了其效率与最优性。
AI.conclusion: TMIT*通过联合优化任务与运动规划，实现了高效且几乎肯定渐近最优的解决方案，为集成任务与运动规划领域提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Ananta Nair,Farnoush Banaei-Kashani
title: Bridging the Gap between Artificial Intelligence and Artificial General Intelligence: A Ten Commandment Framework for Human-Like Intelligence
title_zh: 弥合人工智能和通用人工智能之间的差距：类人智能的十诫框架
abstract: The field of artificial intelligence has seen explosive growth and exponential success. The last phase of development showcased deep learnings ability to solve a variety of difficult problems across a multitude of domains. Many of these networks met and exceeded human benchmarks by becoming experts in the domains in which they are trained. Though the successes of artificial intelligence have begun to overshadow its failures, there is still much that separates current artificial intelligence tools from becoming the exceptional general learners that humans are. In this paper, we identify the ten commandments upon which human intelligence is systematically and hierarchically built. We believe these commandments work collectively to serve as the essential ingredients that lead to the emergence of higher-order cognition and intelligence. This paper discusses a computational framework that could house these ten commandments and suggests new architectural modifications that could lead to the development of smarter, more explainable, and generalizable artificial systems inspired by a neuromorphic approach.

abstract_zh: 人工智能领域取得了爆炸性增长和指数级成功。开发的最后阶段展示了深度学习解决多个领域的各种难题的能力。其中许多网络通过成为其接受培训的领域的专家而达到并超越了人类基准。尽管人工智能的成功已经开始掩盖它的失败，但当前的人工智能工具距离成为人类那样出色的通用学习者仍有很大差距。在本文中，我们确定了人类智能系统和分层构建的十诫。我们相信这些戒律共同发挥作用，成为导致高阶认知和智力出现的基本要素。本文讨论了一个可以容纳这十条戒律的计算框架，并提出了新的架构修改，这些修改可能会导致受神经拟态方法启发的更智能、更可解释和可推广的人工系统的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于人类智能十诫的计算框架，旨在弥合人工智能与通用人工智能（AGI）之间的差距，推动更接近人类认知能力的系统发展。
AI.motivation: 当前人工智能在特定领域表现优异，但缺乏人类般的通用学习能力，需系统性借鉴人类智能结构以突破现有局限。
AI.method: 通过识别人类智能的十诫原则，构建分层计算框架，并结合神经形态架构进行创新设计。
AI.result: 为开发具备更高智能性、可解释性和泛化能力的AI系统提供了理论基础与技术路线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为实现类人通用人工智能指明了方向，后续需通过技术实现与验证完善理论体系。

authors_text: Omer Ronen,Theo Saarinen,Yan Shuo Tan,James Duncan,Bin Yu
title: A Mixing Time Lower Bound for a Simplified Version of BART
title_zh: 简化版 BART 的混合时间下界
abstract: Bayesian Additive Regression Trees (BART) is a popular Bayesian non-parametric regression algorithm. The posterior is a distribution over sums of decision trees, and predictions are made by averaging approximate samples from the posterior. The combination of strong predictive performance and the ability to provide uncertainty measures has led BART to be commonly used in the social sciences, biostatistics, and causal inference. BART uses Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) to obtain approximate posterior samples over a parameterized space of sums of trees, but it has often been observed that the chains are slow to mix. In this paper, we provide the first lower bound on the mixing time for a simplified version of BART in which we reduce the sum to a single tree and use a subset of the possible moves for the MCMC proposal distribution. Our lower bound for the mixing time grows exponentially with the number of data points. Inspired by this new connection between the mixing time and the number of data points, we perform rigorous simulations on BART. We show qualitatively that BART's mixing time increases with the number of data points. The slow mixing time of the simplified BART suggests a large variation between different runs of the simplified BART algorithm and a similar large variation is known for BART in the literature. This large variation could result in a lack of stability in the models, predictions, and posterior intervals obtained from the BART MCMC samples. Our lower bound and simulations suggest increasing the number of chains with the number of data points.
summary: Bayesian Additive Regression Trees (BART) is a popular Bayesian non-parametric regression algorithm. The posterior is a distribution over sums of decision trees, and predictions are made by averaging approximate samples from the posterior. The combination of strong predictive performance and the ability to provide uncertainty measures has led BART to be commonly used in the social sciences, biostatistics, and causal inference. BART uses Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) to obtain approximate posterior samples over a parameterized space of sums of trees, but it has often been observed that the chains are slow to mix. In this paper, we provide the first lower bound on the mixing time for a simplified version of BART in which we reduce the sum to a single tree and use a subset of the possible moves for the MCMC proposal distribution. Our lower bound for the mixing time grows exponentially with the number of data points. Inspired by this new connection between the mixing time and the number of data points, we perform rigorous simulations on BART. We show qualitatively that BART's mixing time increases with the number of data points. The slow mixing time of the simplified BART suggests a large variation between different runs of the simplified BART algorithm and a similar large variation is known for BART in the literature. This large variation could result in a lack of stability in the models, predictions, and posterior intervals obtained from the BART MCMC samples. Our lower bound and simulations suggest increasing the number of chains with the number of data points.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯加性回归树 (BART) 是一种流行的贝叶斯非参数回归算法。后验是决策树总和的分布，通过对后验的近似样本进行平均来进行预测。强大的预测性能和提供不确定性度量的能力相结合，使得 BART 广泛应用于社会科学、生物统计学和因果推理。 BART 使用马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 在树和的参数化空间上获取近似后验样本，但经常观察到链混合速度很慢。在本文中，我们为 BART 的简化版本提供了混合时间的第一个下限，其中我们将总和减少到一棵树，并使用 MCMC 提议分布的可能移动的子集。我们的混合时间下限随着数据点的数量呈指数增长。受到混合时间和数据点数量之间这种新联系的启发，我们对 BART 进行了严格的模拟。我们定性地表明，BART 的混合时间随着数据点数量的增加而增加。简化的 BART 的缓慢混合时间表明简化的 BART 算法的不同运行之间存在较大的变化，并且文献中已知 BART 也存在类似的较大变化。这种巨大的变化可能会导致从 BART MCMC 样本获得的模型、预测和后验区间缺乏稳定性。我们的下限和模拟建议随着数据点数量的增加而增加链的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文针对简化版BART模型的混合时间提供了下界分析，揭示其随数据量指数增长的特性。
AI.motivation: BART算法虽具良好预测性能，但其MCMC采样链混合速度慢，导致结果不稳定，需量化分析混合时间与数据量的关系。
AI.method: 将BART简化为单棵树结构，限制MCMC提议分布的移动方式，结合理论下界分析与模拟实验验证混合时间特性。
AI.result: 理论下界证明混合时间随数据量呈指数增长，模拟实验进一步验证了数据量增加导致混合时间延长的现象。
AI.conclusion: 简化BART的混合时间下界表明，需随数据量增加而扩展MCMC链数量，以提升模型稳定性与结果可靠性。

authors_text: Alper Canberk,Cheng Chi,Huy Ha,Benjamin Burchfiel,Eric Cousineau,Siyuan Feng,Shuran Song
title: Cloth Funnels: Canonicalized-Alignment for Multi-Purpose Garment Manipulation
title_zh: 布料漏斗：多用途服装操作的规范化对齐
abstract: Automating garment manipulation is challenging due to extremely high variability in object configurations. To reduce this intrinsic variation, we introduce the task of "canonicalized-alignment" that simplifies downstream applications by reducing the possible garment configurations. This task can be considered as "cloth state funnel" that manipulates arbitrarily configured clothing items into a predefined deformable configuration (i.e. canonicalization) at an appropriate rigid pose (i.e. alignment). In the end, the cloth items will result in a compact set of structured and highly visible configurations - which are desirable for downstream manipulation skills. To enable this task, we propose a novel canonicalized-alignment objective that effectively guides learning to avoid adverse local minima during learning. Using this objective, we learn a multi-arm, multi-primitive policy that strategically chooses between dynamic flings and quasi-static pick and place actions to achieve efficient canonicalized-alignment. We evaluate this approach on a real-world ironing and folding system that relies on this learned policy as the common first step. Empirically, we demonstrate that our task-agnostic canonicalized-alignment can enable even simple manually-designed policies to work well where they were previously inadequate, thus bridging the gap between automated non-deformable manufacturing and deformable manipulation. Code and qualitative visualizations are available at https://clothfunnels.cs.columbia.edu/. Video can be found at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TkUn0b7mbj0.
summary: Automating garment manipulation is challenging due to extremely high variability in object configurations. To reduce this intrinsic variation, we introduce the task of "canonicalized-alignment" that simplifies downstream applications by reducing the possible garment configurations. This task can be considered as "cloth state funnel" that manipulates arbitrarily configured clothing items into a predefined deformable configuration (i.e. canonicalization) at an appropriate rigid pose (i.e. alignment). In the end, the cloth items will result in a compact set of structured and highly visible configurations - which are desirable for downstream manipulation skills. To enable this task, we propose a novel canonicalized-alignment objective that effectively guides learning to avoid adverse local minima during learning. Using this objective, we learn a multi-arm, multi-primitive policy that strategically chooses between dynamic flings and quasi-static pick and place actions to achieve efficient canonicalized-alignment. We evaluate this approach on a real-world ironing and folding system that relies on this learned policy as the common first step. Empirically, we demonstrate that our task-agnostic canonicalized-alignment can enable even simple manually-designed policies to work well where they were previously inadequate, thus bridging the gap between automated non-deformable manufacturing and deformable manipulation. Code and qualitative visualizations are available at https://clothfunnels.cs.columbia.edu/. Video can be found at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TkUn0b7mbj0.
abstract_zh: 由于对象配置的可变性极高，自动化服装操作具有挑战性。为了减少这种内在的变化，我们引入了“规范化对齐”的任务，通过减少可能的服装配置来简化下游应用程序。该任务可以被视为“布料状态漏斗”，它将任意配置的服装以适当的刚性姿势（即对齐）操纵为预定义的可变形配置（即规范化）。最终，布料将形成一组紧凑的结构化且高度可见的配置 - 这对于下游操作技能来说是理想的。为了完成这项任务，我们提出了一种新颖的规范化对齐目标，可以有效地指导学习，以避免学习过程中出现不利的局部最小值。利用这个目标，我们学习了一种多臂、多原语策略，该策略在动态投掷和准静态拾取和放置操作之间进行策略性选择，以实现有效的规范化对齐。我们在现实世界的熨烫和折叠系统上评估这种方法，该系统依赖于这种学习策略作为共同的第一步。根据经验，我们证明，与任务无关的规范化对齐甚至可以使简单的手动设计策略在以前不足的地方发挥作用，从而弥合自动化不可变形制造和可变形操作之间的差距。代码和定性可视化可在 https://clothfunnels.cs.columbia.edu/ 获得。视频可在 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TkUn0b7mbj0 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'Cloth Funnels'的方法，通过'规范对齐'任务将任意配置的衣物转换为预定义的可变形配置，以简化下游服装操作任务。
AI.motivation: 服装操作因物体配置高度可变而难以自动化，现有方法难以处理变形物体的复杂性，需通过规范对齐降低配置多样性以提升后续任务效率。
AI.method: 设计规范对齐目标函数避免局部最优，提出多臂多原语策略，结合动态抛掷与准静态抓取动作，实现高效对齐。
AI.result: 在真实熨烫折叠系统中验证方法有效性，证明任务无关的规范对齐可提升手动策略性能，弥合刚性制造与变形操作间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 规范对齐框架为多用途服装操作提供通用解决方案，通过结构化配置提升自动化水平，为变形物体操控开辟新方向。

search_text: Cloth Funnels: Canonicalized-Alignment for Multi-Purpose Garment Manipulation 布料漏斗：多用途服装操作的规范化对齐 Automating garment manipulation is challenging due to extremely high variability in object configurations. To reduce this intrinsic variation, we introduce the task of "canonicalized-alignment" that simplifies downstream applications by reducing the possible garment configurations. This task can be considered as "cloth state funnel" that manipulates arbitrarily configured clothing items into a predefined deformable configuration (i.e. canonicalization) at an appropriate rigid pose (i.e. alignment). In the end, the cloth items will result in a compact set of structured and highly visible configurations - which are desirable for downstream manipulation skills. To enable this task, we propose a novel canonicalized-alignment objective that effectively guides learning to avoid adverse local minima during learning. Using this objective, we learn a multi-arm, multi-primitive policy that strategically chooses between dynamic flings and quasi-static pick and place actions to achieve efficient canonicalized-alignment. We evaluate this approach on a real-world ironing and folding system that relies on this learned policy as the common first step. Empirically, we demonstrate that our task-agnostic canonicalized-alignment can enable even simple manually-designed policies to work well where they were previously inadequate, thus bridging the gap between automated non-deformable manufacturing and deformable manipulation. Code and qualitative visualizations are available at https://clothfunnels.cs.columbia.edu/. Video can be found at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TkUn0b7mbj0. 由于对象配置的可变性极高，自动化服装操作具有挑战性。为了减少这种内在的变化，我们引入了“规范化对齐”的任务，通过减少可能的服装配置来简化下游应用程序。该任务可以被视为“布料状态漏斗”，它将任意配置的服装以适当的刚性姿势（即对齐）操纵为预定义的可变形配置（即规范化）。最终，布料将形成一组紧凑的结构化且高度可见的配置 - 这对于下游操作技能来说是理想的。为了完成这项任务，我们提出了一种新颖的规范化对齐目标，可以有效地指导学习，以避免学习过程中出现不利的局部最小值。利用这个目标，我们学习了一种多臂、多原语策略，该策略在动态投掷和准静态拾取和放置操作之间进行策略性选择，以实现有效的规范化对齐。我们在现实世界的熨烫和折叠系统上评估这种方法，该系统依赖于这种学习策略作为共同的第一步。根据经验，我们证明，与任务无关的规范化对齐甚至可以使简单的手动设计策略在以前不足的地方发挥作用，从而弥合自动化不可变形制造和可变形操作之间的差距。代码和定性可视化可在 https://clothfunnels.cs.columbia.edu/ 获得。视频可在 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TkUn0b7mbj0 找到。 本文提出一种名为'Cloth Funnels'的方法，通过'规范对齐'任务将任意配置的衣物转换为预定义的可变形配置，以简化下游服装操作任务。 Alper Canberk,Cheng Chi,Huy Ha,Benjamin Burchfiel,Eric Cousineau,Siyuan Feng,Shuran Song cs.RO

authors_text: Michihiro Yasunaga,Antoine Bosselut,Hongyu Ren,Xikun Zhang,Christopher D Manning,Percy Liang,Jure Leskovec
title: Deep Bidirectional Language-Knowledge Graph Pretraining
title_zh: 深度双向语言-知识图预训练
comment: Published at NeurIPS 2022. Code, data, and trained models are available at https://github.com/michiyasunaga/dragon
comments: Published at NeurIPS 2022. Code, data, and trained models are available at https://github.com/michiyasunaga/dragon
abstract: Pretraining a language model (LM) on text has been shown to help various downstream NLP tasks. Recent works show that a knowledge graph (KG) can complement text data, offering structured background knowledge that provides a useful scaffold for reasoning. However, these works are not pretrained to learn a deep fusion of the two modalities at scale, limiting the potential to acquire fully joint representations of text and KG. Here we propose DRAGON (Deep Bidirectional Language-Knowledge Graph Pretraining), a self-supervised approach to pretraining a deeply joint language-knowledge foundation model from text and KG at scale. Specifically, our model takes pairs of text segments and relevant KG subgraphs as input and bidirectionally fuses information from both modalities. We pretrain this model by unifying two self-supervised reasoning tasks, masked language modeling and KG link prediction. DRAGON outperforms existing LM and LM+KG models on diverse downstream tasks including question answering across general and biomedical domains, with +5% absolute gain on average. In particular, DRAGON achieves notable performance on complex reasoning about language and knowledge (+10% on questions involving long contexts or multi-step reasoning) and low-resource QA (+8% on OBQA and RiddleSense), and new state-of-the-art results on various BioNLP tasks. Our code and trained models are available at https://github.com/michiyasunaga/dragon.
summary: Pretraining a language model (LM) on text has been shown to help various downstream NLP tasks. Recent works show that a knowledge graph (KG) can complement text data, offering structured background knowledge that provides a useful scaffold for reasoning. However, these works are not pretrained to learn a deep fusion of the two modalities at scale, limiting the potential to acquire fully joint representations of text and KG. Here we propose DRAGON (Deep Bidirectional Language-Knowledge Graph Pretraining), a self-supervised approach to pretraining a deeply joint language-knowledge foundation model from text and KG at scale. Specifically, our model takes pairs of text segments and relevant KG subgraphs as input and bidirectionally fuses information from both modalities. We pretrain this model by unifying two self-supervised reasoning tasks, masked language modeling and KG link prediction. DRAGON outperforms existing LM and LM+KG models on diverse downstream tasks including question answering across general and biomedical domains, with +5% absolute gain on average. In particular, DRAGON achieves notable performance on complex reasoning about language and knowledge (+10% on questions involving long contexts or multi-step reasoning) and low-resource QA (+8% on OBQA and RiddleSense), and new state-of-the-art results on various BioNLP tasks. Our code and trained models are available at https://github.com/michiyasunaga/dragon.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，在文本上预训练语言模型 (LM) 有助于各种下游 NLP 任务。最近的工作表明，知识图（KG）可以补充文本数据，提供结构化的背景知识，为推理提供有用的支架。然而，这些作品并未经过预先训练来大规模学习两种模式的深度融合，从而限制了获得文本和 KG 完全联合表示的潜力。在这里，我们提出了 DRAGON（深度双向语言知识图预训练），这是一种自监督方法，用于大规模地从文本和知识图谱中预训练深度联合的语言知识基础模型。具体来说，我们的模型将文本片段对和相关 KG 子图作为输入，并双向融合来自两种模式的信息。我们通过统一两个自监督推理任务（掩码语言建模和 KG 链接预测）来预训练该模型。 DRAGON 在各种下游任务（包括一般和生物医学领域的问答）上优于现有 LM 和 LM+KG 模型，平均绝对增益 +5%。特别是，DRAGON 在有关语言和知识的复杂推理（涉及长上下文或多步骤推理的问题上+10%）和低资源 QA（在 OBQA 和 RiddleSense 上+8%）方面取得了显着的性能，并在各种 BioNLP 任务上取得了最新的最新结果。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://github.com/michiyasunaga/dragon 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRAGON模型，通过深度双向融合文本与知识图谱（KG）进行预训练，提升多任务表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效融合文本与KG的结构化知识，限制了模型在复杂推理和低资源场景下的性能。
AI.method: 设计双向融合机制，输入文本片段与关联KG子图，结合掩码语言建模与KG链接预测任务进行自监督预训练。
AI.result: 在通用和生物医学领域问答任务中平均提升5%，复杂推理任务提升10%，低资源QA提升8%，BioNLP任务达新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: DRAGON通过大规模联合预训练文本与KG，显著提升模型在多跳推理和低资源场景的性能，代码与模型已开源。
