authors_text: Luke Marris,Ian Gemp,Thomas Anthony,Andrea Tacchetti,Siqi Liu,Karl Tuyls
title: Turbocharging Solution Concepts: Solving NEs, CEs and CCEs with Neural Equilibrium Solvers
title_zh: 涡轮增压解决方案概念：使用神经平衡求解器求解 NE、CE 和 CCE
abstract: Solution concepts such as Nash Equilibria, Correlated Equilibria, and Coarse Correlated Equilibria are useful components for many multiagent machine learning algorithms. Unfortunately, solving a normal-form game could take prohibitive or non-deterministic time to converge, and could fail. We introduce the Neural Equilibrium Solver which utilizes a special equivariant neural network architecture to approximately solve the space of all games of fixed shape, buying speed and determinism. We define a flexible equilibrium selection framework, that is capable of uniquely selecting an equilibrium that minimizes relative entropy, or maximizes welfare. The network is trained without needing to generate any supervised training data. We show remarkable zero-shot generalization to larger games. We argue that such a network is a powerful component for many possible multiagent algorithms.
summary: Solution concepts such as Nash Equilibria, Correlated Equilibria, and Coarse Correlated Equilibria are useful components for many multiagent machine learning algorithms. Unfortunately, solving a normal-form game could take prohibitive or non-deterministic time to converge, and could fail. We introduce the Neural Equilibrium Solver which utilizes a special equivariant neural network architecture to approximately solve the space of all games of fixed shape, buying speed and determinism. We define a flexible equilibrium selection framework, that is capable of uniquely selecting an equilibrium that minimizes relative entropy, or maximizes welfare. The network is trained without needing to generate any supervised training data. We show remarkable zero-shot generalization to larger games. We argue that such a network is a powerful component for many possible multiagent algorithms.
abstract_zh: 纳什均衡、相关均衡和粗略相关均衡等解决方案概念是许多多智能体机器学习算法的有用组件。不幸的是，解决正常形式的游戏可能需要令人望而却步的或不确定的时间来收敛，并且可能会失败。我们引入神经均衡求解器，它利用特殊的等变神经网络架构来近似求解所有固定形状、购买速度和确定性的博弈空间。我们定义了一个灵活的均衡选择框架，它能够唯一地选择一个最小化相对熵或最大化福利的均衡。网络的训练不需要生成任何监督训练数据。我们展示了对大型游戏的出色的零样本泛化。我们认为这样的网络是许多可能的多智能体算法的强大组件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经均衡求解器，利用等变神经网络架构高效求解纳什均衡、相关均衡和粗略相关均衡。
AI.motivation: 传统博弈论求解方法存在收敛时间长、不可靠等问题，亟需更高效确定性的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计等变神经网络架构，结合无监督训练框架，实现对固定形状博弈的均衡求解与选择。
AI.result: 在无需监督数据情况下实现零样本泛化，可有效选择最小化相对熵或最大化福利的均衡方案。
AI.conclusion: 该网络为多智能体算法提供了高效可靠的均衡求解组件，具有广泛的应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出一种神经均衡求解器，利用等变神经网络架构高效求解纳什均衡、相关均衡和粗略相关均衡。
motivation: 传统博弈论求解方法存在收敛时间长、不可靠等问题，亟需更高效确定性的解决方案。
method: 设计等变神经网络架构，结合无监督训练框架，实现对固定形状博弈的均衡求解与选择。
result: 在无需监督数据情况下实现零样本泛化，可有效选择最小化相对熵或最大化福利的均衡方案。
conclusion: 该网络为多智能体算法提供了高效可靠的均衡求解组件，具有广泛的应用潜力。
search_text: Turbocharging Solution Concepts: Solving NEs, CEs and CCEs with Neural Equilibrium Solvers 涡轮增压解决方案概念：使用神经平衡求解器求解 NE、CE 和 CCE Solution concepts such as Nash Equilibria, Correlated Equilibria, and Coarse Correlated Equilibria are useful components for many multiagent machine learning algorithms. Unfortunately, solving a normal-form game could take prohibitive or non-deterministic time to converge, and could fail. We introduce the Neural Equilibrium Solver which utilizes a special equivariant neural network architecture to approximately solve the space of all games of fixed shape, buying speed and determinism. We define a flexible equilibrium selection framework, that is capable of uniquely selecting an equilibrium that minimizes relative entropy, or maximizes welfare. The network is trained without needing to generate any supervised training data. We show remarkable zero-shot generalization to larger games. We argue that such a network is a powerful component for many possible multiagent algorithms. 纳什均衡、相关均衡和粗略相关均衡等解决方案概念是许多多智能体机器学习算法的有用组件。不幸的是，解决正常形式的游戏可能需要令人望而却步的或不确定的时间来收敛，并且可能会失败。我们引入神经均衡求解器，它利用特殊的等变神经网络架构来近似求解所有固定形状、购买速度和确定性的博弈空间。我们定义了一个灵活的均衡选择框架，它能够唯一地选择一个最小化相对熵或最大化福利的均衡。网络的训练不需要生成任何监督训练数据。我们展示了对大型游戏的出色的零样本泛化。我们认为这样的网络是许多可能的多智能体算法的强大组件。 本文提出一种神经均衡求解器，利用等变神经网络架构高效求解纳什均衡、相关均衡和粗略相关均衡。 Luke Marris,Ian Gemp,Thomas Anthony,Andrea Tacchetti,Siqi Liu,Karl Tuyls cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.MA

authors_text: Jean-Jacques Godeme,Jalal Fadili,Xavier Buet,Myriam Zerrad,Michel Lequime,Claude Amra
title: Provable Phase Retrieval with Mirror Descent
title_zh: 通过镜像下降进行可证明的相位检索
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of phase retrieval, which consists of recovering an $n$-dimensional real vector from the magnitude of its $m$ linear measurements. We propose a mirror descent (or Bregman gradient descent) algorithm based on a wisely chosen Bregman divergence, hence allowing to remove the classical global Lipschitz continuity requirement on the gradient of the non-convex phase retrieval objective to be minimized. We apply the mirror descent for two random measurements: the \iid standard Gaussian and those obtained by multiple structured illuminations through Coded Diffraction Patterns (CDP). For the Gaussian case, we show that when the number of measurements $m$ is large enough, then with high probability, for almost all initializers, the algorithm recovers the original vector up to a global sign change. For both measurements, the mirror descent exhibits a local linear convergence behaviour with a dimension-independent convergence rate. Our theoretical results are finally illustrated with various numerical experiments, including an application to the reconstruction of images in precision optics.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of phase retrieval, which consists of recovering an $n$-dimensional real vector from the magnitude of its $m$ linear measurements. We propose a mirror descent (or Bregman gradient descent) algorithm based on a wisely chosen Bregman divergence, hence allowing to remove the classical global Lipschitz continuity requirement on the gradient of the non-convex phase retrieval objective to be minimized. We apply the mirror descent for two random measurements: the \iid standard Gaussian and those obtained by multiple structured illuminations through Coded Diffraction Patterns (CDP). For the Gaussian case, we show that when the number of measurements $m$ is large enough, then with high probability, for almost all initializers, the algorithm recovers the original vector up to a global sign change. For both measurements, the mirror descent exhibits a local linear convergence behaviour with a dimension-independent convergence rate. Our theoretical results are finally illustrated with various numerical experiments, including an application to the reconstruction of images in precision optics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑相位检索问题，其中包括从 $m$ 线性测量值的幅度中恢复 $n$ 维实向量。我们提出了一种基于明智选择的 Bregman 散度的镜像下降（或 Bregman 梯度下降）算法，从而允许消除对非凸相位检索目标梯度的经典全局 Lipschitz 连续性要求以最小化。我们将镜面下降应用于两个随机测量：\iid 标准高斯测量和通过编码衍射图案（CDP）通过多个结构化照明获得的测量。对于高斯情况，我们表明，当测量数量 $m$ 足够大时，对于几乎所有初始化器，该算法很有可能恢复原始向量直至全局符号变化。对于这两种测量，镜子下降表现出具有与尺寸无关的收敛速率的局部线性收敛行为。我们的理论结果最终通过各种数值实验来说明，包括在精密光学图像重建中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过镜像梯度下降算法解决相位恢复问题，即从线性测量的幅度中恢复高维实向量。
AI.motivation: 传统相位恢复方法依赖非凸目标函数的梯度全局Lipschitz连续性假设，而该假设在实际应用中可能限制算法性能。
AI.method: 提出基于精心选择的Bregman散度的镜像梯度下降算法，适用于独立同分布高斯测量和结构化编码衍射图案测量。
AI.result: 理论证明当测量数足够时，算法以高概率恢复原始向量（全局符号变化除外），且对两种测量方式均表现出与维度无关的局部线性收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统Lipschitz连续性限制，在理论保证和数值实验中均展现出高效性，适用于精密光学成像等实际场景。

authors_text: Haoming Li,Xinzhuo Lin,Yang Zhou,Xiang Li,Yuchi Huo,Jiming Chen,Qi Ye
title: Contact2Grasp: 3D Grasp Synthesis via Hand-Object Contact Constraint
title_zh: Contact2Grasp：通过手-物体接触约束进行 3D 抓取合成
abstract: 3D grasp synthesis generates grasping poses given an input object. Existing works tackle the problem by learning a direct mapping from objects to the distributions of grasping poses. However, because the physical contact is sensitive to small changes in pose, the high-nonlinear mapping between 3D object representation to valid poses is considerably non-smooth, leading to poor generation efficiency and restricted generality. To tackle the challenge, we introduce an intermediate variable for grasp contact areas to constrain the grasp generation; in other words, we factorize the mapping into two sequential stages by assuming that grasping poses are fully constrained given contact maps: 1) we first learn contact map distributions to generate the potential contact maps for grasps; 2) then learn a mapping from the contact maps to the grasping poses. Further, we propose a penetration-aware optimization with the generated contacts as a consistency constraint for grasp refinement. Extensive validations on two public datasets show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods regarding grasp generation on various metrics.
summary: 3D grasp synthesis generates grasping poses given an input object. Existing works tackle the problem by learning a direct mapping from objects to the distributions of grasping poses. However, because the physical contact is sensitive to small changes in pose, the high-nonlinear mapping between 3D object representation to valid poses is considerably non-smooth, leading to poor generation efficiency and restricted generality. To tackle the challenge, we introduce an intermediate variable for grasp contact areas to constrain the grasp generation; in other words, we factorize the mapping into two sequential stages by assuming that grasping poses are fully constrained given contact maps: 1) we first learn contact map distributions to generate the potential contact maps for grasps; 2) then learn a mapping from the contact maps to the grasping poses. Further, we propose a penetration-aware optimization with the generated contacts as a consistency constraint for grasp refinement. Extensive validations on two public datasets show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods regarding grasp generation on various metrics.
abstract_zh: 3D 抓取合成在给定输入对象的情况下生成抓取姿势。现有的工作通过学习从对象到抓取姿势分布的直接映射来解决这个问题。然而，由于物理接触对姿态的微小变化很敏感，3D 对象表示到有效姿态之间的高度非线性映射相当不平滑，导致生成效率差且通用性受到限制。为了应对这一挑战，我们为抓取接触区域引入了一个中间变量来限制抓取生成；换句话说，我们通过假设抓取姿势完全受限于给定的接触图，将映射分解为两个连续的阶段：1）我们首先学习接触图分布以生成用于抓取的潜在接触图； 2）然后学习从接触图到抓取姿势的映射。此外，我们提出了一种渗透感知优化，将生成的接触作为抓握细化的一致性约束。对两个公共数据集的广泛验证表明，我们的方法在各种指标的抓取生成方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于手-物体接触约束的3D抓取合成方法，通过引入接触区域中间变量优化抓取姿态生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因物理接触对姿态变化敏感，导致从3D物体到有效抓取姿态的映射非平滑，生成效率低且泛化性差。
AI.method: 将映射分解为两阶段：1）学习接触图分布生成潜在接触区域；2）基于接触图映射到抓取姿态，并引入穿透感知优化进行姿态精炼。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上优于现有方法，在多种指标下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过接触约束分解映射过程并结合优化，显著提升了抓取生成的效率与泛化能力。

authors_text: Qishi Dong,Awais Muhammad,Fengwei Zhou,Chuanlong Xie,Tianyang Hu,Yongxin Yang,Sung-Ho Bae,Zhenguo Li
title: ZooD: Exploiting Model Zoo for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: ZooD：利用模型 Zoo 进行分布外泛化
abstract: Recent advances on large-scale pre-training have shown great potentials of leveraging a large set of Pre-Trained Models (PTMs) for improving Out-of-Distribution (OoD) generalization, for which the goal is to perform well on possible unseen domains after fine-tuning on multiple training domains. However, maximally exploiting a zoo of PTMs is challenging since fine-tuning all possible combinations of PTMs is computationally prohibitive while accurate selection of PTMs requires tackling the possible data distribution shift for OoD tasks. In this work, we propose ZooD, a paradigm for PTMs ranking and ensemble with feature selection. Our proposed metric ranks PTMs by quantifying inter-class discriminability and inter-domain stability of the features extracted by the PTMs in a leave-one-domain-out cross-validation manner. The top-K ranked models are then aggregated for the target OoD task. To avoid accumulating noise induced by model ensemble, we propose an efficient variational EM algorithm to select informative features. We evaluate our paradigm on a diverse model zoo consisting of 35 models for various OoD tasks and demonstrate: (i) model ranking is better correlated with fine-tuning ranking than previous methods and up to 9859x faster than brute-force fine-tuning; (ii) OoD generalization after model ensemble with feature selection outperforms the state-of-the-art methods and the accuracy on most challenging task DomainNet is improved from 46.5\% to 50.6\%. Furthermore, we provide the fine-tuning results of 35 PTMs on 7 OoD datasets, hoping to help the research of model zoo and OoD generalization. Code will be available at https://gitee.com/mindspore/models/tree/master/research/cv/zood.
summary: Recent advances on large-scale pre-training have shown great potentials of leveraging a large set of Pre-Trained Models (PTMs) for improving Out-of-Distribution (OoD) generalization, for which the goal is to perform well on possible unseen domains after fine-tuning on multiple training domains. However, maximally exploiting a zoo of PTMs is challenging since fine-tuning all possible combinations of PTMs is computationally prohibitive while accurate selection of PTMs requires tackling the possible data distribution shift for OoD tasks. In this work, we propose ZooD, a paradigm for PTMs ranking and ensemble with feature selection. Our proposed metric ranks PTMs by quantifying inter-class discriminability and inter-domain stability of the features extracted by the PTMs in a leave-one-domain-out cross-validation manner. The top-K ranked models are then aggregated for the target OoD task. To avoid accumulating noise induced by model ensemble, we propose an efficient variational EM algorithm to select informative features. We evaluate our paradigm on a diverse model zoo consisting of 35 models for various OoD tasks and demonstrate: (i) model ranking is better correlated with fine-tuning ranking than previous methods and up to 9859x faster than brute-force fine-tuning; (ii) OoD generalization after model ensemble with feature selection outperforms the state-of-the-art methods and the accuracy on most challenging task DomainNet is improved from 46.5\% to 50.6\%. Furthermore, we provide the fine-tuning results of 35 PTMs on 7 OoD datasets, hoping to help the research of model zoo and OoD generalization. Code will be available at https://gitee.com/mindspore/models/tree/master/research/cv/zood.
abstract_zh: 大规模预训练的最新进展显示出利用大量预训练模型（PTM）来改善分布外（OoD）泛化的巨大潜力，其目标是在多个训练领域进行微调后，在可能未见的领域中表现良好。然而，最大限度地利用大量 PTM 具有挑战性，因为微调所有可能的 PTM 组合在计算上是令人望而却步的，而准确选择 PTM 则需要解决 OoD 任务可能的数据分布变化。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ZooD，一种 PTM 排名和特征选择集成的范例。我们提出的指标通过量化 PTM 以留一域交叉验证方式提取的特征的类间可辨别性和域间稳定性来对 PTM 进行排名。然后，为目标 OoD 任务聚合排名前 K 的模型。为了避免累积模型集成引起的噪声，我们提出了一种有效的变分 EM 算法来选择信息丰富的特征。我们在由用于各种 OoD 任务的 35 个模型组成的多样化模型动物园上评估我们的范式，并证明：（i）模型排名与微调排名的相关性比以前的方法更好，并且比暴力微调快 9859 倍； (ii) 具有特征选择的模型集成后的 OoD 泛化优于最先进的方法，并且最具挑战性的任务 DomainNet 的准确性从 46.5% 提高到 50.6%。此外，我们提供了 7 个 OoD 数据集上 35 个 PTM 的微调结果，希望对模型动物园和 OoD 泛化的研究有所帮助。代码可在 https://gitee.com/mindspore/models/tree/master/research/cv/zood 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ZooD方法，通过模型排序和特征选择提升预训练模型在分布外任务的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用多个预训练模型提升分布外泛化时面临计算开销大和模型选择困难的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计量化模型特征可区分性及领域稳定性的指标，通过留一域交叉验证排序模型，结合变分EM算法筛选信息特征进行集成。
AI.result: 在35个模型和7个OoD数据集上验证，模型排序效率比暴力微调快9859倍，DomainNet任务准确率从46.5%提升至50.6%。
AI.conclusion: ZooD通过高效模型选择与特征集成显著提升分布外泛化性能，为模型动物园研究提供实用工具与基准数据。

search_text: ZooD: Exploiting Model Zoo for Out-of-Distribution Generalization ZooD：利用模型 Zoo 进行分布外泛化 Recent advances on large-scale pre-training have shown great potentials of leveraging a large set of Pre-Trained Models (PTMs) for improving Out-of-Distribution (OoD) generalization, for which the goal is to perform well on possible unseen domains after fine-tuning on multiple training domains. However, maximally exploiting a zoo of PTMs is challenging since fine-tuning all possible combinations of PTMs is computationally prohibitive while accurate selection of PTMs requires tackling the possible data distribution shift for OoD tasks. In this work, we propose ZooD, a paradigm for PTMs ranking and ensemble with feature selection. Our proposed metric ranks PTMs by quantifying inter-class discriminability and inter-domain stability of the features extracted by the PTMs in a leave-one-domain-out cross-validation manner. The top-K ranked models are then aggregated for the target OoD task. To avoid accumulating noise induced by model ensemble, we propose an efficient variational EM algorithm to select informative features. We evaluate our paradigm on a diverse model zoo consisting of 35 models for various OoD tasks and demonstrate: (i) model ranking is better correlated with fine-tuning ranking than previous methods and up to 9859x faster than brute-force fine-tuning; (ii) OoD generalization after model ensemble with feature selection outperforms the state-of-the-art methods and the accuracy on most challenging task DomainNet is improved from 46.5\% to 50.6\%. Furthermore, we provide the fine-tuning results of 35 PTMs on 7 OoD datasets, hoping to help the research of model zoo and OoD generalization. Code will be available at https://gitee.com/mindspore/models/tree/master/research/cv/zood. 大规模预训练的最新进展显示出利用大量预训练模型（PTM）来改善分布外（OoD）泛化的巨大潜力，其目标是在多个训练领域进行微调后，在可能未见的领域中表现良好。然而，最大限度地利用大量 PTM 具有挑战性，因为微调所有可能的 PTM 组合在计算上是令人望而却步的，而准确选择 PTM 则需要解决 OoD 任务可能的数据分布变化。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ZooD，一种 PTM 排名和特征选择集成的范例。我们提出的指标通过量化 PTM 以留一域交叉验证方式提取的特征的类间可辨别性和域间稳定性来对 PTM 进行排名。然后，为目标 OoD 任务聚合排名前 K 的模型。为了避免累积模型集成引起的噪声，我们提出了一种有效的变分 EM 算法来选择信息丰富的特征。我们在由用于各种 OoD 任务的 35 个模型组成的多样化模型动物园上评估我们的范式，并证明：（i）模型排名与微调排名的相关性比以前的方法更好，并且比暴力微调快 9859 倍； (ii) 具有特征选择的模型集成后的 OoD 泛化优于最先进的方法，并且最具挑战性的任务 DomainNet 的准确性从 46.5% 提高到 50.6%。此外，我们提供了 7 个 OoD 数据集上 35 个 PTM 的微调结果，希望对模型动物园和 OoD 泛化的研究有所帮助。代码可在 https://gitee.com/mindspore/models/tree/master/research/cv/zood 获取。 本文提出ZooD方法，通过模型排序和特征选择提升预训练模型在分布外任务的泛化能力。 Qishi Dong,Awais Muhammad,Fengwei Zhou,Chuanlong Xie,Tianyang Hu,Yongxin Yang,Sung-Ho Bae,Zhenguo Li cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Isaac Ronald Ward,Charles Moore,Kai Pak,Jingdao Chen,Edwin Goh
title: Improving Contrastive Learning on Visually Homogeneous Mars Rover Images
title_zh: 改进视觉同质火星漫游者图像的对比学习
comment: Accepted at the AI4Space 2022 Workshop at ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted at the AI4Space 2022 Workshop at ECCV 2022
abstract: Contrastive learning has recently demonstrated superior performance to supervised learning, despite requiring no training labels. We explore how contrastive learning can be applied to hundreds of thousands of unlabeled Mars terrain images, collected from the Mars rovers Curiosity and Perseverance, and from the Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter. Such methods are appealing since the vast majority of Mars images are unlabeled as manual annotation is labor intensive and requires extensive domain knowledge. Contrastive learning, however, assumes that any given pair of distinct images contain distinct semantic content. This is an issue for Mars image datasets, as any two pairs of Mars images are far more likely to be semantically similar due to the lack of visual diversity on the planet's surface. Making the assumption that pairs of images will be in visual contrast - when they are in fact not - results in pairs that are falsely considered as negatives, impacting training performance. In this study, we propose two approaches to resolve this: 1) an unsupervised deep clustering step on the Mars datasets, which identifies clusters of images containing similar semantic content and corrects false negative errors during training, and 2) a simple approach which mixes data from different domains to increase visual diversity of the total training dataset. Both cases reduce the rate of false negative pairs, thus minimizing the rate in which the model is incorrectly penalized during contrastive training. These modified approaches remain fully unsupervised end-to-end. To evaluate their performance, we add a single linear layer trained to generate class predictions based on these contrastively-learned features and demonstrate increased performance compared to supervised models; observing an improvement in classification accuracy of 3.06% using only 10% of the labeled data.
summary: Contrastive learning has recently demonstrated superior performance to supervised learning, despite requiring no training labels. We explore how contrastive learning can be applied to hundreds of thousands of unlabeled Mars terrain images, collected from the Mars rovers Curiosity and Perseverance, and from the Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter. Such methods are appealing since the vast majority of Mars images are unlabeled as manual annotation is labor intensive and requires extensive domain knowledge. Contrastive learning, however, assumes that any given pair of distinct images contain distinct semantic content. This is an issue for Mars image datasets, as any two pairs of Mars images are far more likely to be semantically similar due to the lack of visual diversity on the planet's surface. Making the assumption that pairs of images will be in visual contrast - when they are in fact not - results in pairs that are falsely considered as negatives, impacting training performance. In this study, we propose two approaches to resolve this: 1) an unsupervised deep clustering step on the Mars datasets, which identifies clusters of images containing similar semantic content and corrects false negative errors during training, and 2) a simple approach which mixes data from different domains to increase visual diversity of the total training dataset. Both cases reduce the rate of false negative pairs, thus minimizing the rate in which the model is incorrectly penalized during contrastive training. These modified approaches remain fully unsupervised end-to-end. To evaluate their performance, we add a single linear layer trained to generate class predictions based on these contrastively-learned features and demonstrate increased performance compared to supervised models; observing an improvement in classification accuracy of 3.06% using only 10% of the labeled data.
abstract_zh: 尽管不需要训练标签，对比学习最近仍表现出优于监督学习的性能。我们探索如何将对比学习应用于数十万张未标记的火星地形图像，这些图像是从火星探测器好奇号和毅力号以及火星勘测轨道飞行器收集的。这种方法很有吸引力，因为绝大多数火星图像都没有标记，因为手动注释是劳动密集型的，并且需要广泛的领域知识。然而，对比学习假设任何给定的一对不同图像都包含不同的语义内容。这是火星图像数据集的一个问题，因为由于火星表面缺乏视觉多样性，任何两对火星图像在语义上都更有可能相似。假设成对的图像将具有视觉对比（而实际上并非如此），结果会导致图像对被错误地视为负片，从而影响训练性能。在本研究中，我们提出了两种方法来解决这个问题：1）在火星数据集上进行无监督深度聚类步骤，识别包含相似语义内容的图像簇并在训练期间纠正假阴性错误；2）一种简单的方法，混合来自不同领域的数据以增加整个训练数据集的视觉多样性。这两种情况都降低了假阴性对的比率，从而最大限度地减少了模型在对比训练期间受到错误惩罚的比率。这些修改后的方法仍然完全不受监督的端到端。为了评估它们的性能，我们添加了一个经过训练的线性层，用于根据这些对比学习的特征生成类预测，并证明与监督模型相比性能有所提高；仅使用 10% 的标记数据即可观察到分类准确度提高了 3.06%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在视觉同质化的火星探测器图像上改进对比学习方法，以提高无监督条件下的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 火星表面图像缺乏视觉多样性，导致对比学习中易产生误判的负样本对，而手动标注数据成本高且困难。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：1）通过无监督深度聚类识别语义相似图像簇以修正负样本错误；2）混合不同领域数据增强视觉多样性。
AI.result: 使用仅10%标注数据时，分类准确率较监督模型提升3.06%，且方法保持完全无监督端到端特性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了视觉同质化数据下的对比学习挑战，在无监督场景下显著提升模型性能。

authors_text: Sami Hamdan,Bradley C. Love,Georg G. von Polier,Susanne Weis,Holger Schwender,Simon B. Eickhoff,Kaustubh R. Patil
title: Confound-leakage: Confound Removal in Machine Learning Leads to Leakage
title_zh: 混杂泄漏：机器学习中的混杂去除导致泄漏
comment: Revised Introduction, added CoI, results unchanged
comments: Revised Introduction, added CoI, results unchanged
abstract: Machine learning (ML) approaches to data analysis are now widely adopted in many fields including epidemiology and medicine. To apply these approaches, confounds must first be removed as is commonly done by featurewise removal of their variance by linear regression before applying ML. Here, we show this common approach to confound removal biases ML models, leading to misleading results. Specifically, this common deconfounding approach can leak information such that what are null or moderate effects become amplified to near-perfect prediction when nonlinear ML approaches are subsequently applied. We identify and evaluate possible mechanisms for such confound-leakage and provide practical guidance to mitigate its negative impact. We demonstrate the real-world importance of confound-leakage by analyzing a clinical dataset where accuracy is overestimated for predicting attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) with depression as a confound. Our results have wide-reaching implications for implementation and deployment of ML workflows and beg caution against naïve use of standard confound removal approaches.
summary: Machine learning (ML) approaches to data analysis are now widely adopted in many fields including epidemiology and medicine. To apply these approaches, confounds must first be removed as is commonly done by featurewise removal of their variance by linear regression before applying ML. Here, we show this common approach to confound removal biases ML models, leading to misleading results. Specifically, this common deconfounding approach can leak information such that what are null or moderate effects become amplified to near-perfect prediction when nonlinear ML approaches are subsequently applied. We identify and evaluate possible mechanisms for such confound-leakage and provide practical guidance to mitigate its negative impact. We demonstrate the real-world importance of confound-leakage by analyzing a clinical dataset where accuracy is overestimated for predicting attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) with depression as a confound. Our results have wide-reaching implications for implementation and deployment of ML workflows and beg caution against naïve use of standard confound removal approaches.
abstract_zh: 机器学习（ML）数据分析方法现已广泛应用于包括流行病学和医学在内的许多领域。要应用这些方法，必须首先消除混杂因素，通常是在应用机器学习之前通过线性回归按特征消除其方差。在这里，我们展示了这种混淆去除偏差 ML 模型的常见方法，从而导致误导性结果。具体来说，这种常见的去混杂方法可能会泄漏信息，从而在随后应用非线性 ML 方法时，零效应或中等效应会被放大到近乎完美的预测。我们识别并评估此类混杂泄漏的可能机制，并提供实用指导以减轻其负面影响。我们通过分析临床数据集证明了混杂泄漏在现实世界中的重要性，其中预测以抑郁症为混杂因素的注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）的准确性被高估了。我们的结果对机器学习工作流程的实施和部署具有广泛的影响，并提醒大家不要天真地使用标准混淆去除方法。

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了机器学习中常见的混杂因素去除方法可能导致信息泄露问题，并分析其影响。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习应用中，研究者常通过线性回归去除混杂因素方差，但该方法可能引入偏差，导致模型预测效果被高估。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与临床数据集验证，研究混杂因素去除过程中的信息泄露机制，并评估其对模型预测能力的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，去除混杂因素后，原本无效或微弱的效应可能被非线性模型放大，导致预测准确率被错误提升（如ADHD预测中抑郁作为混杂因素时）。
AI.conclusion: 需警惕标准混杂因素去除方法的潜在风险，建议在ML流程中谨慎处理，避免因信息泄露导致误导性结论。

search_text: Confound-leakage: Confound Removal in Machine Learning Leads to Leakage 混杂泄漏：机器学习中的混杂去除导致泄漏 Machine learning (ML) approaches to data analysis are now widely adopted in many fields including epidemiology and medicine. To apply these approaches, confounds must first be removed as is commonly done by featurewise removal of their variance by linear regression before applying ML. Here, we show this common approach to confound removal biases ML models, leading to misleading results. Specifically, this common deconfounding approach can leak information such that what are null or moderate effects become amplified to near-perfect prediction when nonlinear ML approaches are subsequently applied. We identify and evaluate possible mechanisms for such confound-leakage and provide practical guidance to mitigate its negative impact. We demonstrate the real-world importance of confound-leakage by analyzing a clinical dataset where accuracy is overestimated for predicting attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) with depression as a confound. Our results have wide-reaching implications for implementation and deployment of ML workflows and beg caution against naïve use of standard confound removal approaches. 机器学习（ML）数据分析方法现已广泛应用于包括流行病学和医学在内的许多领域。要应用这些方法，必须首先消除混杂因素，通常是在应用机器学习之前通过线性回归按特征消除其方差。在这里，我们展示了这种混淆去除偏差 ML 模型的常见方法，从而导致误导性结果。具体来说，这种常见的去混杂方法可能会泄漏信息，从而在随后应用非线性 ML 方法时，零效应或中等效应会被放大到近乎完美的预测。我们识别并评估此类混杂泄漏的可能机制，并提供实用指导以减轻其负面影响。我们通过分析临床数据集证明了混杂泄漏在现实世界中的重要性，其中预测以抑郁症为混杂因素的注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）的准确性被高估了。我们的结果对机器学习工作流程的实施和部署具有广泛的影响，并提醒大家不要天真地使用标准混淆去除方法。 本文揭示了机器学习中常见的混杂因素去除方法可能导致信息泄露问题，并分析其影响。 Sami Hamdan,Bradley C. Love,Georg G. von Polier,Susanne Weis,Holger Schwender,Simon B. Eickhoff,Kaustubh R. Patil cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Maryam Paparimoghadamborazjani,Amin Kazemi
title: A Fault Detection Scheme Utilizing Convolutional Neural Network for PV Solar Panels with High Accuracy
title_zh: 一种利用卷积神经网络的高精度光伏太阳能电池板故障检测方案
abstract: Solar energy is one of the most dependable renewable energy technologies, as it is feasible almost everywhere globally. However, improving the efficiency of a solar PV system remains a significant challenge. To enhance the robustness of the solar system, this paper proposes a trained convolutional neural network (CNN) based fault detection scheme to divide the images of photovoltaic modules. For binary classification, the algorithm classifies the input images of PV cells into two categories (i.e. faulty or normal). To further assess the network's capability, the defective PV cells are organized into shadowy, cracked, or dusty cells, and the model is utilized for multiple classifications. The success rate for the proposed CNN model is 91.1% for binary classification and 88.6% for multi-classification. Thus, the proposed trained CNN model remarkably outperforms the CNN model presented in a previous study which used the same datasets. The proposed CNN-based fault detection model is straightforward, simple and effective and could be applied in the fault detection of solar panel.
summary: Solar energy is one of the most dependable renewable energy technologies, as it is feasible almost everywhere globally. However, improving the efficiency of a solar PV system remains a significant challenge. To enhance the robustness of the solar system, this paper proposes a trained convolutional neural network (CNN) based fault detection scheme to divide the images of photovoltaic modules. For binary classification, the algorithm classifies the input images of PV cells into two categories (i.e. faulty or normal). To further assess the network's capability, the defective PV cells are organized into shadowy, cracked, or dusty cells, and the model is utilized for multiple classifications. The success rate for the proposed CNN model is 91.1% for binary classification and 88.6% for multi-classification. Thus, the proposed trained CNN model remarkably outperforms the CNN model presented in a previous study which used the same datasets. The proposed CNN-based fault detection model is straightforward, simple and effective and could be applied in the fault detection of solar panel.
abstract_zh: 太阳能是最可靠的可再生能源技术之一，因为它在全球几乎任何地方都是可行的。然而，提高太阳能光伏系统的效率仍然是一个重大挑战。为了增强太阳能系统的鲁棒性，本文提出了一种基于训练好的卷积神经网络（CNN）的故障检测方案来划分光伏组件的图像。对于二元分类，该算法将光伏电池的输入图像分为两类（即故障或正常）。为了进一步评估网络的能力，有缺陷的光伏电池被组织成阴影、破裂或灰尘的电池，并且该模型用于多种分类。所提出的 CNN 模型的二分类成功率为 91.1%，多分类成功率为 88.6%。因此，所提出的经过训练的 CNN 模型明显优于之前使用相同数据集的研究中提出的 CNN 模型。所提出的基于CNN的故障检测模型直接、简单、有效，可应用于太阳能电池板的故障检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的高精度光伏太阳能板故障检测方案。
AI.motivation: 太阳能是全球广泛应用的可再生能源，但提升光伏系统效率仍面临挑战。现有CNN模型在故障检测中存在准确率不足的问题，需开发更高效且简单的检测方法。
AI.method: 利用训练好的CNN对光伏模块图像进行二分类（故障/正常），并扩展为多分类（阴影、裂纹、灰尘等缺陷类型），通过图像分类实现故障检测。
AI.result: 二分类准确率达91.1%，多分类准确率为88.6%，显著优于先前使用相同数据集的CNN模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提CNN模型结构简单且有效，可广泛应用于太阳能板的故障检测领域。

authors_text: Franz Scherr,Qinghai Guo,Timoleon Moraitis
title: Self-Supervised Learning Through Efference Copies
title_zh: 通过效果副本进行自我监督学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods aim to exploit the abundance of unlabelled data for machine learning (ML), however the underlying principles are often method-specific. An SSL framework derived from biological first principles of embodied learning could unify the various SSL methods, help elucidate learning in the brain, and possibly improve ML. SSL commonly transforms each training datapoint into a pair of views, uses the knowledge of this pairing as a positive (i.e. non-contrastive) self-supervisory sign, and potentially opposes it to unrelated, (i.e. contrastive) negative examples. Here, we show that this type of self-supervision is an incomplete implementation of a concept from neuroscience, the Efference Copy (EC). Specifically, the brain also transforms the environment through efference, i.e. motor commands, however it sends to itself an EC of the full commands, i.e. more than a mere SSL sign. In addition, its action representations are likely egocentric. From such a principled foundation we formally recover and extend SSL methods such as SimCLR, BYOL, and ReLIC under a common theoretical framework, i.e. Self-supervision Through Efference Copies (S-TEC). Empirically, S-TEC restructures meaningfully the within- and between-class representations. This manifests as improvement in recent strong SSL baselines in image classification, segmentation, object detection, and in audio. These results hypothesize a testable positive influence from the brain's motor outputs onto its sensory representations.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods aim to exploit the abundance of unlabelled data for machine learning (ML), however the underlying principles are often method-specific. An SSL framework derived from biological first principles of embodied learning could unify the various SSL methods, help elucidate learning in the brain, and possibly improve ML. SSL commonly transforms each training datapoint into a pair of views, uses the knowledge of this pairing as a positive (i.e. non-contrastive) self-supervisory sign, and potentially opposes it to unrelated, (i.e. contrastive) negative examples. Here, we show that this type of self-supervision is an incomplete implementation of a concept from neuroscience, the Efference Copy (EC). Specifically, the brain also transforms the environment through efference, i.e. motor commands, however it sends to itself an EC of the full commands, i.e. more than a mere SSL sign. In addition, its action representations are likely egocentric. From such a principled foundation we formally recover and extend SSL methods such as SimCLR, BYOL, and ReLIC under a common theoretical framework, i.e. Self-supervision Through Efference Copies (S-TEC). Empirically, S-TEC restructures meaningfully the within- and between-class representations. This manifests as improvement in recent strong SSL baselines in image classification, segmentation, object detection, and in audio. These results hypothesize a testable positive influence from the brain's motor outputs onto its sensory representations.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 方法旨在利用大量未标记数据进行机器学习 (ML)，但其基本原理通常是特定于方法的。源自体现学习的生物学第一原理的 SSL 框架可以统一各种 SSL 方法，帮助阐明大脑中的学习，并可能改善机器学习。 SSL 通常将每个训练数据点转换为一对视图，使用该配对的知识作为积极（即非对比）自我监督标志，并可能将其与不相关（即对比）消极示例相对立。在这里，我们证明这种类型的自我监督是神经科学概念“效应复制”（EC）的不完整实现。具体来说，大脑还通过传递（即运动命令）来改变环境，但它会向自身发送完整命令的 EC，即不仅仅是 SSL 信号。此外，它的动作表现可能是以自我为中心的。从这样的原则基础上，我们在一个共同的理论框架下正式恢复和扩展了 SSL 方法，例如 SimCLR、BYOL 和 ReLIC，即通过影响副本进行自我监督 (S-TEC)。根据经验，S-TEC 有意义地重组了类内和类间表示。这表现为图像分类、分割、对象检测和音频方面最近强大的 SSL 基线的改进。这些结果假设大脑的运动输出对其感觉表征产生可测试的积极影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经科学中'传出复制'（Efference Copy）概念的自监督学习框架S-TEC，旨在统一现有自监督学习方法并提升机器学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法缺乏生物学原理支撑且方法分散，而大脑通过传出复制机制实现感知与运动的协同学习，这一原理可能为机器学习提供新思路。
AI.method: 基于传出复制理论，构建S-TEC框架，将SimCLR、BYOL等方法纳入统一理论体系，通过重构数据视图和动作表示实现更完整的自监督学习。
AI.result: S-TEC在图像分类、分割、目标检测及音频任务中均优于现有自监督学习基线，验证了传出复制机制对感知表征的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 大脑运动输出对感知表征具有正向影响，该假设通过S-TEC框架得到实证支持，为神经科学与机器学习的交叉研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经科学中'传出复制'（Efference Copy）概念的自监督学习框架S-TEC，旨在统一现有自监督学习方法并提升机器学习性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法缺乏生物学原理支撑且方法分散，而大脑通过传出复制机制实现感知与运动的协同学习，这一原理可能为机器学习提供新思路。

search_text: Self-Supervised Learning Through Efference Copies 通过效果副本进行自我监督学习 Self-supervised learning (SSL) methods aim to exploit the abundance of unlabelled data for machine learning (ML), however the underlying principles are often method-specific. An SSL framework derived from biological first principles of embodied learning could unify the various SSL methods, help elucidate learning in the brain, and possibly improve ML. SSL commonly transforms each training datapoint into a pair of views, uses the knowledge of this pairing as a positive (i.e. non-contrastive) self-supervisory sign, and potentially opposes it to unrelated, (i.e. contrastive) negative examples. Here, we show that this type of self-supervision is an incomplete implementation of a concept from neuroscience, the Efference Copy (EC). Specifically, the brain also transforms the environment through efference, i.e. motor commands, however it sends to itself an EC of the full commands, i.e. more than a mere SSL sign. In addition, its action representations are likely egocentric. From such a principled foundation we formally recover and extend SSL methods such as SimCLR, BYOL, and ReLIC under a common theoretical framework, i.e. Self-supervision Through Efference Copies (S-TEC). Empirically, S-TEC restructures meaningfully the within- and between-class representations. This manifests as improvement in recent strong SSL baselines in image classification, segmentation, object detection, and in audio. These results hypothesize a testable positive influence from the brain's motor outputs onto its sensory representations. 自监督学习 (SSL) 方法旨在利用大量未标记数据进行机器学习 (ML)，但其基本原理通常是特定于方法的。源自体现学习的生物学第一原理的 SSL 框架可以统一各种 SSL 方法，帮助阐明大脑中的学习，并可能改善机器学习。 SSL 通常将每个训练数据点转换为一对视图，使用该配对的知识作为积极（即非对比）自我监督标志，并可能将其与不相关（即对比）消极示例相对立。在这里，我们证明这种类型的自我监督是神经科学概念“效应复制”（EC）的不完整实现。具体来说，大脑还通过传递（即运动命令）来改变环境，但它会向自身发送完整命令的 EC，即不仅仅是 SSL 信号。此外，它的动作表现可能是以自我为中心的。从这样的原则基础上，我们在一个共同的理论框架下正式恢复和扩展了 SSL 方法，例如 SimCLR、BYOL 和 ReLIC，即通过影响副本进行自我监督 (S-TEC)。根据经验，S-TEC 有意义地重组了类内和类间表示。这表现为图像分类、分割、对象检测和音频方面最近强大的 SSL 基线的改进。这些结果假设大脑的运动输出对其感觉表征产生可测试的积极影响。 本文提出一种基于神经科学中'传出复制'（Efference Copy）概念的自监督学习框架S-TEC，旨在统一现有自监督学习方法并提升机器学习性能。 Franz Scherr,Qinghai Guo,Timoleon Moraitis cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NE,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Denis Kuznedelev,Eldar Kurtic,Elias Frantar,Dan Alistarh
title: CAP: Correlation-Aware Pruning for Highly-Accurate Sparse Vision Models
title_zh: CAP：高精度稀疏视觉模型的相关感知剪枝
abstract: Driven by significant improvements in architectural design and training pipelines, computer vision has recently experienced dramatic progress in terms of accuracy on classic benchmarks such as ImageNet. These highly-accurate models are challenging to deploy, as they appear harder to compress using standard techniques such as pruning. We address this issue by introducing the Correlation Aware Pruner (CAP), a new unstructured pruning framework which significantly pushes the compressibility limits for state-of-the-art architectures. Our method is based on two technical advancements: a new theoretically-justified pruner, which can handle complex weight correlations accurately and efficiently during the pruning process itself, and an efficient finetuning procedure for post-compression recovery. We validate our approach via extensive experiments on several modern vision models such as Vision Transformers (ViT), modern CNNs, and ViT-CNN hybrids, showing for the first time that these can be pruned to high sparsity levels (e.g. $\geq 75$%) with low impact on accuracy ($\leq 1$% relative drop). Our approach is also compatible with structured pruning and quantization, and can lead to practical speedups of 1.5 to 2.4x without accuracy loss. To further showcase CAP's accuracy and scalability, we use it to show for the first time that extremely-accurate large vision models, trained via self-supervised techniques, can also be pruned to moderate sparsities, with negligible accuracy loss.
summary: Driven by significant improvements in architectural design and training pipelines, computer vision has recently experienced dramatic progress in terms of accuracy on classic benchmarks such as ImageNet. These highly-accurate models are challenging to deploy, as they appear harder to compress using standard techniques such as pruning. We address this issue by introducing the Correlation Aware Pruner (CAP), a new unstructured pruning framework which significantly pushes the compressibility limits for state-of-the-art architectures. Our method is based on two technical advancements: a new theoretically-justified pruner, which can handle complex weight correlations accurately and efficiently during the pruning process itself, and an efficient finetuning procedure for post-compression recovery. We validate our approach via extensive experiments on several modern vision models such as Vision Transformers (ViT), modern CNNs, and ViT-CNN hybrids, showing for the first time that these can be pruned to high sparsity levels (e.g. $\geq 75$%) with low impact on accuracy ($\leq 1$% relative drop). Our approach is also compatible with structured pruning and quantization, and can lead to practical speedups of 1.5 to 2.4x without accuracy loss. To further showcase CAP's accuracy and scalability, we use it to show for the first time that extremely-accurate large vision models, trained via self-supervised techniques, can also be pruned to moderate sparsities, with negligible accuracy loss.
abstract_zh: 在架构设计和训练流程显着改进的推动下，计算机视觉最近在 ImageNet 等经典基准测试的准确性方面取得了巨大进步。这些高精度模型的部署具有挑战性，因为它们似乎更难使用剪枝等标准技术进行压缩。我们通过引入 Correlation Aware Pruner (CAP) 来解决这个问题，这是一种新的非结构化修剪框架，可显着提高最先进架构的可压缩性限制。我们的方法基于两项技术进步：一种新的理论上合理的剪枝器，它可以在剪枝过程本身期间准确有效地处理复杂的权重相关性，以及用于压缩后恢复的有效微调程序。我们通过对多种现代视觉模型（例如视觉变换器（ViT）、现代 CNN 和 ViT-CNN 混合模型）进行大量实验来验证我们的方法，并首次表明这些模型可以修剪到高稀疏性水平（例如 $\geq 75$%），而对准确性的影响很小（$\leq 1$% 相对下降）。我们的方法还与结构化剪枝和量化兼容，并且可以在不损失精度的情况下实现 1.5 至 2.4 倍的实际加速。为了进一步展示 CAP 的准确性和可扩展性，我们首次使用它来证明，通过自我监督技术训练的极其准确的大型视觉模型也可以被修剪到适度的稀疏性，而准确性损失可以忽略不计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CAP的相关性感知剪枝方法，用于在保持高精度的同时对高精度视觉模型进行高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代视觉模型在ImageNet等基准上表现优异，但其压缩难度大，传统剪枝技术难以有效处理高精度模型的复杂权重相关性。
AI.method: CAP通过两个关键技术实现：1) 理论支持的相关性感知剪枝器，精确处理权重相关性；2) 压缩后高效的微调流程。该方法兼容结构化剪枝和量化，并能在多种现代视觉模型（如ViT、CNN及混合模型）上应用。
AI.result: 实验表明，CAP可将ViT等模型剪枝至75%以上稀疏度，精度损失≤1%；同时实现1.5-2.4倍加速，且首次验证了自监督训练的大模型可被有效剪枝。
AI.conclusion: CAP通过处理权重相关性及优化微调流程，显著提升了高精度视觉模型的压缩潜力，在保持精度的同时实现高效部署。

These highly-accurate models are challenging to deploy, as they appear harder to compress using standard techniques such as pruning. Our method is based on two technical advancements: a new theoretically-justified pruner, which can handle complex weight correlations accurately and efficiently during the pruning process itself, and an efficient finetuning procedure for post-compression recovery. To further showcase CAP's accuracy and scalability, we use it to show for the first time that extremely-accurate large vision models, trained via self-supervised techniques, can also be pruned to moderate sparsities, with negligible accuracy loss. 在架构设计和训练流程显着改进的推动下，计算机视觉最近在 ImageNet 等经典基准测试的准确性方面取得了巨大进步。这些高精度模型的部署具有挑战性，因为它们似乎更难使用剪枝等标准技术进行压缩。我们通过引入 Correlation Aware Pruner (CAP) 来解决这个问题，这是一种新的非结构化修剪框架，可显着提高最先进架构的可压缩性限制。我们的方法基于两项技术进步：一种新的理论上合理的剪枝器，它可以在剪枝过程本身期间准确有效地处理复杂的权重相关性，以及用于压缩后恢复的有效微调程序。我们通过对多种现代视觉模型（例如视觉变换器（ViT）、现代 CNN 和 ViT-CNN 混合模型）进行大量实验来验证我们的方法，并首次表明这些模型可以修剪到高稀疏性水平（例如 $\geq 75$%），而对准确性的影响很小（$\leq 1$% 相对下降）。我们的方法还与结构化剪枝和量化兼容，并且可以在不损失精度的情况下实现 1.5 至 2.4 倍的实际加速。为了进一步展示 CAP 的准确性和可扩展性，我们首次使用它来证明，通过自我监督技术训练的极其准确的大型视觉模型也可以被修剪到适度的稀疏性，而准确性损失可以忽略不计。 本文提出了一种名为CAP的相关性感知剪枝方法，用于在保持高精度的同时对高精度视觉模型进行高效压缩。 Denis Kuznedelev,Eldar Kurtic,Elias Frantar,Dan Alistarh cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ziqi Gao,Yuntao Wang,Jianguo Chen,Junliang Xing,Shwetak Patel,Xin Liu,Yuanchun Shi
title: MMTSA: Multimodal Temporal Segment Attention Network for Efficient Human Activity Recognition
title_zh: MMTSA：用于高效人类活动识别的多模态时间段注意力网络
abstract: Multimodal sensors provide complementary information to develop accurate machine-learning methods for human activity recognition (HAR), but introduce significantly higher computational load, which reduces efficiency. This paper proposes an efficient multimodal neural architecture for HAR using an RGB camera and inertial measurement units (IMUs) called Multimodal Temporal Segment Attention Network (MMTSA). MMTSA first transforms IMU sensor data into a temporal and structure-preserving gray-scale image using the Gramian Angular Field (GAF), representing the inherent properties of human activities. MMTSA then applies a multimodal sparse sampling method to reduce data redundancy. Lastly, MMTSA adopts an inter-segment attention module for efficient multimodal fusion. Using three well-established public datasets, we evaluated MMTSA's effectiveness and efficiency in HAR. Results show that our method achieves superior performance improvements 11.13% of cross-subject F1-score on the MMAct dataset than the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. The ablation study and analysis suggest that MMTSA's effectiveness in fusing multimodal data for accurate HAR. The efficiency evaluation on an edge device showed that MMTSA achieved significantly better accuracy, lower computational load, and lower inference latency than SOTA methods.
summary: Multimodal sensors provide complementary information to develop accurate machine-learning methods for human activity recognition (HAR), but introduce significantly higher computational load, which reduces efficiency. This paper proposes an efficient multimodal neural architecture for HAR using an RGB camera and inertial measurement units (IMUs) called Multimodal Temporal Segment Attention Network (MMTSA). MMTSA first transforms IMU sensor data into a temporal and structure-preserving gray-scale image using the Gramian Angular Field (GAF), representing the inherent properties of human activities. MMTSA then applies a multimodal sparse sampling method to reduce data redundancy. Lastly, MMTSA adopts an inter-segment attention module for efficient multimodal fusion. Using three well-established public datasets, we evaluated MMTSA's effectiveness and efficiency in HAR. Results show that our method achieves superior performance improvements 11.13% of cross-subject F1-score on the MMAct dataset than the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. The ablation study and analysis suggest that MMTSA's effectiveness in fusing multimodal data for accurate HAR. The efficiency evaluation on an edge device showed that MMTSA achieved significantly better accuracy, lower computational load, and lower inference latency than SOTA methods.
abstract_zh: 多模态传感器提供补充信息来开发用于人类活动识别 (HAR) 的准确机器学习方法，但会带来明显更高的计算负载，从而降低效率。本文提出了一种使用 RGB 相机和惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的高效 HAR 多模态神经架构，称为多模态时间段注意力网络 (MMTSA)。 MMTSA 首先使用格拉米安角场 (GAF) 将 IMU 传感器数据转换为时间且保留结构的灰度图像，代表人类活动的固有属性。 MMTSA 然后应用多模态稀疏采样方法来减少数据冗余。最后，MMTSA 采用分段间注意力模块来实现高效的多模态融合。我们使用三个完善的公共数据集评估了 MMTSA 在 HAR 中的有效性和效率。结果表明，与之前最先进的 (SOTA) 方法相比，我们的方法在 MMAct 数据集上的跨主题 F1 分数上实现了 11.13% 的卓越性能提升。消融研究和分析表明 MMTSA 在融合多模态数据以获得准确的 HAR 方面是有效的。边缘设备上的效率评估表明，MMTSA 比 SOTA 方法具有明显更好的精度、更低的计算负载和更低的推理延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MMTSA的多模态时间段注意力网络，用于高效的人类活动识别（HAR），结合RGB摄像头和惯性测量单元（IMU）数据。
AI.motivation: 多模态传感器虽能提供互补信息提升HAR准确性，但显著增加计算负载，降低效率，因此需设计更高效的多模态融合方法。
AI.method: MMTSA通过Gramian Angular Field（GAF）将IMU数据转换为结构保留的灰度图像，采用多模态稀疏采样减少冗余，并引入跨段注意力模块实现高效多模态融合。
AI.result: 在MMAct数据集上，MMTSA的跨主体F1分数比现有方法提升11.13%，且在边缘设备上表现出更高的准确率、更低的计算负载和推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: MMTSA通过创新的多模态数据处理与融合机制，在保持高识别精度的同时显著提升了HAR的计算效率，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MMTSA的多模态时间段注意力网络，用于高效的人类活动识别（HAR），结合RGB摄像头和惯性测量单元（IMU）数据。

ai_content.conclusion: MMTSA通过创新的多模态数据处理与融合机制，在保持高识别精度的同时显著提升了HAR的计算效率，验证了其在实际应用中的有效性。

search_text: MMTSA: Multimodal Temporal Segment Attention Network for Efficient Human Activity Recognition MMTSA：用于高效人类活动识别的多模态时间段注意力网络 Multimodal sensors provide complementary information to develop accurate machine-learning methods for human activity recognition (HAR), but introduce significantly higher computational load, which reduces efficiency. This paper proposes an efficient multimodal neural architecture for HAR using an RGB camera and inertial measurement units (IMUs) called Multimodal Temporal Segment Attention Network (MMTSA). MMTSA first transforms IMU sensor data into a temporal and structure-preserving gray-scale image using the Gramian Angular Field (GAF), representing the inherent properties of human activities. MMTSA then applies a multimodal sparse sampling method to reduce data redundancy. Lastly, MMTSA adopts an inter-segment attention module for efficient multimodal fusion. Using three well-established public datasets, we evaluated MMTSA's effectiveness and efficiency in HAR. Results show that our method achieves superior performance improvements 11.13% of cross-subject F1-score on the MMAct dataset than the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. The ablation study and analysis suggest that MMTSA's effectiveness in fusing multimodal data for accurate HAR. The efficiency evaluation on an edge device showed that MMTSA achieved significantly better accuracy, lower computational load, and lower inference latency than SOTA methods. 多模态传感器提供补充信息来开发用于人类活动识别 (HAR) 的准确机器学习方法，但会带来明显更高的计算负载，从而降低效率。本文提出了一种使用 RGB 相机和惯性测量单元 (IMU) 的高效 HAR 多模态神经架构，称为多模态时间段注意力网络 (MMTSA)。 MMTSA 首先使用格拉米安角场 (GAF) 将 IMU 传感器数据转换为时间且保留结构的灰度图像，代表人类活动的固有属性。 MMTSA 然后应用多模态稀疏采样方法来减少数据冗余。最后，MMTSA 采用分段间注意力模块来实现高效的多模态融合。我们使用三个完善的公共数据集评估了 MMTSA 在 HAR 中的有效性和效率。结果表明，与之前最先进的 (SOTA) 方法相比，我们的方法在 MMAct 数据集上的跨主题 F1 分数上实现了 11.13% 的卓越性能提升。消融研究和分析表明 MMTSA 在融合多模态数据以获得准确的 HAR 方面是有效的。边缘设备上的效率评估表明，MMTSA 比 SOTA 方法具有明显更好的精度、更低的计算负载和更低的推理延迟。 本文提出一种名为MMTSA的多模态时间段注意力网络，用于高效的人类活动识别（HAR），结合RGB摄像头和惯性测量单元（IMU）数据。 Ziqi Gao,Yuntao Wang,Jianguo Chen,Junliang Xing,Shwetak Patel,Xin Liu,Yuanchun Shi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Samy Jelassi,Michael E. Sander,Yuanzhi Li
title: Vision Transformers provably learn spatial structure
title_zh: 视觉变形金刚可以学习空间结构
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved comparable or superior performance than Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in computer vision. This empirical breakthrough is even more remarkable since, in contrast to CNNs, ViTs do not embed any visual inductive bias of spatial locality. Yet, recent works have shown that while minimizing their training loss, ViTs specifically learn spatially localized patterns. This raises a central question: how do ViTs learn these patterns by solely minimizing their training loss using gradient-based methods from random initialization? In this paper, we provide some theoretical justification of this phenomenon. We propose a spatially structured dataset and a simplified ViT model. In this model, the attention matrix solely depends on the positional encodings. We call this mechanism the positional attention mechanism. On the theoretical side, we consider a binary classification task and show that while the learning problem admits multiple solutions that generalize, our model implicitly learns the spatial structure of the dataset while generalizing: we call this phenomenon patch association. We prove that patch association helps to sample-efficiently transfer to downstream datasets that share the same structure as the pre-training one but differ in the features. Lastly, we empirically verify that a ViT with positional attention performs similarly to the original one on CIFAR-10/100, SVHN and ImageNet.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved comparable or superior performance than Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in computer vision. This empirical breakthrough is even more remarkable since, in contrast to CNNs, ViTs do not embed any visual inductive bias of spatial locality. Yet, recent works have shown that while minimizing their training loss, ViTs specifically learn spatially localized patterns. This raises a central question: how do ViTs learn these patterns by solely minimizing their training loss using gradient-based methods from random initialization? In this paper, we provide some theoretical justification of this phenomenon. We propose a spatially structured dataset and a simplified ViT model. In this model, the attention matrix solely depends on the positional encodings. We call this mechanism the positional attention mechanism. On the theoretical side, we consider a binary classification task and show that while the learning problem admits multiple solutions that generalize, our model implicitly learns the spatial structure of the dataset while generalizing: we call this phenomenon patch association. We prove that patch association helps to sample-efficiently transfer to downstream datasets that share the same structure as the pre-training one but differ in the features. Lastly, we empirically verify that a ViT with positional attention performs similarly to the original one on CIFAR-10/100, SVHN and ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉领域，视觉变换器 (ViT) 已经取得了与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 相当或更好的性能。这一实证突破更加引人注目，因为与 CNN 相比，ViT 不嵌入任何空间局部性的视觉归纳偏差。然而，最近的研究表明，在最大限度地减少训练损失的同时，ViT 还专门学习了空间局部模式。这就提出了一个核心问题：ViT 如何通过使用基于随机初始化的梯度方法来最小化训练损失来学习这些模式？在本文中，我们为这种现象提供了一些理论依据。我们提出了一个空间结构化数据集和一个简化的 ViT 模型。在该模型中，注意力矩阵仅取决于位置编码。我们将这种机制称为位置注意机制。在理论方面，我们考虑二元分类任务，并表明，虽然学习问题允许多个泛化解决方案，但我们的模型在泛化时隐式学习数据集的空间结构：我们将这种现象称为补丁关联。我们证明补丁关联有助于有效地采样转移到下游数据集，这些数据集与预训练数据集具有相同的结构，但特征不同。最后，我们凭经验验证具有位置注意力的 ViT 在 CIFAR-10/100、SVHN 和 ImageNet 上的表现与原始 ViT 类似。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从理论上解释视觉Transformer（ViT）如何在无显式空间归纳偏置的情况下通过最小化训练损失学习空间结构。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在视觉任务中表现优异，但其缺乏卷积神经网络（CNN）的空间局部性归纳偏置，因此需要探讨其如何通过梯度下降方法从随机初始化学习空间模式。
AI.method: 提出一种结构化数据集和简化ViT模型，通过仅依赖位置编码的注意力机制（位置注意力机制），并理论分析二分类任务中模型隐式学习空间结构的现象（块关联）。
AI.result: 理论证明块关联有助于高效迁移至具有相同结构但特征不同的下游数据集，且实验验证该简化ViT在CIFAR-10/100、SVHN和ImageNet上性能接近原始模型。
AI.conclusion: 位置注意力机制使ViT能隐式学习空间结构并实现跨任务迁移，为ViT的性能提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Willem. T. Pye,David. A. Sinclair
title: A Saccaded Visual Transformer for General Object Spotting
title_zh: 用于一般物体定位的扫视视觉转换器
comment: 11 pages mostly figure, central idea is to train on distance a patch is form a labelled feature
comments: 11 pages mostly figure, central idea is to train on distance a patch is form a labelled feature
abstract: This paper presents the novel combination of a visual transformer style patch classifier with saccaded local attention. A novel optimisation paradigm for training object models is also presented, rather than the optimisation function minimising class membership probability error the network is trained to estimate the normalised distance to the centroid of labelled objects. This approach builds a degree of transnational invariance directly into the model and allows fast saccaded search with gradient ascent to find object centroids. The resulting saccaded visual transformer is demonstrated on human faces.
summary: This paper presents the novel combination of a visual transformer style patch classifier with saccaded local attention. A novel optimisation paradigm for training object models is also presented, rather than the optimisation function minimising class membership probability error the network is trained to estimate the normalised distance to the centroid of labelled objects. This approach builds a degree of transnational invariance directly into the model and allows fast saccaded search with gradient ascent to find object centroids. The resulting saccaded visual transformer is demonstrated on human faces.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了视觉变压器式补丁分类器与扫视局部注意力的新颖组合。还提出了一种用于训练对象模型的新颖优化范例，而不是最小化类隶属概率误差的优化函数，而是训练网络来估计到标记对象质心的归一化距离。这种方法直接在模型中构建了一定程度的跨国不变性，并允许通过梯度上升进行快速扫视搜索以查找对象质心。由此产生的扫视视觉变换器在人脸上得到了展示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉Transformer与眼动机制的新型目标检测方法，通过优化模型以估计物体中心距离实现快速搜索。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测模型对物体位置和视角变化敏感，且搜索效率较低，需提升模型的不变性与检测速度。
AI.method: 将视觉Transformer的patch分类器与saccaded局部注意力结合，采用基于归一化距离到物体中心的优化范式，利用梯度上升实现快速眼动搜索。
AI.result: 该方法在人脸检测任务中验证了有效性，能够快速定位物体中心并保持较高检测精度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的saccaded视觉Transformer通过内置不变性机制，为通用目标检测提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

A novel optimisation paradigm for training object models is also presented, rather than the optimisation function minimising class membership probability error the network is trained to estimate the normalised distance to the centroid of labelled objects. This approach builds a degree of transnational invariance directly into the model and allows fast saccaded search with gradient ascent to find object centroids. The resulting saccaded visual transformer is demonstrated on human faces. 本文提出了视觉变压器式补丁分类器与扫视局部注意力的新颖组合。还提出了一种用于训练对象模型的新颖优化范例，而不是最小化类隶属概率误差的优化函数，而是训练网络来估计到标记对象质心的归一化距离。这种方法直接在模型中构建了一定程度的跨国不变性，并允许通过梯度上升进行快速扫视搜索以查找对象质心。由此产生的扫视视觉变换器在人脸上得到了展示。 本文提出了一种结合视觉Transformer与眼动机制的新型目标检测方法，通过优化模型以估计物体中心距离实现快速搜索。 Willem. T. Pye,David. A. Sinclair cs.CV

authors_text: Md Ekramul Hossain,Muhammad Ashad Kabir,Lihong Zheng,Dave L. Swain,Shawn McGrath,Jonathan Medway
title: A Systematic Review of Machine Learning Techniques for Cattle Identification: Datasets, Methods and Future Directions
title_zh: 牛识别机器学习技术的系统回顾：数据集、方法和未来方向
abstract: Increased biosecurity and food safety requirements may increase demand for efficient traceability and identification systems of livestock in the supply chain. The advanced technologies of machine learning and computer vision have been applied in precision livestock management, including critical disease detection, vaccination, production management, tracking, and health monitoring. This paper offers a systematic literature review (SLR) of vision-based cattle identification. More specifically, this SLR is to identify and analyse the research related to cattle identification using Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL). For the two main applications of cattle detection and cattle identification, all the ML based papers only solve cattle identification problems. However, both detection and identification problems were studied in the DL based papers. Based on our survey report, the most used ML models for cattle identification were support vector machine (SVM), k-nearest neighbour (KNN), and artificial neural network (ANN). Convolutional neural network (CNN), residual network (ResNet), Inception, You Only Look Once (YOLO), and Faster R-CNN were popular DL models in the selected papers. Among these papers, the most distinguishing features were the muzzle prints and coat patterns of cattle. Local binary pattern (LBP), speeded up robust features (SURF), scale-invariant feature transform (SIFT), and Inception or CNN were identified as the most used feature extraction methods.
summary: Increased biosecurity and food safety requirements may increase demand for efficient traceability and identification systems of livestock in the supply chain. The advanced technologies of machine learning and computer vision have been applied in precision livestock management, including critical disease detection, vaccination, production management, tracking, and health monitoring. This paper offers a systematic literature review (SLR) of vision-based cattle identification. More specifically, this SLR is to identify and analyse the research related to cattle identification using Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL). For the two main applications of cattle detection and cattle identification, all the ML based papers only solve cattle identification problems. However, both detection and identification problems were studied in the DL based papers. Based on our survey report, the most used ML models for cattle identification were support vector machine (SVM), k-nearest neighbour (KNN), and artificial neural network (ANN). Convolutional neural network (CNN), residual network (ResNet), Inception, You Only Look Once (YOLO), and Faster R-CNN were popular DL models in the selected papers. Among these papers, the most distinguishing features were the muzzle prints and coat patterns of cattle. Local binary pattern (LBP), speeded up robust features (SURF), scale-invariant feature transform (SIFT), and Inception or CNN were identified as the most used feature extraction methods.
abstract_zh: 生物安全和食品安全要求的提高可能会增加供应链中对牲畜高效追溯和识别系统的需求。机器学习和计算机视觉的先进技术已应用于精准畜牧管理，包括重大疾病检测、疫苗接种、生产管理、跟踪和健康监测。本文提供了基于视觉的牛识别的系统文献综述（SLR）。更具体地说，这个SLR是利用机器学习（ML）和深度学习（DL）来识别和分析与牛识别相关的研究。对于牛检测和牛识别这两个主要应用，所有基于机器学习的论文都只解决牛识别问题。然而，基于深度学习的论文中研究了检测和识别问题。根据我们的调查报告，牛识别中最常用的机器学习模型是支持向量机 (SVM)、k-近邻 (KNN) 和人工神经网络 (ANN)。卷积神经网络（CNN）、残差网络（ResNet）、Inception、You Only Look Once（YOLO）和 Faster R-CNN 是所选论文中流行的 DL 模型。在这些纸张中，最显着的特征是牛的枪口印记和皮毛图案。局部二值模式 (LBP)、加速鲁棒特征 (SURF)、尺度不变特征变换 (SIFT) 和 Inception 或 CNN 被认为是最常用的特征提取方法。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了机器学习和深度学习技术在奶牛识别中的应用，分析了数据集、方法及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 生物安全和食品安全需求增加，推动对牲畜供应链中高效可追溯性识别系统的需求，机器学习和计算机视觉技术为此提供了可能。
AI.method: 通过系统文献综述（SLR）方法，分析基于机器学习（ML）和深度学习（DL）的奶牛识别与检测相关研究。
AI.result: ML方法主要解决识别问题，常用模型包括SVM、KNN和ANN；DL方法同时处理检测与识别，常用CNN、ResNet等。特征提取多采用鼻印、毛皮图案及LBP、SURF等方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习在奶牛检测与识别中表现更全面，未来需进一步探索高效模型与特征提取技术以提升识别准确率与适用性。

authors_text: Fabian Märkert,Martin Sunkel,Anselm Haselhoff,Stefan Rudolph
title: Segmentation-guided Domain Adaptation for Efficient Depth Completion
title_zh: 分段引导的域适应可实现高效的深度补全
abstract: Complete depth information and efficient estimators have become vital ingredients in scene understanding for automated driving tasks. A major problem for LiDAR-based depth completion is the inefficient utilization of convolutions due to the lack of coherent information as provided by the sparse nature of uncorrelated LiDAR point clouds, which often leads to complex and resource-demanding networks. The problem is reinforced by the expensive aquisition of depth data for supervised training. In this work, we propose an efficient depth completion model based on a vgg05-like CNN architecture and propose a semi-supervised domain adaptation approach to transfer knowledge from synthetic to real world data to improve data-efficiency and reduce the need for a large database. In order to boost spatial coherence, we guide the learning process using segmentations as additional source of information. The efficiency and accuracy of our approach is evaluated on the KITTI dataset. Our approach improves on previous efficient and low parameter state of the art approaches while having a noticeably lower computational footprint.
summary: Complete depth information and efficient estimators have become vital ingredients in scene understanding for automated driving tasks. A major problem for LiDAR-based depth completion is the inefficient utilization of convolutions due to the lack of coherent information as provided by the sparse nature of uncorrelated LiDAR point clouds, which often leads to complex and resource-demanding networks. The problem is reinforced by the expensive aquisition of depth data for supervised training. In this work, we propose an efficient depth completion model based on a vgg05-like CNN architecture and propose a semi-supervised domain adaptation approach to transfer knowledge from synthetic to real world data to improve data-efficiency and reduce the need for a large database. In order to boost spatial coherence, we guide the learning process using segmentations as additional source of information. The efficiency and accuracy of our approach is evaluated on the KITTI dataset. Our approach improves on previous efficient and low parameter state of the art approaches while having a noticeably lower computational footprint.
abstract_zh: 完整的深度信息和高效的估计器已成为自动驾驶任务场景理解的重要组成部分。基于激光雷达的深度补全的一个主要问题是由于不相关的激光雷达点云的稀疏性质所提供的缺乏相干信息而导致卷积的利用效率低下，这通常会导致网络复杂且需要大量资源。用于监督训练的深度数据采集成本高昂，加剧了这个问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于类似 vgg05 的 CNN 架构的高效深度补全模型，并提出了一种半监督域适应方法，将知识从合成数据转移到现实世界数据，以提高数据效率并减少对大型数据库的需求。为了提高空间连贯性，我们使用分段作为附加信息源来指导学习过程。我们的方法的效率和准确性是在 KITTI 数据集上进行评估的。我们的方法改进了以前高效且低参数的最先进方法，同时具有明显较低的计算足迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合分割引导的领域自适应方法，用于高效完成LiDAR深度补全任务，解决稀疏点云数据导致的网络效率低下问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR深度补全方法因点云稀疏性导致卷积效率低下，且依赖大量标注数据训练，成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于VGG05架构设计轻量CNN模型，结合半监督领域自适应技术，利用分割信息提升空间一致性并迁移合成数据到真实场景的知识。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上验证，相比现有高效方法参数更少且计算量更低，同时保持更优的深度补全精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分割引导的领域自适应有效平衡了模型效率与精度，为自动驾驶场景下的深度补全提供了轻量化解决方案。

authors_text: Aline Sindel,Andreas Maier,Vincent Christlein
title: ArtFacePoints: High-resolution Facial Landmark Detection in Paintings and Prints
title_zh: ArtFacePoints：绘画和印刷品中的高分辨率面部标志检测
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables, accepted to VISART workshop at ECCV 2022
comments: 16 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables, accepted to VISART workshop at ECCV 2022
abstract: Facial landmark detection plays an important role for the similarity analysis in artworks to compare portraits of the same or similar artists. With facial landmarks, portraits of different genres, such as paintings and prints, can be automatically aligned using control-point-based image registration. We propose a deep-learning-based method for facial landmark detection in high-resolution images of paintings and prints. It divides the task into a global network for coarse landmark prediction and multiple region networks for precise landmark refinement in regions of the eyes, nose, and mouth that are automatically determined based on the predicted global landmark coordinates. We created a synthetically augmented facial landmark art dataset including artistic style transfer and geometric landmark shifts. Our method demonstrates an accurate detection of the inner facial landmarks for our high-resolution dataset of artworks while being comparable for a public low-resolution artwork dataset in comparison to competing methods.
summary: Facial landmark detection plays an important role for the similarity analysis in artworks to compare portraits of the same or similar artists. With facial landmarks, portraits of different genres, such as paintings and prints, can be automatically aligned using control-point-based image registration. We propose a deep-learning-based method for facial landmark detection in high-resolution images of paintings and prints. It divides the task into a global network for coarse landmark prediction and multiple region networks for precise landmark refinement in regions of the eyes, nose, and mouth that are automatically determined based on the predicted global landmark coordinates. We created a synthetically augmented facial landmark art dataset including artistic style transfer and geometric landmark shifts. Our method demonstrates an accurate detection of the inner facial landmarks for our high-resolution dataset of artworks while being comparable for a public low-resolution artwork dataset in comparison to competing methods.
abstract_zh: 面部标志检测对于艺术品相似性分析以比较相同或相似艺术家的肖像起着重要作用。借助面部标志，可以使用基于控制点的图像配准自动对齐不同类型的肖像（例如绘画和版画）。我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于在绘画和印刷品的高分辨率图像中进行面部标志检测。它将任务分为用于粗略地标预测的全局网络和用于根据预测的全局地标坐标自动确定的眼睛、鼻子和嘴巴区域中的精确地标细化的多个区域网络。我们创建了一个综合增强的面部地标艺术数据集，包括艺术风格转移和几何地标移位。我们的方法展示了我们的高分辨率艺术品数据集的内部面部标志的准确检测，同时与公共低分辨率艺术品数据集相比，与竞争方法具有可比性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的高分辨率绘画和印刷品面部关键点检测方法，用于艺术作品相似性分析。
AI.motivation: 艺术作品相似性分析需要自动对齐不同风格的肖像画，传统方法难以处理高分辨率艺术品中的面部关键点检测问题。
AI.method: 将任务分为全局网络进行粗略预测和多个区域网络（眼、鼻、口）进行精确优化，结合合成增强数据集（含艺术风格迁移和几何偏移）训练模型。
AI.result: 在高分辨率艺术品数据集上实现精确的内部面部关键点检测，且在公开低分辨率数据集上性能与现有方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了高分辨率艺术品面部关键点检测问题，为艺术作品自动对齐和相似性分析提供了可靠工具。

search_text: ArtFacePoints: High-resolution Facial Landmark Detection in Paintings and Prints ArtFacePoints：绘画和印刷品中的高分辨率面部标志检测 Facial landmark detection plays an important role for the similarity analysis in artworks to compare portraits of the same or similar artists. With facial landmarks, portraits of different genres, such as paintings and prints, can be automatically aligned using control-point-based image registration. We propose a deep-learning-based method for facial landmark detection in high-resolution images of paintings and prints. It divides the task into a global network for coarse landmark prediction and multiple region networks for precise landmark refinement in regions of the eyes, nose, and mouth that are automatically determined based on the predicted global landmark coordinates. We created a synthetically augmented facial landmark art dataset including artistic style transfer and geometric landmark shifts. Our method demonstrates an accurate detection of the inner facial landmarks for our high-resolution dataset of artworks while being comparable for a public low-resolution artwork dataset in comparison to competing methods. 面部标志检测对于艺术品相似性分析以比较相同或相似艺术家的肖像起着重要作用。借助面部标志，可以使用基于控制点的图像配准自动对齐不同类型的肖像（例如绘画和版画）。我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于在绘画和印刷品的高分辨率图像中进行面部标志检测。它将任务分为用于粗略地标预测的全局网络和用于根据预测的全局地标坐标自动确定的眼睛、鼻子和嘴巴区域中的精确地标细化的多个区域网络。我们创建了一个综合增强的面部地标艺术数据集，包括艺术风格转移和几何地标移位。我们的方法展示了我们的高分辨率艺术品数据集的内部面部标志的准确检测，同时与公共低分辨率艺术品数据集相比，与竞争方法具有可比性。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的高分辨率绘画和印刷品面部关键点检测方法，用于艺术作品相似性分析。 Aline Sindel,Andreas Maier,Vincent Christlein cs.CV

authors_text: Shijian Jiang,Guwen Han,Danhang Tang,Yang Zhou,Xiang Li,Jiming Chen,Qi Ye
title: Pixel-Aligned Non-parametric Hand Mesh Reconstruction
title_zh: 像素对齐非参数手部网格重建
abstract: Non-parametric mesh reconstruction has recently shown significant progress in 3D hand and body applications. In these methods, mesh vertices and edges are visible to neural networks, enabling the possibility to establish a direct mapping between 2D image pixels and 3D mesh vertices. In this paper, we seek to establish and exploit this mapping with a simple and compact architecture. The network is designed with these considerations: 1) aggregating both local 2D image features from the encoder and 3D geometric features captured in the mesh decoder; 2) decoding coarse-to-fine meshes along the decoding layers to make the best use of the hierarchical multi-scale information. Specifically, we propose an end-to-end pipeline for hand mesh recovery tasks which consists of three phases: a 2D feature extractor constructing multi-scale feature maps, a feature mapping module transforming local 2D image features to 3D vertex features via 3D-to-2D projection, and a mesh decoder combining the graph convolution and self-attention to reconstruct mesh. The decoder aggregate both local image features in pixels and geometric features in vertices. It also regresses the mesh vertices in a coarse-to-fine manner, which can leverage multi-scale information. By exploiting the local connection and designing the mesh decoder, Our approach achieves state-of-the-art for hand mesh reconstruction on the public FreiHAND dataset.
summary: Non-parametric mesh reconstruction has recently shown significant progress in 3D hand and body applications. In these methods, mesh vertices and edges are visible to neural networks, enabling the possibility to establish a direct mapping between 2D image pixels and 3D mesh vertices. In this paper, we seek to establish and exploit this mapping with a simple and compact architecture. The network is designed with these considerations: 1) aggregating both local 2D image features from the encoder and 3D geometric features captured in the mesh decoder; 2) decoding coarse-to-fine meshes along the decoding layers to make the best use of the hierarchical multi-scale information. Specifically, we propose an end-to-end pipeline for hand mesh recovery tasks which consists of three phases: a 2D feature extractor constructing multi-scale feature maps, a feature mapping module transforming local 2D image features to 3D vertex features via 3D-to-2D projection, and a mesh decoder combining the graph convolution and self-attention to reconstruct mesh. The decoder aggregate both local image features in pixels and geometric features in vertices. It also regresses the mesh vertices in a coarse-to-fine manner, which can leverage multi-scale information. By exploiting the local connection and designing the mesh decoder, Our approach achieves state-of-the-art for hand mesh reconstruction on the public FreiHAND dataset.
abstract_zh: 非参数网格重建最近在 3D 手和身体应用中取得了重大进展。在这些方法中，网格顶点和边缘对神经网络是可见的，从而可以在 2D 图像像素和 3D 网格顶点之间建立直接映射。在本文中，我们寻求通过简单而紧凑的架构来建立和利用这种映射。该网络的设计考虑了以下因素：1）聚合来自编码器的局部 2D 图像特征和网格解码器中捕获的 3D 几何特征； 2）沿着解码层对从粗到细的网格进行解码，以充分利用分层多尺度信息。具体来说，我们提出了一个用于手部网格恢复任务的端到端管道，该管道由三个阶段组成：构建多尺度特征图的2D特征提取器、通过3D到2D投影将局部2D图像特征转换为3D顶点特征的特征映射模块、以及结合图卷积和自注意力来重建网格的网格解码器。解码器聚合像素中的局部图像特征和顶点中的几何特征。它还以从粗到细的方式回归网格顶点，这可以利用多尺度信息。通过利用本地连接并设计网格解码器，我们的方法在公共 FreiHAND 数据集上实现了最先进的手部网格重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于像素对齐的非参数手部网格重建方法，通过建立2D图像像素与3D网格顶点的直接映射关系，实现高精度的手部三维重建。
AI.motivation: 现有非参数网格重建方法在手部和人体应用中取得进展，但缺乏简单高效的架构设计，难以充分利用多尺度信息和几何特征。
AI.method: 设计端到端三阶段流水线：1) 提取多尺度2D图像特征；2) 通过3D-2D投影转换局部图像特征为顶点特征；3) 结合图卷积与自注意力机制的网格解码器，以粗到细方式重建网格并融合像素与几何特征。
AI.result: 在FreiHAND数据集上达到手部网格重建的最先进水平，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部连接设计与分层解码架构，该方法在保持模型简洁性的同时，显著提升了手部三维网格重建的精度与效率。

authors_text: Zhixue Zhao,George Chrysostomou,Kalina Bontcheva,Nikolaos Aletras
title: On the Impact of Temporal Concept Drift on Model Explanations
title_zh: 时间概念漂移对模型解释的影响
abstract: Explanation faithfulness of model predictions in natural language processing is typically evaluated on held-out data from the same temporal distribution as the training data (i.e. synchronous settings). While model performance often deteriorates due to temporal variation (i.e. temporal concept drift), it is currently unknown how explanation faithfulness is impacted when the time span of the target data is different from the data used to train the model (i.e. asynchronous settings). For this purpose, we examine the impact of temporal variation on model explanations extracted by eight feature attribution methods and three select-then-predict models across six text classification tasks. Our experiments show that (i)faithfulness is not consistent under temporal variations across feature attribution methods (e.g. it decreases or increases depending on the method), with an attention-based method demonstrating the most robust faithfulness scores across datasets; and (ii) select-then-predict models are mostly robust in asynchronous settings with only small degradation in predictive performance. Finally, feature attribution methods show conflicting behavior when used in FRESH (i.e. a select-and-predict model) and for measuring sufficiency/comprehensiveness (i.e. as post-hoc methods), suggesting that we need more robust metrics to evaluate post-hoc explanation faithfulness.
summary: Explanation faithfulness of model predictions in natural language processing is typically evaluated on held-out data from the same temporal distribution as the training data (i.e. synchronous settings). While model performance often deteriorates due to temporal variation (i.e. temporal concept drift), it is currently unknown how explanation faithfulness is impacted when the time span of the target data is different from the data used to train the model (i.e. asynchronous settings). For this purpose, we examine the impact of temporal variation on model explanations extracted by eight feature attribution methods and three select-then-predict models across six text classification tasks. Our experiments show that (i)faithfulness is not consistent under temporal variations across feature attribution methods (e.g. it decreases or increases depending on the method), with an attention-based method demonstrating the most robust faithfulness scores across datasets; and (ii) select-then-predict models are mostly robust in asynchronous settings with only small degradation in predictive performance. Finally, feature attribution methods show conflicting behavior when used in FRESH (i.e. a select-and-predict model) and for measuring sufficiency/comprehensiveness (i.e. as post-hoc methods), suggesting that we need more robust metrics to evaluate post-hoc explanation faithfulness.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理中模型预测的解释可信度通常是根据与训练数据（即同步设置）相​​同时间分布的保留数据来评估的。虽然模型性能经常因时间变化（即时间概念漂移）而恶化，但目前尚不清楚当目标数据的时间跨度与用于训练模型的数据（即异步设置）不同时，解释的可信度会受到怎样的影响。为此，我们研究了时间变化对通过八种特征归因方法和六个文本分类任务中的三个选择然后预测模型提取的模型解释的影响。我们的实验表明，（i）在特征归因方法的时间变化下，忠实度并不一致（例如，它根据方法而减少或增加），而基于注意力的方法展示了跨数据集最稳健的忠实度分数； (ii) 选择然后预测模型在异步设置中大多稳健，预测性能仅略有下降。最后，特征归因方法在用于 FRESH（即选择和预测模型）和测量充分性/全面性（即作为事后方法）时表现出相互冲突的行为，这表明我们需要更强大的指标来评估事后解释的可信度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了时间概念漂移对自然语言处理模型解释性的影响，通过对比不同特征归因方法和选择-预测模型在异步设置下的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有模型解释性评估通常基于同步数据分布，但时间变化可能导致模型性能下降，而异步设置下解释性是否受影响尚不清楚。
AI.method: 在六个文本分类任务中，使用八种特征归因方法和三种选择-预测模型，分析时间变化对模型解释性的影响。
AI.result: 特征归因方法的解释性随时间变化呈现不一致性，基于注意力的方法最稳健；选择-预测模型在异步设置下性能下降较小，但特征归因方法在FRESH和事后评估中表现冲突。
AI.conclusion: 需要更稳健的指标来评估事后解释的可信度，因为现有方法在不同场景下表现不一致。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了时间概念漂移对自然语言处理模型解释性的影响，通过对比不同特征归因方法和选择-预测模型在异步设置下的表现。
ai_content.motivation: 现有模型解释性评估通常基于同步数据分布，但时间变化可能导致模型性能下降，而异步设置下解释性是否受影响尚不清楚。
ai_content.method: 在六个文本分类任务中，使用八种特征归因方法和三种选择-预测模型，分析时间变化对模型解释性的影响。
ai_content.result: 特征归因方法的解释性随时间变化呈现不一致性，基于注意力的方法最稳健；选择-预测模型在异步设置下性能下降较小，但特征归因方法在FRESH和事后评估中表现冲突。
ai_content.conclusion: 需要更稳健的指标来评估事后解释的可信度，因为现有方法在不同场景下表现不一致。
