search_text: On the Impact of Temporal Concept Drift on Model Explanations 时间概念漂移对模型解释的影响 Explanation faithfulness of model predictions in natural language processing is typically evaluated on held-out data from the same temporal distribution as the training data (i.e. synchronous settings). While model performance often deteriorates due to temporal variation (i.e. temporal concept drift), it is currently unknown how explanation faithfulness is impacted when the time span of the target data is different from the data used to train the model (i.e. asynchronous settings). For this purpose, we examine the impact of temporal variation on model explanations extracted by eight feature attribution methods and three select-then-predict models across six text classification tasks. Our experiments show that (i)faithfulness is not consistent under temporal variations across feature attribution methods (e.g. it decreases or increases depending on the method), with an attention-based method demonstrating the most robust faithfulness scores across datasets; and (ii) select-then-predict models are mostly robust in asynchronous settings with only small degradation in predictive performance. Finally, feature attribution methods show conflicting behavior when used in FRESH (i.e. a select-and-predict model) and for measuring sufficiency/comprehensiveness (i.e. as post-hoc methods), suggesting that we need more robust metrics to evaluate post-hoc explanation faithfulness. 自然语言处理中模型预测的解释可信度通常是根据与训练数据（即同步设置）相​​同时间分布的保留数据来评估的。虽然模型性能经常因时间变化（即时间概念漂移）而恶化，但目前尚不清楚当目标数据的时间跨度与用于训练模型的数据（即异步设置）不同时，解释的可信度会受到怎样的影响。为此，我们研究了时间变化对通过八种特征归因方法和六个文本分类任务中的三个选择然后预测模型提取的模型解释的影响。我们的实验表明，（i）在特征归因方法的时间变化下，忠实度并不一致（例如，它根据方法而减少或增加），而基于注意力的方法展示了跨数据集最稳健的忠实度分数； (ii) 选择然后预测模型在异步设置中大多稳健，预测性能仅略有下降。最后，特征归因方法在用于 FRESH（即选择和预测模型）和测量充分性/全面性（即作为事后方法）时表现出相互冲突的行为，这表明我们需要更强大的指标来评估事后解释的可信度。 本文研究了时间概念漂移对自然语言处理模型解释性的影响，通过对比不同特征归因方法和选择-预测模型在异步设置下的表现。 Zhixue Zhao,George Chrysostomou,Kalina Bontcheva,Nikolaos Aletras cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Khoa D. Doan,Yingjie Lao,Ping Li
title: Marksman Backdoor: Backdoor Attacks with Arbitrary Target Class
title_zh: Marksman Backdoor：任意目标类别的后门攻击
abstract: In recent years, machine learning models have been shown to be vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Under such attacks, an adversary embeds a stealthy backdoor into the trained model such that the compromised models will behave normally on clean inputs but will misclassify according to the adversary's control on maliciously constructed input with a trigger. While these existing attacks are very effective, the adversary's capability is limited: given an input, these attacks can only cause the model to misclassify toward a single pre-defined or target class. In contrast, this paper exploits a novel backdoor attack with a much more powerful payload, denoted as Marksman, where the adversary can arbitrarily choose which target class the model will misclassify given any input during inference. To achieve this goal, we propose to represent the trigger function as a class-conditional generative model and to inject the backdoor in a constrained optimization framework, where the trigger function learns to generate an optimal trigger pattern to attack any target class at will while simultaneously embedding this generative backdoor into the trained model. Given the learned trigger-generation function, during inference, the adversary can specify an arbitrary backdoor attack target class, and an appropriate trigger causing the model to classify toward this target class is created accordingly. We show empirically that the proposed framework achieves high attack performance while preserving the clean-data performance in several benchmark datasets, including MNIST, CIFAR10, GTSRB, and TinyImageNet. The proposed Marksman backdoor attack can also easily bypass existing backdoor defenses that were originally designed against backdoor attacks with a single target class. Our work takes another significant step toward understanding the extensive risks of backdoor attacks in practice.
summary: In recent years, machine learning models have been shown to be vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Under such attacks, an adversary embeds a stealthy backdoor into the trained model such that the compromised models will behave normally on clean inputs but will misclassify according to the adversary's control on maliciously constructed input with a trigger. While these existing attacks are very effective, the adversary's capability is limited: given an input, these attacks can only cause the model to misclassify toward a single pre-defined or target class. In contrast, this paper exploits a novel backdoor attack with a much more powerful payload, denoted as Marksman, where the adversary can arbitrarily choose which target class the model will misclassify given any input during inference. To achieve this goal, we propose to represent the trigger function as a class-conditional generative model and to inject the backdoor in a constrained optimization framework, where the trigger function learns to generate an optimal trigger pattern to attack any target class at will while simultaneously embedding this generative backdoor into the trained model. Given the learned trigger-generation function, during inference, the adversary can specify an arbitrary backdoor attack target class, and an appropriate trigger causing the model to classify toward this target class is created accordingly. We show empirically that the proposed framework achieves high attack performance while preserving the clean-data performance in several benchmark datasets, including MNIST, CIFAR10, GTSRB, and TinyImageNet. The proposed Marksman backdoor attack can also easily bypass existing backdoor defenses that were originally designed against backdoor attacks with a single target class. Our work takes another significant step toward understanding the extensive risks of backdoor attacks in practice.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器学习模型已被证明容易受到后门攻击。在此类攻击下，攻击者会在经过训练的模型中嵌入隐形后门，这样受感染的模型将在干净的输入上正常运行，但会根据攻击者对带有触发器的恶意构造的输入的控制进行错误分类。虽然这些现有的攻击非常有效，但对手的能力是有限的：给定输入，这些攻击只能导致模型错误分类为单个预定义或目标类别。相比之下，本文利用了一种新颖的后门攻击，其有效负载更强大，称为“Marksman”，对手可以在推理过程中任意输入给定任何输入的情况下任意选择模型将错误分类的目标类别。为了实现这一目标，我们建议将触发函数表示为类条件生成模型，并将后门注入约束优化框架中，其中触发函数学习生成最佳触发模式以随意攻击任何目标类，同时将此生成后门嵌入到训练模型中。给定学习的触发器生成函数，在推理过程中，对手可以指定任意后门攻击目标类别，并相应地创建导致模型分类到该目标类别的适当触发器。我们凭经验证明，所提出的框架在保持多个基准数据集（包括 MNIST、CIFAR10、GTSRB 和 TinyImageNet）中的干净数据性能的同时，实现了高攻击性能。拟议的 Marksman 后门攻击还可以轻松绕过现有的后门防御，这些后门防御最初是针对单一目标类别的后门攻击而设计的。我们的工作在了解实践中后门攻击的广泛风险方面又迈出了重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型后门攻击方法Marksman，使攻击者能在推理时任意指定目标分类类别。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击只能将输入误分类到预定义的单一目标类，攻击者能力受限，需更强大的攻击手段。
AI.method: 将触发器函数表示为类条件生成模型，通过约束优化框架注入后门，使模型能按需生成对应目标类的触发模式。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10等数据集上验证了高攻击成功率，同时保持正常数据性能，并能绕过现有单目标类防御机制。
AI.conclusion: Marksman显著提升了后门攻击的灵活性和威胁性，揭示了实际场景中后门攻击的广泛风险。

authors_text: Kai Zhen,Martin Radfar,Hieu Duy Nguyen,Grant P. Strimel,Nathan Susanj,Athanasios Mouchtaris
title: Sub-8-bit quantization for on-device speech recognition: a regularization-free approach
title_zh: 用于设备上语音识别的低于 8 位量化：一种免正则化方法
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE SLT'22
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE SLT'22
abstract: For on-device automatic speech recognition (ASR), quantization aware training (QAT) is ubiquitous to achieve the trade-off between model predictive performance and efficiency. Among existing QAT methods, one major drawback is that the quantization centroids have to be predetermined and fixed. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a regularization-free, "soft-to-hard" compression mechanism with self-adjustable centroids in a mu-Law constrained space, resulting in a simpler yet more versatile quantization scheme, called General Quantizer (GQ). We apply GQ to ASR tasks using Recurrent Neural Network Transducer (RNN-T) and Conformer architectures on both LibriSpeech and de-identified far-field datasets. Without accuracy degradation, GQ can compress both RNN-T and Conformer into sub-8-bit, and for some RNN-T layers, to 1-bit for fast and accurate inference. We observe a 30.73% memory footprint saving and 31.75% user-perceived latency reduction compared to 8-bit QAT via physical device benchmarking.
summary: For on-device automatic speech recognition (ASR), quantization aware training (QAT) is ubiquitous to achieve the trade-off between model predictive performance and efficiency. Among existing QAT methods, one major drawback is that the quantization centroids have to be predetermined and fixed. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a regularization-free, "soft-to-hard" compression mechanism with self-adjustable centroids in a mu-Law constrained space, resulting in a simpler yet more versatile quantization scheme, called General Quantizer (GQ). We apply GQ to ASR tasks using Recurrent Neural Network Transducer (RNN-T) and Conformer architectures on both LibriSpeech and de-identified far-field datasets. Without accuracy degradation, GQ can compress both RNN-T and Conformer into sub-8-bit, and for some RNN-T layers, to 1-bit for fast and accurate inference. We observe a 30.73% memory footprint saving and 31.75% user-perceived latency reduction compared to 8-bit QAT via physical device benchmarking.
abstract_zh: 对于设备上的自动语音识别 (ASR)，量化感知训练 (QAT) 无处不在，可以实现模型预测性能和效率之间的权衡。在现有的QAT方法中，一个主要缺点是量化质心必须是预先确定和固定的。为了克服这个限制，我们引入了一种无正则化的“软到硬”压缩机制，在 mu-Law 约束空间中具有自调节质心，从而产生一种更简单但更通用的量化方案，称为通用量化器（GQ）。我们在 LibriSpeech 和去识别的远场数据集上使用循环神经网络转换器 (RNN-T) 和 Conformer 架构将 GQ 应用于 ASR 任务。在不降低精度的情况下，GQ 可以将 RNN-T 和 Conformer 压缩为低于 8 位，对于某些 RNN-T 层，可以压缩为 1 位，以实现快速准确的推理。通过物理设备基准测试，我们观察到与 8 位 QAT 相比，内存占用节省了 30.73%，用户感知的延迟减少了 31.75%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需正则化的软到硬压缩机制，用于设备端语音识别的子8位量化。
AI.motivation: 现有的量化感知训练（QAT）方法存在量化中心必须预先确定且固定的缺点，限制了模型的灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 引入了一种无需正则化的软到硬压缩机制，通过在mu-Law约束空间中自适应调整量化中心，提出了通用量化器（GQ）。
AI.result: GQ在LibriSpeech和去标识远场数据集上成功压缩了RNN-T和Conformer模型，实现了内存占用减少30.73%和用户感知延迟减少31.75%。
AI.conclusion: GQ是一种更简单且更通用的量化方案，能够在不损害精度的前提下实现高效的模型压缩。

conclusion: GQ是一种更简单且更通用的量化方案，能够在不损害精度的前提下实现高效的模型压缩。
search_text: Sub-8-bit quantization for on-device speech recognition: a regularization-free approach 用于设备上语音识别的低于 8 位量化：一种免正则化方法 For on-device automatic speech recognition (ASR), quantization aware training (QAT) is ubiquitous to achieve the trade-off between model predictive performance and efficiency. Among existing QAT methods, one major drawback is that the quantization centroids have to be predetermined and fixed. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a regularization-free, "soft-to-hard" compression mechanism with self-adjustable centroids in a mu-Law constrained space, resulting in a simpler yet more versatile quantization scheme, called General Quantizer (GQ). We apply GQ to ASR tasks using Recurrent Neural Network Transducer (RNN-T) and Conformer architectures on both LibriSpeech and de-identified far-field datasets. Without accuracy degradation, GQ can compress both RNN-T and Conformer into sub-8-bit, and for some RNN-T layers, to 1-bit for fast and accurate inference. We observe a 30.73% memory footprint saving and 31.75% user-perceived latency reduction compared to 8-bit QAT via physical device benchmarking. 对于设备上的自动语音识别 (ASR)，量化感知训练 (QAT) 无处不在，可以实现模型预测性能和效率之间的权衡。在现有的QAT方法中，一个主要缺点是量化质心必须是预先确定和固定的。为了克服这个限制，我们引入了一种无正则化的“软到硬”压缩机制，在 mu-Law 约束空间中具有自调节质心，从而产生一种更简单但更通用的量化方案，称为通用量化器（GQ）。我们在 LibriSpeech 和去识别的远场数据集上使用循环神经网络转换器 (RNN-T) 和 Conformer 架构将 GQ 应用于 ASR 任务。在不降低精度的情况下，GQ 可以将 RNN-T 和 Conformer 压缩为低于 8 位，对于某些 RNN-T 层，可以压缩为 1 位，以实现快速准确的推理。通过物理设备基准测试，我们观察到与 8 位 QAT 相比，内存占用节省了 30.73%，用户感知的延迟减少了 31.75%。 本文提出了一种无需正则化的软到硬压缩机制，用于设备端语音识别的子8位量化。 Kai Zhen,Martin Radfar,Hieu Duy Nguyen,Grant P. Strimel,Nathan Susanj,Athanasios Mouchtaris cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Hien Ohnaka,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Keisuke Imoto,Yuki Okamoto,Kazuki Fujii,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: Visual onoma-to-wave: environmental sound synthesis from visual onomatopoeias and sound-source images
title_zh: 视觉拟声波：从视觉拟声词和声源图像合成环境声音
abstract: We propose a method for synthesizing environmental sounds from visually represented onomatopoeias and sound sources. An onomatopoeia is a word that imitates a sound structure, i.e., the text representation of sound. From this perspective, onoma-to-wave has been proposed to synthesize environmental sounds from the desired onomatopoeia texts. Onomatopoeias have another representation: visual-text representations of sounds in comics, advertisements, and virtual reality. A visual onomatopoeia (visual text of onomatopoeia) contains rich information that is not present in the text, such as a long-short duration of the image, so the use of this representation is expected to synthesize diverse sounds. Therefore, we propose visual onoma-to-wave for environmental sound synthesis from visual onomatopoeia. The method can transfer visual concepts of the visual text and sound-source image to the synthesized sound. We also propose a data augmentation method focusing on the repetition of onomatopoeias to enhance the performance of our method. An experimental evaluation shows that the methods can synthesize diverse environmental sounds from visual text and sound-source images.
summary: We propose a method for synthesizing environmental sounds from visually represented onomatopoeias and sound sources. An onomatopoeia is a word that imitates a sound structure, i.e., the text representation of sound. From this perspective, onoma-to-wave has been proposed to synthesize environmental sounds from the desired onomatopoeia texts. Onomatopoeias have another representation: visual-text representations of sounds in comics, advertisements, and virtual reality. A visual onomatopoeia (visual text of onomatopoeia) contains rich information that is not present in the text, such as a long-short duration of the image, so the use of this representation is expected to synthesize diverse sounds. Therefore, we propose visual onoma-to-wave for environmental sound synthesis from visual onomatopoeia. The method can transfer visual concepts of the visual text and sound-source image to the synthesized sound. We also propose a data augmentation method focusing on the repetition of onomatopoeias to enhance the performance of our method. An experimental evaluation shows that the methods can synthesize diverse environmental sounds from visual text and sound-source images.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从视觉表现的拟声词和声源合成环境声音的方法。拟声词是模仿声音结构的词，即声音的文本表示。从这个角度来看，拟声波被提出来从所需的拟声文本中合成环境声音。拟声词还有另一种表现形式：漫画、广告和虚拟现实中声音的视觉文本表现形式。视觉拟声词（拟声词的视觉文本）包含文本中不存在的丰富信息，例如图像的长短持续时间，因此使用这种表示有望合成多样化的声音。因此，我们提出从视觉拟声词到环境声音合成的视觉拟声波。该方法可以将视觉文本和声源图像的视觉概念转移到合成声音中。我们还提出了一种专注于拟声词重复的数据增强方法，以增强我们方法的性能。实验评估表明，该方法可以从视觉文本和声源图像合成多种环境声音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从视觉拟声词和声音源图像合成环境声音的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的拟声词只能以文本形式表示声音，而视觉拟声词（如漫画、广告和虚拟现实中的视觉文本）包含更多关于声音持续时间等信息，可以合成更多样化的声音。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为Visual Onoma-to-Wave的方法，结合视觉拟声词和声音源图像，将视觉概念和声音源信息转换为合成声音，并提出了通过重复拟声词进行数据增强的方法。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，该方法能够从视觉文本和声音源图像中合成多样化的环境声音。
AI.conclusion: Visual Onoma-to-Wave方法有效地利用了视觉拟声词和声音源图像的信息，实现了更丰富的环境声音合成。

authors_text: Ali Cem,Siqi Yan,Yunhong Ding,Darko Zibar,Francesco Da Ros
title: Data-driven Modeling of Mach-Zehnder Interferometer-based Optical Matrix Multipliers
title_zh: 基于马赫曾德干涉仪的光矩阵乘法器的数据驱动建模
comment: 12 pages, 17 figures, submitted to Jorunal of Lightwave Technology
comments: 12 pages, 17 figures, submitted to Jorunal of Lightwave Technology
abstract: Photonic integrated circuits are facilitating the development of optical neural networks, which have the potential to be both faster and more energy efficient than their electronic counterparts since optical signals are especially well-suited for implementing matrix multiplications. However, accurate programming of photonic chips for optical matrix multiplication remains a difficult challenge. Here, we describe both simple analytical models and data-driven models for offline training of optical matrix multipliers. We train and evaluate the models using experimental data obtained from a fabricated chip featuring a Mach-Zehnder interferometer mesh implementing 3-by-3 matrix multiplication. The neural network-based models outperform the simple physics-based models in terms of prediction error. Furthermore, the neural network models are also able to predict the spectral variations in the matrix weights for up to 100 frequency channels covering the C-band. The use of neural network models for programming the chip for optical matrix multiplication yields increased performance on multiple machine learning tasks.
summary: Photonic integrated circuits are facilitating the development of optical neural networks, which have the potential to be both faster and more energy efficient than their electronic counterparts since optical signals are especially well-suited for implementing matrix multiplications. However, accurate programming of photonic chips for optical matrix multiplication remains a difficult challenge. Here, we describe both simple analytical models and data-driven models for offline training of optical matrix multipliers. We train and evaluate the models using experimental data obtained from a fabricated chip featuring a Mach-Zehnder interferometer mesh implementing 3-by-3 matrix multiplication. The neural network-based models outperform the simple physics-based models in terms of prediction error. Furthermore, the neural network models are also able to predict the spectral variations in the matrix weights for up to 100 frequency channels covering the C-band. The use of neural network models for programming the chip for optical matrix multiplication yields increased performance on multiple machine learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 光子集成电路正在促进光神经网络的发展，由于光信号特别适合实现矩阵乘法，因此光神经网络有可能比电子网络更快、更节能。然而，用于光学矩阵乘法的光子芯片的精确编程仍然是一个艰巨的挑战。在这里，我们描述了用于光学矩阵乘法器离线训练的简单分析模型和数据驱动模型。我们使用从具有实现 3×3 矩阵乘法的马赫-曾德尔干涉仪网格的制造芯片获得的实验数据来训练和评估模型。基于神经网络的模型在预测误差方面优于基于物理的简单模型。此外，神经网络模型还能够预测覆盖 C 频段的多达 100 个频道的矩阵权重的频谱变化。使用神经网络模型对芯片进行光学矩阵乘法编程可以提高多项机器学习任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于数据驱动的模型以优化马赫-曾德干涉仪光学矩阵乘法器的编程方法。
AI.motivation: 光子集成电路虽具光学神经网络的高速低能耗潜力，但其光学矩阵乘法器的精确编程仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 结合物理模型与神经网络模型，利用3×3矩阵乘法芯片实验数据进行离线训练与评估。
AI.result: 神经网络模型预测误差低于物理模型，并可预测C波段100个频率通道的矩阵权重光谱变化。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动模型显著提升光学矩阵乘法器编程性能，推动光学神经网络应用。

authors_text: Niklas Bunzel,Lukas Graner
title: Face Pasting Attack
title_zh: 贴脸攻击
abstract: Cujo AI and Adversa AI hosted the MLSec face recognition challenge. The goal was to attack a black box face recognition model with targeted attacks. The model returned the confidence of the target class and a stealthiness score. For an attack to be considered successful the target class has to have the highest confidence among all classes and the stealthiness has to be at least 0.5. In our approach we paste the face of a target into a source image. By utilizing position, scaling, rotation and transparency attributes we reached 3rd place. Our approach took approximately 200 queries per attack for the final highest score and about ~7.7 queries minimum for a successful attack. The code is available at https://github.com/bunni90/FacePastingAttack .
summary: Cujo AI and Adversa AI hosted the MLSec face recognition challenge. The goal was to attack a black box face recognition model with targeted attacks. The model returned the confidence of the target class and a stealthiness score. For an attack to be considered successful the target class has to have the highest confidence among all classes and the stealthiness has to be at least 0.5. In our approach we paste the face of a target into a source image. By utilizing position, scaling, rotation and transparency attributes we reached 3rd place. Our approach took approximately 200 queries per attack for the final highest score and about ~7.7 queries minimum for a successful attack. The code is available at https://github.com/bunni90/FacePastingAttack .
abstract_zh: Cujo AI 和 Adversa AI 主办了 MLSec 人脸识别挑战赛。目标是通过有针对性的攻击来攻击黑盒人脸识别模型。该模型返回目标类别的置信度和隐秘性得分。为了使攻击被认为是成功的，目标类别必须在所有类别中具有最高的置信度，并且隐秘性必须至少为 0.5。在我们的方法中，我们将目标的脸部粘贴到源图像中。通过利用位置、缩放、旋转和透明度属性，我们获得了第三名。我们的方法每次攻击需要大约 200 个查询才能获得最终最高分，成功攻击最少需要大约 7.7 个查询。该代码可在 https://github.com/bunni90/FacePastingAttack 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是通过将目标人脸粘贴到源图像中，对黑盒人脸识别模型进行有针对性的攻击。
AI.motivation: 动机是通过参加MLSec挑战赛，开发一种有效的针对黑盒人脸识别模型的攻击方法，以提高攻击成功率和隐蔽性。
AI.method: 方法是通过调整位置、缩放、旋转和透明度等参数，将目标人脸粘贴到源图像中，以生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 结果是在挑战赛中获得第三名，每次攻击平均需要约200次查询，最低约7.7次查询即可成功。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明，通过参数调整的面部粘贴攻击方法在黑盒人脸识别模型上有效，且代码已公开供进一步研究。

search_text: Face Pasting Attack 贴脸攻击 Cujo AI and Adversa AI hosted the MLSec face recognition challenge. The goal was to attack a black box face recognition model with targeted attacks. The model returned the confidence of the target class and a stealthiness score. For an attack to be considered successful the target class has to have the highest confidence among all classes and the stealthiness has to be at least 0.5. In our approach we paste the face of a target into a source image. By utilizing position, scaling, rotation and transparency attributes we reached 3rd place. Our approach took approximately 200 queries per attack for the final highest score and about ~7.7 queries minimum for a successful attack. The code is available at https://github.com/bunni90/FacePastingAttack . Cujo AI 和 Adversa AI 主办了 MLSec 人脸识别挑战赛。目标是通过有针对性的攻击来攻击黑盒人脸识别模型。该模型返回目标类别的置信度和隐秘性得分。为了使攻击被认为是成功的，目标类别必须在所有类别中具有最高的置信度，并且隐秘性必须至少为 0.5。在我们的方法中，我们将目标的脸部粘贴到源图像中。通过利用位置、缩放、旋转和透明度属性，我们获得了第三名。我们的方法每次攻击需要大约 200 个查询才能获得最终最高分，成功攻击最少需要大约 7.7 个查询。该代码可在 https://github.com/bunni90/FacePastingAttack 获取。 本文主要任务是通过将目标人脸粘贴到源图像中，对黑盒人脸识别模型进行有针对性的攻击。 Niklas Bunzel,Lukas Graner cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mudit Verma,Katherine Metcalf
title: Symbol Guided Hindsight Priors for Reward Learning from Human Preferences
title_zh: 符号引导的后见之明先验，用于根据人类偏好进行奖励学习
abstract: Specifying rewards for reinforcement learned (RL) agents is challenging. Preference-based RL (PbRL) mitigates these challenges by inferring a reward from feedback over sets of trajectories. However, the effectiveness of PbRL is limited by the amount of feedback needed to reliably recover the structure of the target reward. We present the PRIor Over Rewards (PRIOR) framework, which incorporates priors about the structure of the reward function and the preference feedback into the reward learning process. Imposing these priors as soft constraints on the reward learning objective reduces the amount of feedback required by half and improves overall reward recovery. Additionally, we demonstrate that using an abstract state space for the computation of the priors further improves the reward learning and the agent's performance.
summary: Specifying rewards for reinforcement learned (RL) agents is challenging. Preference-based RL (PbRL) mitigates these challenges by inferring a reward from feedback over sets of trajectories. However, the effectiveness of PbRL is limited by the amount of feedback needed to reliably recover the structure of the target reward. We present the PRIor Over Rewards (PRIOR) framework, which incorporates priors about the structure of the reward function and the preference feedback into the reward learning process. Imposing these priors as soft constraints on the reward learning objective reduces the amount of feedback required by half and improves overall reward recovery. Additionally, we demonstrate that using an abstract state space for the computation of the priors further improves the reward learning and the agent's performance.
abstract_zh: 指定强化学习 (RL) 代理的奖励具有挑战性。基于偏好的强化学习 (PbRL) 通过从轨迹集的反馈中推断奖励来缓解这些挑战。然而，PbRL 的有效性受到可靠恢复目标奖励结构所需的反馈量的限制。我们提出了奖励优先（PRIOR）框架，它将奖励函数结构的先验和偏好反馈纳入奖励学习过程。将这些先验作为奖励学习目标的软约束将所需的反馈量减少一半，并提高整体奖励恢复。此外，我们证明使用抽象状态空间来计算先验可以进一步提高奖励学习和代理的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PRIOR的框架，通过引入奖励函数结构和偏好反馈的先验知识，提升基于人类偏好的强化学习中的奖励学习效率。
AI.motivation: 基于偏好的强化学习（PbRL）在奖励学习中需要大量反馈才能准确恢复目标奖励结构，存在效率瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计PRIOR框架，将奖励结构先验和偏好反馈作为软约束整合到学习目标中，并通过抽象状态空间计算先验以优化学习过程。
AI.result: 反馈需求减少50%，奖励恢复效果提升，且抽象状态空间进一步增强了智能体性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构先验与抽象状态空间的结合，PRIOR框架有效降低了奖励学习的反馈依赖，提高了学习效率和效果。

authors_text: Qisheng Wang
title: A Note on Quantum Divide and Conquer for Minimal String Rotation
title_zh: 关于最小弦旋转的量子分而治之的注解
comment: 16 pages, 1 table. v2: Decision version in v1 is removed due to a gap found in the proof
comments: 16 pages, 1 table. v2: Decision version in v1 is removed due to a gap found in the proof
abstract: Lexicographically minimal string rotation is a fundamental problem in string processing that has recently garnered significant attention in quantum computing. Near-optimal quantum algorithms have been proposed for solving this problem, utilizing a divide-and-conquer structure. In this note, we show that its quantum query complexity is $\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{O(\sqrt{\log n})}$, improving the prior result of $\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{(\log n)^{1/2+\varepsilon}}$ due to Akmal and Jin (SODA 2022). Notably, this improvement is quasi-polylogarithmic, which is achieved by only logarithmic level-wise optimization using fault-tolerant quantum minimum finding.
summary: Lexicographically minimal string rotation is a fundamental problem in string processing that has recently garnered significant attention in quantum computing. Near-optimal quantum algorithms have been proposed for solving this problem, utilizing a divide-and-conquer structure. In this note, we show that its quantum query complexity is $\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{O(\sqrt{\log n})}$, improving the prior result of $\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{(\log n)^{1/2+\varepsilon}}$ due to Akmal and Jin (SODA 2022). Notably, this improvement is quasi-polylogarithmic, which is achieved by only logarithmic level-wise optimization using fault-tolerant quantum minimum finding.
abstract_zh: 字典顺序最小字符串旋转是字符串处理中的一个基本问题，最近在量子计算中引起了极大的关注。近乎最优的量子算法已经被提出来解决这个问题，利用分而治之的结构。在本文中，我们表明其量子查询复杂度为 $\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{O(\sqrt{\log n})}$，改进了 Akmal 和 Jin 提出的 $\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{(\log n)^{1/2+\varepsilon}}$ 的先验结果 (SODA 2022)。值得注意的是，这种改进是准多对数的，这是通过使用容错量子最小值发现的仅对数级优化来实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究量子计算中最小字符串旋转问题的查询复杂度，改进现有算法的上界。
AI.motivation: 最小字符串旋转是字符串处理的基础问题，在量子计算中受到关注。现有算法（Akmal & Jin, SODA 2022）的查询复杂度为$\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{(\log n)^{1/2+\varepsilon}}$，本文旨在进一步优化该上界。
AI.method: 采用分治策略，利用容错量子最小值查找算法进行对数级别的逐层优化，从而改进查询复杂度。
AI.result: 将查询复杂度从$\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{(\log n)^{1/2+\varepsilon}}$改进为$\sqrt{n} \cdot 2^{O(\sqrt{\log n})}$，实现了准多项式的提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过仅对数级别的逐层优化即可显著改进最小字符串旋转问题的量子查询复杂度，展示了量子分治策略的潜力。

authors_text: Gaëtan Landreau,Mohamed Tamaazousti
title: Pruning-based Topology Refinement of 3D Mesh using a 2D Alpha Mask
title_zh: 使用 2D Alpha Mask 对 3D 网格进行基于修剪的拓扑细化
abstract: Image-based 3D reconstruction has increasingly stunning results over the past few years with the latest improvements in computer vision and graphics. Geometry and topology are two fundamental concepts when dealing with 3D mesh structures. But the latest often remains a side issue in the 3D mesh-based reconstruction literature. Indeed, performing per-vertex elementary displacements over a 3D sphere mesh only impacts its geometry and leaves the topological structure unchanged and fixed. Whereas few attempts propose to update the geometry and the topology, all need to lean on costly 3D ground-truth to determine the faces/edges to prune. We present in this work a method that aims to refine the topology of any 3D mesh through a face-pruning strategy that extensively relies upon 2D alpha masks and camera pose information. Our solution leverages a differentiable renderer that renders each face as a 2D soft map. Its pixel intensity reflects the probability of being covered during the rendering process by such a face. Based on the 2D soft-masks available, our method is thus able to quickly highlight all the incorrectly rendered faces for a given viewpoint. Because our module is agnostic to the network that produces the 3D mesh, it can be easily plugged into any self-supervised image-based (either synthetic or natural) 3D reconstruction pipeline to get complex meshes with a non-spherical topology.
summary: Image-based 3D reconstruction has increasingly stunning results over the past few years with the latest improvements in computer vision and graphics. Geometry and topology are two fundamental concepts when dealing with 3D mesh structures. But the latest often remains a side issue in the 3D mesh-based reconstruction literature. Indeed, performing per-vertex elementary displacements over a 3D sphere mesh only impacts its geometry and leaves the topological structure unchanged and fixed. Whereas few attempts propose to update the geometry and the topology, all need to lean on costly 3D ground-truth to determine the faces/edges to prune. We present in this work a method that aims to refine the topology of any 3D mesh through a face-pruning strategy that extensively relies upon 2D alpha masks and camera pose information. Our solution leverages a differentiable renderer that renders each face as a 2D soft map. Its pixel intensity reflects the probability of being covered during the rendering process by such a face. Based on the 2D soft-masks available, our method is thus able to quickly highlight all the incorrectly rendered faces for a given viewpoint. Because our module is agnostic to the network that produces the 3D mesh, it can be easily plugged into any self-supervised image-based (either synthetic or natural) 3D reconstruction pipeline to get complex meshes with a non-spherical topology.
abstract_zh: 随着计算机视觉和图形学的最新改进，基于图像的 3D 重建在过去几年中取得了越来越令人惊叹的结果。几何和拓扑是处理 3D 网格结构时的两个基本概念。但最新的情况通常仍然是基于 3D 网格的重建文献中的一个次要问题。事实上，在 3D 球体网格上执行逐顶点基本位移只会影响其几何形状，而使拓扑结构保持不变和固定。尽管很少有人尝试更新几何结构和拓扑，但所有这些都需要依靠昂贵的 3D 地面实况来确定要修剪的面/边缘。我们在这项工作中提出了一种方法，旨在通过广泛依赖于 2D Alpha 掩模和相机姿势信息的面部修剪策略来细化任何 3D 网格的拓扑。我们的解决方案利用可微分渲染器，将每个面渲染为 2D 软贴图。它的像素强度反映了渲染过程中被这样的人脸覆盖的概率。基于可用的 2D 软掩模，我们的方法能够快速突出显示给定视点的所有错误渲染的面孔。由于我们的模块与生成 3D 网格的网络无关，因此它可以轻松插入任何基于图像（合成或自然）的自监督 3D 重建管道，以获取具有非球形拓扑的复杂网格。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于2D alpha掩码的3D网格拓扑优化方法，通过面片裁剪策略改进网格拓扑结构。
AI.motivation: 现有3D网格重建方法多关注几何优化而忽视拓扑更新，且依赖昂贵的3D真实数据确定裁剪区域，缺乏高效解决方案。
AI.method: 利用可微分渲染器将网格面片渲染为2D软掩码，通过像素强度判断面片覆盖概率，结合相机姿态信息快速定位错误渲染面片进行裁剪。
AI.result: 实现无需3D真实数据的拓扑优化，在多种自监督图像重建流程中可生成非球形复杂拓扑网格。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过2D掩码引导的面片裁剪策略，有效解决了3D网格拓扑优化难题，具有良好的通用性和计算效率。

authors_text: Rongfan Liao,Siyang Song,Hatice Gunes
title: An Open-source Benchmark of Deep Learning Models for Audio-visual Apparent and Self-reported Personality Recognition
title_zh: 用于视听表象和自我报告人格识别的深度学习模型的开源基准
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
abstract: Personality determines a wide variety of human daily and working behaviours, and is crucial for understanding human internal and external states. In recent years, a large number of automatic personality computing approaches have been developed to predict either the apparent personality or self-reported personality of the subject based on non-verbal audio-visual behaviours. However, the majority of them suffer from complex and dataset-specific pre-processing steps and model training tricks. In the absence of a standardized benchmark with consistent experimental settings, it is not only impossible to fairly compare the real performances of these personality computing models but also makes them difficult to be reproduced. In this paper, we present the first reproducible audio-visual benchmarking framework to provide a fair and consistent evaluation of eight existing personality computing models (e.g., audio, visual and audio-visual) and seven standard deep learning models on both self-reported and apparent personality recognition tasks. Building upon a set of benchmarked models, we also investigate the impact of two previously-used long-term modelling strategies for summarising short-term/frame-level predictions on personality computing results. The results conclude: (i) apparent personality traits, inferred from facial behaviours by most benchmarked deep learning models, show more reliability than self-reported ones; (ii) visual models frequently achieved superior performances than audio models on personality recognition; (iii) non-verbal behaviours contribute differently in predicting different personality traits; and (iv) our reproduced personality computing models generally achieved worse performances than their original reported results. Our benchmark is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/liaorongfan/DeepPersonality}.
summary: Personality determines a wide variety of human daily and working behaviours, and is crucial for understanding human internal and external states. In recent years, a large number of automatic personality computing approaches have been developed to predict either the apparent personality or self-reported personality of the subject based on non-verbal audio-visual behaviours. However, the majority of them suffer from complex and dataset-specific pre-processing steps and model training tricks. In the absence of a standardized benchmark with consistent experimental settings, it is not only impossible to fairly compare the real performances of these personality computing models but also makes them difficult to be reproduced. In this paper, we present the first reproducible audio-visual benchmarking framework to provide a fair and consistent evaluation of eight existing personality computing models (e.g., audio, visual and audio-visual) and seven standard deep learning models on both self-reported and apparent personality recognition tasks. Building upon a set of benchmarked models, we also investigate the impact of two previously-used long-term modelling strategies for summarising short-term/frame-level predictions on personality computing results. The results conclude: (i) apparent personality traits, inferred from facial behaviours by most benchmarked deep learning models, show more reliability than self-reported ones; (ii) visual models frequently achieved superior performances than audio models on personality recognition; (iii) non-verbal behaviours contribute differently in predicting different personality traits; and (iv) our reproduced personality computing models generally achieved worse performances than their original reported results. Our benchmark is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/liaorongfan/DeepPersonality}.
abstract_zh: 人格决定了人类的各种日常和工作行为，对于理解人类的内部和外部状态至关重要。近年来，已经开发出大量自动个性计算方法，以基于非语言视听行为来预测对象的表观个性或自我报告个性。然而，它们中的大多数都受到复杂且特定于数据集的预处理步骤和模型训练技巧的困扰。在缺乏具有一致实验设置的标准化基准的情况下，不仅无法公平地比较这些个性计算模型的真实性能，而且也使得它们难以重现。在本文中，我们提出了第一个可重复的视听基准测试框架，为八个现有的个性计算模型（例如音频、视觉和视听）和七个标准深度学习模型在自我报告和表观个性识别任务上提供公平和一致的评估。在一组基准模型的基础上，我们还研究了两种先前使用的长期建模策略的影响，以总结短期/帧级预测对个性计算结果的影响。结果得出结论：（i）通过大多数基准深度学习模型从面部行为推断出的明显人格特征比自我报告的人格特征更可靠； (ii) 在个性识别方面，视觉模型经常比音频模型取得更好的性能； (iii) 非语言行为对预测不同人格特质的贡献不同； （iv）我们复制的个性计算模型通常比最初报告的结果表现更差。我们的基准测试可在 \url{https://github.com/liaorongfan/DeepPersonality} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个开源基准框架，用于公平评估八种现有人格计算模型和七种标准深度学习模型在自我报告和明显人格识别任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因预处理复杂和缺乏标准化基准，导致模型性能难以公平比较和复现，亟需统一的评估框架。
AI.method: 构建包含音频、视觉及多模态模型的基准框架，对比不同模型在人格识别任务中的表现，并分析长期建模策略对结果的影响。
AI.result: （i）深度学习模型预测的明显人格比自我报告更可靠；（ii）视觉模型在人格识别中表现优于音频模型；（iii）非语言行为对不同人格特质的预测贡献不同；（iv）复现模型性能普遍低于原始报告。
AI.conclusion: 开源基准揭示了模型性能差异及复现问题，强调了标准化评估的重要性，并为未来研究提供参考。

The results conclude: (i) apparent personality traits, inferred from facial behaviours by most benchmarked deep learning models, show more reliability than self-reported ones; (ii) visual models frequently achieved superior performances than audio models on personality recognition; (iii) non-verbal behaviours contribute differently in predicting different personality traits; and (iv) our reproduced personality computing models generally achieved worse performances than their original reported results. authors_text: Kai Guo,Seungwon Choi,Jongseong Choi
title: Gated Recurrent Unit for Video Denoising
title_zh: 用于视频降噪的门控循环单元
abstract: Current video denoising methods perform temporal fusion by designing convolutional neural networks (CNN) or combine spatial denoising with temporal fusion into basic recurrent neural networks (RNNs). However, there have not yet been works which adapt gated recurrent unit (GRU) mechanisms for video denoising. In this letter, we propose a new video denoising model based on GRU, namely GRU-VD. First, the reset gate is employed to mark the content related to the current frame in the previous frame output. Then the hidden activation works as an initial spatial-temporal denoising with the help from the marked relevant content. Finally, the update gate recursively fuses the initial denoised result with previous frame output to further increase accuracy. To handle various light conditions adaptively, the noise standard deviation of the current frame is also fed to these three modules. A weighted loss is adopted to regulate initial denoising and final fusion at the same time. The experimental results show that the GRU-VD network not only can achieve better quality than state of the arts objectively and subjectively, but also can obtain satisfied subjective quality on real video.
summary: Current video denoising methods perform temporal fusion by designing convolutional neural networks (CNN) or combine spatial denoising with temporal fusion into basic recurrent neural networks (RNNs). However, there have not yet been works which adapt gated recurrent unit (GRU) mechanisms for video denoising. In this letter, we propose a new video denoising model based on GRU, namely GRU-VD. First, the reset gate is employed to mark the content related to the current frame in the previous frame output. Then the hidden activation works as an initial spatial-temporal denoising with the help from the marked relevant content. Finally, the update gate recursively fuses the initial denoised result with previous frame output to further increase accuracy. To handle various light conditions adaptively, the noise standard deviation of the current frame is also fed to these three modules. A weighted loss is adopted to regulate initial denoising and final fusion at the same time. The experimental results show that the GRU-VD network not only can achieve better quality than state of the arts objectively and subjectively, but also can obtain satisfied subjective quality on real video.
abstract_zh: 当前的视频去噪方法通过设计卷积神经网络（CNN）来执行时间融合，或者将空间去噪与时间融合结合到基本的循环神经网络（RNN）中。然而，目前还没有采用门控循环单元（GRU）机制进行视频去噪的工作。在这封信中，我们提出了一种基于GRU的新视频去噪模型，即GRU-VD。首先，使用重置门来标记上一帧输出中与当前帧相关的内容。然后，隐藏激活借助标记的相关内容作为初始时空去噪。最后，更新门递归地将初始去噪结果与前一帧输出融合，以进一步提高准确性。为了自适应地处理各种光照条件，当前帧的噪声标准偏差也被馈送到这三个模块。采用加权损失同时调节初始去噪和最终融合。实验结果表明，GRU-VD网络不仅能够在客观和主观上达到比现有技术更好的质量，而且能够在真实视频上获得令人满意的主观质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于门控循环单元（GRU）的视频去噪模型GRU-VD，通过改进GRU机制实现更有效的时空去噪。
AI.motivation: 现有视频去噪方法多依赖卷积神经网络或基础循环神经网络，尚未探索GRU机制在视频去噪中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 设计包含重置门、隐藏激活和更新门的GRU框架：重置门标记前帧相关内容，隐藏激活进行初步时空去噪，更新门递归融合结果；引入当前帧噪声标准差和加权损失函数优化模型。
AI.result: 实验表明GRU-VD在客观指标和主观质量上均优于现有方法，尤其在真实视频中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: GRU-VD通过改进GRU结构和损失函数设计，有效提升了视频去噪性能，为该领域提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Gated Recurrent Unit for Video Denoising 用于视频降噪的门控循环单元 Current video denoising methods perform temporal fusion by designing convolutional neural networks (CNN) or combine spatial denoising with temporal fusion into basic recurrent neural networks (RNNs). However, there have not yet been works which adapt gated recurrent unit (GRU) mechanisms for video denoising. In this letter, we propose a new video denoising model based on GRU, namely GRU-VD. First, the reset gate is employed to mark the content related to the current frame in the previous frame output. Then the hidden activation works as an initial spatial-temporal denoising with the help from the marked relevant content. Finally, the update gate recursively fuses the initial denoised result with previous frame output to further increase accuracy. To handle various light conditions adaptively, the noise standard deviation of the current frame is also fed to these three modules. A weighted loss is adopted to regulate initial denoising and final fusion at the same time. The experimental results show that the GRU-VD network not only can achieve better quality than state of the arts objectively and subjectively, but also can obtain satisfied subjective quality on real video. 当前的视频去噪方法通过设计卷积神经网络（CNN）来执行时间融合，或者将空间去噪与时间融合结合到基本的循环神经网络（RNN）中。然而，目前还没有采用门控循环单元（GRU）机制进行视频去噪的工作。在这封信中，我们提出了一种基于GRU的新视频去噪模型，即GRU-VD。首先，使用重置门来标记上一帧输出中与当前帧相关的内容。然后，隐藏激活借助标记的相关内容作为初始时空去噪。最后，更新门递归地将初始去噪结果与前一帧输出融合，以进一步提高准确性。为了自适应地处理各种光照条件，当前帧的噪声标准偏差也被馈送到这三个模块。采用加权损失同时调节初始去噪和最终融合。实验结果表明，GRU-VD网络不仅能够在客观和主观上达到比现有技术更好的质量，而且能够在真实视频上获得令人满意的主观质量。 本文提出一种基于门控循环单元（GRU）的视频去噪模型GRU-VD，通过改进GRU机制实现更有效的时空去噪。 Kai Guo,Seungwon Choi,Jongseong Choi cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Sanyou Wu,Long Feng
title: Sparse Kronecker Product Decomposition: A General Framework of Signal Region Detection in Image Regression
title_zh: 稀疏克罗内克积分解：图像回归中信号区域检测的通用框架
abstract: This paper aims to present the first Frequentist framework on signal region detection in high-resolution and high-order image regression problems. Image data and scalar-on-image regression are intensively studied in recent years. However, most existing studies on such topics focused on outcome prediction, while the research on image region detection is rather limited, even though the latter is often more important. In this paper, we develop a general framework named Sparse Kronecker Product Decomposition (SKPD) to tackle this issue. The SKPD framework is general in the sense that it works for both matrices (e.g., 2D grayscale images) and (high-order) tensors (e.g., 2D colored images, brain MRI/fMRI data) represented image data. Moreover, unlike many Bayesian approaches, our framework is computationally scalable for high-resolution image problems. Specifically, our framework includes: 1) the one-term SKPD; 2) the multi-term SKPD; and 3) the nonlinear SKPD. We propose nonconvex optimization problems to estimate the one-term and multi-term SKPDs and develop path-following algorithms for the nonconvex optimization. The computed solutions of the path-following algorithm are guaranteed to converge to the truth with a particularly chosen initialization even though the optimization is nonconvex. Moreover, the region detection consistency could also be guaranteed by the one-term and multi-term SKPD. The nonlinear SKPD is highly connected to shallow convolutional neural networks (CNN), particular to CNN with one convolutional layer and one fully connected layer. Effectiveness of SKPDs is validated by real brain imaging data in the UK Biobank database.
summary: This paper aims to present the first Frequentist framework on signal region detection in high-resolution and high-order image regression problems. Image data and scalar-on-image regression are intensively studied in recent years. However, most existing studies on such topics focused on outcome prediction, while the research on image region detection is rather limited, even though the latter is often more important. In this paper, we develop a general framework named Sparse Kronecker Product Decomposition (SKPD) to tackle this issue. The SKPD framework is general in the sense that it works for both matrices (e.g., 2D grayscale images) and (high-order) tensors (e.g., 2D colored images, brain MRI/fMRI data) represented image data. Moreover, unlike many Bayesian approaches, our framework is computationally scalable for high-resolution image problems. Specifically, our framework includes: 1) the one-term SKPD; 2) the multi-term SKPD; and 3) the nonlinear SKPD. We propose nonconvex optimization problems to estimate the one-term and multi-term SKPDs and develop path-following algorithms for the nonconvex optimization. The computed solutions of the path-following algorithm are guaranteed to converge to the truth with a particularly chosen initialization even though the optimization is nonconvex. Moreover, the region detection consistency could also be guaranteed by the one-term and multi-term SKPD. The nonlinear SKPD is highly connected to shallow convolutional neural networks (CNN), particular to CNN with one convolutional layer and one fully connected layer. Effectiveness of SKPDs is validated by real brain imaging data in the UK Biobank database.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在提出第一个用于高分辨率和高阶图像回归问题中信号区域检测的频率论框架。近年来，图像数据和图像标量回归得到了深入研究。然而，现有的此类主题的研究大多集中在结果预测上，而图像区域检测的研究相当有限，尽管后者往往更重要。在本文中，我们开发了一个名为稀疏克罗内克产品分解（SKPD）的通用框架来解决这个问题。 SKPD 框架是通用的，因为它适用于矩阵（例如，2D 灰度图像）和（高阶）张量（例如，2D 彩色图像、大脑 MRI/fMRI 数据）表示的图像数据。此外，与许多贝叶斯方法不同，我们的框架对于高分辨率图像问题在计算上是可扩展的。具体来说，我们的框架包括：1）一期SKPD； 2）多项SKPD； 3）非线性SKPD。我们提出非凸优化问题来估计一项和多项 SKPD，并开发用于非凸优化的路径跟踪算法。即使优化是非凸的，路径跟踪算法的计算解也可以通过特别选择的初始化来保证收敛到事实。此外，单项和多项SKPD也可以保证区域检测的一致性。非线性SKPD与浅层卷积神经网络（CNN）高度连接，特别是具有一层卷积层和一层全连接层的CNN。 SKPD 的有效性已通过英国生物银行数据库中的真实脑成像数据得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为稀疏克罗内克积分解（SKPD）的通用框架，用于高分辨率和高阶图像回归中的信号区域检测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于图像回归的预测任务，而对图像区域检测的研究不足，但后者在实际应用中更为关键。
AI.method: 开发了包含单项、多项和非线性SKPD的通用框架，通过非凸优化问题估计模型，并设计路径跟踪算法保证解的收敛性，同时与浅层卷积神经网络建立联系。
AI.result: 通过UK Biobank真实脑成像数据验证了SKPD在信号区域检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SKPD为高分辨率图像区域检测提供了可扩展且通用的频次主义方法，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

authors_text: Christian Brommer,Alessandro Fornasier,Martin Scheiber,Jeff Delaune,Roland Brockers,Jan Steinbrener,Stephan Weiss
title: INSANE: Cross-Domain UAV Data Sets with Increased Number of Sensors for developing Advanced and Novel Estimators
title_zh: 疯狂：跨域无人机数据集，传感器数量增加，用于开发先进和新颖的估计器
comment: V2 with added dataset comparison tables
comments: V2 with added dataset comparison tables
abstract: For real-world applications, autonomous mobile robotic platforms must be capable of navigating safely in a multitude of different and dynamic environments with accurate and robust localization being a key prerequisite. To support further research in this domain, we present the INSANE data sets - a collection of versatile Micro Aerial Vehicle (MAV) data sets for cross-environment localization. The data sets provide various scenarios with multiple stages of difficulty for localization methods. These scenarios range from trajectories in the controlled environment of an indoor motion capture facility, to experiments where the vehicle performs an outdoor maneuver and transitions into a building, requiring changes of sensor modalities, up to purely outdoor flight maneuvers in a challenging Mars analog environment to simulate scenarios which current and future Mars helicopters would need to perform. The presented work aims to provide data that reflects real-world scenarios and sensor effects. The extensive sensor suite includes various sensor categories, including multiple Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) and cameras. Sensor data is made available as raw measurements and each data set provides highly accurate ground truth, including the outdoor experiments where a dual Real-Time Kinematic (RTK) Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) setup provides sub-degree and centimeter accuracy (1-sigma). The sensor suite also includes a dedicated high-rate IMU to capture all the vibration dynamics of the vehicle during flight to support research on novel machine learning-based sensor signal enhancement methods for improved localization. The data sets and post-processing tools are available at: https://sst.aau.at/cns/datasets

The presented work aims to provide data that reflects real-world scenarios and sensor effects. The extensive sensor suite includes various sensor categories, including multiple Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) and cameras. The sensor suite also includes a dedicated high-rate IMU to capture all the vibration dynamics of the vehicle during flight to support research on novel machine learning-based sensor signal enhancement methods for improved localization. The data sets and post-processing tools are available at: https://sst.aau.at/cns/datasets
abstract_zh: 对于现实世界的应用，自主移动机器人平台必须能够在多种不同的动态环境中安全导航，而准确而强大的定位是关键先决条件。为了支持该领域的进一步研究，我们提出了 INSANE 数据集 - 用于跨环境定位的多功能微型飞行器 (MAV) 数据集的集合。这些数据集为定位方法提供了具有多个难度阶段的各种场景。这些场景的范围从室内运动捕捉设施的受控环境中的轨迹，到车辆执行室外机动并过渡到建筑物中（需要改变传感器模式）的实验，一直到在具有挑战性的火星模拟环境中进行纯粹的室外飞行机动，以模拟当前和未来的火星直升机需要执行的场景。所提出的工作旨在提供反映现实世界场景和传感器效果的数据。广泛的传感器套件包括各种传感器类别，包括多个惯性测量单元 (IMU) 和摄像头。传感器数据以原始测量值形式提供，每个数据集都提供高度准确的地面实况，包括户外实验，其中双实时运动 (RTK) 全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 设置提供亚度和厘米精度 (1-sigma)。该传感器套件还包括一个专用的高速 IMU，用于捕获飞行器在飞行过程中的所有振动动态，以支持基于机器学习的新型传感器信号增强方法的研究，以改进定位。数据集和后处理工具可在以下网址获取：https://sst.aau.at/cns/datasets

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了INSANE数据集，旨在通过增加传感器数量和跨环境场景，为开发先进的无人机定位估计器提供多样化数据支持。
AI.motivation: 自主移动机器人需要在复杂多变的环境中实现高精度定位，但现有数据集难以覆盖真实场景的多样性与传感器特性，亟需更全面的数据支持研究。
AI.method: 通过多场景数据采集（室内运动捕捉、室内外过渡、火星模拟环境），结合多类型传感器（IMU、相机、RTK GNSS）获取原始测量数据及高精度地面真实值，并提供后处理工具。
AI.result: 发布包含多环境、多难度定位场景的INSANE数据集，支持传感器信号增强与机器学习方法研究，数据与工具已公开获取。
AI.conclusion: INSANE数据集通过跨领域、多传感器数据覆盖真实场景需求，为无人机定位算法研究提供了高质量基准与实验平台。

search_text: INSANE: Cross-Domain UAV Data Sets with Increased Number of Sensors for developing Advanced and Novel Estimators 疯狂：跨域无人机数据集，传感器数量增加，用于开发先进和新颖的估计器 For real-world applications, autonomous mobile robotic platforms must be capable of navigating safely in a multitude of different and dynamic environments with accurate and robust localization being a key prerequisite. To support further research in this domain, we present the INSANE data sets - a collection of versatile Micro Aerial Vehicle (MAV) data sets for cross-environment localization. The data sets provide various scenarios with multiple stages of difficulty for localization methods. These scenarios range from trajectories in the controlled environment of an indoor motion capture facility, to experiments where the vehicle performs an outdoor maneuver and transitions into a building, requiring changes of sensor modalities, up to purely outdoor flight maneuvers in a challenging Mars analog environment to simulate scenarios which current and future Mars helicopters would need to perform. The presented work aims to provide data that reflects real-world scenarios and sensor effects. The extensive sensor suite includes various sensor categories, including multiple Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) and cameras. Sensor data is made available as raw measurements and each data set provides highly accurate ground truth, including the outdoor experiments where a dual Real-Time Kinematic (RTK) Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) setup provides sub-degree and centimeter accuracy (1-sigma). The sensor suite also includes a dedicated high-rate IMU to capture all the vibration dynamics of the vehicle during flight to support research on novel machine learning-based sensor signal enhancement methods for improved localization. The data sets and post-processing tools are available at: https://sst.aau.at/cns/datasets 对于现实世界的应用，自主移动机器人平台必须能够在多种不同的动态环境中安全导航，而准确而强大的定位是关键先决条件。为了支持该领域的进一步研究，我们提出了 INSANE 数据集 - 用于跨环境定位的多功能微型飞行器 (MAV) 数据集的集合。这些数据集为定位方法提供了具有多个难度阶段的各种场景。这些场景的范围从室内运动捕捉设施的受控环境中的轨迹，到车辆执行室外机动并过渡到建筑物中（需要改变传感器模式）的实验，一直到在具有挑战性的火星模拟环境中进行纯粹的室外飞行机动，以模拟当前和未来的火星直升机需要执行的场景。所提出的工作旨在提供反映现实世界场景和传感器效果的数据。广泛的传感器套件包括各种传感器类别，包括多个惯性测量单元 (IMU) 和摄像头。传感器数据以原始测量值形式提供，每个数据集都提供高度准确的地面实况，包括户外实验，其中双实时运动 (RTK) 全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 设置提供亚度和厘米精度 (1-sigma)。该传感器套件还包括一个专用的高速 IMU，用于捕获飞行器在飞行过程中的所有振动动态，以支持基于机器学习的新型传感器信号增强方法的研究，以改进定位。数据集和后处理工具可在以下网址获取：https://sst.aau.at/cns/datasets 本文介绍了INSANE数据集，旨在通过增加传感器数量和跨环境场景，为开发先进的无人机定位估计器提供多样化数据支持。 Christian Brommer,Alessandro Fornasier,Martin Scheiber,Jeff Delaune,Roland Brockers,Jan Steinbrener,Stephan Weiss cs.RO

authors_text: Miguel Vasques,Claudia Soares,João Gomes
title: ISEE.U: Distributed online active target localization with unpredictable targets
title_zh: ISEE.U：具有不可预测目标的分布式在线主动目标定位
abstract: This paper addresses target localization with an online active learning algorithm defined by distributed, simple and fast computations at each node, with no parameters to tune and where the estimate of the target position at each agent is asymptotically equal in expectation to the centralized maximum-likelihood estimator. ISEE.U takes noisy distances at each agent and finds a control that maximizes localization accuracy. We do not assume specific target dynamics and, thus, our method is robust when facing unpredictable targets. Each agent computes the control that maximizes overall target position accuracy via a local estimate of the Fisher Information Matrix. We compared the proposed method with a state of the art algorithm outperforming it when the target movements do not follow a prescribed trajectory, with x100 less computation time, even when our method is running in one central CPU.
summary: This paper addresses target localization with an online active learning algorithm defined by distributed, simple and fast computations at each node, with no parameters to tune and where the estimate of the target position at each agent is asymptotically equal in expectation to the centralized maximum-likelihood estimator. ISEE.U takes noisy distances at each agent and finds a control that maximizes localization accuracy. We do not assume specific target dynamics and, thus, our method is robust when facing unpredictable targets. Each agent computes the control that maximizes overall target position accuracy via a local estimate of the Fisher Information Matrix. We compared the proposed method with a state of the art algorithm outperforming it when the target movements do not follow a prescribed trajectory, with x100 less computation time, even when our method is running in one central CPU.
abstract_zh: 本文使用在线主动学习算法来解决目标定位问题，该算法由每个节点的分布式、简单且快速的计算定义，无需调整参数，并且每个代理的目标位置估计渐近等于集中式最大似然估计器。 ISEE.U 计算每个智能体的噪声距离，并找到最大化定位精度的控制。我们不假设特定的目标动态，因此，我们的方法在面对不可预测的目标时是稳健的。每个智能体通过费舍尔信息矩阵的局部估计来计算最大化总体目标位置精度的控制。我们将所提出的方法与一种最先进的算法进行了比较，当目标运动不遵循规定的轨迹时，即使我们的方法在一个中央 CPU 中运行，计算时间也减少了 100 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ISEE.U的分布式在线主动目标定位算法，用于处理不可预测目标的定位问题，具有无需调参、计算简单快速的特点。
AI.motivation: 现有目标定位方法在面对不可预测目标时鲁棒性不足，且常需复杂计算或预设目标动态模型，亟需一种高效且无需先验知识的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分布式节点本地估计费舍尔信息矩阵，结合噪声距离测量值计算控制策略，最大化定位精度。算法无需参数调优且不依赖目标运动模型。
AI.result: 在非预设轨迹移动场景下，ISEE.U相较最先进算法定位精度更高，且计算耗时减少100倍，单CPU运行即可实现。
AI.conclusion: ISEE.U为不可预测目标定位提供了高效鲁棒的分布式解决方案，适用于实时动态环境中的资源受限场景。

authors_text: Fei Xu,Lu Cai,Daniele Salvato,Fidelma Dilemma,Luca Capriotti,Tiankai Yao
title: Advanced Characterization-Informed Framework and Quantitative Insight to Irradiated Annular U-10Zr Metallic Fuels
title_zh: 对辐照环形 U-10Zr 金属燃料的先进表征知情框架和定量洞察
abstract: U-10Zr-based metallic nuclear fuel is a promising fuel candidate for next-generation sodium-cooled fast reactors.The research experience of the Idaho National Laboratory for this type of fuel dates back to the 1960s. Idaho National Laboratory researchers have accumulated a considerable amount of experience and knowledge regarding fuel performance at the engineering scale. The limitation of advanced characterization and lack of proper data analysis tools prevented a mechanistic understanding of fuel microstructure evolution and properties degradation during irradiation. This paper proposed a new workflow, coupled with domain knowledge obtained by advanced post-irradiation examination methods, to provide unprecedented and quantified insights into the fission gas bubbles and pores, and lanthanide distribution in an annular fuel irradiated in the Advanced Test Reactor. In the study, researchers identify and confirm that the Zr-bearing secondary phases exist and generate the quantitative ratios of seven microstructures along the thermal gradient. Moreover, the distributions of fission gas bubbles on two samples of U-10Zr advanced fuels were quantitatively compared. Conclusive findings were obtained and allowed for evaluation of the lanthanide transportation through connected bubbles based on approximately 67,000 fission gas bubbles of the two advanced samples.
summary: U-10Zr-based metallic nuclear fuel is a promising fuel candidate for next-generation sodium-cooled fast reactors.The research experience of the Idaho National Laboratory for this type of fuel dates back to the 1960s. Idaho National Laboratory researchers have accumulated a considerable amount of experience and knowledge regarding fuel performance at the engineering scale. The limitation of advanced characterization and lack of proper data analysis tools prevented a mechanistic understanding of fuel microstructure evolution and properties degradation during irradiation. This paper proposed a new workflow, coupled with domain knowledge obtained by advanced post-irradiation examination methods, to provide unprecedented and quantified insights into the fission gas bubbles and pores, and lanthanide distribution in an annular fuel irradiated in the Advanced Test Reactor. In the study, researchers identify and confirm that the Zr-bearing secondary phases exist and generate the quantitative ratios of seven microstructures along the thermal gradient. Moreover, the distributions of fission gas bubbles on two samples of U-10Zr advanced fuels were quantitatively compared. Conclusive findings were obtained and allowed for evaluation of the lanthanide transportation through connected bubbles based on approximately 67,000 fission gas bubbles of the two advanced samples.
abstract_zh: U-10Zr基金属核燃料是下一代钠冷快堆的有前景的候选燃料。爱达荷国家实验室对该类型燃料的研究经验可以追溯到20世纪60年代。爱达荷国家实验室的研究人员在工程规模的燃料性能方面积累了大量的经验和知识。先进表征的局限性和缺乏适当的数据分析工具阻碍了对辐照期间燃料微观结构演变和性能退化的机械理解。本文提出了一种新的工作流程，结合通过先进的辐照后检查方法获得的领域知识，为高级测试反应堆中辐照的环形燃料中的裂变气泡和孔隙以及镧系元素的分布提供前所未有的量化见解。在这项研究中，研究人员识别并确认了含锆第二相的存在，并沿热梯度产生了七种微观结构的数量比。此外，还定量比较了两种U-10Zr先进燃料样品上裂变气泡的分布。获得了结论性的发现，并允许基于两个高级样品的约 67,000 个裂变气泡来评估通过相连气泡的镧系元素传输。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合先进表征技术与数据分析的工作流程，用于量化研究环形U-10Zr金属燃料在辐照过程中的微结构演变及性能退化机制。
AI.motivation: 传统表征技术与数据分析工具的不足限制了对辐照燃料微观结构演化和性能退化的机理性理解，亟需开发新方法以支持下一代钠冷快堆燃料设计。
AI.method: 通过先进后辐照检验技术获取领域知识，结合定量分析方法，研究环形燃料中裂变气体泡、孔隙及镧系元素分布，对比两组样品的气体泡分布并评估镧系元素通过连通泡的传输机制。
AI.result: 确认了含锆二次相的存在，量化了沿热梯度的七种微结构比例，比较了两组样品的裂变气体泡分布，并基于约67,000个气体泡数据评估了镧系元素传输路径。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为辐照燃料微结构演化与性能退化提供了量化洞察，深化了对镧系元素迁移机制的理解，为下一代反应堆燃料设计提供了关键数据支持。

search_text: Advanced Characterization-Informed Framework and Quantitative Insight to Irradiated Annular U-10Zr Metallic Fuels 对辐照环形 U-10Zr 金属燃料的先进表征知情框架和定量洞察 U-10Zr-based metallic nuclear fuel is a promising fuel candidate for next-generation sodium-cooled fast reactors.The research experience of the Idaho National Laboratory for this type of fuel dates back to the 1960s. Idaho National Laboratory researchers have accumulated a considerable amount of experience and knowledge regarding fuel performance at the engineering scale. The limitation of advanced characterization and lack of proper data analysis tools prevented a mechanistic understanding of fuel microstructure evolution and properties degradation during irradiation. This paper proposed a new workflow, coupled with domain knowledge obtained by advanced post-irradiation examination methods, to provide unprecedented and quantified insights into the fission gas bubbles and pores, and lanthanide distribution in an annular fuel irradiated in the Advanced Test Reactor. In the study, researchers identify and confirm that the Zr-bearing secondary phases exist and generate the quantitative ratios of seven microstructures along the thermal gradient. Moreover, the distributions of fission gas bubbles on two samples of U-10Zr advanced fuels were quantitatively compared. Conclusive findings were obtained and allowed for evaluation of the lanthanide transportation through connected bubbles based on approximately 67,000 fission gas bubbles of the two advanced samples. U-10Zr基金属核燃料是下一代钠冷快堆的有前景的候选燃料。爱达荷国家实验室对该类型燃料的研究经验可以追溯到20世纪60年代。爱达荷国家实验室的研究人员在工程规模的燃料性能方面积累了大量的经验和知识。先进表征的局限性和缺乏适当的数据分析工具阻碍了对辐照期间燃料微观结构演变和性能退化的机械理解。本文提出了一种新的工作流程，结合通过先进的辐照后检查方法获得的领域知识，为高级测试反应堆中辐照的环形燃料中的裂变气泡和孔隙以及镧系元素的分布提供前所未有的量化见解。在这项研究中，研究人员识别并确认了含锆第二相的存在，并沿热梯度产生了七种微观结构的数量比。此外，还定量比较了两种U-10Zr先进燃料样品上裂变气泡的分布。获得了结论性的发现，并允许基于两个高级样品的约 67,000 个裂变气泡来评估通过相连气泡的镧系元素传输。 本文提出了一种结合先进表征技术与数据分析的工作流程，用于量化研究环形U-10Zr金属燃料在辐照过程中的微结构演变及性能退化机制。 Fei Xu,Lu Cai,Daniele Salvato,Fidelma Dilemma,Luca Capriotti,Tiankai Yao cond-mat.mtrl-sci,cs.CV

authors_text: Lianting Hu,Huiying Liang,Jiajie Tang,Xin Li,Li Huang,Long Lu
title: Cutting-Splicing data augmentation: A novel technology for medical image segmentation
title_zh: 切割拼接数据增强：一种用于医学图像分割的新技术
abstract: Background: Medical images are more difficult to acquire and annotate than natural images, which results in data augmentation technologies often being used in medical image segmentation tasks. Most data augmentation technologies used in medical segmentation were originally developed on natural images and do not take into account the characteristic that the overall layout of medical images is standard and fixed. Methods: Based on the characteristics of medical images, we developed the cutting-splicing data augmentation (CS-DA) method, a novel data augmentation technology for medical image segmentation. CS-DA augments the dataset by splicing different position components cut from different original medical images into a new image. The characteristics of the medical image result in the new image having the same layout as and similar appearance to the original image. Compared with classical data augmentation technologies, CS-DA is simpler and more robust. Moreover, CS-DA does not introduce any noise or fake information into the newly created image. Results: To explore the properties of CS-DA, many experiments are conducted on eight diverse datasets. On the training dataset with the small sample size, CS-DA can effectively increase the performance of the segmentation model. When CS-DA is used together with classical data augmentation technologies, the performance of the segmentation model can be further improved and is much better than that of CS-DA and classical data augmentation separately. We also explored the influence of the number of components, the position of the cutting line, and the splicing method on the CS-DA performance. Conclusions: The excellent performance of CS-DA in the experiment has confirmed the effectiveness of CS-DA, and provides a new data augmentation idea for the small sample segmentation task.

Most data augmentation technologies used in medical segmentation were originally developed on natural images and do not take into account the characteristic that the overall layout of medical images is standard and fixed. Methods: Based on the characteristics of medical images, we developed the cutting-splicing data augmentation (CS-DA) method, a novel data augmentation technology for medical image segmentation. CS-DA augments the dataset by splicing different position components cut from different original medical images into a new image. The characteristics of the medical image result in the new image having the same layout as and similar appearance to the original image. Compared with classical data augmentation technologies, CS-DA is simpler and more robust. Moreover, CS-DA does not introduce any noise or fake information into the newly created image. Results: To explore the properties of CS-DA, many experiments are conducted on eight diverse datasets. On the training dataset with the small sample size, CS-DA can effectively increase the performance of the segmentation model. When CS-DA is used together with classical data augmentation technologies, the performance of the segmentation model can be further improved and is much better than that of CS-DA and classical data augmentation separately. We also explored the influence of the number of components, the position of the cutting line, and the splicing method on the CS-DA performance. Conclusions: The excellent performance of CS-DA in the experiment has confirmed the effectiveness of CS-DA, and provides a new data augmentation idea for the small sample segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 背景：医学图像比自然图像更难以获取和注释，这导致数据增强技术经常用于医学图像分割任务。大多数医学分割中使用的数据增强技术最初都是在自然图像上开发的，没有考虑到医学图像的整体布局是标准和固定的特点。方法：根据医学图像的特点，我们开发了一种新颖的用于医学图像分割的数据增强技术——切割拼接数据增强（CS-DA）方法。 CS-DA 通过将从不同原始医学图像中剪切的不同位置分量拼接成新图像来增强数据集。医学图像的特征导致新图像具有与原始图像相同的布局和相似的外观。与经典的数据增强技术相比，CS-DA 更简单、更鲁棒。此外，CS-DA 不会在新创建的图像中引入任何噪声或虚假信息。结果：为了探索 CS-DA 的特性，在八个不同的数据集上进行了许多实验。在小样本的训练数据集上，CS-DA可以有效提高分割模型的性能。当CS-DA与经典数据增强技术一起使用时，分割模型的性能可以进一步提高，并且比单独使用CS-DA和经典数据增强技术要好得多。我们还探讨了组件数量、切割线位置和拼接方法对 CS-DA 性能的影响。结论：CS-DA在实验中的优异表现证实了CS-DA的有效性，为小样本分割任务提供了新的数据增强思路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为切割拼接数据增强（CS-DA）的新技术，用于改进医学图像分割任务中的数据增强方法。
AI.motivation: 医学图像获取和标注难度高，传统数据增强技术未考虑医学图像布局标准化特性，导致现有方法在医学图像分割中效果有限。
AI.method: 基于医学图像布局固定的特点，通过从不同原始图像中裁剪并拼接不同位置组件生成新图像，无需引入噪声或虚假信息。
AI.result: 在八个数据集上实验表明，CS-DA在小样本训练集上显著提升分割模型性能，与传统方法结合时效果更优，并验证了组件数量、切割位置和拼接方式对性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: CS-DA在实验中表现出色，证实了其有效性，为小样本分割任务提供了新的数据增强思路。

authors_text: Furkan Kınlı,Doğa Yılmaz,Barış Özcan,Furkan Kıraç
title: Modeling the Lighting in Scenes as Style for Auto White-Balance Correction
title_zh: 将场景中的照明建模为自动白平衡校正的样式
abstract: Style may refer to different concepts (e.g. painting style, hairstyle, texture, color, filter, etc.) depending on how the feature space is formed. In this work, we propose a novel idea of interpreting the lighting in the single- and multi-illuminant scenes as the concept of style. To verify this idea, we introduce an enhanced auto white-balance (AWB) method that models the lighting in single- and mixed-illuminant scenes as the style factor. Our AWB method does not require any illumination estimation step, yet contains a network learning to generate the weighting maps of the images with different WB settings. Proposed network utilizes the style information, extracted from the scene by a multi-head style extraction module. AWB correction is completed after blending these weighting maps and the scene. Experiments on single- and mixed-illuminant datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves promising correction results when compared to the recent works. This shows that the lighting in the scenes with multiple illuminations can be modeled by the concept of style. Source code and trained models are available on https://github.com/birdortyedi/lighting-as-style-awb-correction.
summary: Style may refer to different concepts (e.g. painting style, hairstyle, texture, color, filter, etc.) depending on how the feature space is formed. In this work, we propose a novel idea of interpreting the lighting in the single- and multi-illuminant scenes as the concept of style. To verify this idea, we introduce an enhanced auto white-balance (AWB) method that models the lighting in single- and mixed-illuminant scenes as the style factor. Our AWB method does not require any illumination estimation step, yet contains a network learning to generate the weighting maps of the images with different WB settings. Proposed network utilizes the style information, extracted from the scene by a multi-head style extraction module. AWB correction is completed after blending these weighting maps and the scene. Experiments on single- and mixed-illuminant datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves promising correction results when compared to the recent works. This shows that the lighting in the scenes with multiple illuminations can be modeled by the concept of style. Source code and trained models are available on https://github.com/birdortyedi/lighting-as-style-awb-correction.
abstract_zh: 根据特征空间的形成方式，风格可以指不同的概念（例如绘画风格、发型、纹理、颜色、滤镜等）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的想法，将单光源和多光源场景中的照明解释为风格的概念。为了验证这个想法，我们引入了一种增强的自动白平衡（AWB）方法，该方法将单光源和混合光源场景中的照明建模为风格因素。我们的 AWB 方法不需要任何照明估计步骤，但包含一个网络学习来生成具有不同 WB 设置的图像的权重图。所提出的网络利用多头风格提取模块从场景中提取的风格信息。将这些权重图与场景混合后就完成了AWB校正。对单光源和混合光源数据集的实验表明，与最近的工作相比，我们提出的方法取得了有希望的校正结果。这表明具有多种照明的场景中的照明可以通过风格的概念来建模。源代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://github.com/birdortyedi/lighting-as-style-awb- Correction 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将场景中的光照视为风格的新方法，用于自动白平衡校正。
AI.motivation: 传统的自动白平衡方法通常需要估计光照，而本文旨在探索一种无需估计光照即可通过风格信息进行白平衡校正的新方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种增强的自动白平衡方法，通过多头风格提取模块提取场景中的风格信息，并利用网络生成不同白平衡设置的加权图，从而完成白平衡校正。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在单光源和多光源数据集上的校正效果优于最新方法。
AI.conclusion: 场景中的多光源光照可以被建模为风格概念，从而实现高效的白平衡校正。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种将场景中的光照视为风格的新方法，用于自动白平衡校正。
ai_content.motivation: 传统的自动白平衡方法通常需要估计光照，而本文旨在探索一种无需估计光照即可通过风格信息进行白平衡校正的新方法。
ai_content.method: 本文提出了一种增强的自动白平衡方法，通过多头风格提取模块提取场景中的风格信息，并利用网络生成不同白平衡设置的加权图，从而完成白平衡校正。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在单光源和多光源数据集上的校正效果优于最新方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 场景中的多光源光照可以被建模为风格概念，从而实现高效的白平衡校正。

search_text: Modeling the Lighting in Scenes as Style for Auto White-Balance Correction 将场景中的照明建模为自动白平衡校正的样式 Style may refer to different concepts (e.g. painting style, hairstyle, texture, color, filter, etc.) depending on how the feature space is formed. In this work, we propose a novel idea of interpreting the lighting in the single- and multi-illuminant scenes as the concept of style. To verify this idea, we introduce an enhanced auto white-balance (AWB) method that models the lighting in single- and mixed-illuminant scenes as the style factor. Our AWB method does not require any illumination estimation step, yet contains a network learning to generate the weighting maps of the images with different WB settings. Proposed network utilizes the style information, extracted from the scene by a multi-head style extraction module. AWB correction is completed after blending these weighting maps and the scene. Experiments on single- and mixed-illuminant datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves promising correction results when compared to the recent works. This shows that the lighting in the scenes with multiple illuminations can be modeled by the concept of style. Source code and trained models are available on https://github.com/birdortyedi/lighting-as-style-awb-correction. 根据特征空间的形成方式，风格可以指不同的概念（例如绘画风格、发型、纹理、颜色、滤镜等）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的想法，将单光源和多光源场景中的照明解释为风格的概念。为了验证这个想法，我们引入了一种增强的自动白平衡（AWB）方法，该方法将单光源和混合光源场景中的照明建模为风格因素。我们的 AWB 方法不需要任何照明估计步骤，但包含一个网络学习来生成具有不同 WB 设置的图像的权重图。所提出的网络利用多头风格提取模块从场景中提取的风格信息。将这些权重图与场景混合后就完成了AWB校正。对单光源和混合光源数据集的实验表明，与最近的工作相比，我们提出的方法取得了有希望的校正结果。这表明具有多种照明的场景中的照明可以通过风格的概念来建模。源代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://github.com/birdortyedi/lighting-as-style-awb- Correction 上获取。 本文提出了一种将场景中的光照视为风格的新方法，用于自动白平衡校正。 Furkan Kınlı,Doğa Yılmaz,Barış Özcan,Furkan Kıraç cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Thomas E. Doyle,Victoria Tucci,Calvin Zhu,Yifei Zhang,Basem Yassa,Sajjad Rashidiani,Md Asif Khan,Reza Samavi,Michael Noseworthy,Steven Yule
title: Artificial Intelligence Nomenclature Identified From Delphi Study on Key Issues Related to Trust and Barriers to Adoption for Autonomous Systems
title_zh: 德尔福研究确定的人工智能术语，涉及与信任和采用自主系统的障碍相关的关键问题
abstract: The rapid integration of artificial intelligence across traditional research domains has generated an amalgamation of nomenclature. As cross-discipline teams work together on complex machine learning challenges, finding a consensus of basic definitions in the literature is a more fundamental problem. As a step in the Delphi process to define issues with trust and barriers to the adoption of autonomous systems, our study first collected and ranked the top concerns from a panel of international experts from the fields of engineering, computer science, medicine, aerospace, and defence, with experience working with artificial intelligence. This document presents a summary of the literature definitions for nomenclature derived from expert feedback.
summary: The rapid integration of artificial intelligence across traditional research domains has generated an amalgamation of nomenclature. As cross-discipline teams work together on complex machine learning challenges, finding a consensus of basic definitions in the literature is a more fundamental problem. As a step in the Delphi process to define issues with trust and barriers to the adoption of autonomous systems, our study first collected and ranked the top concerns from a panel of international experts from the fields of engineering, computer science, medicine, aerospace, and defence, with experience working with artificial intelligence. This document presents a summary of the literature definitions for nomenclature derived from expert feedback.
abstract_zh: 人工智能在传统研究领域的快速整合产生了术语的合并。随着跨学科团队共同应对复杂的机器学习挑战，在文献中找到基本定义的共识是一个更根本的问题。作为德尔福流程中定义信任问题和采用自主系统的障碍的一步，我们的研究首先收集了来自工程、计算机科学、医学、航空航天和国防领域的国际专家小组最关心的问题，并对其进行了排名，这些专家具有人工智能方面的工作经验。本文件总结了来自专家反馈的术语的文献定义。

AI.tldr: 本文通过德尔菲研究确定人工智能领域关键术语的命名规范，以解决自主系统信任问题和采用障碍。
AI.motivation: 人工智能技术跨学科应用导致术语混乱，缺乏统一定义阻碍了研究协作与系统信任建立。
AI.method: 邀请工程、计算机科学、医学等领域的国际专家，通过德尔菲法多轮筛选和排序核心问题，汇总文献中术语定义。
AI.result: 整理出专家共识的术语定义框架，识别出影响自主系统信任的关键技术与社会障碍因素。
AI.conclusion: 标准化人工智能术语有助于明确研究方向，为提升自主系统可信度和加速技术落地提供基础支持。

authors_text: Zhaozhi Wang,Kefan Su,Jian Zhang,Huizhu Jia,Qixiang Ye,Xiaodong Xie,Zongqing Lu
title: Multi-Agent Automated Machine Learning
title_zh: 多代理自动化机器学习
abstract: In this paper, we propose multi-agent automated machine learning (MA2ML) with the aim to effectively handle joint optimization of modules in automated machine learning (AutoML). MA2ML takes each machine learning module, such as data augmentation (AUG), neural architecture search (NAS), or hyper-parameters (HPO), as an agent and the final performance as the reward, to formulate a multi-agent reinforcement learning problem. MA2ML explicitly assigns credit to each agent according to its marginal contribution to enhance cooperation among modules, and incorporates off-policy learning to improve search efficiency. Theoretically, MA2ML guarantees monotonic improvement of joint optimization. Extensive experiments show that MA2ML yields the state-of-the-art top-1 accuracy on ImageNet under constraints of computational cost, e.g., $79.7\%/80.5\%$ with FLOPs fewer than 600M/800M. Extensive ablation studies verify the benefits of credit assignment and off-policy learning of MA2ML.
summary: In this paper, we propose multi-agent automated machine learning (MA2ML) with the aim to effectively handle joint optimization of modules in automated machine learning (AutoML). MA2ML takes each machine learning module, such as data augmentation (AUG), neural architecture search (NAS), or hyper-parameters (HPO), as an agent and the final performance as the reward, to formulate a multi-agent reinforcement learning problem. MA2ML explicitly assigns credit to each agent according to its marginal contribution to enhance cooperation among modules, and incorporates off-policy learning to improve search efficiency. Theoretically, MA2ML guarantees monotonic improvement of joint optimization. Extensive experiments show that MA2ML yields the state-of-the-art top-1 accuracy on ImageNet under constraints of computational cost, e.g., $79.7\%/80.5\%$ with FLOPs fewer than 600M/800M. Extensive ablation studies verify the benefits of credit assignment and off-policy learning of MA2ML.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了多智能体自动化机器学习（MA2ML），旨在有效处理自动化机器学习（AutoML）中模块的联合优化。 MA2ML将每个机器学习模块，例如数据增强（AUG）、神经架构搜索（NAS）或超参数（HPO）作为代理，并以最终性能作为奖励，来制定多代理强化学习问题。 MA2ML 根据每个智能体的边际贡献明确分配信用，以增强模块之间的合作，并结合离策略学习来提高搜索效率。理论上，MA2ML保证了联合优化的单调改进。大量实验表明，在计算成本的限制下，MA2ML 在 ImageNet 上产生了最先进的 top-1 精度，例如，FLOPs 小于 600M/800M 的成本为 79.7\%/80.5\%$。广泛的消融研究验证了 MA2ML 的学分分配和离策略学习的好处。

AI.tldr: 提出多智能体自动机器学习方法，通过强化学习优化AutoML模块的联合优化
AI.motivation: 传统AutoML方法难以有效协调多个模块的联合优化，导致效率与性能难以兼顾
AI.method: 将数据增强、NAS、HPO等模块视为智能体，构建多智能体强化学习框架，通过边际贡献信用分配和离线策略学习提升协作效率
AI.result: 在ImageNet上实现79.7%/80.5%的top-1准确率（FLOPs<600M/800M），消融实验证明方法有效性
AI.conclusion: MA2ML理论保证单调优化，实验验证其在计算受限场景下的优越性能，为AutoML提供新范式

search_text: Multi-Agent Automated Machine Learning 多代理自动化机器学习 In this paper, we propose multi-agent automated machine learning (MA2ML) with the aim to effectively handle joint optimization of modules in automated machine learning (AutoML). MA2ML takes each machine learning module, such as data augmentation (AUG), neural architecture search (NAS), or hyper-parameters (HPO), as an agent and the final performance as the reward, to formulate a multi-agent reinforcement learning problem. MA2ML explicitly assigns credit to each agent according to its marginal contribution to enhance cooperation among modules, and incorporates off-policy learning to improve search efficiency. Theoretically, MA2ML guarantees monotonic improvement of joint optimization. Extensive experiments show that MA2ML yields the state-of-the-art top-1 accuracy on ImageNet under constraints of computational cost, e.g., $79.7\%/80.5\%$ with FLOPs fewer than 600M/800M. Extensive ablation studies verify the benefits of credit assignment and off-policy learning of MA2ML. 在本文中，我们提出了多智能体自动化机器学习（MA2ML），旨在有效处理自动化机器学习（AutoML）中模块的联合优化。 MA2ML将每个机器学习模块，例如数据增强（AUG）、神经架构搜索（NAS）或超参数（HPO）作为代理，并以最终性能作为奖励，来制定多代理强化学习问题。 MA2ML 根据每个智能体的边际贡献明确分配信用，以增强模块之间的合作，并结合离策略学习来提高搜索效率。理论上，MA2ML保证了联合优化的单调改进。大量实验表明，在计算成本的限制下，MA2ML 在 ImageNet 上产生了最先进的 top-1 精度，例如，FLOPs 小于 600M/800M 的成本为 79.7\%/80.5\%$。广泛的消融研究验证了 MA2ML 的学分分配和离策略学习的好处。 提出多智能体自动机器学习方法，通过强化学习优化AutoML模块的联合优化 Zhaozhi Wang,Kefan Su,Jian Zhang,Huizhu Jia,Qixiang Ye,Xiaodong Xie,Zongqing Lu cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yildiray Anagun,Sahin Isik
title: Nish: A Novel Negative Stimulated Hybrid Activation Function
title_zh: Nish：一种新型负刺激混合激活函数
abstract: An activation function has a significant impact on the efficiency and robustness of the neural networks. As an alternative, we evolved a cutting-edge non-monotonic activation function, Negative Stimulated Hybrid Activation Function (Nish). It acts as a Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) function for the positive region and a sinus-sigmoidal function for the negative region. In other words, it incorporates a sigmoid and a sine function and gaining new dynamics over classical ReLU. We analyzed the consistency of the Nish for different combinations of essential networks and most common activation functions using on several most popular benchmarks. From the experimental results, we reported that the accuracy rates achieved by the Nish is slightly better than compared to the Mish in classification.
summary: An activation function has a significant impact on the efficiency and robustness of the neural networks. As an alternative, we evolved a cutting-edge non-monotonic activation function, Negative Stimulated Hybrid Activation Function (Nish). It acts as a Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) function for the positive region and a sinus-sigmoidal function for the negative region. In other words, it incorporates a sigmoid and a sine function and gaining new dynamics over classical ReLU. We analyzed the consistency of the Nish for different combinations of essential networks and most common activation functions using on several most popular benchmarks. From the experimental results, we reported that the accuracy rates achieved by the Nish is slightly better than compared to the Mish in classification.
abstract_zh: 激活函数对神经网络的效率和鲁棒性有重大影响。作为替代方案，我们开发了一种尖端的非单调激活函数，即负刺激混合激活函数（Nish）。它对于正区域充当修正线性单元 (ReLU) 函数，对于负区域充当正弦 S 形函数。换句话说，它结合了 sigmoid 和正弦函数，并获得了优于经典 ReLU 的新动态。我们使用几个最流行的基准分析了基本网络和最常见激活函数的不同组合的 Nish 的一致性。从实验结果来看，我们发现 Nish 的分类准确率略好于 Mish。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型非单调激活函数Nish，结合ReLU与正弦- sigmoid函数特性，并在多个基准测试中验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 传统激活函数如ReLU在负区间缺乏动态性，限制了神经网络的表达能力，需设计新型激活函数提升模型效率与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计Nish函数：正区间采用ReLU，负区间融合正弦函数与sigmoid函数，通过多组基准实验对比经典激活函数表现。
AI.result: 实验表明Nish在分类任务中的准确率小幅超越Mish激活函数，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: Nish通过非单调特性增强模型表现，为激活函数设计提供新思路，适用于需复杂非线性映射的场景。
