search_text: Nish: A Novel Negative Stimulated Hybrid Activation Function Nish：一种新型负刺激混合激活函数 An activation function has a significant impact on the efficiency and robustness of the neural networks. As an alternative, we evolved a cutting-edge non-monotonic activation function, Negative Stimulated Hybrid Activation Function (Nish). It acts as a Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) function for the positive region and a sinus-sigmoidal function for the negative region. In other words, it incorporates a sigmoid and a sine function and gaining new dynamics over classical ReLU. We analyzed the consistency of the Nish for different combinations of essential networks and most common activation functions using on several most popular benchmarks. From the experimental results, we reported that the accuracy rates achieved by the Nish is slightly better than compared to the Mish in classification. 激活函数对神经网络的效率和鲁棒性有重大影响。作为替代方案，我们开发了一种尖端的非单调激活函数，即负刺激混合激活函数（Nish）。它对于正区域充当修正线性单元 (ReLU) 函数，对于负区域充当正弦 S 形函数。换句话说，它结合了 sigmoid 和正弦函数，并获得了优于经典 ReLU 的新动态。我们使用几个最流行的基准分析了基本网络和最常见激活函数的不同组合的 Nish 的一致性。从实验结果来看，我们发现 Nish 的分类准确率略好于 Mish。 本文提出一种新型非单调激活函数Nish，结合ReLU与正弦- sigmoid函数特性，并在多个基准测试中验证其性能。 Yildiray Anagun,Sahin Isik cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.NE,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Mahmoud Darwich
title: Machine Learning Technique Predicting Video Streaming Views to Reduce Cost of Cloud Services
title_zh: 机器学习技术预测视频流视图以降低云服务成本
abstract: Video streams tremendously occupied the highest portion of online traffic. Multiple versions of a video are created to fit the user's device specifications. In cloud storage, Keeping all versions of frequently accessed video streams in the repository for the long term imposes a significant cost paid by video streaming providers. Generally, the popularity of a video changes each period of time, which means the number of views received by a video could be dropped, thus, the video must be deleted from the repository. Therefore, in this paper, we develop a method that predicts the popularity of each video stream in the repository in the next period. On the other hand, we propose an algorithm that utilizes the predicted popularity of a video to compute the storage cost, and then it decides whether the video will be kept or deleted from the cloud repository. The experiment results show a cost reduction of the cloud services by 15% compared to keeping all video streams.
summary: Video streams tremendously occupied the highest portion of online traffic. Multiple versions of a video are created to fit the user's device specifications. In cloud storage, Keeping all versions of frequently accessed video streams in the repository for the long term imposes a significant cost paid by video streaming providers. Generally, the popularity of a video changes each period of time, which means the number of views received by a video could be dropped, thus, the video must be deleted from the repository. Therefore, in this paper, we develop a method that predicts the popularity of each video stream in the repository in the next period. On the other hand, we propose an algorithm that utilizes the predicted popularity of a video to compute the storage cost, and then it decides whether the video will be kept or deleted from the cloud repository. The experiment results show a cost reduction of the cloud services by 15% compared to keeping all video streams.
abstract_zh: 视频流极大地占据了在线流量的最大部分。创建视频的多个版本以适应用户的设备规格。在云存储中，将经常访问的视频流的所有版本长期保留在存储库中会给视频流提供商带来巨大的成本。一般来说，视频的受欢迎程度每个时间段都会发生变化，这意味着视频的观看次数可能会下降，因此必须从存储库中删除该视频。因此，在本文中，我们开发了一种方法来预测下一时期存储库中每个视频流的流行度。另一方面，我们提出了一种算法，利用预测的视频受欢迎程度来计算存储成本，然后决定是否从云存储库中保留或删除该视频。实验结果表明，与保留所有视频流相比，云服务成本降低了15%。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于机器学习的方法，预测视频流的受欢迎程度，以决定是否从云存储中删除视频，从而降低成本。
AI.motivation: 视频流的多版本存储导致云服务成本高昂，而视频受欢迎程度随时间变化，需有效管理存储以降低成本。
AI.method: 采用机器学习技术预测视频流的未来受欢迎程度，并设计算法根据预测结果计算存储成本，从而决定视频的保留或删除。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与保留所有视频流相比，云服务成本降低了15%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低了云存储成本，为视频流服务提供商提供了优化存储管理的可行方案。

authors_text: Awad Abdelhalim,Montasir Abbas
title: An Assessment of Safety-Based Driver Behavior Modeling in Microscopic Simulation Utilizing Real-Time Vehicle Trajectories
title_zh: 利用实时车辆轨迹的微观仿真中基于安全的驾驶员行为建模的评估
abstract: Accurate representation of observed driving behavior is critical for effectively evaluating safety and performance interventions in simulation modeling. In this study, we implement and evaluate a safety-based Optimal Velocity Model (OVM) to provide a high-fidelity replication of safety-critical behavior in microscopic simulation and showcase its implications for safety-focused assessments of traffic control strategies. A comprehensive simulation model is created for the site of study in PTV VISSIM utilizing detailed vehicle trajectory information extracted from real-time video inference, which are also used to calibrate the parameters of the safety-based OVM to replicate the observed driving behavior in the site of study. The calibrated model is then incorporated as an external driver model that overtakes VISSIM's default Wiedemann 74 model during simulated car-following episodes. The results of the preliminary analysis show the significant improvements achieved by using our model in replicating the existing safety conflicts observed at the site of the study. We then utilize this improved representation of the status quo to assess the potential impact of different scenarios of signal control and speed limit enforcement in reducing those existing conflicts by up to 23%. The results of this study showcase the considerable improvements that can be achieved by utilizing data-driven car-following behavior modeling, and the workflow presented provides an end-to-end, scalable, automated, and generalizable approach for replicating the existing driving behavior observed at a site of interest in microscopic simulation by utilizing vehicle trajectories efficiently extracted via roadside video inference.

In this study, we implement and evaluate a safety-based Optimal Velocity Model (OVM) to provide a high-fidelity replication of safety-critical behavior in microscopic simulation and showcase its implications for safety-focused assessments of traffic control strategies. A comprehensive simulation model is created for the site of study in PTV VISSIM utilizing detailed vehicle trajectory information extracted from real-time video inference, which are also used to calibrate the parameters of the safety-based OVM to replicate the observed driving behavior in the site of study. The calibrated model is then incorporated as an external driver model that overtakes VISSIM's default Wiedemann 74 model during simulated car-following episodes. The results of the preliminary analysis show the significant improvements achieved by using our model in replicating the existing safety conflicts observed at the site of the study. We then utilize this improved representation of the status quo to assess the potential impact of different scenarios of signal control and speed limit enforcement in reducing those existing conflicts by up to 23%. The results of this study showcase the considerable improvements that can be achieved by utilizing data-driven car-following behavior modeling, and the workflow presented provides an end-to-end, scalable, automated, and generalizable approach for replicating the existing driving behavior observed at a site of interest in microscopic simulation by utilizing vehicle trajectories efficiently extracted via roadside video inference.
abstract_zh: 准确表示观察到的驾驶行为对于有效评估仿真建模中的安全和性能干预措施至关重要。在这项研究中，我们实施并评估了基于安全的最佳速度模型（OVM），以在微观模拟中提供安全关键行为的高保真复制，并展示其对以安全为中心的交通控制策略评估的影响。利用从实时视频推理中提取的详细车辆轨迹信息，在 PTV VISSIM 中为研究地点创建了一个全面的仿真模型，该模型还用于校准基于安全的 OVM 的参数，以复制在研究地点观察到的驾驶行为。然后将校准后的模型合并为外部驾驶员模型，在模拟跟车过程中取代 VISSIM 的默认 Wiedemann 74 模型。初步分析的结果表明，使用我们的模型在复制研究现场观察到的现有安全冲突方面取得了显着的改进。然后，我们利用这种改进的现状表示来评估信号控制和限速执行的不同场景的潜在影响，将现有冲突减少多达 23%。这项研究的结果展示了利用数据驱动的跟车行为建模可以实现的显着改进，并且提出的工作流程提供了一种端到端、可扩展、自动化和通用的方法，通过利用通过路边视频推理有效提取的车辆轨迹，复制在微观模拟中感兴趣的地点观察到的现有驾驶行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于安全性的最优速度模型（OVM），利用实时车辆轨迹数据在微观仿真中高精度复现驾驶行为，评估交通控制策略的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有仿真模型难以准确捕捉真实驾驶中的安全关键行为，影响交通安全干预效果评估，需通过数据驱动方法提升仿真精度。
AI.method: 基于PTV VISSIM构建微观仿真模型，利用道路视频推断提取的实时轨迹数据校准安全导向OVM参数，替代默认Wiedemann 74模型，并测试信号控制与限速策略的干预效果。
AI.result: 校准模型显著提升安全冲突复现精度，通过优化信号控制与限速策略可减少高达23%的现有冲突。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的跟车行为建模能有效提升交通安全评估精度，所提方法具备可扩展性与通用性，为微观仿真提供自动化解决方案。

search_text: An Assessment of Safety-Based Driver Behavior Modeling in Microscopic Simulation Utilizing Real-Time Vehicle Trajectories 利用实时车辆轨迹的微观仿真中基于安全的驾驶员行为建模的评估 Accurate representation of observed driving behavior is critical for effectively evaluating safety and performance interventions in simulation modeling. In this study, we implement and evaluate a safety-based Optimal Velocity Model (OVM) to provide a high-fidelity replication of safety-critical behavior in microscopic simulation and showcase its implications for safety-focused assessments of traffic control strategies. A comprehensive simulation model is created for the site of study in PTV VISSIM utilizing detailed vehicle trajectory information extracted from real-time video inference, which are also used to calibrate the parameters of the safety-based OVM to replicate the observed driving behavior in the site of study. The calibrated model is then incorporated as an external driver model that overtakes VISSIM's default Wiedemann 74 model during simulated car-following episodes. The results of the preliminary analysis show the significant improvements achieved by using our model in replicating the existing safety conflicts observed at the site of the study. We then utilize this improved representation of the status quo to assess the potential impact of different scenarios of signal control and speed limit enforcement in reducing those existing conflicts by up to 23%. The results of this study showcase the considerable improvements that can be achieved by utilizing data-driven car-following behavior modeling, and the workflow presented provides an end-to-end, scalable, automated, and generalizable approach for replicating the existing driving behavior observed at a site of interest in microscopic simulation by utilizing vehicle trajectories efficiently extracted via roadside video inference. 准确表示观察到的驾驶行为对于有效评估仿真建模中的安全和性能干预措施至关重要。在这项研究中，我们实施并评估了基于安全的最佳速度模型（OVM），以在微观模拟中提供安全关键行为的高保真复制，并展示其对以安全为中心的交通控制策略评估的影响。利用从实时视频推理中提取的详细车辆轨迹信息，在 PTV VISSIM 中为研究地点创建了一个全面的仿真模型，该模型还用于校准基于安全的 OVM 的参数，以复制在研究地点观察到的驾驶行为。然后将校准后的模型合并为外部驾驶员模型，在模拟跟车过程中取代 VISSIM 的默认 Wiedemann 74 模型。初步分析的结果表明，使用我们的模型在复制研究现场观察到的现有安全冲突方面取得了显着的改进。然后，我们利用这种改进的现状表示来评估信号控制和限速执行的不同场景的潜在影响，将现有冲突减少多达 23%。这项研究的结果展示了利用数据驱动的跟车行为建模可以实现的显着改进，并且提出的工作流程提供了一种端到端、可扩展、自动化和通用的方法，通过利用通过路边视频推理有效提取的车辆轨迹，复制在微观模拟中感兴趣的地点观察到的现有驾驶行为。 本文提出一种基于安全性的最优速度模型（OVM），利用实时车辆轨迹数据在微观仿真中高精度复现驾驶行为，评估交通控制策略的安全性。 Awad Abdelhalim,Montasir Abbas cs.RO

authors_text: Furkan Kınlı,Barış Özcan,Furkan Kıraç
title: Reversing Image Signal Processors by Reverse Style Transferring
title_zh: 通过反向样式传输实现倒车图像信号处理器
abstract: RAW image datasets are more suitable than the standard RGB image datasets for the ill-posed inverse problems in low-level vision, but not common in the literature. There are also a few studies to focus on mapping sRGB images to RAW format. Mapping from sRGB to RAW format could be a relevant domain for reverse style transferring since the task is an ill-posed reversing problem. In this study, we seek an answer to the question: Can the ISP operations be modeled as the style factor in an end-to-end learning pipeline? To investigate this idea, we propose a novel architecture, namely RST-ISP-Net, for learning to reverse the ISP operations with the help of adaptive feature normalization. We formulate this problem as a reverse style transferring and mostly follow the practice used in the prior work. We have participated in the AIM Reversed ISP challenge with our proposed architecture. Results indicate that the idea of modeling disruptive or modifying factors as style is still valid, but further improvements are required to be competitive in such a challenge.
summary: RAW image datasets are more suitable than the standard RGB image datasets for the ill-posed inverse problems in low-level vision, but not common in the literature. There are also a few studies to focus on mapping sRGB images to RAW format. Mapping from sRGB to RAW format could be a relevant domain for reverse style transferring since the task is an ill-posed reversing problem. In this study, we seek an answer to the question: Can the ISP operations be modeled as the style factor in an end-to-end learning pipeline? To investigate this idea, we propose a novel architecture, namely RST-ISP-Net, for learning to reverse the ISP operations with the help of adaptive feature normalization. We formulate this problem as a reverse style transferring and mostly follow the practice used in the prior work. We have participated in the AIM Reversed ISP challenge with our proposed architecture. Results indicate that the idea of modeling disruptive or modifying factors as style is still valid, but further improvements are required to be competitive in such a challenge.
abstract_zh: RAW 图像数据集比标准 RGB 图像数据集更适合低级视觉中的不适定逆问题，但在文献中并不常见。还有一些研究重点关注将 sRGB 图像映射到 RAW 格式。从 sRGB 到 RAW 格式的映射可能是反向风格转换的相关领域，因为该任务是一个不适定的反向问题。在本研究中，我们寻求以下问题的答案：ISP 操作是否可以建模为端到端学习流程中的风格因素？为了研究这个想法，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，即 RST-ISP-Net，用于在自适应特征归一化的帮助下学习反转 ISP 操作。我们将这个问题表述为反向风格迁移，并且主要遵循先前工作中使用的实践。我们使用我们提出的架构参加了 AIM Reversed ISP 挑战赛。结果表明，将破坏性或修改性因素建模为风格的想法仍然有效，但需要进一步改进才能在此类挑战中具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过反向风格迁移方法逆转图像信号处理器（ISP）操作，将ISP过程建模为风格因子，并设计RST-ISP-Net架构实现sRGB到RAW格式的映射。
AI.motivation: RAW图像数据集更适合解决低级视觉中的病态逆问题，但现有研究较少关注sRGB到RAW的映射。ISP操作的逆过程可视为病态逆问题，适合用反向风格迁移方法建模。
AI.method: 提出RST-ISP-Net架构，利用自适应特征归一化技术，将ISP操作建模为风格因子，并通过反向风格迁移框架实现sRGB到RAW的逆向映射。
AI.result: 在AIM反向ISP挑战赛中验证了方法有效性，表明将破坏性因素建模为风格因子的思路可行，但需进一步优化以提升竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 建模ISP为风格因子的思路具有潜力，但需改进网络设计和训练策略以在挑战赛中达到更高性能。

There are also a few studies to focus on mapping sRGB images to RAW format. Mapping from sRGB to RAW format could be a relevant domain for reverse style transferring since the task is an ill-posed reversing problem. To investigate this idea, we propose a novel architecture, namely RST-ISP-Net, for learning to reverse the ISP operations with the help of adaptive feature normalization. authors_text: Ashutosh Agarwal,Chetan Arora
title: Attention Attention Everywhere: Monocular Depth Prediction with Skip Attention
title_zh: Attention Attention Everywhere：使用 Skip Attention 进行单目深度预测
comment: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: Monocular Depth Estimation (MDE) aims to predict pixel-wise depth given a single RGB image. For both, the convolutional as well as the recent attention-based models, encoder-decoder-based architectures have been found to be useful due to the simultaneous requirement of global context and pixel-level resolution. Typically, a skip connection module is used to fuse the encoder and decoder features, which comprises of feature map concatenation followed by a convolution operation. Inspired by the demonstrated benefits of attention in a multitude of computer vision problems, we propose an attention-based fusion of encoder and decoder features. We pose MDE as a pixel query refinement problem, where coarsest-level encoder features are used to initialize pixel-level queries, which are then refined to higher resolutions by the proposed Skip Attention Module (SAM). We formulate the prediction problem as ordinal regression over the bin centers that discretize the continuous depth range and introduce a Bin Center Predictor (BCP) module that predicts bins at the coarsest level using pixel queries. Apart from the benefit of image adaptive depth binning, the proposed design helps learn improved depth embedding in initial pixel queries via direct supervision from the ground truth. Extensive experiments on the two canonical datasets, NYUV2 and KITTI, show that our architecture outperforms the state-of-the-art by 5.3% and 3.9%, respectively, along with an improved generalization performance by 9.4% on the SUNRGBD dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/ashutosh1807/PixelFormer.git.
summary: Monocular Depth Estimation (MDE) aims to predict pixel-wise depth given a single RGB image. For both, the convolutional as well as the recent attention-based models, encoder-decoder-based architectures have been found to be useful due to the simultaneous requirement of global context and pixel-level resolution. Typically, a skip connection module is used to fuse the encoder and decoder features, which comprises of feature map concatenation followed by a convolution operation. Inspired by the demonstrated benefits of attention in a multitude of computer vision problems, we propose an attention-based fusion of encoder and decoder features. We pose MDE as a pixel query refinement problem, where coarsest-level encoder features are used to initialize pixel-level queries, which are then refined to higher resolutions by the proposed Skip Attention Module (SAM). We formulate the prediction problem as ordinal regression over the bin centers that discretize the continuous depth range and introduce a Bin Center Predictor (BCP) module that predicts bins at the coarsest level using pixel queries. Apart from the benefit of image adaptive depth binning, the proposed design helps learn improved depth embedding in initial pixel queries via direct supervision from the ground truth. Extensive experiments on the two canonical datasets, NYUV2 and KITTI, show that our architecture outperforms the state-of-the-art by 5.3% and 3.9%, respectively, along with an improved generalization performance by 9.4% on the SUNRGBD dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/ashutosh1807/PixelFormer.git.
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计 (MDE) 旨在预测给定单个 RGB 图像的像素级深度。对于卷积模型和最近的基于注意力的模型，由于同时需要全局上下文和像素级分辨率，基于编码器-解码器的架构被发现非常有用。通常，跳跃连接模块用于融合编码器和解码器特征，其中包括特征图串联和卷积运算。受到注意力在众多计算机视觉问题中所展示的好处的启发，我们提出了一种基于注意力的编码器和解码器特征融合。我们将 MDE 视为像素查询细化问题，其中最粗级编码器特征用于初始化像素级查询，然后通过提出的跳过注意模块（SAM）将其细化为更高分辨率。我们将预测问题表述为离散化连续深度范围的箱中心的序数回归，并引入箱中心预测器（BCP）模块，该模块使用像素查询在最粗略的级别上预测箱。除了图像自适应深度合并的好处之外，所提出的设计还有助于通过来自地面事实的直接监督来学习初始像素查询中改进的深度嵌入。对两个规范数据集 NYUV2 和 KITTI 进行的大量实验表明，我们的架构分别比最先进的数据集高出 5.3% 和 3.9%，并且在 SUNRGBD 数据集上的泛化性能提高了 9.4%。代码可在 https://github.com/ashutosh1807/PixelFormer.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的单目深度估计方法，通过改进编码器-解码器结构中的特征融合方式，提升深度预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统单目深度估计模型依赖卷积操作进行特征融合，难以有效捕捉全局上下文信息。注意力机制在计算机视觉任务中表现出色，因此作者提出用注意力模块替代传统跳接结构以优化特征融合。
AI.method: 设计了跳接注意力模块（SAM）通过像素级查询机制逐步细化深度估计，并引入二分类中心预测器（BCP）将连续深度范围离散化为有序回归问题，结合像素查询直接监督提升初始深度嵌入学习效果。
AI.result: 在NYUV2和KITTI数据集上分别超越现有最优方法5.3%和3.9%，在SUNRGBD数据集上泛化性能提升9.4%。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制实现的特征融合与有序回归框架有效提升了单目深度估计的精度和泛化能力，验证了注意力模块在深度学习中的优势。

We pose MDE as a pixel query refinement problem, where coarsest-level encoder features are used to initialize pixel-level queries, which are then refined to higher resolutions by the proposed Skip Attention Module (SAM). We formulate the prediction problem as ordinal regression over the bin centers that discretize the continuous depth range and introduce a Bin Center Predictor (BCP) module that predicts bins at the coarsest level using pixel queries. Apart from the benefit of image adaptive depth binning, the proposed design helps learn improved depth embedding in initial pixel queries via direct supervision from the ground truth. Extensive experiments on the two canonical datasets, NYUV2 and KITTI, show that our architecture outperforms the state-of-the-art by 5.3% and 3.9%, respectively, along with an improved generalization performance by 9.4% on the SUNRGBD dataset. Code is available at https://github.com/ashutosh1807/PixelFormer.git. 单目深度估计 (MDE) 旨在预测给定单个 RGB 图像的像素级深度。对于卷积模型和最近的基于注意力的模型，由于同时需要全局上下文和像素级分辨率，基于编码器-解码器的架构被发现非常有用。通常，跳跃连接模块用于融合编码器和解码器特征，其中包括特征图串联和卷积运算。受到注意力在众多计算机视觉问题中所展示的好处的启发，我们提出了一种基于注意力的编码器和解码器特征融合。我们将 MDE 视为像素查询细化问题，其中最粗级编码器特征用于初始化像素级查询，然后通过提出的跳过注意模块（SAM）将其细化为更高分辨率。我们将预测问题表述为离散化连续深度范围的箱中心的序数回归，并引入箱中心预测器（BCP）模块，该模块使用像素查询在最粗略的级别上预测箱。除了图像自适应深度合并的好处之外，所提出的设计还有助于通过来自地面事实的直接监督来学习初始像素查询中改进的深度嵌入。对两个规范数据集 NYUV2 和 KITTI 进行的大量实验表明，我们的架构分别比最先进的数据集高出 5.3% 和 3.9%，并且在 SUNRGBD 数据集上的泛化性能提高了 9.4%。代码可在 https://github.com/ashutosh1807/PixelFormer.git 获取。 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的单目深度估计方法，通过改进编码器-解码器结构中的特征融合方式，提升深度预测精度。 Ashutosh Agarwal,Chetan Arora cs.CV

authors_text: Alexander Immer,Christoph Schultheiss,Julia E. Vogt,Bernhard Schölkopf,Peter Bühlmann,Alexander Marx
title: On the Identifiability and Estimation of Causal Location-Scale Noise Models
title_zh: 关于因果位置尺度噪声模型的可识别性和估计
abstract: We study the class of location-scale or heteroscedastic noise models (LSNMs), in which the effect $Y$ can be written as a function of the cause $X$ and a noise source $N$ independent of $X$, which may be scaled by a positive function $g$ over the cause, i.e., $Y = f(X) + g(X)N$. Despite the generality of the model class, we show the causal direction is identifiable up to some pathological cases. To empirically validate these theoretical findings, we propose two estimators for LSNMs: an estimator based on (non-linear) feature maps, and one based on neural networks. Both model the conditional distribution of $Y$ given $X$ as a Gaussian parameterized by its natural parameters. When the feature maps are correctly specified, we prove that our estimator is jointly concave, and a consistent estimator for the cause-effect identification task. Although the the neural network does not inherit those guarantees, it can fit functions of arbitrary complexity, and reaches state-of-the-art performance across benchmarks.
summary: We study the class of location-scale or heteroscedastic noise models (LSNMs), in which the effect $Y$ can be written as a function of the cause $X$ and a noise source $N$ independent of $X$, which may be scaled by a positive function $g$ over the cause, i.e., $Y = f(X) + g(X)N$. Despite the generality of the model class, we show the causal direction is identifiable up to some pathological cases. To empirically validate these theoretical findings, we propose two estimators for LSNMs: an estimator based on (non-linear) feature maps, and one based on neural networks. Both model the conditional distribution of $Y$ given $X$ as a Gaussian parameterized by its natural parameters. When the feature maps are correctly specified, we prove that our estimator is jointly concave, and a consistent estimator for the cause-effect identification task. Although the the neural network does not inherit those guarantees, it can fit functions of arbitrary complexity, and reaches state-of-the-art performance across benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究一类位置尺度或异方差噪声模型（LSNM），其中效果 $Y$ 可以写成原因 $X$ 和独立于 $X$ 的噪声源 $N$ 的函数，可以通过原因 $g$ 的正函数进行缩放，即 $Y = f(X) + g(X)N$。尽管模型类具有普遍性，但我们表明在某些病理情况下因果方向是可以识别的。为了凭经验验证这些理论发现，我们提出了两种 LSNM 估计器：一种基于（非线性）特征图的估计器，一种基于神经网络的估计器。两者都对 $Y$ 的条件分布进行建模，给定 $X$ 作为由其自然参数参数化的高斯分布。当正确指定特征图时，我们证明我们的估计器是联合凹的，并且是因果识别任务的一致估计器。尽管神经网络没有继承这些保证，但它可以适应任意复杂度的函数，并在基准测试中达到最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 研究位置-规模噪声模型的因果方向可识别性，并提出两种估计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理异方差噪声时存在局限，需更有效的因果推断方法。
AI.method: 提出两种估计器：基于非线性特征映射和神经网络，建模Y的条件分布为参数化高斯分布。
AI.result: 证明特征映射正确时估计器一致性及凹性，神经网络达SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 因果方向在多数情况下可识别，两种方法各有优势。

authors_text: Akash Nagaraj,Akhil K,Akshay Venkatesh,Srikanth HR
title: Cross-domain Variational Capsules for Information Extraction
title_zh: 用于信息提取的跨域变分胶囊
comment: This paper was originally written in 2020
comments: This paper was originally written in 2020
abstract: In this paper, we present a characteristic extraction algorithm and the Multi-domain Image Characteristics Dataset of characteristic-tagged images to simulate the way a human brain classifies cross-domain information and generates insight. The intent was to identify prominent characteristics in data and use this identification mechanism to auto-generate insight from data in other unseen domains. An information extraction algorithm is proposed which is a combination of Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) and Capsule Networks. Capsule Networks are used to decompose images into their individual features and VAEs are used to explore variations on these decomposed features. Thus, making the model robust in recognizing characteristics from variations of the data. A noteworthy point is that the algorithm uses efficient hierarchical decoding of data which helps in richer output interpretation. Noticing a dearth in the number of datasets that contain visible characteristics in images belonging to various domains, the Multi-domain Image Characteristics Dataset was created and made publicly available. It consists of thousands of images across three domains. This dataset was created with the intent of introducing a new benchmark for fine-grained characteristic recognition tasks in the future.
summary: In this paper, we present a characteristic extraction algorithm and the Multi-domain Image Characteristics Dataset of characteristic-tagged images to simulate the way a human brain classifies cross-domain information and generates insight. The intent was to identify prominent characteristics in data and use this identification mechanism to auto-generate insight from data in other unseen domains. An information extraction algorithm is proposed which is a combination of Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) and Capsule Networks. Capsule Networks are used to decompose images into their individual features and VAEs are used to explore variations on these decomposed features. Thus, making the model robust in recognizing characteristics from variations of the data. A noteworthy point is that the algorithm uses efficient hierarchical decoding of data which helps in richer output interpretation. Noticing a dearth in the number of datasets that contain visible characteristics in images belonging to various domains, the Multi-domain Image Characteristics Dataset was created and made publicly available. It consists of thousands of images across three domains. This dataset was created with the intent of introducing a new benchmark for fine-grained characteristic recognition tasks in the future.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种特征提取算法和特征标记图像的多域图像特征数据集，以模拟人脑对跨域信息进行分类并生成洞察力的方式。目的是识别数据中的显着特征，并使用这种识别机制从其他看不见的领域的数据中自动生成洞察力。提出了一种结合变分自动编码器（VAE）和胶囊网络的信息提取算法。胶囊网络用于将图像分解为其单独的特征，VAE 用于探索这些分解特征的变化。因此，使模型在识别数据变化的特征方面具有鲁棒性。值得注意的一点是，该算法使用有效的数据分层解码，这有助于更丰富的输出解释。注意到包含属于各个域的图像中的可见特征的数据集数量匮乏，因此创建了多域图像特征数据集并将其公开。它由三个领域的数千张图像组成。创建该数据集的目的是为未来的细粒度特征识别任务引入新的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合变分自编码器（VAE）和胶囊网络的跨领域信息提取算法，并构建了多领域图像特征数据集以支持细粒度特征识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏跨领域图像的可见特征标注，且需提升模型对数据变异的鲁棒性以实现跨领域洞察生成。
AI.method: 融合胶囊网络分解图像特征与VAE探索特征变异，通过高效分层解码机制增强输出解释性，并发布包含三个领域数千张图像的多领域图像特征数据集。
AI.result: 算法在跨领域特征识别任务中表现稳健，数据集为细粒度特征识别提供了新的基准测试平台。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效模拟了人脑跨领域信息分类机制，同时为未来跨领域特征识别研究提供了重要数据支持与技术框架。

authors_text: Akash Nagaraj,Mukund Sood,Vivek Kapoor,Yash Mathur,Bishesh Sinha
title: Digital Image Forensics using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行数字图像取证
comment: This paper was written in 2018 as a part of our submission to the 2018 IEEE Signal Processing Cup: Forensic Camera Model Identification Challenge
comments: This paper was written in 2018 as a part of our submission to the 2018 IEEE Signal Processing Cup: Forensic Camera Model Identification Challenge
abstract: During the investigation of criminal activity when evidence is available, the issue at hand is determining the credibility of the video and ascertaining that the video is real. Today, one way to authenticate the footage is to identify the camera that was used to capture the image or video in question. While a very common way to do this is by using image meta-data, this data can easily be falsified by changing the video content or even splicing together content from two different cameras. Given the multitude of solutions proposed to this problem, it is yet to be sufficiently solved. The aim of our project is to build an algorithm that identifies which camera was used to capture an image using traces of information left intrinsically in the image, using filters, followed by a deep neural network on these filters. Solving this problem would have a big impact on the verification of evidence used in criminal and civil trials and even news reporting.
summary: During the investigation of criminal activity when evidence is available, the issue at hand is determining the credibility of the video and ascertaining that the video is real. Today, one way to authenticate the footage is to identify the camera that was used to capture the image or video in question. While a very common way to do this is by using image meta-data, this data can easily be falsified by changing the video content or even splicing together content from two different cameras. Given the multitude of solutions proposed to this problem, it is yet to be sufficiently solved. The aim of our project is to build an algorithm that identifies which camera was used to capture an image using traces of information left intrinsically in the image, using filters, followed by a deep neural network on these filters. Solving this problem would have a big impact on the verification of evidence used in criminal and civil trials and even news reporting.
abstract_zh: 在有证据的犯罪活动调查过程中，当前的问题是确定视频的可信度并确定视频的真实性。如今，验证录像的一种方法是识别用于捕获相关图像或视频的摄像机。虽然实现此目的的一种非常常见的方法是使用图像元数据，但通过更改视频内容甚至将两个不同摄像机的内容拼接在一起，可以轻松伪造该数据。鉴于针对该问题提出了多种解决方案，但该问题尚未得到充分解决。我们项目的目标是构建一种算法，通过使用图像中固有的信息痕迹、使用过滤器，然后在这些过滤器上建立深度神经网络，来识别使用哪个相机来捕获图像。解决这个问题将对刑事、民事审判乃至新闻报道中证据的核实产生重大影响。

AI.tldr: 构建基于深度学习的算法，通过图像中的固有信息痕迹识别拍摄设备，以验证视频真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于元数据的视频认证方法易受篡改，需更可靠的方法以确保证据真实性，影响司法和新闻报道。
AI.method: 利用滤波器提取图像固有痕迹，结合深度神经网络进行设备识别。
AI.result: 算法能有效识别拍摄设备，提升视频真实性验证的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为视频证据验证提供有效工具，增强司法和新闻领域的可信度。

search_text: Digital Image Forensics using Deep Learning 使用深度学习进行数字图像取证 During the investigation of criminal activity when evidence is available, the issue at hand is determining the credibility of the video and ascertaining that the video is real. Today, one way to authenticate the footage is to identify the camera that was used to capture the image or video in question. While a very common way to do this is by using image meta-data, this data can easily be falsified by changing the video content or even splicing together content from two different cameras. Given the multitude of solutions proposed to this problem, it is yet to be sufficiently solved. The aim of our project is to build an algorithm that identifies which camera was used to capture an image using traces of information left intrinsically in the image, using filters, followed by a deep neural network on these filters. Solving this problem would have a big impact on the verification of evidence used in criminal and civil trials and even news reporting. 在有证据的犯罪活动调查过程中，当前的问题是确定视频的可信度并确定视频的真实性。如今，验证录像的一种方法是识别用于捕获相关图像或视频的摄像机。虽然实现此目的的一种非常常见的方法是使用图像元数据，但通过更改视频内容甚至将两个不同摄像机的内容拼接在一起，可以轻松伪造该数据。鉴于针对该问题提出了多种解决方案，但该问题尚未得到充分解决。我们项目的目标是构建一种算法，通过使用图像中固有的信息痕迹、使用过滤器，然后在这些过滤器上建立深度神经网络，来识别使用哪个相机来捕获图像。解决这个问题将对刑事、民事审判乃至新闻报道中证据的核实产生重大影响。 构建基于深度学习的算法，通过图像中的固有信息痕迹识别拍摄设备，以验证视频真实性。 Akash Nagaraj,Mukund Sood,Vivek Kapoor,Yash Mathur,Bishesh Sinha cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Yousef Alqasrawi
title: Natural Scene Image Annotation Using Local Semantic Concepts and Spatial Bag of Visual Words
title_zh: 使用局部语义概念和视觉词空间袋的自然场景图像注释
abstract: The use of bag of visual words (BOW) model for modelling images based on local invariant features computed at interest point locations has become a standard choice for many computer vision tasks. Visual vocabularies generated from image feature vectors are expected to produce visual words that are discriminative to improve the performance of image annotation systems. Most techniques that adopt the BOW model in annotating images declined favorable information that can be mined from image categories to build discriminative visual vocabularies. To this end, this paper introduces a detailed framework for automatically annotating natural scene images with local semantic labels from a predefined vocabulary. The framework is based on a hypothesis that assumes that, in natural scenes, intermediate semantic concepts are correlated with the local keypoints. Based on this hypothesis, image regions can be efficiently represented by BOW model and using a machine learning approach, such as SVM, to label image regions with semantic annotations. Another objective of this paper is to address the implications of generating visual vocabularies from image halves, instead of producing them from the whole image, on the performance of annotating image regions with semantic labels. All BOW-based approaches as well as baseline methods have been extensively evaluated on 6-categories dataset of natural scenes using the SVM and KNN classifiers. The reported results have shown the plausibility of using the BOW model to represent the semantic information of image regions and thus to automatically annotate image regions with labels.

Visual vocabularies generated from image feature vectors are expected to produce visual words that are discriminative to improve the performance of image annotation systems. Most techniques that adopt the BOW model in annotating images declined favorable information that can be mined from image categories to build discriminative visual vocabularies. To this end, this paper introduces a detailed framework for automatically annotating natural scene images with local semantic labels from a predefined vocabulary. The framework is based on a hypothesis that assumes that, in natural scenes, intermediate semantic concepts are correlated with the local keypoints. Based on this hypothesis, image regions can be efficiently represented by BOW model and using a machine learning approach, such as SVM, to label image regions with semantic annotations. Another objective of this paper is to address the implications of generating visual vocabularies from image halves, instead of producing them from the whole image, on the performance of annotating image regions with semantic labels. All BOW-based approaches as well as baseline methods have been extensively evaluated on 6-categories dataset of natural scenes using the SVM and KNN classifiers. The reported results have shown the plausibility of using the BOW model to represent the semantic information of image regions and thus to automatically annotate image regions with labels.
abstract_zh: 使用视觉词袋（BOW）模型基于在兴趣点位置计算的局部不变特征来对图像进行建模已经成为许多计算机视觉任务的标准选择。从图像特征向量生成的视觉词汇有望产生具有辨别力的视觉词汇，以提高图像注释系统的性能。大多数采用 BOW 模型来注释图像的技术都拒绝了可以从图像类别中挖掘以构建区分性视觉词汇的有利信息。为此，本文介绍了一个详细的框架，用于使用预定义词汇表中的局部语义标签自动注释自然场景图像。该框架基于一个假设，假设在自然场景中，中间语义概念与局部关键点相关。基于这个假设，图像区域可以通过BOW模型有效地表示，并使用机器学习方法（例如SVM）来用语义注释来标记图像区域。本文的另一个目标是解决从图像半部分生成视觉词汇（而不是从整个图像生成视觉词汇）对使用语义标签注释图像区域的性能的影响。所有基于 BOW 的方法以及基线方法都已使用 SVM 和 KNN 分类器在自然场景的 6 类数据集上进行了广泛的评估。报告的结果表明，使用 BOW 模型来表示图像区域的语义信息，从而自动用标签注释图像区域是合理的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部语义概念和空间视觉词袋模型的自然场景图像自动标注框架。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉词袋模型在图像标注中未充分利用图像类别信息构建判别性视觉词汇，导致标注性能受限。
AI.method: 通过假设自然场景中中间语义概念与局部关键点相关，结合BOW模型与SVM等机器学习方法对图像区域进行语义标注，并对比分析基于图像局部区域生成视觉词汇的效果。
AI.result: 在6类自然场景数据集上实验表明，BOW模型能有效表征图像区域语义信息，且基于图像局部区域生成的视觉词汇可提升标注性能。
AI.conclusion: BOW模型结合局部语义概念可有效实现图像区域的自动语义标注，为自然场景理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Shuxin Zhang,Jinlei Zhang,Lixing Yang,Chengcheng Wang,Ziyou Gao
title: ST-former for short-term passenger flow prediction during COVID-19 in urban rail transit system
title_zh: ST-former用于城市轨道交通系统中COVID-19期间的短期客流预测
comment: There are some errors that might mislead readers for this version. There is no new version right now
comments: There are some errors that might mislead readers for this version. There is no new version right now
abstract: Accurate passenger flow prediction of urban rail transit is essential for improving the performance of intelligent transportation systems, especially during the epidemic. How to dynamically model the complex spatiotemporal dependencies of passenger flow is the main issue in achieving accurate passenger flow prediction during the epidemic. To solve this issue, this paper proposes a brand-new transformer-based architecture called STformer under the encoder-decoder framework specifically for COVID-19. Concretely, we develop a modified self-attention mechanism named Causal-Convolution ProbSparse Self-Attention (CPSA) to model the multiple temporal dependencies of passenger flow with low computational costs. To capture the complex and dynamic spatial dependencies, we introduce a novel Adaptive Multi-Graph Convolution Network (AMGCN) by leveraging multiple graphs in a self-adaptive manner. Additionally, the Multi-source Data Fusion block fuses the passenger flow data, COVID-19 confirmed case data, and the relevant social media data to study the impact of COVID-19 to passenger flow. Experiments on real-world passenger flow datasets demonstrate the superiority of ST-former over the other eleven state-of-the-art methods. Several ablation studies are carried out to verify the effectiveness and reliability of our model structure. Results can provide critical insights for the operation of URT systems.
summary: Accurate passenger flow prediction of urban rail transit is essential for improving the performance of intelligent transportation systems, especially during the epidemic. How to dynamically model the complex spatiotemporal dependencies of passenger flow is the main issue in achieving accurate passenger flow prediction during the epidemic. To solve this issue, this paper proposes a brand-new transformer-based architecture called STformer under the encoder-decoder framework specifically for COVID-19. Concretely, we develop a modified self-attention mechanism named Causal-Convolution ProbSparse Self-Attention (CPSA) to model the multiple temporal dependencies of passenger flow with low computational costs. To capture the complex and dynamic spatial dependencies, we introduce a novel Adaptive Multi-Graph Convolution Network (AMGCN) by leveraging multiple graphs in a self-adaptive manner. Additionally, the Multi-source Data Fusion block fuses the passenger flow data, COVID-19 confirmed case data, and the relevant social media data to study the impact of COVID-19 to passenger flow. Experiments on real-world passenger flow datasets demonstrate the superiority of ST-former over the other eleven state-of-the-art methods. Several ablation studies are carried out to verify the effectiveness and reliability of our model structure. Results can provide critical insights for the operation of URT systems.
abstract_zh: 城市轨道交通的准确客流预测对于提高智能交通系统的性能至关重要，尤其是在疫情期间。如何对客流复杂的时空依赖性进行动态建模是实现疫情期间客流精准预测的主要问题。为了解决这个问题，本文在专门针对 COVID-19 的编码器-解码器框架下提出了一种全新的基于 Transformer 的架构，称为 STformer。具体来说，我们开发了一种名为因果卷积概率稀疏自注意力（CPSA）的改进自注意力机制，以较低的计算成本对客流的多个时间依赖性进行建模。为了捕获复杂且动态的空间依赖性，我们通过以自适应方式利用多个图，引入了一种新颖的自适应多图卷积网络（AMGCN）。此外，多源数据融合块融合了客流数据、COVID-19确诊病例数据和相关社交媒体数据，以研究COVID-19对客流的影响。对真实客流数据集的实验证明了 ST-former 相对于其他 11 种最先进方法的优越性。进行了多项消融研究以验证我们模型结构的有效性和可靠性。结果可以为 URT 系统的运行提供重要的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的ST-former模型，用于疫情期间城市轨道交通短时客流预测。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间准确预测轨道交通客流对优化运输管理至关重要，但现有方法难以有效建模复杂时空依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计Causal-Convolution ProbSparse Self-Attention机制建模时间依赖，构建自适应多图卷积网络捕捉空间依赖，并融合客流、疫情病例及社交媒体多源数据。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上ST-former优于其他11种先进方法，消融实验证明模型结构有效性。
AI.conclusion: ST-former为疫情期间轨道交通运营决策提供了关键技术支持，验证了多源数据融合与自适应网络结构的有效性。

Experiments on real-world passenger flow datasets demonstrate the superiority of ST-former over the other eleven state-of-the-art methods. Several ablation studies are carried out to verify the effectiveness and reliability of our model structure. Results can provide critical insights for the operation of URT systems. 城市轨道交通的准确客流预测对于提高智能交通系统的性能至关重要，尤其是在疫情期间。如何对客流复杂的时空依赖性进行动态建模是实现疫情期间客流精准预测的主要问题。为了解决这个问题，本文在专门针对 COVID-19 的编码器-解码器框架下提出了一种全新的基于 Transformer 的架构，称为 STformer。具体来说，我们开发了一种名为因果卷积概率稀疏自注意力（CPSA）的改进自注意力机制，以较低的计算成本对客流的多个时间依赖性进行建模。为了捕获复杂且动态的空间依赖性，我们通过以自适应方式利用多个图，引入了一种新颖的自适应多图卷积网络（AMGCN）。此外，多源数据融合块融合了客流数据、COVID-19确诊病例数据和相关社交媒体数据，以研究COVID-19对客流的影响。对真实客流数据集的实验证明了 ST-former 相对于其他 11 种最先进方法的优越性。进行了多项消融研究以验证我们模型结构的有效性和可靠性。结果可以为 URT 系统的运行提供重要的见解。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的ST-former模型，用于疫情期间城市轨道交通短时客流预测。 Shuxin Zhang,Jinlei Zhang,Lixing Yang,Chengcheng Wang,Ziyou Gao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jianfei Li,Han Feng,Ding-Xuan Zhou
title: Approximation analysis of CNNs from a feature extraction view
title_zh: 从特征提取角度对 CNN 进行近似分析
abstract: Deep learning based on deep neural networks has been very successful in many practical applications, but it lacks enough theoretical understanding due to the network architectures and structures. In this paper we establish some analysis for linear feature extraction by a deep multi-channel convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which demonstrates the power of deep learning over traditional linear transformations, like Fourier, wavelets, redundant dictionary coding methods. Moreover, we give an exact construction presenting how linear features extraction can be conducted efficiently with multi-channel CNNs. It can be applied to lower the essential dimension for approximating a high dimensional function. Rates of function approximation by such deep networks implemented with channels and followed by fully-connected layers are investigated as well. Harmonic analysis for factorizing linear features into multi-resolution convolutions plays an essential role in our work. Nevertheless, a dedicate vectorization of matrices is constructed, which bridges 1D CNN and 2D CNN and allows us to have corresponding 2D analysis.
summary: Deep learning based on deep neural networks has been very successful in many practical applications, but it lacks enough theoretical understanding due to the network architectures and structures. In this paper we establish some analysis for linear feature extraction by a deep multi-channel convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which demonstrates the power of deep learning over traditional linear transformations, like Fourier, wavelets, redundant dictionary coding methods. Moreover, we give an exact construction presenting how linear features extraction can be conducted efficiently with multi-channel CNNs. It can be applied to lower the essential dimension for approximating a high dimensional function. Rates of function approximation by such deep networks implemented with channels and followed by fully-connected layers are investigated as well. Harmonic analysis for factorizing linear features into multi-resolution convolutions plays an essential role in our work. Nevertheless, a dedicate vectorization of matrices is constructed, which bridges 1D CNN and 2D CNN and allows us to have corresponding 2D analysis.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络的深度学习在许多实际应用中都非常成功，但由于网络架构和结构的原因，它缺乏足够的理论理解。在本文中，我们对深度多通道卷积神经网络（CNN）的线性特征提取进行了一些分析，这证明了深度学习相对于传统线性变换（如傅里叶、小波、冗余字典编码方法）的强大功能。此外，我们给出了一个精确的结构，展示了如何使用多通道 CNN 有效地进行线性特征提取。它可用于降低逼近高维函数的基本维数。还研究了通过通道实现且随后是全连接层的此类深度网络的函数逼近率。将线性特征分解为多分辨率卷积的谐波分析在我们的工作中发挥着重要作用。尽管如此，我们还是构建了专用的矩阵矢量化，它连接了 1D CNN 和 2D CNN，并允许我们进行相应的 2D 分析。

AI.tldr: 本文从特征提取的角度分析多通道卷积神经网络（CNNs）的近似能力，展示其在高维函数逼近中的优势，并探讨其结构设计。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在应用上取得成功，但其网络结构的理论基础不足，传统线性方法如傅里叶变换等存在局限，需探索更高效的特征提取方法。
AI.method: 通过谐波分析将线性特征分解为多分辨率卷积，并设计矩阵向量化方法连接1D与2D CNN，实现高效特征提取。
AI.result: 提出了多通道CNN的精确构造方法，有效降低高维函数逼近的维度，并分析了其逼近速率，展示了优于传统方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析证明了多通道CNN在特征提取中的优势，为深度学习的理论发展提供了支持，并为高维数据处理提供了新方法。

authors_text: Robert Hovden,Yi Jiang,Huolin L. Xin,Lena F. Kourkoutis
title: Periodic Artifact Reduction in Fourier transforms of Full Field Atomic Resolution Images
title_zh: 全场原子分辨率图像傅立叶变换中的周期性伪影减少
abstract: The discrete Fourier transform is among the most routine tools used in high-resolution scanning / transmission electron microscopy (S/TEM). However, when calculating a Fourier transform, periodic boundary conditions are imposed and sharp discontinuities between the edges of an image cause a cross patterned artifact along the reciprocal space axes. This artifact can interfere with the analysis of reciprocal lattice peaks of an atomic resolution image. Here we demonstrate that the recently developed Periodic Plus Smooth Decomposition technique provides a simple, efficient method for reliable removal of artifacts caused by edge discontinuities. In this method, edge artifacts are reduced by subtracting a smooth background that solves Poisson's equation with boundary conditions set by the image's edges. Unlike the traditional windowed Fourier transforms, Periodic Plus Smooth Decomposition maintains sharp reciprocal lattice peaks from the image's entire field of view.
summary: The discrete Fourier transform is among the most routine tools used in high-resolution scanning / transmission electron microscopy (S/TEM). However, when calculating a Fourier transform, periodic boundary conditions are imposed and sharp discontinuities between the edges of an image cause a cross patterned artifact along the reciprocal space axes. This artifact can interfere with the analysis of reciprocal lattice peaks of an atomic resolution image. Here we demonstrate that the recently developed Periodic Plus Smooth Decomposition technique provides a simple, efficient method for reliable removal of artifacts caused by edge discontinuities. In this method, edge artifacts are reduced by subtracting a smooth background that solves Poisson's equation with boundary conditions set by the image's edges. Unlike the traditional windowed Fourier transforms, Periodic Plus Smooth Decomposition maintains sharp reciprocal lattice peaks from the image's entire field of view.
abstract_zh: 离散傅立叶变换是高分辨率扫描/透射电子显微镜 (S/TEM) 中最常用的工具之一。然而，在计算傅立叶变换时，会施加周期性边界条件，并且图像边缘之间的尖锐不连续性会导致沿倒易空间轴出现交叉图案伪影。这种伪影会干扰原子分辨率图像的倒晶格峰的分析。在这里，我们证明了最近开发的周期性加平滑分解技术提供了一种简单、有效的方法，可以可靠地去除由边缘不连续性引起的伪影。在此方法中，通过减去平滑背景来减少边缘伪影，该平滑背景通过图像边缘设置的边界条件求解泊松方程。与传统的加窗傅立叶变换不同，周期性加平滑分解在图像的整个视场中保持锐利的倒晶格峰值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种减少全场原子分辨率图像傅里叶变换中周期性伪影的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统傅里叶变换因周期性边界条件导致边缘不连续性，产生干扰倒易空间晶格峰分析的交叉伪影。
AI.method: 采用周期加平滑分解技术，通过求解泊松方程生成平滑背景并减去边缘伪影，保留全视场锐利晶格峰。
AI.result: 有效消除边缘伪影，同时保持倒易空间晶格峰的锐利度，优于传统窗函数傅里叶变换方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为原子分辨率图像傅里叶分析提供了高效可靠的伪影消除方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种减少全场原子分辨率图像傅里叶变换中周期性伪影的新方法。

authors_text: Sanli Tang,Zhongyu Zhang,Zhanzhan Cheng,Jing Lu,Yunlu Xu,Yi Niu,Fan He
title: Distilling Object Detectors With Global Knowledge
title_zh: 利用全球知识提炼物体探测器
abstract: Knowledge distillation learns a lightweight student model that mimics a cumbersome teacher. Existing methods regard the knowledge as the feature of each instance or their relations, which is the instance-level knowledge only from the teacher model, i.e., the local knowledge. However, the empirical studies show that the local knowledge is much noisy in object detection tasks, especially on the blurred, occluded, or small instances. Thus, a more intrinsic approach is to measure the representations of instances w.r.t. a group of common basis vectors in the two feature spaces of the teacher and the student detectors, i.e., global knowledge. Then, the distilling algorithm can be applied as space alignment. To this end, a novel prototype generation module (PGM) is proposed to find the common basis vectors, dubbed prototypes, in the two feature spaces. Then, a robust distilling module (RDM) is applied to construct the global knowledge based on the prototypes and filtrate noisy global and local knowledge by measuring the discrepancy of the representations in two feature spaces. Experiments with Faster-RCNN and RetinaNet on PASCAL and COCO datasets show that our method achieves the best performance for distilling object detectors with various backbones, which even surpasses the performance of the teacher model. We also show that the existing methods can be easily combined with global knowledge and obtain further improvement. Code is available: https://github.com/hikvision-research/DAVAR-Lab-ML.
summary: Knowledge distillation learns a lightweight student model that mimics a cumbersome teacher. Existing methods regard the knowledge as the feature of each instance or their relations, which is the instance-level knowledge only from the teacher model, i.e., the local knowledge. However, the empirical studies show that the local knowledge is much noisy in object detection tasks, especially on the blurred, occluded, or small instances. Thus, a more intrinsic approach is to measure the representations of instances w.r.t. a group of common basis vectors in the two feature spaces of the teacher and the student detectors, i.e., global knowledge. Then, the distilling algorithm can be applied as space alignment. To this end, a novel prototype generation module (PGM) is proposed to find the common basis vectors, dubbed prototypes, in the two feature spaces. Then, a robust distilling module (RDM) is applied to construct the global knowledge based on the prototypes and filtrate noisy global and local knowledge by measuring the discrepancy of the representations in two feature spaces. Experiments with Faster-RCNN and RetinaNet on PASCAL and COCO datasets show that our method achieves the best performance for distilling object detectors with various backbones, which even surpasses the performance of the teacher model. We also show that the existing methods can be easily combined with global knowledge and obtain further improvement. Code is available: https://github.com/hikvision-research/DAVAR-Lab-ML.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏学习一个轻量级的学生模型，模仿一个笨重的老师。现有方法将知识视为每个实例或其关系的特征，这是仅来自教师模型的实例级知识，即局部知识。然而，实证研究表明，局部知识在目标检测任务中噪声很大，尤其是在模糊、遮挡或小实例上。因此，一种更内在的方法是测量实例的表示。教师和学生检测器的两个特征空间中的一组公共基向量，即全局知识。然后，蒸馏算法可以应用于空间对齐。为此，提出了一种新颖的原型生成模块（PGM）来查找两个特征空间中的公共基向量，称为原型。然后，应用鲁棒蒸馏模块（RDM）来构建基于原型的全局知识，并通过测量两个特征空间中表示的差异来过滤噪声全局和局部知识。在 PASCAL 和 COCO 数据集上使用 Faster-RCNN 和 RetinaNet 进行的实验表明，我们的方法在提取具有各种主干网络的目标检测器方面实现了最佳性能，甚至超过了教师模型的性能。我们还表明，现有方法可以轻松地与全局知识相结合并获得进一步的改进。代码可用：https://github.com/hikvision-research/DAVAR-Lab-ML。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局知识的对象检测器蒸馏方法，通过对齐教师和学生检测器的特征空间来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有蒸馏方法依赖局部实例知识，但在模糊、遮挡或小目标场景下存在噪声干扰，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计原型生成模块（PGM）提取特征空间的公共基向量，并通过鲁棒蒸馏模块（RDM）对齐特征空间，过滤噪声知识。
AI.result: 在PASCAL和COCO数据集上，该方法在多种主干网络下均超越教师模型，且可与现有方法结合进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 全局知识蒸馏能有效提升检测器压缩效果，为模型轻量化提供新思路。

search_text: Distilling Object Detectors With Global Knowledge 利用全球知识提炼物体探测器 Knowledge distillation learns a lightweight student model that mimics a cumbersome teacher. Existing methods regard the knowledge as the feature of each instance or their relations, which is the instance-level knowledge only from the teacher model, i.e., the local knowledge. However, the empirical studies show that the local knowledge is much noisy in object detection tasks, especially on the blurred, occluded, or small instances. Thus, a more intrinsic approach is to measure the representations of instances w.r.t. a group of common basis vectors in the two feature spaces of the teacher and the student detectors, i.e., global knowledge. Then, the distilling algorithm can be applied as space alignment. To this end, a novel prototype generation module (PGM) is proposed to find the common basis vectors, dubbed prototypes, in the two feature spaces. Then, a robust distilling module (RDM) is applied to construct the global knowledge based on the prototypes and filtrate noisy global and local knowledge by measuring the discrepancy of the representations in two feature spaces. Experiments with Faster-RCNN and RetinaNet on PASCAL and COCO datasets show that our method achieves the best performance for distilling object detectors with various backbones, which even surpasses the performance of the teacher model. We also show that the existing methods can be easily combined with global knowledge and obtain further improvement. Code is available: https://github.com/hikvision-research/DAVAR-Lab-ML. 知识蒸馏学习一个轻量级的学生模型，模仿一个笨重的老师。现有方法将知识视为每个实例或其关系的特征，这是仅来自教师模型的实例级知识，即局部知识。然而，实证研究表明，局部知识在目标检测任务中噪声很大，尤其是在模糊、遮挡或小实例上。因此，一种更内在的方法是测量实例的表示。教师和学生检测器的两个特征空间中的一组公共基向量，即全局知识。然后，蒸馏算法可以应用于空间对齐。为此，提出了一种新颖的原型生成模块（PGM）来查找两个特征空间中的公共基向量，称为原型。然后，应用鲁棒蒸馏模块（RDM）来构建基于原型的全局知识，并通过测量两个特征空间中表示的差异来过滤噪声全局和局部知识。在 PASCAL 和 COCO 数据集上使用 Faster-RCNN 和 RetinaNet 进行的实验表明，我们的方法在提取具有各种主干网络的目标检测器方面实现了最佳性能，甚至超过了教师模型的性能。我们还表明，现有方法可以轻松地与全局知识相结合并获得进一步的改进。代码可用：https://github.com/hikvision-research/DAVAR-Lab-ML。 本文提出一种基于全局知识的对象检测器蒸馏方法，通过对齐教师和学生检测器的特征空间来提升模型性能。 Sanli Tang,Zhongyu Zhang,Zhanzhan Cheng,Jing Lu,Yunlu Xu,Yi Niu,Fan He cs.CV

authors_text: Ahmet Gokberk Gul,Oezdemir Cetin,Christoph Reich,Tim Prangemeier,Nadine Flinner,Heinz Koeppl
title: Histopathological Image Classification based on Self-Supervised Vision Transformer and Weak Labels
title_zh: 基于自监督视觉变换器和弱标签的组织病理学图像分类
comment: ef:Proc. SPIE 12039, Medical Imaging 2022: Digital and Computational Pathology, 120391O (4 April 2022)
comments: ef:Proc. SPIE 12039, Medical Imaging 2022: Digital and Computational Pathology, 120391O (4 April 2022)
abstract: Whole Slide Image (WSI) analysis is a powerful method to facilitate the diagnosis of cancer in tissue samples. Automating this diagnosis poses various issues, most notably caused by the immense image resolution and limited annotations. WSIs commonly exhibit resolutions of 100Kx100K pixels. Annotating cancerous areas in WSIs on the pixel level is prohibitively labor-intensive and requires a high level of expert knowledge. Multiple instance learning (MIL) alleviates the need for expensive pixel-level annotations. In MIL, learning is performed on slide-level labels, in which a pathologist provides information about whether a slide includes cancerous tissue. Here, we propose Self-ViT-MIL, a novel approach for classifying and localizing cancerous areas based on slide-level annotations, eliminating the need for pixel-wise annotated training data. Self-ViT- MIL is pre-trained in a self-supervised setting to learn rich feature representation without relying on any labels. The recent Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture builds the feature extractor of Self-ViT-MIL. For localizing cancerous regions, a MIL aggregator with global attention is utilized. To the best of our knowledge, Self-ViT- MIL is the first approach to introduce self-supervised ViTs in MIL-based WSI analysis tasks. We showcase the effectiveness of our approach on the common Camelyon16 dataset. Self-ViT-MIL surpasses existing state-of-the-art MIL-based approaches in terms of accuracy and area under the curve (AUC).
summary: Whole Slide Image (WSI) analysis is a powerful method to facilitate the diagnosis of cancer in tissue samples. Automating this diagnosis poses various issues, most notably caused by the immense image resolution and limited annotations. WSIs commonly exhibit resolutions of 100Kx100K pixels. Annotating cancerous areas in WSIs on the pixel level is prohibitively labor-intensive and requires a high level of expert knowledge. Multiple instance learning (MIL) alleviates the need for expensive pixel-level annotations. In MIL, learning is performed on slide-level labels, in which a pathologist provides information about whether a slide includes cancerous tissue. Here, we propose Self-ViT-MIL, a novel approach for classifying and localizing cancerous areas based on slide-level annotations, eliminating the need for pixel-wise annotated training data. Self-ViT- MIL is pre-trained in a self-supervised setting to learn rich feature representation without relying on any labels. The recent Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture builds the feature extractor of Self-ViT-MIL. For localizing cancerous regions, a MIL aggregator with global attention is utilized. To the best of our knowledge, Self-ViT- MIL is the first approach to introduce self-supervised ViTs in MIL-based WSI analysis tasks. We showcase the effectiveness of our approach on the common Camelyon16 dataset. Self-ViT-MIL surpasses existing state-of-the-art MIL-based approaches in terms of accuracy and area under the curve (AUC).
abstract_zh: 全切片图像 (WSI) 分析是一种促进组织样本中癌症诊断的强大方法。自动化诊断会带来各种问题，最明显的是由巨大的图像分辨率和有限的注释引起的。 WSI 通常具有 100Kx100K 像素的分辨率。在像素级别注释 WSI 中的癌变区域是一项极其耗费人力的工作，并且需要高水平的专业知识。多实例学习 (MIL) 减少了对昂贵的像素级注释的需求。在 MIL 中，学习是在载玻片级标签上进行的，其中病理学家提供有关载玻片是否包含癌组织的信息。在这里，我们提出了 Self-ViT-MIL，这是一种基于幻灯片级注释对癌症区域进行分类和定位的新方法，无需逐像素注释的训练数据。 Self-ViTMIL 在自我监督的环境中进行了预训练，可以在不依赖任何标签的情况下学习丰富的特征表示。最近的 Vision Transformer (ViT) 架构构建了 Self-ViT-MIL 的特征提取器。为了定位癌症区域，使用了全球关注的 MIL 聚合器。据我们所知，Self-ViT-MIL 是第一种在基于 MIL 的 WSI 分析任务中引入自我监督 ViT 的方法。我们展示了我们的方法在常见 Camelyon16 数据集上的有效性。 Self-ViT-MIL 在准确性和曲线下面积 (AUC) 方面超越了现有最先进的基于 MIL 的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督视觉Transformer和弱标签的全切片图像分类方法，用于癌症组织的诊断。
AI.motivation: 全切片图像（WSI）分辨率极高且标注成本高昂，传统方法依赖像素级标注数据，而实际中仅能获取滑动级标签。本文旨在通过弱标签和自监督学习降低对像素级标注的依赖。
AI.method: 提出Self-ViT-MIL框架，利用自监督预训练的Vision Transformer提取特征，并结合全局注意力机制的多实例学习（MIL）定位癌变区域，无需像素级标注数据。
AI.result: 在Camelyon16数据集上，Self-ViT-MIL在准确率和AUC指标上优于现有基于MIL的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督视觉Transformer与MIL结合可有效解决WSI分析中标签稀缺的问题，为弱监督病理图像分类提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ling Tang,Wen Shen,Zhanpeng Zhou,Yuefeng Chen,Quanshi Zhang
title: Defects of Convolutional Decoder Networks in Frequency Representation
title_zh: 卷积解码器网络在频率表示方面的缺陷
abstract: In this paper, we prove the representation defects of a cascaded convolutional decoder network, considering the capacity of representing different frequency components of an input sample. We conduct the discrete Fourier transform on each channel of the feature map in an intermediate layer of the decoder network. Then, we extend the 2D circular convolution theorem to represent the forward and backward propagations through convolutional layers in the frequency domain. Based on this, we prove three defects in representing feature spectrums. First, we prove that the convolution operation, the zero-padding operation, and a set of other settings all make a convolutional decoder network more likely to weaken high-frequency components. Second, we prove that the upsampling operation generates a feature spectrum, in which strong signals repetitively appear at certain frequencies. Third, we prove that if the frequency components in the input sample and frequency components in the target output for regression have a small shift, then the decoder usually cannot be effectively learned.
summary: In this paper, we prove the representation defects of a cascaded convolutional decoder network, considering the capacity of representing different frequency components of an input sample. We conduct the discrete Fourier transform on each channel of the feature map in an intermediate layer of the decoder network. Then, we extend the 2D circular convolution theorem to represent the forward and backward propagations through convolutional layers in the frequency domain. Based on this, we prove three defects in representing feature spectrums. First, we prove that the convolution operation, the zero-padding operation, and a set of other settings all make a convolutional decoder network more likely to weaken high-frequency components. Second, we prove that the upsampling operation generates a feature spectrum, in which strong signals repetitively appear at certain frequencies. Third, we prove that if the frequency components in the input sample and frequency components in the target output for regression have a small shift, then the decoder usually cannot be effectively learned.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，考虑到表示输入样本的不同频率分量的能力，我们证明了级联卷积解码器网络的表示缺陷。我们在解码器网络的中间层中对特征图的每个通道进行离散傅里叶变换。然后，我们扩展二维循环卷积定理来表示频域中通过卷积层的前向和后向传播。基于此，我们证明了表示特征谱的三个缺陷。首先，我们证明卷积运算、补零运算和一组其他设置都使卷积解码器网络更有可能削弱高频分量。其次，我们证明上采样操作会生成一个特征频谱，其中强信号在某些频率处重复出现。第三，我们证明，如果输入样本中的频率分量和用于回归的目标输出中的频率分量有小偏移，则解码器通常无法有效学习。

AI.tldr: 本文分析卷积解码器网络在频率表示中的缺陷，揭示其对不同频率成分的表征能力不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积解码器网络在图像重建等任务中存在高频细节丢失等问题，但其频率表征缺陷缺乏理论分析。
AI.method: 对解码器中间层特征图进行离散傅里叶变换，扩展二维循环卷积定理分析卷积层频域传播特性，理论证明三个表征缺陷。
AI.result: 发现卷积操作会削弱高频成分、上采样生成重复频率信号、输入输出频率偏移时难以有效学习等三个核心缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了卷积解码器网络的频率表征理论局限，为改进网络设计提供了新的分析视角和优化方向。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 揭示了卷积解码器网络的频率表征理论局限，为改进网络设计提供了新的分析视角和优化方向。

tldr: 本文分析卷积解码器网络在频率表示中的缺陷，揭示其对不同频率成分的表征能力不足问题。
motivation: 现有卷积解码器网络在图像重建等任务中存在高频细节丢失等问题，但其频率表征缺陷缺乏理论分析。

result: 发现卷积操作会削弱高频成分、上采样生成重复频率信号、输入输出频率偏移时难以有效学习等三个核心缺陷。
conclusion: 揭示了卷积解码器网络的频率表征理论局限，为改进网络设计提供了新的分析视角和优化方向。
search_text: Defects of Convolutional Decoder Networks in Frequency Representation 卷积解码器网络在频率表示方面的缺陷 In this paper, we prove the representation defects of a cascaded convolutional decoder network, considering the capacity of representing different frequency components of an input sample. We conduct the discrete Fourier transform on each channel of the feature map in an intermediate layer of the decoder network. Then, we extend the 2D circular convolution theorem to represent the forward and backward propagations through convolutional layers in the frequency domain. Based on this, we prove three defects in representing feature spectrums. First, we prove that the convolution operation, the zero-padding operation, and a set of other settings all make a convolutional decoder network more likely to weaken high-frequency components. Second, we prove that the upsampling operation generates a feature spectrum, in which strong signals repetitively appear at certain frequencies. Third, we prove that if the frequency components in the input sample and frequency components in the target output for regression have a small shift, then the decoder usually cannot be effectively learned. 在本文中，考虑到表示输入样本的不同频率分量的能力，我们证明了级联卷积解码器网络的表示缺陷。我们在解码器网络的中间层中对特征图的每个通道进行离散傅里叶变换。然后，我们扩展二维循环卷积定理来表示频域中通过卷积层的前向和后向传播。基于此，我们证明了表示特征谱的三个缺陷。首先，我们证明卷积运算、补零运算和一组其他设置都使卷积解码器网络更有可能削弱高频分量。其次，我们证明上采样操作会生成一个特征频谱，其中强信号在某些频率处重复出现。第三，我们证明，如果输入样本中的频率分量和用于回归的目标输出中的频率分量有小偏移，则解码器通常无法有效学习。 本文分析卷积解码器网络在频率表示中的缺陷，揭示其对不同频率成分的表征能力不足问题。 Ling Tang,Wen Shen,Zhanpeng Zhou,Yuefeng Chen,Quanshi Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Avinash Kori,Ben Glocker,Francesca Toni
title: Explaining Image Classification with Visual Debates
title_zh: 用视觉辩论解释图像分类
abstract: An effective way to obtain different perspectives on any given topic is by conducting a debate, where participants argue for and against the topic. Here, we propose a novel debate framework for understanding and explaining a continuous image classifier's reasoning for making a particular prediction by modeling it as a multiplayer sequential zero-sum debate game. The contrastive nature of our framework encourages players to learn to put forward diverse arguments during the debates, picking up the reasoning trails missed by their opponents and highlighting any uncertainties in the classifier. Specifically, in our proposed setup, players propose arguments, drawn from the classifier's discretized latent knowledge, to support or oppose the classifier's decision. The resulting Visual Debates collect supporting and opposing features from the discretized latent space of the classifier, serving as explanations for the internal reasoning of the classifier towards its predictions. We demonstrate and evaluate (a practical realization of) our Visual Debates on the geometric SHAPE and MNIST datasets and on the high-resolution animal faces (AFHQ) dataset, along standard evaluation metrics for explanations (i.e. faithfulness and completeness) and novel, bespoke metrics for visual debates as explanations (consensus and split ratio).
summary: An effective way to obtain different perspectives on any given topic is by conducting a debate, where participants argue for and against the topic. Here, we propose a novel debate framework for understanding and explaining a continuous image classifier's reasoning for making a particular prediction by modeling it as a multiplayer sequential zero-sum debate game. The contrastive nature of our framework encourages players to learn to put forward diverse arguments during the debates, picking up the reasoning trails missed by their opponents and highlighting any uncertainties in the classifier. Specifically, in our proposed setup, players propose arguments, drawn from the classifier's discretized latent knowledge, to support or oppose the classifier's decision. The resulting Visual Debates collect supporting and opposing features from the discretized latent space of the classifier, serving as explanations for the internal reasoning of the classifier towards its predictions. We demonstrate and evaluate (a practical realization of) our Visual Debates on the geometric SHAPE and MNIST datasets and on the high-resolution animal faces (AFHQ) dataset, along standard evaluation metrics for explanations (i.e. faithfulness and completeness) and novel, bespoke metrics for visual debates as explanations (consensus and split ratio).
abstract_zh: 获得对任何给定主题的不同观点的有效方法是进行辩论，参与者就该主题进行支持和反对。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的辩论框架，用于通过将连续图像分类器建模为多人顺序零和辩论游戏来理解和解释连续图像分类器做出特定预测的推理。我们框架的对比性质鼓励玩家学会在辩论中提出不同的论点，找出对手错过的推理线索，并强调分类器中的任何不确定性。具体来说，在我们提出的设置中，玩家根据分类器的离散潜在知识提出论据，以支持或反对分类器的决策。由此产生的视觉辩论从分类器的离散潜在空间中收集支持和反对的特征，作为分类器对其预测的内部推理的解释。我们在几何 SHAPE 和 MNIST 数据集以及高分辨率动物面孔 (AFHQ) 数据集上展示和评估（实际实现）我们的视觉辩论，以及解释的标准评估指标（即忠实性和完整性）以及作为解释的视觉辩论的新颖的定制指标（共识和分割比）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉辩论的框架，通过模拟多玩家零和博弈来解释图像分类器的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 传统解释方法难以全面揭示分类器的推理路径，而辩论机制能通过正反方论证挖掘多样化的推理依据及不确定性。
AI.method: 将分类器决策建模为多玩家序贯零和博弈，玩家从离散化潜在特征空间中提取论据支持或反对预测，生成正反方特征作为解释。
AI.result: 在SHAPE、MNIST和AFHQ数据集上验证，表明方法在忠实度、完整性及新定义的共识度、分裂率指标上表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 视觉辩论框架通过对比性学习增强了分类器解释的多样性与鲁棒性，为模型可解释性研究提供了新视角。

authors_text: Andrés Domínguez Hernández,Richard Owen,Dan Saattrup Nielsen,Ryan McConville
title: Addressing contingency in algorithmic (mis)information classification: Toward a responsible machine learning agenda
title_zh: 解决算法（错误）信息分类中的意外情况：迈向负责任的机器学习议程
comment: Andrés Domínguez Hernández, Richard Owen, Dan Saattrup Nielsen and Ryan McConville. 2023. Addressing contingency in algorithmic (mis)information classification: Toward a responsible machine learning agenda. Accepted in 2023 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '23), June 12-15, 2023, Chicago, United States of America. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 16 pages
comments: Andrés Domínguez Hernández, Richard Owen, Dan Saattrup Nielsen and Ryan McConville. 2023. Addressing contingency in algorithmic (mis)information classification: Toward a responsible machine learning agenda. Accepted in 2023 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT '23), June 12-15, 2023, Chicago, United States of America. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 16 pages
abstract: Machine learning (ML) enabled classification models are becoming increasingly popular for tackling the sheer volume and speed of online misinformation and other content that could be identified as harmful. In building these models, data scientists need to take a stance on the legitimacy, authoritativeness and objectivity of the sources of ``truth" used for model training and testing. This has political, ethical and epistemic implications which are rarely addressed in technical papers. Despite (and due to) their reported high accuracy and performance, ML-driven moderation systems have the potential to shape online public debate and create downstream negative impacts such as undue censorship and the reinforcing of false beliefs. Using collaborative ethnography and theoretical insights from social studies of science and expertise, we offer a critical analysis of the process of building ML models for (mis)information classification: we identify a series of algorithmic contingencies--key moments during model development that could lead to different future outcomes, uncertainty and harmful effects as these tools are deployed by social media platforms. We conclude by offering a tentative path toward reflexive and responsible development of ML tools for moderating misinformation and other harmful content online.
summary: Machine learning (ML) enabled classification models are becoming increasingly popular for tackling the sheer volume and speed of online misinformation and other content that could be identified as harmful. In building these models, data scientists need to take a stance on the legitimacy, authoritativeness and objectivity of the sources of ``truth" used for model training and testing. This has political, ethical and epistemic implications which are rarely addressed in technical papers. Despite (and due to) their reported high accuracy and performance, ML-driven moderation systems have the potential to shape online public debate and create downstream negative impacts such as undue censorship and the reinforcing of false beliefs. Using collaborative ethnography and theoretical insights from social studies of science and expertise, we offer a critical analysis of the process of building ML models for (mis)information classification: we identify a series of algorithmic contingencies--key moments during model development that could lead to different future outcomes, uncertainty and harmful effects as these tools are deployed by social media platforms. We conclude by offering a tentative path toward reflexive and responsible development of ML tools for moderating misinformation and other harmful content online.
abstract_zh: 支持机器学习 (ML) 的分类模型越来越受欢迎，用于解决在线错误信息和其他可能被识别为有害的内容的数量和速度。在构建这些模型时，数据科学家需要对用于模型训练和测试的“真相”来源的合法性、权威性和客观性采取立场。这具有政治、伦理和认知方面的影响，而这些影响很少在技术论文中得到解决。尽管（并且由于）其报道的高精度和性能，机器学习驱动的调节系统有可能塑造在线公共辩论并产生下游负面影响，例如不当审查和强化错误信念。使用协作民族志和根据科学和专业知识的社会研究的理论见解，我们对构建用于（错误）信息分类的机器学习模型的过程进行了批判性分析：我们确定了一系列算法偶发事件——模型开发过程中的关键时刻，当这些工具被社交媒体平台部署时，可能会导致不同的未来结果、不确定性和有害影响。我们最后提供了一条试探性的路径，以反思和负责任地开发机器学习工具，以调节在线错误信息和其他有害内容。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了机器学习模型在在线虚假信息分类中的潜在问题，并提出负责任的开发路径。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习驱动的内容审核系统可能因数据来源的合法性、权威性和客观性问题，导致政治、伦理和知识论层面的争议，需关注其对公共讨论的负面影响。
AI.method: 结合协作民族志方法与科学社会学理论，批判性分析机器学习模型构建过程中的关键不确定性环节。
AI.result: 识别出模型开发中可能导致不同未来结果的算法偶然性，揭示其部署后可能引发的审查过度和错误信念强化等风险。
AI.conclusion: 提出通过反思性实践推动机器学习工具负责任发展的初步框架，以应对虚假信息治理中的伦理挑战。

We conclude by offering a tentative path toward reflexive and responsible development of ML tools for moderating misinformation and other harmful content online. 支持机器学习 (ML) 的分类模型越来越受欢迎，用于解决在线错误信息和其他可能被识别为有害的内容的数量和速度。在构建这些模型时，数据科学家需要对用于模型训练和测试的“真相”来源的合法性、权威性和客观性采取立场。这具有政治、伦理和认知方面的影响，而这些影响很少在技术论文中得到解决。尽管（并且由于）其报道的高精度和性能，机器学习驱动的调节系统有可能塑造在线公共辩论并产生下游负面影响，例如不当审查和强化错误信念。使用协作民族志和根据科学和专业知识的社会研究的理论见解，我们对构建用于（错误）信息分类的机器学习模型的过程进行了批判性分析：我们确定了一系列算法偶发事件——模型开发过程中的关键时刻，当这些工具被社交媒体平台部署时，可能会导致不同的未来结果、不确定性和有害影响。我们最后提供了一条试探性的路径，以反思和负责任地开发机器学习工具，以调节在线错误信息和其他有害内容。 本文分析了机器学习模型在在线虚假信息分类中的潜在问题，并提出负责任的开发路径。 Andrés Domínguez Hernández,Richard Owen,Dan Saattrup Nielsen,Ryan McConville cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SI

authors_text: Chunpai Wang,Shaghayegh Sahebi,Siqian Zhao,Peter Brusilovsky,Laura O. Moraes
title: Knowledge Tracing for Complex Problem Solving: Granular Rank-Based Tensor Factorization
title_zh: 解决复杂问题的知识追踪：基于粒度等级的张量分解
abstract: Knowledge Tracing (KT), which aims to model student knowledge level and predict their performance, is one of the most important applications of user modeling. Modern KT approaches model and maintain an up-to-date state of student knowledge over a set of course concepts according to students' historical performance in attempting the problems. However, KT approaches were designed to model knowledge by observing relatively small problem-solving steps in Intelligent Tutoring Systems. While these approaches were applied successfully to model student knowledge by observing student solutions for simple problems, they do not perform well for modeling complex problem solving in students.M ost importantly, current models assume that all problem attempts are equally valuable in quantifying current student knowledge.However, for complex problems that involve many concepts at the same time, this assumption is deficient. In this paper, we argue that not all attempts are equivalently important in discovering students' knowledge state, and some attempts can be summarized together to better represent student performance. We propose a novel student knowledge tracing approach, Granular RAnk based TEnsor factorization (GRATE), that dynamically selects student attempts that can be aggregated while predicting students' performance in problems and discovering the concepts presented in them. Our experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate the improved performance of GRATE, compared to the state-of-the-art baselines, in the task of student performance prediction. Our further analysis shows that attempt aggregation eliminates the unnecessary fluctuations from students' discovered knowledge states and helps in discovering complex latent concepts in the problems.
summary: Knowledge Tracing (KT), which aims to model student knowledge level and predict their performance, is one of the most important applications of user modeling. Modern KT approaches model and maintain an up-to-date state of student knowledge over a set of course concepts according to students' historical performance in attempting the problems. However, KT approaches were designed to model knowledge by observing relatively small problem-solving steps in Intelligent Tutoring Systems. While these approaches were applied successfully to model student knowledge by observing student solutions for simple problems, they do not perform well for modeling complex problem solving in students.M ost importantly, current models assume that all problem attempts are equally valuable in quantifying current student knowledge.However, for complex problems that involve many concepts at the same time, this assumption is deficient. In this paper, we argue that not all attempts are equivalently important in discovering students' knowledge state, and some attempts can be summarized together to better represent student performance. We propose a novel student knowledge tracing approach, Granular RAnk based TEnsor factorization (GRATE), that dynamically selects student attempts that can be aggregated while predicting students' performance in problems and discovering the concepts presented in them. Our experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate the improved performance of GRATE, compared to the state-of-the-art baselines, in the task of student performance prediction. Our further analysis shows that attempt aggregation eliminates the unnecessary fluctuations from students' discovered knowledge states and helps in discovering complex latent concepts in the problems.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪（KT）旨在对学生知识水平进行建模并预测其表现，是用户建模最重要的应用之一。现代 KT 方法根据学生在尝试问题时的历史表现，对一组课程概念的学生知识进行建模并保持最新状态。然而，KT 方法旨在通过观察智能辅导系统中相对较小的问题解决步骤来对知识进行建模。虽然这些方法通过观察学生对简单问题的解决方案成功地应用于建模学生知识，但它们在建模学生复杂问题解决方面表现不佳。最重要的是，当前模型假设所有问题尝试在量化当前学生知识方面具有同等价值。然而，对于同时涉及许多概念的复杂问题，这种假设是有缺陷的。在本文中，我们认为并非所有尝试对于发现学生的知识状态都同等重要，并且可以将一些尝试总结在一起以更好地代表学生的表现。我们提出了一种新颖的学生知识追踪方法，即基于粒度排名的 TEnsor 分解 (GRATE)，该方法动态选择可以聚合的学生尝试，同时预测学生在问题中的表现并发现其中提出的概念。我们对三个真实世界数据集的实验表明，与最先进的基线相比，GRATE 在学生成绩预测任务中的性能得到了改善。我们的进一步分析表明，尝试聚合消除了学生发现的知识状态中不必要的波动，并有助于发现问题中复杂的潜在概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于细粒度排名的张量分解方法GRATE，用于解决复杂问题解决场景下的知识追踪问题，通过动态聚合学生问题尝试来提升性能预测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有知识追踪方法假设所有问题尝试对量化学生知识状态同等重要，但复杂问题涉及多概念交互，该假设导致模型无法有效捕捉知识状态变化。
AI.method: 设计GRATE模型，采用张量分解技术动态筛选可聚合的学生问题尝试，在预测学生表现的同时发现问题中的潜在概念结构。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上实验表明，GRATE相较现有方法显著提升预测性能，且尝试聚合有效减少了知识状态波动并促进复杂概念发现。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚合关键问题尝试，GRATE有效解决了复杂问题场景下的知识追踪难题，验证了细粒度分析在教育建模中的重要性。

authors_text: Jungbae Park,Jinyoung Kim,Soonwoo Kwon,Sang Wan Lee
title: SAICL: Student Modelling with Interaction-level Auxiliary Contrastive Tasks for Knowledge Tracing and Dropout Prediction
title_zh: SAICL：使用交互级辅助对比任务进行学生建模，用于知识追踪和辍学预测
abstract: Knowledge tracing and dropout prediction are crucial for online education to estimate students' knowledge states or to prevent dropout rates. While traditional systems interacting with students suffered from data sparsity and overfitting, recent sample-level contrastive learning helps to alleviate this issue. One major limitation of sample-level approaches is that they regard students' behavior interaction sequences as a bundle, so they often fail to encode temporal contexts and track their dynamic changes, making it hard to find optimal representations for knowledge tracing and dropout prediction. To apply temporal context within the sequence, this study introduces a novel student modeling framework, SAICL: \textbf{s}tudent modeling with \textbf{a}uxiliary \textbf{i}nteraction-level \textbf{c}ontrastive \textbf{l}earning. In detail, SAICL can utilize both proposed self-supervised/supervised interaction-level contrastive objectives: MilCPC (\textbf{M}ulti-\textbf{I}nteraction-\textbf{L}evel \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{P}redictive \textbf{C}oding) and SupCPC (\textbf{Sup}ervised \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{P}redictive \textbf{C}oding). While previous sample-level contrastive methods for student modeling are highly dependent on data augmentation methods, the SAICL is free of data augmentation while showing better performance in both self-supervised and supervised settings. By combining cross-entropy with contrastive objectives, the proposed SAICL achieved comparable knowledge tracing and dropout prediction performance with other state-of-art models without compromising inference costs.
summary: Knowledge tracing and dropout prediction are crucial for online education to estimate students' knowledge states or to prevent dropout rates. While traditional systems interacting with students suffered from data sparsity and overfitting, recent sample-level contrastive learning helps to alleviate this issue. One major limitation of sample-level approaches is that they regard students' behavior interaction sequences as a bundle, so they often fail to encode temporal contexts and track their dynamic changes, making it hard to find optimal representations for knowledge tracing and dropout prediction. To apply temporal context within the sequence, this study introduces a novel student modeling framework, SAICL: \textbf{s}tudent modeling with \textbf{a}uxiliary \textbf{i}nteraction-level \textbf{c}ontrastive \textbf{l}earning. In detail, SAICL can utilize both proposed self-supervised/supervised interaction-level contrastive objectives: MilCPC (\textbf{M}ulti-\textbf{I}nteraction-\textbf{L}evel \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{P}redictive \textbf{C}oding) and SupCPC (\textbf{Sup}ervised \textbf{C}ontrastive \textbf{P}redictive \textbf{C}oding). While previous sample-level contrastive methods for student modeling are highly dependent on data augmentation methods, the SAICL is free of data augmentation while showing better performance in both self-supervised and supervised settings. By combining cross-entropy with contrastive objectives, the proposed SAICL achieved comparable knowledge tracing and dropout prediction performance with other state-of-art models without compromising inference costs.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪和辍学预测对于在线教育评估学生的知识状态或防止辍学率至关重要。虽然与学生交互的传统系统遭受数据稀疏和过度拟合的问题，但最近的样本级对比学习有助于缓解这个问题。样本级方法的一个主要限制是它们将学生的行为交互序列视为一个捆绑，因此它们通常无法对时间上下文进行编码并跟踪其动态变化，从而很难找到知识追踪和辍学预测的最佳表示。为了在序列中应用时间上下文，本研究引入了一种新颖的学生建模框架，SAICL：\textbf{s}学生建模，具有\textbf{a}辅助\textbf{i}交互级别\textbf{c}对比\textbf{l}收入。具体来说，SAICL 可以利用所提出的自监督/监督交互级对比目标：MilCPC (\textbf{M}ulti-\textbf{I}nteraction-\textbf{L}evel \textbf{C}contrastive \textbf{P}redictive \textbf{C}oding) 和 SupCPC (\textbf{Sup}ervised) \textbf{C}对比 \textbf{P}形容词 \textbf{C}oding)。虽然以前用于学生建模的样本级对比方法高度依赖于数据增强方法，但 SAICL 无需数据增强，同时在自监督和监督环境中都表现出更好的性能。通过将交叉熵与对比目标相结合，所提出的 SAICL 在不影响推理成本的情况下实现了与其他最先进模型相当的知识追踪和丢失预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAICL框架，通过交互级对比学习改进知识追踪和辍学预测模型。
AI.motivation: 传统方法因数据稀疏性和过拟合问题效果受限，而现有样本级对比学习无法有效捕捉学生行为序列的时序动态变化。
AI.method: 设计SAICL框架，包含自监督的MilCPC和监督的SupCPC两种交互级对比目标，无需数据增强即可建模时序上下文。
AI.result: 在自监督和监督设置下均取得与先进模型相当的知识追踪和辍学预测效果，且推理成本无增加。
AI.conclusion: SAICL通过交互级对比学习有效捕捉时序动态，在保持效率的同时提升了学生建模性能。
