search_text: Weakly Supervised Face Naming with Symmetry-Enhanced Contrastive Loss 具有对称性增强对比损失的弱监督人脸命名 We revisit the weakly supervised cross-modal face-name alignment task; that is, given an image and a caption, we label the faces in the image with the names occurring in the caption. Whereas past approaches have learned the latent alignment between names and faces by uncertainty reasoning over a set of images and their respective captions, in this paper, we rely on appropriate loss functions to learn the alignments in a neural network setting and propose SECLA and SECLA-B. SECLA is a Symmetry-Enhanced Contrastive Learning-based Alignment model that can effectively maximize the similarity scores between corresponding faces and names in a weakly supervised fashion. A variation of the model, SECLA-B, learns to align names and faces as humans do, that is, learning from easy to hard cases to further increase the performance of SECLA. More specifically, SECLA-B applies a two-stage learning framework: (1) Training the model on an easy subset with a few names and faces in each image-caption pair. (2) Leveraging the known pairs of names and faces from the easy cases using a bootstrapping strategy with additional loss to prevent forgetting and learning new alignments at the same time. We achieve state-of-the-art results for both the augmented Labeled Faces in the Wild dataset and the Celebrity Together dataset. In addition, we believe that our methods can be adapted to other multimodal news understanding tasks. 我们重新审视弱监督的跨模态人脸名称对齐任务；也就是说，给定图像和标题，我们用标题中出现的名称来标记图像中的面孔。过去的方法通过对一组图像及其各自的标题进行不确定性推理来学习姓名和面孔之间的潜在对齐，而在本文中，我们依靠适当的损失函数来学习神经网络设置中的对齐，并提出 SECLA 和 SECLA-B。 SECLA 是一种基于对称增强对比学习的对齐模型，可以以弱监督的方式有效地最大化相应面孔和姓名之间的相似度分数。该模型的变体 SECLA-B 学习像人类一样对齐姓名和面孔，即从简单到困难的情况进行学习，以进一步提高 SECLA 的性能。更具体地说，SECLA-B 应用了一个两阶段的学习框架：（1）在每个图像标题对中包含一些名字和面孔的简单子集上训练模型。 （2）利用简单案例中已知的姓名和面孔对，使用具有额外损失的引导策略来防止遗忘，同时学习新的对齐方式。我们在 Wild 数据集中的增强标签面孔和 Celebrity Together 数据集中都取得了最先进的结果。此外，我们相信我们的方法可以适应其他多模式新闻理解任务。 本文提出了一种弱监督的跨模态人脸命名方法，通过对称增强对比损失函数（SECLA及其改进版SECLA-B）实现图像中人脸与标题中名称的对齐。 Tingyu Qu,Tinne Tuytelaars,Marie-Francine Moens cs.CV

authors_text: Pan Li,Peizhuo Lv,Shenchen Zhu,Ruigang Liang,Kai Chen
title: A Novel Membership Inference Attack against Dynamic Neural Networks by Utilizing Policy Networks Information
title_zh: 利用策略网络信息对动态神经网络进行新型成员推理攻击
abstract: Unlike traditional static deep neural networks (DNNs), dynamic neural networks (NNs) adjust their structures or parameters to different inputs to guarantee accuracy and computational efficiency. Meanwhile, it has been an emerging research area in deep learning recently. Although traditional static DNNs are vulnerable to the membership inference attack (MIA) , which aims to infer whether a particular point was used to train the model, little is known about how such an attack performs on the dynamic NNs. In this paper, we propose a novel MI attack against dynamic NNs, leveraging the unique policy networks mechanism of dynamic NNs to increase the effectiveness of membership inference. We conducted extensive experiments using two dynamic NNs, i.e., GaterNet, BlockDrop, on four mainstream image classification tasks, i.e., CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, STL-10, and GTSRB. The evaluation results demonstrate that the control-flow information can significantly promote the MIA. Based on backbone-finetuning and information-fusion, our method achieves better results than baseline attack and traditional attack using intermediate information.
summary: Unlike traditional static deep neural networks (DNNs), dynamic neural networks (NNs) adjust their structures or parameters to different inputs to guarantee accuracy and computational efficiency. Meanwhile, it has been an emerging research area in deep learning recently. Although traditional static DNNs are vulnerable to the membership inference attack (MIA) , which aims to infer whether a particular point was used to train the model, little is known about how such an attack performs on the dynamic NNs. In this paper, we propose a novel MI attack against dynamic NNs, leveraging the unique policy networks mechanism of dynamic NNs to increase the effectiveness of membership inference. We conducted extensive experiments using two dynamic NNs, i.e., GaterNet, BlockDrop, on four mainstream image classification tasks, i.e., CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, STL-10, and GTSRB. The evaluation results demonstrate that the control-flow information can significantly promote the MIA. Based on backbone-finetuning and information-fusion, our method achieves better results than baseline attack and traditional attack using intermediate information.
abstract_zh: 与传统的静态深度神经网络（DNN）不同，动态神经网络（NN）根据不同的输入调整其结构或参数，以保证准确性和计算效率。同时，它也是近年来深度学习的一个新兴研究领域。尽管传统的静态 DNN 很容易受到成员推理攻击 (MIA) 的攻击，该攻击旨在推断特定点是否用于训练模型，但人们对这种攻击如何在动态 NN 上执行却知之甚少。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对动态神经网络的新型 MI 攻击，利用动态神经网络独特的策略网络机制来提高成员推理的有效性。我们使用两个动态神经网络（即 GaterNet、BlockDrop）在四个主流图像分类任务（即 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、STL-10 和 GTSRB）上进行了广泛的实验。评估结果表明控制流信息可以显着促进MIA。基于主干微调和信息融合，我们的方法比基线攻击和使用中间信息的传统攻击取得了更好的效果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用策略网络信息的新会员推理攻击方法，针对动态神经网络。
AI.motivation: 传统静态DNN易受会员推理攻击，但动态NNs在此领域的研究不足，需探索其攻击方法。
AI.method: 利用动态NNs的策略网络机制，结合骨干网络微调与信息融合技术，提升攻击效果。
AI.result: 实验显示控制流信息显著提升MIA效果，方法在四个图像分类任务中优于基线和传统攻击。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效，揭示动态NNs在隐私安全上的潜在风险，需进一步研究防御措施。

authors_text: Yash Goel,Narunas Vaskevicius,Luigi Palmieri,Nived Chebrolu,Cyrill Stachniss
title: Predicting Dense and Context-aware Cost Maps for Semantic Robot Navigation
title_zh: 预测语义机器人导航的密集和上下文感知成本图
comment: Accepted at IROS PNARUDE(Perception and Navigation for Autonomous Robotics in Unstructured and Dynamic Environments) Workshop 2022
comments: Accepted at IROS PNARUDE(Perception and Navigation for Autonomous Robotics in Unstructured and Dynamic Environments) Workshop 2022
abstract: We investigate the task of object goal navigation in unknown environments where the target is specified by a semantic label (e.g. find a couch). Such a navigation task is especially challenging as it requires understanding of semantic context in diverse settings. Most of the prior work tackles this problem under the assumption of a discrete action policy whereas we present an approach with continuous control which brings it closer to real world applications. We propose a deep neural network architecture and loss function to predict dense cost maps that implicitly contain semantic context and guide the robot towards the semantic goal. We also present a novel way of fusing mid-level visual representations in our architecture to provide additional semantic cues for cost map prediction. The estimated cost maps are then used by a sampling-based model predictive controller (MPC) for generating continuous robot actions. The preliminary experiments suggest that the cost maps generated by our network are suitable for the MPC and can guide the agent to the semantic goal more efficiently than a baseline approach. The results also indicate the importance of mid-level representations for navigation by improving the success rate by 7 percentage points.
summary: We investigate the task of object goal navigation in unknown environments where the target is specified by a semantic label (e.g. find a couch). Such a navigation task is especially challenging as it requires understanding of semantic context in diverse settings. Most of the prior work tackles this problem under the assumption of a discrete action policy whereas we present an approach with continuous control which brings it closer to real world applications. We propose a deep neural network architecture and loss function to predict dense cost maps that implicitly contain semantic context and guide the robot towards the semantic goal. We also present a novel way of fusing mid-level visual representations in our architecture to provide additional semantic cues for cost map prediction. The estimated cost maps are then used by a sampling-based model predictive controller (MPC) for generating continuous robot actions. The preliminary experiments suggest that the cost maps generated by our network are suitable for the MPC and can guide the agent to the semantic goal more efficiently than a baseline approach. The results also indicate the importance of mid-level representations for navigation by improving the success rate by 7 percentage points.
abstract_zh: 我们研究未知环境中的目标目标导航任务，其中目标由语义标签指定（例如找到沙发）。这种导航任务尤其具有挑战性，因为它需要理解不同设置中的语义上下文。大多数先前的工作都是在离散行动策略的假设下解决这个问题的，而我们提出了一种连续控制的方法，使其更接近现实世界的应用。我们提出了一种深度神经网络架构和损失函数来预测隐式包含语义上下文的密集成本图，并引导机器人实现语义目标。我们还提出了一种在我们的架构中融合中层视觉表示的新颖方法，为成本图预测提供额外的语义线索。然后，基于采样的模型预测控制器 (MPC) 使用估计的成本图来生成连续的机器人动作。初步实验表明，我们的网络生成的成本图适合 MPC，并且可以比基线方法更有效地引导代理实现语义目标。结果还表明中级表示对于导航的重要性，成功率提高了 7 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在未知环境中基于语义标签（如找到沙发）的机器人导航任务，提出了一种预测密集且包含语义上下文的成本图方法，以指导机器人连续控制导航。
AI.motivation: 传统方法多采用离散动作策略，难以满足实际应用中连续控制的需求。同时，现有方法对语义上下文的理解不足，影响导航效率。
AI.method: 设计深度神经网络架构和损失函数预测包含语义信息的成本图，融合中层视觉表示以增强语义线索，并结合采样型模型预测控制器（MPC）生成连续机器人动作。
AI.result: 实验表明，生成的成本图能有效指导MPC控制器，使机器人更高效地到达目标，成功率比基线方法提升7个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合中层视觉表示和预测语义成本图，显著提升了语义机器人导航的效率和成功率，验证了连续控制策略在实际应用中的有效性。

authors_text: Theo W. Costain,Victor Adrian Prisacariu
title: Approximating Continuous Convolutions for Deep Network Compression
title_zh: 深度网络压缩的近似连续卷积
abstract: We present ApproxConv, a novel method for compressing the layers of a convolutional neural network. Reframing conventional discrete convolution as continuous convolution of parametrised functions over space, we use functional approximations to capture the essential structures of CNN filters with fewer parameters than conventional operations. Our method is able to reduce the size of trained CNN layers requiring only a small amount of fine-tuning. We show that our method is able to compress existing deep network models by half whilst losing only 1.86% accuracy. Further, we demonstrate that our method is compatible with other compression methods like quantisation allowing for further reductions in model size.
summary: We present ApproxConv, a novel method for compressing the layers of a convolutional neural network. Reframing conventional discrete convolution as continuous convolution of parametrised functions over space, we use functional approximations to capture the essential structures of CNN filters with fewer parameters than conventional operations. Our method is able to reduce the size of trained CNN layers requiring only a small amount of fine-tuning. We show that our method is able to compress existing deep network models by half whilst losing only 1.86% accuracy. Further, we demonstrate that our method is compatible with other compression methods like quantisation allowing for further reductions in model size.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ApproxConv，一种压缩卷积神经网络层的新颖方法。将传统的离散卷积重新定义为参数化函数在空间上的连续卷积，我们使用函数近似来捕获 CNN 滤波器的基本结构，其参数比传统操作更少。我们的方法能够减少训练后的 CNN 层的大小，只需要少量的微调。我们表明，我们的方法能够将现有深度网络模型压缩一半，同时仅损失 1.86% 的准确度。此外，我们证明我们的方法与其他压缩方法（例如量化）兼容，可以进一步减小模型大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过将离散卷积转化为连续卷积逼近的方法，实现深度神经网络的高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络参数量大，难以部署于资源受限设备，需寻找在保持精度前提下显著压缩模型的方法。
AI.method: 提出ApproxConv方法，将离散卷积重构为参数化函数的连续卷积，通过函数逼近技术以更少参数表征滤波器结构，并兼容量化等其他压缩技术。
AI.result: 在保持仅1.86%精度损失的前提下，成功将主流深度模型压缩至原尺寸的一半，且可与其他压缩方法叠加使用。
AI.conclusion: ApproxConv为深度网络压缩提供了新思路，在参数效率与兼容性方面优于现有方法，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Wenqi Yang,Guanying Chen,Chaofeng Chen,Zhenfang Chen,Kwan-Yee K. Wong
title: S$^3$-NeRF: Neural Reflectance Field from Shading and Shadow under a Single Viewpoint
title_zh: S$^3$-NeRF：单视点下阴影和阴影的神经反射场
abstract: In this paper, we address the "dual problem" of multi-view scene reconstruction in which we utilize single-view images captured under different point lights to learn a neural scene representation. Different from existing single-view methods which can only recover a 2.5D scene representation (i.e., a normal / depth map for the visible surface), our method learns a neural reflectance field to represent the 3D geometry and BRDFs of a scene. Instead of relying on multi-view photo-consistency, our method exploits two information-rich monocular cues, namely shading and shadow, to infer scene geometry. Experiments on multiple challenging datasets show that our method is capable of recovering 3D geometry, including both visible and invisible parts, of a scene from single-view images. Thanks to the neural reflectance field representation, our method is robust to depth discontinuities. It supports applications like novel-view synthesis and relighting. Our code and model can be found at https://ywq.github.io/s3nerf.
summary: In this paper, we address the "dual problem" of multi-view scene reconstruction in which we utilize single-view images captured under different point lights to learn a neural scene representation. Different from existing single-view methods which can only recover a 2.5D scene representation (i.e., a normal / depth map for the visible surface), our method learns a neural reflectance field to represent the 3D geometry and BRDFs of a scene. Instead of relying on multi-view photo-consistency, our method exploits two information-rich monocular cues, namely shading and shadow, to infer scene geometry. Experiments on multiple challenging datasets show that our method is capable of recovering 3D geometry, including both visible and invisible parts, of a scene from single-view images. Thanks to the neural reflectance field representation, our method is robust to depth discontinuities. It supports applications like novel-view synthesis and relighting. Our code and model can be found at https://ywq.github.io/s3nerf.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了多视图场景重建的“对偶问题”，其中我们利用在不同点光源下捕获的单视图图像来学习神经场景表示。与只能恢复 2.5D 场景表示（即可见表面的法线/深度图）的现有单视图方法不同，我们的方法学习神经反射场来表示场景的 3D 几何和 BRDF。我们的方法不依赖多视图照片一致性，而是利用两种信息丰富的单眼线索，即阴影和阴影来推断场景几何形状。对多个具有挑战性的数据集的实验表明，我们的方法能够从单视图图像中恢复场景的 3D 几何形状，包括可见和不可见的部分。由于神经反射场表示，我们的方法对于深度不连续性具有鲁棒性。它支持小说视图合成和重新照明等应用程序。我们的代码和模型可以在 https://ywq.github.io/s3nerf 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出S$^3$-NeRF方法，通过单视角下不同点光源的图像学习神经反射场，实现对场景3D几何和BRDF的重建。
AI.motivation: 传统单视角方法仅能恢复2.5D表面信息，无法获取完整3D几何与材质。本文旨在通过单视角图像中的阴影与光照信息，突破多视角重建的限制。
AI.method: 利用单视角下不同点光源产生的阴影与光照变化作为信息源，通过神经反射场（NeRF）同时建模场景几何与材质属性，无需依赖多视角光一致性约束。
AI.result: 在多个复杂数据集上验证了方法有效性，可恢复场景可见与不可见区域的3D几何，对深度不连续区域具有鲁棒性，支持新视角合成与重光照应用。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过单视角阴影与光照信息可有效重建完整3D场景，为单视角重建提供了新思路并拓展了应用场景。

authors_text: Gaurav Kumar Nayak,Ruchit Rawal,Anirban Chakraborty
title: DE-CROP: Data-efficient Certified Robustness for Pretrained Classifiers
title_zh: DE-CROP：预训练分类器的数据高效鲁棒性认证
abstract: Certified defense using randomized smoothing is a popular technique to provide robustness guarantees for deep neural networks against l2 adversarial attacks. Existing works use this technique to provably secure a pretrained non-robust model by training a custom denoiser network on entire training data. However, access to the training set may be restricted to a handful of data samples due to constraints such as high transmission cost and the proprietary nature of the data. Thus, we formulate a novel problem of "how to certify the robustness of pretrained models using only a few training samples". We observe that training the custom denoiser directly using the existing techniques on limited samples yields poor certification. To overcome this, our proposed approach (DE-CROP) generates class-boundary and interpolated samples corresponding to each training sample, ensuring high diversity in the feature space of the pretrained classifier. We train the denoiser by maximizing the similarity between the denoised output of the generated sample and the original training sample in the classifier's logit space. We also perform distribution level matching using domain discriminator and maximum mean discrepancy that yields further benefit. In white box setup, we obtain significant improvements over the baseline on multiple benchmark datasets and also report similar performance under the challenging black box setup.
summary: Certified defense using randomized smoothing is a popular technique to provide robustness guarantees for deep neural networks against l2 adversarial attacks. Existing works use this technique to provably secure a pretrained non-robust model by training a custom denoiser network on entire training data. However, access to the training set may be restricted to a handful of data samples due to constraints such as high transmission cost and the proprietary nature of the data. Thus, we formulate a novel problem of "how to certify the robustness of pretrained models using only a few training samples". We observe that training the custom denoiser directly using the existing techniques on limited samples yields poor certification. To overcome this, our proposed approach (DE-CROP) generates class-boundary and interpolated samples corresponding to each training sample, ensuring high diversity in the feature space of the pretrained classifier. We train the denoiser by maximizing the similarity between the denoised output of the generated sample and the original training sample in the classifier's logit space. We also perform distribution level matching using domain discriminator and maximum mean discrepancy that yields further benefit. In white box setup, we obtain significant improvements over the baseline on multiple benchmark datasets and also report similar performance under the challenging black box setup.
abstract_zh: 使用随机平滑的认证防御是一种流行的技术，可为深度神经网络提供针对 L2 对抗性攻击的鲁棒性保证。现有的工作使用这种技术通过在整个训练数据上训练自定义降噪器网络来证明预训练的非鲁棒模型的安全。然而，由于高传输成本和数据的专有性质等限制，对训练集的访问可能仅限于少数数据样本。因此，我们提出了一个新问题“如何仅使用少量训练样本来证明预训练模型的鲁棒性”。我们观察到，直接使用现有技术在有限的样本上训练定制降噪器会产生较差的认证。为了克服这个问题，我们提出的方法（DE-CROP）生成与每个训练样本相对应的类边界和插值样本，确保预训练分类器的特征空间具有高度多样性。我们通过最大化生成样本的去噪输出与分类器的 logit 空间中的原始训练样本之间的相似性来训练去噪器。我们还使用域鉴别器和最大平均差异来执行分布级别匹配，从而产生进一步的好处。在白盒设置中，我们在多个基准数据集上获得了比基线显着的改进，并且在具有挑战性的黑盒设置下也报告了类似的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出DE-CROP方法，在少量训练样本下认证预训练分类器的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有随机平滑技术需完整训练集，但实际应用中可能仅能获取少量样本，需解决少量样本下的鲁棒性认证问题
AI.method: 生成类别边界与插值样本增强特征多样性，通过最大化去噪输出与原始样本在logit空间的相似性训练去噪器，并结合领域判别器与最大均值差异进行分布匹配
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集的白盒测试中显著优于基线方法，黑盒设置下表现相近
AI.conclusion: DE-CROP有效解决了少量样本下预训练模型的鲁棒性认证问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案

tldr: 提出DE-CROP方法，在少量训练样本下认证预训练分类器的鲁棒性
motivation: 现有随机平滑技术需完整训练集，但实际应用中可能仅能获取少量样本，需解决少量样本下的鲁棒性认证问题
method: 生成类别边界与插值样本增强特征多样性，通过最大化去噪输出与原始样本在logit空间的相似性训练去噪器，并结合领域判别器与最大均值差异进行分布匹配
result: 在多个基准数据集的白盒测试中显著优于基线方法，黑盒设置下表现相近
conclusion: DE-CROP有效解决了少量样本下预训练模型的鲁棒性认证问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案
search_text: DE-CROP: Data-efficient Certified Robustness for Pretrained Classifiers DE-CROP：预训练分类器的数据高效鲁棒性认证 Certified defense using randomized smoothing is a popular technique to provide robustness guarantees for deep neural networks against l2 adversarial attacks. Existing works use this technique to provably secure a pretrained non-robust model by training a custom denoiser network on entire training data. However, access to the training set may be restricted to a handful of data samples due to constraints such as high transmission cost and the proprietary nature of the data. Thus, we formulate a novel problem of "how to certify the robustness of pretrained models using only a few training samples". We observe that training the custom denoiser directly using the existing techniques on limited samples yields poor certification. To overcome this, our proposed approach (DE-CROP) generates class-boundary and interpolated samples corresponding to each training sample, ensuring high diversity in the feature space of the pretrained classifier. We train the denoiser by maximizing the similarity between the denoised output of the generated sample and the original training sample in the classifier's logit space. We also perform distribution level matching using domain discriminator and maximum mean discrepancy that yields further benefit. In white box setup, we obtain significant improvements over the baseline on multiple benchmark datasets and also report similar performance under the challenging black box setup. 使用随机平滑的认证防御是一种流行的技术，可为深度神经网络提供针对 L2 对抗性攻击的鲁棒性保证。现有的工作使用这种技术通过在整个训练数据上训练自定义降噪器网络来证明预训练的非鲁棒模型的安全。然而，由于高传输成本和数据的专有性质等限制，对训练集的访问可能仅限于少数数据样本。因此，我们提出了一个新问题“如何仅使用少量训练样本来证明预训练模型的鲁棒性”。我们观察到，直接使用现有技术在有限的样本上训练定制降噪器会产生较差的认证。为了克服这个问题，我们提出的方法（DE-CROP）生成与每个训练样本相对应的类边界和插值样本，确保预训练分类器的特征空间具有高度多样性。我们通过最大化生成样本的去噪输出与分类器的 logit 空间中的原始训练样本之间的相似性来训练去噪器。我们还使用域鉴别器和最大平均差异来执行分布级别匹配，从而产生进一步的好处。在白盒设置中，我们在多个基准数据集上获得了比基线显着的改进，并且在具有挑战性的黑盒设置下也报告了类似的性能。 提出DE-CROP方法，在少量训练样本下认证预训练分类器的鲁棒性 Gaurav Kumar Nayak,Ruchit Rawal,Anirban Chakraborty cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Suman Ghosh,Guillermo Gallego
title: Event-based Stereo Depth Estimation from Ego-motion using Ray Density Fusion
title_zh: 使用射线密度融合根据自我运动进行基于事件的立体深度估计
abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that mimic the human retina by responding to brightness changes in the scene. They generate asynchronous spike-based outputs at microsecond resolution, providing advantages over traditional cameras like high dynamic range, low motion blur and power efficiency. Most event-based stereo methods attempt to exploit the high temporal resolution of the camera and the simultaneity of events across cameras to establish matches and estimate depth. By contrast, this work investigates how to estimate depth from stereo event cameras without explicit data association by fusing back-projected ray densities, and demonstrates its effectiveness on head-mounted camera data, which is recorded in an egocentric fashion. Code and video are available at https://github.com/tub-rip/dvs_mcemvs
summary: Event cameras are bio-inspired sensors that mimic the human retina by responding to brightness changes in the scene. They generate asynchronous spike-based outputs at microsecond resolution, providing advantages over traditional cameras like high dynamic range, low motion blur and power efficiency. Most event-based stereo methods attempt to exploit the high temporal resolution of the camera and the simultaneity of events across cameras to establish matches and estimate depth. By contrast, this work investigates how to estimate depth from stereo event cameras without explicit data association by fusing back-projected ray densities, and demonstrates its effectiveness on head-mounted camera data, which is recorded in an egocentric fashion. Code and video are available at https://github.com/tub-rip/dvs_mcemvs
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机是仿生传感器，通过响应场景中的亮度变化来模仿人类视网膜。它们以微秒分辨率生成基于异步尖峰的输出，与传统相机相比具有高动态范围、低运动模糊和功效等优势。大多数基于事件的立体方法试图利用相机的高时间分辨率和跨相机事件的同时性来建立匹配和估计深度。相比之下，这项工作研究了如何通过融合背投影射线密度来估计立体事件相机的深度，而无需明确的数据关联，并证明了其对以自我为中心的方式记录的头戴式相机数据的有效性。代码和视频可在 https://github.com/tub-rip/dvs_mcemvs 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事件相机的立体深度估计方法，通过融合回投影射线密度实现无需显式数据关联的深度估计。
AI.motivation: 传统事件立体视觉方法依赖显式数据关联，但该方法旨在解决动态场景下数据关联困难的问题，通过利用事件相机的高时间分辨率特性。
AI.method: 采用射线密度融合技术，将双目事件相机的异步事件流回投影为三维射线密度场，通过密度一致性计算深度信息。
AI.result: 在头戴式相机采集的自中心视角数据集上验证了方法有效性，实现了无需显式匹配的深度估计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为事件相机立体视觉提供了新的解决方案，尤其适用于动态场景下的自运动深度估计任务。

authors_text: Adnan Haider,Tim Ng,Zhen Huang,Xingyu Na,Antti Veikko Rosti
title: A Treatise On FST Lattice Based MMI Training
title_zh: 基于 FST 格的 MMI 训练论文
abstract: Maximum mutual information (MMI) has become one of the two de facto methods for sequence-level training of speech recognition acoustic models. This paper aims to isolate, identify and bring forward the implicit modelling decisions induced by the design implementation of standard finite state transducer (FST) lattice based MMI training framework. The paper particularly investigates the necessity to maintain a preselected numerator alignment and raises the importance of determinizing FST denominator lattices on the fly. The efficacy of employing on the fly FST lattice determinization is mathematically shown to guarantee discrimination at the hypothesis level and is empirically shown through training deep CNN models on a 18K hours Mandarin dataset and on a 2.8K hours English dataset. On assistant and dictation tasks, the approach achieves between 2.3-4.6% relative WER reduction (WERR) over the standard FST lattice based approach.
summary: Maximum mutual information (MMI) has become one of the two de facto methods for sequence-level training of speech recognition acoustic models. This paper aims to isolate, identify and bring forward the implicit modelling decisions induced by the design implementation of standard finite state transducer (FST) lattice based MMI training framework. The paper particularly investigates the necessity to maintain a preselected numerator alignment and raises the importance of determinizing FST denominator lattices on the fly. The efficacy of employing on the fly FST lattice determinization is mathematically shown to guarantee discrimination at the hypothesis level and is empirically shown through training deep CNN models on a 18K hours Mandarin dataset and on a 2.8K hours English dataset. On assistant and dictation tasks, the approach achieves between 2.3-4.6% relative WER reduction (WERR) over the standard FST lattice based approach.
abstract_zh: 最大互信息（MMI）已成为语音识别声学模型序列级训练的两种事实上的方法之一。本文旨在分离、识别和提出由基于标准有限状态传感器（FST）格的 MMI 训练框架的设计实现所引发的隐式建模决策。该论文特别研究了保持预选分子对齐的必要性，并提出了动态确定 FST 分母格的重要性。采用动态 FST 格确定的有效性在数学上被证明可以保证假设水平上的辨别力，并且通过在 18K 小时的普通话数据集和 2800 小时的英语数据集上训练深度 CNN 模型来实证证明。在助理和听写任务中，该方法比基于标准 FST 网格的方法实现了 2.3-4.6% 的相对 WER 减少 (WERR)。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于有限状态转录机（FST）格子的最大互信息（MMI）训练框架中的隐含建模决策，提出改进方法以提升语音识别模型性能。
AI.motivation: 标准FST格子MMI训练框架存在隐含建模假设，可能影响模型判别能力，需明确其设计决策并优化实现细节。
AI.method: 通过数学证明和实验证明动态确定化FST分母格子的必要性，结合预选分子对齐策略，在大规模中英文数据集上训练深度CNN模型验证效果。
AI.result: 在助理和听写任务中，相对于标准方法实现2.3-4.6%的相对词错误率（WERR）下降。
AI.conclusion: 动态确定化分母格子可保证假设层判别性，该方法有效提升MMI训练效果，为语音识别模型优化提供理论支持。

authors_text: Xuri Ge,Fuhai Chen,Songpei Xu,Fuxiang Tao,Joemon M. Jose
title: Cross-modal Semantic Enhanced Interaction for Image-Sentence Retrieval
title_zh: 用于图像句子检索的跨模态语义增强交互
abstract: Image-sentence retrieval has attracted extensive research attention in multimedia and computer vision due to its promising application. The key issue lies in jointly learning the visual and textual representation to accurately estimate their similarity. To this end, the mainstream schema adopts an object-word based attention to calculate their relevance scores and refine their interactive representations with the attention features, which, however, neglects the context of the object representation on the inter-object relationship that matches the predicates in sentences. In this paper, we propose a Cross-modal Semantic Enhanced Interaction method, termed CMSEI for image-sentence retrieval, which correlates the intra- and inter-modal semantics between objects and words. In particular, we first design the intra-modal spatial and semantic graphs based reasoning to enhance the semantic representations of objects guided by the explicit relationships of the objects' spatial positions and their scene graph. Then the visual and textual semantic representations are refined jointly via the inter-modal interactive attention and the cross-modal alignment. To correlate the context of objects with the textual context, we further refine the visual semantic representation via the cross-level object-sentence and word-image based interactive attention. Experimental results on seven standard evaluation metrics show that the proposed CMSEI outperforms the state-of-the-art and the alternative approaches on MS-COCO and Flickr30K benchmarks.
summary: Image-sentence retrieval has attracted extensive research attention in multimedia and computer vision due to its promising application. The key issue lies in jointly learning the visual and textual representation to accurately estimate their similarity. To this end, the mainstream schema adopts an object-word based attention to calculate their relevance scores and refine their interactive representations with the attention features, which, however, neglects the context of the object representation on the inter-object relationship that matches the predicates in sentences. In this paper, we propose a Cross-modal Semantic Enhanced Interaction method, termed CMSEI for image-sentence retrieval, which correlates the intra- and inter-modal semantics between objects and words. In particular, we first design the intra-modal spatial and semantic graphs based reasoning to enhance the semantic representations of objects guided by the explicit relationships of the objects' spatial positions and their scene graph. Then the visual and textual semantic representations are refined jointly via the inter-modal interactive attention and the cross-modal alignment. To correlate the context of objects with the textual context, we further refine the visual semantic representation via the cross-level object-sentence and word-image based interactive attention. Experimental results on seven standard evaluation metrics show that the proposed CMSEI outperforms the state-of-the-art and the alternative approaches on MS-COCO and Flickr30K benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 图像句子检索由于其广阔的应用前景而引起了多媒体和计算机视觉领域的广泛研究关注。关键问题在于共同学习视觉和文本表示以准确估计它们的相似性。为此，主流模式采用基于对象词的注意力来计算它们的相关性分数，并利用注意力特征细化它们的交互表示，然而，这忽略了与句子中的谓词匹配的对象间关系上的对象表示的上下文。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图像句子检索的跨模态语义增强交互方法，称为 CMSEI，该方法将对象和单词之间的模内和模间语义相关联。特别是，我们首先设计基于模态内空间和语义图的推理，以增强由对象空间位置及其场景图的显式关系引导的对象的语义表示。然后，通过模间交互注意力和跨模态对齐来共同细化视觉和文本语义表示。为了将对象的上下文与文本上下文相关联，我们通过跨级对象句子和基于单词图像的交互式注意力进一步细化视觉语义表示。七个标准评估指标的实验结果表明，所提出的 CMSEI 在 MS-COCO 和 Flickr30K 基准上优于最先进的方法和替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态语义增强交互方法（CMSEI），用于改进图像-句子检索任务，通过联合学习视觉和文本表示以准确估计其相似性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法基于物体-词语注意力计算相关性，但忽略了物体表示中与句子谓词匹配的物体间关系上下文，导致语义对齐不足。
AI.method: 设计基于物体空间位置和场景图的模态内语义图，通过跨模态交互注意力和对齐机制联合优化视觉与文本表示，并引入跨层级的物体-句子及词语-图像交互注意力进一步细化语义表示。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和Flickr30K基准数据集上，CMSEI在七个标准评估指标中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CMSEI通过融合模态内空间语义与跨模态交互注意力，有效增强了图像与文本的语义对齐，显著提升了检索性能。

search_text: Cross-modal Semantic Enhanced Interaction for Image-Sentence Retrieval 用于图像句子检索的跨模态语义增强交互 Image-sentence retrieval has attracted extensive research attention in multimedia and computer vision due to its promising application. The key issue lies in jointly learning the visual and textual representation to accurately estimate their similarity. To this end, the mainstream schema adopts an object-word based attention to calculate their relevance scores and refine their interactive representations with the attention features, which, however, neglects the context of the object representation on the inter-object relationship that matches the predicates in sentences. In this paper, we propose a Cross-modal Semantic Enhanced Interaction method, termed CMSEI for image-sentence retrieval, which correlates the intra- and inter-modal semantics between objects and words. In particular, we first design the intra-modal spatial and semantic graphs based reasoning to enhance the semantic representations of objects guided by the explicit relationships of the objects' spatial positions and their scene graph. Then the visual and textual semantic representations are refined jointly via the inter-modal interactive attention and the cross-modal alignment. To correlate the context of objects with the textual context, we further refine the visual semantic representation via the cross-level object-sentence and word-image based interactive attention. Experimental results on seven standard evaluation metrics show that the proposed CMSEI outperforms the state-of-the-art and the alternative approaches on MS-COCO and Flickr30K benchmarks. 图像句子检索由于其广阔的应用前景而引起了多媒体和计算机视觉领域的广泛研究关注。关键问题在于共同学习视觉和文本表示以准确估计它们的相似性。为此，主流模式采用基于对象词的注意力来计算它们的相关性分数，并利用注意力特征细化它们的交互表示，然而，这忽略了与句子中的谓词匹配的对象间关系上的对象表示的上下文。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图像句子检索的跨模态语义增强交互方法，称为 CMSEI，该方法将对象和单词之间的模内和模间语义相关联。特别是，我们首先设计基于模态内空间和语义图的推理，以增强由对象空间位置及其场景图的显式关系引导的对象的语义表示。然后，通过模间交互注意力和跨模态对齐来共同细化视觉和文本语义表示。为了将对象的上下文与文本上下文相关联，我们通过跨级对象句子和基于单词图像的交互式注意力进一步细化视觉语义表示。七个标准评估指标的实验结果表明，所提出的 CMSEI 在 MS-COCO 和 Flickr30K 基准上优于最先进的方法和替代方法。 本文提出一种跨模态语义增强交互方法（CMSEI），用于改进图像-句子检索任务，通过联合学习视觉和文本表示以准确估计其相似性。 Xuri Ge,Fuhai Chen,Songpei Xu,Fuxiang Tao,Joemon M. authors_text: Andrea Tocchetti,Lorenzo Corti,Agathe Balayn,Mireia Yurrita,Philip Lippmann,Marco Brambilla,Jie Yang
title: A.I. Robustness: a Human-Centered Perspective on Technological Challenges and Opportunities
title_zh: 人工智能。稳健性：以人为本的视角看待技术挑战和机遇
abstract: Despite the impressive performance of Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems, their robustness remains elusive and constitutes a key issue that impedes large-scale adoption. Robustness has been studied in many domains of AI, yet with different interpretations across domains and contexts. In this work, we systematically survey the recent progress to provide a reconciled terminology of concepts around AI robustness. We introduce three taxonomies to organize and describe the literature both from a fundamental and applied point of view: 1) robustness by methods and approaches in different phases of the machine learning pipeline; 2) robustness for specific model architectures, tasks, and systems; and in addition, 3) robustness assessment methodologies and insights, particularly the trade-offs with other trustworthiness properties. Finally, we identify and discuss research gaps and opportunities and give an outlook on the field. We highlight the central role of humans in evaluating and enhancing AI robustness, considering the necessary knowledge humans can provide, and discuss the need for better understanding practices and developing supportive tools in the future.
summary: Despite the impressive performance of Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems, their robustness remains elusive and constitutes a key issue that impedes large-scale adoption. Robustness has been studied in many domains of AI, yet with different interpretations across domains and contexts. In this work, we systematically survey the recent progress to provide a reconciled terminology of concepts around AI robustness. We introduce three taxonomies to organize and describe the literature both from a fundamental and applied point of view: 1) robustness by methods and approaches in different phases of the machine learning pipeline; 2) robustness for specific model architectures, tasks, and systems; and in addition, 3) robustness assessment methodologies and insights, particularly the trade-offs with other trustworthiness properties. Finally, we identify and discuss research gaps and opportunities and give an outlook on the field. We highlight the central role of humans in evaluating and enhancing AI robustness, considering the necessary knowledge humans can provide, and discuss the need for better understanding practices and developing supportive tools in the future.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能（AI）系统的性能令人印象深刻，但其稳健性仍然难以捉摸，并构成了阻碍大规模采用的关键问题。人工智能的许多领域都对鲁棒性进行了研究，但不同领域和背景有不同的解释。在这项工作中，我们系统地调查了最新进展，以提供有关人工智能鲁棒性概念的一致术语。我们引入了三种分类法，从基础和应用的角度来组织和描述文献：1）机器学习流程不同阶段的方法和方法的稳健性； 2）特定模型架构、任务和系统的鲁棒性；此外，3）稳健性评估方法和见解，特别是与其他可信属性的权衡。最后，我们确定并讨论研究差距和机会，并对该领域进行展望。我们强调人类在评估和增强人工智能鲁棒性方面的核心作用，考虑人类可以提供的必要知识，并讨论未来更好地理解实践和开发支持工具的必要性。

AI.tldr: 系统综述AI鲁棒性研究进展，提出分类框架并探讨挑战与机遇
AI.motivation: 现有AI鲁棒性研究缺乏统一术语和系统分析，阻碍其大规模应用，需整合不同领域成果
AI.method: 提出三个分类框架：机器学习流程中的方法、特定模型架构与任务的鲁棒性、评估方法与权衡分析
AI.result: 明确了研究空白，指出未来方向，强调人类在评估中的核心作用，并提出需开发支持工具
AI.conclusion: 需跨学科合作，结合人类因素提升AI鲁棒性，并推动可信AI发展

authors_text: Julia El Zini,Mariette Awad
title: Beyond Model Interpretability: On the Faithfulness and Adversarial Robustness of Contrastive Textual Explanations
title_zh: 超越模型可解释性：论对比文本解释的可信性和对抗性稳健性
abstract: Contrastive explanation methods go beyond transparency and address the contrastive aspect of explanations. Such explanations are emerging as an attractive option to provide actionable change to scenarios adversely impacted by classifiers' decisions. However, their extension to textual data is under-explored and there is little investigation on their vulnerabilities and limitations. This work motivates textual counterfactuals by laying the ground for a novel evaluation scheme inspired by the faithfulness of explanations. Accordingly, we extend the computation of three metrics, proximity,connectedness and stability, to textual data and we benchmark two successful contrastive methods, POLYJUICE and MiCE, on our suggested metrics. Experiments on sentiment analysis data show that the connectedness of counterfactuals to their original counterparts is not obvious in both models. More interestingly, the generated contrastive texts are more attainable with POLYJUICE which highlights the significance of latent representations in counterfactual search. Finally, we perform the first semantic adversarial attack on textual recourse methods. The results demonstrate the robustness of POLYJUICE and the role that latent input representations play in robustness and reliability.
summary: Contrastive explanation methods go beyond transparency and address the contrastive aspect of explanations. Such explanations are emerging as an attractive option to provide actionable change to scenarios adversely impacted by classifiers' decisions. However, their extension to textual data is under-explored and there is little investigation on their vulnerabilities and limitations. This work motivates textual counterfactuals by laying the ground for a novel evaluation scheme inspired by the faithfulness of explanations. Accordingly, we extend the computation of three metrics, proximity,connectedness and stability, to textual data and we benchmark two successful contrastive methods, POLYJUICE and MiCE, on our suggested metrics. Experiments on sentiment analysis data show that the connectedness of counterfactuals to their original counterparts is not obvious in both models. More interestingly, the generated contrastive texts are more attainable with POLYJUICE which highlights the significance of latent representations in counterfactual search. Finally, we perform the first semantic adversarial attack on textual recourse methods. The results demonstrate the robustness of POLYJUICE and the role that latent input representations play in robustness and reliability.
abstract_zh: 对比解释方法超越了透明度并解决了解释的对比方面。这种解释正在成为一种有吸引力的选择，可以为受到分类器决策不利影响的场景提供可行的改变。然而，它们对文本数据的扩展尚未得到充分探索，而且对其漏洞和局限性的调查也很少。这项工作通过为受解释的忠实性启发的新颖评估方案奠定基础，激发了文本反事实。因此，我们将邻近性、连通性和稳定性这三个指标的计算扩展到文本数据，并根据我们建议的指标对两种成功的对比方法 POLYJUICE 和 MiCE 进行了基准测试。情感分析数据的实验表明，在这两个模型中，反事实与其原始对应物的关联性并不明显。更有趣的是，使用 POLYJUICE 更容易获得生成的对比文本，这凸显了反事实搜索中潜在表征的重要性。最后，我们对文本资源方法进行第一次语义对抗攻击。结果证明了 POLYJUICE 的鲁棒性以及潜在输入表示在鲁棒性和可靠性中发挥的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了对比文本解释的可信度和对抗鲁棒性，提出新的评估方案并验证两种方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对文本数据的对比解释方法及其脆弱性缺乏系统探索，需建立有效评估框架以提升解释的可靠性。
AI.method: 扩展近似度、连贯性及稳定性指标至文本领域，基于情感分析数据集对比POLYJUICE与MiCE方法，并设计语义对抗攻击测试鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验发现两种模型生成的对比文本连贯性不足，POLYJUICE生成文本更易实现且在对抗攻击中表现更鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 潜在表示对对比文本生成的可靠性至关重要，POLYJUICE在鲁棒性方面具有优势，需进一步优化文本解释的连贯性设计。

ai_content_json.result: 实验发现两种模型生成的对比文本连贯性不足，POLYJUICE生成文本更易实现且在对抗攻击中表现更鲁棒。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 潜在表示对对比文本生成的可靠性至关重要，POLYJUICE在鲁棒性方面具有优势，需进一步优化文本解释的连贯性设计。

tldr: 本文探讨了对比文本解释的可信度和对抗鲁棒性，提出新的评估方案并验证两种方法的性能。
motivation: 现有研究对文本数据的对比解释方法及其脆弱性缺乏系统探索，需建立有效评估框架以提升解释的可靠性。
method: 扩展近似度、连贯性及稳定性指标至文本领域，基于情感分析数据集对比POLYJUICE与MiCE方法，并设计语义对抗攻击测试鲁棒性。
result: 实验发现两种模型生成的对比文本连贯性不足，POLYJUICE生成文本更易实现且在对抗攻击中表现更鲁棒。
conclusion: 潜在表示对对比文本生成的可靠性至关重要，POLYJUICE在鲁棒性方面具有优势，需进一步优化文本解释的连贯性设计。
search_text: Beyond Model Interpretability: On the Faithfulness and Adversarial Robustness of Contrastive Textual Explanations 超越模型可解释性：论对比文本解释的可信性和对抗性稳健性 Contrastive explanation methods go beyond transparency and address the contrastive aspect of explanations. Such explanations are emerging as an attractive option to provide actionable change to scenarios adversely impacted by classifiers' decisions. However, their extension to textual data is under-explored and there is little investigation on their vulnerabilities and limitations. This work motivates textual counterfactuals by laying the ground for a novel evaluation scheme inspired by the faithfulness of explanations. Accordingly, we extend the computation of three metrics, proximity,connectedness and stability, to textual data and we benchmark two successful contrastive methods, POLYJUICE and MiCE, on our suggested metrics. Experiments on sentiment analysis data show that the connectedness of counterfactuals to their original counterparts is not obvious in both models. More interestingly, the generated contrastive texts are more attainable with POLYJUICE which highlights the significance of latent representations in counterfactual search. Finally, we perform the first semantic adversarial attack on textual recourse methods. The results demonstrate the robustness of POLYJUICE and the role that latent input representations play in robustness and reliability. 对比解释方法超越了透明度并解决了解释的对比方面。这种解释正在成为一种有吸引力的选择，可以为受到分类器决策不利影响的场景提供可行的改变。然而，它们对文本数据的扩展尚未得到充分探索，而且对其漏洞和局限性的调查也很少。这项工作通过为受解释的忠实性启发的新颖评估方案奠定基础，激发了文本反事实。因此，我们将邻近性、连通性和稳定性这三个指标的计算扩展到文本数据，并根据我们建议的指标对两种成功的对比方法 POLYJUICE 和 MiCE 进行了基准测试。情感分析数据的实验表明，在这两个模型中，反事实与其原始对应物的关联性并不明显。更有趣的是，使用 POLYJUICE 更容易获得生成的对比文本，这凸显了反事实搜索中潜在表征的重要性。最后，我们对文本资源方法进行第一次语义对抗攻击。结果证明了 POLYJUICE 的鲁棒性以及潜在输入表示在鲁棒性和可靠性中发挥的作用。 本文探讨了对比文本解释的可信度和对抗鲁棒性，提出新的评估方案并验证两种方法的性能。 Julia El Zini,Mariette Awad cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Xuran Pan,Tianzhu Ye,Dongchen Han,Shiji Song,Gao Huang
title: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training with Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 知识图对比语言-图像预训练
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the fast development of large-scale pre-training frameworks that can extract multi-modal representations in a unified form and achieve promising performances when transferred to downstream tasks. Nevertheless, existing approaches mainly focus on pre-training with simple image-text pairs, while neglecting the semantic connections between concepts from different modalities. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-based pre-training framework, dubbed Knowledge-CLIP, which injects semantic information into the widely used CLIP model. Through introducing knowledge-based objectives in the pre-training process and utilizing different types of knowledge graphs as training data, our model can semantically align the representations in vision and language with higher quality, and enhance the reasoning ability across scenarios and modalities. Extensive experiments on various vision-language downstream tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of Knowledge-CLIP compared with the original CLIP and competitive baselines.
summary: Recent years have witnessed the fast development of large-scale pre-training frameworks that can extract multi-modal representations in a unified form and achieve promising performances when transferred to downstream tasks. Nevertheless, existing approaches mainly focus on pre-training with simple image-text pairs, while neglecting the semantic connections between concepts from different modalities. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-based pre-training framework, dubbed Knowledge-CLIP, which injects semantic information into the widely used CLIP model. Through introducing knowledge-based objectives in the pre-training process and utilizing different types of knowledge graphs as training data, our model can semantically align the representations in vision and language with higher quality, and enhance the reasoning ability across scenarios and modalities. Extensive experiments on various vision-language downstream tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of Knowledge-CLIP compared with the original CLIP and competitive baselines.
abstract_zh: 近年来，大规模预训练框架得到了快速发展，这些框架可以以统一的形式提取多模态表示，并在转移到下游任务时取得良好的性能。然而，现有的方法主要集中于简单图像文本对的预训练，而忽略了不同模态概念之间的语义联系。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于知识的预训练框架，称为 Knowledge-CLIP，它将语义信息注入到广泛使用的 CLIP 模型中。通过在预训练过程中引入基于知识的目标并利用不同类型的知识图作为训练数据，我们的模型可以在语义上以更高的质量对齐视觉和语言中的表示，并增强跨场景和模式的推理能力。对各种视觉语言下游任务的大量实验证明了 Knowledge-CLIP 与原始 CLIP 和竞争基线相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出基于知识图谱的对比语言-图像预训练框架Knowledge-CLIP，提升多模态表征的语义对齐质量与跨模态推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖简单图像-文本对，忽视跨模态语义关联，限制了模型在复杂场景下的推理能力。
AI.method: 融合知识图谱与CLIP模型，通过引入知识引导的预训练目标，利用多类型知识图谱数据增强跨模态语义对齐。
AI.result: 在多个视觉-语言下游任务中，Knowledge-CLIP显著优于原始CLIP及竞争性基线模型。
AI.conclusion: Knowledge-CLIP通过知识图谱注入语义信息，有效提升跨模态表征质量与推理能力，为多模态预训练提供新方向。

authors_text: Kevin Rösch,Florian Heidecker,Julian Truetsch,Kamil Kowol,Clemens Schicktanz,Maarten Bieshaar,Bernhard Sick,Christoph Stiller
title: Space, Time, and Interaction: A Taxonomy of Corner Cases in Trajectory Datasets for Automated Driving
title_zh: 空间、时间和交互：自动驾驶轨迹数据集中极端情况的分类
abstract: Trajectory data analysis is an essential component for highly automated driving. Complex models developed with these data predict other road users' movement and behavior patterns. Based on these predictions - and additional contextual information such as the course of the road, (traffic) rules, and interaction with other road users - the highly automated vehicle (HAV) must be able to reliably and safely perform the task assigned to it, e.g., moving from point A to B. Ideally, the HAV moves safely through its environment, just as we would expect a human driver to do. However, if unusual trajectories occur, so-called trajectory corner cases, a human driver can usually cope well, but an HAV can quickly get into trouble. In the definition of trajectory corner cases, which we provide in this work, we will consider the relevance of unusual trajectories with respect to the task at hand. Based on this, we will also present a taxonomy of different trajectory corner cases. The categorization of corner cases into the taxonomy will be shown with examples and is done by cause and required data sources. To illustrate the complexity between the machine learning (ML) model and the corner case cause, we present a general processing chain underlying the taxonomy.
summary: Trajectory data analysis is an essential component for highly automated driving. Complex models developed with these data predict other road users' movement and behavior patterns. Based on these predictions - and additional contextual information such as the course of the road, (traffic) rules, and interaction with other road users - the highly automated vehicle (HAV) must be able to reliably and safely perform the task assigned to it, e.g., moving from point A to B. Ideally, the HAV moves safely through its environment, just as we would expect a human driver to do. However, if unusual trajectories occur, so-called trajectory corner cases, a human driver can usually cope well, but an HAV can quickly get into trouble. In the definition of trajectory corner cases, which we provide in this work, we will consider the relevance of unusual trajectories with respect to the task at hand. Based on this, we will also present a taxonomy of different trajectory corner cases. The categorization of corner cases into the taxonomy will be shown with examples and is done by cause and required data sources. To illustrate the complexity between the machine learning (ML) model and the corner case cause, we present a general processing chain underlying the taxonomy.
abstract_zh: 轨迹数据分析是高度自动化驾驶的重要组成部分。利用这些数据开发的复杂模型可以预测其他道路使用者的运动和行为模式。基于这些预测以及其他上下文信息，例如道路走向、（交通）规则以及与其他道路使用者的互动，高度自动化车辆 (HAV) 必须能够可靠且安全地执行分配给它的任务，例如从 A 点移动到 B 点。理想情况下，HAV 在其环境中安全移动，就像我们期望人类驾驶员所做的那样。然而，如果出现不寻常的轨迹，即所谓的轨迹极端情况，人类驾驶员通常可以很好地应对，但 HAV 很快就会陷入麻烦。在我们在这项工作中提供的轨迹极端情况的定义中，我们将考虑异常轨迹与手头任务的相关性。基于此，我们还将提出不同轨迹极端情况的分类。将通过示例显示极端案例的分类，并按原因和所需的数据源进行分类。为了说明机器学习 (ML) 模型和极端情况原因之间的复杂性，我们提出了分类法底层的通用处理链。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在定义轨迹边缘案例并建立分类体系，以提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统依赖轨迹预测，但罕见的轨迹案例可能引发安全问题，需系统化分类以增强系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于轨迹异常性及任务相关性，结合数据源与成因进行分类，并构建处理链解析模型与边缘案例的关联。
AI.result: 提出轨迹边缘案例分类体系，通过实例展示分类方法，并揭示ML模型与边缘案例的复杂关系。
AI.conclusion: 系统化分类有助于提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和鲁棒性，为后续研究和应用提供理论框架。

authors_text: Aibek Alanov,Vadim Titov,Dmitry Vetrov
title: HyperDomainNet: Universal Domain Adaptation for Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: HyperDomainNet：生成对抗网络的通用域适应
abstract: Domain adaptation framework of GANs has achieved great progress in recent years as a main successful approach of training contemporary GANs in the case of very limited training data. In this work, we significantly improve this framework by proposing an extremely compact parameter space for fine-tuning the generator. We introduce a novel domain-modulation technique that allows to optimize only 6 thousand-dimensional vector instead of 30 million weights of StyleGAN2 to adapt to a target domain. We apply this parameterization to the state-of-art domain adaptation methods and show that it has almost the same expressiveness as the full parameter space. Additionally, we propose a new regularization loss that considerably enhances the diversity of the fine-tuned generator. Inspired by the reduction in the size of the optimizing parameter space we consider the problem of multi-domain adaptation of GANs, i.e. setting when the same model can adapt to several domains depending on the input query. We propose the HyperDomainNet that is a hypernetwork that predicts our parameterization given the target domain. We empirically confirm that it can successfully learn a number of domains at once and may even generalize to unseen domains. Source code can be found at https://github.com/MACderRu/HyperDomainNet
summary: Domain adaptation framework of GANs has achieved great progress in recent years as a main successful approach of training contemporary GANs in the case of very limited training data. In this work, we significantly improve this framework by proposing an extremely compact parameter space for fine-tuning the generator. We introduce a novel domain-modulation technique that allows to optimize only 6 thousand-dimensional vector instead of 30 million weights of StyleGAN2 to adapt to a target domain. We apply this parameterization to the state-of-art domain adaptation methods and show that it has almost the same expressiveness as the full parameter space. Additionally, we propose a new regularization loss that considerably enhances the diversity of the fine-tuned generator. Inspired by the reduction in the size of the optimizing parameter space we consider the problem of multi-domain adaptation of GANs, i.e. setting when the same model can adapt to several domains depending on the input query. We propose the HyperDomainNet that is a hypernetwork that predicts our parameterization given the target domain. We empirically confirm that it can successfully learn a number of domains at once and may even generalize to unseen domains. Source code can be found at https://github.com/MACderRu/HyperDomainNet
abstract_zh: GAN 的领域适应框架近年来取得了巨大进展，作为在训练数据非常有限的情况下训练当代 GAN 的主要成功方法。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一个极其紧凑的参数空间来微调生成器，显着改进了这个框架。我们引入了一种新颖的域调制技术，该技术允许仅优化 6000 维向量而不是 StyleGAN2 的 3000 万个权重来适应目标域。我们将这种参数化应用于最先进的域适应方法，并表明它具有与完整参数空间几乎相同的表达能力。此外，我们提出了一种新的正则化损失，可以大大增强微调生成器的多样性。受到优化参数空间大小减小的启发，我们考虑了 GAN 的多域适应问题，即设置同一模型何时可以根据输入查询适应多个域。我们提出了 HyperDomainNet，它是一个超网络，可以在给定目标域的情况下预测我们的参数化。我们凭经验证实，它可以一次成功地学习多个领域，甚至可以推广到未见过的领域。源代码可以在 https://github.com/MACderRu/HyperDomainNet 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperDomainNet，通过紧凑参数空间和域调制技术提升生成对抗网络的领域自适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN领域自适应方法参数量大、效率低，且难以处理多领域适应问题。
AI.method: 引入域调制技术将参数空间从3000万压缩至6000维，并设计正则化损失；提出HyperDomainNet超网络预测目标领域参数化表示。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在表达能力、多样性及多领域适应性上优于现有技术，可泛化至未见领域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高效、通用的GAN领域自适应提供了新思路，平衡了参数效率与生成质量。

search_text: HyperDomainNet: Universal Domain Adaptation for Generative Adversarial Networks HyperDomainNet：生成对抗网络的通用域适应 Domain adaptation framework of GANs has achieved great progress in recent years as a main successful approach of training contemporary GANs in the case of very limited training data. In this work, we significantly improve this framework by proposing an extremely compact parameter space for fine-tuning the generator. We introduce a novel domain-modulation technique that allows to optimize only 6 thousand-dimensional vector instead of 30 million weights of StyleGAN2 to adapt to a target domain. We apply this parameterization to the state-of-art domain adaptation methods and show that it has almost the same expressiveness as the full parameter space. Additionally, we propose a new regularization loss that considerably enhances the diversity of the fine-tuned generator. Inspired by the reduction in the size of the optimizing parameter space we consider the problem of multi-domain adaptation of GANs, i.e. setting when the same model can adapt to several domains depending on the input query. We propose the HyperDomainNet that is a hypernetwork that predicts our parameterization given the target domain. We empirically confirm that it can successfully learn a number of domains at once and may even generalize to unseen domains. Source code can be found at https://github.com/MACderRu/HyperDomainNet GAN 的领域适应框架近年来取得了巨大进展，作为在训练数据非常有限的情况下训练当代 GAN 的主要成功方法。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一个极其紧凑的参数空间来微调生成器，显着改进了这个框架。我们引入了一种新颖的域调制技术，该技术允许仅优化 6000 维向量而不是 StyleGAN2 的 3000 万个权重来适应目标域。我们将这种参数化应用于最先进的域适应方法，并表明它具有与完整参数空间几乎相同的表达能力。此外，我们提出了一种新的正则化损失，可以大大增强微调生成器的多样性。受到优化参数空间大小减小的启发，我们考虑了 GAN 的多域适应问题，即设置同一模型何时可以根据输入查询适应多个域。我们提出了 HyperDomainNet，它是一个超网络，可以在给定目标域的情况下预测我们的参数化。我们凭经验证实，它可以一次成功地学习多个领域，甚至可以推广到未见过的领域。源代码可以在 https://github.com/MACderRu/HyperDomainNet 找到 本文提出HyperDomainNet，通过紧凑参数空间和域调制技术提升生成对抗网络的领域自适应能力。 Aibek Alanov,Vadim Titov,Dmitry Vetrov cs.CV

authors_text: Anthony Favier,Shashank Shekhar,Rachid Alami
title: Robust Planning for Human-Robot Joint Tasks with Explicit Reasoning on Human Mental State
title_zh: 对人类心理状态进行显式推理的人机联合任务的鲁棒规划
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, 1 table, AI-HRI AAAI 2022 Fall Symposium Series
comments: 10 pages, 2 figures, 1 table, AI-HRI AAAI 2022 Fall Symposium Series
abstract: We consider the human-aware task planning problem where a human-robot team is given a shared task with a known objective to achieve. Recent approaches tackle it by modeling it as a team of independent, rational agents, where the robot plans for both agents' (shared) tasks. However, the robot knows that humans cannot be administered like artificial agents, so it emulates and predicts the human's decisions, actions, and reactions. Based on earlier approaches, we describe a novel approach to solve such problems, which models and uses execution-time observability conventions. Abstractly, this modeling is based on situation assessment, which helps our approach capture the evolution of individual agents' beliefs and anticipate belief divergences that arise in practice. It decides if and when belief alignment is needed and achieves it with communication. These changes improve the solver's performance: (a) communication is effectively used, and (b) robust for more realistic and challenging problems.
summary: We consider the human-aware task planning problem where a human-robot team is given a shared task with a known objective to achieve. Recent approaches tackle it by modeling it as a team of independent, rational agents, where the robot plans for both agents' (shared) tasks. However, the robot knows that humans cannot be administered like artificial agents, so it emulates and predicts the human's decisions, actions, and reactions. Based on earlier approaches, we describe a novel approach to solve such problems, which models and uses execution-time observability conventions. Abstractly, this modeling is based on situation assessment, which helps our approach capture the evolution of individual agents' beliefs and anticipate belief divergences that arise in practice. It decides if and when belief alignment is needed and achieves it with communication. These changes improve the solver's performance: (a) communication is effectively used, and (b) robust for more realistic and challenging problems.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑人类感知的任务规划问题，其中人类机器人团队被赋予一个具有已知目标要实现的共享任务。最近的方法通过将其建模为一组独立、理性的代理来解决这个问题，其中机器人为两个代理的（共享）任务进行规划。然而，机器人知道人类不能像人工代理一样被管理，因此它模仿并预测人类的决定、行动和反应。基于早期的方法，我们描述了一种解决此类问题的新方法，该方法建模并使用执行时可观察性约定。抽象地说，这种建模基于情境评估，这有助于我们的方法捕获个体代理信念的演变并预测实践中出现的信念分歧。它决定是否以及何时需要信念一致，并通过沟通来实现。这些变化提高了求解器的性能：(a) 有效地使用了通信，并且 (b) 对于更现实和更具挑战性的问题具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对人机协作任务的鲁棒规划方法，通过显式推理人类心理状态提升协作效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将人类视为理性代理建模存在局限，需考虑人类决策的不可预测性和心理状态变化对协作的影响。
AI.method: 基于执行时可观测性约定建模，通过情境评估捕捉信念演变，并在必要时通过通信实现信念对齐。
AI.result: 通信机制被有效利用，求解器在更复杂现实场景中表现出更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式心理状态推理和动态信念对齐机制，显著提升了人机协作任务规划的可靠性与适应性。

authors_text: Timofey Grigoryev,Polina Verezemskaya,Mikhail Krinitskiy,Nikita Anikin,Alexander Gavrikov,Ilya Trofimov,Nikita Balabin,Aleksei Shpilman,Andrei Eremchenko,Sergey Gulev,Evgeny Burnaev,Vladimir Vanovskiy
title: Data-Driven Short-Term Daily Operational Sea Ice Regional Forecasting
title_zh: 数据驱动的短期每日业务海冰区域预报
abstract: Global warming made the Arctic available for marine operations and created demand for reliable operational sea ice forecasts to make them safe. While ocean-ice numerical models are highly computationally intensive, relatively lightweight ML-based methods may be more efficient in this task. Many works have exploited different deep learning models alongside classical approaches for predicting sea ice concentration in the Arctic. However, only a few focus on daily operational forecasts and consider the real-time availability of data they need for operation. In this work, we aim to close this gap and investigate the performance of the U-Net model trained in two regimes for predicting sea ice for up to the next 10 days. We show that this deep learning model can outperform simple baselines by a significant margin and improve its quality by using additional weather data and training on multiple regions, ensuring its generalization abilities. As a practical outcome, we build a fast and flexible tool that produces operational sea ice forecasts in the Barents Sea, the Labrador Sea, and the Laptev Sea regions.
summary: Global warming made the Arctic available for marine operations and created demand for reliable operational sea ice forecasts to make them safe. While ocean-ice numerical models are highly computationally intensive, relatively lightweight ML-based methods may be more efficient in this task. Many works have exploited different deep learning models alongside classical approaches for predicting sea ice concentration in the Arctic. However, only a few focus on daily operational forecasts and consider the real-time availability of data they need for operation. In this work, we aim to close this gap and investigate the performance of the U-Net model trained in two regimes for predicting sea ice for up to the next 10 days. We show that this deep learning model can outperform simple baselines by a significant margin and improve its quality by using additional weather data and training on multiple regions, ensuring its generalization abilities. As a practical outcome, we build a fast and flexible tool that produces operational sea ice forecasts in the Barents Sea, the Labrador Sea, and the Laptev Sea regions.
abstract_zh: 全球变暖使北极可用于海洋作业，并产生了对可靠的海冰预报的需求，以确保北极的安全。虽然海冰数值模型的计算量很大，但相对轻量级的基于机器学习的方法在此任务中可能更有效。许多作品利用了不同的深度学习模型以及经典方法来预测北极海冰浓度。然而，只有少数人关注日常运营预测并考虑运营所需数据的实时可用性。在这项工作中，我们的目标是缩小这一差距，并研究在两种模式下训练的 U-Net 模型的性能，以预测未来 10 天的海冰。我们表明，这种深度学习模型可以显着优于简单的基线，并通过使用额外的天气数据和多个区域的训练来提高其质量，确保其泛化能力。作为一个实际成果，我们构建了一个快速、灵活的工具，可以对巴伦支海、拉布拉多海和拉普捷夫海地区的海冰进行业务预报。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据驱动的U-Net模型，用于预测北极地区未来10天内的海冰情况，以支持海洋操作的安全性。
AI.motivation: 全球变暖使北极地区对海洋活动开放，但现有数值模型计算成本高，且缺乏针对实时数据的每日操作性海冰预测方法。
AI.method: 采用U-Net深度学习模型，在两种训练模式下结合多区域数据和天气信息进行训练，构建快速灵活的预测工具。
AI.result: U-Net模型显著优于简单基线方法，通过多区域训练和天气数据融合提升了预测精度，并成功应用于巴伦支海、拉布拉多海和拉普捷夫海区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为北极海洋操作提供了高效、准确的短期海冰预测方案，验证了深度学习在操作性预报中的可行性与优势。

conclusion: 该方法为北极海洋操作提供了高效、准确的短期海冰预测方案，验证了深度学习在操作性预报中的可行性与优势。
search_text: Data-Driven Short-Term Daily Operational Sea Ice Regional Forecasting 数据驱动的短期每日业务海冰区域预报 Global warming made the Arctic available for marine operations and created demand for reliable operational sea ice forecasts to make them safe. While ocean-ice numerical models are highly computationally intensive, relatively lightweight ML-based methods may be more efficient in this task. Many works have exploited different deep learning models alongside classical approaches for predicting sea ice concentration in the Arctic. However, only a few focus on daily operational forecasts and consider the real-time availability of data they need for operation. In this work, we aim to close this gap and investigate the performance of the U-Net model trained in two regimes for predicting sea ice for up to the next 10 days. We show that this deep learning model can outperform simple baselines by a significant margin and improve its quality by using additional weather data and training on multiple regions, ensuring its generalization abilities. As a practical outcome, we build a fast and flexible tool that produces operational sea ice forecasts in the Barents Sea, the Labrador Sea, and the Laptev Sea regions. 全球变暖使北极可用于海洋作业，并产生了对可靠的海冰预报的需求，以确保北极的安全。虽然海冰数值模型的计算量很大，但相对轻量级的基于机器学习的方法在此任务中可能更有效。许多作品利用了不同的深度学习模型以及经典方法来预测北极海冰浓度。然而，只有少数人关注日常运营预测并考虑运营所需数据的实时可用性。在这项工作中，我们的目标是缩小这一差距，并研究在两种模式下训练的 U-Net 模型的性能，以预测未来 10 天的海冰。我们表明，这种深度学习模型可以显着优于简单的基线，并通过使用额外的天气数据和多个区域的训练来提高其质量，确保其泛化能力。作为一个实际成果，我们构建了一个快速、灵活的工具，可以对巴伦支海、拉布拉多海和拉普捷夫海地区的海冰进行业务预报。 本文提出一种基于数据驱动的U-Net模型，用于预测北极地区未来10天内的海冰情况，以支持海洋操作的安全性。 Timofey Grigoryev,Polina Verezemskaya,Mikhail Krinitskiy,Nikita Anikin,Alexander Gavrikov,Ilya Trofimov,Nikita Balabin,Aleksei Shpilman,Andrei Eremchenko,Sergey Gulev,Evgeny Burnaev,Vladimir Vanovskiy cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yousef Alqasrawi
title: Bridging the Gap between Local Semantic Concepts and Bag of Visual Words for Natural Scene Image Retrieval
title_zh: 弥合自然场景图像检索的局部语义概念和视觉词袋之间的差距
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of semantic-based image retrieval of natural scenes. A typical content-based image retrieval system deals with the query image and images in the dataset as a collection of low-level features and retrieves a ranked list of images based on the similarities between features of the query image and features of images in the image dataset. However, top ranked images in the retrieved list, which have high similarities to the query image, may be different from the query image in terms of the semantic interpretation of the user which is known as the semantic gap. In order to reduce the semantic gap, this paper investigates how natural scene retrieval can be performed using the bag of visual word model and the distribution of local semantic concepts. The paper studies the efficiency of using different approaches for representing the semantic information, depicted in natural scene images, for image retrieval. An extensive experimental work has been conducted to study the efficiency of using semantic information as well as the bag of visual words model for natural and urban scene image retrieval.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of semantic-based image retrieval of natural scenes. A typical content-based image retrieval system deals with the query image and images in the dataset as a collection of low-level features and retrieves a ranked list of images based on the similarities between features of the query image and features of images in the image dataset. However, top ranked images in the retrieved list, which have high similarities to the query image, may be different from the query image in terms of the semantic interpretation of the user which is known as the semantic gap. In order to reduce the semantic gap, this paper investigates how natural scene retrieval can be performed using the bag of visual word model and the distribution of local semantic concepts. The paper studies the efficiency of using different approaches for representing the semantic information, depicted in natural scene images, for image retrieval. An extensive experimental work has been conducted to study the efficiency of using semantic information as well as the bag of visual words model for natural and urban scene image retrieval.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了自然场景的基于语义的图像检索问题。典型的基于内容的图像检索系统将查询图像和数据集中的图像作为低级特征的集合来处理，并基于查询图像的特征与图像数据集中的图像特征之间的相似性来检索图像的排序列表。然而，检索列表中排名靠前的图像与查询图像具有很高的相似度，但在用户的语义解释方面可能与查询图像不同，这被称为语义差距。为了减少语义差距，本文研究了如何使用视觉词袋模型和局部语义概念的分布来进行自然场景检索。本文研究了使用不同方法来表示自然场景图像中描述的语义信息以进行图像检索的效率。我们进行了大量的实验工作来研究使用语义信息以及视觉词袋模型进行自然和城市场景图像检索的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合局部语义概念与视觉词袋模型，缩小自然场景图像检索中的语义鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 传统基于低级特征的图像检索方法存在语义鸿沟问题，即检索结果与用户语义需求不匹配。
AI.method: 研究将视觉词袋模型与局部语义概念分布结合，探索语义信息在自然场景图像检索中的表示方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，融合语义信息的方法显著提升了自然和城市场景图像检索的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 整合局部语义概念与视觉词袋模型能有效缓解语义鸿沟，提高图像检索性能。

authors_text: Ang Li,Judea Pearl
title: Probabilities of Causation: Role of Observational Data
title_zh: 因果关系的概率：观察数据的作用
abstract: Probabilities of causation play a crucial role in modern decision-making. Pearl defined three binary probabilities of causation, the probability of necessity and sufficiency (PNS), the probability of sufficiency (PS), and the probability of necessity (PN). These probabilities were then bounded by Tian and Pearl using a combination of experimental and observational data. However, observational data are not always available in practice; in such a case, Tian and Pearl's Theorem provided valid but less effective bounds using pure experimental data. In this paper, we discuss the conditions that observational data are worth considering to improve the quality of the bounds. More specifically, we defined the expected improvement of the bounds by assuming the observational distributions are uniformly distributed on their feasible interval. We further applied the proposed theorems to the unit selection problem defined by Li and Pearl.
summary: Probabilities of causation play a crucial role in modern decision-making. Pearl defined three binary probabilities of causation, the probability of necessity and sufficiency (PNS), the probability of sufficiency (PS), and the probability of necessity (PN). These probabilities were then bounded by Tian and Pearl using a combination of experimental and observational data. However, observational data are not always available in practice; in such a case, Tian and Pearl's Theorem provided valid but less effective bounds using pure experimental data. In this paper, we discuss the conditions that observational data are worth considering to improve the quality of the bounds. More specifically, we defined the expected improvement of the bounds by assuming the observational distributions are uniformly distributed on their feasible interval. We further applied the proposed theorems to the unit selection problem defined by Li and Pearl.
abstract_zh: 因果概率在现代决策中发挥着至关重要的作用。 Pearl 定义了因果关系的三个二元概率：必要性和充分性概率 (PNS)、充分性概率 (PS) 和必要性概率 (PN)。然后，田和珀尔结合实验和观察数据，对这些概率进行了界定。然而，观测数据在实践中并不总是可用；在这种情况下，田和珀尔定理使用纯实验数据提供了有效但不太有效的界限。在本文中，我们讨论了值得考虑观测数据以提高边界质量的条件。更具体地说，我们通过假设观测分布在其可行区间上均匀分布来定义边界的预期改进。我们进一步将所提出的定理应用于 Li 和 Pearl 定义的单元选择问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在何种条件下引入观测数据可有效提升因果概率的界限质量，并提出相关定理应用于单位选择问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在缺乏观测数据时依赖纯实验数据得出的因果概率界限效果有限，需确定观测数据的引入价值。
AI.method: 假设观测分布均匀分布在可行区间内，定义界限预期改进量，并结合Li和Pearl的单位选择问题验证理论。
AI.result: 提出观测数据值得引入的条件，建立改进界限的定理，并通过案例证明方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 观测数据在特定条件下可显著提升因果概率估计的准确性，为实际决策提供更可靠的依据。

authors_text: Yiqun Chen,Hangyu Mao,Jiaxin Mao,Shiguang Wu,Tianle Zhang,Bin Zhang,Wei Yang,Hongxing Chang
title: PTDE: Personalized Training with Distilled Execution for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: PTDE：多智能体强化学习的精炼执行个性化训练
abstract: Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) has emerged as a widely adopted paradigm in multi-agent reinforcement learning, emphasizing the utilization of global information for learning an enhanced joint $Q$-function or centralized critic. In contrast, our investigation delves into harnessing global information to directly enhance individual $Q$-functions or individual actors. Notably, we discover that applying identical global information universally across all agents proves insufficient for optimal performance. Consequently, we advocate for the customization of global information tailored to each agent, creating agent-personalized global information to bolster overall performance. Furthermore, we introduce a novel paradigm named Personalized Training with Distilled Execution (PTDE), wherein agent-personalized global information is distilled into the agent's local information. This distilled information is then utilized during decentralized execution, resulting in minimal performance degradation. PTDE can be seamlessly integrated with state-of-the-art algorithms, leading to notable performance enhancements across diverse benchmarks, including the SMAC benchmark, Google Research Football (GRF) benchmark, and Learning to Rank (LTR) task.
summary: Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) has emerged as a widely adopted paradigm in multi-agent reinforcement learning, emphasizing the utilization of global information for learning an enhanced joint $Q$-function or centralized critic. In contrast, our investigation delves into harnessing global information to directly enhance individual $Q$-functions or individual actors. Notably, we discover that applying identical global information universally across all agents proves insufficient for optimal performance. Consequently, we advocate for the customization of global information tailored to each agent, creating agent-personalized global information to bolster overall performance. Furthermore, we introduce a novel paradigm named Personalized Training with Distilled Execution (PTDE), wherein agent-personalized global information is distilled into the agent's local information. This distilled information is then utilized during decentralized execution, resulting in minimal performance degradation. PTDE can be seamlessly integrated with state-of-the-art algorithms, leading to notable performance enhancements across diverse benchmarks, including the SMAC benchmark, Google Research Football (GRF) benchmark, and Learning to Rank (LTR) task.
abstract_zh: 集中训练与分散执行（CTDE）已成为多智能体强化学习中广泛采用的范例，强调利用全局信息来学习增强的联合 $Q$ 功能或集中批评家。相比之下，我们的调查深入研究利用全球信息来直接增强个人 $Q$ 功能或个人参与者。值得注意的是，我们发现在所有代理中普遍应用相同的全局信息不足以实现最佳性能。因此，我们主张为每个代理定制全局信息，创建代理个性化的全局信息以提高整体绩效。此外，我们引入了一种名为个性化训练与蒸馏执行（PTDE）的新颖范式，其中代理个性化全局信息被提取到代理的本地信息中。然后在分散执行期间利用这些提取的信息，从而将性能下降降至最低。 PTDE 可以与最先进的算法无缝集成，从而在各种基准测试中显着提高性能，包括 SMAC 基准测试、Google Research Football (GRF) 基准测试和学习排名 (LTR) 任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PTDE的新范式，通过个性化训练与蒸馏执行，提升多智能体强化学习中个体智能体的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CTDE方法虽利用全局信息优化联合Q函数，但统一应用全局信息无法满足各智能体的个性化需求，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计PTDE框架，将定制化的全局信息蒸馏至各智能体的本地信息中，实现去中心化执行时的性能保持。
AI.result: PTDE在SMAC、GRF和LTR等基准测试中均取得显著性能提升，且可无缝集成现有算法。
AI.conclusion: 个性化全局信息能有效提升多智能体系统表现，PTDE为多智能体强化学习提供了新思路与实用方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PTDE的新范式，通过个性化训练与蒸馏执行，提升多智能体强化学习中个体智能体的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统CTDE方法虽利用全局信息优化联合Q函数，但统一应用全局信息无法满足各智能体的个性化需求，导致性能不足。
ai_content.method: 设计PTDE框架，将定制化的全局信息蒸馏至各智能体的本地信息中，实现去中心化执行时的性能保持。

search_text: PTDE: Personalized Training with Distilled Execution for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning PTDE：多智能体强化学习的精炼执行个性化训练 Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) has emerged as a widely adopted paradigm in multi-agent reinforcement learning, emphasizing the utilization of global information for learning an enhanced joint $Q$-function or centralized critic. In contrast, our investigation delves into harnessing global information to directly enhance individual $Q$-functions or individual actors. Notably, we discover that applying identical global information universally across all agents proves insufficient for optimal performance. Consequently, we advocate for the customization of global information tailored to each agent, creating agent-personalized global information to bolster overall performance. Furthermore, we introduce a novel paradigm named Personalized Training with Distilled Execution (PTDE), wherein agent-personalized global information is distilled into the agent's local information. This distilled information is then utilized during decentralized execution, resulting in minimal performance degradation. PTDE can be seamlessly integrated with state-of-the-art algorithms, leading to notable performance enhancements across diverse benchmarks, including the SMAC benchmark, Google Research Football (GRF) benchmark, and Learning to Rank (LTR) task. 集中训练与分散执行（CTDE）已成为多智能体强化学习中广泛采用的范例，强调利用全局信息来学习增强的联合 $Q$ 功能或集中批评家。相比之下，我们的调查深入研究利用全球信息来直接增强个人 $Q$ 功能或个人参与者。值得注意的是，我们发现在所有代理中普遍应用相同的全局信息不足以实现最佳性能。因此，我们主张为每个代理定制全局信息，创建代理个性化的全局信息以提高整体绩效。此外，我们引入了一种名为个性化训练与蒸馏执行（PTDE）的新颖范式，其中代理个性化全局信息被提取到代理的本地信息中。然后在分散执行期间利用这些提取的信息，从而将性能下降降至最低。 PTDE 可以与最先进的算法无缝集成，从而在各种基准测试中显着提高性能，包括 SMAC 基准测试、Google Research Football (GRF) 基准测试和学习排名 (LTR) 任务。 本文提出了一种名为PTDE的新范式，通过个性化训练与蒸馏执行，提升多智能体强化学习中个体智能体的性能。 Yiqun Chen,Hangyu Mao,Jiaxin Mao,Shiguang Wu,Tianle Zhang,Bin Zhang,Wei Yang,Hongxing Chang cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Jialiang Sun,Tingsong Jiang,Wen Yao,Donghua Wang,Xiaoqian Chen
title: Differential Evolution based Dual Adversarial Camouflage: Fooling Human Eyes and Object Detectors
title_zh: 基于差分进化的双重对抗性伪装：欺骗人眼和物体探测器
abstract: Recent studies reveal that deep neural network (DNN) based object detectors are vulnerable to adversarial attacks in the form of adding the perturbation to the images, leading to the wrong output of object detectors. Most current existing works focus on generating perturbed images, also called adversarial examples, to fool object detectors. Though the generated adversarial examples themselves can remain a certain naturalness, most of them can still be easily observed by human eyes, which limits their further application in the real world. To alleviate this problem, we propose a differential evolution based dual adversarial camouflage (DE_DAC) method, composed of two stages to fool human eyes and object detectors simultaneously. Specifically, we try to obtain the camouflage texture, which can be rendered over the surface of the object. In the first stage, we optimize the global texture to minimize the discrepancy between the rendered object and the scene images, making human eyes difficult to distinguish. In the second stage, we design three loss functions to optimize the local texture, making object detectors ineffective. In addition, we introduce the differential evolution algorithm to search for the near-optimal areas of the object to attack, improving the adversarial performance under certain attack area limitations. Besides, we also study the performance of adaptive DE_DAC, which can be adapted to the environment. Experiments show that our proposed method could obtain a good trade-off between the fooling human eyes and object detectors under multiple specific scenes and objects.
summary: Recent studies reveal that deep neural network (DNN) based object detectors are vulnerable to adversarial attacks in the form of adding the perturbation to the images, leading to the wrong output of object detectors. Most current existing works focus on generating perturbed images, also called adversarial examples, to fool object detectors. Though the generated adversarial examples themselves can remain a certain naturalness, most of them can still be easily observed by human eyes, which limits their further application in the real world. To alleviate this problem, we propose a differential evolution based dual adversarial camouflage (DE_DAC) method, composed of two stages to fool human eyes and object detectors simultaneously. Specifically, we try to obtain the camouflage texture, which can be rendered over the surface of the object. In the first stage, we optimize the global texture to minimize the discrepancy between the rendered object and the scene images, making human eyes difficult to distinguish. In the second stage, we design three loss functions to optimize the local texture, making object detectors ineffective. In addition, we introduce the differential evolution algorithm to search for the near-optimal areas of the object to attack, improving the adversarial performance under certain attack area limitations. Besides, we also study the performance of adaptive DE_DAC, which can be adapted to the environment. Experiments show that our proposed method could obtain a good trade-off between the fooling human eyes and object detectors under multiple specific scenes and objects.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，基于深度神经网络（DNN）的目标检测器很容易受到对抗性攻击，其形式是向图像添加扰动，从而导致目标检测器的错误输出。目前大多数现有的工作都集中在生成扰动图像（也称为对抗性示例）来欺骗对象检测器。尽管生成的对抗样本本身可以保持一定的自然性，但其中大多数仍然可以很容易地被人眼观察到，这限制了它们在现实世界中的进一步应用。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于差分进化的双重对抗性伪装（DE_DAC）方法，该方法由两个阶段组成，可以同时欺骗人眼和物体检测器。具体来说，我们尝试获取可以在物体表面渲染的迷彩纹理。在第一阶段，我们优化全局纹理，以尽量减少渲染对象与场景图像之间的差异，使人眼难以区分。在第二阶段，我们设计了三个损失函数来优化局部纹理，使目标检测器无效。此外，我们引入差分进化算法来搜索攻击对象的近最优区域，提高了某些攻击区域限制下的对抗性能。此外，我们还研究了自适应DE_DAC的性能，使其能够适应环境。实验表明，我们提出的方法可以在多个特定场景和物体下，在欺骗人眼和物体检测器之间取得良好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于差分进化的双重对抗伪装方法，同时欺骗人类视觉和目标检测器
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本虽具一定自然性但易被人类察觉，限制了实际应用中的隐蔽性
AI.method: 分两阶段优化纹理：第一阶段用差分进化算法最小化物体与场景差异，第二阶段通过三个损失函数破坏检测器性能，并设计自适应版本适应环境变化
AI.result: 在多场景多物体实验中实现人类视觉与检测器欺骗效果的平衡，攻击性能优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过全局-局部双重优化机制，在保持图像自然性的同时有效攻击检测器，具有实际应用潜力

authors_text: Zhanqiang Guo,Yao Luan,Jianjiang Feng,Wangsheng Lu,Yin Yin,Guangming Yang,Jie Zhou
title: Cerebrovascular Segmentation via Vessel Oriented Filtering Network
title_zh: 通过面向血管的过滤网络进行脑血管分割
abstract: Accurate cerebrovascular segmentation from Magnetic Resonance Angiography (MRA) and Computed Tomography Angiography (CTA) is of great significance in diagnosis and treatment of cerebrovascular pathology. Due to the complexity and topology variability of blood vessels, complete and accurate segmentation of vascular network is still a challenge. In this paper, we proposed a Vessel Oriented Filtering Network (VOF-Net) which embeds domain knowledge into the convolutional neural network. We design oriented filters for blood vessels according to vessel orientation field, which is obtained by orientation estimation network. Features extracted by oriented filtering are injected into segmentation network, so as to make use of the prior information that the blood vessels are slender and curved tubular structure. Experimental results on datasets of CTA and MRA show that the proposed method is effective for vessel segmentation, and embedding the specific vascular filter improves the segmentation performance.
summary: Accurate cerebrovascular segmentation from Magnetic Resonance Angiography (MRA) and Computed Tomography Angiography (CTA) is of great significance in diagnosis and treatment of cerebrovascular pathology. Due to the complexity and topology variability of blood vessels, complete and accurate segmentation of vascular network is still a challenge. In this paper, we proposed a Vessel Oriented Filtering Network (VOF-Net) which embeds domain knowledge into the convolutional neural network. We design oriented filters for blood vessels according to vessel orientation field, which is obtained by orientation estimation network. Features extracted by oriented filtering are injected into segmentation network, so as to make use of the prior information that the blood vessels are slender and curved tubular structure. Experimental results on datasets of CTA and MRA show that the proposed method is effective for vessel segmentation, and embedding the specific vascular filter improves the segmentation performance.
abstract_zh: 磁共振血管造影（MRA）和计算机断层扫描血管造影（CTA）准确的脑血管分割对于脑血管病理的诊断和治疗具有重要意义。由于血管的复杂性和拓扑变化性，完整而准确的血管网络分割仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向容器的过滤网络（VOF-Net），它将领域知识嵌入到卷积神经网络中。我们根据方向估计网络获得的血管方向场设计血管的定向滤波器。将定向过滤提取的特征注入分割网络，以利用血管是细长且弯曲的管状结构的先验信息。在CTA和MRA数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法对于血管分割是有效的，并且嵌入特定血管滤波器提高了分割性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于血管方向场的定向滤波网络（VOF-Net），用于提高脑血管分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于脑血管结构复杂且拓扑多变，传统方法难以实现准确分割，需结合先验知识提升性能。
AI.method: 设计基于血管方向场的定向滤波器，提取特征并注入分割网络，利用血管细长弯曲的先验信息。
AI.result: 在CTA和MRA数据集上验证，方法有效且嵌入血管滤波器提升了分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 将领域知识嵌入CNN能有效提升脑血管分割的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Reducing Collision Checking for Sampling-Based Motion Planning Using Graph Neural Networks
