abstract: Sampling-based motion planning is a popular approach in robotics for finding paths in continuous configuration spaces. Checking collision with obstacles is the major computational bottleneck in this process. We propose new learning-based methods for reducing collision checking to accelerate motion planning by training graph neural networks (GNNs) that perform path exploration and path smoothing. Given random geometric graphs (RGGs) generated from batch sampling, the path exploration component iteratively predicts collision-free edges to prioritize their exploration. The path smoothing component then optimizes paths obtained from the exploration stage. The methods benefit from the ability of GNNs of capturing geometric patterns from RGGs through batch sampling and generalize better to unseen environments. Experimental results show that the learned components can significantly reduce collision checking and improve overall planning efficiency in challenging high-dimensional motion planning tasks.
summary: Sampling-based motion planning is a popular approach in robotics for finding paths in continuous configuration spaces. Checking collision with obstacles is the major computational bottleneck in this process. We propose new learning-based methods for reducing collision checking to accelerate motion planning by training graph neural networks (GNNs) that perform path exploration and path smoothing. Given random geometric graphs (RGGs) generated from batch sampling, the path exploration component iteratively predicts collision-free edges to prioritize their exploration. The path smoothing component then optimizes paths obtained from the exploration stage. The methods benefit from the ability of GNNs of capturing geometric patterns from RGGs through batch sampling and generalize better to unseen environments. Experimental results show that the learned components can significantly reduce collision checking and improve overall planning efficiency in challenging high-dimensional motion planning tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于采样的运动规划是机器人技术中用于在连续配置空间中寻找路径的流行方法。检查与障碍物的碰撞是该过程中的主要计算瓶颈。我们提出了基于学习的新方法，通过训练执行路径探索和路径平滑的图神经网络（GNN）来减少碰撞检查，从而加速运动规划。给定批量采样生成的随机几何图（RGG），路径探索组件迭代地预测无碰撞边缘以优先考虑其探索。然后，路径平滑组件优化从探索阶段获得的路径。这些方法受益于 GNN 通过批量采样从 RGG 捕获几何图案的能力，并更好地推广到不可见的环境。实验结果表明，在具有挑战性的高维运动规划任务中，学习的组件可以显着减少碰撞检查并提高总体规划效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用图神经网络减少基于采样的运动规划中的碰撞检测次数，以提升规划效率。
AI.motivation: 基于采样的运动规划中，碰撞检测是主要的计算瓶颈，需要更高效的方法来减少检测次数。
AI.method: 通过训练图神经网络（GNN），分为路径探索和路径平滑两个组件，利用批量采样的随机几何图（RGG）预测无碰撞边并优化路径。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在复杂高维运动规划任务中显著减少了碰撞检测次数，提高了整体规划效率。
AI.conclusion: GNN能够有效捕捉几何模式，提升碰撞检测减少效果，并在未知环境中表现良好。

The methods benefit from the ability of GNNs of capturing geometric patterns from RGGs through batch sampling and generalize better to unseen environments. authors_text: Annie S. Chen,Archit Sharma,Sergey Levine,Chelsea Finn
title: You Only Live Once: Single-Life Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 你只活一次：单一生命强化学习
abstract: Reinforcement learning algorithms are typically designed to learn a performant policy that can repeatedly and autonomously complete a task, usually starting from scratch. However, in many real-world situations, the goal might not be to learn a policy that can do the task repeatedly, but simply to perform a new task successfully once in a single trial. For example, imagine a disaster relief robot tasked with retrieving an item from a fallen building, where it cannot get direct supervision from humans. It must retrieve this object within one test-time trial, and must do so while tackling unknown obstacles, though it may leverage knowledge it has of the building before the disaster. We formalize this problem setting, which we call single-life reinforcement learning (SLRL), where an agent must complete a task within a single episode without interventions, utilizing its prior experience while contending with some form of novelty. SLRL provides a natural setting to study the challenge of autonomously adapting to unfamiliar situations, and we find that algorithms designed for standard episodic reinforcement learning often struggle to recover from out-of-distribution states in this setting. Motivated by this observation, we propose an algorithm, $Q$-weighted adversarial learning (QWALE), which employs a distribution matching strategy that leverages the agent's prior experience as guidance in novel situations. Our experiments on several single-life continuous control problems indicate that methods based on our distribution matching formulation are 20-60% more successful because they can more quickly recover from novel states.
summary: Reinforcement learning algorithms are typically designed to learn a performant policy that can repeatedly and autonomously complete a task, usually starting from scratch. However, in many real-world situations, the goal might not be to learn a policy that can do the task repeatedly, but simply to perform a new task successfully once in a single trial. For example, imagine a disaster relief robot tasked with retrieving an item from a fallen building, where it cannot get direct supervision from humans. It must retrieve this object within one test-time trial, and must do so while tackling unknown obstacles, though it may leverage knowledge it has of the building before the disaster. We formalize this problem setting, which we call single-life reinforcement learning (SLRL), where an agent must complete a task within a single episode without interventions, utilizing its prior experience while contending with some form of novelty. SLRL provides a natural setting to study the challenge of autonomously adapting to unfamiliar situations, and we find that algorithms designed for standard episodic reinforcement learning often struggle to recover from out-of-distribution states in this setting. Motivated by this observation, we propose an algorithm, $Q$-weighted adversarial learning (QWALE), which employs a distribution matching strategy that leverages the agent's prior experience as guidance in novel situations. Our experiments on several single-life continuous control problems indicate that methods based on our distribution matching formulation are 20-60% more successful because they can more quickly recover from novel states.
abstract_zh: 强化学习算法通常旨在学习可以重复且自主地完成任务（通常从头开始）的高性能策略。然而，在许多现实情况下，目标可能不是学习可以重复执行任务的策略，而只是在一次试验中成功执行一次新任务。例如，想象一个救灾机器人的任务是从倒塌的建筑物中检索物品，但它无法得到人类的直接监督。它必须在一次测试中取回该物体，并且必须在解决未知障碍的同时这样做，尽管它可能会利用灾难前对建筑物的了解。我们将这个问题设置形式化，称为单生命强化学习（SLRL），其中代理必须在没有干预的情况下在单个情节内完成任务，利用其先前的经验，同时应对某种形式的新奇事物。 SLRL 提供了一个自然的环境来研究自主适应陌生情况的挑战，我们发现为标准情景强化学习设计的算法通常很难从这种环境中的分布外状态中恢复。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种算法，即 $Q$ 加权对抗性学习 (QWALE)，该算法采用分布匹配策略，利用代理的先前经验作为新情况下的指导。我们对几个单寿命连续控制问题的实验表明，基于我们的分布匹配公式的方法成功率高 20-60%，因为它们可以更快地从新状态中恢复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出单次生命强化学习（SLRL）问题，设计QWALE算法解决单次任务成功场景下的未知障碍应对问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习专注于重复任务，但现实场景常需单次成功（如灾难救援），此时标准算法难以处理未知障碍和分布外状态。
AI.method: 提出QWALE算法，通过分布匹配策略利用先验经验指导新状态下的决策，增强对未知环境的适应能力。
AI.result: 在多个单次连续控制任务中，QWALE方法成功率提升20-60%，显著优于传统算法的恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: SLRL为研究自主适应性提供新场景，传统方法在分布外状态表现不足，而分布匹配策略能有效提升单次任务成功率。

authors_text: Shu Zhao,Almıla Akdağ Salah,Albert Ali Salah
title: Automatic Analysis of Human Body Representations in Western Art
title_zh: 西方艺术中人体表现的自动分析
abstract: The way the human body is depicted in classical and modern paintings is relevant for art historical analyses. Each artist has certain themes and concerns, resulting in different poses being used more heavily than others. In this paper, we propose a computer vision pipeline to analyse human pose and representations in paintings, which can be used for specific artists or periods. Specifically, we combine two pose estimation approaches (OpenPose and DensePose, respectively) and introduce methods to deal with occlusion and perspective issues. For normalisation, we map the detected poses and contours to Leonardo da Vinci's Vitruvian Man, the classical depiction of body proportions. We propose a visualisation approach for illustrating the articulation of joints in a set of paintings. Combined with a hierarchical clustering of poses, our approach reveals common and uncommon poses used by artists. Our approach improves over purely skeleton based analyses of human body in paintings.
summary: The way the human body is depicted in classical and modern paintings is relevant for art historical analyses. Each artist has certain themes and concerns, resulting in different poses being used more heavily than others. In this paper, we propose a computer vision pipeline to analyse human pose and representations in paintings, which can be used for specific artists or periods. Specifically, we combine two pose estimation approaches (OpenPose and DensePose, respectively) and introduce methods to deal with occlusion and perspective issues. For normalisation, we map the detected poses and contours to Leonardo da Vinci's Vitruvian Man, the classical depiction of body proportions. We propose a visualisation approach for illustrating the articulation of joints in a set of paintings. Combined with a hierarchical clustering of poses, our approach reveals common and uncommon poses used by artists. Our approach improves over purely skeleton based analyses of human body in paintings.
abstract_zh: 古典和现代绘画中描绘人体的方式与艺术史分析相关。每个艺术家都有特定的主题和关注点，导致不同的姿势比其他艺术家被更多地使用。在本文中，我们提出了一种计算机视觉管道来分析绘画中的人体姿势和表现，可用于特定的艺术家或时期。具体来说，我们结合了两种姿态估计方法（分别是 OpenPose 和 DensePose），并引入了处理遮挡和透视问题的方法。为了标准化，我们将检测到的姿势和轮廓映射到达芬奇的维特鲁威人，这是身体比例的经典描述。我们提出了一种可视化方法来说明一组绘画中关节的清晰度。结合姿势的层次聚类，我们的方法揭示了艺术家使用的常见和不常见的姿势。我们的方法改进了绘画中纯粹基于骨骼的人体分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合计算机视觉技术的分析方法，用于研究西方艺术作品中人体姿态的表现方式。
AI.motivation: 不同艺术家在绘画中对人体姿态的使用存在差异，传统分析方法难以系统量化这些差异。
AI.method: 融合OpenPose和DensePose两种姿态估计技术，结合遮挡处理与透视校正，并以达芬奇《维特鲁威人》为基准进行人体比例归一化，通过关节可视化与层次聚类分析姿态特征。
AI.result: 成功识别出不同时期/艺术家作品中常见的姿态模式及独特姿态，验证了该方法对绘画人体分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 相较于单纯骨骼分析，该方法能更全面地揭示绘画中人体姿态的艺术特征与演变规律。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合计算机视觉技术的分析方法，用于研究西方艺术作品中人体姿态的表现方式。
ai_content.motivation: 不同艺术家在绘画中对人体姿态的使用存在差异，传统分析方法难以系统量化这些差异。
ai_content.method: 融合OpenPose和DensePose两种姿态估计技术，结合遮挡处理与透视校正，并以达芬奇《维特鲁威人》为基准进行人体比例归一化，通过关节可视化与层次聚类分析姿态特征。
ai_content.result: 成功识别出不同时期/艺术家作品中常见的姿态模式及独特姿态，验证了该方法对绘画人体分析的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 相较于单纯骨骼分析，该方法能更全面地揭示绘画中人体姿态的艺术特征与演变规律。

search_text: Automatic Analysis of Human Body Representations in Western Art 西方艺术中人体表现的自动分析 The way the human body is depicted in classical and modern paintings is relevant for art historical analyses. Each artist has certain themes and concerns, resulting in different poses being used more heavily than others. In this paper, we propose a computer vision pipeline to analyse human pose and representations in paintings, which can be used for specific artists or periods. Specifically, we combine two pose estimation approaches (OpenPose and DensePose, respectively) and introduce methods to deal with occlusion and perspective issues. For normalisation, we map the detected poses and contours to Leonardo da Vinci's Vitruvian Man, the classical depiction of body proportions. We propose a visualisation approach for illustrating the articulation of joints in a set of paintings. Combined with a hierarchical clustering of poses, our approach reveals common and uncommon poses used by artists. Our approach improves over purely skeleton based analyses of human body in paintings. 古典和现代绘画中描绘人体的方式与艺术史分析相关。每个艺术家都有特定的主题和关注点，导致不同的姿势比其他艺术家被更多地使用。在本文中，我们提出了一种计算机视觉管道来分析绘画中的人体姿势和表现，可用于特定的艺术家或时期。具体来说，我们结合了两种姿态估计方法（分别是 OpenPose 和 DensePose），并引入了处理遮挡和透视问题的方法。为了标准化，我们将检测到的姿势和轮廓映射到达芬奇的维特鲁威人，这是身体比例的经典描述。我们提出了一种可视化方法来说明一组绘画中关节的清晰度。结合姿势的层次聚类，我们的方法揭示了艺术家使用的常见和不常见的姿势。我们的方法改进了绘画中纯粹基于骨骼的人体分析。 本文提出了一种结合计算机视觉技术的分析方法，用于研究西方艺术作品中人体姿态的表现方式。 Shu Zhao,Almıla Akdağ Salah,Albert Ali Salah cs.CV

authors_text: Mingqi Gao,Xiaojun Wan
title: Social Biases in Automatic Evaluation Metrics for NLG
title_zh: NLG 自动评估指标中的社会偏见
abstract: Many studies have revealed that word embeddings, language models, and models for specific downstream tasks in NLP are prone to social biases, especially gender bias. Recently these techniques have been gradually applied to automatic evaluation metrics for text generation. In the paper, we propose an evaluation method based on Word Embeddings Association Test (WEAT) and Sentence Embeddings Association Test (SEAT) to quantify social biases in evaluation metrics and discover that social biases are also widely present in some model-based automatic evaluation metrics. Moreover, we construct gender-swapped meta-evaluation datasets to explore the potential impact of gender bias in image caption and text summarization tasks. Results show that given gender-neutral references in the evaluation, model-based evaluation metrics may show a preference for the male hypothesis, and the performance of them, i.e. the correlation between evaluation metrics and human judgments, usually has more significant variation after gender swapping.
summary: Many studies have revealed that word embeddings, language models, and models for specific downstream tasks in NLP are prone to social biases, especially gender bias. Recently these techniques have been gradually applied to automatic evaluation metrics for text generation. In the paper, we propose an evaluation method based on Word Embeddings Association Test (WEAT) and Sentence Embeddings Association Test (SEAT) to quantify social biases in evaluation metrics and discover that social biases are also widely present in some model-based automatic evaluation metrics. Moreover, we construct gender-swapped meta-evaluation datasets to explore the potential impact of gender bias in image caption and text summarization tasks. Results show that given gender-neutral references in the evaluation, model-based evaluation metrics may show a preference for the male hypothesis, and the performance of them, i.e. the correlation between evaluation metrics and human judgments, usually has more significant variation after gender swapping.
abstract_zh: 许多研究表明，NLP 中的词嵌入、语言模型和特定下游任务的模型容易产生社会偏见，尤其是性别偏见。最近这些技术已逐渐应用于文本生成的自动评估指标。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于词嵌入关联测试（WEAT）和句子嵌入关联测试（SEAT）的评估方法来量化评估指标中的社会偏见，并发现社会偏见也广泛存在于一些基于模型的自动评估指标中。此外，我们构建了性别交换元评估数据集，以探索性别偏见在图像标题和文本摘要任务中的潜在影响。结果表明，在评估中考虑到性别中立的参考，基于模型的评估指标可能会表现出对男性假设的偏好，并且它们的表现，即评估指标与人类判断之间的相关性，通常在性别交换后有更显着的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自然语言生成自动评估指标中的社会偏见问题，提出基于WEAT/SEAT的量化方法并构建性别交换数据集进行验证。
AI.motivation: 现有自动评估指标可能继承模型和社会数据中的偏见，影响评估公平性，需检测并量化此类社会偏见的存在与影响。
AI.method: 采用词嵌入关联测试（WEAT）和句子嵌入关联测试（SEAT）量化评估指标偏见，构建性别交换元评估数据集进行图像描述与文本摘要任务的对比实验。
AI.result: 性别中立参考下模型评估指标仍偏好男性假设，性别交换后指标与人类判断的相关性呈现显著波动。
AI.conclusion: 主流自动评估指标存在社会偏见，需开发更公平的评估方法以减少偏见对模型优化的负面影响。

authors_text: Wenhe Jia,Lu Yang,Zilong Jia,Wenyi Zhao,Yilin Zhou,Qing Song
title: TIVE: A Toolbox for Identifying Video Instance Segmentation Errors
title_zh: TIVE：识别视频实例分割错误的工具箱
abstract: Since first proposed, Video Instance Segmentation(VIS) task has attracted vast researchers' focus on architecture modeling to boost performance. Though great advances achieved in online and offline paradigms, there are still insufficient means to identify model errors and distinguish discrepancies between methods, as well approaches that correctly reflect models' performance in recognizing object instances of various temporal lengths remain barely available. More importantly, as the fundamental model abilities demanded by the task, spatial segmentation and temporal association are still understudied in both evaluation and interaction mechanisms. In this paper, we introduce TIVE, a Toolbox for Identifying Video instance segmentation Errors. By directly operating output prediction files, TIVE defines isolated error types and weights each type's damage to mAP, for the purpose of distinguishing model characters. By decomposing localization quality in spatial-temporal dimensions, model's potential drawbacks on spatial segmentation and temporal association can be revealed. TIVE can also report mAP over instance temporal length for real applications. We conduct extensive experiments by the toolbox to further illustrate how spatial segmentation and temporal association affect each other. We expect the analysis of TIVE can give the researchers more insights, guiding the community to promote more meaningful explorations for video instance segmentation. The proposed toolbox is available at https://github.com/wenhe-jia/TIVE.
summary: Since first proposed, Video Instance Segmentation(VIS) task has attracted vast researchers' focus on architecture modeling to boost performance. Though great advances achieved in online and offline paradigms, there are still insufficient means to identify model errors and distinguish discrepancies between methods, as well approaches that correctly reflect models' performance in recognizing object instances of various temporal lengths remain barely available. More importantly, as the fundamental model abilities demanded by the task, spatial segmentation and temporal association are still understudied in both evaluation and interaction mechanisms. In this paper, we introduce TIVE, a Toolbox for Identifying Video instance segmentation Errors. By directly operating output prediction files, TIVE defines isolated error types and weights each type's damage to mAP, for the purpose of distinguishing model characters. By decomposing localization quality in spatial-temporal dimensions, model's potential drawbacks on spatial segmentation and temporal association can be revealed. TIVE can also report mAP over instance temporal length for real applications. We conduct extensive experiments by the toolbox to further illustrate how spatial segmentation and temporal association affect each other. We expect the analysis of TIVE can give the researchers more insights, guiding the community to promote more meaningful explorations for video instance segmentation. The proposed toolbox is available at https://github.com/wenhe-jia/TIVE.
abstract_zh: 自首次提出以来，视频实例分割（VIS）任务吸引了广大研究人员对架构建模以提高性能的关注。尽管在线和离线范式取得了巨大进步，但仍然没有足够的手段来识别模型错误和区分方法之间的差异，并且正确反映模型在识别不同时间长度的对象实例方面的性能的方法仍然几乎不可用。更重要的是，作为任务所需的基本模型能力，空间分割和时间关联在评估和交互机制方面仍然没有得到充分研究。在本文中，我们介绍了 TIVE，一个用于识别视频实例分割错误的工具箱。 TIVE通过直接操作输出预测文件，定义孤立的错误类型，并对每种类型的损害对mAP进行加权，以达到区分模型特征的目的。通过在时空维度上分解定位质量，可以揭示模型在空间分割和时间关联方面的潜在缺陷。 TIVE 还可以针对实际应用程序报告实例时间长度上的 mAP。我们通过工具箱进行了广泛的实验，以进一步说明空间分割和时间关联如何相互影响。我们期望对 TIVE 的分析能够为研究人员提供更多见解，引导社区推动对视频实例分割更有意义的探索。建议的工具箱可在 https://github.com/wenhe-jia/TIVE 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出TIVE工具箱，用于识别视频实例分割中的错误，分析模型在空间分割和时间关联上的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有视频实例分割方法缺乏有效手段识别模型错误及区分方法差异，且空间分割与时间关联的评估机制研究不足。
AI.method: 通过分析预测文件定义错误类型并加权其对mAP的影响，分解空间-时间维度的定位质量，揭示模型在空间分割与时间关联上的潜在问题，并报告实例时间长度的mAP。
AI.result: 实验表明空间分割与时间关联相互影响，TIVE能有效揭示模型缺陷并指导改进方向。
AI.conclusion: TIVE为视频实例分割研究提供分析工具，有助于深入理解模型特性并推动领域发展。

We conduct extensive experiments by the toolbox to further illustrate how spatial segmentation and temporal association affect each other. We expect the analysis of TIVE can give the researchers more insights, guiding the community to promote more meaningful explorations for video instance segmentation. The proposed toolbox is available at https://github.com/wenhe-jia/TIVE. 自首次提出以来，视频实例分割（VIS）任务吸引了广大研究人员对架构建模以提高性能的关注。尽管在线和离线范式取得了巨大进步，但仍然没有足够的手段来识别模型错误和区分方法之间的差异，并且正确反映模型在识别不同时间长度的对象实例方面的性能的方法仍然几乎不可用。更重要的是，作为任务所需的基本模型能力，空间分割和时间关联在评估和交互机制方面仍然没有得到充分研究。在本文中，我们介绍了 TIVE，一个用于识别视频实例分割错误的工具箱。 TIVE通过直接操作输出预测文件，定义孤立的错误类型，并对每种类型的损害对mAP进行加权，以达到区分模型特征的目的。通过在时空维度上分解定位质量，可以揭示模型在空间分割和时间关联方面的潜在缺陷。 TIVE 还可以针对实际应用程序报告实例时间长度上的 mAP。我们通过工具箱进行了广泛的实验，以进一步说明空间分割和时间关联如何相互影响。我们期望对 TIVE 的分析能够为研究人员提供更多见解，引导社区推动对视频实例分割更有意义的探索。建议的工具箱可在 https://github.com/wenhe-jia/TIVE 获取。 提出TIVE工具箱，用于识别视频实例分割中的错误，分析模型在空间分割和时间关联上的缺陷。 Wenhe Jia,Lu Yang,Zilong Jia,Wenyi Zhao,Yilin Zhou,Qing Song cs.CV

authors_text: Peirong Zhang,Jiajia Jiang,Yuliang Liu,Lianwen Jin
title: MSDS: A Large-Scale Chinese Signature and Token Digit String Dataset for Handwriting Verification
title_zh: MSDS：用于手写验证的大规模中文签名和令牌数字串数据集
abstract: Although online handwriting verification has made great progress recently, the verification performances are still far behind the real usage owing to the small scale of the datasets as well as the limited biometric mediums. Therefore, this paper proposes a new handwriting verification benchmark dataset named Multimodal Signature and Digit String (MSDS), which consists of two subsets: MSDS-ChS (Chinese Signatures) and MSDS-TDS (Token Digit Strings), contributed by 402 users, with 20 genuine samples and 20 skilled forgeries per user per subset. MSDS-ChS consists of handwritten Chinese signatures, which, to the best of our knowledge, is the largest publicly available Chinese signature dataset for handwriting verification, at least eight times larger than existing online datasets. Meanwhile, MSDS-TDS consists of handwritten Token Digit Strings, i.e, the actual phone numbers of users, which have not been explored yet. Extensive experiments with different baselines are respectively conducted for MSDS-ChS and MSDS-TDS. Surprisingly, verification performances of state-of-the-art methods on MSDS-TDS are generally better than those on MSDS-ChS, which indicates that the handwritten Token Digit String could be a more effective biometric than handwritten Chinese signature. This is a promising discovery that could inspire us to explore new biometric traits. The MSDS dataset is available at https://github.com/HCIILAB/MSDS.
summary: Although online handwriting verification has made great progress recently, the verification performances are still far behind the real usage owing to the small scale of the datasets as well as the limited biometric mediums. Therefore, this paper proposes a new handwriting verification benchmark dataset named Multimodal Signature and Digit String (MSDS), which consists of two subsets: MSDS-ChS (Chinese Signatures) and MSDS-TDS (Token Digit Strings), contributed by 402 users, with 20 genuine samples and 20 skilled forgeries per user per subset. MSDS-ChS consists of handwritten Chinese signatures, which, to the best of our knowledge, is the largest publicly available Chinese signature dataset for handwriting verification, at least eight times larger than existing online datasets. Meanwhile, MSDS-TDS consists of handwritten Token Digit Strings, i.e, the actual phone numbers of users, which have not been explored yet. Extensive experiments with different baselines are respectively conducted for MSDS-ChS and MSDS-TDS. Surprisingly, verification performances of state-of-the-art methods on MSDS-TDS are generally better than those on MSDS-ChS, which indicates that the handwritten Token Digit String could be a more effective biometric than handwritten Chinese signature. This is a promising discovery that could inspire us to explore new biometric traits. The MSDS dataset is available at https://github.com/HCIILAB/MSDS.
abstract_zh: 尽管在线笔迹验证近年来取得了很大进展，但由于数据集规模较小以及生物识别介质有限，验证性能仍然远远落后于实际使用。因此，本文提出了一个新的手写验证基准数据集，名为多模态签名和数字字符串（MSDS），它由两个子集组成：MSDS-ChS（中文签名）和MSDS-TDS（令牌数字字符串），由402个用户贡献，每个子集有20个真实样本和20个熟练伪造样本。 MSDS-ChS 由手写中文签名组成，据我们所知，这是用于手写验证的最大的公开中文签名数据集，至少比现有在线数据集大八倍。同时，MSDS-TDS由手写的令牌数字字符串组成，即用户的实际电话号码，目前尚未被探索。对MSDS-ChS和MSDS-TDS分别进行了不同基线的大量实验。令人惊讶的是，最先进的方法在 MSDS-TDS 上的验证性能通常优于 MSDS-ChS，这表明手写的令牌数字字符串可能是比手写的中文签名更有效的生物特征识别。这是一个有希望的发现，可以激励我们探索新的生物识别特征。 MSDS 数据集可从 https://github.com/HCIILAB/MSDS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为MSDS的大规模中文签名和数字字符串手写验证数据集，包含两个子集：MSDS-ChS（中文签名）和MSDS-TDS（数字字符串），用于提升手写验证性能。
AI.motivation: 现有手写验证数据集规模较小且生物特征媒介有限，导致验证性能无法满足实际需求，亟需更大规模和更多样化的数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含402名用户、每用户每子集20个真样本和20个熟练伪造样本的MSDS数据集，分别针对MSDS-ChS和MSDS-TDS进行多基线实验对比。
AI.result: 实验发现，先进方法在MSDS-TDS上的验证性能普遍优于MSDS-ChS，表明手写数字字符串可能比中文签名更有效的生物特征。
AI.conclusion: MSDS数据集为手写验证研究提供新资源，揭示数字字符串作为生物特征的潜力，可能推动新型生物特征的探索。

authors_text: Sandipana Dowerah,Romain Serizel,Denis Jouvet,Mohammad Mohammadamini,Driss Matrouf
title: How to Leverage DNN-based speech enhancement for multi-channel speaker verification?
title_zh: 如何利用基于 DNN 的语音增强进行多通道说话人验证？
comment: ef:4th International Conference on Advances in Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence (ASPAI' 2022), Oct 2022, Corfu, Greece
comments: ef:4th International Conference on Advances in Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence (ASPAI' 2022), Oct 2022, Corfu, Greece
abstract: Speaker verification (SV) suffers from unsatisfactory performance in far-field scenarios due to environmental noise andthe adverse impact of room reverberation. This work presents a benchmark of multichannel speech enhancement for far-fieldspeaker verification. One approach is a deep neural network-based, and the other is a combination of deep neural network andsignal processing. We integrated a DNN architecture with signal processing techniques to carry out various experiments. Ourapproach is compared to the existing state-of-the-art approaches. We examine the importance of enrollment in pre-processing,which has been largely overlooked in previous studies. Experimental evaluation shows that pre-processing can improve the SVperformance as long as the enrollment files are processed similarly to the test data and that test and enrollment occur within similarSNR ranges. Considerable improvement is obtained on the generated and all the noise conditions of the VOiCES dataset.
summary: Speaker verification (SV) suffers from unsatisfactory performance in far-field scenarios due to environmental noise andthe adverse impact of room reverberation. This work presents a benchmark of multichannel speech enhancement for far-fieldspeaker verification. One approach is a deep neural network-based, and the other is a combination of deep neural network andsignal processing. We integrated a DNN architecture with signal processing techniques to carry out various experiments. Ourapproach is compared to the existing state-of-the-art approaches. We examine the importance of enrollment in pre-processing,which has been largely overlooked in previous studies. Experimental evaluation shows that pre-processing can improve the SVperformance as long as the enrollment files are processed similarly to the test data and that test and enrollment occur within similarSNR ranges. Considerable improvement is obtained on the generated and all the noise conditions of the VOiCES dataset.
abstract_zh: 由于环境噪声和房间混响的不利影响，扬声器验证（SV）在远场场景中的性能并不理想。这项工作为远场扬声器验证提供了多通道语音增强的基准。一种方法是基于深度神经网络，另一种方法是深度神经网络和信号处理的结合。我们将 DNN 架构与信号处理技术集成来进行各种实验。我们的方法与现有的最先进的方法进行了比较。我们研究了注册在预处理中的重要性，这在以前的研究中很大程度上被忽视了。实验评估表明，只要登记文件的处理方式与测试数据类似，并且测试和登记发生在相似的 SNR 范围内，预处理就可以提高 SV 性能。 VOiCES 数据集的生成和所有噪声条件都得到了相当大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过基于深度神经网络（DNN）的语音增强技术，提升多通道远场说话人验证的性能。
AI.motivation: 远场环境下，环境噪声和房间混 reverberation 导致说话人验证性能下降，而现有方法在预处理阶段（尤其是注册数据处理）存在不足，需改进。
AI.method: 结合深度神经网络（DNN）与信号处理技术，提出两种多通道语音增强方法，并对比现有最先进方法，验证预处理对注册数据的重要性。
AI.result: 实验表明，当注册数据与测试数据以相似信噪比（SNR）处理时，预处理显著提升验证性能，尤其在VOiCES数据集的多种噪声条件下效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 预处理阶段（尤其注册数据处理）对提升远场说话人验证性能至关重要，结合DNN与信号处理的方法有效。

authors_text: Jihao Huang,Zhitao Liu,Xuemin Chi,Feng Hong,Hongye Su
title: Search-Based Path Planning Algorithm for Autonomous Parking:Multi-Heuristic Hybrid A*
title_zh: 基于搜索的自动停车路径规划算法：多重启发式混合 A*
abstract: This paper proposed a novel method for autonomous parking. Autonomous parking has received a lot of attention because of its convenience, but due to the complex environment and the non-holonomic constraints of vehicle, it is difficult to get a collision-free and feasible path in a short time. To solve this problem, this paper introduced a novel algorithm called Multi-Heuristic Hybrid A* (MHHA*) which incorporates the characteristic of Multi-Heuristic A* and Hybrid A*. So it could provide the guarantee for completeness, the avoidance of local minimum and sub-optimality, and generate a feasible path in a short time. And this paper also proposed a new collision check method based on coordinate transformation which could improve the computational efficiency. The performance of the proposed method was compared with Hybrid A* in simulation experiments and its superiority has been proved.
summary: This paper proposed a novel method for autonomous parking. Autonomous parking has received a lot of attention because of its convenience, but due to the complex environment and the non-holonomic constraints of vehicle, it is difficult to get a collision-free and feasible path in a short time. To solve this problem, this paper introduced a novel algorithm called Multi-Heuristic Hybrid A* (MHHA*) which incorporates the characteristic of Multi-Heuristic A* and Hybrid A*. So it could provide the guarantee for completeness, the avoidance of local minimum and sub-optimality, and generate a feasible path in a short time. And this paper also proposed a new collision check method based on coordinate transformation which could improve the computational efficiency. The performance of the proposed method was compared with Hybrid A* in simulation experiments and its superiority has been proved.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种自动停车的新方法。自动停车因其便利性而受到广泛关注，但由于复杂的环境和车辆的非完整约束，很难在短时间内获得无碰撞的可行路径。为了解决这个问题，本文引入了一种新的算法，称为多重启发式混合A*（MHHA*），它结合了多重启发式A*和混合A*的特点。因此它可以保证完整性，避免局部极小值和次优值，并在短时间内生成一条可行路径。本文还提出了一种基于坐标变换的碰撞检查新方法，可以提高计算效率。在仿真实验中将所提方法的性能与Hybrid A*进行了比较，证明了其优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多启发式混合A*算法（MHHA*），用于解决自主泊车中的复杂环境和车辆非完整约束下的快速无碰撞路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 自主泊车因环境复杂和车辆非完整约束，难以在短时间内生成无碰撞且可行的路径，现有算法存在局部最优或次优解的问题。
AI.method: 结合多启发式A*与混合A*算法，设计MHHA*以保证完备性并避免局部最优；提出基于坐标变换的碰撞检测方法提升计算效率。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明，MHHA*相较混合A*在路径生成速度和优化效果上具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: MHHA*算法有效解决了自主泊车路径规划的挑战，兼具完备性、高效性及实用性。

authors_text: Brandon Smart,Gustavo Carneiro
title: Bootstrapping the Relationship Between Images and Their Clean and Noisy Labels
title_zh: 引导图像与其干净和嘈杂标签之间的关系
abstract: Many state-of-the-art noisy-label learning methods rely on learning mechanisms that estimate the samples' clean labels during training and discard their original noisy labels. However, this approach prevents the learning of the relationship between images, noisy labels and clean labels, which has been shown to be useful when dealing with instance-dependent label noise problems. Furthermore, methods that do aim to learn this relationship require cleanly annotated subsets of data, as well as distillation or multi-faceted models for training. In this paper, we propose a new training algorithm that relies on a simple model to learn the relationship between clean and noisy labels without the need for a cleanly labelled subset of data. Our algorithm follows a 3-stage process, namely: 1) self-supervised pre-training followed by an early-stopping training of the classifier to confidently predict clean labels for a subset of the training set; 2) use the clean set from stage (1) to bootstrap the relationship between images, noisy labels and clean labels, which we exploit for effective relabelling of the remaining training set using semi-supervised learning; and 3) supervised training of the classifier with all relabelled samples from stage (2). By learning this relationship, we achieve state-of-the-art performance in asymmetric and instance-dependent label noise problems.
summary: Many state-of-the-art noisy-label learning methods rely on learning mechanisms that estimate the samples' clean labels during training and discard their original noisy labels. However, this approach prevents the learning of the relationship between images, noisy labels and clean labels, which has been shown to be useful when dealing with instance-dependent label noise problems. Furthermore, methods that do aim to learn this relationship require cleanly annotated subsets of data, as well as distillation or multi-faceted models for training. In this paper, we propose a new training algorithm that relies on a simple model to learn the relationship between clean and noisy labels without the need for a cleanly labelled subset of data. Our algorithm follows a 3-stage process, namely: 1) self-supervised pre-training followed by an early-stopping training of the classifier to confidently predict clean labels for a subset of the training set; 2) use the clean set from stage (1) to bootstrap the relationship between images, noisy labels and clean labels, which we exploit for effective relabelling of the remaining training set using semi-supervised learning; and 3) supervised training of the classifier with all relabelled samples from stage (2). By learning this relationship, we achieve state-of-the-art performance in asymmetric and instance-dependent label noise problems.
abstract_zh: 许多最先进的噪声标签学习方法依赖于在训练期间估计样本的干净标签并丢弃其原始噪声标签的学习机制。然而，这种方法阻碍了对图像、噪声标签和干净标签之间关系的学习，这在处理依赖于实例的标签噪声问题时已被证明是有用的。此外，旨在学习这种关系的方法需要清晰注释的数据子集，以及用于训练的蒸馏或多方面模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的训练算法，它依赖于一个简单的模型来学习干净标签和噪声标签之间的关系，而不需要干净标记的数据子集。我们的算法遵循 3 阶段过程，即：1）自监督预训练，然后对分类器进行提前停止训练，以自信地预测训练集子集的干净标签； 2）使用阶段（1）中的干净集来引导图像、噪声标签和干净标签之间的关系，我们利用该关系使用半监督学习对剩余训练集进行有效的重新标记； 3）使用阶段（2）中所有重新标记的样本对分类器进行监督训练。通过学习这种关系，我们在不对称和实例相关的标签噪声问题中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需干净标注数据子集即可学习图像与干净标签及噪声标签之间关系的新算法，以解决实例相关标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么丢弃噪声标签，要么依赖干净标注数据子集，限制了在实例相关噪声场景下的性能。本文旨在通过直接建模噪声与干净标签的关系提升去噪效果。
AI.method: 采用三阶段流程：1）自监督预训练后通过早停机制筛选可信样本；2）利用阶段1的干净样本引导半监督重标记；3）用所有重标记样本进行监督训练。
AI.result: 在非对称和实例相关噪声场景中达到最先进性能，验证了学习标签关系的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过无需干净数据的三阶段训练策略，成功建模了噪声标签与干净标签的关联，为处理复杂噪声提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dongze Lian,Daquan Zhou,Jiashi Feng,Xinchao Wang
title: Scaling & Shifting Your Features: A New Baseline for Efficient Model Tuning
title_zh: 扩展和改变特征：高效模型调整的新基准
abstract: Existing fine-tuning methods either tune all parameters of the pre-trained model (full fine-tuning), which is not efficient, or only tune the last linear layer (linear probing), which suffers a significant accuracy drop compared to the full fine-tuning. In this paper, we propose a new parameter-efficient fine-tuning method termed as SSF, representing that researchers only need to Scale and Shift the deep Features extracted by a pre-trained model to catch up with the performance of full fine-tuning. In this way, SSF also surprisingly outperforms other parameter-efficient fine-tuning approaches even with a smaller number of tunable parameters. Furthermore, different from some existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods (e.g., Adapter or VPT) that introduce the extra parameters and computational cost in the training and inference stages, SSF only adds learnable parameters during the training stage, and these additional parameters can be merged into the original pre-trained model weights via re-parameterization in the inference phase. With the proposed SSF, our model obtains 2.46% (90.72% vs. 88.54%) and 11.48% (73.10% vs. 65.57%) performance improvement on FGVC and VTAB-1k in terms of Top-1 accuracy compared to the full fine-tuning but only fine-tuning about 0.3M parameters. We also conduct amounts of experiments in various model families (CNNs, Transformers, and MLPs) and datasets. Results on 26 image classification datasets in total and 3 robustness & out-of-distribution datasets show the effectiveness of SSF. Code is available at https://github.com/dongzelian/SSF.
summary: Existing fine-tuning methods either tune all parameters of the pre-trained model (full fine-tuning), which is not efficient, or only tune the last linear layer (linear probing), which suffers a significant accuracy drop compared to the full fine-tuning. In this paper, we propose a new parameter-efficient fine-tuning method termed as SSF, representing that researchers only need to Scale and Shift the deep Features extracted by a pre-trained model to catch up with the performance of full fine-tuning. In this way, SSF also surprisingly outperforms other parameter-efficient fine-tuning approaches even with a smaller number of tunable parameters. Furthermore, different from some existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods (e.g., Adapter or VPT) that introduce the extra parameters and computational cost in the training and inference stages, SSF only adds learnable parameters during the training stage, and these additional parameters can be merged into the original pre-trained model weights via re-parameterization in the inference phase. With the proposed SSF, our model obtains 2.46% (90.72% vs. 88.54%) and 11.48% (73.10% vs. 65.57%) performance improvement on FGVC and VTAB-1k in terms of Top-1 accuracy compared to the full fine-tuning but only fine-tuning about 0.3M parameters. We also conduct amounts of experiments in various model families (CNNs, Transformers, and MLPs) and datasets. Results on 26 image classification datasets in total and 3 robustness & out-of-distribution datasets show the effectiveness of SSF. Code is available at https://github.com/dongzelian/SSF.
abstract_zh: 现有的微调方法要么调整预训练模型的所有参数（全微调），效率不高，要么只调整最后一个线性层（线性探测），与全微调相比，精度显着下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的参数高效微调方法，称为SSF，代表研究人员只需要缩放和移动预训练模型提取的深层特征即可赶上完全微调的性能。通过这种方式，即使可调参数数量较少，SSF 也令人惊讶地优于其他参数高效的微调方法。此外，与一些现有的参数高效微调方法（例如Adapter或VPT）在训练和推理阶段引入额外的参数和计算成本不同，SSF仅在训练阶段添加可学习的参数，并且这些额外的参数可以通过在推理阶段的重新参数化合并到原始预训练的模型权重中。通过所提出的 SSF，与完全微调但仅微调约 0.3M 参数相比，我们的模型在 Top-1 精度方面在 FGVC 和 VTAB-1k 上获得了 2.46%（90.72% vs. 88.54%）和 11.48%（73.10% vs. 65.57%）的性能提升。我们还在各种模型系列（CNN、Transformers 和 MLP）和数据集中进行了大量实验。总共 26 个图像分类数据集和 3 个鲁棒性和分布外数据集的结果显示了 SSF 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/dongzelian/SSF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SSF的参数高效微调方法，通过缩放和偏移预训练模型的深层特征，在保持高性能的同时显著减少可调参数数量。
AI.motivation: 现有微调方法要么需要调整全部参数（效率低），要么仅调整最后一层（精度损失大），亟需一种兼顾效率与性能的解决方案。
AI.method: SSF在训练阶段仅添加可学习参数用于特征缩放和偏移，并通过重新参数化将这些参数合并到原始模型权重中，从而在推理阶段无需额外计算开销。
AI.result: 在FGVC和VTAB-1k数据集上，SSF分别以0.3M可调参数实现2.46%和11.48%的Top-1精度提升，且在26个图像分类数据集及3个鲁棒性测试集上均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SSF通过简单的特征缩放机制，在多种模型架构和任务中证明了其作为参数高效微调新基线的有效性与广泛适用性。

search_text: Scaling & Shifting Your Features: A New Baseline for Efficient Model Tuning 扩展和改变特征：高效模型调整的新基准 Existing fine-tuning methods either tune all parameters of the pre-trained model (full fine-tuning), which is not efficient, or only tune the last linear layer (linear probing), which suffers a significant accuracy drop compared to the full fine-tuning. In this paper, we propose a new parameter-efficient fine-tuning method termed as SSF, representing that researchers only need to Scale and Shift the deep Features extracted by a pre-trained model to catch up with the performance of full fine-tuning. In this way, SSF also surprisingly outperforms other parameter-efficient fine-tuning approaches even with a smaller number of tunable parameters. Furthermore, different from some existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods (e.g., Adapter or VPT) that introduce the extra parameters and computational cost in the training and inference stages, SSF only adds learnable parameters during the training stage, and these additional parameters can be merged into the original pre-trained model weights via re-parameterization in the inference phase. With the proposed SSF, our model obtains 2.46% (90.72% vs. 88.54%) and 11.48% (73.10% vs. 65.57%) performance improvement on FGVC and VTAB-1k in terms of Top-1 accuracy compared to the full fine-tuning but only fine-tuning about 0.3M parameters. We also conduct amounts of experiments in various model families (CNNs, Transformers, and MLPs) and datasets. Results on 26 image classification datasets in total and 3 robustness & out-of-distribution datasets show the effectiveness of SSF. Code is available at https://github.com/dongzelian/SSF. 现有的微调方法要么调整预训练模型的所有参数（全微调），效率不高，要么只调整最后一个线性层（线性探测），与全微调相比，精度显着下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的参数高效微调方法，称为SSF，代表研究人员只需要缩放和移动预训练模型提取的深层特征即可赶上完全微调的性能。通过这种方式，即使可调参数数量较少，SSF 也令人惊讶地优于其他参数高效的微调方法。此外，与一些现有的参数高效微调方法（例如Adapter或VPT）在训练和推理阶段引入额外的参数和计算成本不同，SSF仅在训练阶段添加可学习的参数，并且这些额外的参数可以通过在推理阶段的重新参数化合并到原始预训练的模型权重中。通过所提出的 SSF，与完全微调但仅微调约 0.3M 参数相比，我们的模型在 Top-1 精度方面在 FGVC 和 VTAB-1k 上获得了 2.46%（90.72% vs. 88.54%）和 11.48%（73.10% vs. 65.57%）的性能提升。我们还在各种模型系列（CNN、Transformers 和 MLP）和数据集中进行了大量实验。总共 26 个图像分类数据集和 3 个鲁棒性和分布外数据集的结果显示了 SSF 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/dongzelian/SSF 获取。 本文提出一种名为SSF的参数高效微调方法，通过缩放和偏移预训练模型的深层特征，在保持高性能的同时显著减少可调参数数量。 Dongze Lian,Daquan Zhou,Jiashi Feng,Xinchao Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Jong Hak Moon,Wonjae Kim,Edward Choi
title: Correlation between Alignment-Uniformity and Performance of Dense Contrastive Representations
title_zh: 对齐均匀性与密集对比表示性能之间的相关性
abstract: Recently, dense contrastive learning has shown superior performance on dense prediction tasks compared to instance-level contrastive learning. Despite its supremacy, the properties of dense contrastive representations have not yet been carefully studied. Therefore, we analyze the theoretical ideas of dense contrastive learning using a standard CNN and straightforward feature matching scheme rather than propose a new complex method. Inspired by the analysis of the properties of instance-level contrastive representations through the lens of alignment and uniformity on the hypersphere, we employ and extend the same lens for the dense contrastive representations to analyze their underexplored properties. We discover the core principle in constructing a positive pair of dense features and empirically proved its validity. Also, we introduces a new scalar metric that summarizes the correlation between alignment-and-uniformity and downstream performance. Using this metric, we study various facets of densely learned contrastive representations such as how the correlation changes over single- and multi-object datasets or linear evaluation and dense prediction tasks. The source code is publicly available at: https://github.com/SuperSupermoon/DenseCL-analysis
summary: Recently, dense contrastive learning has shown superior performance on dense prediction tasks compared to instance-level contrastive learning. Despite its supremacy, the properties of dense contrastive representations have not yet been carefully studied. Therefore, we analyze the theoretical ideas of dense contrastive learning using a standard CNN and straightforward feature matching scheme rather than propose a new complex method. Inspired by the analysis of the properties of instance-level contrastive representations through the lens of alignment and uniformity on the hypersphere, we employ and extend the same lens for the dense contrastive representations to analyze their underexplored properties. We discover the core principle in constructing a positive pair of dense features and empirically proved its validity. Also, we introduces a new scalar metric that summarizes the correlation between alignment-and-uniformity and downstream performance. Using this metric, we study various facets of densely learned contrastive representations such as how the correlation changes over single- and multi-object datasets or linear evaluation and dense prediction tasks. The source code is publicly available at: https://github.com/SuperSupermoon/DenseCL-analysis
abstract_zh: 最近，与实例级对比学习相比，密集对比学习在密集预测任务上表现出了优越的性能。尽管其具有至高无上的地位，但密集对比表示的特性尚未得到仔细研究。因此，我们使用标准 CNN 和简单的特征匹配方案来分析密集对比学习的理论思想，而不是提出一种新的复杂方法。受到通过超球面上的对齐和均匀性透镜对实例级对比表示的属性进行分析的启发，我们采用并扩展了用于密集对比表示的相同透镜来分析其未充分探索的属性。我们发现了构造一对正密集特征的核心原理，并通过经验证明了其有效性。此外，我们还引入了一种新的标量度量，该度量总结了对齐和均匀性与下游性能之间的相关性。使用这个指标，我们研究密集学习对比表示的各个方面，例如单对象和多对象数据集或线性评估和密集预测任务上的相关性如何变化。源代码公开于：https://github.com/SuperSupermoon/DenseCL-analysis

AI.tldr: 本文研究密集对比表示的对齐性-均匀性与下游任务性能之间的相关性，提出新的度量方法并分析其特性。
AI.motivation: 密集对比学习在密集预测任务中表现优异，但其表示特性尚未被系统研究，需通过理论分析揭示其核心规律。
AI.method: 基于标准CNN和特征匹配方案，扩展实例级对比表示的对齐性-均匀性分析框架，提出新的标量度量指标。
AI.result: 发现密集特征正样本对构建的核心原则，验证其有效性，并揭示该相关性在不同数据集和任务中的变化规律。
AI.conclusion: 提出的度量指标可有效表征密集对比表示性能，为优化模型设计提供理论指导。

authors_text: Yiqi Wang,Chaozhuo Li,Wei Jin,Rui Li,Jianan Zhao,Jiliang Tang,Xing Xie
title: Test-Time Training for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络的测试时训练
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have made tremendous progress in the graph classification task. However, a performance gap between the training set and the test set has often been noticed. To bridge such gap, in this work we introduce the first test-time training framework for GNNs to enhance the model generalization capacity for the graph classification task. In particular, we design a novel test-time training strategy with self-supervised learning to adjust the GNN model for each test graph sample. Experiments on the benchmark datasets have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed framework, especially when there are distribution shifts between training set and test set. We have also conducted exploratory studies and theoretical analysis to gain deeper understandings on the rationality of the design of the proposed graph test time training framework (GT3).
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have made tremendous progress in the graph classification task. However, a performance gap between the training set and the test set has often been noticed. To bridge such gap, in this work we introduce the first test-time training framework for GNNs to enhance the model generalization capacity for the graph classification task. In particular, we design a novel test-time training strategy with self-supervised learning to adjust the GNN model for each test graph sample. Experiments on the benchmark datasets have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed framework, especially when there are distribution shifts between training set and test set. We have also conducted exploratory studies and theoretical analysis to gain deeper understandings on the rationality of the design of the proposed graph test time training framework (GT3).
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在图分类任务中取得了巨大进步。然而，训练集和测试集之间的性能差距经常被注意到。为了弥补这一差距，在这项工作中，我们引入了第一个 GNN 测试时训练框架，以增强图分类任务的模型泛化能力。特别是，我们设计了一种新颖的测试时训练策略，通过自监督学习来调整每个测试图样本的 GNN 模型。基准数据集上的实验证明了所提出框架的有效性，特别是当训练集和测试集之间存在分布变化时。我们还进行了探索性研究和理论分析，以更深入地了解所提出的图测试时间训练框架（GT3）的设计合理性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个针对图神经网络的测试时训练框架（GT3），通过自监督学习调整模型以提升图分类任务的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络在测试集上的表现常低于训练集，尤其在训练测试分布不一致时存在显著性能差距。
AI.method: 设计结合自监督学习的测试时训练策略，针对每个测试图样本动态调整GNN模型参数。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上验证了框架有效性，尤其在分布偏移场景下表现突出，并通过理论分析阐释设计合理性。
AI.conclusion: GT3框架能有效缓解图分类任务的分布偏移问题，为提升模型泛化能力提供了新思路。

In particular, we design a novel test-time training strategy with self-supervised learning to adjust the GNN model for each test graph sample. Experiments on the benchmark datasets have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed framework, especially when there are distribution shifts between training set and test set. We have also conducted exploratory studies and theoretical analysis to gain deeper understandings on the rationality of the design of the proposed graph test time training framework (GT3). 图神经网络（GNN）在图分类任务中取得了巨大进步。然而，训练集和测试集之间的性能差距经常被注意到。为了弥补这一差距，在这项工作中，我们引入了第一个 GNN 测试时训练框架，以增强图分类任务的模型泛化能力。特别是，我们设计了一种新颖的测试时训练策略，通过自监督学习来调整每个测试图样本的 GNN 模型。基准数据集上的实验证明了所提出框架的有效性，特别是当训练集和测试集之间存在分布变化时。我们还进行了探索性研究和理论分析，以更深入地了解所提出的图测试时间训练框架（GT3）的设计合理性。 本文提出首个针对图神经网络的测试时训练框架（GT3），通过自监督学习调整模型以提升图分类任务的泛化能力。 Yiqi Wang,Chaozhuo Li,Wei Jin,Rui Li,Jianan Zhao,Jiliang Tang,Xing Xie cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sheng Shen,Huanjing Yue,Jingyu Yang,Kun Li
title: ITSRN++: Stronger and Better Implicit Transformer Network for Continuous Screen Content Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: ITSRN++：更强更好的隐式变压器网络，用于连续屏幕内容图像超分辨率
abstract: Nowadays, online screen sharing and remote cooperation are becoming ubiquitous. However, the screen content may be downsampled and compressed during transmission, while it may be displayed on large screens or the users would zoom in for detail observation at the receiver side. Therefore, developing a strong and effective screen content image (SCI) super-resolution (SR) method is demanded. We observe that the weight-sharing upsampler (such as deconvolution or pixel shuffle) could be harmful to sharp and thin edges in SCIs, and the fixed scale upsampler makes it inflexible to fit screens with various sizes. To solve this problem, we propose an implicit transformer network for continuous SCI SR (termed as ITSRN++). Specifically, we propose a modulation based transformer as the upsampler, which modulates the pixel features in discrete space via a periodic nonlinear function to generate features for continuous pixels. To enhance the extracted features, we further propose an enhanced transformer as the feature extraction backbone, where convolution and attention branches are utilized parallelly. Besides, we construct a large scale SCI2K dataset to facilitate the research on SCI SR. Experimental results on nine datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance for SCI SR (outperforming SwinIR by 0.74 dB for x3 SR) and also works well for natural image SR. Our codes and dataset will be released upon the acceptance of this work.
summary: Nowadays, online screen sharing and remote cooperation are becoming ubiquitous. However, the screen content may be downsampled and compressed during transmission, while it may be displayed on large screens or the users would zoom in for detail observation at the receiver side. Therefore, developing a strong and effective screen content image (SCI) super-resolution (SR) method is demanded. We observe that the weight-sharing upsampler (such as deconvolution or pixel shuffle) could be harmful to sharp and thin edges in SCIs, and the fixed scale upsampler makes it inflexible to fit screens with various sizes. To solve this problem, we propose an implicit transformer network for continuous SCI SR (termed as ITSRN++). Specifically, we propose a modulation based transformer as the upsampler, which modulates the pixel features in discrete space via a periodic nonlinear function to generate features for continuous pixels. To enhance the extracted features, we further propose an enhanced transformer as the feature extraction backbone, where convolution and attention branches are utilized parallelly. Besides, we construct a large scale SCI2K dataset to facilitate the research on SCI SR. Experimental results on nine datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance for SCI SR (outperforming SwinIR by 0.74 dB for x3 SR) and also works well for natural image SR. Our codes and dataset will be released upon the acceptance of this work.
abstract_zh: 如今，在线屏幕共享和远程协作变得无处不在。然而，屏幕内容在传输过程中可能会被降采样和压缩，同时可能会显示在大屏幕上，或者用户会在接收端放大以进行细节观察。因此，需要开发一种强大且有效的屏幕内容图像（SCI）超分辨率（SR）方法。我们观察到，权重共享上采样器（例如反卷积或像素洗牌）可能会对 SCI 中的锐利和薄边缘有害，并且固定比例的上采样器使其不灵活地适应各种尺寸的屏幕。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于连续 SCI SR 的隐式变压器网络（称为 ITSRN++）。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于调制的变压器作为上采样器，它通过周期性非线性函数调制离散空间中的像素特征，以生成连续像素的特征。为了增强提取的特征，我们进一步提出了一种增强型变压器作为特征提取主干，其中并行利用卷积和注意力分支。此外，我们构建了大规模的 SCI2K 数据集以促进 SCI SR 的研究。九个数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在 SCI SR 方面实现了最先进的性能（对于 x3 SR，性能优于 SwinIR 0.74 dB），并且也适用于自然图像 SR。我们的代码和数据集将在这项工作被接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ITSRN++方法，旨在解决屏幕内容图像（SCI）超分辨率中的边缘模糊和尺寸适配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统上采样方法（如反卷积）在处理SCI时会损害锐利边缘，且固定比例上采样难以适配不同尺寸屏幕，需更灵活有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计基于调制的Transformer作为连续像素特征生成器，结合增强型Transformer并行提取特征，并构建SCI2K数据集支持研究。
AI.result: 在九个数据集上达到SCI超分SOTA性能（x3时比SwinIR高0.74dB），同时适用于自然图像超分。
AI.conclusion: ITSRN++通过新型Transformer结构和专用数据集，显著提升了SCI超分效果，推动了该领域研究进展。

authors_text: Jingwei Yi,Fangzhao Wu,Chuhan Wu,Xiaolong Huang,Binxing Jiao,Guangzhong Sun,Xing Xie
title: Effective and Efficient Query-aware Snippet Extraction for Web Search
title_zh: 用于 Web 搜索的有效且高效的查询感知片段提取
abstract: Query-aware webpage snippet extraction is widely used in search engines to help users better understand the content of the returned webpages before clicking. Although important, it is very rarely studied. In this paper, we propose an effective query-aware webpage snippet extraction method named DeepQSE, aiming to select a few sentences which can best summarize the webpage content in the context of input query. DeepQSE first learns query-aware sentence representations for each sentence to capture the fine-grained relevance between query and sentence, and then learns document-aware query-sentence relevance representations for snippet extraction. Since the query and each sentence are jointly modeled in DeepQSE, its online inference may be slow. Thus, we further propose an efficient version of DeepQSE, named Efficient-DeepQSE, which can significantly improve the inference speed of DeepQSE without affecting its performance. The core idea of Efficient-DeepQSE is to decompose the query-aware snippet extraction task into two stages, i.e., a coarse-grained candidate sentence selection stage where sentence representations can be cached, and a fine-grained relevance modeling stage. Experiments on two real-world datasets validate the effectiveness and efficiency of our methods.
summary: Query-aware webpage snippet extraction is widely used in search engines to help users better understand the content of the returned webpages before clicking. Although important, it is very rarely studied. In this paper, we propose an effective query-aware webpage snippet extraction method named DeepQSE, aiming to select a few sentences which can best summarize the webpage content in the context of input query. DeepQSE first learns query-aware sentence representations for each sentence to capture the fine-grained relevance between query and sentence, and then learns document-aware query-sentence relevance representations for snippet extraction. Since the query and each sentence are jointly modeled in DeepQSE, its online inference may be slow. Thus, we further propose an efficient version of DeepQSE, named Efficient-DeepQSE, which can significantly improve the inference speed of DeepQSE without affecting its performance. The core idea of Efficient-DeepQSE is to decompose the query-aware snippet extraction task into two stages, i.e., a coarse-grained candidate sentence selection stage where sentence representations can be cached, and a fine-grained relevance modeling stage. Experiments on two real-world datasets validate the effectiveness and efficiency of our methods.
abstract_zh: 查询感知网页片段提取广泛应用于搜索引擎中，以帮助用户在点击之前更好地理解返回网页的内容。尽管很重要，但很少有人对其进行研究。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的查询感知网页片段提取方法，名为 DeepQSE，旨在选择几个最能概括输入查询上下文中的网页内容的句子。 DeepQSE 首先学习每个句子的查询感知句子表示，以捕获查询和句子之间的细粒度相关性，然后学习文档感知查询句子相关性表示以进行片段提取。由于查询和每个句子是在 DeepQSE 中联合建模的，因此其在线推理可能会很慢。因此，我们进一步提出了 DeepQSE 的高效版本，命名为 Efficient-DeepQSE，它可以显着提高 DeepQSE 的推理速度而不影响其性能。 Efficient-DeepQSE的核心思想是将查询感知片段提取任务分解为两个阶段，即可以缓存句子表示的粗粒度候选句子选择阶段和细粒度相关性建模阶段。对两个现实世界数据集的实验验证了我们方法的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DeepQSE的有效且高效的查询感知网页片段提取方法，并进一步优化为Efficient-DeepQSE以提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 查询感知的网页片段提取对搜索引擎理解返回结果至关重要，但现有研究较少且存在在线推理效率低的问题。
AI.method: DeepQSE通过学习查询感知的句子表示和文档感知的查询-句子相关性表示进行片段提取；Efficient-DeepQSE将任务分解为粗粒度候选句筛选（缓存表示）和细粒度相关性建模两阶段。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性和效率，Efficient-DeepQSE在保持性能的同时显著提升推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DeepQSE系列方法为查询感知片段提取提供了兼顾效果与效率的解决方案，适用于实际搜索引擎场景。

authors_text: Yingcan Wei,Matthias Langer,Fan Yu,Minseok Lee,Kingsley Liu,Jerry Shi,Joey Wang
title: A GPU-specialized Inference Parameter Server for Large-Scale Deep Recommendation Models
title_zh: 用于大规模深度推荐模型的 GPU 专用推理参数服务器
abstract: Recommendation systems are of crucial importance for a variety of modern apps and web services, such as news feeds, social networks, e-commerce, search, etc. To achieve peak prediction accuracy, modern recommendation models combine deep learning with terabyte-scale embedding tables to obtain a fine-grained representation of the underlying data. Traditional inference serving architectures require deploying the whole model to standalone servers, which is infeasible at such massive scale. In this paper, we provide insights into the intriguing and challenging inference domain of online recommendation systems. We propose the HugeCTR Hierarchical Parameter Server (HPS), an industry-leading distributed recommendation inference framework, that combines a high-performance GPU embedding cache with an hierarchical storage architecture, to realize low-latency retrieval of embeddings for online model inference tasks. Among other things, HPS features (1) a redundant hierarchical storage system, (2) a novel high-bandwidth cache to accelerate parallel embedding lookup on NVIDIA GPUs, (3) online training support and (4) light-weight APIs for easy integration into existing large-scale recommendation workflows. To demonstrate its capabilities, we conduct extensive studies using both synthetically engineered and public datasets. We show that our HPS can dramatically reduce end-to-end inference latency, achieving 5~62x speedup (depending on the batch size) over CPU baseline implementations for popular recommendation models. Through multi-GPU concurrent deployment, the HPS can also greatly increase the inference QPS.
summary: Recommendation systems are of crucial importance for a variety of modern apps and web services, such as news feeds, social networks, e-commerce, search, etc. To achieve peak prediction accuracy, modern recommendation models combine deep learning with terabyte-scale embedding tables to obtain a fine-grained representation of the underlying data. Traditional inference serving architectures require deploying the whole model to standalone servers, which is infeasible at such massive scale. In this paper, we provide insights into the intriguing and challenging inference domain of online recommendation systems. We propose the HugeCTR Hierarchical Parameter Server (HPS), an industry-leading distributed recommendation inference framework, that combines a high-performance GPU embedding cache with an hierarchical storage architecture, to realize low-latency retrieval of embeddings for online model inference tasks. Among other things, HPS features (1) a redundant hierarchical storage system, (2) a novel high-bandwidth cache to accelerate parallel embedding lookup on NVIDIA GPUs, (3) online training support and (4) light-weight APIs for easy integration into existing large-scale recommendation workflows. To demonstrate its capabilities, we conduct extensive studies using both synthetically engineered and public datasets. We show that our HPS can dramatically reduce end-to-end inference latency, achieving 5~62x speedup (depending on the batch size) over CPU baseline implementations for popular recommendation models. Through multi-GPU concurrent deployment, the HPS can also greatly increase the inference QPS.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统对于各种现代应用程序和网络服务（例如新闻源、社交网络、电子商务、搜索等）至关重要。为了实现最高预测精度，现代推荐模型将深度学习与 TB 级嵌入表相结合，以获得底层数据的细粒度表示。传统的推理服务架构需要将整个模型部署到独立服务器上，这在如此大规模的情况下是不可行的。在本文中，我们深入探讨了在线推荐系统有趣且具有挑战性的推理领域。我们提出了HugeCTR分层参数服务器（HPS），这是一种业界领先的分布式推荐推理框架，它将高性能GPU嵌入缓存与分层存储架构相结合，以实现在线模型推理任务的嵌入的低延迟检索。除此之外，HPS 还具有 (1) 冗余分层存储系统、(2) 新颖的高带宽缓存，可加速 NVIDIA GPU 上的并行嵌入查找、(3) 在线训练支持和 (4) 轻量级 API，可轻松集成到现有的大规模推荐工作流程中。为了展示其功能，我们使用综合工程数据集和公共数据集进行了广泛的研究。我们表明，我们的 HPS 可以显着减少端到端推理延迟，与流行推荐模型的 CPU 基准实现相比，实现 5~62 倍的加速（取决于批量大小）。通过多GPU并发部署，HPS还可以大幅提升推理QPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对GPU优化的分布式推荐模型推理框架HPS，用于处理大规模嵌入表的低延迟检索问题。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统因需处理TB级嵌入表导致推理延迟高且部署困难，亟需高效的大规模模型推理解决方案。
AI.method: 设计分层存储架构结合GPU高速缓存，支持在线训练与轻量级API集成，并通过多GPU并发部署提升吞吐量。
AI.result: 在合成与公开数据集测试中，HPS相较CPU基线实现5~62倍加速，多GPU部署显著提升QPS指标。
AI.conclusion: HPS通过GPU专业化设计有效解决了大规模推荐模型的推理效率瓶颈，为工业级应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Joey Wang,Yingcan Wei,Minseok Lee,Matthias Langer,Fan Yu,Jie Liu,Alex Liu,Daniel Abel,Gems Guo,Jianbing Dong,Jerry Shi,Kunlun Li
title: Merlin HugeCTR: GPU-accelerated Recommender System Training and Inference
title_zh: Merlin HugeCTR：GPU 加速的推荐系统训练和推理
abstract: In this talk, we introduce Merlin HugeCTR. Merlin HugeCTR is an open source, GPU-accelerated integration framework for click-through rate estimation. It optimizes both training and inference, whilst enabling model training at scale with model-parallel embeddings and data-parallel neural networks. In particular, Merlin HugeCTR combines a high-performance GPU embedding cache with an hierarchical storage architecture, to realize low-latency retrieval of embeddings for online model inference tasks. In the MLPerf v1.0 DLRM model training benchmark, Merlin HugeCTR achieves a speedup of up to 24.6x on a single DGX A100 (8x A100) over PyTorch on 4x4-socket CPU nodes (4x4x28 cores). Merlin HugeCTR can also take advantage of multi-node environments to accelerate training even further. Since late 2021, Merlin HugeCTR additionally features a hierarchical parameter server (HPS) and supports deployment via the NVIDIA Triton server framework, to leverage the computational capabilities of GPUs for high-speed recommendation model inference. Using this HPS, Merlin HugeCTR users can achieve a 5~62x speedup (batch size dependent) for popular recommendation models over CPU baseline implementations, and dramatically reduce their end-to-end inference latency.
summary: In this talk, we introduce Merlin HugeCTR. Merlin HugeCTR is an open source, GPU-accelerated integration framework for click-through rate estimation. It optimizes both training and inference, whilst enabling model training at scale with model-parallel embeddings and data-parallel neural networks. In particular, Merlin HugeCTR combines a high-performance GPU embedding cache with an hierarchical storage architecture, to realize low-latency retrieval of embeddings for online model inference tasks. In the MLPerf v1.0 DLRM model training benchmark, Merlin HugeCTR achieves a speedup of up to 24.6x on a single DGX A100 (8x A100) over PyTorch on 4x4-socket CPU nodes (4x4x28 cores). Merlin HugeCTR can also take advantage of multi-node environments to accelerate training even further. Since late 2021, Merlin HugeCTR additionally features a hierarchical parameter server (HPS) and supports deployment via the NVIDIA Triton server framework, to leverage the computational capabilities of GPUs for high-speed recommendation model inference. Using this HPS, Merlin HugeCTR users can achieve a 5~62x speedup (batch size dependent) for popular recommendation models over CPU baseline implementations, and dramatically reduce their end-to-end inference latency.
abstract_zh: 在本次演讲中，我们介绍 Merlin HugeCTR。 Merlin HugeCTR 是一个开源、GPU 加速的集成框架，用于估计点击率。它优化了训练和推理，同时通过模型并行嵌入和数据并行神经网络实现大规模模型训练。特别是，Merlin HugeCTR将高性能GPU嵌入缓存与分层存储架构相结合，实现在线模型推理任务的嵌入的低延迟检索。在 MLPerf v1.0 DLRM 模型训练基准中，Merlin HugeCTR 在单个 DGX A100 (8x A100) 上实现了比 4x4 插槽 CPU 节点（4x4x28 核心）上的 PyTorch 高达 24.6 倍的加速。 Merlin HugeCTR 还可以利用多节点环境进一步加速训练。自 2021 年底以来，Merlin HugeCTR 新增了分层参数服务器 (HPS)，并支持通过 NVIDIA Triton 服务器框架进行部署，以利用 GPU 的计算能力进行高速推荐模型推理。使用此 HPS，Merlin HugeCTR 用户可以将流行的推荐模型比 CPU 基准实现实现 5~62 倍的加速（取决于批量大小），并显着降低端到端推理延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Merlin HugeCTR，一个开源的GPU加速框架，用于优化推荐系统的训练和推理过程。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统在训练和推理效率上存在瓶颈，需通过GPU加速和并行技术提升大规模模型的性能。
AI.method: 结合高性能GPU嵌入缓存与分层存储架构，采用模型并行嵌入和数据并行神经网络，并引入分层参数服务器（HPS）与NVIDIA Triton部署框架。
AI.result: 在MLPerf v1.0 DLRM基准测试中，单节点DGX A100相较CPU节点加速24.6倍；推理阶段对主流模型实现5~62倍加速，显著降低延迟。
AI.conclusion: Merlin HugeCTR通过GPU硬件特性与架构优化，有效提升了推荐系统的训练与推理效率，为大规模部署提供了高性能解决方案。

authors_text: Shubo Lv,Yihui Fu,Yukai Jv,Lei Xie,Weixin Zhu,Wei Rao,Yannan Wang
title: spatial-dccrn: dccrn equipped with frame-level angle feature and hybrid filtering for multi-channel speech enhancement
title_zh: Spatial-dccrn：dccrn配备帧级角度特征和混合滤波，用于多通道语音增强
abstract: Recently, multi-channel speech enhancement has drawn much interest due to the use of spatial information to distinguish target speech from interfering signal. To make full use of spatial information and neural network based masking estimation, we propose a multi-channel denoising neural network -- Spatial DCCRN. Firstly, we extend S-DCCRN to multi-channel scenario, aiming at performing cascaded sub-channel and full-channel processing strategy, which can model different channels separately. Moreover, instead of only adopting multi-channel spectrum or concatenating first-channel's magnitude and IPD as the model's inputs, we apply an angle feature extraction module (AFE) to extract frame-level angle feature embeddings, which can help the model to apparently perceive spatial information. Finally, since the phenomenon of residual noise will be more serious when the noise and speech exist in the same time frequency (TF) bin, we particularly design a masking and mapping filtering method to substitute the traditional filter-and-sum operation, with the purpose of cascading coarsely denoising, dereverberation and residual noise suppression. The proposed model, Spatial-DCCRN, has surpassed EaBNet, FasNet as well as several competitive models on the L3DAS22 Challenge dataset. Not only the 3D scenario, Spatial-DCCRN outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) model MIMO-UNet by a large margin in multiple evaluation metrics on the multi-channel ConferencingSpeech2021 Challenge dataset. Ablation studies also demonstrate the effectiveness of different contributions.
summary: Recently, multi-channel speech enhancement has drawn much interest due to the use of spatial information to distinguish target speech from interfering signal. To make full use of spatial information and neural network based masking estimation, we propose a multi-channel denoising neural network -- Spatial DCCRN. Firstly, we extend S-DCCRN to multi-channel scenario, aiming at performing cascaded sub-channel and full-channel processing strategy, which can model different channels separately. Moreover, instead of only adopting multi-channel spectrum or concatenating first-channel's magnitude and IPD as the model's inputs, we apply an angle feature extraction module (AFE) to extract frame-level angle feature embeddings, which can help the model to apparently perceive spatial information. Finally, since the phenomenon of residual noise will be more serious when the noise and speech exist in the same time frequency (TF) bin, we particularly design a masking and mapping filtering method to substitute the traditional filter-and-sum operation, with the purpose of cascading coarsely denoising, dereverberation and residual noise suppression. The proposed model, Spatial-DCCRN, has surpassed EaBNet, FasNet as well as several competitive models on the L3DAS22 Challenge dataset. Not only the 3D scenario, Spatial-DCCRN outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) model MIMO-UNet by a large margin in multiple evaluation metrics on the multi-channel ConferencingSpeech2021 Challenge dataset. Ablation studies also demonstrate the effectiveness of different contributions.
abstract_zh: 最近，由于使用空间信息来区分目标语音和干扰信号，多通道语音增强引起了人们的广泛兴趣。为了充分利用空间信息和基于神经网络的掩蔽估计，我们提出了一种多通道去噪神经网络——Spatial DCCRN。首先，我们将S-DCCRN扩展到多通道场景，旨在执行级联子通道和全通道处理策略，可以分别对不同通道进行建模。此外，我们不是仅仅采用多通道频谱或连接第一通道的幅度和IPD作为模型的输入，而是应用角度特征提取模块（AFE）来提取帧级角度特征嵌入，这可以帮助模型明显感知空间信息。最后，由于当噪声和语音同时存在于同一时频（TF）箱时，残余噪声现象会更加严重，因此我们特别设计了一种掩蔽和映射滤波方法来替代传统的滤波和求和操作，达到级联粗略去噪、去混响和残余噪声抑制的目的。所提出的模型 Spatial-DCCRN 在 L3DAS22 挑战数据集上超越了 EaBNet、FasNet 以及多个竞争模型。不仅在 3D 场景中，Spatial-DCCRN 在多通道 ConferencingSpeech2021 挑战数据集上的多个评估指标上都大幅优于最先进的 (SOTA) 模型 MIMO-UNet。消融研究还证明了不同贡献的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多通道语音增强模型Spatial-DCCRN，通过引入帧级角度特征和混合滤波方法提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分利用空间信息与神经网络的掩码估计能力，导致多通道语音增强效果受限。
AI.method: 扩展S-DCCRN至多通道场景，采用级联子通道与全通道处理策略，并设计角度特征提取模块（AFE）获取帧级空间特征，结合混合滤波替代传统滤波操作。
AI.result: 在L3DAS22和ConferencingSpeech2021数据集上显著超越EaBNet、FasNet及MIMO-UNet等模型，多项评估指标表现优异。
AI.conclusion: Spatial-DCCRN通过空间特征建模与混合滤波策略有效提升了多通道语音增强效果，消融实验验证了各模块的有效性。

search_text: spatial-dccrn: dccrn equipped with frame-level angle feature and hybrid filtering for multi-channel speech enhancement Spatial-dccrn：dccrn配备帧级角度特征和混合滤波，用于多通道语音增强 Recently, multi-channel speech enhancement has drawn much interest due to the use of spatial information to distinguish target speech from interfering signal. To make full use of spatial information and neural network based masking estimation, we propose a multi-channel denoising neural network -- Spatial DCCRN. Firstly, we extend S-DCCRN to multi-channel scenario, aiming at performing cascaded sub-channel and full-channel processing strategy, which can model different channels separately. Moreover, instead of only adopting multi-channel spectrum or concatenating first-channel's magnitude and IPD as the model's inputs, we apply an angle feature extraction module (AFE) to extract frame-level angle feature embeddings, which can help the model to apparently perceive spatial information. Finally, since the phenomenon of residual noise will be more serious when the noise and speech exist in the same time frequency (TF) bin, we particularly design a masking and mapping filtering method to substitute the traditional filter-and-sum operation, with the purpose of cascading coarsely denoising, dereverberation and residual noise suppression. The proposed model, Spatial-DCCRN, has surpassed EaBNet, FasNet as well as several competitive models on the L3DAS22 Challenge dataset. Not only the 3D scenario, Spatial-DCCRN outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) model MIMO-UNet by a large margin in multiple evaluation metrics on the multi-channel ConferencingSpeech2021 Challenge dataset. Ablation studies also demonstrate the effectiveness of different contributions. 最近，由于使用空间信息来区分目标语音和干扰信号，多通道语音增强引起了人们的广泛兴趣。为了充分利用空间信息和基于神经网络的掩蔽估计，我们提出了一种多通道去噪神经网络——Spatial DCCRN。首先，我们将S-DCCRN扩展到多通道场景，旨在执行级联子通道和全通道处理策略，可以分别对不同通道进行建模。此外，我们不是仅仅采用多通道频谱或连接第一通道的幅度和IPD作为模型的输入，而是应用角度特征提取模块（AFE）来提取帧级角度特征嵌入，这可以帮助模型明显感知空间信息。最后，由于当噪声和语音同时存在于同一时频（TF）箱时，残余噪声现象会更加严重，因此我们特别设计了一种掩蔽和映射滤波方法来替代传统的滤波和求和操作，达到级联粗略去噪、去混响和残余噪声抑制的目的。所提出的模型 Spatial-DCCRN 在 L3DAS22 挑战数据集上超越了 EaBNet、FasNet 以及多个竞争模型。不仅在 3D 场景中，Spatial-DCCRN 在多通道 ConferencingSpeech2021 挑战数据集上的多个评估指标上都大幅优于最先进的 (SOTA) 模型 MIMO-UNet。消融研究还证明了不同贡献的有效性。 本文提出了一种多通道语音增强模型Spatial-DCCRN，通过引入帧级角度特征和混合滤波方法提升性能。 Shubo Lv,Yihui Fu,Yukai Jv,Lei Xie,Weixin Zhu,Wei Rao,Yannan Wang eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Zihao Chen,Wenyong Wang,Sai Zou
title: Break The Spell Of Total Correlation In betaTCVAE
title_zh: 打破 betaTCVAE 中的完全相关性魔咒
abstract: In the absence of artificial labels, the independent and dependent features in the data are cluttered. How to construct the inductive biases of the model to flexibly divide and effectively contain features with different complexity is the main focal point of unsupervised disentangled representation learning. This paper proposes a new iterative decomposition path of total correlation and explains the disentangled representation ability of VAE from the perspective of model capacity allocation. The newly developed objective function combines latent variable dimensions into joint distribution while relieving the independence constraints of marginal distributions in combination, leading to latent variables with a more manipulable prior distribution. The novel model enables VAE to adjust the parameter capacity to divide dependent and independent data features flexibly. Experimental results on various datasets show an interesting relevance between model capacity and the latent variable grouping size, called the "V"-shaped best ELBO trajectory. Additionally, we empirically demonstrate that the proposed method obtains better disentangling performance with reasonable parameter capacity allocation.
summary: In the absence of artificial labels, the independent and dependent features in the data are cluttered. How to construct the inductive biases of the model to flexibly divide and effectively contain features with different complexity is the main focal point of unsupervised disentangled representation learning. This paper proposes a new iterative decomposition path of total correlation and explains the disentangled representation ability of VAE from the perspective of model capacity allocation. The newly developed objective function combines latent variable dimensions into joint distribution while relieving the independence constraints of marginal distributions in combination, leading to latent variables with a more manipulable prior distribution. The novel model enables VAE to adjust the parameter capacity to divide dependent and independent data features flexibly. Experimental results on various datasets show an interesting relevance between model capacity and the latent variable grouping size, called the "V"-shaped best ELBO trajectory. Additionally, we empirically demonstrate that the proposed method obtains better disentangling performance with reasonable parameter capacity allocation.
abstract_zh: 在没有人工标签的情况下，数据中的独立特征和依赖特征变得混乱。如何构建模型的归纳偏差以灵活划分并有效包含不同复杂度的特征是无监督解缠表示学习的主要焦点。本文提出了一种新的全相关性迭代分解路径，并从模型容量分配的角度解释了VAE的解缠结表示能力。新开发的目标函数将潜在变量维度组合成联合分布，同时缓解组合中边际分布的独立性约束，从而使潜在变量具有更可操纵的先验分布。该新颖的模型使得VAE能够调整参数容量以灵活地划分依赖和独立的数据特征。各种数据集的实验结果显示模型容量和潜在变量分组大小之间存在有趣的相关性，称为“V”形最佳 ELBO 轨迹。此外，我们还凭经验证明，所提出的方法通过合理的参数容量分配可以获得更好的解缠结性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的betaTCVAE模型，通过调整模型容量分配来增强变分自编码器（VAE）的解耦表示能力。
AI.motivation: 在无监督学习中，数据的独立特征与依赖特征混杂，传统方法难以灵活分离不同复杂度的特征，需设计新的归纳偏置以优化模型容量分配。
AI.method: 提出迭代分解总相关性的新路径，设计结合联合分布的新型目标函数，在放松边缘分布独立性约束的同时，通过参数容量调整实现对依赖/独立特征的灵活划分。
AI.result: 实验显示模型容量与潜在变量分组规模存在'V'型最优ELBO轨迹，验证了合理参数分配下解耦性能的提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化模型容量分配机制，为VAE提供了更灵活的特征解耦能力，揭示了容量分配与解耦效果的关联性。

authors_text: Zikai Wei,Xinge Zhu,Bo Dai,Dahua Lin
title: Rethinking Trajectory Prediction via "Team Game"
title_zh: 通过“团队游戏”重新思考轨迹预测
abstract: To accurately predict trajectories in multi-agent settings, e.g. team games, it is important to effectively model the interactions among agents. Whereas a number of methods have been developed for this purpose, existing methods implicitly model these interactions as part of the deep net architecture. However, in the real world, interactions often exist at multiple levels, e.g. individuals may form groups, where interactions among groups and those among the individuals in the same group often follow significantly different patterns. In this paper, we present a novel formulation for multi-agent trajectory prediction, which explicitly introduces the concept of interactive group consensus via an interactive hierarchical latent space. This formulation allows group-level and individual-level interactions to be captured jointly, thus substantially improving the capability of modeling complex dynamics. On two multi-agent settings, i.e. team sports and pedestrians, the proposed framework consistently achieves superior performance compared to existing methods.
summary: To accurately predict trajectories in multi-agent settings, e.g. team games, it is important to effectively model the interactions among agents. Whereas a number of methods have been developed for this purpose, existing methods implicitly model these interactions as part of the deep net architecture. However, in the real world, interactions often exist at multiple levels, e.g. individuals may form groups, where interactions among groups and those among the individuals in the same group often follow significantly different patterns. In this paper, we present a novel formulation for multi-agent trajectory prediction, which explicitly introduces the concept of interactive group consensus via an interactive hierarchical latent space. This formulation allows group-level and individual-level interactions to be captured jointly, thus substantially improving the capability of modeling complex dynamics. On two multi-agent settings, i.e. team sports and pedestrians, the proposed framework consistently achieves superior performance compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 准确预测多智能体设置中的轨迹，例如团队游戏中，有效地模拟智能体之间的交互非常重要。尽管为此目的开发了许多方法，但现有方法将这些交互隐式建模为深度网络架构的一部分。然而，在现实世界中，交互通常存在于多个层面，例如个体可能形成群体，群体之间的互动以及同一群体中个体之间的互动往往遵循明显不同的模式。在本文中，我们提出了一种多智能体轨迹预测的新颖公式，它通过交互式分层潜在空间明确引入了交互式群体共识的概念。该公式允许联合捕获群体级别和个人级别的交互，从而显着提高复杂动态建模的能力。在两种多智能体设置（即团队运动和行人）上，所提出的框架始终比现有方法取得更优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交互分层潜在空间的多智能体轨迹预测方法，通过显式建模群体共识来提升复杂动态场景的预测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过深度网络隐式建模多智能体交互，难以捕捉群体间与群体内部差异化的交互模式，导致复杂动态场景建模不足。
AI.method: 构建交互分层潜在空间，显式引入群体共识机制，联合建模群体级与个体级交互特征。
AI.result: 在团队运动与行人场景的多智能体轨迹预测任务中，相较现有方法取得持续性性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式建模多层级交互，有效提升了多智能体轨迹预测的准确性，为复杂动态场景建模提供新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 构建交互分层潜在空间，显式引入群体共识机制，联合建模群体级与个体级交互特征。
ai_content_json.result: 在团队运动与行人场景的多智能体轨迹预测任务中，相较现有方法取得持续性性能提升。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过显式建模多层级交互，有效提升了多智能体轨迹预测的准确性，为复杂动态场景建模提供新思路。

search_text: Rethinking Trajectory Prediction via "Team Game" 通过“团队游戏”重新思考轨迹预测 To accurately predict trajectories in multi-agent settings, e.g. team games, it is important to effectively model the interactions among agents. Whereas a number of methods have been developed for this purpose, existing methods implicitly model these interactions as part of the deep net architecture. However, in the real world, interactions often exist at multiple levels, e.g. individuals may form groups, where interactions among groups and those among the individuals in the same group often follow significantly different patterns. In this paper, we present a novel formulation for multi-agent trajectory prediction, which explicitly introduces the concept of interactive group consensus via an interactive hierarchical latent space. This formulation allows group-level and individual-level interactions to be captured jointly, thus substantially improving the capability of modeling complex dynamics. On two multi-agent settings, i.e. team sports and pedestrians, the proposed framework consistently achieves superior performance compared to existing methods. 准确预测多智能体设置中的轨迹，例如团队游戏中，有效地模拟智能体之间的交互非常重要。尽管为此目的开发了许多方法，但现有方法将这些交互隐式建模为深度网络架构的一部分。然而，在现实世界中，交互通常存在于多个层面，例如个体可能形成群体，群体之间的互动以及同一群体中个体之间的互动往往遵循明显不同的模式。在本文中，我们提出了一种多智能体轨迹预测的新颖公式，它通过交互式分层潜在空间明确引入了交互式群体共识的概念。该公式允许联合捕获群体级别和个人级别的交互，从而显着提高复杂动态建模的能力。在两种多智能体设置（即团队运动和行人）上，所提出的框架始终比现有方法取得更优异的性能。 本文提出一种基于交互分层潜在空间的多智能体轨迹预测方法，通过显式建模群体共识来提升复杂动态场景的预测能力。 Zikai Wei,Xinge Zhu,Bo Dai,Dahua Lin cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Yuying Hao,Yi Liu,Yizhou Chen,Lin Han,Juncai Peng,Shiyu Tang,Guowei Chen,Zewu Wu,Zeyu Chen,Baohua Lai
title: EISeg: An Efficient Interactive Segmentation Tool based on PaddlePaddle
title_zh: EISeg：基于PaddlePaddle的高效交互式分割工具
abstract: In recent years, the rapid development of deep learning has brought great advancements to image and video segmentation methods based on neural networks. However, to unleash the full potential of such models, large numbers of high-quality annotated images are necessary for model training. Currently, many widely used open-source image segmentation software relies heavily on manual annotation which is tedious and time-consuming. In this work, we introduce EISeg, an Efficient Interactive SEGmentation annotation tool that can drastically improve image segmentation annotation efficiency, generating highly accurate segmentation masks with only a few clicks. We also provide various domain-specific models for remote sensing, medical imaging, industrial quality inspections, human segmentation, and temporal aware models for video segmentation. The source code for our algorithm and user interface are available at: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSeg.
summary: In recent years, the rapid development of deep learning has brought great advancements to image and video segmentation methods based on neural networks. However, to unleash the full potential of such models, large numbers of high-quality annotated images are necessary for model training. Currently, many widely used open-source image segmentation software relies heavily on manual annotation which is tedious and time-consuming. In this work, we introduce EISeg, an Efficient Interactive SEGmentation annotation tool that can drastically improve image segmentation annotation efficiency, generating highly accurate segmentation masks with only a few clicks. We also provide various domain-specific models for remote sensing, medical imaging, industrial quality inspections, human segmentation, and temporal aware models for video segmentation. The source code for our algorithm and user interface are available at: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSeg.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习的快速发展为基于神经网络的图像和视频分割方法带来了巨大进步。然而，为了充分发挥此类模型的潜力，模型训练需要大量高质量的带注释图像。目前，许多广泛使用的开源图像分割软件严重依赖于手动标注，繁琐且耗时。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 EISeg，一种高效的交互式分割注释工具，它可以极大地提高图像分割注释效率，只需点击几下即可生成高度准确的分割掩模。我们还提供用于遥感、医学成像、工业质量检查、人体分割的各种特定领域模型以及用于视频分割的时间感知模型。我们的算法和用户界面的源代码位于：https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSeg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EISeg，一个基于PaddlePaddle的高效交互式图像分割标注工具，通过少量点击生成高精度分割掩码。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分割依赖大量人工标注，过程繁琐低效，且现有开源工具难以满足多领域需求。
AI.method: 开发交互式分割工具EISeg，结合多种领域专用模型（如遥感、医疗影像等）及视频时序感知模型，集成于PaddleSeg框架。
AI.result: 实现高精度分割掩码生成，显著提升标注效率，支持多领域应用并开源代码与界面。
AI.conclusion: EISeg通过交互式方法与领域模型优化，有效解决标注效率问题，为多场景分割任务提供实用工具。
