authors_text: Ranran Huang,Yu Wang,Huazhong Yang
title: Cross-layer Attention Network for Fine-grained Visual Categorization
title_zh: 用于细粒度视觉分类的跨层注意力网络
abstract: Learning discriminative representations for subtle localized details plays a significant role in Fine-grained Visual Categorization (FGVC). Compared to previous attention-based works, our work does not explicitly define or localize the part regions of interest; instead, we leverage the complementary properties of different stages of the network, and build a mutual refinement mechanism between the mid-level feature maps and the top-level feature map by our proposed Cross-layer Attention Network (CLAN). Specifically, CLAN is composed of 1) the Cross-layer Context Attention (CLCA) module, which enhances the global context information in the intermediate feature maps with the help of the top-level feature map, thereby improving the expressive power of the middle layers, and 2) the Cross-layer Spatial Attention (CLSA) module, which takes advantage of the local attention in the mid-level feature maps to boost the feature extraction of local regions at the top-level feature maps. Experimental results show our approach achieves state-of-the-art on three publicly available fine-grained recognition datasets (CUB-200-2011, Stanford Cars and FGVC-Aircraft). Ablation studies and visualizations are provided to understand our approach. Experimental results show our approach achieves state-of-the-art on three publicly available fine-grained recognition datasets (CUB-200-2011, Stanford Cars and FGVC-Aircraft).
summary: Learning discriminative representations for subtle localized details plays a significant role in Fine-grained Visual Categorization (FGVC). Compared to previous attention-based works, our work does not explicitly define or localize the part regions of interest; instead, we leverage the complementary properties of different stages of the network, and build a mutual refinement mechanism between the mid-level feature maps and the top-level feature map by our proposed Cross-layer Attention Network (CLAN). Specifically, CLAN is composed of 1) the Cross-layer Context Attention (CLCA) module, which enhances the global context information in the intermediate feature maps with the help of the top-level feature map, thereby improving the expressive power of the middle layers, and 2) the Cross-layer Spatial Attention (CLSA) module, which takes advantage of the local attention in the mid-level feature maps to boost the feature extraction of local regions at the top-level feature maps. Experimental results show our approach achieves state-of-the-art on three publicly available fine-grained recognition datasets (CUB-200-2011, Stanford Cars and FGVC-Aircraft). Ablation studies and visualizations are provided to understand our approach. Experimental results show our approach achieves state-of-the-art on three publicly available fine-grained recognition datasets (CUB-200-2011, Stanford Cars and FGVC-Aircraft).
abstract_zh: 学习细微局部细节的判别表示在细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）中发挥着重要作用。与之前的基于注意力的工作相比，我们的工作没有明确定义或本地化部分感兴趣区域；相反，我们利用网络不同阶段的互补特性，并通过我们提出的跨层注意网络（CLAN）在中层特征图和顶层特征图之间建立相互细化机制。具体来说，CLAN由1）跨层上下文注意力（CLCA）模块组成，它借助顶层特征图增强中间特征图中的全局上下文信息，从而提高中间层的表达能力；2）跨层空间注意力（CLSA）模块，它利用中层特征图中的局部注意力来促进顶层特征图中局部区域的特征提取。实验结果表明，我们的方法在三个公开的细粒度识别数据集（CUB-200-2011、Stanford Cars 和 FGVC-Aircraft）上达到了最先进的水平。提供消融研究和可视化来理解我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法在三个公开的细粒度识别数据集（CUB-200-2011、Stanford Cars 和 FGVC-Aircraft）上达到了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨层注意力网络（CLAN），用于细粒度视觉分类（FGVC），通过跨层特征交互提升模型对细微局部细节的判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于注意力的方法需显式定义感兴趣区域，而本文旨在通过跨层特征互补性，无需显式定位部分区域即可提升特征表达能力。
AI.method: CLAN包含两个模块：1) 跨层上下文注意力（CLCA）模块，利用顶层特征增强中间层全局上下文信息；2) 跨层空间注意力（CLSA）模块，借助中间层局部注意力优化顶层特征提取。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011、Stanford Cars和FGVC-Aircraft三个数据集上达到当时最优性能，并通过消融实验和可视化验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨层注意力机制能有效融合不同层级特征，无需显式部分定位即可提升细粒度分类性能，为FGVC提供新思路。

authors_text: Anuj Pal,Tianyi He,Wenpeng Wei
title: Sample-efficient Model Predictive Control Design of Soft Robotics by Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 基于贝叶斯优化的软体机器人样本有效模型预测控制设计
abstract: This paper presents a sample-efficient data-driven method to design model predictive control (MPC) for cable-actuated soft robotics using Bayesian optimization. Instead of modeling the complex dynamics of the soft robots, the proposed approach uses Bayesian optimization to search the best-guessed low-dimensional prediction model and its associated controller to minimize the objective function of closed-loop responses. The prediction model is updated by Bayesian optimization from the closed-loop input-output data in each iteration. A linear MPC is then designed based on the updated prediction model, and evaluated based on the closed-loop responses. Different from directly searching controller parameters, the closed-loop system stability, and inputs/outputs constraints can be easily handled in the MPC design. After a few iterations, a convergent solution of a (sub-)optimal controller can be obtained, which minimizes the user-defined closed-loop performance index. The proposed method is simulated and validated by a high-fidelity simulation of a cable-actuated soft robot. The simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach can achieve desired tracking controller for the soft robot without a prior-known model.
summary: This paper presents a sample-efficient data-driven method to design model predictive control (MPC) for cable-actuated soft robotics using Bayesian optimization. Instead of modeling the complex dynamics of the soft robots, the proposed approach uses Bayesian optimization to search the best-guessed low-dimensional prediction model and its associated controller to minimize the objective function of closed-loop responses. The prediction model is updated by Bayesian optimization from the closed-loop input-output data in each iteration. A linear MPC is then designed based on the updated prediction model, and evaluated based on the closed-loop responses. Different from directly searching controller parameters, the closed-loop system stability, and inputs/outputs constraints can be easily handled in the MPC design. After a few iterations, a convergent solution of a (sub-)optimal controller can be obtained, which minimizes the user-defined closed-loop performance index. The proposed method is simulated and validated by a high-fidelity simulation of a cable-actuated soft robot. The simulation results demonstrate that the proposed approach can achieve desired tracking controller for the soft robot without a prior-known model.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种样本高效的数据驱动方法，使用贝叶斯优化为电缆驱动软机器人设计模型预测控制 (MPC)。该方法不是对软机器人的复杂动力学进行建模，而是使用贝叶斯优化来搜索最佳猜测的低维预测模型及其相关控制器，以最小化闭环响应的目标函数。预测模型通过贝叶斯优化根据每次迭代中的闭环输入输出数据进行更新。然后根据更新的预测模型设计线性 MPC，并根据闭环响应进行评估。与直接搜索控制器参数不同，MPC 设计可以轻松处理闭环系统稳定性和输入/输出约束。经过几次迭代后，可以获得（次）最优控制器的收敛解，从而最小化用户定义的闭环性能指标。通过对电缆驱动软体机器人的高保真度仿真来对所提出的方法进行仿真和验证。仿真结果表明，所提出的方法可以在没有先验已知模型的情况下实现软机器人所需的跟踪控制器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯优化的样本高效方法，用于设计电缆驱动软机器人的模型预测控制（MPC），无需先验动力学模型。
AI.motivation: 软机器人动力学复杂且难以建模，传统MPC依赖精确模型，而实际中获取模型困难，需开发数据驱动且样本高效的控制设计方法。
AI.method: 通过贝叶斯优化迭代搜索最优低维预测模型及控制器，利用闭环输入输出数据更新模型，并基于更新模型设计线性MPC，确保稳定性与约束处理。
AI.result: 仿真验证表明，该方法可在无需先验模型的情况下实现软机器人的期望轨迹跟踪，且迭代次数少、收敛性好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂软机器人系统提供了无需精确模型的样本高效MPC设计框架，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Anthony Meng Huat Tiong,Junnan Li,Boyang Li,Silvio Savarese,Steven C. H. Hoi
title: Plug-and-Play VQA: Zero-shot VQA by Conjoining Large Pretrained Models with Zero Training
title_zh: 即插即用 VQA：通过将大型预训练模型与零训练相结合来实现零样本 VQA
comment: EMNLP 2022 (Findings); correct typos in Equation 2 on page 4
comments: EMNLP 2022 (Findings); correct typos in Equation 2 on page 4
abstract: Visual question answering (VQA) is a hallmark of vision and language reasoning and a challenging task under the zero-shot setting. We propose Plug-and-Play VQA (PNP-VQA), a modular framework for zero-shot VQA. In contrast to most existing works, which require substantial adaptation of pretrained language models (PLMs) for the vision modality, PNP-VQA requires no additional training of the PLMs. Instead, we propose to use natural language and network interpretation as an intermediate representation that glues pretrained models together. We first generate question-guided informative image captions, and pass the captions to a PLM as context for question answering. Surpassing end-to-end trained baselines, PNP-VQA achieves state-of-the-art results on zero-shot VQAv2 and GQA. With 11B parameters, it outperforms the 80B-parameter Flamingo model by 8.5% on VQAv2. With 738M PLM parameters, PNP-VQA achieves an improvement of 9.1% on GQA over FewVLM with 740M PLM parameters. Code is released at https://github.com/salesforce/LAVIS/tree/main/projects/pnp-vqa
summary: Visual question answering (VQA) is a hallmark of vision and language reasoning and a challenging task under the zero-shot setting. We propose Plug-and-Play VQA (PNP-VQA), a modular framework for zero-shot VQA. In contrast to most existing works, which require substantial adaptation of pretrained language models (PLMs) for the vision modality, PNP-VQA requires no additional training of the PLMs. Instead, we propose to use natural language and network interpretation as an intermediate representation that glues pretrained models together. We first generate question-guided informative image captions, and pass the captions to a PLM as context for question answering. Surpassing end-to-end trained baselines, PNP-VQA achieves state-of-the-art results on zero-shot VQAv2 and GQA. With 11B parameters, it outperforms the 80B-parameter Flamingo model by 8.5% on VQAv2. With 738M PLM parameters, PNP-VQA achieves an improvement of 9.1% on GQA over FewVLM with 740M PLM parameters. Code is released at https://github.com/salesforce/LAVIS/tree/main/projects/pnp-vqa
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）是视觉和语言推理的标志，也是零样本设置下的一项具有挑战性的任务。我们提出了即插即用 VQA (PNP-VQA)，这是一种零样本 VQA 的模块化框架。大多数现有的工作需要对视觉模态的预训练语言模型 (PLM) 进行大量调整，与此相反，PNP-VQA 不需要对 PLM 进行额外的训练。相反，我们建议使用自然语言和网络解释作为将预训练模型粘合在一起的中间表示。我们首先生成问题引导的信息图像标题，并将标题传递到 PLM 作为问答的上下文。 PNP-VQA 超越了端到端训练基线，在零样本 VQAv2 和 GQA 上实现了最先进的结果。具有 11B 参数的情况下，它在 VQAv2 上的性能比 80B 参数 Flamingo 模型高出 8.5%。凭借 738M PLM 参数，PNP-VQA 与具有 740M PLM 参数的 FewVLM 相比，GQA 提高了 9.1%。代码发布于 https://github.com/salesforce/LAVIS/tree/main/projects/pnp-vqa

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需额外训练的零样本视觉问答框架PNP-VQA，通过结合预训练模型实现跨模态推理。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本VQA方法需要大量调整预训练语言模型以适应视觉模态，导致训练成本高且效果受限，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用自然语言和网络解释作为中间表示，生成问题引导的图像描述并输入预训练语言模型（PLM）作为上下文，实现跨模态信息融合。
AI.result: 在零样本VQAv2和GQA数据集上取得SOTA结果，11B参数模型超越80B参数Flamingo模型8.5%，738M参数模型在GQA上较FewVLM提升9.1%。
AI.conclusion: PNP-VQA验证了模块化组合预训练模型在零样本VQA中的有效性，无需微调即可实现跨模态推理，代码已开源推动后续研究。

authors_text: Dejia Xu,Peihao Wang,Yifan Jiang,Zhiwen Fan,Zhangyang Wang
title: Signal Processing for Implicit Neural Representations
title_zh: 隐式神经表示的信号处理
comment: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2022
comments: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2022
abstract: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) encoding continuous multi-media data via multi-layer perceptrons has shown undebatable promise in various computer vision tasks. Despite many successful applications, editing and processing an INR remains intractable as signals are represented by latent parameters of a neural network. Existing works manipulate such continuous representations via processing on their discretized instance, which breaks down the compactness and continuous nature of INR. In this work, we present a pilot study on the question: how to directly modify an INR without explicit decoding? We answer this question by proposing an implicit neural signal processing network, dubbed INSP-Net, via differential operators on INR. Our key insight is that spatial gradients of neural networks can be computed analytically and are invariant to translation, while mathematically we show that any continuous convolution filter can be uniformly approximated by a linear combination of high-order differential operators. With these two knobs, INSP-Net instantiates the signal processing operator as a weighted composition of computational graphs corresponding to the high-order derivatives of INRs, where the weighting parameters can be data-driven learned. Based on our proposed INSP-Net, we further build the first Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that implicitly runs on INRs, named INSP-ConvNet. Our experiments validate the expressiveness of INSP-Net and INSP-ConvNet in fitting low-level image and geometry processing kernels (e.g. blurring, deblurring, denoising, inpainting, and smoothening) as well as for high-level tasks on implicit fields such as image classification.

Despite many successful applications, editing and processing an INR remains intractable as signals are represented by latent parameters of a neural network. Existing works manipulate such continuous representations via processing on their discretized instance, which breaks down the compactness and continuous nature of INR. In this work, we present a pilot study on the question: how to directly modify an INR without explicit decoding? We answer this question by proposing an implicit neural signal processing network, dubbed INSP-Net, via differential operators on INR. Our key insight is that spatial gradients of neural networks can be computed analytically and are invariant to translation, while mathematically we show that any continuous convolution filter can be uniformly approximated by a linear combination of high-order differential operators. With these two knobs, INSP-Net instantiates the signal processing operator as a weighted composition of computational graphs corresponding to the high-order derivatives of INRs, where the weighting parameters can be data-driven learned. Based on our proposed INSP-Net, we further build the first Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that implicitly runs on INRs, named INSP-ConvNet. Our experiments validate the expressiveness of INSP-Net and INSP-ConvNet in fitting low-level image and geometry processing kernels (e.g. blurring, deblurring, denoising, inpainting, and smoothening) as well as for high-level tasks on implicit fields such as image classification.
abstract_zh: 通过多层感知器编码连续多媒体数据的隐式神经表示（INR）在各种计算机视觉任务中显示出了无可争议的前景。尽管有许多成功的应用，但编辑和处理 INR 仍然很棘手，因为信号是由神经网络的潜在参数表示的。现有的作品通过对其离散实例进行处理来操纵这种连续表示，这打破了 INR 的紧凑性和连续性。在这项工作中，我们针对以下问题提出了一项试点研究：如何在不显式解码的情况下直接修改 INR？我们通过提出一个隐式神经信号处理网络来回答这个问题，称为 INSP-Net，通过 INR 上的微分算子。我们的主要见解是，神经网络的空间梯度可以通过分析计算并且对于平移不变，而在数学上我们表明任何连续卷积滤波器都可以通过高阶微分算子的线性组合来统一近似。通过这两个旋钮，INSP-Net 将信号处理算子实例化为与 INR 高阶导数相对应的计算图的加权组合，其中加权参数可以通过数据驱动学习。基于我们提出的 INSP-Net，我们进一步构建了第一个在 INR 上隐式运行的卷积神经网络（CNN），命名为 INSP-ConvNet。我们的实验验证了 INSP-Net 和 INSP-ConvNet 在拟合低级图像和几何处理内核（例如模糊、去模糊、去噪、修复和平滑）以及图像分类等隐式领域的高级任务方面的表现力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需显式解码的隐式神经表示（INR）信号处理方法，通过微分算子直接操作INR参数。
AI.motivation: 现有INR编辑方法依赖离散化处理，破坏了其连续性和紧凑性，难以直接操作神经网络参数进行信号处理。
AI.method: 提出INSP-Net框架，利用神经网络的解析梯度和微分算子近似卷积滤波器，构建基于高阶导数的计算图组合，并设计隐式运行于INR上的INSP-ConvNet。
AI.result: 实验验证了INSP-Net和INSP-ConvNet在图像模糊/去模糊/去噪/修复等低级任务及分类等高级任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过微分算子直接操作INR参数，实现了对隐式神经表示的高效信号处理，为连续域操作提供了新思路。

search_text: Signal Processing for Implicit Neural Representations 隐式神经表示的信号处理 Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) encoding continuous multi-media data via multi-layer perceptrons has shown undebatable promise in various computer vision tasks. Despite many successful applications, editing and processing an INR remains intractable as signals are represented by latent parameters of a neural network. Existing works manipulate such continuous representations via processing on their discretized instance, which breaks down the compactness and continuous nature of INR. In this work, we present a pilot study on the question: how to directly modify an INR without explicit decoding? We answer this question by proposing an implicit neural signal processing network, dubbed INSP-Net, via differential operators on INR. Our key insight is that spatial gradients of neural networks can be computed analytically and are invariant to translation, while mathematically we show that any continuous convolution filter can be uniformly approximated by a linear combination of high-order differential operators. With these two knobs, INSP-Net instantiates the signal processing operator as a weighted composition of computational graphs corresponding to the high-order derivatives of INRs, where the weighting parameters can be data-driven learned. Based on our proposed INSP-Net, we further build the first Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) that implicitly runs on INRs, named INSP-ConvNet. Our experiments validate the expressiveness of INSP-Net and INSP-ConvNet in fitting low-level image and geometry processing kernels (e.g. blurring, deblurring, denoising, inpainting, and smoothening) as well as for high-level tasks on implicit fields such as image classification. 通过多层感知器编码连续多媒体数据的隐式神经表示（INR）在各种计算机视觉任务中显示出了无可争议的前景。尽管有许多成功的应用，但编辑和处理 INR 仍然很棘手，因为信号是由神经网络的潜在参数表示的。现有的作品通过对其离散实例进行处理来操纵这种连续表示，这打破了 INR 的紧凑性和连续性。在这项工作中，我们针对以下问题提出了一项试点研究：如何在不显式解码的情况下直接修改 INR？我们通过提出一个隐式神经信号处理网络来回答这个问题，称为 INSP-Net，通过 INR 上的微分算子。我们的主要见解是，神经网络的空间梯度可以通过分析计算并且对于平移不变，而在数学上我们表明任何连续卷积滤波器都可以通过高阶微分算子的线性组合来统一近似。通过这两个旋钮，INSP-Net 将信号处理算子实例化为与 INR 高阶导数相对应的计算图的加权组合，其中加权参数可以通过数据驱动学习。基于我们提出的 INSP-Net，我们进一步构建了第一个在 INR 上隐式运行的卷积神经网络（CNN），命名为 INSP-ConvNet。我们的实验验证了 INSP-Net 和 INSP-ConvNet 在拟合低级图像和几何处理内核（例如模糊、去模糊、去噪、修复和平滑）以及图像分类等隐式领域的高级任务方面的表现力。 本文提出了一种无需显式解码的隐式神经表示（INR）信号处理方法，通过微分算子直接操作INR参数。 Dejia Xu,Peihao Wang,Yifan Jiang,Zhiwen Fan,Zhangyang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: JunKyu Jang,Eugene Hwang,Sung-Hyuk Park
title: N-pad : Neighboring Pixel-based Industrial Anomaly Detection
title_zh: N-pad：基于相邻像素的工业异常检测
abstract: Identifying defects in the images of industrial products has been an important task to enhance quality control and reduce maintenance costs. In recent studies, industrial anomaly detection models were developed using pre-trained networks to learn nominal representations. To employ the relative positional information of each pixel, we present \textit{\textbf{N-pad}}, a novel method for anomaly detection and segmentation in a one-class learning setting that includes the neighborhood of the target pixel for model training and evaluation. Within the model architecture, pixel-wise nominal distributions are estimated by using the features of neighboring pixels with the target pixel to allow possible marginal misalignment. Moreover, the centroids from clusters of nominal features are identified as a representative nominal set. Accordingly, anomaly scores are inferred based on the Mahalanobis distances and Euclidean distances between the target pixel and the estimated distributions or the centroid set, respectively. Thus, we have achieved state-of-the-art performance in MVTec-AD with AUROC of 99.37 for anomaly detection and 98.75 for anomaly segmentation, reducing the error by 34\% compared to the next best performing model. Experiments in various settings further validate our model.
summary: Identifying defects in the images of industrial products has been an important task to enhance quality control and reduce maintenance costs. In recent studies, industrial anomaly detection models were developed using pre-trained networks to learn nominal representations. To employ the relative positional information of each pixel, we present \textit{\textbf{N-pad}}, a novel method for anomaly detection and segmentation in a one-class learning setting that includes the neighborhood of the target pixel for model training and evaluation. Within the model architecture, pixel-wise nominal distributions are estimated by using the features of neighboring pixels with the target pixel to allow possible marginal misalignment. Moreover, the centroids from clusters of nominal features are identified as a representative nominal set. Accordingly, anomaly scores are inferred based on the Mahalanobis distances and Euclidean distances between the target pixel and the estimated distributions or the centroid set, respectively. Thus, we have achieved state-of-the-art performance in MVTec-AD with AUROC of 99.37 for anomaly detection and 98.75 for anomaly segmentation, reducing the error by 34\% compared to the next best performing model. Experiments in various settings further validate our model.
abstract_zh: 识别工业产品图像中的缺陷一直是加强质量控制和降低维护成本的重要任务。在最近的研究中，使用预先训练的网络来学习名义表示来开发工业异常检测模型。为了利用每个像素的相对位置信息，我们提出了 \textit{\textbf{N-pad}}，这是一种在一类学习设置中进行异常检测和分割的新方法，其中包括用于模型训练和评估的目标像素的邻域。在模型架构中，通过使用邻近像素与目标像素的特征来估计逐像素标称分布，以允许可能的边缘未对准。此外，标称特征簇的质心被识别为代表性标称集。因此，分别基于目标像素与估计分布或质心集之间的马哈拉诺比斯距离和欧几里得距离来推断异常分数。因此，我们在 MVTec-AD 中实现了最先进的性能，异常检测的 AUROC 为 99.37，异常分割的 AUROC 为 98.75，与下一个最佳性能模型相比，误差减少了 34%。各种设置下的实验进一步验证了我们的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相邻像素的工业异常检测方法N-pad，在单类学习框架下通过考虑目标像素的邻域信息提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有工业异常检测方法未能有效利用像素间的相对位置信息，导致模型在处理边缘或错位缺陷时存在误差。
AI.method: 通过整合目标像素及其邻域的特征估计像素级正常分布，利用马氏距离和欧氏距离分别计算目标像素与分布/聚类中心的差异作为异常分数。
AI.result: 在MVTec-AD数据集上达到99.37%的AUROC（检测）和98.75%的AUROC（分割），相比次优模型误差降低34%。
AI.conclusion: N-pad通过引入邻域像素信息有效提升了工业异常检测精度，实验验证了其在多种场景下的优越性。

authors_text: Minjun Zhu,Yixuan Weng,Shizhu He,Kang Liu,Jun Zhao
title: ReasonChainQA: Text-based Complex Question Answering with Explainable Evidence Chains
title_zh: ReasonChainQA：具有可解释证据链的基于文本的复杂问题解答
abstract: The ability of reasoning over evidence has received increasing attention in question answering (QA). Recently, natural language database (NLDB) conducts complex QA in knowledge base with textual evidences rather than structured representations, this task attracts a lot of attention because of the flexibility and richness of textual evidence. However, existing text-based complex question answering datasets fail to provide explicit reasoning process, while it's important for retrieval effectiveness and reasoning interpretability. Therefore, we present a benchmark \textbf{ReasonChainQA} with explanatory and explicit evidence chains. ReasonChainQA consists of two subtasks: answer generation and evidence chains extraction, it also contains higher diversity for multi-hop questions with varying depths, 12 reasoning types and 78 relations. To obtain high-quality textual evidences for answering complex question. Additional experiment on supervised and unsupervised retrieval fully indicates the significance of ReasonChainQA. Dataset and codes will be made publicly available upon accepted.
summary: The ability of reasoning over evidence has received increasing attention in question answering (QA). Recently, natural language database (NLDB) conducts complex QA in knowledge base with textual evidences rather than structured representations, this task attracts a lot of attention because of the flexibility and richness of textual evidence. However, existing text-based complex question answering datasets fail to provide explicit reasoning process, while it's important for retrieval effectiveness and reasoning interpretability. Therefore, we present a benchmark \textbf{ReasonChainQA} with explanatory and explicit evidence chains. ReasonChainQA consists of two subtasks: answer generation and evidence chains extraction, it also contains higher diversity for multi-hop questions with varying depths, 12 reasoning types and 78 relations. To obtain high-quality textual evidences for answering complex question. Additional experiment on supervised and unsupervised retrieval fully indicates the significance of ReasonChainQA. Dataset and codes will be made publicly available upon accepted.
abstract_zh: 对证据进行推理的能力在问答（QA）中受到越来越多的关注。最近，自然语言数据库（NLDB）利用文本证据而不是结构化表示在知识库中进行复杂的问答，由于文本证据的灵活性和丰富性，这项任务引起了广泛的关注。然而，现有的基于文本的复杂问答数据集无法提供明确的推理过程，而这对于检索有效性和推理可解释性很重要。因此，我们提出了一个具有解释性和明确证据链的基准 \textbf{ReasonChainQA}。 ReasonChainQA 包含两个子任务：答案生成和证据链提取，它还包含针对不同深度的多跳问题的更高多样性、12 种推理类型和 78 种关系。获得高质量的文本证据来回答复杂的问题。监督和无监督检索的额外实验充分表明了 ReasonChainQA 的重要性。数据集和代码将在接受后公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为ReasonChainQA的基准测试，用于基于文本的复杂问答任务，通过可解释的证据链提升推理效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文本复杂问答数据集缺乏显式推理过程，影响检索效果和可解释性，需构建包含明确证据链的新数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含答案生成和证据链提取两个子任务的ReasonChainQA，涵盖多跳问题、12种推理类型及78种关系，并通过监督与非监督检索实验验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明ReasonChainQA能显著提升复杂问答的检索效果与推理可解释性，凸显其在研究中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: ReasonChainQA为复杂问答研究提供了高质量基准，推动基于文本的可解释推理方法发展。

search_text: ReasonChainQA: Text-based Complex Question Answering with Explainable Evidence Chains ReasonChainQA：具有可解释证据链的基于文本的复杂问题解答 The ability of reasoning over evidence has received increasing attention in question answering (QA). Recently, natural language database (NLDB) conducts complex QA in knowledge base with textual evidences rather than structured representations, this task attracts a lot of attention because of the flexibility and richness of textual evidence. However, existing text-based complex question answering datasets fail to provide explicit reasoning process, while it's important for retrieval effectiveness and reasoning interpretability. Therefore, we present a benchmark \textbf{ReasonChainQA} with explanatory and explicit evidence chains. ReasonChainQA consists of two subtasks: answer generation and evidence chains extraction, it also contains higher diversity for multi-hop questions with varying depths, 12 reasoning types and 78 relations. To obtain high-quality textual evidences for answering complex question. Additional experiment on supervised and unsupervised retrieval fully indicates the significance of ReasonChainQA. Dataset and codes will be made publicly available upon accepted. 对证据进行推理的能力在问答（QA）中受到越来越多的关注。最近，自然语言数据库（NLDB）利用文本证据而不是结构化表示在知识库中进行复杂的问答，由于文本证据的灵活性和丰富性，这项任务引起了广泛的关注。然而，现有的基于文本的复杂问答数据集无法提供明确的推理过程，而这对于检索有效性和推理可解释性很重要。因此，我们提出了一个具有解释性和明确证据链的基准 \textbf{ReasonChainQA}。 ReasonChainQA 包含两个子任务：答案生成和证据链提取，它还包含针对不同深度的多跳问题的更高多样性、12 种推理类型和 78 种关系。获得高质量的文本证据来回答复杂的问题。监督和无监督检索的额外实验充分表明了 ReasonChainQA 的重要性。数据集和代码将在接受后公开发布。 本文提出一个名为ReasonChainQA的基准测试，用于基于文本的复杂问答任务，通过可解释的证据链提升推理效果。 Minjun Zhu,Yixuan Weng,Shizhu He,Kang Liu,Jun Zhao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhaoheng Huang,Zhicheng Dou,Yutao Zhu,Zhengyi Ma
title: MCP: Self-supervised Pre-training for Personalized Chatbots with Multi-level Contrastive Sampling
title_zh: MCP：具有多级对比采样的个性化聊天机器人的自监督预训练
abstract: Personalized chatbots focus on endowing the chatbots with a consistent personality to behave like real users and further act as personal assistants. Previous studies have explored generating implicit user profiles from the user's dialogue history for building personalized chatbots. However, these studies only use the response generation loss to train the entire model, thus it is prone to suffer from the problem of data sparsity. Besides, they overemphasize the final generated response's quality while ignoring the correlations and fusions between the user's dialogue history, leading to rough data representations and performance degradation. To tackle these problems, we propose a self-supervised learning framework MCP for capturing better representations from users' dialogue history for personalized chatbots. Specifically, we apply contrastive sampling methods to leverage the supervised signals hidden in user dialog history, and generate the pre-training samples for enhancing the model. We design three pre-training tasks based on three types of contrastive pairs from user dialogue history, namely response pairs, sequence augmentation pairs, and user pairs. We pre-train the utterance encoder and the history encoder towards the contrastive objectives and use these pre-trained encoders for generating user profiles while personalized response generation. Experimental results on two real-world datasets show a significant improvement in our proposed model MCP compared with the existing methods.
summary: Personalized chatbots focus on endowing the chatbots with a consistent personality to behave like real users and further act as personal assistants. Previous studies have explored generating implicit user profiles from the user's dialogue history for building personalized chatbots. However, these studies only use the response generation loss to train the entire model, thus it is prone to suffer from the problem of data sparsity. Besides, they overemphasize the final generated response's quality while ignoring the correlations and fusions between the user's dialogue history, leading to rough data representations and performance degradation. To tackle these problems, we propose a self-supervised learning framework MCP for capturing better representations from users' dialogue history for personalized chatbots. Specifically, we apply contrastive sampling methods to leverage the supervised signals hidden in user dialog history, and generate the pre-training samples for enhancing the model. We design three pre-training tasks based on three types of contrastive pairs from user dialogue history, namely response pairs, sequence augmentation pairs, and user pairs. We pre-train the utterance encoder and the history encoder towards the contrastive objectives and use these pre-trained encoders for generating user profiles while personalized response generation. Experimental results on two real-world datasets show a significant improvement in our proposed model MCP compared with the existing methods.
abstract_zh: 个性化聊天机器人专注于赋予聊天机器人一致的个性，使其表现得像真正的用户，并进一步充当个人助理。先前的研究已经探索从用户的对话历史中生成隐式用户配置文件以构建个性化聊天机器人。然而，这些研究仅使用响应生成损失来训练整个模型，因此很容易出现数据稀疏的问题。此外，他们过分强调最终生成的响应的质量，而忽略了用户对话历史之间的相关性和融合，导致数据表示粗糙和性能下降。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种自监督学习框架 MCP，用于从个性化聊天机器人的用户对话历史记录中捕获更好的表示。具体来说，我们应用对比采样方法来利用隐藏在用户对话历史记录中的监督信号，并生成用于增强模型的预训练样本。我们根据用户对话历史中的三种对比对（即响应对、序列增强对和用户对）设计了三个预训练任务。我们针对对比目标预先训练话语编码器和历史编码器，并使用这些预先训练的编码器来生成用户配置文件，同时生成个性化响应。两个真实世界数据集的实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，我们提出的模型 MCP 有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MCP框架，通过多层次对比抽样方法提升个性化聊天机器人的对话表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因仅依赖响应生成损失导致数据稀疏，且忽视对话历史间的关联性，造成表示粗糙和性能下降。
AI.method: 设计包含响应对、序列增强对、用户对的三类对比样本，通过对比学习预训练对话历史编码器与语句编码器。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上，MCP相较现有方法实现显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MCP通过挖掘对话历史中的监督信号，有效解决了个性化聊天机器人中的数据稀疏与表示粗糙问题。

authors_text: Sanjoy Kumar Pal,Soumen Sarkar,Surajit Chakrabarti
title: Use of a smartphone camera to determine the focal length of a thin lens by finding the transverse magnification of the virtual image of an object
title_zh: 使用智能手机摄像头通过查找物体虚像的横向放大率来确定薄透镜的焦距
abstract: In this work we have determined the focal length of a concave lens by photographing the virtual image of an object by a smartphone camera. We have similarly determined the focal length of a convex lens by forming a virtual image of an object keeping it within the focal distance from the lens. When a photograph is taken by a smartphone, the transverse width of the image on the sensor of the camera in pixels can be read off by software available freely from the internet. By taking a photograph of the virtual image from two positions of the camera separated by a distance along the line of sight of the camera, we have determined the transverse width of the virtual image. From this we find the focal lengths of the lenses knowing the transverse width and the distance of the object from the lenses.
summary: In this work we have determined the focal length of a concave lens by photographing the virtual image of an object by a smartphone camera. We have similarly determined the focal length of a convex lens by forming a virtual image of an object keeping it within the focal distance from the lens. When a photograph is taken by a smartphone, the transverse width of the image on the sensor of the camera in pixels can be read off by software available freely from the internet. By taking a photograph of the virtual image from two positions of the camera separated by a distance along the line of sight of the camera, we have determined the transverse width of the virtual image. From this we find the focal lengths of the lenses knowing the transverse width and the distance of the object from the lenses.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们通过智能手机相机拍摄物体的虚像来确定凹透镜的焦距。我们通过形成物体的虚像并将其保持在距透镜的焦距内，从而类似地确定了凸透镜的焦距。当用智能手机拍照时，可以通过互联网上免费提供的软件读取相机传感器上图像的横向宽度（以像素为单位）。通过沿着相机视线从相距一定距离的相机的两个位置拍摄虚像的照片，我们确定了虚像的横向宽度。由此，我们可以在知道横向宽度和物体距镜头的距离的情况下找到镜头的焦距。

AI.tldr: 本文通过智能手机摄像头拍摄虚拟图像，利用横向放大率测定薄透镜的焦距。
AI.motivation: 提供一种利用常见智能手机设备简便测量透镜焦距的实验方法，适用于教学和实践场景。
AI.method: 使用智能手机摄像头拍摄物体经透镜形成的虚拟图像，通过软件读取传感器上图像的横向像素宽度，结合两次不同位置的拍摄数据及物距计算焦距。
AI.result: 成功测定凹透镜和凸透镜的焦距，验证了基于智能手机的测量方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为光学实验提供了低成本、易操作的解决方案，适合教育领域推广使用。

authors_text: Sanghwan Bae,Donghyun Kwak,Soyoung Kang,Min Young Lee,Sungdong Kim,Yuin Jeong,Hyeri Kim,Sang-Woo Lee,Woomyoung Park,Nako Sung
title: Keep Me Updated! Memory Management in Long-term Conversations
title_zh: 让我更新！长期对话中的内存管理
abstract: Remembering important information from the past and continuing to talk about it in the present are crucial in long-term conversations. However, previous literature does not deal with cases where the memorized information is outdated, which may cause confusion in later conversations. To address this issue, we present a novel task and a corresponding dataset of memory management in long-term conversations, in which bots keep track of and bring up the latest information about users while conversing through multiple sessions. In order to support more precise and interpretable memory, we represent memory as unstructured text descriptions of key information and propose a new mechanism of memory management that selectively eliminates invalidated or redundant information. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms the baselines that leave the stored memory unchanged in terms of engagingness and humanness, with larger performance gap especially in the later sessions.
summary: Remembering important information from the past and continuing to talk about it in the present are crucial in long-term conversations. However, previous literature does not deal with cases where the memorized information is outdated, which may cause confusion in later conversations. To address this issue, we present a novel task and a corresponding dataset of memory management in long-term conversations, in which bots keep track of and bring up the latest information about users while conversing through multiple sessions. In order to support more precise and interpretable memory, we represent memory as unstructured text descriptions of key information and propose a new mechanism of memory management that selectively eliminates invalidated or redundant information. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms the baselines that leave the stored memory unchanged in terms of engagingness and humanness, with larger performance gap especially in the later sessions.
abstract_zh: 记住过去的重要信息并在当前继续谈论它对于长期对话至关重要。然而，以前的文献并没有处理记忆信息过时的情况，这可能会在以后的对话中造成混乱。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一项新颖的任务和长期对话中内存管理的相应数据集，其中机器人在通过多个会话进行对话时跟踪并调出有关用户的最新信息。为了支持更精确和可解释的记忆，我们将记忆表示为关键信息的非结构化文本描述，并提出了一种新的记忆管理机制，可以选择性地消除无效或冗余信息。实验结果表明，我们的方法在参与度和人性方面优于保持存储记忆不变的基线，尤其是在后面的会话中，性能差距更大。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种长期对话中的记忆管理任务与数据集，解决对话中记忆信息过时导致的混淆问题，并设计选择性更新记忆的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未处理长期对话中记忆信息可能过时的问题，导致后续对话产生混淆，需开发能动态更新记忆的对话系统。
AI.method: 将记忆表示为非结构化文本描述，提出选择性消除无效/冗余信息的机制，并构建多会话场景下的记忆管理数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在对话参与度和人性化指标上优于静态记忆基线，后期对话效果提升更显著。
AI.conclusion: 动态记忆管理机制能有效提升长期对话的连贯性与自然度，为对话系统提供新的研究方向。

search_text: Keep Me Updated! Memory Management in Long-term Conversations 让我更新！长期对话中的内存管理 Remembering important information from the past and continuing to talk about it in the present are crucial in long-term conversations. However, previous literature does not deal with cases where the memorized information is outdated, which may cause confusion in later conversations. To address this issue, we present a novel task and a corresponding dataset of memory management in long-term conversations, in which bots keep track of and bring up the latest information about users while conversing through multiple sessions. In order to support more precise and interpretable memory, we represent memory as unstructured text descriptions of key information and propose a new mechanism of memory management that selectively eliminates invalidated or redundant information. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms the baselines that leave the stored memory unchanged in terms of engagingness and humanness, with larger performance gap especially in the later sessions. 记住过去的重要信息并在当前继续谈论它对于长期对话至关重要。然而，以前的文献并没有处理记忆信息过时的情况，这可能会在以后的对话中造成混乱。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一项新颖的任务和长期对话中内存管理的相应数据集，其中机器人在通过多个会话进行对话时跟踪并调出有关用户的最新信息。为了支持更精确和可解释的记忆，我们将记忆表示为关键信息的非结构化文本描述，并提出了一种新的记忆管理机制，可以选择性地消除无效或冗余信息。实验结果表明，我们的方法在参与度和人性方面优于保持存储记忆不变的基线，尤其是在后面的会话中，性能差距更大。 本文提出一种长期对话中的记忆管理任务与数据集，解决对话中记忆信息过时导致的混淆问题，并设计选择性更新记忆的机制。 Sanghwan Bae,Donghyun Kwak,Soyoung Kang,Min Young Lee,Sungdong Kim,Yuin Jeong,Hyeri Kim,Sang-Woo Lee,Woomyoung Park,Nako Sung cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Longhui Yu,Yifan Zhang,Lanqing Hong,Fei Chen,Zhenguo Li
title: Dual-Curriculum Teacher for Domain-Inconsistent Object Detection in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶中域不一致目标检测的双课程教师
abstract: Object detection for autonomous vehicles has received increasing attention in recent years, where labeled data are often expensive while unlabeled data can be collected readily, calling for research on semi-supervised learning for this area. Existing semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) methods usually assume that the labeled and unlabeled data come from the same data distribution. In autonomous driving, however, data are usually collected from different scenarios, such as different weather conditions or different times in a day. Motivated by this, we study a novel but challenging domain inconsistent SSOD problem. It involves two kinds of distribution shifts among different domains, including (1) data distribution discrepancy, and (2) class distribution shifts, making existing SSOD methods suffer from inaccurate pseudo-labels and hurting model performance. To address this problem, we propose a novel method, namely Dual-Curriculum Teacher (DucTeacher). Specifically, DucTeacher consists of two curriculums, i.e., (1) domain evolving curriculum seeks to learn from the data progressively to handle data distribution discrepancy by estimating the similarity between domains, and (2) distribution matching curriculum seeks to estimate the class distribution for each unlabeled domain to handle class distribution shifts. In this way, DucTeacher can calibrate biased pseudo-labels and handle the domain-inconsistent SSOD problem effectively. DucTeacher shows its advantages on SODA10M, the largest public semi-supervised autonomous driving dataset, and COCO, a widely used SSOD benchmark. Experiments show that DucTeacher achieves new state-of-the-art performance on SODA10M with 2.2 mAP improvement and on COCO with 0.8 mAP improvement.
summary: Object detection for autonomous vehicles has received increasing attention in recent years, where labeled data are often expensive while unlabeled data can be collected readily, calling for research on semi-supervised learning for this area. Existing semi-supervised object detection (SSOD) methods usually assume that the labeled and unlabeled data come from the same data distribution. In autonomous driving, however, data are usually collected from different scenarios, such as different weather conditions or different times in a day. Motivated by this, we study a novel but challenging domain inconsistent SSOD problem. It involves two kinds of distribution shifts among different domains, including (1) data distribution discrepancy, and (2) class distribution shifts, making existing SSOD methods suffer from inaccurate pseudo-labels and hurting model performance. To address this problem, we propose a novel method, namely Dual-Curriculum Teacher (DucTeacher). Specifically, DucTeacher consists of two curriculums, i.e., (1) domain evolving curriculum seeks to learn from the data progressively to handle data distribution discrepancy by estimating the similarity between domains, and (2) distribution matching curriculum seeks to estimate the class distribution for each unlabeled domain to handle class distribution shifts. In this way, DucTeacher can calibrate biased pseudo-labels and handle the domain-inconsistent SSOD problem effectively. DucTeacher shows its advantages on SODA10M, the largest public semi-supervised autonomous driving dataset, and COCO, a widely used SSOD benchmark. Experiments show that DucTeacher achieves new state-of-the-art performance on SODA10M with 2.2 mAP improvement and on COCO with 0.8 mAP improvement.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自动驾驶汽车的目标检测受到越来越多的关注，其中标记数据通常很昂贵，而未标记数据很容易收集，因此需要对这一领域的半监督学习进行研究。现有的半监督目标检测（SSOD）方法通常假设标记数据和未标记数据来自相同的数据分布。然而，在自动驾驶中，数据通常是从不同的场景收集的，例如不同的天气条件或一天中的不同时间。受此启发，我们研究了一个新颖但具有挑战性的域不一致 SSOD 问题。它涉及不同领域之间的两种分布变化，包括（1）数据分布差异和（2）类别分布变化，使得现有的SSOD方法遭受不准确的伪标签并损害模型性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新方法，即双课程教师（DucTeacher）。具体来说，DucTeacher 由两个课程组成，即（1）领域演化课程旨在通过估计领域之间的相似性逐步从数据中学习，以处理数据分布差异，（2）分布匹配课程旨在估计每个未标记领域的类分布以处理类分布变化。通过这种方式，DucTeacher可以校准有偏差的伪标签并有效处理域不一致的SSOD问题。 DucTeacher在最大的公共半监督自动驾驶数据集SODA10M和广泛使用的SSOD基准COCO上展示了其优势。实验表明，DucTeacher 在 SODA10M 上实现了新的最先进性能，mAP 提高了 2.2，在 COCO 上实现了 0.8 mAP 提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DucTeacher的双课程教师方法，用于解决自动驾驶中领域不一致的半监督目标检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法假设标注数据和未标注数据来自相同分布，但自动驾驶场景中数据常来自不同领域（如天气、时间），导致伪标签不准确和模型性能下降。
AI.method: DucTeacher包含两个课程：领域演化课程通过估计领域相似性逐步学习以处理数据分布差异；分布匹配课程通过估计每个未标注领域的类别分布以处理类别分布偏移，从而校准有偏伪标签。
AI.result: 在SODA10M数据集上提升2.2 mAP，在COCO基准测试中提升0.8 mAP，达到新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: DucTeacher有效解决了领域不一致的半监督目标检测问题，在大规模自动驾驶数据集和通用基准上均取得显著性能提升。

authors_text: Dong-Hee Paek,Kevin Tirta Wijaya,Seung-Hyun Kong
title: Row-wise LiDAR Lane Detection Network with Lane Correlation Refinement
title_zh: 具有车道相关性细化的行式 LiDAR 车道检测网络
comment: Accepted at 2022 IEEE Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)
comments: Accepted at 2022 IEEE Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)
abstract: Lane detection is one of the most important functions for autonomous driving. In recent years, deep learning-based lane detection networks with RGB camera images have shown promising performance. However, camera-based methods are inherently vulnerable to adverse lighting conditions such as poor or dazzling lighting. Unlike camera, LiDAR sensor is robust to the lighting conditions. In this work, we propose a novel two-stage LiDAR lane detection network with row-wise detection approach. The first-stage network produces lane proposals through a global feature correlator backbone and a row-wise detection head. Meanwhile, the second-stage network refines the feature map of the first-stage network via attention-based mechanism between the local features around the lane proposals, and outputs a set of new lane proposals. Experimental results on the K-Lane dataset show that the proposed network advances the state-of-the-art in terms of F1-score with 30% less GFLOPs. In addition, the second-stage network is found to be especially robust to lane occlusions, thus, demonstrating the robustness of the proposed network for driving in crowded environments.
summary: Lane detection is one of the most important functions for autonomous driving. In recent years, deep learning-based lane detection networks with RGB camera images have shown promising performance. However, camera-based methods are inherently vulnerable to adverse lighting conditions such as poor or dazzling lighting. Unlike camera, LiDAR sensor is robust to the lighting conditions. In this work, we propose a novel two-stage LiDAR lane detection network with row-wise detection approach. The first-stage network produces lane proposals through a global feature correlator backbone and a row-wise detection head. Meanwhile, the second-stage network refines the feature map of the first-stage network via attention-based mechanism between the local features around the lane proposals, and outputs a set of new lane proposals. Experimental results on the K-Lane dataset show that the proposed network advances the state-of-the-art in terms of F1-score with 30% less GFLOPs. In addition, the second-stage network is found to be especially robust to lane occlusions, thus, demonstrating the robustness of the proposed network for driving in crowded environments.
abstract_zh: 车道检测是自动驾驶最重要的功能之一。近年来，基于深度学习的带有 RGB 摄像头图像的车道检测网络表现出了良好的性能。然而，基于相机的方法本质上容易受到不利照明条件的影响，例如光线不足或刺眼。与相机不同，LiDAR 传感器对照明条件具有鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种采用行检测方法的新型两级 LiDAR 车道检测网络。第一阶段网络通过全局特征相关器骨干和行检测头产生车道建议。同时，第二阶段网络通过车道提案周围的局部特征之间基于注意力的机制细化第一阶段网络的特征图，并输出一组新的车道提案。 K-Lane 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的网络在 F1 分数方面领先于最先进水平，且 GFLOP 减少了 30%。此外，发现第二阶段网络对车道遮挡特别鲁棒，从而证明了所提出的网络在拥挤环境中驾驶的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于行-wise检测方法和车道关联优化的LiDAR车道检测网络，以提升自动驾驶场景下的车道检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于RGB相机的车道检测方法易受光照条件影响，而LiDAR传感器具有光照鲁棒性，但现有LiDAR车道检测方法在遮挡场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 设计两阶段网络架构：第一阶段通过全局特征关联和行-wise检测头生成车道提案；第二阶段利用局部特征注意力机制优化提案，增强遮挡场景下的检测能力。
AI.result: 在K-Lane数据集上，该网络相较现有方法F1-score提升30%且计算量减少30%，对车道遮挡具有显著鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提网络通过行-wise检测与关联优化机制，在保持高效计算的同时显著提升了LiDAR车道检测的准确性和环境适应性。

search_text: Row-wise LiDAR Lane Detection Network with Lane Correlation Refinement 具有车道相关性细化的行式 LiDAR 车道检测网络 Lane detection is one of the most important functions for autonomous driving. In recent years, deep learning-based lane detection networks with RGB camera images have shown promising performance. However, camera-based methods are inherently vulnerable to adverse lighting conditions such as poor or dazzling lighting. Unlike camera, LiDAR sensor is robust to the lighting conditions. In this work, we propose a novel two-stage LiDAR lane detection network with row-wise detection approach. The first-stage network produces lane proposals through a global feature correlator backbone and a row-wise detection head. Meanwhile, the second-stage network refines the feature map of the first-stage network via attention-based mechanism between the local features around the lane proposals, and outputs a set of new lane proposals. Experimental results on the K-Lane dataset show that the proposed network advances the state-of-the-art in terms of F1-score with 30% less GFLOPs. In addition, the second-stage network is found to be especially robust to lane occlusions, thus, demonstrating the robustness of the proposed network for driving in crowded environments. 车道检测是自动驾驶最重要的功能之一。近年来，基于深度学习的带有 RGB 摄像头图像的车道检测网络表现出了良好的性能。然而，基于相机的方法本质上容易受到不利照明条件的影响，例如光线不足或刺眼。与相机不同，LiDAR 传感器对照明条件具有鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种采用行检测方法的新型两级 LiDAR 车道检测网络。第一阶段网络通过全局特征相关器骨干和行检测头产生车道建议。同时，第二阶段网络通过车道提案周围的局部特征之间基于注意力的机制细化第一阶段网络的特征图，并输出一组新的车道提案。 K-Lane 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的网络在 F1 分数方面领先于最先进水平，且 GFLOP 减少了 30%。此外，发现第二阶段网络对车道遮挡特别鲁棒，从而证明了所提出的网络在拥挤环境中驾驶的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于行-wise检测方法和车道关联优化的LiDAR车道检测网络，以提升自动驾驶场景下的车道检测性能。 Dong-Hee Paek,Kevin Tirta Wijaya,Seung-Hyun Kong cs.CV

authors_text: Li Xia,Peter W. Glynn
title: Risk-Sensitive Markov Decision Processes with Long-Run CVaR Criterion
title_zh: 具有长期 CVaR 准则的风险敏感马尔可夫决策过程
comment: 33 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables. A risk-sensitive MDP methodology for optimizing long-run CVaR, which is extensive to data-driven learning scenarios
comments: 33 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables. A risk-sensitive MDP methodology for optimizing long-run CVaR, which is extensive to data-driven learning scenarios
abstract: CVaR (Conditional Value at Risk) is a risk metric widely used in finance. However, dynamically optimizing CVaR is difficult since it is not a standard Markov decision process (MDP) and the principle of dynamic programming fails. In this paper, we study the infinite-horizon discrete-time MDP with a long-run CVaR criterion, from the view of sensitivity-based optimization. By introducing a pseudo CVaR metric, we derive a CVaR difference formula which quantifies the difference of long-run CVaR under any two policies. The optimality of deterministic policies is derived. We obtain a so-called Bellman local optimality equation for CVaR, which is a necessary and sufficient condition for local optimal policies and only necessary for global optimal policies. A CVaR derivative formula is also derived for providing more sensitivity information. Then we develop a policy iteration type algorithm to efficiently optimize CVaR, which is shown to converge to local optima in the mixed policy space. We further discuss some extensions including the mean-CVaR optimization and the maximization of CVaR. Finally, we conduct numerical experiments relating to portfolio management to demonstrate the main results. Our work may shed light on dynamically optimizing CVaR from a sensitivity viewpoint.
summary: CVaR (Conditional Value at Risk) is a risk metric widely used in finance. However, dynamically optimizing CVaR is difficult since it is not a standard Markov decision process (MDP) and the principle of dynamic programming fails. In this paper, we study the infinite-horizon discrete-time MDP with a long-run CVaR criterion, from the view of sensitivity-based optimization. By introducing a pseudo CVaR metric, we derive a CVaR difference formula which quantifies the difference of long-run CVaR under any two policies. The optimality of deterministic policies is derived. We obtain a so-called Bellman local optimality equation for CVaR, which is a necessary and sufficient condition for local optimal policies and only necessary for global optimal policies. A CVaR derivative formula is also derived for providing more sensitivity information. Then we develop a policy iteration type algorithm to efficiently optimize CVaR, which is shown to converge to local optima in the mixed policy space. We further discuss some extensions including the mean-CVaR optimization and the maximization of CVaR. Finally, we conduct numerical experiments relating to portfolio management to demonstrate the main results. Our work may shed light on dynamically optimizing CVaR from a sensitivity viewpoint.
abstract_zh: CVaR（条件风险价值）是金融领域广泛使用的风险指标。然而，动态优化 CVaR 是很困难的，因为它不是标准的马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，而且动态规划的原理失效了。在本文中，我们从基于灵敏度的优化角度研究了具有长期 CVaR 准则的无限范围离散时间 MDP。通过引入伪 CVaR 指标，我们推导出了 CVaR 差异公式，该公式量化了任意两种策略下长期 CVaR 的差异。推导出确定性策略的最优性。我们得到了 CVaR 的所谓 Bellman 局部最优方程，它是局部最优策略的充分必要条件，并且仅是全局最优策略所必需的。为了提供更多的敏感性信息，还推导了CVaR导数公式。然后我们开发了一种策略迭代型算法来有效地优化 CVaR，该算法被证明可以在混合策略空间中收敛到局部最优。我们进一步讨论一些扩展，包括平均 CVaR 优化和 CVaR 最大化。最后，我们进行了与投资组合管理相关的数值实验来证明主要结果。我们的工作可能有助于从灵敏度的角度动态优化 CVaR。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在长期内使用CVaR准则的无限时间离散时间马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）的动态优化问题。
AI.motivation: CVaR作为金融领域的风险度量指标，其动态优化因不符合标准MDP框架且无法应用动态规划原理而面临挑战。
AI.method: 通过引入伪CVaR度量，推导CVaR差分公式与Bellman局部最优方程，并开发基于策略迭代的算法以优化CVaR。
AI.result: 证明了确定性策略的最优性，建立了CVaR局部最优条件，并通过数值实验验证了算法在投资组合管理中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作从敏感性视角为动态CVaR优化提供了理论框架与算法支持，拓展了风险敏感MDP的研究方向。

search_text: Risk-Sensitive Markov Decision Processes with Long-Run CVaR Criterion 具有长期 CVaR 准则的风险敏感马尔可夫决策过程 CVaR (Conditional Value at Risk) is a risk metric widely used in finance. However, dynamically optimizing CVaR is difficult since it is not a standard Markov decision process (MDP) and the principle of dynamic programming fails. In this paper, we study the infinite-horizon discrete-time MDP with a long-run CVaR criterion, from the view of sensitivity-based optimization. By introducing a pseudo CVaR metric, we derive a CVaR difference formula which quantifies the difference of long-run CVaR under any two policies. The optimality of deterministic policies is derived. We obtain a so-called Bellman local optimality equation for CVaR, which is a necessary and sufficient condition for local optimal policies and only necessary for global optimal policies. A CVaR derivative formula is also derived for providing more sensitivity information. Then we develop a policy iteration type algorithm to efficiently optimize CVaR, which is shown to converge to local optima in the mixed policy space. We further discuss some extensions including the mean-CVaR optimization and the maximization of CVaR. Finally, we conduct numerical experiments relating to portfolio management to demonstrate the main results. Our work may shed light on dynamically optimizing CVaR from a sensitivity viewpoint. authors_text: Chenqi Li,Yuan Ren,Bingbing Liu
title: PCGen: Point Cloud Generator for LiDAR Simulation
title_zh: PCGen：用于 LiDAR 仿真的点云生成器
abstract: Data is a fundamental building block for LiDAR perception systems. Unfortunately, real-world data collection and annotation is extremely costly & laborious. Recently, real data based LiDAR simulators have shown tremendous potential to complement real data, due to their scalability and high-fidelity compared to graphics engine based methods. Before simulation can be deployed in the real-world, two shortcomings need to be addressed. First, existing methods usually generate data which are more noisy and complete than the real point clouds, due to 3D reconstruction error and pure geometry-based raycasting method. Second, prior works on simulation for object detection focus solely on rigid objects, like cars, but VRUs, like pedestrians, are important road participants. To tackle the first challenge, we propose FPA raycasting and surrogate model raydrop. FPA enables the simulation of both point cloud coordinates and sensor features, while taking into account reconstruction noise. The ray-wise surrogate raydrop model mimics the physical properties of LiDAR's laser receiver to determine whether a simulated point would be recorded by a real LiDAR. With minimal training data, the surrogate model can generalize to different geographies and scenes, closing the domain gap between raycasted and real point clouds. To tackle the simulation of deformable VRU simulation, we employ SMPL dataset to provide a pedestrian simulation baseline and compare the domain gap between CAD and reconstructed objects. Applying our pipeline to perform novel sensor synthesis, results show that object detection models trained by simulation data can achieve similar result as the real data trained model.
summary: Data is a fundamental building block for LiDAR perception systems. Unfortunately, real-world data collection and annotation is extremely costly & laborious. Recently, real data based LiDAR simulators have shown tremendous potential to complement real data, due to their scalability and high-fidelity compared to graphics engine based methods. Before simulation can be deployed in the real-world, two shortcomings need to be addressed. First, existing methods usually generate data which are more noisy and complete than the real point clouds, due to 3D reconstruction error and pure geometry-based raycasting method. Second, prior works on simulation for object detection focus solely on rigid objects, like cars, but VRUs, like pedestrians, are important road participants. To tackle the first challenge, we propose FPA raycasting and surrogate model raydrop. FPA enables the simulation of both point cloud coordinates and sensor features, while taking into account reconstruction noise. The ray-wise surrogate raydrop model mimics the physical properties of LiDAR's laser receiver to determine whether a simulated point would be recorded by a real LiDAR. With minimal training data, the surrogate model can generalize to different geographies and scenes, closing the domain gap between raycasted and real point clouds. To tackle the simulation of deformable VRU simulation, we employ SMPL dataset to provide a pedestrian simulation baseline and compare the domain gap between CAD and reconstructed objects. Applying our pipeline to perform novel sensor synthesis, results show that object detection models trained by simulation data can achieve similar result as the real data trained model.
abstract_zh: 数据是激光雷达感知系统的基本构建模块。不幸的是，现实世界的数据收集和注释极其昂贵且费力。最近，基于真实数据的激光雷达模拟器显示出补充真实数据的巨大潜力，因为与基于图形引擎的方法相比，它们具有可扩展性和高保真度。在将模拟部署到现实世界之前，需要解决两个缺点。首先，由于 3D 重建误差和纯基于几何的光线投射方法，现有方法通常生成比真实点云更嘈杂、更完整的数据。其次，先前的物体检测模拟工作仅关注刚性物体（例如汽车），但 VRU（例如行人）是重要的道路参与者。为了解决第一个挑战，我们提出了 FPA 射线投射和代理模型射线滴。 FPA 能够模拟点云坐标和传感器特征，同时考虑重建噪声。逐射线替代射线滴模型模仿 LiDAR 激光接收器的物理特性，以确定真实 LiDAR 是否会记录模拟点。使用最少的训练数据，代理模型可以推广到不同的地理位置和场景，缩小光线投射和真实点云之间的域差距。为了解决可变形 VRU 模拟的问题，我们使用 SMPL 数据集提供行人模拟基线并比较 CAD 和重建对象之间的域差距。应用我们的流程来执行新颖的传感器合成，结果表明，通过模拟数据训练的对象检测模型可以达到与真实数据训练模型相似的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PCGen点云生成器，解决LiDAR模拟中的数据噪声问题和可变形VRU（如行人）的模拟问题。
AI.motivation: 真实LiDAR数据采集成本高，现有模拟方法生成的数据存在噪声过多、完整性过高，且缺乏对可变形VRU的有效模拟。
AI.method: 提出FPA光栅化方法模拟点云坐标和传感器特征，并结合物理特性建模的raydrop模型减少噪声；使用SMPL数据集构建行人模拟基准，对比CAD与重建物体的领域差异。
AI.result: 使用模拟数据训练的物体检测模型性能接近真实数据训练模型，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PCGen通过噪声建模和VRU模拟改进，显著缩小了仿真与真实LiDAR数据的差距，为自动驾驶感知系统提供高质量模拟数据支持。

search_text: PCGen: Point Cloud Generator for LiDAR Simulation PCGen：用于 LiDAR 仿真的点云生成器 Data is a fundamental building block for LiDAR perception systems. Unfortunately, real-world data collection and annotation is extremely costly & laborious. Recently, real data based LiDAR simulators have shown tremendous potential to complement real data, due to their scalability and high-fidelity compared to graphics engine based methods. Before simulation can be deployed in the real-world, two shortcomings need to be addressed. First, existing methods usually generate data which are more noisy and complete than the real point clouds, due to 3D reconstruction error and pure geometry-based raycasting method. Second, prior works on simulation for object detection focus solely on rigid objects, like cars, but VRUs, like pedestrians, are important road participants. To tackle the first challenge, we propose FPA raycasting and surrogate model raydrop. FPA enables the simulation of both point cloud coordinates and sensor features, while taking into account reconstruction noise. The ray-wise surrogate raydrop model mimics the physical properties of LiDAR's laser receiver to determine whether a simulated point would be recorded by a real LiDAR. With minimal training data, the surrogate model can generalize to different geographies and scenes, closing the domain gap between raycasted and real point clouds. To tackle the simulation of deformable VRU simulation, we employ SMPL dataset to provide a pedestrian simulation baseline and compare the domain gap between CAD and reconstructed objects. Applying our pipeline to perform novel sensor synthesis, results show that object detection models trained by simulation data can achieve similar result as the real data trained model. 数据是激光雷达感知系统的基本构建模块。不幸的是，现实世界的数据收集和注释极其昂贵且费力。最近，基于真实数据的激光雷达模拟器显示出补充真实数据的巨大潜力，因为与基于图形引擎的方法相比，它们具有可扩展性和高保真度。在将模拟部署到现实世界之前，需要解决两个缺点。首先，由于 3D 重建误差和纯基于几何的光线投射方法，现有方法通常生成比真实点云更嘈杂、更完整的数据。其次，先前的物体检测模拟工作仅关注刚性物体（例如汽车），但 VRU（例如行人）是重要的道路参与者。为了解决第一个挑战，我们提出了 FPA 射线投射和代理模型射线滴。 FPA 能够模拟点云坐标和传感器特征，同时考虑重建噪声。逐射线替代射线滴模型模仿 LiDAR 激光接收器的物理特性，以确定真实 LiDAR 是否会记录模拟点。使用最少的训练数据，代理模型可以推广到不同的地理位置和场景，缩小光线投射和真实点云之间的域差距。为了解决可变形 VRU 模拟的问题，我们使用 SMPL 数据集提供行人模拟基线并比较 CAD 和重建对象之间的域差距。应用我们的流程来执行新颖的传感器合成，结果表明，通过模拟数据训练的对象检测模型可以达到与真实数据训练模型相似的结果。 本文提出PCGen点云生成器，解决LiDAR模拟中的数据噪声问题和可变形VRU（如行人）的模拟问题。 Chenqi Li,Yuan Ren,Bingbing Liu cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Anyi Rao,Xuekun Jiang,Sichen Wang,Yuwei Guo,Zihao Liu,Bo Dai,Long Pang,Xiaoyu Wu,Dahua Lin,Libiao Jin
title: Temporal and Contextual Transformer for Multi-Camera Editing of TV Shows
title_zh: 用于电视节目多机位编辑的时间和上下文转换器
comment: Extended Abstract of ECCV 2022 Workshop on AI for Creative Video Editing and Understanding
comments: Extended Abstract of ECCV 2022 Workshop on AI for Creative Video Editing and Understanding
abstract: The ability to choose an appropriate camera view among multiple cameras plays a vital role in TV shows delivery. But it is hard to figure out the statistical pattern and apply intelligent processing due to the lack of high-quality training data. To solve this issue, we first collect a novel benchmark on this setting with four diverse scenarios including concerts, sports games, gala shows, and contests, where each scenario contains 6 synchronized tracks recorded by different cameras. It contains 88-hour raw videos that contribute to the 14-hour edited videos. Based on this benchmark, we further propose a new approach temporal and contextual transformer that utilizes clues from historical shots and other views to make shot transition decisions and predict which view to be used. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing methods on the proposed multi-camera editing benchmark.
summary: The ability to choose an appropriate camera view among multiple cameras plays a vital role in TV shows delivery. But it is hard to figure out the statistical pattern and apply intelligent processing due to the lack of high-quality training data. To solve this issue, we first collect a novel benchmark on this setting with four diverse scenarios including concerts, sports games, gala shows, and contests, where each scenario contains 6 synchronized tracks recorded by different cameras. It contains 88-hour raw videos that contribute to the 14-hour edited videos. Based on this benchmark, we further propose a new approach temporal and contextual transformer that utilizes clues from historical shots and other views to make shot transition decisions and predict which view to be used. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing methods on the proposed multi-camera editing benchmark.
abstract_zh: 在多个摄像机中选择合适的摄像机视图的能力在电视节目交付中起着至关重要的作用。但由于缺乏高质量的训练数据，很难找出统计模式并进行智能处理。为了解决这个问题，我们首先收集了一个新的基准，包括音乐会、体育比赛、晚会和比赛等四种不同的场景，每个场景包含由不同摄像机录制的 6 个同步曲目。它包含 88 小时的原始视频，这些视频构成了 14 小时的编辑视频。基于这个基准，我们进一步提出了一种新的时间和上下文转换器方法，它利用历史镜头和其他视图的线索来做出镜头转换决策并预测要使用哪个视图。大量实验表明，我们的方法在所提出的多摄像机编辑基准上优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间和上下文信息的Transformer模型，用于解决多摄像头电视节目编辑中镜头选择的难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因缺乏高质量训练数据，难以从多摄像头视频中学习统计规律并实现智能编辑。
AI.method: 构建包含四个场景的多摄像头基准数据集，并设计Temporal and Contextual Transformer模型，通过融合历史镜头信息与其他视角线索进行镜头切换决策。
AI.result: 在提出的多摄像头编辑基准测试中，该方法性能优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了多摄像头电视节目智能编辑效果，且基准数据集为后续研究提供了支持。

authors_text: Xiaolong Huang,Qiankun Li
title: 2nd Place Solution to Google Universal Image Embedding
title_zh: Google 通用图像嵌入解决方案第二名
comment: 3 pages, 1 figures, Instance-Level Recognition Workshop at ECCV 2022, Google Universal Image Embedding, 2nd place solution
comments: 3 pages, 1 figures, Instance-Level Recognition Workshop at ECCV 2022, Google Universal Image Embedding, 2nd place solution
abstract: Image representations are a critical building block of computer vision applications. This paper presents the 2nd place solution to the Google Universal Image Embedding Competition, which is part of the ECCV2022 instance-level recognition workshops. We use the instance-level fine-grained image classification method to complete this competition. We focus on data building and processing, model structure, and training strategies. Finally, the solution scored 0.713 on the public leaderboard and 0.709 on the private leaderboard.
summary: Image representations are a critical building block of computer vision applications. This paper presents the 2nd place solution to the Google Universal Image Embedding Competition, which is part of the ECCV2022 instance-level recognition workshops. We use the instance-level fine-grained image classification method to complete this competition. We focus on data building and processing, model structure, and training strategies. Finally, the solution scored 0.713 on the public leaderboard and 0.709 on the private leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 图像表示是计算机视觉应用的关键构建块。本文介绍了 Google 通用图像嵌入竞赛第二名的解决方案，该竞赛是 ECCV2022 实例级识别研讨会的一部分。我们使用实例级细粒度图像分类方法来完成本次比赛。我们专注于数据构建和处理、模型结构和训练策略。最终，该解决方案在公共排行榜上得分为 0.713，在私人排行榜上得分为 0.709。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是解决谷歌通用图像嵌入竞赛，采用实例级细粒度图像分类方法以提升图像表示效果。
AI.motivation: 图像表示是计算机视觉应用的核心，需通过优化模型结构与训练策略提升嵌入质量以满足竞赛需求。
AI.method: 采用实例级细粒度图像分类方法，重点优化数据构建与处理流程，设计高效模型结构并采用先进的训练策略。
AI.result: 在公共测试集得分为0.713，私有测试集得分为0.709，位列竞赛第二名。
AI.conclusion: 该方案验证了细粒度分类方法在图像嵌入任务中的有效性，但仍有优化空间以进一步提升性能。

authors_text: Raniere Silva,Khizar Hayat,Christopher M Riggs,Michael Doube
title: How many radiographs are needed to re-train a deep learning system for object detection?
title_zh: 重新训练用于物体检测的深度学习系统需要多少张射线照片？
abstract: Background: Object detection in radiograph computer vision has largely benefited from progress in deep convolutional neural networks and can, for example, annotate a radiograph with a box around a knee joint or intervertebral disc. Is deep learning capable of detect small (less than 1% of the image) in radiographs? And how many radiographs do we need use when re-training a deep learning model? Methods: We annotated 396 radiographs of left and right carpi dorsal 75 medial to palmarolateral oblique (DMPLO) projection with the location of radius, proximal row of carpal bones, distal row of carpal bones, accessory carpal bone, first carpal bone (if present), and metacarpus (metacarpal II, III, and IV). The radiographs and respective annotations were splited into sets that were used to leave-one-out cross-validation of models created using transfer learn from YOLOv5s. Results: Models trained using 96 radiographs or more achieved precision, recall and mAP above 0.95, including for the first carpal bone, when trained for 32 epochs. The best model needed the double of epochs to learn to detect the first carpal bone compared with the other bones. Conclusions: Free and open source state of the art object detection models based on deep learning can be re-trained for radiograph computer vision applications with 100 radiographs and achieved precision, recall and mAP above 0.95.
summary: Background: Object detection in radiograph computer vision has largely benefited from progress in deep convolutional neural networks and can, for example, annotate a radiograph with a box around a knee joint or intervertebral disc. Is deep learning capable of detect small (less than 1% of the image) in radiographs? And how many radiographs do we need use when re-training a deep learning model? Methods: We annotated 396 radiographs of left and right carpi dorsal 75 medial to palmarolateral oblique (DMPLO) projection with the location of radius, proximal row of carpal bones, distal row of carpal bones, accessory carpal bone, first carpal bone (if present), and metacarpus (metacarpal II, III, and IV). The radiographs and respective annotations were splited into sets that were used to leave-one-out cross-validation of models created using transfer learn from YOLOv5s. Results: Models trained using 96 radiographs or more achieved precision, recall and mAP above 0.95, including for the first carpal bone, when trained for 32 epochs. The best model needed the double of epochs to learn to detect the first carpal bone compared with the other bones. Conclusions: Free and open source state of the art object detection models based on deep learning can be re-trained for radiograph computer vision applications with 100 radiographs and achieved precision, recall and mAP above 0.95.
abstract_zh: 背景：射线照片计算机视觉中的对象检测很大程度上受益于深度卷积神经网络的进步，例如，可以用膝关节或椎间盘周围的框来注释射线照片。深度学习能够检测射线照片中的小物体（小于图像的 1%）吗？当重新训练深度学习模型时，我们需要使用多少张射线照片？方法：我们对 396 张左右腕背 75 内侧至掌外侧斜位 (DMPLO) 投影的 X 光片进行了注释，其中包括桡骨、腕骨近排、腕骨远端排、副腕骨、第一腕骨（如果存在）和掌骨（掌骨 II、III 和 IV）的位置。 X 线照片和相应的注释被分成几组，用于对使用 YOLOv5 的迁移学习创建的模型进行留一交叉验证。结果：使用 96 张或更多 X 线照片训练的模型在训练 32 个 epoch 时，达到了 0.95 以上的精确度、召回率和 mAP，包括第一腕骨。最好的模型需要双倍的时间来学习检测第一块腕骨与其他骨头的比较。结论：基于深度学习的免费开源最先进的目标检测模型可以针对具有 100 张射线照片的射线照相计算机视觉应用进行重新训练，并实现高于 0.95 的精度、召回率和 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了重新训练深度学习模型进行放射影像目标检测所需最少放射影像数量。
AI.motivation: 探讨深度学习是否能检测放射影像中极小目标（小于图像1%），并确定重新训练模型所需的最小数据量。
AI.method: 对396张腕关节放射影像进行标注，使用YOLOv5s进行迁移学习，并通过留一法交叉验证评估模型性能。
AI.result: 使用96张及以上影像训练的模型在32个epoch后达到精度、召回率和mAP均高于0.95，其中第一腕骨检测所需epoch为其他骨骼的两倍。
AI.conclusion: 基于开源的深度学习目标检测模型可通过100张放射影像实现高精度（精度、召回率、mAP>0.95）的重新训练。

search_text: How many radiographs are needed to re-train a deep learning system for object detection? 重新训练用于物体检测的深度学习系统需要多少张射线照片？ Background: Object detection in radiograph computer vision has largely benefited from progress in deep convolutional neural networks and can, for example, annotate a radiograph with a box around a knee joint or intervertebral disc. Is deep learning capable of detect small (less than 1% of the image) in radiographs? And how many radiographs do we need use when re-training a deep learning model? Methods: We annotated 396 radiographs of left and right carpi dorsal 75 medial to palmarolateral oblique (DMPLO) projection with the location of radius, proximal row of carpal bones, distal row of carpal bones, accessory carpal bone, first carpal bone (if present), and metacarpus (metacarpal II, III, and IV). The radiographs and respective annotations were splited into sets that were used to leave-one-out cross-validation of models created using transfer learn from YOLOv5s. Results: Models trained using 96 radiographs or more achieved precision, recall and mAP above 0.95, including for the first carpal bone, when trained for 32 epochs. The best model needed the double of epochs to learn to detect the first carpal bone compared with the other bones. Conclusions: Free and open source state of the art object detection models based on deep learning can be re-trained for radiograph computer vision applications with 100 radiographs and achieved precision, recall and mAP above 0.95. 背景：射线照片计算机视觉中的对象检测很大程度上受益于深度卷积神经网络的进步，例如，可以用膝关节或椎间盘周围的框来注释射线照片。深度学习能够检测射线照片中的小物体（小于图像的 1%）吗？当重新训练深度学习模型时，我们需要使用多少张射线照片？方法：我们对 396 张左右腕背 75 内侧至掌外侧斜位 (DMPLO) 投影的 X 光片进行了注释，其中包括桡骨、腕骨近排、腕骨远端排、副腕骨、第一腕骨（如果存在）和掌骨（掌骨 II、III 和 IV）的位置。 X 线照片和相应的注释被分成几组，用于对使用 YOLOv5 的迁移学习创建的模型进行留一交叉验证。结果：使用 96 张或更多 X 线照片训练的模型在训练 32 个 epoch 时，达到了 0.95 以上的精确度、召回率和 mAP，包括第一腕骨。最好的模型需要双倍的时间来学习检测第一块腕骨与其他骨头的比较。结论：基于深度学习的免费开源最先进的目标检测模型可以针对具有 100 张射线照片的射线照相计算机视觉应用进行重新训练，并实现高于 0.95 的精度、召回率和 mAP。 本文研究了重新训练深度学习模型进行放射影像目标检测所需最少放射影像数量。 Raniere Silva,Khizar Hayat,Christopher M Riggs,Michael Doube eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Mancheng Meng,Ziyan Wu,Terrence Chen,Xiran Cai,Xiang Sean Zhou,Fan Yang,Dinggang Shen
title: Forecasting Human Trajectory from Scene History
title_zh: 从场景历史预测人类轨迹
comment: Accept in the Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
comments: Accept in the Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022
abstract: Predicting the future trajectory of a person remains a challenging problem, due to randomness and subjectivity of human movement. However, the moving patterns of human in a constrained scenario typically conform to a limited number of regularities to a certain extent, because of the scenario restrictions and person-person or person-object interactivity. Thus, an individual person in this scenario should follow one of the regularities as well. In other words, a person's subsequent trajectory has likely been traveled by others. Based on this hypothesis, we propose to forecast a person's future trajectory by learning from the implicit scene regularities. We call the regularities, inherently derived from the past dynamics of the people and the environment in the scene, scene history. We categorize scene history information into two types: historical group trajectory and individual-surroundings interaction. To exploit these two types of information for trajectory prediction, we propose a novel framework Scene History Excavating Network (SHENet), where the scene history is leveraged in a simple yet effective approach. In particular, we design two components: the group trajectory bank module to extract representative group trajectories as the candidate for future path, and the cross-modal interaction module to model the interaction between individual past trajectory and its surroundings for trajectory refinement. In addition, to mitigate the uncertainty in ground-truth trajectory, caused by the aforementioned randomness and subjectivity of human movement, we propose to include smoothness into the training process and evaluation metrics. We conduct extensive evaluations to validate the efficacy of our proposed framework on ETH, UCY, as well as a new, challenging benchmark dataset PAV, demonstrating superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Predicting the future trajectory of a person remains a challenging problem, due to randomness and subjectivity of human movement. However, the moving patterns of human in a constrained scenario typically conform to a limited number of regularities to a certain extent, because of the scenario restrictions and person-person or person-object interactivity. Thus, an individual person in this scenario should follow one of the regularities as well. In other words, a person's subsequent trajectory has likely been traveled by others. Based on this hypothesis, we propose to forecast a person's future trajectory by learning from the implicit scene regularities. We call the regularities, inherently derived from the past dynamics of the people and the environment in the scene, scene history. We categorize scene history information into two types: historical group trajectory and individual-surroundings interaction. To exploit these two types of information for trajectory prediction, we propose a novel framework Scene History Excavating Network (SHENet), where the scene history is leveraged in a simple yet effective approach. In particular, we design two components: the group trajectory bank module to extract representative group trajectories as the candidate for future path, and the cross-modal interaction module to model the interaction between individual past trajectory and its surroundings for trajectory refinement. In addition, to mitigate the uncertainty in ground-truth trajectory, caused by the aforementioned randomness and subjectivity of human movement, we propose to include smoothness into the training process and evaluation metrics. We conduct extensive evaluations to validate the efficacy of our proposed framework on ETH, UCY, as well as a new, challenging benchmark dataset PAV, demonstrating superior performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于人类运动的随机性和主观性，预测一个人的未来轨迹仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。然而，由于场景的限制以及人与人或人与物体的交互性，在受限场景中人类的运动模式通常在一定程度上符合有限的规律。因此，在这种情况下，个人也应该遵循其中一个规律。换句话说，一个人后来的轨迹很可能已经被别人走过了。基于这个假设，我们建议通过学习隐含的场景规律来预测一个人的未来轨迹。我们将场景中人和环境的过去动态所固有的规律性称为场景历史。我们将场景历史信息分为两类：历史群体轨迹和个体与环境的交互。为了利用这两种类型的信息进行轨迹预测，我们提出了一种新颖的框架场景历史挖掘网络（SHENet），其中以简单而有效的方法利用场景历史。特别是，我们设计了两个组件：群体轨迹库模块，用于提取代表性群体轨迹作为未来路径的候选；跨模态交互模块，用于对个体过去轨迹与其周围环境之间的交互进行建模，以进行轨迹细化。此外，为了减轻由上述人体运动的随机性和主观性引起的地面真实轨迹的不确定性，我们建议将平滑度纳入训练过程和评估指标中。我们进行了广泛的评估，以验证我们提出的框架在 ETH、UCY 以及新的、具有挑战性的基准数据集 PAV 上的有效性，与最先进的方法相比，展示了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过学习场景历史中的隐含规律来预测人类未来轨迹。
AI.motivation: 人类在受限场景中的移动模式通常遵循一定规律，利用场景历史信息可提升轨迹预测准确性。
AI.method: 设计SHENet框架，包含群体轨迹库模块和跨模态交互模块，结合场景历史信息与平滑性约束进行预测。
AI.result: 在ETH、UCY和PAV数据集上优于现有方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 场景历史信息能有效提升轨迹预测性能，未来可进一步探索复杂交互建模。

authors_text: Lin Ma,Longrui Chen,Yan Zhang,Mengdi Chu,Wenjie Jiang,Jiahao Shen,Chuxuan Li,Yifeng Shi,Nairui Luo,Jirui Yuan,Guyue Zhou,Jiangtao Gong
title: Evaluation of Pedestrian Safety in a High-Fidelity Simulation Environment Framework
title_zh: 高保真模拟环境框架中的行人安全评估
comment: Resubmit to ITSC 2024; Accept by ITSC 2024
comments: Resubmit to ITSC 2024; Accept by ITSC 2024
abstract: Pedestrians' safety is a crucial factor in assessing autonomous driving scenarios. However, pedestrian safety evaluation is rarely considered by existing autonomous driving simulation platforms. This paper proposes a pedestrian safety evaluation method for autonomous driving, in which not only the collision events but also the conflict events together with the characteristics of pedestrians are fully considered. Moreover, to apply the pedestrian safety evaluation system, we construct a high-fidelity simulation framework embedded with pedestrian safety-critical characteristics. We demonstrate our simulation framework and pedestrian safety evaluation with a comparative experiment with two kinds of autonomous driving perception algorithms -- single-vehicle perception and vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) cooperative perception. The results show that our framework can evaluate different autonomous driving algorithms with detailed and quantitative pedestrian safety indexes. To this end, the proposed simulation method and framework can be used to access different autonomous driving algorithms and evaluate pedestrians' safety performance in future autonomous driving simulations, which can inspire more pedestrian-friendly autonomous driving algorithms.
summary: Pedestrians' safety is a crucial factor in assessing autonomous driving scenarios. However, pedestrian safety evaluation is rarely considered by existing autonomous driving simulation platforms. This paper proposes a pedestrian safety evaluation method for autonomous driving, in which not only the collision events but also the conflict events together with the characteristics of pedestrians are fully considered. Moreover, to apply the pedestrian safety evaluation system, we construct a high-fidelity simulation framework embedded with pedestrian safety-critical characteristics. We demonstrate our simulation framework and pedestrian safety evaluation with a comparative experiment with two kinds of autonomous driving perception algorithms -- single-vehicle perception and vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) cooperative perception. The results show that our framework can evaluate different autonomous driving algorithms with detailed and quantitative pedestrian safety indexes. To this end, the proposed simulation method and framework can be used to access different autonomous driving algorithms and evaluate pedestrians' safety performance in future autonomous driving simulations, which can inspire more pedestrian-friendly autonomous driving algorithms.
abstract_zh: 行人安全是评估自动驾驶场景的关键因素。然而，现有的自动驾驶仿真平台很少考虑行人安全评估。本文提出了一种自动驾驶行人安全评估方法，该方法不仅充分考虑碰撞事件，还充分考虑冲突事件以及行人的特征。此外，为了应用行人安全评估系统，我们构建了一个嵌入行人安全关键特征的高保真模拟框架。我们通过两种自动驾驶感知算法（单车感知和车对基础设施（V2I）协作感知）的比较实验来展示我们的仿真框架和行人安全评估。结果表明，我们的框架可以通过详细且定量的行人安全指标来评估不同的自动驾驶算法。为此，所提出的仿真方法和框架可用于访问不同的自动驾驶算法并在未来的自动驾驶模拟中评估行人的安全性能，这可以激发更多对行人友好的自动驾驶算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高保真模拟环境的行人安全评估方法与框架，用于自动驾驶场景中对行人安全的量化分析。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶模拟平台缺乏对行人安全的系统性评估，尤其忽视了非碰撞冲突事件与行人特征的综合考量。
AI.method: 构建集成行人安全关键特征的高保真模拟框架，设计包含碰撞与冲突事件的评估指标，并通过单车辆感知与V2I协同感知算法对比实验验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明框架可生成详细定量的行人安全指标，有效区分不同自动驾驶感知算法的安全性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自动驾驶算法的行人安全评估提供工具支持，可推动更注重行人保护的自动驾驶技术发展。
