search_text: Evaluation of Pedestrian Safety in a High-Fidelity Simulation Environment Framework 高保真模拟环境框架中的行人安全评估 Pedestrians' safety is a crucial factor in assessing autonomous driving scenarios. However, pedestrian safety evaluation is rarely considered by existing autonomous driving simulation platforms. This paper proposes a pedestrian safety evaluation method for autonomous driving, in which not only the collision events but also the conflict events together with the characteristics of pedestrians are fully considered. Moreover, to apply the pedestrian safety evaluation system, we construct a high-fidelity simulation framework embedded with pedestrian safety-critical characteristics. We demonstrate our simulation framework and pedestrian safety evaluation with a comparative experiment with two kinds of autonomous driving perception algorithms -- single-vehicle perception and vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) cooperative perception. The results show that our framework can evaluate different autonomous driving algorithms with detailed and quantitative pedestrian safety indexes. To this end, the proposed simulation method and framework can be used to access different autonomous driving algorithms and evaluate pedestrians' safety performance in future autonomous driving simulations, which can inspire more pedestrian-friendly autonomous driving algorithms. 行人安全是评估自动驾驶场景的关键因素。然而，现有的自动驾驶仿真平台很少考虑行人安全评估。本文提出了一种自动驾驶行人安全评估方法，该方法不仅充分考虑碰撞事件，还充分考虑冲突事件以及行人的特征。此外，为了应用行人安全评估系统，我们构建了一个嵌入行人安全关键特征的高保真模拟框架。我们通过两种自动驾驶感知算法（单车感知和车对基础设施（V2I）协作感知）的比较实验来展示我们的仿真框架和行人安全评估。结果表明，我们的框架可以通过详细且定量的行人安全指标来评估不同的自动驾驶算法。为此，所提出的仿真方法和框架可用于访问不同的自动驾驶算法并在未来的自动驾驶模拟中评估行人的安全性能，这可以激发更多对行人友好的自动驾驶算法。 本文提出一种基于高保真模拟环境的行人安全评估方法与框架，用于自动驾驶场景中对行人安全的量化分析。 Lin Ma,Longrui Chen,Yan Zhang,Mengdi Chu,Wenjie Jiang,Jiahao Shen,Chuxuan Li,Yifeng Shi,Nairui Luo,Jirui Yuan,Guyue Zhou,Jiangtao Gong cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Sankeerth Durvasula,Raymond Kiguru,Samarth Mathur,Jenny Xu,Jimmy Lin,Nandita Vijaykumar
title: VoxelCache: Accelerating Online Mapping in Robotics and 3D Reconstruction Tasks
title_zh: VoxelCache：加速机器人和 3D 重建任务中的在线绘图
abstract: Real-time 3D mapping is a critical component in many important applications today including robotics, AR/VR, and 3D visualization. 3D mapping involves continuously fusing depth maps obtained from depth sensors in phones, robots, and autonomous vehicles into a single 3D representative model of the scene. Many important applications, e.g., global path planning and trajectory generation in micro aerial vehicles, require the construction of large maps at high resolutions. In this work, we identify mapping, i.e., construction and updates of 3D maps to be a critical bottleneck in these applications. The memory required and access times of these maps limit the size of the environment and the resolution with which the environment can be feasibly mapped, especially in resource constrained environments such as autonomous robot platforms and portable devices. To address this challenge, we propose VoxelCache: a hardware-software technique to accelerate map data access times in 3D mapping applications. We observe that mapping applications typically access voxels in the map that are spatially co-located to each other. We leverage this temporal locality in voxel accesses to cache indices to blocks of voxels to enable quick lookup and avoid expensive access times. We evaluate VoxelCache on popularly used mapping and reconstruction applications on both GPUs and CPUs. We demonstrate an average speedup of 1.47X (up to 1.66X) and 1.79X (up to 1.91X) on CPUs and GPUs respectively.
summary: Real-time 3D mapping is a critical component in many important applications today including robotics, AR/VR, and 3D visualization. 3D mapping involves continuously fusing depth maps obtained from depth sensors in phones, robots, and autonomous vehicles into a single 3D representative model of the scene. Many important applications, e.g., global path planning and trajectory generation in micro aerial vehicles, require the construction of large maps at high resolutions. In this work, we identify mapping, i.e., construction and updates of 3D maps to be a critical bottleneck in these applications. The memory required and access times of these maps limit the size of the environment and the resolution with which the environment can be feasibly mapped, especially in resource constrained environments such as autonomous robot platforms and portable devices. To address this challenge, we propose VoxelCache: a hardware-software technique to accelerate map data access times in 3D mapping applications. We observe that mapping applications typically access voxels in the map that are spatially co-located to each other. We leverage this temporal locality in voxel accesses to cache indices to blocks of voxels to enable quick lookup and avoid expensive access times. We evaluate VoxelCache on popularly used mapping and reconstruction applications on both GPUs and CPUs. We demonstrate an average speedup of 1.47X (up to 1.66X) and 1.79X (up to 1.91X) on CPUs and GPUs respectively.
abstract_zh: 实时 3D 地图是当今许多重要应用的关键组成部分，包括机器人、AR/VR 和 3D 可视化。 3D 映射涉及不断将从手机、机器人和自动驾驶车辆中的深度传感器获得的深度图融合到场景的单个 3D 代表性模型中。许多重要的应用，例如微型飞行器中的全局路径规划和轨迹生成，需要构建高分辨率的大地图。在这项工作中，我们发现映射（即 3D 地图的构建和更新）是这些应用程序中的关键瓶颈。这些地图所需的内存和访问时间限制了环境的大小以及可行地映射环境的分辨率，特别是在资源受限的环境中，例如自主机器人平台和便携式设备。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 VoxelCache：一种硬件-软件技术，可加速 3D 地图应用中的地图数据访问时间。我们观察到，地图应用程序通常访问地图中在空间上彼此位于同一位置的体素。我们利用体素访问中的这种时间局部性来缓存体素块的索引，以实现快速查找并避免昂贵的访问时间。我们在 GPU 和 CPU 上常用的映射和重建应用程序上评估 VoxelCache。我们展示了 CPU 和 GPU 上的平均加速分别为 1.47 倍（高达 1.66 倍）和 1.79 倍（高达 1.91 倍）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VoxelCache技术，通过硬件-软件协同优化加速机器人和3D重建任务中的实时在线地图构建。
AI.motivation: 实时3D地图构建在机器人、AR/VR等应用中面临内存占用高和访问延迟大的瓶颈，尤其在资源受限设备上难以实现高分辨率大场景建模。
AI.method: 基于时空局部性原理，设计 voxel 索引缓存机制，通过预测并缓存相邻空间块的 voxel 数据，减少对主存的频繁访问。
AI.result: 在CPU和GPU平台上分别实现1.47-1.66倍和1.79-1.91倍的平均加速，显著提升地图更新效率。
AI.conclusion: VoxelCache通过有效利用 voxel 访问的时空局部性，为资源受限场景下的实时3D建图提供了高效且普适的解决方案。

authors_text: Luyao Wang,Qihe Chen,Yan Zhang,Ziang Li,Tingmin Yan,Fan Wang,Guyue Zhou,Jiangtao Gong
title: Can Quadruped Navigation Robots be Used as Guide Dogs?
title_zh: 四足导航机器人可以当导盲犬吗？
abstract: Quadruped robots have the potential to guide blind and low vision (BLV) people due to their highly flexible locomotion and emotional value provided by their bionic forms. However, the development of quadruped guide robots rarely involves BLV users' participatory designs and evaluations. In this paper, we conducted two empirical experiments both in indoor controlled and outdoor field scenarios, exploring the benefits and drawbacks of quadruped guide robots. The results show that the nowadays commercial quadruped robots exposed significant disadvantages in usability and trust compared with wheeled robots. It is concluded that the moving gait and walking noise of quadruped robots would limit the guiding effectiveness to a certain extent, and the empathetic effect of its bionic form for BLV users could not be fully reflected. Based on the findings of wheeled robots and quadruped robots' advantages, we discuss the design implications for the future guide robot design for BLV users. This paper reports the first empirical experiment about quadruped guide robots with BLV users and preliminary explores their potential improvement space in substituting guide dogs, which can inspire the further specialized design of quadruped guide robots.
summary: Quadruped robots have the potential to guide blind and low vision (BLV) people due to their highly flexible locomotion and emotional value provided by their bionic forms. However, the development of quadruped guide robots rarely involves BLV users' participatory designs and evaluations. In this paper, we conducted two empirical experiments both in indoor controlled and outdoor field scenarios, exploring the benefits and drawbacks of quadruped guide robots. The results show that the nowadays commercial quadruped robots exposed significant disadvantages in usability and trust compared with wheeled robots. It is concluded that the moving gait and walking noise of quadruped robots would limit the guiding effectiveness to a certain extent, and the empathetic effect of its bionic form for BLV users could not be fully reflected. Based on the findings of wheeled robots and quadruped robots' advantages, we discuss the design implications for the future guide robot design for BLV users. This paper reports the first empirical experiment about quadruped guide robots with BLV users and preliminary explores their potential improvement space in substituting guide dogs, which can inspire the further specialized design of quadruped guide robots.
abstract_zh: 四足机器人具有引导盲人和低视力（BLV）人的潜力，因为它们具有高度灵活的运动和仿生形式提供的情感价值。然而，四足引导机器人的开发很少涉及BLV用户的参与式设计和评估。在本文中，我们在室内控制和室外现场场景中进行了两次实证实验，探讨了四足引导机器人的优点和缺点。结果表明，与轮式机器人相比，当今的商用四足机器人在可用性和信任度方面存在显着劣势。结果表明，四足机器人的移动步态和行走噪声会在一定程度上限制其引导效果，且其仿生形态对BLV用户的共情作用无法充分体现。基于轮式机器人和四足机器人优势的发现，我们讨论了 BLV 用户未来引导机器人设计的设计意义。本文首次报道了BLV用户对四足导引机器人的实证实验，初步探讨了其替代导盲犬的潜在改进空间，为四足导引机器人的进一步专业化设计提供了启发。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验探讨四足导航机器人作为盲人及低视力（BLV）人士导盲犬的可行性，分析其优缺点并提出未来设计方向。
AI.motivation: 四足机器人因灵活运动和仿生形态的情感价值被认为可能替代导盲犬，但现有设计缺乏BLV用户的参与式评估，需验证其实际效果。
AI.method: 开展两项实验（室内控制场景与户外实地场景），对比四足机器人与轮式机器人的人机交互表现，评估可用性、信任度及仿生形态的共情效应。
AI.result: 商用四足机器人相较于轮式机器人存在显著可用性与信任度缺陷，步态与行走噪音限制引导效果，仿生形态的共情效应未被充分激发。
AI.conclusion: 四足机器人需优化运动步态与噪音控制以提升引导效能，未来设计应结合轮式机器人优势与四足形态特性，推动专用导盲机器人发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过实验探讨四足导航机器人作为盲人及低视力（BLV）人士导盲犬的可行性，分析其优缺点并提出未来设计方向。
ai_content.motivation: 四足机器人因灵活运动和仿生形态的情感价值被认为可能替代导盲犬，但现有设计缺乏BLV用户的参与式评估，需验证其实际效果。
ai_content.method: 开展两项实验（室内控制场景与户外实地场景），对比四足机器人与轮式机器人的人机交互表现，评估可用性、信任度及仿生形态的共情效应。
ai_content.result: 商用四足机器人相较于轮式机器人存在显著可用性与信任度缺陷，步态与行走噪音限制引导效果，仿生形态的共情效应未被充分激发。
ai_content.conclusion: 四足机器人需优化运动步态与噪音控制以提升引导效能，未来设计应结合轮式机器人优势与四足形态特性，推动专用导盲机器人发展。

search_text: Can Quadruped Navigation Robots be Used as Guide Dogs? 四足导航机器人可以当导盲犬吗？ Quadruped robots have the potential to guide blind and low vision (BLV) people due to their highly flexible locomotion and emotional value provided by their bionic forms. However, the development of quadruped guide robots rarely involves BLV users' participatory designs and evaluations. In this paper, we conducted two empirical experiments both in indoor controlled and outdoor field scenarios, exploring the benefits and drawbacks of quadruped guide robots. The results show that the nowadays commercial quadruped robots exposed significant disadvantages in usability and trust compared with wheeled robots. It is concluded that the moving gait and walking noise of quadruped robots would limit the guiding effectiveness to a certain extent, and the empathetic effect of its bionic form for BLV users could not be fully reflected. Based on the findings of wheeled robots and quadruped robots' advantages, we discuss the design implications for the future guide robot design for BLV users. This paper reports the first empirical experiment about quadruped guide robots with BLV users and preliminary explores their potential improvement space in substituting guide dogs, which can inspire the further specialized design of quadruped guide robots. 四足机器人具有引导盲人和低视力（BLV）人的潜力，因为它们具有高度灵活的运动和仿生形式提供的情感价值。然而，四足引导机器人的开发很少涉及BLV用户的参与式设计和评估。在本文中，我们在室内控制和室外现场场景中进行了两次实证实验，探讨了四足引导机器人的优点和缺点。结果表明，与轮式机器人相比，当今的商用四足机器人在可用性和信任度方面存在显着劣势。结果表明，四足机器人的移动步态和行走噪声会在一定程度上限制其引导效果，且其仿生形态对BLV用户的共情作用无法充分体现。基于轮式机器人和四足机器人优势的发现，我们讨论了 BLV 用户未来引导机器人设计的设计意义。本文首次报道了BLV用户对四足导引机器人的实证实验，初步探讨了其替代导盲犬的潜在改进空间，为四足导引机器人的进一步专业化设计提供了启发。 本文通过实验探讨四足导航机器人作为盲人及低视力（BLV）人士导盲犬的可行性，分析其优缺点并提出未来设计方向。 Luyao Wang,Qihe Chen,Yan Zhang,Ziang Li,Tingmin Yan,Fan Wang,Guyue Zhou,Jiangtao Gong cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Luyu Gao,Zhuyun Dai,Panupong Pasupat,Anthony Chen,Arun Tejasvi Chaganty,Yicheng Fan,Vincent Y. Zhao,Ni Lao,Hongrae Lee,Da-Cheng Juan,Kelvin Guu
title: RARR: Researching and Revising What Language Models Say, Using Language Models
title_zh: RARR：使用语言模型研究和修改语言模型的内容
abstract: Language models (LMs) now excel at many tasks such as few-shot learning, question answering, reasoning, and dialog. However, they sometimes generate unsupported or misleading content. A user cannot easily determine whether their outputs are trustworthy or not, because most LMs do not have any built-in mechanism for attribution to external evidence. To enable attribution while still preserving all the powerful advantages of recent generation models, we propose RARR (Retrofit Attribution using Research and Revision), a system that 1) automatically finds attribution for the output of any text generation model and 2) post-edits the output to fix unsupported content while preserving the original output as much as possible. When applied to the output of several state-of-the-art LMs on a diverse set of generation tasks, we find that RARR significantly improves attribution while otherwise preserving the original input to a much greater degree than previously explored edit models. Furthermore, the implementation of RARR requires only a handful of training examples, a large language model, and standard web search.
summary: Language models (LMs) now excel at many tasks such as few-shot learning, question answering, reasoning, and dialog. However, they sometimes generate unsupported or misleading content. A user cannot easily determine whether their outputs are trustworthy or not, because most LMs do not have any built-in mechanism for attribution to external evidence. To enable attribution while still preserving all the powerful advantages of recent generation models, we propose RARR (Retrofit Attribution using Research and Revision), a system that 1) automatically finds attribution for the output of any text generation model and 2) post-edits the output to fix unsupported content while preserving the original output as much as possible. When applied to the output of several state-of-the-art LMs on a diverse set of generation tasks, we find that RARR significantly improves attribution while otherwise preserving the original input to a much greater degree than previously explored edit models. Furthermore, the implementation of RARR requires only a handful of training examples, a large language model, and standard web search.
abstract_zh: 语言模型 (LM) 现在在许多任务上表现出色，例如小样本学习、问答、推理和对话。然而，它们有时会生成不受支持或误导性的内容。用户无法轻松确定其输出是否值得信赖，因为大多数 LM 没有任何内置机制来归因于外部证据。为了在启用归因的同时仍然保留最近生成模型的所有强大优势，我们提出了 RARR（使用研究和修订进行改造归因），该系统 1）自动查找任何文本生成模型的输出的归因，2）对输出进行后期编辑以修复不受支持的内容，同时尽可能保留原始输出。当应用于多个最先进的语言模型在不同的生成任务集上的输出时，我们发现 RARR 显着提高了归因，同时比以前探索的编辑模型更大程度地保留了原始输入。此外，RARR 的实现只需要少量的训练示例、大型语言模型和标准的网络搜索。

AI.tldr: 提出RARR系统，通过自动查找归因和后编辑修正语言模型生成内容中的不准确信息，提升输出可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型缺乏对生成内容的归因机制，用户难以判断输出可信度，需在不牺牲生成能力的前提下增强内容可靠性。
AI.method: RARR通过自动检索网络证据为生成内容添加归因，并利用语言模型进行最小修改以修正不准确信息，仅需少量训练样本和标准搜索工具。
AI.result: 实验显示RARR在多个生成任务中显著提升归因准确性，同时比现有编辑模型更有效地保留原始输出内容。
AI.conclusion: RARR通过简单高效的方法有效提升语言模型输出的可信度，为生成内容的可靠性提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Chongyu Sun,Yang Xu,Zebin Wu,Zhihui Wei
title: ReAFFPN: Rotation-equivariant Attention Feature Fusion Pyramid Networks for Aerial Object Detection
title_zh: ReAFFPN：用于空中物体检测的旋转等变注意特征融合金字塔网络
abstract: This paper proposes a Rotation-equivariant Attention Feature Fusion Pyramid Networks for Aerial Object Detection named ReAFFPN. ReAFFPN aims at improving the effect of rotation-equivariant features fusion between adjacent layers which suffers from the semantic and scale discontinuity. Due to the particularity of rotational equivariant convolution, general methods are unable to achieve their original effect while ensuring rotation equivariance of the network. To solve this problem, we design a new Rotation-equivariant Channel Attention which has the ability to both generate channel attention and keep rotation equivariance. Then we embed a new channel attention function into Iterative Attentional Feature Fusion (iAFF) module to realize Rotation-equivariant Attention Feature Fusion. Experimental results demonstrate that ReAFFPN achieves a better rotation-equivariant feature fusion ability and significantly improve the accuracy of the Rotation-equivariant Convolutional Networks.
summary: This paper proposes a Rotation-equivariant Attention Feature Fusion Pyramid Networks for Aerial Object Detection named ReAFFPN. ReAFFPN aims at improving the effect of rotation-equivariant features fusion between adjacent layers which suffers from the semantic and scale discontinuity. Due to the particularity of rotational equivariant convolution, general methods are unable to achieve their original effect while ensuring rotation equivariance of the network. To solve this problem, we design a new Rotation-equivariant Channel Attention which has the ability to both generate channel attention and keep rotation equivariance. Then we embed a new channel attention function into Iterative Attentional Feature Fusion (iAFF) module to realize Rotation-equivariant Attention Feature Fusion. Experimental results demonstrate that ReAFFPN achieves a better rotation-equivariant feature fusion ability and significantly improve the accuracy of the Rotation-equivariant Convolutional Networks.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于空中目标检测的旋转等变注意特征融合金字塔网络，名为 ReAFFPN。 ReAFFPN旨在改善相邻层之间旋转等变特征融合的效果，该效果受到语义和尺度不连续性的影响。由于旋转等变卷积的特殊性，一般方法无法在保证网络旋转等变性的同时达到原有的效果。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种新的旋转等变通道注意力，它能够生成通道注意力并保持旋转等变。然后，我们将新的通道注意力函数嵌入到迭代注意力特征融合（iAFF）模块中，以实现旋转等变注意力特征融合。实验结果表明，ReAFFPN实现了更好的旋转等变特征融合能力，显着提高了旋转等变卷积网络的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReAFFPN网络，旨在改进航拍图像目标检测中的旋转等变特征融合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在融合相邻层旋转等变特征时存在语义和尺度不连续问题，常规方法难以兼顾旋转等变性与特征融合效果。
AI.method: 设计旋转等变通道注意力机制并嵌入iAFF模块，实现旋转等变的注意力特征融合。
AI.result: 实验表明ReAFFPN显著提升了旋转等变卷积网络的特征融合能力与检测精度。
AI.conclusion: ReAFFPN有效解决了旋转等变特征融合难题，为航拍目标检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sunjae Yoon,Ji Woo Hong,Eunseop Yoon,Dahyun Kim,Junyeong Kim,Hee Suk Yoon,Chang D. Yoo
title: Selective Query-guided Debiasing for Video Corpus Moment Retrieval
title_zh: 用于视频语料库时刻检索的选择性查询引导去偏
abstract: Video moment retrieval (VMR) aims to localize target moments in untrimmed videos pertinent to a given textual query. Existing retrieval systems tend to rely on retrieval bias as a shortcut and thus, fail to sufficiently learn multi-modal interactions between query and video. This retrieval bias stems from learning frequent co-occurrence patterns between query and moments, which spuriously correlate objects (e.g., a pencil) referred in the query with moments (e.g., scene of writing with a pencil) where the objects frequently appear in the video, such that they converge into biased moment predictions. Although recent debiasing methods have focused on removing this retrieval bias, we argue that these biased predictions sometimes should be preserved because there are many queries where biased predictions are rather helpful. To conjugate this retrieval bias, we propose a Selective Query-guided Debiasing network (SQuiDNet), which incorporates the following two main properties: (1) Biased Moment Retrieval that intentionally uncovers the biased moments inherent in objects of the query and (2) Selective Query-guided Debiasing that performs selective debiasing guided by the meaning of the query. Our experimental results on three moment retrieval benchmarks (i.e., TVR, ActivityNet, DiDeMo) show the effectiveness of SQuiDNet and qualitative analysis shows improved interpretability.
summary: Video moment retrieval (VMR) aims to localize target moments in untrimmed videos pertinent to a given textual query. Existing retrieval systems tend to rely on retrieval bias as a shortcut and thus, fail to sufficiently learn multi-modal interactions between query and video. This retrieval bias stems from learning frequent co-occurrence patterns between query and moments, which spuriously correlate objects (e.g., a pencil) referred in the query with moments (e.g., scene of writing with a pencil) where the objects frequently appear in the video, such that they converge into biased moment predictions. Although recent debiasing methods have focused on removing this retrieval bias, we argue that these biased predictions sometimes should be preserved because there are many queries where biased predictions are rather helpful. To conjugate this retrieval bias, we propose a Selective Query-guided Debiasing network (SQuiDNet), which incorporates the following two main properties: (1) Biased Moment Retrieval that intentionally uncovers the biased moments inherent in objects of the query and (2) Selective Query-guided Debiasing that performs selective debiasing guided by the meaning of the query. Our experimental results on three moment retrieval benchmarks (i.e., TVR, ActivityNet, DiDeMo) show the effectiveness of SQuiDNet and qualitative analysis shows improved interpretability.
abstract_zh: 视频时刻检索（VMR）旨在定位与给定文本查询相关的未修剪视频中的目标时刻。现有的检索系统往往依赖检索偏差作为捷径，因此无法充分学习查询和视频之间的多模式交互。这种检索偏差源于学习查询和时刻之间的频繁共现模式，该模式将查询中引用的对象（例如铅笔）与该对象经常出现在视频中的时刻（例如用铅笔书写的场景）虚假关联，从而使它们收敛到有偏差的时刻预测。尽管最近的去偏差方法侧重于消除这种检索偏差，但我们认为有时应该保留这些有偏差的预测，因为有很多查询，其中有偏差的预测相当有帮助。为了结合这种检索偏差，我们提出了一种选择性查询引导去偏差网络（SQuiDNet），它包含以下两个主要属性：（1）有偏差时刻检索，有意揭示查询对象固有的偏差时刻；（2）选择性查询引导去偏差，根据查询含义执行选择性去偏差。我们在三个矩检索基准（即 TVR、ActivityNet、DiDeMo）上的实验结果表明了 SQuiDNet 的有效性，定性分析显示了可解释性的提高。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种选择性查询引导的去偏网络（SQuiDNet），旨在解决视频时刻检索中的检索偏差问题，提升多模态交互学习效果和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时刻检索系统依赖检索偏差作为快捷方式，导致无法充分学习查询与视频间的多模态交互。而现有去偏方法可能移除对某些查询有用的偏差预测，需平衡偏差与去偏。
AI.method: 提出SQuiDNet，包含两个核心模块：1）有偏时刻检索，主动挖掘查询中物体的固有偏差时刻；2）选择性查询引导去偏，根据查询语义进行动态去偏处理。
AI.result: 在TVR、ActivityNet、DiDeMo三个基准数据集上验证了SQuiDNet的有效性，定性分析表明模型可解释性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SQuiDNet通过选择性保留有益偏差并动态去偏，有效平衡了多模态交互学习与预测准确性，提升了视频时刻检索的性能和可解释性。

authors_text: Xiaohui Song,Longtao Huang,Hui Xue,Songlin Hu
title: Supervised Prototypical Contrastive Learning for Emotion Recognition in Conversation
title_zh: 用于对话中情绪识别的监督原型对比学习
abstract: Capturing emotions within a conversation plays an essential role in modern dialogue systems. However, the weak correlation between emotions and semantics brings many challenges to emotion recognition in conversation (ERC). Even semantically similar utterances, the emotion may vary drastically depending on contexts or speakers. In this paper, we propose a Supervised Prototypical Contrastive Learning (SPCL) loss for the ERC task. Leveraging the Prototypical Network, the SPCL targets at solving the imbalanced classification problem through contrastive learning and does not require a large batch size. Meanwhile, we design a difficulty measure function based on the distance between classes and introduce curriculum learning to alleviate the impact of extreme samples. We achieve state-of-the-art results on three widely used benchmarks. Further, we conduct analytical experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed SPCL and curriculum learning strategy. We release the code at https://github.com/caskcsg/SPCL.
summary: Capturing emotions within a conversation plays an essential role in modern dialogue systems. However, the weak correlation between emotions and semantics brings many challenges to emotion recognition in conversation (ERC). Even semantically similar utterances, the emotion may vary drastically depending on contexts or speakers. In this paper, we propose a Supervised Prototypical Contrastive Learning (SPCL) loss for the ERC task. Leveraging the Prototypical Network, the SPCL targets at solving the imbalanced classification problem through contrastive learning and does not require a large batch size. Meanwhile, we design a difficulty measure function based on the distance between classes and introduce curriculum learning to alleviate the impact of extreme samples. We achieve state-of-the-art results on three widely used benchmarks. Further, we conduct analytical experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed SPCL and curriculum learning strategy. We release the code at https://github.com/caskcsg/SPCL.
abstract_zh: 在现代对话系统中捕捉对话中的情绪起着至关重要的作用。然而，情感和语义之间的弱相关性给会话中的情感识别（ERC）带来了许多挑战。即使语义相似的话语，情绪也可能根据上下文或说话者的不同而有很大差异。在本文中，我们为 ERC 任务提出了监督原型对比学习（SPCL）损失。 SPCL利用原型网络，旨在通过对比学习解决不平衡分类问题，并且不需要大批量。同时，我们设计了基于班级距离的难度测度函数，并引入课程学习来减轻极端样本的影响。我们在三个广泛使用的基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。此外，我们进行分析实验来证明我们提出的 SPCL 和课程学习策略的有效性。我们在 https://github.com/caskcsg/SPCL 发布了代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种监督原型对比学习（SPCL）方法，用于解决对话中的情感识别（ERC）任务。
AI.motivation: 对话情感识别中情感与语义关联弱，且存在类别不平衡和极端样本问题，传统方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 基于原型网络设计SPCL损失函数，结合对比学习解决类别不平衡问题，并引入难度度量函数与课程学习策略缓解极端样本影响。
AI.result: 在三个主流基准数据集上取得最先进结果，实验验证了SPCL和课程学习策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SPCL方法通过原型对比学习和课程学习有效提升了对话情感识别的性能，尤其在处理类别不平衡和极端样本时表现突出。

authors_text: Zexian Yang,Dayan Wu,Wanqian Zhang,Bo Li,Weiping Wang
title: Handling Label Uncertainty for Camera Incremental Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 处理相机增量行人重识别的标签不确定性
abstract: Incremental learning for person re-identification (ReID) aims to develop models that can be trained with a continuous data stream, which is a more practical setting for real-world applications. However, the existing incremental ReID methods make two strong assumptions that the cameras are fixed and the new-emerging data is class-disjoint from previous classes. This is unrealistic as previously observed pedestrians may re-appear and be captured again by new cameras. In this paper, we investigate person ReID in an unexplored scenario named Camera Incremental Person ReID (CIPR), which advances existing lifelong person ReID by taking into account the class overlap issue. Specifically, new data collected from new cameras may probably contain an unknown proportion of identities seen before. This subsequently leads to the lack of cross-camera annotations for new data due to privacy concerns. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework ExtendOVA. First, to handle the class overlap issue, we introduce an instance-wise seen-class identification module to discover previously seen identities at the instance level. Then, we propose a criterion for selecting confident ID-wise candidates and also devise an early learning regularization term to correct noise issues in pseudo labels. Furthermore, to compensate for the lack of previous data, we resort prototypical memory bank to create surrogate features, along with a cross-camera distillation loss to further retain the inter-camera relationship. The comprehensive experimental results on multiple benchmarks show that ExtendOVA significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts with remarkable advantages.
summary: Incremental learning for person re-identification (ReID) aims to develop models that can be trained with a continuous data stream, which is a more practical setting for real-world applications. However, the existing incremental ReID methods make two strong assumptions that the cameras are fixed and the new-emerging data is class-disjoint from previous classes. This is unrealistic as previously observed pedestrians may re-appear and be captured again by new cameras. In this paper, we investigate person ReID in an unexplored scenario named Camera Incremental Person ReID (CIPR), which advances existing lifelong person ReID by taking into account the class overlap issue. Specifically, new data collected from new cameras may probably contain an unknown proportion of identities seen before. This subsequently leads to the lack of cross-camera annotations for new data due to privacy concerns. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework ExtendOVA. First, to handle the class overlap issue, we introduce an instance-wise seen-class identification module to discover previously seen identities at the instance level. Then, we propose a criterion for selecting confident ID-wise candidates and also devise an early learning regularization term to correct noise issues in pseudo labels. Furthermore, to compensate for the lack of previous data, we resort prototypical memory bank to create surrogate features, along with a cross-camera distillation loss to further retain the inter-camera relationship. The comprehensive experimental results on multiple benchmarks show that ExtendOVA significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts with remarkable advantages.
abstract_zh: 行人重新识别 (ReID) 的增量学习旨在开发可以使用连续数据流进行训练的模型，这对于实际应用来说是更实用的设置。然而，现有的增量 ReID 方法做出了两个强有力的假设：相机是固定的，并且新出现的数据与以前的类是不相交的。这是不现实的，因为之前观察到的行人可能会重新出现并被新摄像机再次捕捉到。在本文中，我们研究了一个名为相机增量人员重识别（CIPR）的未探索场景中的人员重识别，该方案通过考虑类别重叠问题来改进现有的终身人员重识别。具体来说，从新相机收集的新数据可能包含以前见过的未知比例的身份。由于隐私问题，这随后导致新数据缺乏跨摄像机注释。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个新颖的框架 ExtendOVA。首先，为了处理类重叠问题，我们引入了实例级可见类识别模块来发现实例级别的先前可见的身份。然后，我们提出了一个选择自信的 ID-wise 候选者的标准，并设计了一个早期学习正则化项来纠正伪标签中的噪声问题。此外，为了弥补先前数据的缺乏，我们利用原型内存库来创建代理特征，以及跨相机蒸馏损失以进一步保留相机间关系。多个基准测试的综合实验结果表明，ExtendOVA 的性能明显优于现有技术，具有显着的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种处理标签不确定性的相机增量行人重识别方法，解决新旧相机数据类别重叠及注释缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有增量行人重识别方法假设相机固定且新旧数据类别无重叠，但实际场景中行人可能被新相机重复捕捉，导致类别重叠和隐私限制下的注释缺失。
AI.method: 提出ExtendOVA框架，包含实例级已见类别识别模块、置信度候选筛选机制、噪声修正正则化项、原型记忆库及跨相机蒸馏损失。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: ExtendOVA有效解决了相机增量场景下的标签不确定性问题，为持续学习型行人重识别提供了新思路。

search_text: Handling Label Uncertainty for Camera Incremental Person Re-Identification 处理相机增量行人重识别的标签不确定性 Incremental learning for person re-identification (ReID) aims to develop models that can be trained with a continuous data stream, which is a more practical setting for real-world applications. However, the existing incremental ReID methods make two strong assumptions that the cameras are fixed and the new-emerging data is class-disjoint from previous classes. This is unrealistic as previously observed pedestrians may re-appear and be captured again by new cameras. In this paper, we investigate person ReID in an unexplored scenario named Camera Incremental Person ReID (CIPR), which advances existing lifelong person ReID by taking into account the class overlap issue. Specifically, new data collected from new cameras may probably contain an unknown proportion of identities seen before. This subsequently leads to the lack of cross-camera annotations for new data due to privacy concerns. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework ExtendOVA. First, to handle the class overlap issue, we introduce an instance-wise seen-class identification module to discover previously seen identities at the instance level. Then, we propose a criterion for selecting confident ID-wise candidates and also devise an early learning regularization term to correct noise issues in pseudo labels. Furthermore, to compensate for the lack of previous data, we resort prototypical memory bank to create surrogate features, along with a cross-camera distillation loss to further retain the inter-camera relationship. The comprehensive experimental results on multiple benchmarks show that ExtendOVA significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts with remarkable advantages. 行人重新识别 (ReID) 的增量学习旨在开发可以使用连续数据流进行训练的模型，这对于实际应用来说是更实用的设置。然而，现有的增量 ReID 方法做出了两个强有力的假设：相机是固定的，并且新出现的数据与以前的类是不相交的。这是不现实的，因为之前观察到的行人可能会重新出现并被新摄像机再次捕捉到。在本文中，我们研究了一个名为相机增量人员重识别（CIPR）的未探索场景中的人员重识别，该方案通过考虑类别重叠问题来改进现有的终身人员重识别。具体来说，从新相机收集的新数据可能包含以前见过的未知比例的身份。由于隐私问题，这随后导致新数据缺乏跨摄像机注释。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个新颖的框架 ExtendOVA。首先，为了处理类重叠问题，我们引入了实例级可见类识别模块来发现实例级别的先前可见的身份。然后，我们提出了一个选择自信的 ID-wise 候选者的标准，并设计了一个早期学习正则化项来纠正伪标签中的噪声问题。此外，为了弥补先前数据的缺乏，我们利用原型内存库来创建代理特征，以及跨相机蒸馏损失以进一步保留相机间关系。多个基准测试的综合实验结果表明，ExtendOVA 的性能明显优于现有技术，具有显着的优势。 本文提出一种处理标签不确定性的相机增量行人重识别方法，解决新旧相机数据类别重叠及注释缺失问题。 Zexian Yang,Dayan Wu,Wanqian Zhang,Bo Li,Weiping Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Ye Wang,Xinxin Liu,Wenxin Hu,Tao Zhang
title: A Unified Positive-Unlabeled Learning Framework for Document-Level Relation Extraction with Different Levels of Labeling
title_zh: 不同级别标签的文档级关系抽取的统一正向无标签学习框架
abstract: Document-level relation extraction (RE) aims to identify relations between entities across multiple sentences. Most previous methods focused on document-level RE under full supervision. However, in real-world scenario, it is expensive and difficult to completely label all relations in a document because the number of entity pairs in document-level RE grows quadratically with the number of entities. To solve the common incomplete labeling problem, we propose a unified positive-unlabeled learning framework - shift and squared ranking loss positive-unlabeled (SSR-PU) learning. We use positive-unlabeled (PU) learning on document-level RE for the first time. Considering that labeled data of a dataset may lead to prior shift of unlabeled data, we introduce a PU learning under prior shift of training data. Also, using none-class score as an adaptive threshold, we propose squared ranking loss and prove its Bayesian consistency with multi-label ranking metrics. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves an improvement of about 14 F1 points relative to the previous baseline with incomplete labeling. In addition, it outperforms previous state-of-the-art results under both fully supervised and extremely unlabeled settings as well.
summary: Document-level relation extraction (RE) aims to identify relations between entities across multiple sentences. Most previous methods focused on document-level RE under full supervision. However, in real-world scenario, it is expensive and difficult to completely label all relations in a document because the number of entity pairs in document-level RE grows quadratically with the number of entities. To solve the common incomplete labeling problem, we propose a unified positive-unlabeled learning framework - shift and squared ranking loss positive-unlabeled (SSR-PU) learning. We use positive-unlabeled (PU) learning on document-level RE for the first time. Considering that labeled data of a dataset may lead to prior shift of unlabeled data, we introduce a PU learning under prior shift of training data. Also, using none-class score as an adaptive threshold, we propose squared ranking loss and prove its Bayesian consistency with multi-label ranking metrics. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves an improvement of about 14 F1 points relative to the previous baseline with incomplete labeling. In addition, it outperforms previous state-of-the-art results under both fully supervised and extremely unlabeled settings as well.
abstract_zh: 文档级关系提取（RE）旨在识别跨多个句子的实体之间的关系。以前的大多数方法都集中在完全监督下的文档级 RE。然而，在现实场景中，完全标记文档中的所有关系既昂贵又困难，因为文档级 RE 中实体对的数量随实体数量呈二次方增长。为了解决常见的不完全标记问题，我们提出了一个统一的正未标记学习框架——移位和平方排名损失正未标记（SSR-PU）学习。我们首次在文档级 RE 上使用正向无标记（PU）学习。考虑到数据集的标记数据可能会导致未标记数据的先验移位，我们引入了训练数据先验移位下的PU学习。此外，使用无类分数作为自适应阈值，我们提出平方排名损失，并证明其与多标签排名指标的贝叶斯一致性。大量实验表明，我们的方法相对于之前标记不完整的基线，实现了约 14 F1 点的改进。此外，它在完全监督和极其无标签的设置下也优于以前最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的正例-未标记学习框架（SSR-PU），用于解决文档级关系抽取中的不完全标注问题。
AI.motivation: 传统文档级关系抽取依赖完全标注数据，但实际场景中实体对数量呈二次增长，导致标注成本高且难以完成。需通过半监督方法应对不完全标注问题。
AI.method: 首次将正例-未标记（PU）学习应用于文档级关系抽取，引入先验偏移下的PU学习，并设计平方排序损失函数与自适应阈值机制，证明其贝叶斯一致性。
AI.result: 在不完全标注下，方法较基线提升约14 F1点，且在完全监督和极端未标注场景下均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SSR-PU框架有效解决了文档级关系抽取的标注不完整性问题，在多种标注条件下均取得显著性能提升。

authors_text: Yongchang Hao,Yuxin Liu,Lili Mou
title: Teacher Forcing Recovers Reward Functions for Text Generation
title_zh: 教师强制恢复文本生成的奖励功能
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been widely used in text generation to alleviate the exposure bias issue or to utilize non-parallel datasets. The reward function plays an important role in making RL training successful. However, previous reward functions are typically task-specific and sparse, restricting the use of RL. In our work, we propose a task-agnostic approach that derives a step-wise reward function directly from a model trained with teacher forcing. We additionally propose a simple modification to stabilize the RL training on non-parallel datasets with our induced reward function. Empirical results show that our method outperforms self-training and reward regression methods on several text generation tasks, confirming the effectiveness of our reward function.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been widely used in text generation to alleviate the exposure bias issue or to utilize non-parallel datasets. The reward function plays an important role in making RL training successful. However, previous reward functions are typically task-specific and sparse, restricting the use of RL. In our work, we propose a task-agnostic approach that derives a step-wise reward function directly from a model trained with teacher forcing. We additionally propose a simple modification to stabilize the RL training on non-parallel datasets with our induced reward function. Empirical results show that our method outperforms self-training and reward regression methods on several text generation tasks, confirming the effectiveness of our reward function.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已广泛应用于文本生成中，以减轻暴露偏差问题或利用非并行数据集。奖励函数对于 RL 训练的成功起着重要作用。然而，以前的奖励函数通常是针对特定任务且稀疏的，限制了强化学习的使用。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种与任务无关的方法，该方法直接从经过教师强制训练的模型中得出逐步奖励函数。我们还提出了一个简单的修改，以通过我们的诱导奖励函数稳定非并行数据集上的 RL 训练。实证结果表明，我们的方法在几个文本生成任务上优于自训练和奖励回归方法，证实了我们的奖励函数的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种任务无关的方法，通过教师强制训练的模型恢复文本生成中的分步奖励函数，以改进强化学习的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在文本生成中的奖励函数通常任务特定且稀疏，限制了其广泛应用，需更通用且有效的奖励函数设计。
AI.method: 从教师强制训练的模型中直接推导分步奖励函数，并提出简单修改以稳定非并行数据集上的强化学习训练过程。
AI.result: 在多个文本生成任务中，该方法优于自训练和奖励回归方法，验证了所提奖励函数的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为强化学习在文本生成中的应用提供了新的思路，通过任务无关的奖励函数设计提升了训练效果。

search_text: Teacher Forcing Recovers Reward Functions for Text Generation 教师强制恢复文本生成的奖励功能 Reinforcement learning (RL) has been widely used in text generation to alleviate the exposure bias issue or to utilize non-parallel datasets. The reward function plays an important role in making RL training successful. However, previous reward functions are typically task-specific and sparse, restricting the use of RL. In our work, we propose a task-agnostic approach that derives a step-wise reward function directly from a model trained with teacher forcing. We additionally propose a simple modification to stabilize the RL training on non-parallel datasets with our induced reward function. Empirical results show that our method outperforms self-training and reward regression methods on several text generation tasks, confirming the effectiveness of our reward function. 强化学习（RL）已广泛应用于文本生成中，以减轻暴露偏差问题或利用非并行数据集。奖励函数对于 RL 训练的成功起着重要作用。然而，以前的奖励函数通常是针对特定任务且稀疏的，限制了强化学习的使用。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种与任务无关的方法，该方法直接从经过教师强制训练的模型中得出逐步奖励函数。我们还提出了一个简单的修改，以通过我们的诱导奖励函数稳定非并行数据集上的 RL 训练。实证结果表明，我们的方法在几个文本生成任务上优于自训练和奖励回归方法，证实了我们的奖励函数的有效性。 本文提出一种任务无关的方法，通过教师强制训练的模型恢复文本生成中的分步奖励函数，以改进强化学习的训练效果。 Yongchang Hao,Yuxin Liu,Lili Mou cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Motoyuki Suzuki,Shintaro Sodeya,Taichi Nakamura
title: Spoken Dialogue System Based on Attribute Vector for Travel Agent Robot
title_zh: 基于属性向量的旅行社机器人口语对话系统
comment: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
comments: This paper is part of the proceedings of the Dialogue Robot Competition 2022
abstract: In this study, we develop a dialogue system for a dialogue robot competition. In the system, the characteristics of sightseeing spots are expressed as "attribute vectors" in advance, and the user is questioned on the different attributes of the two candidate spots. Consequently, the system can make recommendations based on user intentions. A dialogue experiment is conducted during a preliminary round of competition. The overall satisfaction score obtained is 40.1 out of 63 points, which is a reasonable result. Analysis of the relationship between the system behavior and satisfaction scores reveals that satisfaction increases when the system correctly understands the user intention and responds appropriately. However, a negative correlation is observed between the number of user utterances and the satisfaction score. This implies that inappropriate responses reduce the usefulness of the system as a consultation partner.
summary: In this study, we develop a dialogue system for a dialogue robot competition. In the system, the characteristics of sightseeing spots are expressed as "attribute vectors" in advance, and the user is questioned on the different attributes of the two candidate spots. Consequently, the system can make recommendations based on user intentions. A dialogue experiment is conducted during a preliminary round of competition. The overall satisfaction score obtained is 40.1 out of 63 points, which is a reasonable result. Analysis of the relationship between the system behavior and satisfaction scores reveals that satisfaction increases when the system correctly understands the user intention and responds appropriately. However, a negative correlation is observed between the number of user utterances and the satisfaction score. This implies that inappropriate responses reduce the usefulness of the system as a consultation partner.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们开发了一个用于对话机器人竞赛的对话系统。系统中，预先将旅游景点的特征表示为“属性向量”，询问用户两个候选景点的不同属性。因此，系统可以根据用户意图做出推荐。预赛期间进行对话实验。总体满意度得分为40.1分（满分63分），这是一个合理的结果。对系统行为和满意度得分之间关系的分析表明，当系统正确理解用户意图并做出适当响应时，满意度会增加。然而，用户话语数量和满意度得分之间存在负相关关系。这意味着不适当的响应会降低系统作为咨询伙伴的有用性。

AI.tldr: 开发基于属性向量的旅游代理机器人对话系统，通过分析用户对景点属性的反馈进行推荐。
AI.motivation: 提升对话机器人在旅游推荐场景中的用户满意度与对话效率，解决传统系统对用户意图理解不足的问题。
AI.method: 将景点特征转化为属性向量，通过对比候选景点属性提问用户，根据反馈动态调整推荐策略。
AI.result: 预赛满意度得分为40.1/63，正确理解用户意图可提升满意度，但用户发言次数与满意度呈负相关。
AI.conclusion: 系统需优化响应策略以减少冗余对话，提升用户咨询体验与推荐精准度。

authors_text: Chaofan Tao,Ngai Wong
title: ODG-Q: Robust Quantization via Online Domain Generalization
title_zh: ODG-Q：通过在线域泛化实现鲁棒量化
abstract: Quantizing neural networks to low-bitwidth is important for model deployment on resource-limited edge hardware. Although a quantized network has a smaller model size and memory footprint, it is fragile to adversarial attacks. However, few methods study the robustness and training efficiency of quantized networks. To this end, we propose a new method by recasting robust quantization as an online domain generalization problem, termed ODG-Q, which generates diverse adversarial data at a low cost during training. ODG-Q consistently outperforms existing works against various adversarial attacks. For example, on CIFAR-10 dataset, ODG-Q achieves 49.2% average improvements under five common white-box attacks and 21.7% average improvements under five common black-box attacks, with a training cost similar to that of natural training (viz. without adversaries). To our best knowledge, this work is the first work that trains both quantized and binary neural networks on ImageNet that consistently improve robustness under different attacks. We also provide a theoretical insight of ODG-Q that accounts for the bound of model risk on attacked data.
summary: Quantizing neural networks to low-bitwidth is important for model deployment on resource-limited edge hardware. Although a quantized network has a smaller model size and memory footprint, it is fragile to adversarial attacks. However, few methods study the robustness and training efficiency of quantized networks. To this end, we propose a new method by recasting robust quantization as an online domain generalization problem, termed ODG-Q, which generates diverse adversarial data at a low cost during training. ODG-Q consistently outperforms existing works against various adversarial attacks. For example, on CIFAR-10 dataset, ODG-Q achieves 49.2% average improvements under five common white-box attacks and 21.7% average improvements under five common black-box attacks, with a training cost similar to that of natural training (viz. without adversaries). To our best knowledge, this work is the first work that trains both quantized and binary neural networks on ImageNet that consistently improve robustness under different attacks. We also provide a theoretical insight of ODG-Q that accounts for the bound of model risk on attacked data.
abstract_zh: 将神经网络量化为低位宽对于资源有限的边缘硬件上的模型部署非常重要。尽管量化网络的模型大小和内存占用较小，但它很容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，很少有方法研究量化网络的鲁棒性和训练效率。为此，我们提出了一种新方法，将鲁棒量化重新定义为在线领域泛化问题，称为 ODG-Q，它在训练过程中以低成本生成多样化的对抗数据。 ODG-Q 在对抗各种对抗性攻击方面始终优于现有作品。例如，在 CIFAR-10 数据集上，ODG-Q 在五种常见白盒攻击下平均提高了 49.2%，在五种常见黑盒攻击下平均提高了 21.7%，训练成本与自然训练相似（即没有对手）。据我们所知，这项工作是第一个在 ImageNet 上训练量化和二元神经网络的工作，能够持续提高不同攻击下的鲁棒性。我们还提供了 ODG-Q 的理论见解，解释了受攻击数据的模型风险界限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ODG-Q方法，通过在线领域泛化提升量化神经网络的鲁棒性，使其在对抗攻击下表现更优。
AI.motivation: 量化网络虽利于边缘设备部署，但易受对抗攻击影响，现有方法缺乏对量化网络鲁棒性与训练效率的系统研究。
AI.method: 将鲁棒量化重构为在线领域泛化问题，训练时低成本生成多样对抗数据以增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，ODG-Q在五种白盒攻击下平均提升49.2%，黑盒攻击下提升21.7%，且训练成本与自然训练相当；首次在ImageNet上实现量化与二值网络的鲁棒性提升。
AI.conclusion: ODG-Q通过在线领域泛化有效提升量化网络的对抗鲁棒性，理论分析证实其模型风险界的有效性。

authors_text: Hong Liu,Yucheng Cai,Zhijian Ou,Yi Huang,Junlan Feng
title: A Generative User Simulator with GPT-based Architecture and Goal State Tracking for Reinforced Multi-Domain Dialog Systems
title_zh: 具有基于 GPT 架构和目标状态跟踪的增强型多域对话系统的生成用户模拟器
abstract: Building user simulators (USs) for reinforcement learning (RL) of task-oriented dialog systems (DSs) has gained more and more attention, which, however, still faces several fundamental challenges. First, it is unclear whether we can leverage pretrained language models to design, for example, GPT-2 based USs, to catch up and interact with the recently advanced GPT-2 based DSs. Second, an important ingredient in a US is that the user goal can be effectively incorporated and tracked; but how to flexibly integrate goal state tracking and develop an end-to-end trainable US for multi-domains has remained to be a challenge. In this work, we propose a generative user simulator (GUS) with GPT-2 based architecture and goal state tracking towards addressing the above two challenges. Extensive experiments are conducted on MultiWOZ2.1. Different DSs are trained via RL with GUS, the classic agenda-based user simulator (ABUS) and other ablation simulators respectively, and are compared for cross-model evaluation, corpus-based evaluation and human evaluation. The GUS achieves superior results in all three evaluation tasks.
summary: Building user simulators (USs) for reinforcement learning (RL) of task-oriented dialog systems (DSs) has gained more and more attention, which, however, still faces several fundamental challenges. First, it is unclear whether we can leverage pretrained language models to design, for example, GPT-2 based USs, to catch up and interact with the recently advanced GPT-2 based DSs. Second, an important ingredient in a US is that the user goal can be effectively incorporated and tracked; but how to flexibly integrate goal state tracking and develop an end-to-end trainable US for multi-domains has remained to be a challenge. In this work, we propose a generative user simulator (GUS) with GPT-2 based architecture and goal state tracking towards addressing the above two challenges. Extensive experiments are conducted on MultiWOZ2.1. Different DSs are trained via RL with GUS, the classic agenda-based user simulator (ABUS) and other ablation simulators respectively, and are compared for cross-model evaluation, corpus-based evaluation and human evaluation. The GUS achieves superior results in all three evaluation tasks.
abstract_zh: 构建用于面向任务的对话系统（DS）的强化学习（RL）的用户模拟器（US）已经受到越来越多的关注，然而，这仍然面临一些基本挑战。首先，目前尚不清楚我们是否可以利用预训练的语言模型来设计基于 GPT-2 的 US，以赶上最近先进的基于 GPT-2 的 DS 并与之交互。其次，美国的一个重要因素是用户目标可以有效地纳入和跟踪；但如何灵活地集成目标状态跟踪并开发用于多领域的端到端可训练美国仍然是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有基于 GPT-2 架构和目标状态跟踪的生成用户模拟器（GUS），以解决上述两个挑战。在 MultiWOZ2.1 上进行了大量的实验。不同的 DS 分别通过 RL 与 GUS、经典的基于议程的用户模拟器（ABUS）和其他消融模拟器进行训练，并进行跨模型评估、基于语料库的评估和人类评估的比较。 GUS 在所有三项评估任务中均取得了优异的成绩。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于GPT-2架构并结合目标状态跟踪的生成式用户模拟器（GUS），用于强化学习的多领域对话系统。
AI.motivation: 现有用户模拟器难以有效利用预训练语言模型（如GPT-2）并实现多领域目标状态跟踪，限制了对话系统的强化学习效果。
AI.method: 设计基于GPT-2的生成式用户模拟器（GUS），集成目标状态跟踪模块，并在MultiWOZ2.1数据集上通过跨模型、语料库和人工评估进行验证。
AI.result: GUS在三种评估任务中均优于经典ABUS和其他简化模拟器，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: GUS通过结合GPT架构与目标跟踪机制，有效解决了多领域对话系统用户模拟器的设计难题，为强化学习提供了更优工具。

search_text: A Generative User Simulator with GPT-based Architecture and Goal State Tracking for Reinforced Multi-Domain Dialog Systems 具有基于 GPT 架构和目标状态跟踪的增强型多域对话系统的生成用户模拟器 Building user simulators (USs) for reinforcement learning (RL) of task-oriented dialog systems (DSs) has gained more and more attention, which, however, still faces several fundamental challenges. First, it is unclear whether we can leverage pretrained language models to design, for example, GPT-2 based USs, to catch up and interact with the recently advanced GPT-2 based DSs. Second, an important ingredient in a US is that the user goal can be effectively incorporated and tracked; but how to flexibly integrate goal state tracking and develop an end-to-end trainable US for multi-domains has remained to be a challenge. In this work, we propose a generative user simulator (GUS) with GPT-2 based architecture and goal state tracking towards addressing the above two challenges. Extensive experiments are conducted on MultiWOZ2.1. Different DSs are trained via RL with GUS, the classic agenda-based user simulator (ABUS) and other ablation simulators respectively, and are compared for cross-model evaluation, corpus-based evaluation and human evaluation. The GUS achieves superior results in all three evaluation tasks. 构建用于面向任务的对话系统（DS）的强化学习（RL）的用户模拟器（US）已经受到越来越多的关注，然而，这仍然面临一些基本挑战。首先，目前尚不清楚我们是否可以利用预训练的语言模型来设计基于 GPT-2 的 US，以赶上最近先进的基于 GPT-2 的 DS 并与之交互。其次，美国的一个重要因素是用户目标可以有效地纳入和跟踪；但如何灵活地集成目标状态跟踪并开发用于多领域的端到端可训练美国仍然是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有基于 GPT-2 架构和目标状态跟踪的生成用户模拟器（GUS），以解决上述两个挑战。在 MultiWOZ2.1 上进行了大量的实验。不同的 DS 分别通过 RL 与 GUS、经典的基于议程的用户模拟器（ABUS）和其他消融模拟器进行训练，并进行跨模型评估、基于语料库的评估和人类评估的比较。 GUS 在所有三项评估任务中均取得了优异的成绩。 提出一种基于GPT-2架构并结合目标状态跟踪的生成式用户模拟器（GUS），用于强化学习的多领域对话系统。 Hong Liu,Yucheng Cai,Zhijian Ou,Yi Huang,Junlan Feng cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Maruti K. Mudunuru,Velimir V. Vesselinov,Bulbul Ahmmed
title: GeoThermalCloud: Machine Learning for Geothermal Resource Exploration
title_zh: GeoThermalCloud：用于地热资源勘探的机器学习
abstract: This paper presents a novel ML-based methodology for geothermal exploration towards PFA applications. Our methodology is provided through our open-source ML framework, GeoThermalCloud \url{https://github.com/SmartTensors/GeoThermalCloud.jl}. The GeoThermalCloud uses a series of unsupervised, supervised, and physics-informed ML methods available in SmartTensors AI platform \url{https://github.com/SmartTensors}. Here, the presented analyses are performed using our unsupervised ML algorithm called NMF$k$, which is available in the SmartTensors AI platform. Our ML algorithm facilitates the discovery of new phenomena, hidden patterns, and mechanisms that helps us to make informed decisions. Moreover, the GeoThermalCloud enhances the collected PFA data and discovers signatures representative of geothermal resources. Through GeoThermalCloud, we could identify hidden patterns in the geothermal field data needed to discover blind systems efficiently. Crucial geothermal signatures often overlooked in traditional PFA are extracted using the GeoThermalCloud and analyzed by the subject matter experts to provide ML-enhanced PFA, which is informative for efficient exploration. We applied our ML methodology to various open-source geothermal datasets within the U.S. (some of these are collected by past PFA work). The results provide valuable insights into resource types within those regions. This ML-enhanced workflow makes the GeoThermalCloud attractive for the geothermal community to improve existing datasets and extract valuable information often unnoticed during geothermal exploration.
summary: This paper presents a novel ML-based methodology for geothermal exploration towards PFA applications. Our methodology is provided through our open-source ML framework, GeoThermalCloud \url{https://github.com/SmartTensors/GeoThermalCloud.jl}. The GeoThermalCloud uses a series of unsupervised, supervised, and physics-informed ML methods available in SmartTensors AI platform \url{https://github.com/SmartTensors}. Here, the presented analyses are performed using our unsupervised ML algorithm called NMF$k$, which is available in the SmartTensors AI platform. Our ML algorithm facilitates the discovery of new phenomena, hidden patterns, and mechanisms that helps us to make informed decisions. Moreover, the GeoThermalCloud enhances the collected PFA data and discovers signatures representative of geothermal resources. Through GeoThermalCloud, we could identify hidden patterns in the geothermal field data needed to discover blind systems efficiently. Crucial geothermal signatures often overlooked in traditional PFA are extracted using the GeoThermalCloud and analyzed by the subject matter experts to provide ML-enhanced PFA, which is informative for efficient exploration. We applied our ML methodology to various open-source geothermal datasets within the U.S. (some of these are collected by past PFA work). The results provide valuable insights into resource types within those regions. This ML-enhanced workflow makes the GeoThermalCloud attractive for the geothermal community to improve existing datasets and extract valuable information often unnoticed during geothermal exploration.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的新颖方法，用于 PFA 应用的地热勘探。我们的方法是通过我们的开源机器学习框架 GeoThermalCloud \url{https://github.com/SmartTensors/GeoThermalCloud.jl} 提供的。 GeoThermalCloud 使用 SmartTensors AI 平台 \url{https://github.com/SmartTensors} 中提供的一系列无监督、监督和物理信息的 ML 方法。在这里，所提出的分析是使用我们名为 NMF$k$ 的无监督机器学习算法来执行的，该算法可在 SmartTensors AI 平台中使用。我们的机器学习算法有助于发现新现象、隐藏模式和机制，帮助我们做出明智的决策。此外，GeoThermalCloud 增强了收集的 PFA 数据并发现代表地热资源的特征。通过 GeoThermalCloud，我们可以识别有效发现盲系统所需的地热场数据中的隐藏模式。使用 GeoThermalCloud 提取传统 PFA 中经常被忽视的关键地热特征，并由主题专家进行分析，以提供 ML 增强型 PFA，为高效勘探提供信息。我们将 ML 方法应用于美国境内的各种开源地热数据集（其中一些是由过去的 PFA 工作收集的）。结果为了解这些地区的资源类型提供了宝贵的见解。这种机器学习增强的工作流程使 GeoThermalCloud 对地热社区具有吸引力，可以改进现有数据集并提取地热勘探过程中经常被忽视的有价值信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的地热资源勘探方法GeoThermalCloud，通过开源框架实现对地热数据的高效分析与特征提取。
AI.motivation: 传统地热勘探方法存在数据利用效率低、关键特征易被忽略的问题，需借助机器学习提升勘探准确性与效率。
AI.method: 基于SmartTensors平台，结合无监督学习算法NMF$k$与物理信息机器学习方法，对公开地热数据集进行特征提取与模式分析。
AI.result: 成功识别出传统方法遗漏的地热特征，为美国多个区域的地热资源类型提供了新的洞见，并验证了框架在盲区系统发现中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GeoThermalCloud框架可有效增强地热勘探数据的分析能力，为行业提供改进数据质量和挖掘隐藏信息的工具。

authors_text: Junhong Xu,Kai Yin,Jason M. Gregory,Lantao Liu
title: Causal Inference for De-biasing Motion Estimation from Robotic Observational Data
title_zh: 根据机器人观测数据进行去偏运动估计的因果推断
abstract: Robot data collected in complex real-world scenarios are often biased due to safety concerns, human preferences, and mission or platform constraints. Consequently, robot learning from such observational data poses great challenges for accurate parameter estimation. We propose a principled causal inference framework for robots to learn the parameters of a stochastic motion model using observational data. Specifically, we leverage the de-biasing functionality of the potential-outcome causal inference framework, the Inverse Propensity Weighting (IPW), and the Doubly Robust (DR) methods, to obtain a better parameter estimation of the robot's stochastic motion model. The IPW is a re-weighting approach to ensure unbiased estimation, and the DR approach further combines any two estimators to strengthen the unbiased result even if one of these estimators is biased. We then develop an approximate policy iteration algorithm using the bias-eliminated estimated state transition function. We validate our framework using both simulation and real-world experiments, and the results have revealed that the proposed causal inference-based navigation and control framework can correctly and efficiently learn the parameters from biased observational data.
summary: Robot data collected in complex real-world scenarios are often biased due to safety concerns, human preferences, and mission or platform constraints. Consequently, robot learning from such observational data poses great challenges for accurate parameter estimation. We propose a principled causal inference framework for robots to learn the parameters of a stochastic motion model using observational data. Specifically, we leverage the de-biasing functionality of the potential-outcome causal inference framework, the Inverse Propensity Weighting (IPW), and the Doubly Robust (DR) methods, to obtain a better parameter estimation of the robot's stochastic motion model. The IPW is a re-weighting approach to ensure unbiased estimation, and the DR approach further combines any two estimators to strengthen the unbiased result even if one of these estimators is biased. We then develop an approximate policy iteration algorithm using the bias-eliminated estimated state transition function. We validate our framework using both simulation and real-world experiments, and the results have revealed that the proposed causal inference-based navigation and control framework can correctly and efficiently learn the parameters from biased observational data.
abstract_zh: 由于安全问题、人类偏好以及任务或平台限制，在复杂的现实场景中收集的机器人数据通常存在偏差。因此，机器人从这些观测数据中学习对准确的参数估计提出了巨大的挑战。我们为机器人提出了一个原则性的因果推理框架，以使用观测数据学习随机运动模型的参数。具体来说，我们利用潜在结果因果推理框架的去偏功能、逆倾向加权（IPW）和双鲁棒（DR）方法，以获得机器人随机运动模型的更好的参数估计。 IPW 是一种重新加权方法，以确保无偏估计，而 DR 方法进一步组合任意两个估计量，以增强无偏结果，即使其中一个估计量有偏差。然后，我们使用消除偏差的估计状态转换函数开发近似策略迭代算法。我们使用模拟和真实实验验证了我们的框架，结果表明所提出的基于因果推理的导航和控制框架可以正确有效地从有偏差的观测数据中学习参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果推理的框架，用于从存在偏差的机器人观测数据中学习随机运动模型参数。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中机器人收集的数据常因安全限制、人类偏好等因素存在偏差，导致参数估计困难。
AI.method: 结合潜在结果框架中的逆概率加权（IPW）和双重稳健（DR）方法，通过近似策略迭代算法消除偏差。
AI.result: 仿真与实际实验验证了该框架能有效从偏差数据中准确学习运动模型参数。
AI.conclusion: 因果推理方法可有效消除观测数据偏差，提升机器人运动模型的学习效率与准确性。

search_text: Causal Inference for De-biasing Motion Estimation from Robotic Observational Data 根据机器人观测数据进行去偏运动估计的因果推断 Robot data collected in complex real-world scenarios are often biased due to safety concerns, human preferences, and mission or platform constraints. Consequently, robot learning from such observational data poses great challenges for accurate parameter estimation. We propose a principled causal inference framework for robots to learn the parameters of a stochastic motion model using observational data. Specifically, we leverage the de-biasing functionality of the potential-outcome causal inference framework, the Inverse Propensity Weighting (IPW), and the Doubly Robust (DR) methods, to obtain a better parameter estimation of the robot's stochastic motion model. The IPW is a re-weighting approach to ensure unbiased estimation, and the DR approach further combines any two estimators to strengthen the unbiased result even if one of these estimators is biased. We then develop an approximate policy iteration algorithm using the bias-eliminated estimated state transition function. We validate our framework using both simulation and real-world experiments, and the results have revealed that the proposed causal inference-based navigation and control framework can correctly and efficiently learn the parameters from biased observational data. 由于安全问题、人类偏好以及任务或平台限制，在复杂的现实场景中收集的机器人数据通常存在偏差。因此，机器人从这些观测数据中学习对准确的参数估计提出了巨大的挑战。我们为机器人提出了一个原则性的因果推理框架，以使用观测数据学习随机运动模型的参数。具体来说，我们利用潜在结果因果推理框架的去偏功能、逆倾向加权（IPW）和双鲁棒（DR）方法，以获得机器人随机运动模型的更好的参数估计。 IPW 是一种重新加权方法，以确保无偏估计，而 DR 方法进一步组合任意两个估计量，以增强无偏结果，即使其中一个估计量有偏差。然后，我们使用消除偏差的估计状态转换函数开发近似策略迭代算法。我们使用模拟和真实实验验证了我们的框架，结果表明所提出的基于因果推理的导航和控制框架可以正确有效地从有偏差的观测数据中学习参数。 本文提出了一种基于因果推理的框架，用于从存在偏差的机器人观测数据中学习随机运动模型参数。 Junhong Xu,Kai Yin,Jason M. Gregory,Lantao Liu cs.RO

authors_text: Dave Van Veen,Rogier van der Sluijs,Batu Ozturkler,Arjun Desai,Christian Bluethgen,Robert D. Boutin,Marc H. Willis,Gordon Wetzstein,David Lindell,Shreyas Vasanawala,John Pauly,Akshay S. Chaudhari
title: Scale-Agnostic Super-Resolution in MRI using Feature-Based Coordinate Networks
title_zh: 使用基于特征的坐标网络在 MRI 中实现与尺度无关的超分辨率
abstract: We propose using a coordinate network decoder for the task of super-resolution in MRI. The continuous signal representation of coordinate networks enables this approach to be scale-agnostic, i.e. one can train over a continuous range of scales and subsequently query at arbitrary resolutions. Due to the difficulty of performing super-resolution on inherently noisy data, we analyze network behavior under multiple denoising strategies. Lastly we compare this method to a standard convolutional decoder using both quantitative metrics and a radiologist study implemented in Voxel, our newly developed tool for web-based evaluation of medical images.
summary: We propose using a coordinate network decoder for the task of super-resolution in MRI. The continuous signal representation of coordinate networks enables this approach to be scale-agnostic, i.e. one can train over a continuous range of scales and subsequently query at arbitrary resolutions. Due to the difficulty of performing super-resolution on inherently noisy data, we analyze network behavior under multiple denoising strategies. Lastly we compare this method to a standard convolutional decoder using both quantitative metrics and a radiologist study implemented in Voxel, our newly developed tool for web-based evaluation of medical images.
abstract_zh: 我们建议使用坐标网络解码器来完成 MRI 中的超分辨率任务。坐标网络的连续信号表示使这种方法能够与尺度无关，即可以在连续的尺度范围内进行训练，然后以任意分辨率进行查询。由于对固有噪声数据执行超分辨率的困难，我们分析了多种去噪策略下的网络行为。最后，我们将该方法与使用定量指标和在 Voxel（我们新开发的用于基于网络的医学图像评估的工具）中实施的放射科医生研究的标准卷积解码器进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于坐标网络的MRI超分辨率方法，通过连续信号表示实现尺度无关的图像重建。
AI.motivation: MRI超分辨率面临噪声数据和尺度适应性挑战，传统方法难以兼顾多尺度需求与噪声抑制。
AI.method: 采用坐标网络解码器利用连续信号表示，跨尺度训练模型并支持任意分辨率查询，结合多种去噪策略优化网络性能。
AI.result: 定量指标与放射科医生评估显示，该方法在噪声抑制和图像质量上优于标准卷积解码器。
AI.conclusion: 坐标网络解码器在MRI超分辨率任务中展现尺度无关优势，有效应对噪声数据挑战。

authors_text: Woo Suk Choi,Yu-Jung Heo,Byoung-Tak Zhang
title: SGRAM: Improving Scene Graph Parsing via Abstract Meaning Representation
title_zh: SGRAM：通过抽象含义表示改进场景图解析
abstract: Scene graph is structured semantic representation that can be modeled as a form of graph from images and texts. Image-based scene graph generation research has been actively conducted until recently, whereas text-based scene graph generation research has not. In this paper, we focus on the problem of scene graph parsing from textual description of a visual scene. The core idea is to use abstract meaning representation (AMR) instead of the dependency parsing mainly used in previous studies. AMR is a graph-based semantic formalism of natural language which abstracts concepts of words in a sentence contrary to the dependency parsing which considers dependency relationships on all words in a sentence. To this end, we design a simple yet effective two-stage scene graph parsing framework utilizing abstract meaning representation, SGRAM (Scene GRaph parsing via Abstract Meaning representation): 1) transforming a textual description of an image into an AMR graph (Text-to-AMR) and 2) encoding the AMR graph into a Transformer-based language model to generate a scene graph (AMR-to-SG). Experimental results show the scene graphs generated by our framework outperforms the dependency parsing-based model by 11.61\% and the previous state-of-the-art model using a pre-trained Transformer language model by 3.78\%. Furthermore, we apply SGRAM to image retrieval task which is one of downstream tasks for scene graph, and confirm the effectiveness of scene graphs generated by our framework.
summary: Scene graph is structured semantic representation that can be modeled as a form of graph from images and texts. Image-based scene graph generation research has been actively conducted until recently, whereas text-based scene graph generation research has not. In this paper, we focus on the problem of scene graph parsing from textual description of a visual scene. The core idea is to use abstract meaning representation (AMR) instead of the dependency parsing mainly used in previous studies. AMR is a graph-based semantic formalism of natural language which abstracts concepts of words in a sentence contrary to the dependency parsing which considers dependency relationships on all words in a sentence. To this end, we design a simple yet effective two-stage scene graph parsing framework utilizing abstract meaning representation, SGRAM (Scene GRaph parsing via Abstract Meaning representation): 1) transforming a textual description of an image into an AMR graph (Text-to-AMR) and 2) encoding the AMR graph into a Transformer-based language model to generate a scene graph (AMR-to-SG). Experimental results show the scene graphs generated by our framework outperforms the dependency parsing-based model by 11.61\% and the previous state-of-the-art model using a pre-trained Transformer language model by 3.78\%. Furthermore, we apply SGRAM to image retrieval task which is one of downstream tasks for scene graph, and confirm the effectiveness of scene graphs generated by our framework.
abstract_zh: 场景图是结构化语义表示，可以将图像和文本建模为图形形式。基于图像的场景图生成研究直到最近才被积极开展，而基于文本的场景图生成研究却还没有。在本文中，我们关注从视觉场景的文本描述进行场景图解析的问题。其核心思想是使用抽象意义表示（AMR）来代替以往研究中主要使用的依存句法分析。 AMR 是一种基于图的自然语言语义形式，它抽象了句子中单词的概念，这与考虑句子中所有单词的依赖关系的依存分析相反。为此，我们利用抽象含义表示设计了一个简单而有效的两阶段场景图解析框架，SGRAM（通过抽象含义表示进行场景图解析）：1）将图像的文本描述转换为AMR图（Text-to-AMR），2）将AMR图编码为基于Transformer的语言模型以生成场景图（AMR-to-SG）。实验结果表明，我们的框架生成的场景图比基于依赖解析的模型高出 11.61%，比之前使用预训练 Transformer 语言模型的最先进模型高出 3.78%。此外，我们将 SGRAM 应用于场景图下游任务之一的图像检索任务，并验证了我们的框架生成的场景图的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于抽象意义表示（AMR）的场景图解析框架SGRAM，用于从视觉场景的文本描述中生成更准确的场景图。
AI.motivation: 尽管图像场景图生成研究活跃，但基于文本的场景图生成研究较少。传统依赖句法分析存在语义抽象不足的问题，而AMR能更有效地捕捉句子中的概念关系，因此需探索更优的文本场景图解析方法。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架SGRAM：1）将文本描述转化为AMR图（Text-to-AMR）；2）通过Transformer语言模型将AMR图编码为场景图（AMR-to-SG），利用AMR的语义抽象优势提升解析效果。
AI.result: SGRAM在场景图生成任务中较依赖句法分析模型提升11.61%，较预训练Transformer模型提升3.78%；在图像检索下游任务中验证了生成场景图的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于AMR的SGRAM框架显著优于传统方法，证明了AMR在场景图解析中的有效性，且生成的场景图可有效支持图像检索等下游任务。

Experimental results show the scene graphs generated by our framework outperforms the dependency parsing-based model by 11.61\% and the previous state-of-the-art model using a pre-trained Transformer language model by 3.78\%. Furthermore, we apply SGRAM to image retrieval task which is one of downstream tasks for scene graph, and confirm the effectiveness of scene graphs generated by our framework. 场景图是结构化语义表示，可以将图像和文本建模为图形形式。基于图像的场景图生成研究直到最近才被积极开展，而基于文本的场景图生成研究却还没有。在本文中，我们关注从视觉场景的文本描述进行场景图解析的问题。其核心思想是使用抽象意义表示（AMR）来代替以往研究中主要使用的依存句法分析。 AMR 是一种基于图的自然语言语义形式，它抽象了句子中单词的概念，这与考虑句子中所有单词的依赖关系的依存分析相反。为此，我们利用抽象含义表示设计了一个简单而有效的两阶段场景图解析框架，SGRAM（通过抽象含义表示进行场景图解析）：1）将图像的文本描述转换为AMR图（Text-to-AMR），2）将AMR图编码为基于Transformer的语言模型以生成场景图（AMR-to-SG）。实验结果表明，我们的框架生成的场景图比基于依赖解析的模型高出 11.61%，比之前使用预训练 Transformer 语言模型的最先进模型高出 3.78%。此外，我们将 SGRAM 应用于场景图下游任务之一的图像检索任务，并验证了我们的框架生成的场景图的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于抽象意义表示（AMR）的场景图解析框架SGRAM，用于从视觉场景的文本描述中生成更准确的场景图。 Woo Suk Choi,Yu-Jung Heo,Byoung-Tak Zhang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Junhong Xu,Durgakant Pushp,Kai Yin,Lantao Liu
title: Decision-Making Among Bounded Rational Agents
title_zh: 有限理性主体之间的决策
abstract: When robots share the same workspace with other intelligent agents (e.g., other robots or humans), they must be able to reason about the behaviors of their neighboring agents while accomplishing the designated tasks. In practice, frequently, agents do not exhibit absolutely rational behavior due to their limited computational resources. Thus, predicting the optimal agent behaviors is undesirable (because it demands prohibitive computational resources) and undesirable (because the prediction may be wrong). Motivated by this observation, we remove the assumption of perfectly rational agents and propose incorporating the concept of bounded rationality from an information-theoretic view into the game-theoretic framework. This allows the robots to reason other agents' sub-optimal behaviors and act accordingly under their computational constraints. Specifically, bounded rationality directly models the agent's information processing ability, which is represented as the KL-divergence between nominal and optimized stochastic policies, and the solution to the bounded-optimal policy can be obtained by an efficient importance sampling approach. Using both simulated and real-world experiments in multi-robot navigation tasks, we demonstrate that the resulting framework allows the robots to reason about different levels of rational behaviors of other agents and compute a reasonable strategy under its computational constraint.
summary: When robots share the same workspace with other intelligent agents (e.g., other robots or humans), they must be able to reason about the behaviors of their neighboring agents while accomplishing the designated tasks. In practice, frequently, agents do not exhibit absolutely rational behavior due to their limited computational resources. Thus, predicting the optimal agent behaviors is undesirable (because it demands prohibitive computational resources) and undesirable (because the prediction may be wrong). Motivated by this observation, we remove the assumption of perfectly rational agents and propose incorporating the concept of bounded rationality from an information-theoretic view into the game-theoretic framework. This allows the robots to reason other agents' sub-optimal behaviors and act accordingly under their computational constraints. Specifically, bounded rationality directly models the agent's information processing ability, which is represented as the KL-divergence between nominal and optimized stochastic policies, and the solution to the bounded-optimal policy can be obtained by an efficient importance sampling approach. Using both simulated and real-world experiments in multi-robot navigation tasks, we demonstrate that the resulting framework allows the robots to reason about different levels of rational behaviors of other agents and compute a reasonable strategy under its computational constraint.
abstract_zh: 当机器人与其他智能代理（例如其他机器人或人类）共享同一工作空间时，它们必须能够在完成指定任务的同时推理相邻代理的行为。在实践中，由于计算资源有限，代理经常不会表现出绝对理性的行为。因此，预测最佳代理行为是不可取的（因为它需要大量的计算资源）并且不可取（因为预测可能是错误的）。受这一观察的启发，我们删除了完全理性主体的假设，并建议将有限理性的概念从信息论观点纳入博弈论框架。这使得机器人能够推理其他代理的次优行为，并在其计算限制下采取相应的行动。具体来说，有限理性直接对智能体的信息处理能力进行建模，表示为名义随机策略和优化随机策略之间的KL散度，并且可以通过有效的重要性采样方法获得有限最优策略的解。在多机器人导航任务中使用模拟和现实实验，我们证明了所得到的框架允许机器人推理其他代理的不同级别的理性行为，并在其计算约束下计算合理的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论视角的有限理性模型，用于多智能体决策框架，使机器人能够在计算资源受限的情况下合理预测并应对其他智能体的次优行为。
AI.motivation: 传统假设智能体完全理性在实际中不可行，因为有限计算资源导致行为预测既耗资源又可能错误，需考虑有限理性以提升决策实用性。
AI.method: 通过引入信息论中的KL散度建模智能体的信息处理能力，将有限理性纳入博弈框架，并采用高效的重要抽样方法求解次优策略。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实多机器人导航任务中验证了框架有效性，证明机器人可合理应对不同理性水平的其他智能体行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多智能体系统提供了一种在计算约束下处理有限理性的有效框架，提升了复杂环境中的决策鲁棒性。

authors_text: Ruchao Fan,Guoli Ye,Yashesh Gaur,Jinyu Li
title: Acoustic-aware Non-autoregressive Spell Correction with Mask Sample Decoding
title_zh: 带掩模样本解码的声学感知非自回归拼写校正
abstract: Masked language model (MLM) has been widely used for understanding tasks, e.g. BERT. Recently, MLM has also been used for generation tasks. The most popular one in speech is using Mask-CTC for non-autoregressive speech recognition. In this paper, we take one step further, and explore the possibility of using MLM as a non-autoregressive spell correction (SC) model for transformer-transducer (TT), denoted as MLM-SC. Our initial experiments show that MLM-SC provides no improvements on Librispeech data. The problem might be the choice of modeling units (word pieces) and the inaccuracy of the TT confidence scores for English data. To solve the problem, we propose a mask sample decoding (MS-decode) method where the masked tokens can have the choice of being masked or not to compensate for the inaccuracy. As a result, we reduce the WER of a streaming TT from 7.6% to 6.5% on the Librispeech test-other data and the CER from 7.3% to 6.1% on the Aishell test data, respectively.
summary: Masked language model (MLM) has been widely used for understanding tasks, e.g. BERT. Recently, MLM has also been used for generation tasks. The most popular one in speech is using Mask-CTC for non-autoregressive speech recognition. In this paper, we take one step further, and explore the possibility of using MLM as a non-autoregressive spell correction (SC) model for transformer-transducer (TT), denoted as MLM-SC. Our initial experiments show that MLM-SC provides no improvements on Librispeech data. The problem might be the choice of modeling units (word pieces) and the inaccuracy of the TT confidence scores for English data. To solve the problem, we propose a mask sample decoding (MS-decode) method where the masked tokens can have the choice of being masked or not to compensate for the inaccuracy. As a result, we reduce the WER of a streaming TT from 7.6% to 6.5% on the Librispeech test-other data and the CER from 7.3% to 6.1% on the Aishell test data, respectively.
abstract_zh: 掩码语言模型（MLM）已广泛用于理解任务，例如伯特。最近，MLM 也被用于生成任务。语音领域最流行的一种是使用 Mask-CTC 进行非自回归语音识别。在本文中，我们更进一步，探索使用 MLM 作为变压器-换能器 (TT) 的非自回归拼写校正 (SC) 模型的可能性，表示为 MLM-SC。我们的初步实验表明，MLM-SC 对 Librispeech 数据没有提供任何改进。问题可能在于建模单位（单词片段）的选择以及英语数据的 TT 置信度分数的不准确。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种掩码样本解码（MS-decode）方法，其中掩码令牌可以选择被掩码或不被掩码以补偿不准确性。因此，我们将 Librispeech 测试其他数据上的流式 TT 的 WER 从 7.6% 降低到 6.5%，将 Aishell 测试数据上的 CER 从 7.3% 降低到 6.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码语言模型（MLM）的非自回归拼写校正方法，并引入掩码样本解码（MS-decode）以提高校正效果。
AI.motivation: 传统MLM在拼写校正任务中效果有限，尤其在建模单元选择和置信度估计方面存在不足，需提出新方法以提高准确性。
AI.method: 提出掩码样本解码（MS-decode）方法，通过允许掩码标记选择是否保留以补偿置信度估计的不准确性。
AI.result: 在Librispeech测试集上将词错误率（WER）从7.6%降至6.5%，在Aishell测试集上将字符错误率（CER）从7.3%降至6.1%。
AI.conclusion: MS-decode方法有效缓解了建模单元和置信度估计问题，显著提升了非自回归拼写校正的性能。

authors_text: Navid Feizi,S. Farokh Atashzar,Mehrdad R. Kermani,Rajni V. Patel
title: Design and Modeling of a Smart Torque-Adjustable Rotary Electroadhesive Clutch for Application in Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: 用于人机交互的智能扭矩可调旋转电粘附离合器的设计和建模
comment: submitted to IEEE T-MECH, 11 pages, 14 figures,
comments: submitted to IEEE T-MECH, 11 pages, 14 figures,
abstract: The increasing need for sharing workspace and interactive physical tasks between robots and humans has raised concerns regarding safety of such operations. In this regard, controllable clutches have shown great potential for addressing important safety concerns at the hardware level by separating the high-impedance actuator from the end effector by providing the power transfer from electromagnetic source to the human. However, the existing clutches suffer from high power consumption and large-weight, which make them undesirable from the design point of view. In this paper, for the first time, the design and development of a novel, lightweight, and low-power torque-adjustable rotary clutch using electroadhesive materials is presented. The performance of three different pairs of clutch plates is investigated in the context of the smoothness and quality of output torque. The performance degradation issue due to the polarization of the insulator is addressed through the utilization of an alternating current waveform activation signal. Moreover, the effect of the activation frequency on the output torque and power consumption of the clutch is investigated. Finally, a time-dependent model for the output torque of the clutch is presented, and the performance of the clutch was evaluated through experiments, including physical human-robot interaction. The proposed clutch offers a torque to power consumption ratio that is six times better than commercial magnetic particle clutches. The proposed clutch presents great potential for developing safe, lightweight, and low-power physical human-robot interaction systems, such as exoskeletons and robotic walkers.

The performance degradation issue due to the polarization of the insulator is addressed through the utilization of an alternating current waveform activation signal. Moreover, the effect of the activation frequency on the output torque and power consumption of the clutch is investigated. Finally, a time-dependent model for the output torque of the clutch is presented, and the performance of the clutch was evaluated through experiments, including physical human-robot interaction. The proposed clutch offers a torque to power consumption ratio that is six times better than commercial magnetic particle clutches. The proposed clutch presents great potential for developing safe, lightweight, and low-power physical human-robot interaction systems, such as exoskeletons and robotic walkers.
abstract_zh: 机器人和人类之间共享工作空间和交互式物理任务的需求日益增长，引起了人们对此类操作安全性的担忧。在这方面，可控离合器在解决硬件层面的重要安全问题方面表现出了巨大的潜力，通过将高阻抗执行器与末端执行器分开，通过提供从电磁源到人类的电力传输。然而，现有的离合器功耗高、重量大，从设计角度来看并不理想。在本文中，首次提出了一种采用电粘附材料的新型、轻量化、低功率扭矩可调旋转离合器的设计和开发。在输出扭矩的平滑度和质量的背景下研究了三对不同离合器片的性能。通过利用交流波形激活信号来解决由于绝缘体的极化而导致的性能下降问题。此外，还研究了激活频率对离合器输出扭矩和功耗的影响。最后，提出了离合器输出扭矩的时间相关模型，并通过实验（包括人机交互）评估了离合器的性能。所提出的离合器的扭矩与功耗比是商用磁粉离合器的六倍。所提出的离合器在开发安全、轻型和低功耗的物理人机交互系统（例如外骨骼和机器人步行器）方面具有巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并开发了一种新型轻量化、低功耗的电致粘附扭矩可调旋转离合器，用于人机交互场景。
AI.motivation: 现有离合器存在高能耗和重量大等问题，难以满足人机交互中对安全性与轻量化的需求。
AI.method: 采用电致粘附材料设计离合器，通过测试不同摩擦片组合优化扭矩性能，利用交流波形解决绝缘体极化问题，并建立时变扭矩模型进行实验验证。
AI.result: 所提出离合器的扭矩功率比是商用磁粉离合器的6倍，适用于外骨骼和机器人行走器等安全交互系统。
AI.conclusion: 该离合器为开发安全、轻量化的人机交互系统提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Design and Modeling of a Smart Torque-Adjustable Rotary Electroadhesive Clutch for Application in Human-Robot Interaction 用于人机交互的智能扭矩可调旋转电粘附离合器的设计和建模 The increasing need for sharing workspace and interactive physical tasks between robots and humans has raised concerns regarding safety of such operations. In this regard, controllable clutches have shown great potential for addressing important safety concerns at the hardware level by separating the high-impedance actuator from the end effector by providing the power transfer from electromagnetic source to the human. However, the existing clutches suffer from high power consumption and large-weight, which make them undesirable from the design point of view. In this paper, for the first time, the design and development of a novel, lightweight, and low-power torque-adjustable rotary clutch using electroadhesive materials is presented. The performance of three different pairs of clutch plates is investigated in the context of the smoothness and quality of output torque. The performance degradation issue due to the polarization of the insulator is addressed through the utilization of an alternating current waveform activation signal. Moreover, the effect of the activation frequency on the output torque and power consumption of the clutch is investigated. Finally, a time-dependent model for the output torque of the clutch is presented, and the performance of the clutch was evaluated through experiments, including physical human-robot interaction. The proposed clutch offers a torque to power consumption ratio that is six times better than commercial magnetic particle clutches. The proposed clutch presents great potential for developing safe, lightweight, and low-power physical human-robot interaction systems, such as exoskeletons and robotic walkers. 机器人和人类之间共享工作空间和交互式物理任务的需求日益增长，引起了人们对此类操作安全性的担忧。在这方面，可控离合器在解决硬件层面的重要安全问题方面表现出了巨大的潜力，通过将高阻抗执行器与末端执行器分开，通过提供从电磁源到人类的电力传输。然而，现有的离合器功耗高、重量大，从设计角度来看并不理想。在本文中，首次提出了一种采用电粘附材料的新型、轻量化、低功率扭矩可调旋转离合器的设计和开发。在输出扭矩的平滑度和质量的背景下研究了三对不同离合器片的性能。通过利用交流波形激活信号来解决由于绝缘体的极化而导致的性能下降问题。此外，还研究了激活频率对离合器输出扭矩和功耗的影响。最后，提出了离合器输出扭矩的时间相关模型，并通过实验（包括人机交互）评估了离合器的性能。所提出的离合器的扭矩与功耗比是商用磁粉离合器的六倍。所提出的离合器在开发安全、轻型和低功耗的物理人机交互系统（例如外骨骼和机器人步行器）方面具有巨大的潜力。 本文设计并开发了一种新型轻量化、低功耗的电致粘附扭矩可调旋转离合器，用于人机交互场景。 Navid Feizi,S.
