authors_text: Monika Filipovska,Michael Hyland,Haimanti Bala
title: Towards More Efficient Shared Autonomous Mobility: A Learning-Based Fleet Repositioning Approach
title_zh: 迈向更高效的共享自主移动：基于学习的车队重新定位方法
abstract: Shared-use autonomous mobility services (SAMS) present new opportunities for improving accessible and demand-responsive mobility. A fundamental challenge that SAMS face is appropriate positioning of idle fleet vehicles to meet future demand - a problem that strongly impacts service quality and efficiency. This paper formulates SAMS fleet repositioning as a Markov Decision Process and presents a reinforcement learning-based repositioning (RLR) approach called integrated system-agent repositioning (ISR). The ISR learns a scalable fleet repositioning strategy in an integrated manner: learning to respond to evolving demand patterns without explicit demand forecasting and to cooperate with optimization-based passenger-to-vehicle assignment. Numerical experiments are conducted using New York City taxi data and an agent-based simulation tool. The ISR is compared to an alternative RLR approach named externally guided repositioning (EGR) and a benchmark joint optimization (JO) for passenger-to-vehicle assignment and repositioning. The results demonstrate the RLR approaches' substantial reductions in passenger wait times, over 50%, relative to the JO approach. The ISR's ability to bypass demand forecasting is also demonstrated as it maintains comparable performance to EGR in terms of average metrics. The results also demonstrate the model's transferability to evolving conditions, including unseen demand patterns, extended operational periods, and changes in the assignment strategy.
summary: Shared-use autonomous mobility services (SAMS) present new opportunities for improving accessible and demand-responsive mobility. A fundamental challenge that SAMS face is appropriate positioning of idle fleet vehicles to meet future demand - a problem that strongly impacts service quality and efficiency. This paper formulates SAMS fleet repositioning as a Markov Decision Process and presents a reinforcement learning-based repositioning (RLR) approach called integrated system-agent repositioning (ISR). The ISR learns a scalable fleet repositioning strategy in an integrated manner: learning to respond to evolving demand patterns without explicit demand forecasting and to cooperate with optimization-based passenger-to-vehicle assignment. Numerical experiments are conducted using New York City taxi data and an agent-based simulation tool. The ISR is compared to an alternative RLR approach named externally guided repositioning (EGR) and a benchmark joint optimization (JO) for passenger-to-vehicle assignment and repositioning. The results demonstrate the RLR approaches' substantial reductions in passenger wait times, over 50%, relative to the JO approach. The ISR's ability to bypass demand forecasting is also demonstrated as it maintains comparable performance to EGR in terms of average metrics. The results also demonstrate the model's transferability to evolving conditions, including unseen demand patterns, extended operational periods, and changes in the assignment strategy.
abstract_zh: 共享自动出行服务 (SAMS) 为改善无障碍和需求响应型出行提供了新的机遇。 SAMS 面临的一个根本挑战是适当定位闲置车队车辆以满足未来需求 - 这一问题严重影响服务质量和效率。本文将 SAMS 机队重新定位表述为马尔可夫决策过程，并提出了一种基于强化学习的重新定位 (RLR) 方法，称为集成系统代理重新定位 (ISR)。 ISR 以集成的方式学习可扩展的车队重新定位策略：学习在没有明确需求预测的情况下响应不断变化的需求模式，并与基于优化的乘客到车辆分配进行合作。使用纽约市出租车数据和基于代理的模拟工具进行数值实验。 ISR 与称为外部引导重新定位 (EGR) 的替代 RLR 方法以及用于乘客到车辆分配和重新定位的基准联合优化 (JO) 进行比较。结果表明，与 JO 方法相比，RLR 方法可大幅减少乘客等待时间，超过 50%。 ISR 绕过需求预测的能力也得到了证明，因为它在平均指标方面保持了与 EGR 相当的性能。结果还证明了该模型对于不断变化的条件的可移植性，包括看不见的需求模式、延长的运营周期和分配策略的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的共享自动驾驶车队重定位方法ISR，以提升服务效率并减少乘客等待时间。
AI.motivation: 共享自动驾驶出行服务面临如何高效定位闲置车辆以应对未来需求的挑战，传统方法依赖需求预测且效率低下。
AI.method: 将车队重定位建模为马尔可夫决策过程，设计集成系统-智能体重定位（ISR）方法，结合强化学习与基于优化的乘客-车辆分配策略，无需显式需求预测。
AI.result: 实验表明ISR使乘客等待时间较基准方法减少超50%，且在无需求预测情况下性能与对比方法EGR相当，模型具有应对动态需求的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: ISR方法通过强化学习实现了高效、可扩展的车队重定位，为共享自动驾驶服务提供了无需显式预测的优化方案。

authors_text: Emily Muller,Xu Zheng,Jer Hayes
title: Evaluation of the Synthetic Electronic Health Records
title_zh: 综合电子健康记录的评估
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.05400
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.05400
abstract: Generative models have been found effective for data synthesis due to their ability to capture complex underlying data distributions. The quality of generated data from these models is commonly evaluated by visual inspection for image datasets or downstream analytical tasks for tabular datasets. These evaluation methods neither measure the implicit data distribution nor consider the data privacy issues, and it remains an open question of how to compare and rank different generative models. Medical data can be sensitive, so it is of great importance to draw privacy concerns of patients while maintaining the data utility of the synthetic dataset. Beyond the utility evaluation, this work outlines two metrics called Similarity and Uniqueness for sample-wise assessment of synthetic datasets. We demonstrate the proposed notions with several state-of-the-art generative models to synthesise Cystic Fibrosis (CF) patients' electronic health records (EHRs), observing that the proposed metrics are suitable for synthetic data evaluation and generative model comparison.
summary: Generative models have been found effective for data synthesis due to their ability to capture complex underlying data distributions. The quality of generated data from these models is commonly evaluated by visual inspection for image datasets or downstream analytical tasks for tabular datasets. These evaluation methods neither measure the implicit data distribution nor consider the data privacy issues, and it remains an open question of how to compare and rank different generative models. Medical data can be sensitive, so it is of great importance to draw privacy concerns of patients while maintaining the data utility of the synthetic dataset. Beyond the utility evaluation, this work outlines two metrics called Similarity and Uniqueness for sample-wise assessment of synthetic datasets. We demonstrate the proposed notions with several state-of-the-art generative models to synthesise Cystic Fibrosis (CF) patients' electronic health records (EHRs), observing that the proposed metrics are suitable for synthetic data evaluation and generative model comparison.
abstract_zh: 由于生成模型能够捕获复杂的底层数据分布，因此已被发现对数据合成有效。这些模型生成的数据的质量通常通过图像数据集的目视检查或表格数据集的下游分析任务来评估。这些评估方法既没有测量隐式数据分布，也没有考虑数据隐私问题，如何对不同的生成模型进行比较和排序仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。医疗数据可能很敏感，因此在保持合成数据集的数据实用性的同时，吸引患者的隐私问题非常重要。除了效用评估之外，这项工作还概述了两个称为相似性和唯一性的指标，用于对合成数据集进行样本评估。我们用几种最先进的生成模型展示了所提出的概念，以综合囊性纤维化（CF）患者的电子健康记录（EHR），观察到所提出的指标适用于合成数据评估和生成模型比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新指标（相似性与唯一性）用于评估合成电子健康记录（EHR）数据的质量，并通过比较生成模型在囊性纤维化患者数据上的表现验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型评估方法无法衡量隐含数据分布或隐私风险，且缺乏统一的模型比较标准，尤其在医疗数据这种敏感领域需兼顾数据效用与隐私保护。
AI.method: 设计样本级评估指标Similarity（数据分布相似性）和Uniqueness（数据唯一性），并基于CF患者EHR数据测试多种先进生成模型的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明所提指标能有效评估合成数据质量，且可作为不同生成模型的比较依据，验证了其在医疗数据合成中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的相似性与唯一性指标为合成医疗数据评估提供了新方法，在保证数据效用的同时可量化隐私风险，有助于优化生成模型的选择与改进。

search_text: Evaluation of the Synthetic Electronic Health Records 综合电子健康记录的评估 Generative models have been found effective for data synthesis due to their ability to capture complex underlying data distributions. The quality of generated data from these models is commonly evaluated by visual inspection for image datasets or downstream analytical tasks for tabular datasets. These evaluation methods neither measure the implicit data distribution nor consider the data privacy issues, and it remains an open question of how to compare and rank different generative models. Medical data can be sensitive, so it is of great importance to draw privacy concerns of patients while maintaining the data utility of the synthetic dataset. Beyond the utility evaluation, this work outlines two metrics called Similarity and Uniqueness for sample-wise assessment of synthetic datasets. We demonstrate the proposed notions with several state-of-the-art generative models to synthesise Cystic Fibrosis (CF) patients' electronic health records (EHRs), observing that the proposed metrics are suitable for synthetic data evaluation and generative model comparison. 由于生成模型能够捕获复杂的底层数据分布，因此已被发现对数据合成有效。这些模型生成的数据的质量通常通过图像数据集的目视检查或表格数据集的下游分析任务来评估。这些评估方法既没有测量隐式数据分布，也没有考虑数据隐私问题，如何对不同的生成模型进行比较和排序仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。医疗数据可能很敏感，因此在保持合成数据集的数据实用性的同时，吸引患者的隐私问题非常重要。除了效用评估之外，这项工作还概述了两个称为相似性和唯一性的指标，用于对合成数据集进行样本评估。我们用几种最先进的生成模型展示了所提出的概念，以综合囊性纤维化（CF）患者的电子健康记录（EHR），观察到所提出的指标适用于合成数据评估和生成模型比较。 本文提出两种新指标（相似性与唯一性）用于评估合成电子健康记录（EHR）数据的质量，并通过比较生成模型在囊性纤维化患者数据上的表现验证其有效性。 Emily Muller,Xu Zheng,Jer Hayes cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ruijie Wang,Zheng Li,Dachun Sun,Shengzhong Liu,Jinning Li,Bing Yin,Tarek Abdelzaher
title: Learning to Sample and Aggregate: Few-shot Reasoning over Temporal Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 学习采样和聚合：时态知识图上的小样本推理
comment: This paper is accepted by Neurips 2022
comments: This paper is accepted by Neurips 2022
abstract: In this paper, we investigate a realistic but underexplored problem, called few-shot temporal knowledge graph reasoning, that aims to predict future facts for newly emerging entities based on extremely limited observations in evolving graphs. It offers practical value in applications that need to derive instant new knowledge about new entities in temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) with minimal supervision. The challenges mainly come from the few-shot and time shift properties of new entities. First, the limited observations associated with them are insufficient for training a model from scratch. Second, the potentially dynamic distributions from the initially observable facts to the future facts ask for explicitly modeling the evolving characteristics of new entities. We correspondingly propose a novel Meta Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning (MetaTKGR) framework. Unlike prior work that relies on rigid neighborhood aggregation schemes to enhance low-data entity representation, MetaTKGR dynamically adjusts the strategies of sampling and aggregating neighbors from recent facts for new entities, through temporally supervised signals on future facts as instant feedback. Besides, such a meta temporal reasoning procedure goes beyond existing meta-learning paradigms on static knowledge graphs that fail to handle temporal adaptation with large entity variance. We further provide a theoretical analysis and propose a temporal adaptation regularizer to stabilize the meta temporal reasoning over time. Empirically, extensive experiments on three real-world TKGs demonstrate the superiority of MetaTKGR over state-of-the-art baselines by a large margin.
summary: In this paper, we investigate a realistic but underexplored problem, called few-shot temporal knowledge graph reasoning, that aims to predict future facts for newly emerging entities based on extremely limited observations in evolving graphs. It offers practical value in applications that need to derive instant new knowledge about new entities in temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) with minimal supervision. The challenges mainly come from the few-shot and time shift properties of new entities. First, the limited observations associated with them are insufficient for training a model from scratch. Second, the potentially dynamic distributions from the initially observable facts to the future facts ask for explicitly modeling the evolving characteristics of new entities. We correspondingly propose a novel Meta Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning (MetaTKGR) framework. Unlike prior work that relies on rigid neighborhood aggregation schemes to enhance low-data entity representation, MetaTKGR dynamically adjusts the strategies of sampling and aggregating neighbors from recent facts for new entities, through temporally supervised signals on future facts as instant feedback. Besides, such a meta temporal reasoning procedure goes beyond existing meta-learning paradigms on static knowledge graphs that fail to handle temporal adaptation with large entity variance. We further provide a theoretical analysis and propose a temporal adaptation regularizer to stabilize the meta temporal reasoning over time. Empirically, extensive experiments on three real-world TKGs demonstrate the superiority of MetaTKGR over state-of-the-art baselines by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一个现实但尚未充分探索的问题，称为少样本时间知识图推理，旨在根据演化图中极其有限的观察来预测新兴实体的未来事实。它为需要在最少监督的情况下获取有关时间知识图（TKG）中新实体的即时新知识的应用程序提供了实用价值。挑战主要来自新实体的少样本和时移特性。首先，与它们相关的有限观察不足以从头开始训练模型。其次，从最初可观察事实到未来事实的潜在动态分布要求对新实体的演变特征进行明确建模。我们相应地提出了一种新颖的元时态知识图推理（MetaTKGR）框架。与之前依靠严格邻域聚合方案来增强低数据实体表示的工作不同，MetaTKGR 通过对未来事实的时间监督信号作为即时反馈，动态调整从新实体的最新事实中采样和聚合邻居的策略。此外，这种元时间推理过程超越了静态知识图上现有的元学习范式，这些范式无法处理具有大实体方差的时间适应。我们进一步提供了理论分析，并提出了一种时间适应正则化器，以随着时间的推移稳定元时间推理。根据经验，对三个现实世界 TKG 的广泛实验证明了 MetaTKGR 比最先进的基线有很大的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究时态知识图谱中的少样本推理问题，旨在基于极少量观察预测新实体的未来事实。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理新实体数据稀缺及动态分布变化的挑战，需设计适应时序演变的少样本推理框架。
AI.method: 提出MetaTKGR框架，通过动态调整邻域采样与聚合策略，并结合未来事实的时间监督信号进行元学习，辅以时间适应正则化器稳定训练。
AI.result: 在三个真实时态知识图谱数据集上显著优于现有先进方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: MetaTKGR通过动态策略调整和时序建模有效解决了少样本与时序适应问题，为时态知识图谱推理提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning to Sample and Aggregate: Few-shot Reasoning over Temporal Knowledge Graphs 学习采样和聚合：时态知识图上的小样本推理 In this paper, we investigate a realistic but underexplored problem, called few-shot temporal knowledge graph reasoning, that aims to predict future facts for newly emerging entities based on extremely limited observations in evolving graphs. It offers practical value in applications that need to derive instant new knowledge about new entities in temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) with minimal supervision. The challenges mainly come from the few-shot and time shift properties of new entities. First, the limited observations associated with them are insufficient for training a model from scratch. Second, the potentially dynamic distributions from the initially observable facts to the future facts ask for explicitly modeling the evolving characteristics of new entities. We correspondingly propose a novel Meta Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning (MetaTKGR) framework. Unlike prior work that relies on rigid neighborhood aggregation schemes to enhance low-data entity representation, MetaTKGR dynamically adjusts the strategies of sampling and aggregating neighbors from recent facts for new entities, through temporally supervised signals on future facts as instant feedback. Besides, such a meta temporal reasoning procedure goes beyond existing meta-learning paradigms on static knowledge graphs that fail to handle temporal adaptation with large entity variance. We further provide a theoretical analysis and propose a temporal adaptation regularizer to stabilize the meta temporal reasoning over time. Empirically, extensive experiments on three real-world TKGs demonstrate the superiority of MetaTKGR over state-of-the-art baselines by a large margin. 在本文中，我们研究了一个现实但尚未充分探索的问题，称为少样本时间知识图推理，旨在根据演化图中极其有限的观察来预测新兴实体的未来事实。它为需要在最少监督的情况下获取有关时间知识图（TKG）中新实体的即时新知识的应用程序提供了实用价值。挑战主要来自新实体的少样本和时移特性。首先，与它们相关的有限观察不足以从头开始训练模型。其次，从最初可观察事实到未来事实的潜在动态分布要求对新实体的演变特征进行明确建模。我们相应地提出了一种新颖的元时态知识图推理（MetaTKGR）框架。与之前依靠严格邻域聚合方案来增强低数据实体表示的工作不同，MetaTKGR 通过对未来事实的时间监督信号作为即时反馈，动态调整从新实体的最新事实中采样和聚合邻居的策略。此外，这种元时间推理过程超越了静态知识图上现有的元学习范式，这些范式无法处理具有大实体方差的时间适应。我们进一步提供了理论分析，并提出了一种时间适应正则化器，以随着时间的推移稳定元时间推理。根据经验，对三个现实世界 TKG 的广泛实验证明了 MetaTKGR 比最先进的基线有很大的优越性。 本文研究时态知识图谱中的少样本推理问题，旨在基于极少量观察预测新实体的未来事实。 Ruijie Wang,Zheng Li,Dachun Sun,Shengzhong Liu,Jinning Li,Bing Yin,Tarek Abdelzaher cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Ho Hin Lee,Yucheng Tang,Han Liu,Yubo Fan,Leon Y. Cai,Qi Yang,Xin Yu,Shunxing Bao,Yuankai Huo,Bennett A. Landman
title: Adaptive Contrastive Learning with Dynamic Correlation for Multi-Phase Organ Segmentation
title_zh: 具有动态相关性的自适应对比学习用于多相器官分割
abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated the superior performance of introducing ``scan-wise" contrast labels into contrastive learning for multi-organ segmentation on multi-phase computed tomography (CT). However, such scan-wise labels are limited: (1) a coarse classification, which could not capture the fine-grained ``organ-wise" contrast variations across all organs; (2) the label (i.e., contrast phase) is typically manually provided, which is error-prone and may introduce manual biases of defining phases. In this paper, we propose a novel data-driven contrastive loss function that adapts the similar/dissimilar contrast relationship between samples in each minibatch at organ-level. Specifically, as variable levels of contrast exist between organs, we hypothesis that the contrast differences in the organ-level can bring additional context for defining representations in the latent space. An organ-wise contrast correlation matrix is computed with mean organ intensities under one-hot attention maps. The goal of adapting the organ-driven correlation matrix is to model variable levels of feature separability at different phases. We evaluate our proposed approach on multi-organ segmentation with both non-contrast CT (NCCT) datasets and the MICCAI 2015 BTCV Challenge contrast-enhance CT (CECT) datasets. Compared to the state-of-the-art approaches, our proposed contrastive loss yields a substantial and significant improvement of 1.41% (from 0.923 to 0.936, p-value$<$0.01) and 2.02% (from 0.891 to 0.910, p-value$<$0.01) on mean Dice scores across all organs with respect to NCCT and CECT cohorts. We further assess the trained model performance with the MICCAI 2021 FLARE Challenge CECT datasets and achieve a substantial improvement of mean Dice score from 0.927 to 0.934 (p-value$<$0.01). The code is available at: https://github.com/MASILab/DCC_CL
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated the superior performance of introducing ``scan-wise" contrast labels into contrastive learning for multi-organ segmentation on multi-phase computed tomography (CT). However, such scan-wise labels are limited: (1) a coarse classification, which could not capture the fine-grained ``organ-wise" contrast variations across all organs; (2) the label (i.e., contrast phase) is typically manually provided, which is error-prone and may introduce manual biases of defining phases. In this paper, we propose a novel data-driven contrastive loss function that adapts the similar/dissimilar contrast relationship between samples in each minibatch at organ-level. Specifically, as variable levels of contrast exist between organs, we hypothesis that the contrast differences in the organ-level can bring additional context for defining representations in the latent space. An organ-wise contrast correlation matrix is computed with mean organ intensities under one-hot attention maps. The goal of adapting the organ-driven correlation matrix is to model variable levels of feature separability at different phases. We evaluate our proposed approach on multi-organ segmentation with both non-contrast CT (NCCT) datasets and the MICCAI 2015 BTCV Challenge contrast-enhance CT (CECT) datasets. Compared to the state-of-the-art approaches, our proposed contrastive loss yields a substantial and significant improvement of 1.41% (from 0.923 to 0.936, p-value$<$0.01) and 2.02% (from 0.891 to 0.910, p-value$<$0.01) on mean Dice scores across all organs with respect to NCCT and CECT cohorts. We further assess the trained model performance with the MICCAI 2021 FLARE Challenge CECT datasets and achieve a substantial improvement of mean Dice score from 0.927 to 0.934 (p-value$<$0.01). The code is available at: https://github.com/MASILab/DCC_CL
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，将“扫描方式”对比标签引入多相计算机断层扫描（CT）多器官分割的对比学习中具有优越的性能。然而，这种扫描方式标签有局限性：（1）粗分类，无法捕获所有器官的细粒度“器官方式”对比变化； (2) 标签（即对比相）通常是手动提供的，这很容易出错，并且可能会引入定义相的手动偏差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数据驱动的对比损失函数，该函数在器官水平上适应每个小批量中样本之间的相似/不相似对比关系。具体来说，由于器官之间存在不同水平的对比度，我们假设器官水平的对比度差异可以为定义潜在空间中的表示带来额外的背景。器官方面的对比相关矩阵是用单热注意力图下的平均器官强度计算的。适应器官驱动相关矩阵的目标是对不同阶段的特征可分离性的可变水平进行建模。我们使用非对比 CT (NCCT) 数据集和 MICCAI 2015 BTCV Challenge 对比增强 CT (CECT) 数据集评估了我们提出的多器官分割方法。与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的对比损失使 NCCT 和 CECT 队列中所有器官的平均 Dice 分数显着提高了 1.41%（从 0.923 到 0.936，p 值 <0.01 美元）和 2.02%（从 0.891 到 0.910，p 值 <0.01 美元）。我们使用 MICCAI 2021 FLARE Challenge CECT 数据集进一步评估训练后的模型性能，并将平均 Dice 得分从 0.927 大幅提高到 0.934（p 值 <0.01 美元）。代码位于：https://github.com/MASILab/DCC_CL

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应对比学习方法，通过动态相关性建模，改进多期CT图像的多器官分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扫描级对比标签的方法存在分类粗粒度、依赖人工标注且易引入偏差的问题，难以捕捉器官级的细粒度对比差异。
AI.method: 设计数据驱动的对比损失函数，通过计算器官级均值强度的一热编码注意力图，构建动态器官对比相关性矩阵，自适应建模不同阶段的特征可分性。
AI.result: 在NCCT和CECT数据集上，平均Dice分数分别提升1.41%和2.02%（p<0.01），在FLARE挑战赛数据集上提升0.7%（p<0.01）。
AI.conclusion: 器官级动态对比相关性建模有效提升了多期CT器官分割的表示学习能力，优于现有最先进方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应对比学习方法，通过动态相关性建模，改进多期CT图像的多器官分割性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于扫描级对比标签的方法存在分类粗粒度、依赖人工标注且易引入偏差的问题，难以捕捉器官级的细粒度对比差异。
ai_content.method: 设计数据驱动的对比损失函数，通过计算器官级均值强度的一热编码注意力图，构建动态器官对比相关性矩阵，自适应建模不同阶段的特征可分性。
ai_content.result: 在NCCT和CECT数据集上，平均Dice分数分别提升1.41%和2.02%（p<0.01），在FLARE挑战赛数据集上提升0.7%（p<0.01）。
ai_content.conclusion: 器官级动态对比相关性建模有效提升了多期CT器官分割的表示学习能力，优于现有最先进方法。

search_text: Adaptive Contrastive Learning with Dynamic Correlation for Multi-Phase Organ Segmentation 具有动态相关性的自适应对比学习用于多相器官分割 Recent studies have demonstrated the superior performance of introducing ``scan-wise" contrast labels into contrastive learning for multi-organ segmentation on multi-phase computed tomography (CT). However, such scan-wise labels are limited: (1) a coarse classification, which could not capture the fine-grained ``organ-wise" contrast variations across all organs; (2) the label (i.e., contrast phase) is typically manually provided, which is error-prone and may introduce manual biases of defining phases. In this paper, we propose a novel data-driven contrastive loss function that adapts the similar/dissimilar contrast relationship between samples in each minibatch at organ-level. Specifically, as variable levels of contrast exist between organs, we hypothesis that the contrast differences in the organ-level can bring additional context for defining representations in the latent space. An organ-wise contrast correlation matrix is computed with mean organ intensities under one-hot attention maps. The goal of adapting the organ-driven correlation matrix is to model variable levels of feature separability at different phases. We evaluate our proposed approach on multi-organ segmentation with both non-contrast CT (NCCT) datasets and the MICCAI 2015 BTCV Challenge contrast-enhance CT (CECT) datasets. Compared to the state-of-the-art approaches, our proposed contrastive loss yields a substantial and significant improvement of 1.41% (from 0.923 to 0.936, p-value$<$0.01) and 2.02% (from 0.891 to 0.910, p-value$<$0.01) on mean Dice scores across all organs with respect to NCCT and CECT cohorts. We further assess the trained model performance with the MICCAI 2021 FLARE Challenge CECT datasets and achieve a substantial improvement of mean Dice score from 0.927 to 0.934 (p-value$<$0.01). The code is available at: https://github.com/MASILab/DCC_CL 最近的研究表明，将“扫描方式”对比标签引入多相计算机断层扫描（CT）多器官分割的对比学习中具有优越的性能。然而，这种扫描方式标签有局限性：（1）粗分类，无法捕获所有器官的细粒度“器官方式”对比变化； (2) 标签（即对比相）通常是手动提供的，这很容易出错，并且可能会引入定义相的手动偏差。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数据驱动的对比损失函数，该函数在器官水平上适应每个小批量中样本之间的相似/不相似对比关系。具体来说，由于器官之间存在不同水平的对比度，我们假设器官水平的对比度差异可以为定义潜在空间中的表示带来额外的背景。器官方面的对比相关矩阵是用单热注意力图下的平均器官强度计算的。适应器官驱动相关矩阵的目标是对不同阶段的特征可分离性的可变水平进行建模。我们使用非对比 CT (NCCT) 数据集和 MICCAI 2015 BTCV Challenge 对比增强 CT (CECT) 数据集评估了我们提出的多器官分割方法。与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的对比损失使 NCCT 和 CECT 队列中所有器官的平均 Dice 分数显着提高了 1.41%（从 0.923 到 0.936，p 值 <0.01 美元）和 2.02%（从 0.891 到 0.910，p 值 <0.01 美元）。我们使用 MICCAI 2021 FLARE Challenge CECT 数据集进一步评估训练后的模型性能，并将平均 Dice 得分从 0.927 大幅提高到 0.934（p 值 <0.01 美元）。代码位于：https://github.com/MASILab/DCC_CL 本文提出一种自适应对比学习方法，通过动态相关性建模，改进多期CT图像的多器官分割性能。 Ho Hin Lee,Yucheng Tang,Han Liu,Yubo Fan,Leon Y. Cai,Qi Yang,Xin Yu,Shunxing Bao,Yuankai Huo,Bennett A. Landman cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Keivan Nalaie,Rong Zheng
title: AttTrack: Online Deep Attention Transfer for Multi-object Tracking
title_zh: AttTrack：用于多目标跟踪的在线深度注意力转移
abstract: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is a vital component of intelligent video analytics applications such as surveillance and autonomous driving. The time and storage complexity required to execute deep learning models for visual object tracking hinder their adoption on embedded devices with limited computing power. In this paper, we aim to accelerate MOT by transferring the knowledge from high-level features of a complex network (teacher) to a lightweight network (student) at both training and inference times. The proposed AttTrack framework has three key components: 1) cross-model feature learning to align intermediate representations from the teacher and student models, 2) interleaving the execution of the two models at inference time, and 3) incorporating the updated predictions from the teacher model as prior knowledge to assist the student model. Experiments on pedestrian tracking tasks are conducted on the MOT17 and MOT15 datasets using two different object detection backbones YOLOv5 and DLA34 show that AttTrack can significantly improve student model tracking performance while sacrificing only minor degradation of tracking speed.
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is a vital component of intelligent video analytics applications such as surveillance and autonomous driving. The time and storage complexity required to execute deep learning models for visual object tracking hinder their adoption on embedded devices with limited computing power. In this paper, we aim to accelerate MOT by transferring the knowledge from high-level features of a complex network (teacher) to a lightweight network (student) at both training and inference times. The proposed AttTrack framework has three key components: 1) cross-model feature learning to align intermediate representations from the teacher and student models, 2) interleaving the execution of the two models at inference time, and 3) incorporating the updated predictions from the teacher model as prior knowledge to assist the student model. Experiments on pedestrian tracking tasks are conducted on the MOT17 and MOT15 datasets using two different object detection backbones YOLOv5 and DLA34 show that AttTrack can significantly improve student model tracking performance while sacrificing only minor degradation of tracking speed.
abstract_zh: 多目标跟踪 (MOT) 是监控和自动驾驶等智能视频分析应用的重要组成部分。执行用于视觉对象跟踪的深度学习模型所需的时间和存储复杂性阻碍了它们在计算能力有限的嵌入式设备上的采用。在本文中，我们的目标是通过在训练和推理时将知识从复杂网络（教师）的高级特征转移到轻量级网络（学生）来加速 MOT。所提出的 AttTrack 框架具有三个关键组成部分：1）跨模型特征学习，以对齐教师和学生模型的中间表示，2）在推理时交错执行两个模型，3）将教师模型的更新预测作为先验知识纳入以协助学生模型。使用两种不同的对象检测主干 YOLOv5 和 DLA34 在 MOT17 和 MOT15 数据集上进行行人跟踪任务实验表明，AttTrack 可以显着提高学生模型跟踪性能，同时仅牺牲跟踪速度的轻微下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AttTrack框架，通过知识蒸馏将复杂网络的高层特征知识迁移至轻量网络，以加速多目标跟踪任务在嵌入式设备上的应用。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在多目标跟踪中的计算和存储复杂度限制了其在计算能力有限的嵌入式设备上的部署，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: AttTrack包含三部分：跨模型特征对齐、推理时双模型交错执行、利用教师模型预测作为学生模型的先验知识。
AI.result: 在MOT17和MOT15数据集上，使用YOLOv5和DLA34主干网络验证，学生模型跟踪性能显著提升且速度仅轻微下降。
AI.conclusion: AttTrack通过在线深度注意力迁移有效提升轻量网络性能，为嵌入式设备的多目标跟踪提供可行方案。

authors_text: Ayman Beghdadi,Malik Mallem,Lotfi Beji
title: D2SLAM: Semantic visual SLAM based on the Depth-related influence on object interactions for Dynamic environments
title_zh: D2SLAM：基于动态环境中对象交互的深度相关影响的语义视觉 SLAM
abstract: Considering the scene's dynamics is the most effective solution to obtain an accurate perception of unknown environments for real vSLAM applications. Most existing methods attempt to address the non-rigid scene assumption by combining geometric and semantic approaches to determine dynamic elements that lack generalization and scene awareness. We propose a novel approach that overcomes these limitations by using scene-depth information to improve the accuracy of the localization from geometric and semantic modules. In addition, we use depth information to determine an area of influence of dynamic objects through an Object Interaction Module that estimates the state of both non-matched and non-segmented key points. The obtained results on TUM-RGBD dataset clearly demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art.
summary: Considering the scene's dynamics is the most effective solution to obtain an accurate perception of unknown environments for real vSLAM applications. Most existing methods attempt to address the non-rigid scene assumption by combining geometric and semantic approaches to determine dynamic elements that lack generalization and scene awareness. We propose a novel approach that overcomes these limitations by using scene-depth information to improve the accuracy of the localization from geometric and semantic modules. In addition, we use depth information to determine an area of influence of dynamic objects through an Object Interaction Module that estimates the state of both non-matched and non-segmented key points. The obtained results on TUM-RGBD dataset clearly demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 考虑场景的动态性是真实 vSLAM 应用获得未知环境准确感知的最有效解决方案。大多数现有方法试图通过结合几何和语义方法来解决非刚性场景假设，以确定缺乏泛化和场景感知的动态元素。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过使用场景深度信息来克服这些限制，以提高几何和语义模块的定位准确性。此外，我们使用深度信息通过对象交互模块来确定动态对象的影响区域，该模块估计非匹配和非分段关键点的状态。在 TUM-RGBD 数据集上获得的结果清楚地表明所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度信息影响的语义视觉SLAM方法D2SLAM，用于动态环境中的精准定位与建图。
AI.motivation: 现有动态环境SLAM方法在非刚性场景处理中存在泛化能力不足和场景感知缺失的问题，需结合几何与语义信息提升动态元素识别准确性。
AI.method: 通过深度信息优化几何与语义模块的定位精度，并设计对象交互模块，利用深度数据估计未匹配和未分割关键点的动态物体影响区域。
AI.result: 在TUM-RGBD数据集上的实验表明，D2SLAM方法在定位精度上优于当前最先进的SLAM技术。
AI.conclusion: D2SLAM通过深度信息与对象交互建模有效提升了动态环境下的语义SLAM性能，验证了方法的优越性。

The obtained results on TUM-RGBD dataset clearly demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art. 考虑场景的动态性是真实 vSLAM 应用获得未知环境准确感知的最有效解决方案。大多数现有方法试图通过结合几何和语义方法来解决非刚性场景假设，以确定缺乏泛化和场景感知的动态元素。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过使用场景深度信息来克服这些限制，以提高几何和语义模块的定位准确性。此外，我们使用深度信息通过对象交互模块来确定动态对象的影响区域，该模块估计非匹配和非分段关键点的状态。在 TUM-RGBD 数据集上获得的结果清楚地表明所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于深度信息影响的语义视觉SLAM方法D2SLAM，用于动态环境中的精准定位与建图。 Ayman Beghdadi,Malik Mallem,Lotfi Beji cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Jungkyu Park,Jakub Chłędowski,Stanisław Jastrzębski,Jan Witowski,Yanqi Xu,Linda Du,Sushma Gaddam,Eric Kim,Alana Lewin,Ujas Parikh,Anastasia Plaunova,Sardius Chen,Alexandra Millet,James Park,Kristine Pysarenko,Shalin Patel,Julia Goldberg,Melanie Wegener,Linda Moy,Laura Heacock,Beatriu Reig,Krzysztof J. Geras
title: An efficient deep neural network to find small objects in large 3D images
title_zh: 用于在大型 3D 图像中查找小物体的高效深度神经网络
abstract: 3D imaging enables accurate diagnosis by providing spatial information about organ anatomy. However, using 3D images to train AI models is computationally challenging because they consist of 10x or 100x more pixels than their 2D counterparts. To be trained with high-resolution 3D images, convolutional neural networks resort to downsampling them or projecting them to 2D. We propose an effective alternative, a neural network that enables efficient classification of full-resolution 3D medical images. Compared to off-the-shelf convolutional neural networks, our network, 3D Globally-Aware Multiple Instance Classifier (3D-GMIC), uses 77.98%-90.05% less GPU memory and 91.23%-96.02% less computation. While it is trained only with image-level labels, without segmentation labels, it explains its predictions by providing pixel-level saliency maps. On a dataset collected at NYU Langone Health, including 85,526 patients with full-field 2D mammography (FFDM), synthetic 2D mammography, and 3D mammography, 3D-GMIC achieves an AUC of 0.831 (95% CI: 0.769-0.887) in classifying breasts with malignant findings using 3D mammography. This is comparable to the performance of GMIC on FFDM (0.816, 95% CI: 0.737-0.878) and synthetic 2D (0.826, 95% CI: 0.754-0.884), which demonstrates that 3D-GMIC successfully classified large 3D images despite focusing computation on a smaller percentage of its input compared to GMIC. Therefore, 3D-GMIC identifies and utilizes extremely small regions of interest from 3D images consisting of hundreds of millions of pixels, dramatically reducing associated computational challenges. 3D-GMIC generalizes well to BCS-DBT, an external dataset from Duke University Hospital, achieving an AUC of 0.848 (95% CI: 0.798-0.896).

This is comparable to the performance of GMIC on FFDM (0.816, 95% CI: 0.737-0.878) and synthetic 2D (0.826, 95% CI: 0.754-0.884), which demonstrates that 3D-GMIC successfully classified large 3D images despite focusing computation on a smaller percentage of its input compared to GMIC. abstract_zh: 3D 成像通过提供有关器官解剖结构的空间信息来实现准确诊断。然而，使用 3D 图像来训练 AI 模型在计算上具有挑战性，因为它们包含的像素比 2D 图像多 10 倍或 100 倍。为了使用高分辨率 3D 图像进行训练，卷积神经网络会对其进行下采样或将其投影为 2D。我们提出了一种有效的替代方案，即一种能够对全分辨率 3D 医学图像进行有效分类的神经网络。与现成的卷积神经网络相比，我们的网络 3D 全局感知多实例分类器 (3D-GMIC) 使用的 GPU 内存减少了 77.98%-90.05%，计算量减少了 91.23%-96.02%。虽然它仅使用图像级标签进行训练，没有分割标签，但它通过提供像素级显着性图来解释其预测。在 NYU Langone Health 收集的数据集上，包括 85,526 名接受全视野 2D 乳房 X 光检查 (FFDM)、合成 2D 乳房 X 光检查和 3D 乳房 X 光检查的患者，3D-GMIC 在使用 3D 乳房 X 光检查对有恶性发现的乳房进行分类时，AUC 为 0.831 (95% CI: 0.769-0.887)。这与 GMIC 在 FFDM（0.816，95% CI：0.737-0.878）和合成 2D（0.826，95% CI：0.754-0.884）上的性能相当，这表明 3D-GMIC 成功地对大型 3D 图像进行了分类，尽管与 GMIC 相比，3D-GMIC 将计算集中在其输入的较小百分比上。因此，3D-GMIC 可识别并利用由数亿像素组成的 3D 图像中极小的感兴趣区域，从而显着减少相关的计算挑战。 3D-GMIC 可以很好地推广到杜克大学医院的外部数据集 BCS-DBT，其 AUC 为 0.848（95% CI：0.798-0.896）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的深度神经网络3D-GMIC，用于在高分辨率3D医学图像中检测微小病变区域。
AI.motivation: 3D医学图像因像素数量远超2D图像而面临计算资源消耗大的挑战，传统方法通过降采样或投影至2D处理效率低下，且需分割标签。
AI.method: 设计3D-GMIC网络架构，在无需分割标签的情况下直接处理全分辨率3D图像，通过关注输入中较小比例的关键区域实现计算效率提升，并生成像素级显著性图解释预测结果。
AI.result: 在包含85,526例患者的NYU数据集上，3D-GMIC在3D乳腺X线分类任务中达到AUC 0.831，与2D方法性能相当；在Duke外部数据集上AUC为0.848，验证了模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 3D-GMIC通过聚焦微小感兴趣区域显著降低计算成本，有效解决了高分辨率3D图像的分类难题，为医学影像分析提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Allen Nie,Yannis Flet-Berliac,Deon R. Jordan,William Steenbergen,Emma Brunskill
title: Data-Efficient Pipeline for Offline Reinforcement Learning with Limited Data
title_zh: 用于有限数据的离线强化学习的数据高效管道
comment: 32 pages. Published at NeurIPS 2022. Presented at RLDM 2022
comments: 32 pages. Published at NeurIPS 2022. Presented at RLDM 2022
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) can be used to improve future performance by leveraging historical data. There exist many different algorithms for offline RL, and it is well recognized that these algorithms, and their hyperparameter settings, can lead to decision policies with substantially differing performance. This prompts the need for pipelines that allow practitioners to systematically perform algorithm-hyperparameter selection for their setting. Critically, in most real-world settings, this pipeline must only involve the use of historical data. Inspired by statistical model selection methods for supervised learning, we introduce a task- and method-agnostic pipeline for automatically training, comparing, selecting, and deploying the best policy when the provided dataset is limited in size. In particular, our work highlights the importance of performing multiple data splits to produce more reliable algorithm-hyperparameter selection. While this is a common approach in supervised learning, to our knowledge, this has not been discussed in detail in the offline RL setting. We show it can have substantial impacts when the dataset is small. Compared to alternate approaches, our proposed pipeline outputs higher-performing deployed policies from a broad range of offline policy learning algorithms and across various simulation domains in healthcare, education, and robotics. This work contributes toward the development of a general-purpose meta-algorithm for automatic algorithm-hyperparameter selection for offline RL.

In particular, our work highlights the importance of performing multiple data splits to produce more reliable algorithm-hyperparameter selection. While this is a common approach in supervised learning, to our knowledge, this has not been discussed in detail in the offline RL setting. Compared to alternate approaches, our proposed pipeline outputs higher-performing deployed policies from a broad range of offline policy learning algorithms and across various simulation domains in healthcare, education, and robotics. abstract_zh: 离线强化学习 (RL) 可用于通过利用历史数据来提高未来的性能。离线强化学习存在许多不同的算法，众所周知，这些算法及其超参数设置可能会导致决策策略具有显着不同的性能。这提示需要允许从业者为其设置系统地执行算法超参数选择的管道。至关重要的是，在大多数现实环境中，该管道必须仅涉及历史数据的使用。受监督学习统计模型选择方法的启发，我们引入了一个与任务和方法无关的管道，用于在提供的数据集大小有限时自动训练、比较、选择和部署最佳策略。特别是，我们的工作强调了执行多个数据分割以产生更可靠的算法超参数选择的重要性。虽然这是监督学习中的常见方法，但据我们所知，这在离线 RL 设置中尚未详细讨论。我们证明，当数据集较小时，它可以产生重大影响。与替代方法相比，我们提出的管道从广泛的离线策略学习算法以及医疗保健、教育和机器人领域的各个模拟领域输出性能更高的部署策略。这项工作有助于开发一种通用元算法，用于离线强化学习的自动算法超参数选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于数据量有限的离线强化学习的高效流程，通过系统化选择算法和超参数以提高策略性能。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习算法的性能受超参数影响显著，但缺乏系统化的流程在有限历史数据下进行算法-超参数选择，导致结果不可靠。
AI.method: 受监督学习模型选择方法启发，设计一个任务无关的自动化流程，通过多次数据分割进行策略训练、比较和选择，提升小数据场景下的决策可靠性。
AI.result: 在医疗、教育和机器人等多领域模拟中，该流程相比其他方法能从多种离线算法中输出更高性能的部署策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文为离线强化学习提供了通用的元算法框架，推动了自动化的超参数选择方法在数据受限场景下的应用发展。

result: 在医疗、教育和机器人等多领域模拟中，该流程相比其他方法能从多种离线算法中输出更高性能的部署策略。
conclusion: 本文为离线强化学习提供了通用的元算法框架，推动了自动化的超参数选择方法在数据受限场景下的应用发展。
search_text: Data-Efficient Pipeline for Offline Reinforcement Learning with Limited Data 用于有限数据的离线强化学习的数据高效管道 Offline reinforcement learning (RL) can be used to improve future performance by leveraging historical data. There exist many different algorithms for offline RL, and it is well recognized that these algorithms, and their hyperparameter settings, can lead to decision policies with substantially differing performance. This prompts the need for pipelines that allow practitioners to systematically perform algorithm-hyperparameter selection for their setting. Critically, in most real-world settings, this pipeline must only involve the use of historical data. Inspired by statistical model selection methods for supervised learning, we introduce a task- and method-agnostic pipeline for automatically training, comparing, selecting, and deploying the best policy when the provided dataset is limited in size. In particular, our work highlights the importance of performing multiple data splits to produce more reliable algorithm-hyperparameter selection. While this is a common approach in supervised learning, to our knowledge, this has not been discussed in detail in the offline RL setting. We show it can have substantial impacts when the dataset is small. Compared to alternate approaches, our proposed pipeline outputs higher-performing deployed policies from a broad range of offline policy learning algorithms and across various simulation domains in healthcare, education, and robotics. This work contributes toward the development of a general-purpose meta-algorithm for automatic algorithm-hyperparameter selection for offline RL. 离线强化学习 (RL) 可用于通过利用历史数据来提高未来的性能。离线强化学习存在许多不同的算法，众所周知，这些算法及其超参数设置可能会导致决策策略具有显着不同的性能。这提示需要允许从业者为其设置系统地执行算法超参数选择的管道。至关重要的是，在大多数现实环境中，该管道必须仅涉及历史数据的使用。受监督学习统计模型选择方法的启发，我们引入了一个与任务和方法无关的管道，用于在提供的数据集大小有限时自动训练、比较、选择和部署最佳策略。特别是，我们的工作强调了执行多个数据分割以产生更可靠的算法超参数选择的重要性。虽然这是监督学习中的常见方法，但据我们所知，这在离线 RL 设置中尚未详细讨论。我们证明，当数据集较小时，它可以产生重大影响。与替代方法相比，我们提出的管道从广泛的离线策略学习算法以及医疗保健、教育和机器人领域的各个模拟领域输出性能更高的部署策略。这项工作有助于开发一种通用元算法，用于离线强化学习的自动算法超参数选择。 本文提出了一种适用于数据量有限的离线强化学习的高效流程，通过系统化选择算法和超参数以提高策略性能。 Allen Nie,Yannis Flet-Berliac,Deon R. Jordan,William Steenbergen,Emma Brunskill cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO,stat.ML

authors_text: Amnon Attali,Stav Ashur,Isaac Burton Love,Courtney McBeth,James Motes,Diane Uwacu,Marco Morales,Nancy M. Amato
title: Evaluating Guiding Spaces for Motion Planning
title_zh: 评估运动规划的引导空间
comment: Accepted at IROS 2022, Workshop for Evaluating Motion Planning Performance
comments: Accepted at IROS 2022, Workshop for Evaluating Motion Planning Performance
abstract: Randomized sampling based algorithms are widely used in robot motion planning due to the problem's intractability, and are experimentally effective on a wide range of problem instances. Most variants do not sample uniformly at random, and instead bias their sampling using various heuristics for determining which samples will provide more information, or are more likely to participate in the final solution. In this work, we define the \emph{motion planning guiding space}, which encapsulates many seemingly distinct prior works under the same framework. In addition, we suggest an information theoretic method to evaluate guided planning which places the focus on the quality of the resulting biased sampling. Finally, we analyze several motion planning algorithms in order to demonstrate the applicability of our definition and its evaluation.
summary: Randomized sampling based algorithms are widely used in robot motion planning due to the problem's intractability, and are experimentally effective on a wide range of problem instances. Most variants do not sample uniformly at random, and instead bias their sampling using various heuristics for determining which samples will provide more information, or are more likely to participate in the final solution. In this work, we define the \emph{motion planning guiding space}, which encapsulates many seemingly distinct prior works under the same framework. In addition, we suggest an information theoretic method to evaluate guided planning which places the focus on the quality of the resulting biased sampling. Finally, we analyze several motion planning algorithms in order to demonstrate the applicability of our definition and its evaluation.
abstract_zh: 由于问题的棘手性，基于随机采样的算法被广泛应用于机器人运动规划中，并且在广泛的问题实例上经过实验证明是有效的。大多数变体不会随机均匀采样，而是使用各种启发式方法对采样进行偏差，以确定哪些样本将提供更多信息，或者更有可能参与最终解决方案。在这项工作中，我们定义了\emph{运动规划引导空间}，它在同一框架下封装了许多看似不同的先前工作。此外，我们建议采用信息论方法来评估指导规划，该方法将重点放在所产生的有偏差抽样的质量上。最后，我们分析了几种运动规划算法，以证明我们的定义及其评估的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在定义运动规划中的引导空间，并提出基于信息论的评估方法以优化有偏采样策略。
AI.motivation: 现有运动规划算法依赖启发式有偏采样，但缺乏统一的评估框架，难以量化采样质量，限制了算法优化。
AI.method: 提出运动规划引导空间框架，整合多种先前方法；设计信息论评估指标，量化有偏采样的信息增益，并通过多算法实验验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 通过对比实验验证了引导空间框架的普适性，信息论评估方法能有效区分不同采样策略的质量差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的引导空间框架和评估方法为运动规划算法优化提供了理论依据，有助于设计更高效的采样策略。

authors_text: Zhewei Sun,Yang Xu
title: Tracing Semantic Variation in Slang
title_zh: 追踪俚语中的语义变化
abstract: The meaning of a slang term can vary in different communities. However, slang semantic variation is not well understood and under-explored in the natural language processing of slang. One existing view argues that slang semantic variation is driven by culture-dependent communicative needs. An alternative view focuses on slang's social functions suggesting that the desire to foster semantic distinction may have led to the historical emergence of community-specific slang senses. We explore these theories using computational models and test them against historical slang dictionary entries, with a focus on characterizing regularity in the geographical variation of slang usages attested in the US and the UK over the past two centuries. We show that our models are able to predict the regional identity of emerging slang word meanings from historical slang records. We offer empirical evidence that both communicative need and semantic distinction play a role in the variation of slang meaning yet their relative importance fluctuates over the course of history. Our work offers an opportunity for incorporating historical cultural elements into the natural language processing of slang.
summary: The meaning of a slang term can vary in different communities. However, slang semantic variation is not well understood and under-explored in the natural language processing of slang. One existing view argues that slang semantic variation is driven by culture-dependent communicative needs. An alternative view focuses on slang's social functions suggesting that the desire to foster semantic distinction may have led to the historical emergence of community-specific slang senses. We explore these theories using computational models and test them against historical slang dictionary entries, with a focus on characterizing regularity in the geographical variation of slang usages attested in the US and the UK over the past two centuries. We show that our models are able to predict the regional identity of emerging slang word meanings from historical slang records. We offer empirical evidence that both communicative need and semantic distinction play a role in the variation of slang meaning yet their relative importance fluctuates over the course of history. Our work offers an opportunity for incorporating historical cultural elements into the natural language processing of slang.
abstract_zh: 俚语的含义在不同的社区中可能有所不同。然而，在俚语的自然语言处理中，俚语语义变异还没有得到很好的理解和探索。一种现有的观点认为，俚语语义变异是由文化相关的交际需求驱动的。另一种观点侧重于俚语的社会功能，表明促进语义区分的愿望可能导致了社区特定俚语意义的历史出现。我们使用计算模型探索这些理论，并根据历史俚语词典条目对其进行测试，重点是描述过去两个世纪美国和英国证实的俚语用法的地理变化的规律性。我们表明，我们的模型能够从历史俚语记录中预测新兴俚语词含义的区域特征。我们提供的经验证据表明，交际需要和语义区别在俚语含义的变化中都发挥着作用，但它们的相对重要性随着历史的进程而波动。我们的工作提供了将历史文化元素融入俚语的自然语言处理中的机会。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究俚语在不同社群中的语义变化规律，并探索其驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对俚语语义变异的机制理解不足，两种理论观点存在争议：文化沟通需求与社会语义区分需求。需通过计算模型验证并量化其历史演变规律。
AI.method: 构建计算模型分析历史俚语词典数据，对比美国与英国过去两百年俚语使用地域差异，预测新兴俚语意义的地区归属。
AI.result: 模型成功预测俚语地域分布，证实沟通需求与语义区分均影响语义变异，但二者相对重要性随历史阶段波动。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了俚语演变的文化与社会双重动因，为自然语言处理中融入历史语境分析提供新方向。

authors_text: Tzu-hsun Feng,Annie Dong,Ching-Feng Yeh,Shu-wen Yang,Tzu-Quan Lin,Jiatong Shi,Kai-Wei Chang,Zili Huang,Haibin Wu,Xuankai Chang,Shinji Watanabe,Abdelrahman Mohamed,Shang-Wen Li,Hung-yi Lee
title: SUPERB @ SLT 2022: Challenge on Generalization and Efficiency of Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning
title_zh: SUPERB @ SLT 2022：自监督语音表示学习的泛化和效率挑战
abstract: We present the SUPERB challenge at SLT 2022, which aims at learning self-supervised speech representation for better performance, generalization, and efficiency. The challenge builds upon the SUPERB benchmark and implements metrics to measure the computation requirements of self-supervised learning (SSL) representation and to evaluate its generalizability and performance across the diverse SUPERB tasks. The SUPERB benchmark provides comprehensive coverage of popular speech processing tasks, from speech and speaker recognition to audio generation and semantic understanding. As SSL has gained interest in the speech community and showed promising outcomes, we envision the challenge to uplevel the impact of SSL techniques by motivating more practical designs of techniques beyond task performance. We summarize the results of 14 submitted models in this paper. We also discuss the main findings from those submissions and the future directions of SSL research.
summary: We present the SUPERB challenge at SLT 2022, which aims at learning self-supervised speech representation for better performance, generalization, and efficiency. The challenge builds upon the SUPERB benchmark and implements metrics to measure the computation requirements of self-supervised learning (SSL) representation and to evaluate its generalizability and performance across the diverse SUPERB tasks. The SUPERB benchmark provides comprehensive coverage of popular speech processing tasks, from speech and speaker recognition to audio generation and semantic understanding. As SSL has gained interest in the speech community and showed promising outcomes, we envision the challenge to uplevel the impact of SSL techniques by motivating more practical designs of techniques beyond task performance. We summarize the results of 14 submitted models in this paper. We also discuss the main findings from those submissions and the future directions of SSL research.
abstract_zh: 我们在 SLT 2022 上提出了 SUPERB 挑战，旨在学习自监督语音表示，以获得更好的性能、泛化和效率。该挑战以 SUPERB 基准为基础，并实施指标来衡量自监督学习 (SSL) 表示的计算要求，并评估其在不同 SUPERB 任务中的通用性和性能。 SUPERB 基准测试全面覆盖了流行的语音处理任务，从语音和说话人识别到音频生成和语义理解。随着 SSL 在语音社区中引起了兴趣并显示出了有希望的成果，我们设想了通过激发除任务性能之外的更实用的技术设计来提升 SSL 技术的影响力的挑战。我们在本文中总结了 14 个提交模型的结果。我们还讨论了这些提交的主要发现以及 SSL 研究的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SLT 2022上的SUPERB挑战赛，旨在通过自监督语音表示学习提升性能、泛化能力和效率。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习（SSL）在语音领域展现出潜力，但需进一步推动其在实际应用中的效率和泛化能力，而不仅限于任务性能。
AI.method: 基于SUPERB基准，引入计算需求指标和泛化性评估，通过14个提交模型在多样化任务中验证SSL方法。
AI.result: 总结了14个模型的成果，分析了提交方案的主要发现，并提出了SSL研究的未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛强调了高效且泛化的SSL模型设计的重要性，为后续研究提供了实践指导和改进方向。

search_text: SUPERB @ SLT 2022: Challenge on Generalization and Efficiency of Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning SUPERB @ SLT 2022：自监督语音表示学习的泛化和效率挑战 We present the SUPERB challenge at SLT 2022, which aims at learning self-supervised speech representation for better performance, generalization, and efficiency. The challenge builds upon the SUPERB benchmark and implements metrics to measure the computation requirements of self-supervised learning (SSL) representation and to evaluate its generalizability and performance across the diverse SUPERB tasks. The SUPERB benchmark provides comprehensive coverage of popular speech processing tasks, from speech and speaker recognition to audio generation and semantic understanding. As SSL has gained interest in the speech community and showed promising outcomes, we envision the challenge to uplevel the impact of SSL techniques by motivating more practical designs of techniques beyond task performance. We summarize the results of 14 submitted models in this paper. We also discuss the main findings from those submissions and the future directions of SSL research. 我们在 SLT 2022 上提出了 SUPERB 挑战，旨在学习自监督语音表示，以获得更好的性能、泛化和效率。该挑战以 SUPERB 基准为基础，并实施指标来衡量自监督学习 (SSL) 表示的计算要求，并评估其在不同 SUPERB 任务中的通用性和性能。 SUPERB 基准测试全面覆盖了流行的语音处理任务，从语音和说话人识别到音频生成和语义理解。随着 SSL 在语音社区中引起了兴趣并显示出了有希望的成果，我们设想了通过激发除任务性能之外的更实用的技术设计来提升 SSL 技术的影响力的挑战。我们在本文中总结了 14 个提交模型的结果。我们还讨论了这些提交的主要发现以及 SSL 研究的未来方向。 本文介绍了SLT 2022上的SUPERB挑战赛，旨在通过自监督语音表示学习提升性能、泛化能力和效率。 Tzu-hsun Feng,Annie Dong,Ching-Feng Yeh,Shu-wen Yang,Tzu-Quan Lin,Jiatong Shi,Kai-Wei Chang,Zili Huang,Haibin Wu,Xuankai Chang,Shinji Watanabe,Abdelrahman Mohamed,Shang-Wen Li,Hung-yi Lee cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Brandon RichardWebster,Justin Dulay,Anthony DiFalco,Elisabetta Caldesi,Walter J. Scheirer
title: Psychophysical-Score: A Behavioral Measure for Assessing the Biological Plausibility of Visual Recognition Models
title_zh: 心理物理学评分：评估视觉识别模型的生物学合理性的行为测量
abstract: For the last decade, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have vastly superseded their predecessors in nearly all vision tasks in artificial intelligence, including object recognition. However, despite abundant advancements, they continue to pale in comparison to biological vision. This chasm has prompted the development of biologically-inspired models that have attempted to mimic the human visual system, primarily at a neural level, which is evaluated using standard dataset benchmarks. However, more work is needed to understand how these models perceive the visual world. This article proposes a state-of-the-art procedure that generates a new metric, Psychophysical-Score, which is grounded in visual psychophysics and is capable of reliably estimating perceptual responses across numerous models -- representing a large range in complexity and biological inspiration. We perform the procedure on twelve models that vary in degree of biological inspiration and complexity, we compare the results against the aggregated results of 2,390 Amazon Mechanical Turk workers who together provided ~2.7 million perceptual responses. Each model's Psychophysical-Score is compared against the state-of-the-art neural activity-based metric, Brain-Score. Our study indicates that models with a high correlation to human perceptual behavior also have a high correlation with the corresponding neural activity.
summary: For the last decade, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have vastly superseded their predecessors in nearly all vision tasks in artificial intelligence, including object recognition. However, despite abundant advancements, they continue to pale in comparison to biological vision. This chasm has prompted the development of biologically-inspired models that have attempted to mimic the human visual system, primarily at a neural level, which is evaluated using standard dataset benchmarks. However, more work is needed to understand how these models perceive the visual world. This article proposes a state-of-the-art procedure that generates a new metric, Psychophysical-Score, which is grounded in visual psychophysics and is capable of reliably estimating perceptual responses across numerous models -- representing a large range in complexity and biological inspiration. We perform the procedure on twelve models that vary in degree of biological inspiration and complexity, we compare the results against the aggregated results of 2,390 Amazon Mechanical Turk workers who together provided ~2.7 million perceptual responses. Each model's Psychophysical-Score is compared against the state-of-the-art neural activity-based metric, Brain-Score. Our study indicates that models with a high correlation to human perceptual behavior also have a high correlation with the corresponding neural activity.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，卷积神经网络（CNN）在几乎所有人工智能视觉任务（包括物体识别）中已经极大地取代了它们的前辈。然而，尽管取得了巨大的进步，但与生物视觉相比，它们仍然相形见绌。这一鸿沟促使了受生物学启发的模型的开发，这些模型试图主要在神经水平上模仿人类视觉系统，并使用标准数据集基准进行评估。然而，需要做更多的工作来理解这些模型如何感知视觉世界。本文提出了一种最先进的程序，可以生成一种新的度量标准“心理物理学评分”，该度量标准以视觉心理物理学为基础，能够可靠地估计多种模型的感知反应——代表了大范围的复杂性和生物灵感。我们在 12 个生物启发程度和复杂性各不相同的模型上执行该程序，并将结果与​​ 2,390 名 Amazon Mechanical Turk 工作人员的汇总结果进行比较，这些工作人员总共提供了约 270 万个感知反应。每个模型的心理物理评分都与最先进的基于神经活动的指标 Brain-Score 进行比较。我们的研究表明，与人类感知行为高度相关的模型也与相应的神经活动具有高度相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉心理物理学的新指标Psychophysical-Score，用于评估视觉识别模型的生物合理性。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络在视觉任务中表现优异，但其生物合理性仍远低于人类视觉系统，现有评估指标难以全面反映模型的感知特性。
AI.method: 通过生成Psychophysical-Score指标，结合2390名亚马逊机械 Turk工作者的270万感知响应数据，与Brain-Score等神经活动指标进行对比分析。
AI.result: 高生物合理性的模型在感知行为和神经活动相关性上均表现优异，Psychophysical-Score与Brain-Score存在显著关联。
AI.conclusion: Psychophysical-Score能有效评估模型的感知合理性，为生物启发模型研究提供新工具，可与现有神经活动指标互补使用。

authors_text: Ramkumar Natarajan,Garrison L. H. Johnston,Nabil Simaan,Maxim Likhachev,Howie Choset
title: Long Horizon Planning through Contact using Discrete Search and Continuous Optimization
title_zh: 使用离散搜索和持续优化通过联系进行长期规划
abstract: Robots often have to perform manipulation tasks in close proximity to people. As such, it is desirable to use a robot arm that has limited joint torques to not injure the nearby person and interacts with the environment to explore new possibilities for completing a task. By bracing against the environment, robots can expand their reachable workspace, which would otherwise be inaccessible due to exceeding actuator torque limits, and accomplish tasks beyond their design specifications. However, motion planning for complex contact-rich tasks requires reasoning through the permutations of different possible contact modes and bracing locations, which grow exponentially with the number of contact points and links in the robot. To address this combinatorial problem, we developed INSAT, which interleaves graph search to explore the manipulator joint configuration and the contact mode space with incremental trajectory optimizations seeded by neighborhood solutions to find a dynamically feasible trajectory through contact. In this paper, we present recent additions to the INSAT algorithm that improve its runtime performance. In particular, we propose Lazy INSAT with reduced optimization rejection that systematically procrastinates its calls to trajectory optimization while reusing feasible solutions that violate boundary constraints. The algorithm is evaluated on a heavy payload transportation task in simulation and on physical hardware. In simulation, we show that Lazy INSAT can discover solutions for tasks that cannot be accomplished within its design limits and without interacting with the environment. In comparison to executing the same trajectory without environment support, we demonstrate that the utilization of bracing contacts reduces the overall torque required to execute the trajectory.
summary: Robots often have to perform manipulation tasks in close proximity to people. As such, it is desirable to use a robot arm that has limited joint torques to not injure the nearby person and interacts with the environment to explore new possibilities for completing a task. By bracing against the environment, robots can expand their reachable workspace, which would otherwise be inaccessible due to exceeding actuator torque limits, and accomplish tasks beyond their design specifications. However, motion planning for complex contact-rich tasks requires reasoning through the permutations of different possible contact modes and bracing locations, which grow exponentially with the number of contact points and links in the robot. To address this combinatorial problem, we developed INSAT, which interleaves graph search to explore the manipulator joint configuration and the contact mode space with incremental trajectory optimizations seeded by neighborhood solutions to find a dynamically feasible trajectory through contact. In this paper, we present recent additions to the INSAT algorithm that improve its runtime performance. In particular, we propose Lazy INSAT with reduced optimization rejection that systematically procrastinates its calls to trajectory optimization while reusing feasible solutions that violate boundary constraints. The algorithm is evaluated on a heavy payload transportation task in simulation and on physical hardware. In simulation, we show that Lazy INSAT can discover solutions for tasks that cannot be accomplished within its design limits and without interacting with the environment. In comparison to executing the same trajectory without environment support, we demonstrate that the utilization of bracing contacts reduces the overall torque required to execute the trajectory.
abstract_zh: 机器人通常必须在靠近人类的地方执行操作任务。因此，需要使用关节扭矩有限的机器人手臂，以免伤害附近的人，并与环境互动，以探索完成任务的新可能性。通过应对环境，机器人可以扩展其可到达的工作空间（否则由于超出执行器扭矩限制而无法到达），并完成超出其设计规格的任务。然而，复杂的接触丰富的任务的运动规划需要通过不同可能的接触模式和支撑位置的排列进行推理，这些排列随着机器人中接触点和连杆的数量呈指数增长。为了解决这个组合问题，我们开发了 INSAT，它交错图搜索来探索机械臂关节配置和接触模式空间，并通过邻域解决方案进行增量轨迹优化，以通过接触找到动态可行的轨迹。在本文中，我们介绍了 INSAT 算法的最新补充，以提高其运行时性能。特别是，我们提出了减少优化拒绝的 Lazy INSAT，系统地推迟对轨迹优化的调用，同时重用违反边界约束的可行解决方案。该算法在模拟中的重负载运输任务和物理硬件上进行了评估。在模拟中，我们表明 Lazy INSAT 可以发现在其设计限制内且在不与环境交互的情况下无法完成的任务的解决方案。与在没有环境支持的情况下执行相同的轨迹相比，我们证明了支撑接触的利用减少了执行轨迹所需的总扭矩。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Lazy INSAT的算法，用于解决机器人在复杂接触任务中的长期规划问题。
AI.motivation: 机器人在与人类近距离操作时，需要避免因关节扭矩过大而造成伤害，同时通过与环境的接触来扩展其工作空间，以完成超出其设计限制的任务。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种改进的INSAT算法，即Lazy INSAT，通过延迟调用轨迹优化并重复使用违反边界约束的可行解来提高运行时性能。
AI.result: 在仿真和实际硬件上测试表明，Lazy INSAT能够发现传统设计限制下无法完成的任务解决方案，并通过环境支撑减少了执行轨迹所需的总体扭矩。
AI.conclusion: Lazy INSAT算法有效提高了机器人在复杂接触任务中的长期规划能力，展示了环境交互在扩展机器人工作空间和降低扭矩需求方面的潜力。

tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为Lazy INSAT的算法，用于解决机器人在复杂接触任务中的长期规划问题。
motivation: 机器人在与人类近距离操作时，需要避免因关节扭矩过大而造成伤害，同时通过与环境的接触来扩展其工作空间，以完成超出其设计限制的任务。
method: 本文提出了一种改进的INSAT算法，即Lazy INSAT，通过延迟调用轨迹优化并重复使用违反边界约束的可行解来提高运行时性能。
result: 在仿真和实际硬件上测试表明，Lazy INSAT能够发现传统设计限制下无法完成的任务解决方案，并通过环境支撑减少了执行轨迹所需的总体扭矩。
conclusion: Lazy INSAT算法有效提高了机器人在复杂接触任务中的长期规划能力，展示了环境交互在扩展机器人工作空间和降低扭矩需求方面的潜力。
search_text: Long Horizon Planning through Contact using Discrete Search and Continuous Optimization 使用离散搜索和持续优化通过联系进行长期规划 Robots often have to perform manipulation tasks in close proximity to people. As such, it is desirable to use a robot arm that has limited joint torques to not injure the nearby person and interacts with the environment to explore new possibilities for completing a task. By bracing against the environment, robots can expand their reachable workspace, which would otherwise be inaccessible due to exceeding actuator torque limits, and accomplish tasks beyond their design specifications. However, motion planning for complex contact-rich tasks requires reasoning through the permutations of different possible contact modes and bracing locations, which grow exponentially with the number of contact points and links in the robot. To address this combinatorial problem, we developed INSAT, which interleaves graph search to explore the manipulator joint configuration and the contact mode space with incremental trajectory optimizations seeded by neighborhood solutions to find a dynamically feasible trajectory through contact. In this paper, we present recent additions to the INSAT algorithm that improve its runtime performance. In particular, we propose Lazy INSAT with reduced optimization rejection that systematically procrastinates its calls to trajectory optimization while reusing feasible solutions that violate boundary constraints. The algorithm is evaluated on a heavy payload transportation task in simulation and on physical hardware. In simulation, we show that Lazy INSAT can discover solutions for tasks that cannot be accomplished within its design limits and without interacting with the environment. In comparison to executing the same trajectory without environment support, we demonstrate that the utilization of bracing contacts reduces the overall torque required to execute the trajectory. 机器人通常必须在靠近人类的地方执行操作任务。因此，需要使用关节扭矩有限的机器人手臂，以免伤害附近的人，并与环境互动，以探索完成任务的新可能性。通过应对环境，机器人可以扩展其可到达的工作空间（否则由于超出执行器扭矩限制而无法到达），并完成超出其设计规格的任务。然而，复杂的接触丰富的任务的运动规划需要通过不同可能的接触模式和支撑位置的排列进行推理，这些排列随着机器人中接触点和连杆的数量呈指数增长。为了解决这个组合问题，我们开发了 INSAT，它交错图搜索来探索机械臂关节配置和接触模式空间，并通过邻域解决方案进行增量轨迹优化，以通过接触找到动态可行的轨迹。在本文中，我们介绍了 INSAT 算法的最新补充，以提高其运行时性能。特别是，我们提出了减少优化拒绝的 Lazy INSAT，系统地推迟对轨迹优化的调用，同时重用违反边界约束的可行解决方案。该算法在模拟中的重负载运输任务和物理硬件上进行了评估。在模拟中，我们表明 Lazy INSAT 可以发现在其设计限制内且在不与环境交互的情况下无法完成的任务的解决方案。与在没有环境支持的情况下执行相同的轨迹相比，我们证明了支撑接触的利用减少了执行轨迹所需的总扭矩。 本文介绍了一种名为Lazy INSAT的算法，用于解决机器人在复杂接触任务中的长期规划问题。 Ramkumar Natarajan,Garrison L. H. Johnston,Nabil Simaan,Maxim Likhachev,Howie Choset cs.RO

authors_text: Anup Singh,Kris Demuynck,Vipul Arora
title: Attention-Based Audio Embeddings for Query-by-Example
title_zh: 用于示例查询的基于注意力的音频嵌入
abstract: An ideal audio retrieval system efficiently and robustly recognizes a short query snippet from an extensive database. However, the performance of well-known audio fingerprinting systems falls short at high signal distortion levels. This paper presents an audio retrieval system that generates noise and reverberation robust audio fingerprints using the contrastive learning framework. Using these fingerprints, the method performs a comprehensive search to identify the query audio and precisely estimate its timestamp in the reference audio. Our framework involves training a CNN to maximize the similarity between pairs of embeddings extracted from clean audio and its corresponding distorted and time-shifted version. We employ a channel-wise spectral-temporal attention mechanism to better discriminate the audio by giving more weight to the salient spectral-temporal patches in the signal. Experimental results indicate that our system is efficient in computation and memory usage while being more accurate, particularly at higher distortion levels, than competing state-of-the-art systems and scalable to a larger database.
summary: An ideal audio retrieval system efficiently and robustly recognizes a short query snippet from an extensive database. However, the performance of well-known audio fingerprinting systems falls short at high signal distortion levels. This paper presents an audio retrieval system that generates noise and reverberation robust audio fingerprints using the contrastive learning framework. Using these fingerprints, the method performs a comprehensive search to identify the query audio and precisely estimate its timestamp in the reference audio. Our framework involves training a CNN to maximize the similarity between pairs of embeddings extracted from clean audio and its corresponding distorted and time-shifted version. We employ a channel-wise spectral-temporal attention mechanism to better discriminate the audio by giving more weight to the salient spectral-temporal patches in the signal. Experimental results indicate that our system is efficient in computation and memory usage while being more accurate, particularly at higher distortion levels, than competing state-of-the-art systems and scalable to a larger database.
abstract_zh: 理想的音频检索系统可以高效、稳健地从广泛的数据库中识别简短的查询片段。然而，众所周知的音频指纹识别系统的性能在高信号失真水平下表现不佳。本文提出了一种音频检索系统，该系统使用对比学习框架生成噪声和混响鲁棒的音频指纹。使用这些指纹，该方法执行全面搜索以识别查询音频并精确估计其在参考音频中的时间戳。我们的框架涉及训练 CNN，以最大化从干净音频中提取的嵌入对及其相应的失真和时移版本之间的相似性。我们采用通道方式的频谱时间注意力机制，通过给予信号中显着的频谱时间块更多的权重来更好地区分音频。实验结果表明，我们的系统在计算和内存使用方面非常高效，同时比竞争的最先进系统更准确，特别是在更高的失真水平下，并且可扩展至更大的数据库。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的音频嵌入方法，用于在高噪声和混响环境下实现鲁棒的音频检索。
AI.motivation: 现有音频指纹系统在高信号失真情况下性能不足，需开发更鲁棒的音频检索方法以应对实际场景中的噪声和混响干扰。
AI.method: 采用对比学习框架训练CNN，通过最大化干净音频与失真/时移版本嵌入相似性生成鲁棒指纹，并引入通道级频谱-时域注意力机制增强关键特征区分能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该系统在计算和内存效率上表现优异，在高失真场景下比现有方法更准确，且可扩展至更大数据库。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力的音频嵌入方法有效提升了音频检索系统的鲁棒性与准确性，为复杂环境下的音频匹配提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Benjamin McDonough,Andrea Mari,Nathan Shammah,Nathaniel T. Stemen,Misty Wahl,William J. Zeng,Peter P. Orth
title: Automated quantum error mitigation based on probabilistic error reduction
title_zh: 基于概率误差减少的自动量子误差缓解
abstract: Current quantum computers suffer from a level of noise that prohibits extracting useful results directly from longer computations. The figure of merit in many near-term quantum algorithms is an expectation value measured at the end of the computation, which experiences a bias in the presence of hardware noise. A systematic way to remove such bias is probabilistic error cancellation (PEC). PEC requires a full characterization of the noise and introduces a sampling overhead that increases exponentially with circuit depth, prohibiting high-depth circuits at realistic noise levels. Probabilistic error reduction (PER) is a related quantum error mitigation method that systematically reduces the sampling overhead at the cost of reintroducing bias. In combination with zero-noise extrapolation, PER can yield expectation values with an accuracy comparable to PEC.Noise reduction through PER is broadly applicable to near-term algorithms, and the automated implementation of PER is thus desirable for facilitating its widespread use. To this end, we present an automated quantum error mitigation software framework that includes noise tomography and application of PER to user-specified circuits. We provide a multi-platform Python package that implements a recently developed Pauli noise tomography (PNT) technique for learning a sparse Pauli noise model and exploits a Pauli noise scaling method to carry out PER.We also provide software tools that leverage a previously developed toolchain, employing PyGSTi for gate set tomography and providing a functionality to use the software Mitiq for PER and zero-noise extrapolation to obtain error-mitigated expectation values on a user-defined circuit.
summary: Current quantum computers suffer from a level of noise that prohibits extracting useful results directly from longer computations. The figure of merit in many near-term quantum algorithms is an expectation value measured at the end of the computation, which experiences a bias in the presence of hardware noise. A systematic way to remove such bias is probabilistic error cancellation (PEC). PEC requires a full characterization of the noise and introduces a sampling overhead that increases exponentially with circuit depth, prohibiting high-depth circuits at realistic noise levels. Probabilistic error reduction (PER) is a related quantum error mitigation method that systematically reduces the sampling overhead at the cost of reintroducing bias. In combination with zero-noise extrapolation, PER can yield expectation values with an accuracy comparable to PEC.Noise reduction through PER is broadly applicable to near-term algorithms, and the automated implementation of PER is thus desirable for facilitating its widespread use. To this end, we present an automated quantum error mitigation software framework that includes noise tomography and application of PER to user-specified circuits. We provide a multi-platform Python package that implements a recently developed Pauli noise tomography (PNT) technique for learning a sparse Pauli noise model and exploits a Pauli noise scaling method to carry out PER.We also provide software tools that leverage a previously developed toolchain, employing PyGSTi for gate set tomography and providing a functionality to use the software Mitiq for PER and zero-noise extrapolation to obtain error-mitigated expectation values on a user-defined circuit.
abstract_zh: 当前的量子计算机存在一定程度的噪声，无法直接从较长的计算中提取有用的结果。许多近期量子算法的品质因数是在计算结束时测量的期望值，在存在硬件噪声的情况下会出现偏差。消除此类偏差的系统方法是概率误差消除 (PEC)。 PEC 需要对噪声进行全面表征，并引入随电路深度呈指数增加的采样开销，从而禁止在实际噪声水平下使用高深度电路。概率误差减少（PER）是一种相关的量子误差缓解方法，它以重新引入偏差为代价系统地减少采样开销。与零噪声外推法相结合，PER 可以产生精度与 PEC 相当的期望值。通过 PER 降噪广泛适用于近期算法，因此 PER 的自动化实现对于促进其广泛使用是可取的。为此，我们提出了一个自动量子误差缓解软件框架，其中包括噪声断层扫描和 PER 在用户指定电路中的应用。我们提供了一个多平台 Python 包，该包实现了最近开发的泡利噪声断层扫描 (PNT) 技术，用于学习稀疏泡利噪声模型，并利用泡利噪声缩放方法来执行 PER。我们还提供了利用先前开发的工具链的软件工具，采用 PyGSTi 进行门组断层扫描，并提供使用软件 Mitiq 进行 PER 和零噪声外推的功能，以获得用户定义电路上的误差减轻的期望值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率误差减少（PER）的自动化量子误差缓解软件框架，旨在解决当前量子计算机噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有量子算法因噪声导致计算结果偏差，而概率误差消除（PEC）方法因采样开销过大难以应用于深度电路，需更高效的误差缓解方案。
AI.method: 开发了包含噪声断层扫描和PER应用的自动化框架，结合Pauli噪声断层扫描（PNT）技术及噪声缩放方法，并集成PyGSTi和Mitiq工具链实现误差缓解。
AI.result: 实现了多平台Python工具包，可自动学习稀疏Pauli噪声模型并应用PER，结合零噪声外推法获得高精度期望值。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效降低了误差缓解的计算开销，为近期量子算法的广泛应用提供了可行的自动化解决方案。

search_text: Automated quantum error mitigation based on probabilistic error reduction 基于概率误差减少的自动量子误差缓解 Current quantum computers suffer from a level of noise that prohibits extracting useful results directly from longer computations. The figure of merit in many near-term quantum algorithms is an expectation value measured at the end of the computation, which experiences a bias in the presence of hardware noise. A systematic way to remove such bias is probabilistic error cancellation (PEC). PEC requires a full characterization of the noise and introduces a sampling overhead that increases exponentially with circuit depth, prohibiting high-depth circuits at realistic noise levels. Probabilistic error reduction (PER) is a related quantum error mitigation method that systematically reduces the sampling overhead at the cost of reintroducing bias. In combination with zero-noise extrapolation, PER can yield expectation values with an accuracy comparable to PEC.Noise reduction through PER is broadly applicable to near-term algorithms, and the automated implementation of PER is thus desirable for facilitating its widespread use. To this end, we present an automated quantum error mitigation software framework that includes noise tomography and application of PER to user-specified circuits. We provide a multi-platform Python package that implements a recently developed Pauli noise tomography (PNT) technique for learning a sparse Pauli noise model and exploits a Pauli noise scaling method to carry out PER.We also provide software tools that leverage a previously developed toolchain, employing PyGSTi for gate set tomography and providing a functionality to use the software Mitiq for PER and zero-noise extrapolation to obtain error-mitigated expectation values on a user-defined circuit. 当前的量子计算机存在一定程度的噪声，无法直接从较长的计算中提取有用的结果。许多近期量子算法的品质因数是在计算结束时测量的期望值，在存在硬件噪声的情况下会出现偏差。消除此类偏差的系统方法是概率误差消除 (PEC)。 PEC 需要对噪声进行全面表征，并引入随电路深度呈指数增加的采样开销，从而禁止在实际噪声水平下使用高深度电路。概率误差减少（PER）是一种相关的量子误差缓解方法，它以重新引入偏差为代价系统地减少采样开销。与零噪声外推法相结合，PER 可以产生精度与 PEC 相当的期望值。通过 PER 降噪广泛适用于近期算法，因此 PER 的自动化实现对于促进其广泛使用是可取的。为此，我们提出了一个自动量子误差缓解软件框架，其中包括噪声断层扫描和 PER 在用户指定电路中的应用。我们提供了一个多平台 Python 包，该包实现了最近开发的泡利噪声断层扫描 (PNT) 技术，用于学习稀疏泡利噪声模型，并利用泡利噪声缩放方法来执行 PER。我们还提供了利用先前开发的工具链的软件工具，采用 PyGSTi 进行门组断层扫描，并提供使用软件 Mitiq 进行 PER 和零噪声外推的功能，以获得用户定义电路上的误差减轻的期望值。 本文提出了一种基于概率误差减少（PER）的自动化量子误差缓解软件框架，旨在解决当前量子计算机噪声问题。 Benjamin McDonough,Andrea Mari,Nathan Shammah,Nathaniel T. Stemen,Misty Wahl,William J. Zeng,Peter P. Orth quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Lam Pham,Dusan Salovic,Anahid Jalali,Alexander Schindler,Khoa Tran,Canh Vu,Phu X. Nguyen
title: Robust, General, and Low Complexity Acoustic Scene Classification Systems and An Effective Visualization for Presenting a Sound Scene Context
title_zh: 鲁棒、通用且低复杂度的声学场景分类系统以及用于呈现声音场景上下文的有效可视化
abstract: In this paper, we present a comprehensive analysis of Acoustic Scene Classification (ASC), the task of identifying the scene of an audio recording from its acoustic signature. In particular, we firstly propose an inception-based and low footprint ASC model, referred to as the ASC baseline. The proposed ASC baseline is then compared with benchmark and high-complexity network architectures of MobileNetV1, MobileNetV2, VGG16, VGG19, ResNet50V2, ResNet152V2, DenseNet121, DenseNet201, and Xception. Next, we improve the ASC baseline by proposing a novel deep neural network architecture which leverages residual-inception architectures and multiple kernels. Given the novel residual-inception (NRI) model, we further evaluate the trade off between the model complexity and the model accuracy performance. Finally, we evaluate whether sound events occurring in a sound scene recording can help to improve ASC accuracy, then indicate how a sound scene context is well presented by combining both sound scene and sound event information. We conduct extensive experiments on various ASC datasets, including Crowded Scenes, IEEE AASP Challenge on Detection and Classification of Acoustic Scenes and Events (DCASE) 2018 Task 1A and 1B, 2019 Task 1A and 1B, 2020 Task 1A, 2021 Task 1A, 2022 Task 1. The experimental results on several different ASC challenges highlight two main achievements; the first is to propose robust, general, and low complexity ASC systems which are suitable for real-life applications on a wide range of edge devices and mobiles; the second is to propose an effective visualization method for comprehensively presenting a sound scene context.
summary: In this paper, we present a comprehensive analysis of Acoustic Scene Classification (ASC), the task of identifying the scene of an audio recording from its acoustic signature. In particular, we firstly propose an inception-based and low footprint ASC model, referred to as the ASC baseline. The proposed ASC baseline is then compared with benchmark and high-complexity network architectures of MobileNetV1, MobileNetV2, VGG16, VGG19, ResNet50V2, ResNet152V2, DenseNet121, DenseNet201, and Xception. Next, we improve the ASC baseline by proposing a novel deep neural network architecture which leverages residual-inception architectures and multiple kernels. Given the novel residual-inception (NRI) model, we further evaluate the trade off between the model complexity and the model accuracy performance. Finally, we evaluate whether sound events occurring in a sound scene recording can help to improve ASC accuracy, then indicate how a sound scene context is well presented by combining both sound scene and sound event information. We conduct extensive experiments on various ASC datasets, including Crowded Scenes, IEEE AASP Challenge on Detection and Classification of Acoustic Scenes and Events (DCASE) 2018 Task 1A and 1B, 2019 Task 1A and 1B, 2020 Task 1A, 2021 Task 1A, 2022 Task 1. The experimental results on several different ASC challenges highlight two main achievements; the first is to propose robust, general, and low complexity ASC systems which are suitable for real-life applications on a wide range of edge devices and mobiles; the second is to propose an effective visualization method for comprehensively presenting a sound scene context.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们对声学场景分类（ASC）进行了全面分析，该任务是根据音频记录的声学特征识别音频场景。特别是，我们首先提出了一种基于初始且低足迹的 ASC 模型，称为 ASC 基线。然后将提出的 ASC 基线与 MobileNetV1、MobileNetV2、VGG16、VGG19、ResNet50V2、ResNet152V2、DenseNet121、DenseNet201 和 Xception 的基准和高复杂性网络架构进行比较。接下来，我们通过提出一种利用残差初始架构和多个内核的新型深度神经网络架构来改进 ASC 基线。考虑到新颖的残差初始（NRI）模型，我们进一步评估模型复杂性和模型准确性性能之间的权衡。最后，我们评估声音场景录制中发生的声音事件是否有助于提高 ASC 准确性，然后表明如何通过结合声音场景和声音事件信息来很好地呈现声音场景上下文。我们对各种 ASC 数据集进行了广泛的实验，包括 Crowded Scenes、IEEE AASP Challenge on Inspection and Classification of Acoustic Sc​​enes and Events (DCASE) 2018 Task 1A and 1B、2019 Task 1A and 1B、2020 Task 1A、2021 Task 1A、2022 Task 1。几个不同 ASC 挑战的实验结果突出了两个主要成就：第一个是提出稳健、通用且低复杂度的 ASC 系统，适用于各种边缘设备和移动设备上的实际应用；第二是提出一种有效的可视化方法来全面呈现声音场景上下文。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒、通用且低复杂度的声学场景分类（ASC）系统，并设计了一种有效的方法来呈现声音场景上下文。
AI.motivation: 现有ASC模型复杂度高或泛化能力不足，难以满足边缘设备的实际应用需求，同时缺乏对声音场景上下文的直观可视化方法。
AI.method: 提出基于Inception的ASC基线模型，对比多种主流网络架构；改进为融合残差-Inception结构和多核的新型网络（NRI），并通过实验分析模型复杂度与精度的权衡；结合场景与事件信息设计可视化方法。
AI.result: 在多个ASC数据集上验证了所提系统的有效性，实现了适用于边缘设备的低复杂度ASC方案，并提出了能够综合呈现声学场景上下文的可视化方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为实际应用提供了高效且通用的ASC解决方案，同时通过融合场景与事件信息的可视化方法，提升了对声学场景上下文的理解与呈现能力。

authors_text: Jiayu Huang,Yutian Pang,Yongming Liu,Hao Yan
title: Posterior Regularized Bayesian Neural Network Incorporating Soft and Hard Knowledge Constraints
title_zh: 结合软硬知识约束的后验正则贝叶斯神经网络
abstract: Neural Networks (NNs) have been widely {used in supervised learning} due to their ability to model complex nonlinear patterns, often presented in high-dimensional data such as images and text. However, traditional NNs often lack the ability for uncertainty quantification. Bayesian NNs (BNNS) could help measure the uncertainty by considering the distributions of the NN model parameters. Besides, domain knowledge is commonly available and could improve the performance of BNNs if it can be appropriately incorporated. In this work, we propose a novel Posterior-Regularized Bayesian Neural Network (PR-BNN) model by incorporating different types of knowledge constraints, such as the soft and hard constraints, as a posterior regularization term. Furthermore, we propose to combine the augmented Lagrangian method and the existing BNN solvers for efficient inference. The experiments in simulation and two case studies about aviation landing prediction and solar energy output prediction have shown the knowledge constraints and the performance improvement of the proposed model over traditional BNNs without the constraints.
summary: Neural Networks (NNs) have been widely {used in supervised learning} due to their ability to model complex nonlinear patterns, often presented in high-dimensional data such as images and text. However, traditional NNs often lack the ability for uncertainty quantification. Bayesian NNs (BNNS) could help measure the uncertainty by considering the distributions of the NN model parameters. Besides, domain knowledge is commonly available and could improve the performance of BNNs if it can be appropriately incorporated. In this work, we propose a novel Posterior-Regularized Bayesian Neural Network (PR-BNN) model by incorporating different types of knowledge constraints, such as the soft and hard constraints, as a posterior regularization term. Furthermore, we propose to combine the augmented Lagrangian method and the existing BNN solvers for efficient inference. The experiments in simulation and two case studies about aviation landing prediction and solar energy output prediction have shown the knowledge constraints and the performance improvement of the proposed model over traditional BNNs without the constraints.
abstract_zh: 神经网络 (NN) 因其能够对复杂的非线性模式（通常呈现在图像和文本等高维数据中）进行建模而被广泛{用于监督学习}。然而，传统的神经网络往往缺乏不确定性量化的能力。贝叶斯神经网络 (BNNS) 可以通过考虑神经网络模型参数的分布来帮助测量不确定性。此外，领域知识是普遍可用的，如果能够适当地结合起来，可以提高 BNN 的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的后验正则贝叶斯神经网络（PR-BNN）模型，通过合并不同类型的知识约束（例如软约束和硬约束）作为后验正则化项。此外，我们建议将增强拉格朗日方法和现有的 BNN 求解器结合起来，以实现高效推理。模拟实验和关于航空着陆预测和太阳能输出预测的两个案例研究表明，所提出的模型相对于无约束的传统 BNN 具有知识约束和性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合软硬知识约束的后验正则化贝叶斯神经网络（PR-BNN），以提升模型不确定性量化能力和性能。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络缺乏不确定性量化能力，而贝叶斯神经网络虽能衡量不确定性，但如何有效融合领域知识仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过引入软硬知识约束作为后验正则化项，并结合增广拉格朗日方法与现有BNN求解器实现高效推断。
AI.result: 在模拟数据及航空着陆预测、太阳能输出预测案例中，PR-BNN在知识约束下显著优于无约束的传统BNN。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效整合领域知识，提升了贝叶斯神经网络的不确定性量化能力与实际预测性能。
