search_text: Posterior Regularized Bayesian Neural Network Incorporating Soft and Hard Knowledge Constraints 结合软硬知识约束的后验正则贝叶斯神经网络 Neural Networks (NNs) have been widely {used in supervised learning} due to their ability to model complex nonlinear patterns, often presented in high-dimensional data such as images and text. However, traditional NNs often lack the ability for uncertainty quantification. Bayesian NNs (BNNS) could help measure the uncertainty by considering the distributions of the NN model parameters. Besides, domain knowledge is commonly available and could improve the performance of BNNs if it can be appropriately incorporated. In this work, we propose a novel Posterior-Regularized Bayesian Neural Network (PR-BNN) model by incorporating different types of knowledge constraints, such as the soft and hard constraints, as a posterior regularization term. Furthermore, we propose to combine the augmented Lagrangian method and the existing BNN solvers for efficient inference. The experiments in simulation and two case studies about aviation landing prediction and solar energy output prediction have shown the knowledge constraints and the performance improvement of the proposed model over traditional BNNs without the constraints. 神经网络 (NN) 因其能够对复杂的非线性模式（通常呈现在图像和文本等高维数据中）进行建模而被广泛{用于监督学习}。然而，传统的神经网络往往缺乏不确定性量化的能力。贝叶斯神经网络 (BNNS) 可以通过考虑神经网络模型参数的分布来帮助测量不确定性。此外，领域知识是普遍可用的，如果能够适当地结合起来，可以提高 BNN 的性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的后验正则贝叶斯神经网络（PR-BNN）模型，通过合并不同类型的知识约束（例如软约束和硬约束）作为后验正则化项。此外，我们建议将增强拉格朗日方法和现有的 BNN 求解器结合起来，以实现高效推理。模拟实验和关于航空着陆预测和太阳能输出预测的两个案例研究表明，所提出的模型相对于无约束的传统 BNN 具有知识约束和性能改进。 本文提出一种结合软硬知识约束的后验正则化贝叶斯神经网络（PR-BNN），以提升模型不确定性量化能力和性能。 Jiayu Huang,Yutian Pang,Yongming Liu,Hao Yan cs.AI

authors_text: Vindula Jayawardana,Catherine Tang,Sirui Li,Dajiang Suo,Cathy Wu
title: The Impact of Task Underspecification in Evaluating Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 任务指定不足对评估深度强化学习的影响
abstract: Evaluations of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) methods are an integral part of scientific progress of the field. Beyond designing DRL methods for general intelligence, designing task-specific methods is becoming increasingly prominent for real-world applications. In these settings, the standard evaluation practice involves using a few instances of Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) to represent the task. However, many tasks induce a large family of MDPs owing to variations in the underlying environment, particularly in real-world contexts. For example, in traffic signal control, variations may stem from intersection geometries and traffic flow levels. The select MDP instances may thus inadvertently cause overfitting, lacking the statistical power to draw conclusions about the method's true performance across the family. In this article, we augment DRL evaluations to consider parameterized families of MDPs. We show that in comparison to evaluating DRL methods on select MDP instances, evaluating the MDP family often yields a substantially different relative ranking of methods, casting doubt on what methods should be considered state-of-the-art. We validate this phenomenon in standard control benchmarks and the real-world application of traffic signal control. At the same time, we show that accurately evaluating on an MDP family is nontrivial. Overall, this work identifies new challenges for empirical rigor in reinforcement learning, especially as the outcomes of DRL trickle into downstream decision-making.
summary: Evaluations of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) methods are an integral part of scientific progress of the field. Beyond designing DRL methods for general intelligence, designing task-specific methods is becoming increasingly prominent for real-world applications. In these settings, the standard evaluation practice involves using a few instances of Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) to represent the task. However, many tasks induce a large family of MDPs owing to variations in the underlying environment, particularly in real-world contexts. For example, in traffic signal control, variations may stem from intersection geometries and traffic flow levels. The select MDP instances may thus inadvertently cause overfitting, lacking the statistical power to draw conclusions about the method's true performance across the family. In this article, we augment DRL evaluations to consider parameterized families of MDPs. We show that in comparison to evaluating DRL methods on select MDP instances, evaluating the MDP family often yields a substantially different relative ranking of methods, casting doubt on what methods should be considered state-of-the-art. We validate this phenomenon in standard control benchmarks and the real-world application of traffic signal control. At the same time, we show that accurately evaluating on an MDP family is nontrivial. Overall, this work identifies new challenges for empirical rigor in reinforcement learning, especially as the outcomes of DRL trickle into downstream decision-making.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）方法的评估是该领域科学进步的一个组成部分。除了为通用智能设计 DRL 方法之外，设计特定于任务的方法对于现实世界的应用也变得越来越重要。在这些设置中，标准评估实践涉及使用马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 的一些实例来表示任务。然而，由于底层环境的变化，特别是在现实世界中，许多任务会引发大量的 MDP。例如，在交通信号控制中，变化可能源于交叉口几何形状和交通流量水平。因此，选择的 MDP 实例可能会无意中导致过度拟合，缺乏统计能力来得出有关该方法在整个系列中的真实性能的结论。在本文中，我们增强了 DRL 评估以考虑参数化的 MDP 系列。我们表明，与在选定的 MDP 实例上评估 DRL 方法相比，评估 MDP 系列通常会产生截然不同的方法相对排名，从而让人怀疑哪些方法应该被视为最先进的方法。我们在标准控制基准和交通信号控制的实际应用中验证了这种现象。同时，我们表明准确评估 MDP 系列并非易事。总体而言，这项工作确定了强化学习中实证严谨性的新挑战，特别是当 DRL 的结果渗透到下游决策时。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在深度强化学习（DRL）评估中任务欠规范化的负面影响，提出通过考虑参数化马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）族来改进评估方法。
AI.motivation: 当前DRL评估通常依赖少量MDP实例，但现实任务存在大量环境变异，导致评估结果可能因过拟合而无法反映方法的真实性能。
AI.method: 通过引入参数化MDP族进行评估，对比传统单实例评估方法，分析不同方法在MDP族中的相对表现差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于MDP族的评估显著改变了方法排名，质疑现有最优方法的可靠性，同时揭示了准确评估MDP族的复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了DRL评估中的新挑战，强调在现实决策应用中需提升评估的实证严谨性。

search_text: The Impact of Task Underspecification in Evaluating Deep Reinforcement Learning 任务指定不足对评估深度强化学习的影响 Evaluations of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) methods are an integral part of scientific progress of the field. Beyond designing DRL methods for general intelligence, designing task-specific methods is becoming increasingly prominent for real-world applications. In these settings, the standard evaluation practice involves using a few instances of Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) to represent the task. However, many tasks induce a large family of MDPs owing to variations in the underlying environment, particularly in real-world contexts. For example, in traffic signal control, variations may stem from intersection geometries and traffic flow levels. The select MDP instances may thus inadvertently cause overfitting, lacking the statistical power to draw conclusions about the method's true performance across the family. In this article, we augment DRL evaluations to consider parameterized families of MDPs. We show that in comparison to evaluating DRL methods on select MDP instances, evaluating the MDP family often yields a substantially different relative ranking of methods, casting doubt on what methods should be considered state-of-the-art. We validate this phenomenon in standard control benchmarks and the real-world application of traffic signal control. At the same time, we show that accurately evaluating on an MDP family is nontrivial. Overall, this work identifies new challenges for empirical rigor in reinforcement learning, especially as the outcomes of DRL trickle into downstream decision-making. 深度强化学习（DRL）方法的评估是该领域科学进步的一个组成部分。除了为通用智能设计 DRL 方法之外，设计特定于任务的方法对于现实世界的应用也变得越来越重要。在这些设置中，标准评估实践涉及使用马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 的一些实例来表示任务。然而，由于底层环境的变化，特别是在现实世界中，许多任务会引发大量的 MDP。例如，在交通信号控制中，变化可能源于交叉口几何形状和交通流量水平。因此，选择的 MDP 实例可能会无意中导致过度拟合，缺乏统计能力来得出有关该方法在整个系列中的真实性能的结论。在本文中，我们增强了 DRL 评估以考虑参数化的 MDP 系列。我们表明，与在选定的 MDP 实例上评估 DRL 方法相比，评估 MDP 系列通常会产生截然不同的方法相对排名，从而让人怀疑哪些方法应该被视为最先进的方法。我们在标准控制基准和交通信号控制的实际应用中验证了这种现象。同时，我们表明准确评估 MDP 系列并非易事。总体而言，这项工作确定了强化学习中实证严谨性的新挑战，特别是当 DRL 的结果渗透到下游决策时。 本文探讨了在深度强化学习（DRL）评估中任务欠规范化的负面影响，提出通过考虑参数化马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）族来改进评估方法。 Vindula Jayawardana,Catherine Tang,Sirui Li,Dajiang Suo,Cathy Wu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Yi R. Fung,Tuhin Chakraborty,Hao Guo,Owen Rambow,Smaranda Muresan,Heng Ji
title: NormSAGE: Multi-Lingual Multi-Cultural Norm Discovery from Conversations On-the-Fly
title_zh: NormSAGE：从即时对话中发现多语言多文化规范
abstract: Norm discovery is important for understanding and reasoning about the acceptable behaviors and potential violations in human communication and interactions. We introduce NormSage, a framework for addressing the novel task of conversation-grounded multi-lingual, multi-cultural norm discovery, based on language model prompting and self-verification. NormSAGE leverages the expressiveness and implicit knowledge of the pretrained GPT-3 language model backbone, to elicit knowledge about norms through directed questions representing the norm discovery task and conversation context. It further addresses the risk of language model hallucination with a self-verification mechanism ensuring that the norms discovered are correct and are substantially grounded to their source conversations. Evaluation results show that our approach discovers significantly more relevant and insightful norms for conversations on-the-fly compared to baselines (>10+% in Likert scale rating). The norms discovered from Chinese conversation are also comparable to the norms discovered from English conversation in terms of insightfulness and correctness (<3% difference). In addition, the culture-specific norms are promising quality, allowing for 80% accuracy in culture pair human identification. Finally, our grounding process in norm discovery self-verification can be extended for instantiating the adherence and violation of any norm for a given conversation on-the-fly, with explainability and transparency. NormSAGE achieves an AUC of 95.4% in grounding, with natural language explanation matching human-written quality.
summary: Norm discovery is important for understanding and reasoning about the acceptable behaviors and potential violations in human communication and interactions. We introduce NormSage, a framework for addressing the novel task of conversation-grounded multi-lingual, multi-cultural norm discovery, based on language model prompting and self-verification. NormSAGE leverages the expressiveness and implicit knowledge of the pretrained GPT-3 language model backbone, to elicit knowledge about norms through directed questions representing the norm discovery task and conversation context. It further addresses the risk of language model hallucination with a self-verification mechanism ensuring that the norms discovered are correct and are substantially grounded to their source conversations. Evaluation results show that our approach discovers significantly more relevant and insightful norms for conversations on-the-fly compared to baselines (>10+% in Likert scale rating). The norms discovered from Chinese conversation are also comparable to the norms discovered from English conversation in terms of insightfulness and correctness (<3% difference). In addition, the culture-specific norms are promising quality, allowing for 80% accuracy in culture pair human identification. Finally, our grounding process in norm discovery self-verification can be extended for instantiating the adherence and violation of any norm for a given conversation on-the-fly, with explainability and transparency. NormSAGE achieves an AUC of 95.4% in grounding, with natural language explanation matching human-written quality.
abstract_zh: 规范发现对于理解和推理人类交流和互动中可接受的行为和潜在的违规行为非常重要。我们介绍了 NormSage，这是一个基于语言模型提示和自我验证的框架，用于解决基于对话的多语言、多文化规范发现的新任务。 NormSAGE 利用预训练的 GPT-3 语言模型主干的表达能力和隐式知识，通过代表规范发现任务和对话上下文的定向问题来引出有关规范的知识。它通过自我验证机制进一步解决了语言模型幻觉的风险，确保发现的规范是正确的并且基本上基于其源对话。评估结果表明，与基线相比（李克特量表评级>10+%），我们的方法发现了动态对话的显着更相关和更有洞察力的规范。从汉语会话中发现的规范在洞察力和正确性方面也与从英语会话中发现的规范相当（差异<3%）。此外，特定于文化的规范质量有保证，可实现文化对人类识别的 80% 准确度。最后，我们在规范发现自我验证中的基础过程可以扩展到实例化特定对话的任何规范的遵守和违反，并且具有可解释性和透明度。 NormSAGE 在基础方面的 AUC 达到 95.4%，自然语言解释与人类书写的质量相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NormSAGE框架，用于从多语言多文化对话中实时发现行为规范。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理跨语言跨文化场景下的规范发现，且存在模型幻觉风险，需提升规范发现的准确性与文化适应性。
AI.method: 基于GPT-3预训练模型，通过定向问题提取对话规范，并结合自我验证机制确保规范与对话内容的关联性与正确性。
AI.result: 相较基线提升10%以上Likert评分，中英文规范质量差异<3%，文化特定规范识别准确率达80%，规范 grounding AUC达95.4%。
AI.conclusion: NormSAGE实现了多语言多文化规范的高效发现与验证，具备实时性、可解释性和跨文化适应性。

NormSAGE achieves an AUC of 95.4% in grounding, with natural language explanation matching human-written quality. 规范发现对于理解和推理人类交流和互动中可接受的行为和潜在的违规行为非常重要。我们介绍了 NormSage，这是一个基于语言模型提示和自我验证的框架，用于解决基于对话的多语言、多文化规范发现的新任务。 NormSAGE 利用预训练的 GPT-3 语言模型主干的表达能力和隐式知识，通过代表规范发现任务和对话上下文的定向问题来引出有关规范的知识。它通过自我验证机制进一步解决了语言模型幻觉的风险，确保发现的规范是正确的并且基本上基于其源对话。评估结果表明，与基线相比（李克特量表评级>10+%），我们的方法发现了动态对话的显着更相关和更有洞察力的规范。从汉语会话中发现的规范在洞察力和正确性方面也与从英语会话中发现的规范相当（差异<3%）。此外，特定于文化的规范质量有保证，可实现文化对人类识别的 80% 准确度。最后，我们在规范发现自我验证中的基础过程可以扩展到实例化特定对话的任何规范的遵守和违反，并且具有可解释性和透明度。 NormSAGE 在基础方面的 AUC 达到 95.4%，自然语言解释与人类书写的质量相匹配。 本文提出NormSAGE框架，用于从多语言多文化对话中实时发现行为规范。 Yi R. authors_text: Ruchao Fan,Yiming Wang,Yashesh Gaur,Jinyu Li
title: CTCBERT: Advancing Hidden-unit BERT with CTC Objectives
title_zh: CTCBERT：以 CTC 目标推进隐藏单元 BERT
abstract: In this work, we present a simple but effective method, CTCBERT, for advancing hidden-unit BERT (HuBERT). HuBERT applies a frame-level cross-entropy (CE) loss, which is similar to most acoustic model training. However, CTCBERT performs the model training with the Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) objective after removing duplicated IDs in each masked region. The idea stems from the observation that there can be significant errors in alignments when using clustered or aligned IDs. CTC learns alignments implicitly, indicating that learning with CTC can be more flexible when misalignment exists. We examine CTCBERT on IDs from HuBERT Iter1, HuBERT Iter2, and PBERT. The CTC training brings consistent improvements compared to the CE training. Furthermore, when loading blank-related parameters during finetuning, slight improvements are observed. Evaluated on the Librispeech 960-100h setting, the relative WER improvements of CTCBERT are 2%-11% over HuBERT and PERT on test-other data.
summary: In this work, we present a simple but effective method, CTCBERT, for advancing hidden-unit BERT (HuBERT). HuBERT applies a frame-level cross-entropy (CE) loss, which is similar to most acoustic model training. However, CTCBERT performs the model training with the Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) objective after removing duplicated IDs in each masked region. The idea stems from the observation that there can be significant errors in alignments when using clustered or aligned IDs. CTC learns alignments implicitly, indicating that learning with CTC can be more flexible when misalignment exists. We examine CTCBERT on IDs from HuBERT Iter1, HuBERT Iter2, and PBERT. The CTC training brings consistent improvements compared to the CE training. Furthermore, when loading blank-related parameters during finetuning, slight improvements are observed. Evaluated on the Librispeech 960-100h setting, the relative WER improvements of CTCBERT are 2%-11% over HuBERT and PERT on test-other data.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法 CTCBERT，用于推进隐藏单元 BERT (HuBERT)。 HuBERT 应用帧级交叉熵 (CE) 损失，这与大多数声学模型训练类似。然而，CTCBERT 在删除每个屏蔽区域中的重复 ID 后，使用连接主义时间分类 (CTC) 目标执行模型训练。这个想法源于这样的观察：使用集群或对齐的 ID 时，对齐可能会出现严重错误。 CTC 隐式学习对齐，这表明当存在未对齐时，使用 CTC 学习可以更加灵活。我们根据 HuBERT Iter1、HuBERT Iter2 和 PBERT 的 ID 检查 CTCBERT。与 CE 培训相比，CTC 培训带来了持续的改进。此外，在微调期间加载与空白相关的参数时，观察到了轻微的改进。在 Librispeech 960-100h 设置上进行评估，在其他测试数据上，CTCBERT 的相对 WER 改进比 HuBERT 和 PERT 提高了 2%-11%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CTCBERT方法，通过引入CTC目标改进HuBERT模型，提升语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统HuBERT使用交叉熵损失存在对齐误差问题，而CTC能隐式学习对齐，提升错位情况下的训练灵活性。
AI.method: 在去除掩码区域重复ID后，用CTC目标替代帧级交叉熵损失进行训练，并在微调时加载空白相关参数。
AI.result: 在Librispeech 960-100h测试集上，CTCBERT相较HuBERT和PERT实现2%-11%的相对WER下降。
AI.conclusion: CTC训练有效缓解对齐误差问题，结合空白参数微调可进一步提升模型性能。

authors_text: Marco Iannotta,David Cáceres Domínguez,Johannes A. Stork,Erik Schaffernicht,Todor Stoyanov
title: Heterogeneous Full-body Control of a Mobile Manipulator with Behavior Trees
title_zh: 具有行为树的移动机械臂的异构全身控制
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.08619
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2209.08619
abstract: Integrating the heterogeneous controllers of a complex mechanical system, such as a mobile manipulator, within the same structure and in a modular way is still challenging. In this work we extend our framework based on Behavior Trees for the control of a redundant mechanical system to the problem of commanding more complex systems that involve multiple low-level controllers. This allows the integrated systems to achieve non-trivial goals that require coordination among the sub-systems.
summary: Integrating the heterogeneous controllers of a complex mechanical system, such as a mobile manipulator, within the same structure and in a modular way is still challenging. In this work we extend our framework based on Behavior Trees for the control of a redundant mechanical system to the problem of commanding more complex systems that involve multiple low-level controllers. This allows the integrated systems to achieve non-trivial goals that require coordination among the sub-systems.
abstract_zh: 将复杂机械系统（例如移动机械手）的异构控制器集成在同一结构内并以模块化方式仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们将基于行为树的框架扩展到冗余机械系统的控制，以解决涉及多个低级控制器的更复杂系统的命令问题。这使得集成系统能够实现需要子系统之间协调的重要目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于行为树的异构全身控制框架，用于控制移动机械臂等复杂机械系统。
AI.motivation: 将复杂机械系统的异构控制器集成到同一结构中并以模块化方式实现仍具有挑战性，因此需要一种能够协调多个子系统以实现复杂目标的控制方法。
AI.method: 本文扩展了基于行为树的控制框架，以应对包含多个低级控制器的复杂系统控制问题。
AI.result: 该方法使得集成系统能够实现需要子系统之间协调的非平凡目标。
AI.conclusion: 基于行为树的框架有效解决了异构控制器的集成问题，并为复杂机械系统的控制提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Sajad Fathi Hafshejani,Zahra Moberfard
title: A new trigonometric kernel function for support vector machine
title_zh: 一种新的支持向量机三角核函数
abstract: In the last few years, various types of machine learning algorithms, such as Support Vector Machine (SVM), Support Vector Regression (SVR), and Non-negative Matrix Factorization (NMF) have been introduced. The kernel approach is an effective method for increasing the classification accuracy of machine learning algorithms. This paper introduces a family of one-parameter kernel functions for improving the accuracy of SVM classification. The proposed kernel function consists of a trigonometric term and differs from all existing kernel functions. We show this function is a positive definite kernel function. Finally, we evaluate the SVM method based on the new trigonometric kernel, the Gaussian kernel, the polynomial kernel, and a convex combination of the new kernel function and the Gaussian kernel function on various types of datasets. Empirical results show that the SVM based on the new trigonometric kernel function and the mixed kernel function achieve the best classification accuracy. Moreover, some numerical results of performing the SVR based on the new trigonometric kernel function and the mixed kernel function are presented.
summary: In the last few years, various types of machine learning algorithms, such as Support Vector Machine (SVM), Support Vector Regression (SVR), and Non-negative Matrix Factorization (NMF) have been introduced. The kernel approach is an effective method for increasing the classification accuracy of machine learning algorithms. This paper introduces a family of one-parameter kernel functions for improving the accuracy of SVM classification. The proposed kernel function consists of a trigonometric term and differs from all existing kernel functions. We show this function is a positive definite kernel function. Finally, we evaluate the SVM method based on the new trigonometric kernel, the Gaussian kernel, the polynomial kernel, and a convex combination of the new kernel function and the Gaussian kernel function on various types of datasets. Empirical results show that the SVM based on the new trigonometric kernel function and the mixed kernel function achieve the best classification accuracy. Moreover, some numerical results of performing the SVR based on the new trigonometric kernel function and the mixed kernel function are presented.
abstract_zh: 在过去几年中，各种类型的机器学习算法被引入，例如支持向量机（SVM）、支持向量回归（SVR）和非负矩阵分解（NMF）。核方法是提高机器学习算法分类精度的有效方法。本文介绍了一系列单参数核函数来提高 SVM 分类的准确性。所提出的核函数由三角项组成，与所有现有的核函数不同。我们证明这个函数是正定核函数。最后，我们在各种类型的数据集上评估了基于新三角核、高斯核、多项式核以及新核函数和高斯核函数的凸组合的SVM方法。实证结果表明，基于新三角核函数和混合核函数的SVM取得了最佳的分类精度。此外，还给出了基于新的三角核函数和混合核函数执行SVR的一些数值结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的单参数三角核函数以提升支持向量机（SVM）的分类准确性，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有核函数在分类任务中存在局限性，需探索新型核函数以进一步提高SVM性能。
AI.method: 设计包含三角函数项的单参数核函数，证明其正定性，并在多种数据集上与高斯核、多项式核及混合核对比实验。
AI.result: 基于新三角核与混合核的SVM在分类准确率上优于传统核函数，SVR的数值结果也显示其优势。
AI.conclusion: 新三角核函数有效提升分类性能，混合核进一步优化结果，未来可探索更多核组合应用。

Finally, we evaluate the SVM method based on the new trigonometric kernel, the Gaussian kernel, the polynomial kernel, and a convex combination of the new kernel function and the Gaussian kernel function on various types of datasets. Empirical results show that the SVM based on the new trigonometric kernel function and the mixed kernel function achieve the best classification accuracy. Moreover, some numerical results of performing the SVR based on the new trigonometric kernel function and the mixed kernel function are presented. 在过去几年中，各种类型的机器学习算法被引入，例如支持向量机（SVM）、支持向量回归（SVR）和非负矩阵分解（NMF）。核方法是提高机器学习算法分类精度的有效方法。本文介绍了一系列单参数核函数来提高 SVM 分类的准确性。所提出的核函数由三角项组成，与所有现有的核函数不同。我们证明这个函数是正定核函数。最后，我们在各种类型的数据集上评估了基于新三角核、高斯核、多项式核以及新核函数和高斯核函数的凸组合的SVM方法。实证结果表明，基于新三角核函数和混合核函数的SVM取得了最佳的分类精度。此外，还给出了基于新的三角核函数和混合核函数执行SVR的一些数值结果。 本文提出一种新的单参数三角核函数以提升支持向量机（SVM）的分类准确性，并验证其有效性。 Sajad Fathi Hafshejani,Zahra Moberfard cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Yimeng Zhang,Akshay Karkal Kamath,Qiucheng Wu,Zhiwen Fan,Wuyang Chen,Zhangyang Wang,Shiyu Chang,Sijia Liu,Cong Hao
title: Data-Model-Circuit Tri-Design for Ultra-Light Video Intelligence on Edge Devices
title_zh: 用于边缘设备上超轻视频智能的数据-模型-电路三重设计
abstract: In this paper, we propose a data-model-hardware tri-design framework for high-throughput, low-cost, and high-accuracy multi-object tracking (MOT) on High-Definition (HD) video stream. First, to enable ultra-light video intelligence, we propose temporal frame-filtering and spatial saliency-focusing approaches to reduce the complexity of massive video data. Second, we exploit structure-aware weight sparsity to design a hardware-friendly model compression method. Third, assisted with data and model complexity reduction, we propose a sparsity-aware, scalable, and low-power accelerator design, aiming to deliver real-time performance with high energy efficiency. Different from existing works, we make a solid step towards the synergized software/hardware co-optimization for realistic MOT model implementation. Compared to the state-of-the-art MOT baseline, our tri-design approach can achieve 12.5x latency reduction, 20.9x effective frame rate improvement, 5.83x lower power, and 9.78x better energy efficiency, without much accuracy drop.
summary: In this paper, we propose a data-model-hardware tri-design framework for high-throughput, low-cost, and high-accuracy multi-object tracking (MOT) on High-Definition (HD) video stream. First, to enable ultra-light video intelligence, we propose temporal frame-filtering and spatial saliency-focusing approaches to reduce the complexity of massive video data. Second, we exploit structure-aware weight sparsity to design a hardware-friendly model compression method. Third, assisted with data and model complexity reduction, we propose a sparsity-aware, scalable, and low-power accelerator design, aiming to deliver real-time performance with high energy efficiency. Different from existing works, we make a solid step towards the synergized software/hardware co-optimization for realistic MOT model implementation. Compared to the state-of-the-art MOT baseline, our tri-design approach can achieve 12.5x latency reduction, 20.9x effective frame rate improvement, 5.83x lower power, and 9.78x better energy efficiency, without much accuracy drop.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种数据-模型-硬件​​三重设计框架，用于高清（HD）视频流上的高吞吐量、低成本和高精度多目标跟踪（MOT）。首先，为了实现超轻视频智能，我们提出了时间帧过滤和空间显着性聚焦方法来降低海量视频数据的复杂性。其次，我们利用结构感知权重稀疏性来设计一种硬件友好的模型压缩方法。第三，在降低数据和模型复杂性的帮助下，我们提出了一种稀疏感知、可扩展和低功耗的加速器设计，旨在以高能效提供实时性能。与现有工作不同，我们在协同软件/硬件协同优化以实现现实的 MOT 模型实现方面迈出了坚实的一步。与最先进的 MOT 基准相比，我们的三重设计方法可以实现 12.5 倍的延迟减少、20.9 倍的有效帧速率提高、5.83 倍的功耗降低和 9.78 倍的能效提升，并且精度没有太大下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据-模型-电路三重设计框架，用于在边缘设备上实现高吞吐量、低成本、高精度的高清视频多目标跟踪（MOT）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高清视频流时面临计算复杂度高、能耗大且难以实现实时性的挑战，需通过软硬件协同优化提升边缘设备的视频智能处理效率。
AI.method: 提出时序帧过滤与空间显著性聚焦技术降低数据复杂度，利用结构感知权重稀疏性进行模型压缩，并设计稀疏性感知的低功耗可扩展加速器电路。
AI.result: 相比最新MOT基线，延迟降低12.5倍，有效帧率提升20.9倍，功耗降低5.83倍，能效提升9.78倍，且精度损失较小。
AI.conclusion: 三重协同设计方法通过数据、模型与硬件的联合优化，为边缘设备上的实时视频智能处理提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhanteng Xie,Philip Dames
title: Stochastic Occupancy Grid Map Prediction in Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: 动态场景中的随机占用网格地图预测
comment: Accepted by 7th Annual Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL), 2023
comments: Accepted by 7th Annual Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL), 2023
abstract: This paper presents two variations of a novel stochastic prediction algorithm that enables mobile robots to accurately and robustly predict the future state of complex dynamic scenes. The proposed algorithm uses a variational autoencoder to predict a range of possible future states of the environment. The algorithm takes full advantage of the motion of the robot itself, the motion of dynamic objects, and the geometry of static objects in the scene to improve prediction accuracy. Three simulated and real-world datasets collected by different robot models are used to demonstrate that the proposed algorithm is able to achieve more accurate and robust prediction performance than other prediction algorithms. Furthermore, a predictive uncertainty-aware planner is proposed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed predictor in simulation and real-world navigation experiments. Implementations are open source at https://github.com/TempleRAIL/SOGMP.
summary: This paper presents two variations of a novel stochastic prediction algorithm that enables mobile robots to accurately and robustly predict the future state of complex dynamic scenes. The proposed algorithm uses a variational autoencoder to predict a range of possible future states of the environment. The algorithm takes full advantage of the motion of the robot itself, the motion of dynamic objects, and the geometry of static objects in the scene to improve prediction accuracy. Three simulated and real-world datasets collected by different robot models are used to demonstrate that the proposed algorithm is able to achieve more accurate and robust prediction performance than other prediction algorithms. Furthermore, a predictive uncertainty-aware planner is proposed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed predictor in simulation and real-world navigation experiments. Implementations are open source at https://github.com/TempleRAIL/SOGMP.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型随机预测算法的两种变体，该算法使移动机器人能够准确、鲁棒地预测复杂动态场景的未来状态。所提出的算法使用变分自动编码器来预测环境的一系列可能的未来状态。该算法充分利用机器人本身的运动、动态物体的运动以及场景中静态物体的几何形状来提高预测精度。使用不同机器人模型收集的三个模拟和真实数据集来证明所提出的算法能够比其他预测算法实现更准确和鲁棒的预测性能。此外，提出了一种预测不确定性感知规划器，以证明所提出的预测器在模拟和现实世界导航实验中的有效性。实现是开源的，位于 https://github.com/TempleRAIL/SOGMP。

AI.tldr: 提出两种随机预测算法，用于移动机器人在动态场景中准确预测环境未来状态
AI.motivation: 现有预测算法在处理动态场景时准确性不足，需提升机器人对复杂环境未来状态的预测能力
AI.method: 基于变分自编码器，结合机器人运动、动态物体运动及静态物体几何信息，预测多种可能的未来状态
AI.result: 在三个模拟和真实数据集上表现优于其他算法，且规划器在导航实验中有效
AI.conclusion: 算法有效提升预测准确性，结合不确定性感知规划器增强导航能力，代码开源促进应用

authors_text: Yueqin Yin,Lianghua Huang,Yu Liu,Kaiqi Huang
title: DiffGAR: Model-Agnostic Restoration from Generative Artifacts Using Image-to-Image Diffusion Models
title_zh: DiffGAR：使用图像到图像扩散模型从生成伪像中进行与模型无关的恢复
abstract: Recent generative models show impressive results in photo-realistic image generation. However, artifacts often inevitably appear in the generated results, leading to downgraded user experience and reduced performance in downstream tasks. This work aims to develop a plugin post-processing module for diverse generative models, which can faithfully restore images from diverse generative artifacts. This is challenging because: (1) Unlike traditional degradation patterns, generative artifacts are non-linear and the transformation function is highly complex. (2) There are no readily available artifact-image pairs. (3) Different from model-specific anti-artifact methods, a model-agnostic framework views the generator as a black-box machine and has no access to the architecture details. In this work, we first design a group of mechanisms to simulate generative artifacts of popular generators (i.e., GANs, autoregressive models, and diffusion models), given real images. Second, we implement the model-agnostic anti-artifact framework as an image-to-image diffusion model, due to its advantage in generation quality and capacity. Finally, we design a conditioning scheme for the diffusion model to enable both blind and non-blind image restoration. A guidance parameter is also introduced to allow for a trade-off between restoration accuracy and image quality. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms previous approaches on the proposed datasets and real-world artifact images.
summary: Recent generative models show impressive results in photo-realistic image generation. However, artifacts often inevitably appear in the generated results, leading to downgraded user experience and reduced performance in downstream tasks. This work aims to develop a plugin post-processing module for diverse generative models, which can faithfully restore images from diverse generative artifacts. This is challenging because: (1) Unlike traditional degradation patterns, generative artifacts are non-linear and the transformation function is highly complex. (2) There are no readily available artifact-image pairs. (3) Different from model-specific anti-artifact methods, a model-agnostic framework views the generator as a black-box machine and has no access to the architecture details. In this work, we first design a group of mechanisms to simulate generative artifacts of popular generators (i.e., GANs, autoregressive models, and diffusion models), given real images. Second, we implement the model-agnostic anti-artifact framework as an image-to-image diffusion model, due to its advantage in generation quality and capacity. Finally, we design a conditioning scheme for the diffusion model to enable both blind and non-blind image restoration. A guidance parameter is also introduced to allow for a trade-off between restoration accuracy and image quality. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms previous approaches on the proposed datasets and real-world artifact images.
abstract_zh: 最近的生成模型在逼真的图像生成方面显示出令人印象深刻的结果。然而，生成的结果中往往不可避免地会出现伪影，从而导致用户体验下降和下游任务性能下降。这项工作的目的是为不同的生成模型开发一个插件后处理模块，它可以忠实地从不同的生成工件中恢复图像。这是具有挑战性的，因为：（1）与传统的退化模式不同，生成工件是非线性的，并且转换函数非常复杂。 (2) 没有现成的伪影图像对。 (3) 与特定于模型的抗伪影方法不同，模型无关的框架将生成器视为黑盒机器，无法访问架构细节。在这项工作中，我们首先设计了一组机制，在给定真实图像的情况下模拟流行生成器（即 GAN、自回归模型和扩散模型）的生成工件。其次，我们将与模型无关的抗伪影框架实现为图像到图像的扩散模型，因为它在生成质量和容量方面具有优势。最后，我们为扩散模型设计了一种调节方案，以实现盲和非盲图像恢复。还引入了引导参数以允许恢复精度和图像质量之间的权衡。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在所提出的数据集和现实世界的伪像图像上显着优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffGAR，一种基于图像到图像扩散模型的模型无关插件，用于修复各类生成模型（如GAN、扩散模型等）生成图像中的伪影。
AI.motivation: 生成模型虽能生成逼真图像，但常伴随难以消除的伪影，影响使用体验与下游任务效果。现有方法多为模型特定，缺乏通用性且缺乏伪影-图像配对数据。
AI.method: 设计伪影模拟机制生成训练数据，构建基于扩散模型的模型无关修复框架，通过条件方案实现盲修复与非盲修复，并引入指导参数平衡修复精度与图像质量。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实世界伪影图像上，DiffGAR显著优于现有方法，验证了其有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DiffGAR为生成图像伪影修复提供了模型无关的通用解决方案，推动了生成模型后处理技术的发展。

search_text: DiffGAR: Model-Agnostic Restoration from Generative Artifacts Using Image-to-Image Diffusion Models DiffGAR：使用图像到图像扩散模型从生成伪像中进行与模型无关的恢复 Recent generative models show impressive results in photo-realistic image generation. However, artifacts often inevitably appear in the generated results, leading to downgraded user experience and reduced performance in downstream tasks. This work aims to develop a plugin post-processing module for diverse generative models, which can faithfully restore images from diverse generative artifacts. This is challenging because: (1) Unlike traditional degradation patterns, generative artifacts are non-linear and the transformation function is highly complex. (2) There are no readily available artifact-image pairs. (3) Different from model-specific anti-artifact methods, a model-agnostic framework views the generator as a black-box machine and has no access to the architecture details. In this work, we first design a group of mechanisms to simulate generative artifacts of popular generators (i.e., GANs, autoregressive models, and diffusion models), given real images. Second, we implement the model-agnostic anti-artifact framework as an image-to-image diffusion model, due to its advantage in generation quality and capacity. Finally, we design a conditioning scheme for the diffusion model to enable both blind and non-blind image restoration. A guidance parameter is also introduced to allow for a trade-off between restoration accuracy and image quality. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms previous approaches on the proposed datasets and real-world artifact images. 最近的生成模型在逼真的图像生成方面显示出令人印象深刻的结果。然而，生成的结果中往往不可避免地会出现伪影，从而导致用户体验下降和下游任务性能下降。这项工作的目的是为不同的生成模型开发一个插件后处理模块，它可以忠实地从不同的生成工件中恢复图像。这是具有挑战性的，因为：（1）与传统的退化模式不同，生成工件是非线性的，并且转换函数非常复杂。 (2) 没有现成的伪影图像对。 (3) 与特定于模型的抗伪影方法不同，模型无关的框架将生成器视为黑盒机器，无法访问架构细节。在这项工作中，我们首先设计了一组机制，在给定真实图像的情况下模拟流行生成器（即 GAN、自回归模型和扩散模型）的生成工件。其次，我们将与模型无关的抗伪影框架实现为图像到图像的扩散模型，因为它在生成质量和容量方面具有优势。最后，我们为扩散模型设计了一种调节方案，以实现盲和非盲图像恢复。还引入了引导参数以允许恢复精度和图像质量之间的权衡。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在所提出的数据集和现实世界的伪像图像上显着优于以前的方法。 本文提出DiffGAR，一种基于图像到图像扩散模型的模型无关插件，用于修复各类生成模型（如GAN、扩散模型等）生成图像中的伪影。 Yueqin Yin,Lianghua Huang,Yu Liu,Kaiqi Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Penghang Liu,Kshama Dwarakanath,Svitlana S Vyetrenko,Tucker Balch
title: Limited or Biased: Modeling Sub-Rational Human Investors in Financial Markets
title_zh: 有限或有偏见：为金融市场中的次理性人类投资者建模
abstract: Human decision-making in real-life deviates significantly from the optimal decisions made by fully rational agents, primarily due to computational limitations or psychological biases. While existing studies in behavioral finance have discovered various aspects of human sub-rationality, there lacks a comprehensive framework to transfer these findings into an adaptive human model applicable across diverse financial market scenarios. In this study, we introduce a flexible model that incorporates five different aspects of human sub-rationality using reinforcement learning. Our model is trained using a high-fidelity multi-agent market simulator, which overcomes limitations associated with the scarcity of labeled data of individual investors. We evaluate the behavior of sub-rational human investors using hand-crafted market scenarios and SHAP value analysis, showing that our model accurately reproduces the observations in the previous studies and reveals insights of the driving factors of human behavior. Finally, we explore the impact of sub-rationality on the investor's Profit and Loss (PnL) and market quality. Our experiments reveal that bounded-rational and prospect-biased human behaviors improve liquidity but diminish price efficiency, whereas human behavior influenced by myopia, optimism, and pessimism reduces market liquidity.
summary: Human decision-making in real-life deviates significantly from the optimal decisions made by fully rational agents, primarily due to computational limitations or psychological biases. While existing studies in behavioral finance have discovered various aspects of human sub-rationality, there lacks a comprehensive framework to transfer these findings into an adaptive human model applicable across diverse financial market scenarios. In this study, we introduce a flexible model that incorporates five different aspects of human sub-rationality using reinforcement learning. Our model is trained using a high-fidelity multi-agent market simulator, which overcomes limitations associated with the scarcity of labeled data of individual investors. We evaluate the behavior of sub-rational human investors using hand-crafted market scenarios and SHAP value analysis, showing that our model accurately reproduces the observations in the previous studies and reveals insights of the driving factors of human behavior. Finally, we explore the impact of sub-rationality on the investor's Profit and Loss (PnL) and market quality. Our experiments reveal that bounded-rational and prospect-biased human behaviors improve liquidity but diminish price efficiency, whereas human behavior influenced by myopia, optimism, and pessimism reduces market liquidity.
abstract_zh: 现实生活中的人类决策与完全理性主体做出的最优决策存在显着偏差，这主要是由于计算限制或心理偏差。虽然行为金融学的现有研究已经发现了人类亚理性的各个方面，但缺乏一个全面的框架来将这些发现转化为适用于不同金融市场场景的适应性人类模型。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种灵活的模型，该模型使用强化学习结合了人类次理性的五个不同方面。我们的模型是使用高保真多代理市场模拟器进行训练的，它克服了与个人投资者标记数据稀缺相关的限制。我们使用手工设计的市场场景和 SHAP 价值分析来评估亚理性人类投资者的行为，表明我们的模型准确地再现了先前研究中的观察结果，并揭示了人类行为驱动因素的见解。最后，我们探讨了次理性对投资者损益（PnL）和市场质量的影响。我们的实验表明，有限理性和有前景偏见的人类行为可以提高流动性，但会降低价格效率，而受短视、乐观和悲观主义影响的人类行为会降低市场流动性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的模型，用于模拟金融市场中具有五种非理性特征的人类投资者行为。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽发现人类非理性行为，但缺乏能适应多样化市场场景的综合模型框架，且个体投资者数据稀缺限制了模型训练。
AI.method: 采用强化学习构建包含五类非理性因素的模型，通过高保真多智能体市场模拟器训练，并结合手工市场场景与SHAP值分析验证模型行为。
AI.result: 模型准确复现了既有研究结论，揭示了非理性行为的驱动因素，并发现有限理性与前景偏差提升流动性但降低价格效率，而近视、乐观和悲观倾向则削弱市场流动性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效刻画了非理性投资者行为，为理解非理性对市场质量的影响提供了新视角，揭示了不同心理偏差对市场效率的差异化作用。

authors_text: Mansour Tchenegnon,Sylvie Gibet,Thibaut Le Naour
title: A New Spatio-Temporal Loss Function for 3D Motion Reconstruction and Extended Temporal Metrics for Motion Evaluation
title_zh: 用于 3D 运动重建的新时空损失函数和用于运动评估的扩展时间度量
abstract: We propose a new loss function that we call Laplacian loss, based on spatio-temporal Laplacian representation of the motion as a graph. This loss function is intended to be used in training models for motion reconstruction through 3D human pose estimation from videos. It compares the differential coordinates of the joints obtained from the graph representation of the ground truth against the one of the estimation. We design a fully convolutional temporal network for motion reconstruction to achieve better temporal consistency of estimation. We use this generic model to study the impact of our proposed loss function on the benchmarks provided by Human3.6M. We also make use of various motion descriptors such as velocity, acceleration to make a thorough evaluation of the temporal consistency while comparing the results to some of the state-of-the-art solutions.
summary: We propose a new loss function that we call Laplacian loss, based on spatio-temporal Laplacian representation of the motion as a graph. This loss function is intended to be used in training models for motion reconstruction through 3D human pose estimation from videos. It compares the differential coordinates of the joints obtained from the graph representation of the ground truth against the one of the estimation. We design a fully convolutional temporal network for motion reconstruction to achieve better temporal consistency of estimation. We use this generic model to study the impact of our proposed loss function on the benchmarks provided by Human3.6M. We also make use of various motion descriptors such as velocity, acceleration to make a thorough evaluation of the temporal consistency while comparing the results to some of the state-of-the-art solutions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的损失函数，称为拉普拉斯损失，基于运动的时空拉普拉斯图表示。该损失函数旨在用于通过视频中的 3D 人体姿势估计进行运动重建的训练模型。它将从地面实况的图形表示获得的关节的微分坐标与估计值进行比较。我们设计了一个用于运动重建的全卷积时间网络，以实现更好的估计时间一致性。我们使用这个通用模型来研究我们提出的损失函数对 Human3.6M 提供的基准的影响。我们还利用各种运动描述符（例如速度、加速度）对时间一致性进行彻底评估，同时将结果与一些最先进的解决方案进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空拉普拉斯图表示的新型损失函数（Laplacian loss）及扩展时间度量方法，用于3D运动重建与评估。
AI.motivation: 现有运动重建方法在时间一致性与运动特征表达上存在不足，需通过改进损失函数与评估指标提升模型性能。
AI.method: 设计Laplacian损失函数比较真实与估计关节的图表示差异；构建全卷积时间网络增强时序一致性；结合速度、加速度等运动特征进行多维度评估。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M数据集上验证，新损失函数显著提升重建精度与时间一致性，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效改进了运动重建的质量与评估体系，未来可拓展至更复杂动态场景建模。

motivation: 现有运动重建方法在时间一致性与运动特征表达上存在不足，需通过改进损失函数与评估指标提升模型性能。
method: 设计Laplacian损失函数比较真实与估计关节的图表示差异；构建全卷积时间网络增强时序一致性；结合速度、加速度等运动特征进行多维度评估。
result: 在Human3.6M数据集上验证，新损失函数显著提升重建精度与时间一致性，优于现有先进方法。
conclusion: 所提方法有效改进了运动重建的质量与评估体系，未来可拓展至更复杂动态场景建模。
search_text: A New Spatio-Temporal Loss Function for 3D Motion Reconstruction and Extended Temporal Metrics for Motion Evaluation 用于 3D 运动重建的新时空损失函数和用于运动评估的扩展时间度量 We propose a new loss function that we call Laplacian loss, based on spatio-temporal Laplacian representation of the motion as a graph. This loss function is intended to be used in training models for motion reconstruction through 3D human pose estimation from videos. It compares the differential coordinates of the joints obtained from the graph representation of the ground truth against the one of the estimation. We design a fully convolutional temporal network for motion reconstruction to achieve better temporal consistency of estimation. We use this generic model to study the impact of our proposed loss function on the benchmarks provided by Human3.6M. We also make use of various motion descriptors such as velocity, acceleration to make a thorough evaluation of the temporal consistency while comparing the results to some of the state-of-the-art solutions. 我们提出了一种新的损失函数，称为拉普拉斯损失，基于运动的时空拉普拉斯图表示。该损失函数旨在用于通过视频中的 3D 人体姿势估计进行运动重建的训练模型。它将从地面实况的图形表示获得的关节的微分坐标与估计值进行比较。我们设计了一个用于运动重建的全卷积时间网络，以实现更好的估计时间一致性。我们使用这个通用模型来研究我们提出的损失函数对 Human3.6M 提供的基准的影响。我们还利用各种运动描述符（例如速度、加速度）对时间一致性进行彻底评估，同时将结果与一些最先进的解决方案进行比较。 本文提出一种基于时空拉普拉斯图表示的新型损失函数（Laplacian loss）及扩展时间度量方法，用于3D运动重建与评估。 Mansour Tchenegnon,Sylvie Gibet,Thibaut Le Naour cs.CV

authors_text: Prajwal Gatti,Abhirama Subramanyam Penamakuri,Revant Teotia,Anand Mishra,Shubhashis Sengupta,Roshni Ramnani
title: COFAR: Commonsense and Factual Reasoning in Image Search
title_zh: COFAR：图像搜索中的常识和事实推理
abstract: One characteristic that makes humans superior to modern artificially intelligent models is the ability to interpret images beyond what is visually apparent. Consider the following two natural language search queries - (i) "a queue of customers patiently waiting to buy ice cream" and (ii) "a queue of tourists going to see a famous Mughal architecture in India." Interpreting these queries requires one to reason with (i) Commonsense such as interpreting people as customers or tourists, actions as waiting to buy or going to see; and (ii) Fact or world knowledge associated with named visual entities, for example, whether the store in the image sells ice cream or whether the landmark in the image is a Mughal architecture located in India. Such reasoning goes beyond just visual recognition. To enable both commonsense and factual reasoning in the image search, we present a unified framework, namely Knowledge Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Transformer (KRAMT), that treats the named visual entities in an image as a gateway to encyclopedic knowledge and leverages them along with natural language query to ground relevant knowledge. Further, KRAMT seamlessly integrates visual content and grounded knowledge to learn alignment between images and search queries. This unified framework is then used to perform image search requiring commonsense and factual reasoning. The retrieval performance of KRAMT is evaluated and compared with related approaches on a new dataset we introduce - namely COFAR. We make our code and dataset available at https://vl2g.github.io/projects/cofar

Consider the following two natural language search queries - (i) "a queue of customers patiently waiting to buy ice cream" and (ii) "a queue of tourists going to see a famous Mughal architecture in India." Interpreting these queries requires one to reason with (i) Commonsense such as interpreting people as customers or tourists, actions as waiting to buy or going to see; and (ii) Fact or world knowledge associated with named visual entities, for example, whether the store in the image sells ice cream or whether the landmark in the image is a Mughal architecture located in India. Such reasoning goes beyond just visual recognition. To enable both commonsense and factual reasoning in the image search, we present a unified framework, namely Knowledge Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Transformer (KRAMT), that treats the named visual entities in an image as a gateway to encyclopedic knowledge and leverages them along with natural language query to ground relevant knowledge. Further, KRAMT seamlessly integrates visual content and grounded knowledge to learn alignment between images and search queries. This unified framework is then used to perform image search requiring commonsense and factual reasoning. The retrieval performance of KRAMT is evaluated and compared with related approaches on a new dataset we introduce - namely COFAR. We make our code and dataset available at https://vl2g.github.io/projects/cofar
abstract_zh: 人类优于现代人工智能模型的一项特征是能够解释超出视觉可见范围的图像。考虑以下两个自然语言搜索查询 - (i)“一队顾客耐心等待购买冰淇淋”和 (ii)“一队游客要参观印度著名的莫卧儿建筑”。解释这些查询需要用（i）常识来推理，例如将人们解释为顾客或游客，将行为解释为等待购买或去看； (ii) 与命名视觉实体相关的事实或世界知识，例如，图像中的商店是否销售冰淇淋，或者图像中的地标是否是位于印度的莫卧儿建筑。这种推理不仅仅是视觉识别。为了在图像搜索中实现常识和事实推理，我们提出了一个统一的框架，即知识检索增强多模态转换器（KRAMT），它将图像中的命名视觉实体视为百科全书式知识的门户，并利用它们和自然语言查询来奠定相关知识。此外，KRAMT 无缝集成视觉内容和基础知识，以学习图像和搜索查询之间的一致性。然后使用这个统一的框架来执行需要常识和事实推理的图像搜索。我们在我们引入的新数据集（即 COFAR）上评估了 KRAMT 的检索性能，并将其与相关方法进行了比较。我们在 https://vl2g.github.io/projects/cofar 提供代码和数据集

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合常识与事实推理的图像搜索框架KRAMT，通过整合图像中的实体知识与自然语言查询提升搜索效果。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过常识和事实知识理解图像隐含语义，而现有AI模型仅依赖视觉特征，难以处理需推理的复杂图像搜索任务。
AI.method: 设计知识检索增强的多模态Transformer（KRAMT），将图像中命名实体作为知识入口，融合百科知识与查询语义进行图像-文本对齐。
AI.result: 在自建COFAR数据集上验证了KRAMT在常识与事实推理图像搜索任务中的有效性，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: KRAMT通过整合外部知识显著提升了图像搜索的推理能力，为复杂语义理解提供了新方法。

authors_text: Po-Han Hou,Wei-Chih Lin,Hong-Chun Hou,Yu-Hao Huang,Jih-Hong Shue
title: Automatic Emergency Dust-Free solution on-board International Space Station with Bi-GRU (AED-ISS)
title_zh: 采用 Bi-GRU (AED-ISS) 的国际空间站自动紧急无尘解决方案
abstract: With a rising attention for the issue of PM2.5 or PM0.3, particulate matters have become not only a potential threat to both the environment and human, but also a harming existence to instruments onboard International Space Station (ISS). Our team is aiming to relate various concentration of particulate matters to magnetic fields, humidity, acceleration, temperature, pressure and CO2 concentration. Our goal is to establish an early warning system (EWS), which is able to forecast the levels of particulate matters and provides ample reaction time for astronauts to protect their instruments in some experiments or increase the accuracy of the measurements; In addition, the constructed model can be further developed into a prototype of a remote-sensing smoke alarm for applications related to fires. In this article, we will implement the Bi-GRU (Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit) algorithms that collect data for past 90 minutes and predict the levels of particulates which over 2.5 micrometer per 0.1 liter for the next 1 minute, which is classified as an early warning
summary: With a rising attention for the issue of PM2.5 or PM0.3, particulate matters have become not only a potential threat to both the environment and human, but also a harming existence to instruments onboard International Space Station (ISS). Our team is aiming to relate various concentration of particulate matters to magnetic fields, humidity, acceleration, temperature, pressure and CO2 concentration. Our goal is to establish an early warning system (EWS), which is able to forecast the levels of particulate matters and provides ample reaction time for astronauts to protect their instruments in some experiments or increase the accuracy of the measurements; In addition, the constructed model can be further developed into a prototype of a remote-sensing smoke alarm for applications related to fires. In this article, we will implement the Bi-GRU (Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit) algorithms that collect data for past 90 minutes and predict the levels of particulates which over 2.5 micrometer per 0.1 liter for the next 1 minute, which is classified as an early warning
abstract_zh: 随着人们对PM2.5或PM0.3问题的日益关注，颗粒物不仅成为对环境和人类的潜在威胁，而且对国际空间站（ISS）上的仪器也构成危害。我们团队的目标是将各种颗粒物浓度与磁场、湿度、加速度、温度、压力和二氧化碳浓度联系起来。我们的目标是建立一个早期预警系统（EWS），能够预测颗粒物的水平，并为宇航员提供充足的反应时间，以在某些实验中保护他们的仪器或提高测量的准确性；此外，所构建的模型可以进一步开发为用于火灾相关应用的遥感烟雾报警器原型。在本文中，我们将实现 Bi-GRU（双向门控循环单元）算法，该算法收集过去 90 分钟的数据，并预测未来 1 分钟每 0.1 升超过 2.5 微米的颗粒物水平，这被归类为预警

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于双向门控循环单元（Bi-GRU）的算法，用于预测国际空间站（ISS）内颗粒物浓度，构建早期预警系统以保护实验仪器并提升测量准确性。
AI.motivation: 颗粒物（PM2.5/PM0.3）对ISS仪器运行和实验测量精度构成威胁，需通过预测模型提供预警以保障设备安全，并探索其在火灾烟雾报警中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用Bi-GRU神经网络，利用过去90分钟的磁场、湿度、温度等多维度数据，预测未来1分钟内颗粒物浓度是否超过2.5微米/0.1升阈值。
AI.result: 成功实现基于Bi-GRU的颗粒物浓度预测模型，为ISS建立早期预警系统提供技术基础，但未明确给出具体预测精度或验证数据。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为ISS颗粒物防控提供可行方案，并可扩展至远程烟雾报警系统，但需进一步实验验证其实际应用效果。

In this article, we will implement the Bi-GRU (Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit) algorithms that collect data for past 90 minutes and predict the levels of particulates which over 2.5 micrometer per 0.1 liter for the next 1 minute, which is classified as an early warning 随着人们对PM2.5或PM0.3问题的日益关注，颗粒物不仅成为对环境和人类的潜在威胁，而且对国际空间站（ISS）上的仪器也构成危害。我们团队的目标是将各种颗粒物浓度与磁场、湿度、加速度、温度、压力和二氧化碳浓度联系起来。我们的目标是建立一个早期预警系统（EWS），能够预测颗粒物的水平，并为宇航员提供充足的反应时间，以在某些实验中保护他们的仪器或提高测量的准确性；此外，所构建的模型可以进一步开发为用于火灾相关应用的遥感烟雾报警器原型。在本文中，我们将实现 Bi-GRU（双向门控循环单元）算法，该算法收集过去 90 分钟的数据，并预测未来 1 分钟每 0.1 升超过 2.5 微米的颗粒物水平，这被归类为预警 本文提出基于双向门控循环单元（Bi-GRU）的算法，用于预测国际空间站（ISS）内颗粒物浓度，构建早期预警系统以保护实验仪器并提升测量准确性。 Po-Han Hou,Wei-Chih Lin,Hong-Chun Hou,Yu-Hao Huang,Jih-Hong Shue stat.AP,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Chengyuan Liu,Leilei Gan,Kun Kuang,Fei Wu
title: Investigating the Robustness of Natural Language Generation from Logical Forms via Counterfactual Samples
title_zh: 通过反事实样本研究逻辑形式自然语言生成的鲁棒性
comment: Accepted to appear at the main conference of EMNLP 2022
comments: Accepted to appear at the main conference of EMNLP 2022
abstract: The aim of Logic2Text is to generate controllable and faithful texts conditioned on tables and logical forms, which not only requires a deep understanding of the tables and logical forms, but also warrants symbolic reasoning over the tables. State-of-the-art methods based on pre-trained models have achieved remarkable performance on the standard test dataset. However, we question whether these methods really learn how to perform logical reasoning, rather than just relying on the spurious correlations between the headers of the tables and operators of the logical form. To verify this hypothesis, we manually construct a set of counterfactual samples, which modify the original logical forms to generate counterfactual logical forms with rarely co-occurred table headers and logical operators. SOTA methods give much worse results on these counterfactual samples compared with the results on the original test dataset, which verifies our hypothesis. To deal with this problem, we firstly analyze this bias from a causal perspective, based on which we propose two approaches to reduce the model's reliance on the shortcut. The first one incorporates the hierarchical structure of the logical forms into the model. The second one exploits automatically generated counterfactual data for training. Automatic and manual experimental results on the original test dataset and the counterfactual dataset show that our method is effective to alleviate the spurious correlation. Our work points out the weakness of previous methods and takes a further step toward developing Logic2Text models with real logical reasoning ability.
summary: The aim of Logic2Text is to generate controllable and faithful texts conditioned on tables and logical forms, which not only requires a deep understanding of the tables and logical forms, but also warrants symbolic reasoning over the tables. State-of-the-art methods based on pre-trained models have achieved remarkable performance on the standard test dataset. However, we question whether these methods really learn how to perform logical reasoning, rather than just relying on the spurious correlations between the headers of the tables and operators of the logical form. To verify this hypothesis, we manually construct a set of counterfactual samples, which modify the original logical forms to generate counterfactual logical forms with rarely co-occurred table headers and logical operators. SOTA methods give much worse results on these counterfactual samples compared with the results on the original test dataset, which verifies our hypothesis. To deal with this problem, we firstly analyze this bias from a causal perspective, based on which we propose two approaches to reduce the model's reliance on the shortcut. The first one incorporates the hierarchical structure of the logical forms into the model. The second one exploits automatically generated counterfactual data for training. Automatic and manual experimental results on the original test dataset and the counterfactual dataset show that our method is effective to alleviate the spurious correlation. Our work points out the weakness of previous methods and takes a further step toward developing Logic2Text models with real logical reasoning ability.
abstract_zh: Logic2Text的目标是生成以表格和逻辑形式为条件的可控且忠实的文本，这不仅需要对表格和逻辑形式的深入理解，而且还需要对表格进行符号推理。基于预训练模型的最先进方法在标准测试数据集上取得了显着的性能。然而，我们质疑这些方法是否真正学习如何执行逻辑推理，而不仅仅是依赖于表头和逻辑形式运算符之间的虚假相关性。为了验证这一假设，我们手动构造了一组反事实样本，这些样本修改原始逻辑形式以生成很少同时出现的表头和逻辑运算符的反事实逻辑形式。与原始测试数据集的结果相比，SOTA 方法在这些反事实样本上给出的结果要差得多，这验证了我们的假设。为了解决这个问题，我们首先从因果角度分析这种偏差，在此基础上我们提出了两种方法来减少模型对捷径的依赖。第一个将逻辑形式的层次结构合并到模型中。第二个利用自动生成的反事实数据进行训练。在原始测试数据集和反事实数据集上的自动和手动实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地减轻虚假相关性。我们的工作指出了以前方法的弱点，并朝着开发具有真正逻辑推理能力的 Logic2Text 模型迈出了进一步的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建反事实样本，研究逻辑形式到文本生成模型的鲁棒性，并提出方法减少模型对表头与逻辑算子间虚假相关性的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有逻辑到文本生成模型可能依赖表格表头与逻辑算子间的虚假相关性而非真实推理，需验证并改进其逻辑推理能力。
AI.method: 手动构造反事实样本破坏原始逻辑形式中的表头-算子关联，从因果角度分析偏差，并提出两种方法：融合逻辑形式层次结构、利用自动生成的反事实数据训练。
AI.result: SOTA模型在反事实样本上表现显著下降，验证了虚假相关性假设；所提方法在原始和反事实数据集上均有效缓解了该问题。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了先前方法的逻辑推理缺陷，通过结构建模与反事实训练提升了模型鲁棒性，推动了具备真实推理能力的Logic2Text模型发展。

authors_text: Rui Zhang,Xiaoyan Zhao,Bayu Distiawan Trisedya,Min Yang,Hong Cheng,Jianzhong Qi
title: TransAlign: Fully Automatic and Effective Entity Alignment for Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: TransAlign：知识图谱的全自动、有效的实体对齐
abstract: The task of entity alignment between knowledge graphs (KGs) aims to identify every pair of entities from two different KGs that represent the same entity. Many machine learning-based methods have been proposed for this task. However, to our best knowledge, existing methods all require manually crafted seed alignments, which are expensive to obtain. In this paper, we propose the first fully automatic alignment method named TransAlign, which does not require any manually crafted seed alignments. Specifically, for predicate embeddings, TransAlign constructs a predicate-proximity-graph to automatically capture the similarity between predicates across two KGs by learning the attention of entity types. For entity embeddings, TransAlign first computes the entity embeddings of each KG independently using TransE, and then shifts the two KGs' entity embeddings into the same vector space by computing the similarity between entities based on their attributes. Thus, both predicate alignment and entity alignment can be done without manually crafted seed alignments. TransAlign is not only fully automatic, but also highly effective. Experiments using real-world KGs show that TransAlign improves the accuracy of entity alignment significantly compared to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The task of entity alignment between knowledge graphs (KGs) aims to identify every pair of entities from two different KGs that represent the same entity. Many machine learning-based methods have been proposed for this task. However, to our best knowledge, existing methods all require manually crafted seed alignments, which are expensive to obtain. In this paper, we propose the first fully automatic alignment method named TransAlign, which does not require any manually crafted seed alignments. Specifically, for predicate embeddings, TransAlign constructs a predicate-proximity-graph to automatically capture the similarity between predicates across two KGs by learning the attention of entity types. For entity embeddings, TransAlign first computes the entity embeddings of each KG independently using TransE, and then shifts the two KGs' entity embeddings into the same vector space by computing the similarity between entities based on their attributes. Thus, both predicate alignment and entity alignment can be done without manually crafted seed alignments. TransAlign is not only fully automatic, but also highly effective. Experiments using real-world KGs show that TransAlign improves the accuracy of entity alignment significantly compared to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）之间的实体对齐任务旨在识别来自两个不同 KG 中代表同一实体的每对实体。为此任务提出了许多基于机器学习的方法。然而，据我们所知，现有方法都需要手动制作种子对齐，而获得这种方法的成本很高。在本文中，我们提出了第一个名为 TransAlign 的全自动对齐方法，它不需要任何手动制作的种子对齐。具体来说，对于谓词嵌入，TransAlign 构建了一个谓词邻近图，通过学习实体类型的注意力来自动捕获两个 KG 之间的谓词之间的相似性。对于实体嵌入，TransAlign 首先使用 TransE 独立计算每个 KG 的实体嵌入，然后根据实体的属性计算实体之间的相似度，将两个 KG 的实体嵌入转移到同一向量空间中。因此，谓词对齐和实体对齐都可以在无需手动制作种子对齐的情况下完成。 TransAlign 不仅是全自动的，而且非常高效。使用真实世界 KG 的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，TransAlign 显着提高了实体对齐的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工种子对齐的全自动知识图谱实体对齐方法TransAlign。
AI.motivation: 现有实体对齐方法依赖昂贵的人工种子对齐，缺乏全自动解决方案。
AI.method: 构建谓词接近图捕捉跨KG谓词相似性，使用TransE独立计算实体嵌入并通过属性相似性对齐向量空间。
AI.result: 在真实KG数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，提升实体对齐准确率。
AI.conclusion: TransAlign实现了无需人工干预的全自动高效实体对齐，解决了领域痛点。

authors_text: Wenkai Chen,Hongzhuo Liang,Zhaopeng Chen,Fuchun Sun,Jianwei Zhang
title: Learning 6-DoF Task-oriented Grasp Detection via Implicit Estimation and Visual Affordance
title_zh: 通过隐式估计和视觉可供性学习 6-DoF 面向任务的抓取检测
comment: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Accepted to the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Currently, task-oriented grasp detection approaches are mostly based on pixel-level affordance detection and semantic segmentation. These pixel-level approaches heavily rely on the accuracy of a 2D affordance mask, and the generated grasp candidates are restricted to a small workspace. To mitigate these limitations, we first construct a novel affordance-based grasp dataset and propose a 6-DoF task-oriented grasp detection framework, which takes the observed object point cloud as input and predicts diverse 6-DoF grasp poses for different tasks. Specifically, our implicit estimation network and visual affordance network in this framework could directly predict coarse grasp candidates, and corresponding 3D affordance heatmap for each potential task, respectively. Furthermore, the grasping scores from coarse grasps are combined with heatmap values to generate more accurate and finer candidates. Our proposed framework shows significant improvements compared to baselines for existing and novel objects on our simulation dataset. Although our framework is trained based on the simulated objects and environment, the final generated grasp candidates can be accurately and stably executed in real robot experiments when the object is randomly placed on a support surface.
summary: Currently, task-oriented grasp detection approaches are mostly based on pixel-level affordance detection and semantic segmentation. These pixel-level approaches heavily rely on the accuracy of a 2D affordance mask, and the generated grasp candidates are restricted to a small workspace. To mitigate these limitations, we first construct a novel affordance-based grasp dataset and propose a 6-DoF task-oriented grasp detection framework, which takes the observed object point cloud as input and predicts diverse 6-DoF grasp poses for different tasks. Specifically, our implicit estimation network and visual affordance network in this framework could directly predict coarse grasp candidates, and corresponding 3D affordance heatmap for each potential task, respectively. Furthermore, the grasping scores from coarse grasps are combined with heatmap values to generate more accurate and finer candidates. Our proposed framework shows significant improvements compared to baselines for existing and novel objects on our simulation dataset. Although our framework is trained based on the simulated objects and environment, the final generated grasp candidates can be accurately and stably executed in real robot experiments when the object is randomly placed on a support surface.
abstract_zh: 目前，面向任务的抓取检测方法主要基于像素级可供性检测和语义分割。这些像素级方法在很大程度上依赖于 2D 可供性掩模的准确性，并且生成的抓取候选对象仅限于较小的工作空间。为了减轻这些限制，我们首先构建了一个新颖的基于可供性的抓取数据集，并提出了一个面向 6-DoF 任务的抓取检测框架，该框架将观察到的对象点云作为输入，并预测不同任务的多种 6-DoF 抓取姿势。具体来说，该框架中的隐式估计网络和视觉可供性网络可以分别直接预测粗略掌握候选者以及每个潜在任务的相应 3D 可供性热图。此外，粗抓的抓握分数与热图值相结合，以生成更准确、更精细的候选对象。与我们的模拟数据集上现有和新颖对象的基线相比，我们提出的框架显示出显着的改进。尽管我们的框架是基于模拟物体和环境进行训练的，但当物体随机放置在支撑表面上时，最终生成的抓取候选可以在真实的机器人实验中准确稳定地执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式估计和视觉可操作性的6-DoF任务导向抓取检测框架，通过点云输入预测多样化抓取姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有像素级可操作性检测方法依赖2D掩码且工作空间受限，难以生成准确的抓取候选方案。
AI.method: 构建新型可操作性抓取数据集，设计包含隐式估计网络和视觉可操作性网络的框架，分别预测粗略抓取候选和3D可操作性热图，并融合两者生成精细候选。
AI.result: 在仿真数据集上显著优于基线方法，且在真实机器人实验中能稳定执行随机放置物体的抓取任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合隐式估计与视觉可操作性分析，有效提升了任务导向抓取的准确性与泛化能力。

search_text: Learning 6-DoF Task-oriented Grasp Detection via Implicit Estimation and Visual Affordance 通过隐式估计和视觉可供性学习 6-DoF 面向任务的抓取检测 Currently, task-oriented grasp detection approaches are mostly based on pixel-level affordance detection and semantic segmentation. These pixel-level approaches heavily rely on the accuracy of a 2D affordance mask, and the generated grasp candidates are restricted to a small workspace. To mitigate these limitations, we first construct a novel affordance-based grasp dataset and propose a 6-DoF task-oriented grasp detection framework, which takes the observed object point cloud as input and predicts diverse 6-DoF grasp poses for different tasks. Specifically, our implicit estimation network and visual affordance network in this framework could directly predict coarse grasp candidates, and corresponding 3D affordance heatmap for each potential task, respectively. Furthermore, the grasping scores from coarse grasps are combined with heatmap values to generate more accurate and finer candidates. Our proposed framework shows significant improvements compared to baselines for existing and novel objects on our simulation dataset. Although our framework is trained based on the simulated objects and environment, the final generated grasp candidates can be accurately and stably executed in real robot experiments when the object is randomly placed on a support surface. 目前，面向任务的抓取检测方法主要基于像素级可供性检测和语义分割。这些像素级方法在很大程度上依赖于 2D 可供性掩模的准确性，并且生成的抓取候选对象仅限于较小的工作空间。为了减轻这些限制，我们首先构建了一个新颖的基于可供性的抓取数据集，并提出了一个面向 6-DoF 任务的抓取检测框架，该框架将观察到的对象点云作为输入，并预测不同任务的多种 6-DoF 抓取姿势。具体来说，该框架中的隐式估计网络和视觉可供性网络可以分别直接预测粗略掌握候选者以及每个潜在任务的相应 3D 可供性热图。此外，粗抓的抓握分数与热图值相结合，以生成更准确、更精细的候选对象。与我们的模拟数据集上现有和新颖对象的基线相比，我们提出的框架显示出显着的改进。尽管我们的框架是基于模拟物体和环境进行训练的，但当物体随机放置在支撑表面上时，最终生成的抓取候选可以在真实的机器人实验中准确稳定地执行。 本文提出一种基于隐式估计和视觉可操作性的6-DoF任务导向抓取检测框架，通过点云输入预测多样化抓取姿态。 Wenkai Chen,Hongzhuo Liang,Zhaopeng Chen,Fuchun Sun,Jianwei Zhang cs.RO

authors_text: Gayal Kuruppu,Bumuthu Dilshan,Shehan Samarasinghe,Nipuna Madhushan,Ranga Rodrigo
title: Realistic, Animatable Human Reconstructions for Virtual Fit-On
title_zh: 逼真、可动画的人体重建，用于虚拟试穿
abstract: We present an end-to-end virtual try-on pipeline, that can fit different clothes on a personalized 3-D human model, reconstructed using a single RGB image. Our main idea is to construct an animatable 3-D human model and try-on different clothes in a 3-D virtual environment. The existing frame by frame volumetric reconstruction of 3-D human models are highly resource-demanding and do not allow clothes switching. Moreover, existing virtual fit-on systems also lack realism due to predominantly being 2-D or not using user's features in the reconstruction. These shortcomings are due to either the human body or clothing model being 2-D or not having the user's facial features in the dressed model. We solve these problems by manipulating a parametric representation of the 3-D human body model and stitching a head model reconstructed from the actual image. Fitting the 3-D clothing models on the parameterized human model is also adjustable to the body shape of the input image. Our reconstruction results, in comparison with recent existing work, are more visually-pleasing.
summary: We present an end-to-end virtual try-on pipeline, that can fit different clothes on a personalized 3-D human model, reconstructed using a single RGB image. Our main idea is to construct an animatable 3-D human model and try-on different clothes in a 3-D virtual environment. The existing frame by frame volumetric reconstruction of 3-D human models are highly resource-demanding and do not allow clothes switching. Moreover, existing virtual fit-on systems also lack realism due to predominantly being 2-D or not using user's features in the reconstruction. These shortcomings are due to either the human body or clothing model being 2-D or not having the user's facial features in the dressed model. We solve these problems by manipulating a parametric representation of the 3-D human body model and stitching a head model reconstructed from the actual image. Fitting the 3-D clothing models on the parameterized human model is also adjustable to the body shape of the input image. Our reconstruction results, in comparison with recent existing work, are more visually-pleasing.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个端到端的虚拟试穿流程，可以在使用单个 RGB 图像重建的个性化 3D 人体模型上试穿不同的衣服。我们的主要想法是构建一个可动画的 3D 人体模型，并在 3D 虚拟环境中试穿不同的衣服。现有的 3D 人体模型逐帧体积重建对资源要求很高，并且不允许更换衣服。此外，现有的虚拟试戴系统由于主要是二维的或者在重建中不使用用户的特征而缺乏真实感。这些缺点是由于人体或服装模型是二维的或者在着装模型中不具有用户的面部特征。我们通过操纵 3D 人体模型的参数化表示并缝合从实际图像重建的头部模型来解决这些问题。在参数化人体模型上拟合 3D 服装模型也可以根据输入图像的体形进行调整。与最近的现有工作相比，我们的重建结果在视觉上更加令人愉悦。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端虚拟试穿系统，通过单张RGB图像重建可动画的3D人体模型，并在3D环境中实现个性化衣物试穿。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟试穿系统存在资源消耗高、无法切换衣物、缺乏真实感及个性化等问题，主要受限于2D建模和未整合用户特征。
AI.method: 通过参数化3D人体模型与图像重建的头部模型融合，结合可调节的3D服装模型适配输入图像的身体形态。
AI.result: 相较现有方法，重建结果在视觉效果上更具真实感和个性化表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了虚拟试穿系统在真实感、可动画性及用户特征整合方面的技术瓶颈。

authors_text: Yuyuan Zeng,Bowen Zhao,Shanzhao Qiu,Tao Dai,Shu-Tao Xia
title: Towards Effective Image Manipulation Detection with Proposal Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过提案对比学习实现有效的图像操纵检测
abstract: Deep models have been widely and successfully used in image manipulation detection, which aims to classify tampered images and localize tampered regions. Most existing methods mainly focus on extracting global features from tampered images, while neglecting the relationships of local features between tampered and authentic regions within a single tampered image. To exploit such spatial relationships, we propose Proposal Contrastive Learning (PCL) for effective image manipulation detection. Our PCL consists of a two-stream architecture by extracting two types of global features from RGB and noise views respectively. To further improve the discriminative power, we exploit the relationships of local features through a proxy proposal contrastive learning task by attracting/repelling proposal-based positive/negative sample pairs. Moreover, we show that our PCL can be easily adapted to unlabeled data in practice, which can reduce manual labeling costs and promote more generalizable features. Extensive experiments among several standard datasets demonstrate that our PCL can be a general module to obtain consistent improvement. The code is available at https://github.com/Sandy-Zeng/PCL.
summary: Deep models have been widely and successfully used in image manipulation detection, which aims to classify tampered images and localize tampered regions. Most existing methods mainly focus on extracting global features from tampered images, while neglecting the relationships of local features between tampered and authentic regions within a single tampered image. To exploit such spatial relationships, we propose Proposal Contrastive Learning (PCL) for effective image manipulation detection. Our PCL consists of a two-stream architecture by extracting two types of global features from RGB and noise views respectively. To further improve the discriminative power, we exploit the relationships of local features through a proxy proposal contrastive learning task by attracting/repelling proposal-based positive/negative sample pairs. Moreover, we show that our PCL can be easily adapted to unlabeled data in practice, which can reduce manual labeling costs and promote more generalizable features. Extensive experiments among several standard datasets demonstrate that our PCL can be a general module to obtain consistent improvement. The code is available at https://github.com/Sandy-Zeng/PCL.
abstract_zh: 深度模型已广泛且成功地应用于图像篡改检测，其目的是对篡改图像进行分类并定位篡改区域。大多数现有方法主要侧重于从篡改图像中提取全局特征，而忽略了单个篡改图像内篡改区域和真实区域之间的局部特征之间的关系。为了利用这种空间关系，我们提出了提案对比学习（PCL）来进行有效的图像操纵检测。我们的 PCL 由双流架构组成，分别从 RGB 和噪声视图中提取两种类型的全局特征。为了进一步提高判别力，我们通过吸引/排斥基于提案的正/负样本对，通过代理提案对比学习任务来利用局部特征的关系。此外，我们表明我们的 PCL 在实践中可以轻松适应未标记的数据，这可以减少手动标记成本并促进更通用的功能。在多个标准数据集之间进行的大量实验表明，我们的 PCL 可以成为获得一致改进的通用模块。代码可在 https://github.com/Sandy-Zeng/PCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Proposal Contrastive Learning (PCL)的新方法，用于提升图像篡改检测的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注图像全局特征，忽视了单张篡改图像中篡改区域与真实区域之间的局部特征关系，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计了双流架构分别提取RGB和噪声视角的全局特征，并通过代理提案对比学习任务，利用局部特征的吸引/排斥机制增强判别能力。同时支持无标签数据的自适应训练。
AI.result: 在多个标准数据集上实验表明，PCL模块能带来一致性的性能提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PCL通过建模局部特征关系和适应无标签数据，为图像篡改检测提供了通用且有效的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Proposal Contrastive Learning (PCL)的新方法，用于提升图像篡改检测的效果。
motivation: 现有方法主要关注图像全局特征，忽视了单张篡改图像中篡改区域与真实区域之间的局部特征关系，导致检测效果受限。
method: 设计了双流架构分别提取RGB和噪声视角的全局特征，并通过代理提案对比学习任务，利用局部特征的吸引/排斥机制增强判别能力。同时支持无标签数据的自适应训练。
result: 在多个标准数据集上实验表明，PCL模块能带来一致性的性能提升，代码已开源。
conclusion: PCL通过建模局部特征关系和适应无标签数据，为图像篡改检测提供了通用且有效的解决方案。
search_text: Towards Effective Image Manipulation Detection with Proposal Contrastive Learning 通过提案对比学习实现有效的图像操纵检测 Deep models have been widely and successfully used in image manipulation detection, which aims to classify tampered images and localize tampered regions. Most existing methods mainly focus on extracting global features from tampered images, while neglecting the relationships of local features between tampered and authentic regions within a single tampered image. To exploit such spatial relationships, we propose Proposal Contrastive Learning (PCL) for effective image manipulation detection. Our PCL consists of a two-stream architecture by extracting two types of global features from RGB and noise views respectively. To further improve the discriminative power, we exploit the relationships of local features through a proxy proposal contrastive learning task by attracting/repelling proposal-based positive/negative sample pairs. Moreover, we show that our PCL can be easily adapted to unlabeled data in practice, which can reduce manual labeling costs and promote more generalizable features. Extensive experiments among several standard datasets demonstrate that our PCL can be a general module to obtain consistent improvement. The code is available at https://github.com/Sandy-Zeng/PCL. 深度模型已广泛且成功地应用于图像篡改检测，其目的是对篡改图像进行分类并定位篡改区域。大多数现有方法主要侧重于从篡改图像中提取全局特征，而忽略了单个篡改图像内篡改区域和真实区域之间的局部特征之间的关系。为了利用这种空间关系，我们提出了提案对比学习（PCL）来进行有效的图像操纵检测。我们的 PCL 由双流架构组成，分别从 RGB 和噪声视图中提取两种类型的全局特征。为了进一步提高判别力，我们通过吸引/排斥基于提案的正/负样本对，通过代理提案对比学习任务来利用局部特征的关系。此外，我们表明我们的 PCL 在实践中可以轻松适应未标记的数据，这可以减少手动标记成本并促进更通用的功能。在多个标准数据集之间进行的大量实验表明，我们的 PCL 可以成为获得一致改进的通用模块。代码可在 https://github.com/Sandy-Zeng/PCL 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Proposal Contrastive Learning (PCL)的新方法，用于提升图像篡改检测的效果。 Yuyuan Zeng,Bowen Zhao,Shanzhao Qiu,Tao Dai,Shu-Tao Xia cs.CV

authors_text: Shengxi Li,Xinyi Zhao,Ljubisa Stankovic,Danilo Mandic
title: Demystifying CNNs for Images by Matched Filters
title_zh: 通过匹配滤波器揭开图像 CNN 的神秘面纱
abstract: The success of convolution neural networks (CNN) has been revolutionising the way we approach and use intelligent machines in the Big Data era. Despite success, CNNs have been consistently put under scrutiny owing to their \textit{black-box} nature, an \textit{ad hoc} manner of their construction, together with the lack of theoretical support and physical meanings of their operation. This has been prohibitive to both the quantitative and qualitative understanding of CNNs, and their application in more sensitive areas such as AI for health. We set out to address these issues, and in this way demystify the operation of CNNs, by employing the perspective of matched filtering. We first illuminate that the convolution operation, the very core of CNNs, represents a matched filter which aims to identify the presence of features in input data. This then serves as a vehicle to interpret the convolution-activation-pooling chain in CNNs under the theoretical umbrella of matched filtering, a common operation in signal processing. We further provide extensive examples and experiments to illustrate this connection, whereby the learning in CNNs is shown to also perform matched filtering, which further sheds light onto physical meaning of learnt parameters and layers. It is our hope that this material will provide new insights into the understanding, constructing and analysing of CNNs, as well as paving the way for developing new methods and architectures of CNNs.
summary: The success of convolution neural networks (CNN) has been revolutionising the way we approach and use intelligent machines in the Big Data era. Despite success, CNNs have been consistently put under scrutiny owing to their \textit{black-box} nature, an \textit{ad hoc} manner of their construction, together with the lack of theoretical support and physical meanings of their operation. This has been prohibitive to both the quantitative and qualitative understanding of CNNs, and their application in more sensitive areas such as AI for health. We set out to address these issues, and in this way demystify the operation of CNNs, by employing the perspective of matched filtering. We first illuminate that the convolution operation, the very core of CNNs, represents a matched filter which aims to identify the presence of features in input data. This then serves as a vehicle to interpret the convolution-activation-pooling chain in CNNs under the theoretical umbrella of matched filtering, a common operation in signal processing. We further provide extensive examples and experiments to illustrate this connection, whereby the learning in CNNs is shown to also perform matched filtering, which further sheds light onto physical meaning of learnt parameters and layers. It is our hope that this material will provide new insights into the understanding, constructing and analysing of CNNs, as well as paving the way for developing new methods and architectures of CNNs.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的成功彻底改变了我们在大数据时代处理和使用智能机器的方式。尽管取得了成功，但由于 CNN 的 \textit{黑盒} 性质、\textit{ad hoc} 构造方式以及缺乏理论支持和其操作的物理意义，CNN 一直受到密切关注。这阻碍了对 CNN 的定量和定性理解，也阻碍了它们在健康人工智能等更敏感领域的应用。我们着手解决这些问题，并通过采用匹配过滤的角度来揭开 CNN 运行的神秘面纱。我们首先阐明，卷积运算是 CNN 的核心，它代表一个匹配滤波器，旨在识别输入数据中是否存在特征。然后，这可以作为在匹配滤波（信号处理中的常见操作）理论框架下解释 CNN 中的卷积-激活-池化链的工具。我们进一步提供了大量的示例和实验来说明这种联系，其中 CNN 中的学习也可以执行匹配过滤，这进一步揭示了学习参数和层的物理意义。我们希望这些材料能够为理解、构建和分析 CNN 提供新的见解，并为开发 CNN 的新方法和架构铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 通过匹配滤波理论解释CNN的工作原理，解决其黑箱问题
AI.motivation: CNN虽成功但存在黑箱性、构造随意及缺乏理论支持，阻碍其在敏感领域（如医疗AI）的应用，需理论解释以增强理解和应用
AI.method: 将卷积操作视为匹配滤波，从信号处理理论解释CNN的卷积-激活-池化流程，并通过实验验证学习过程的匹配滤波特性
AI.result: 证明CNN学习本质为匹配滤波，赋予参数物理意义，并提供新见解以指导CNN设计与分析
AI.conclusion: 为CNN的理解、构建与分析提供新视角，并推动新方法和架构的发展

authors_text: Rui Li,Guodong Ma,Dexin Zhao,Ranran Zeng,Xiaoyu Li,Hao Huang
title: A Policy-based Approach to the SpecAugment Method for Low Resource E2E ASR
title_zh: 基于策略的低资源 E2E ASR 规范增强方法
abstract: SpecAugment is a very effective data augmentation method for both HMM and E2E-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. Especially, it also works in low-resource scenarios. However, SpecAugment masks the spectrum of time or the frequency domain in a fixed augmentation policy, which may bring relatively less data diversity to the low-resource ASR. In this paper, we propose a policy-based SpecAugment (Policy-SpecAugment) method to alleviate the above problem. The idea is to use the augmentation-select policy and the augmentation-parameter changing policy to solve the fixed way. These policies are learned based on the loss of validation set, which is applied to the corresponding augmentation policies. It aims to encourage the model to learn more diverse data, which the model relatively requires. In experiments, we evaluate the effectiveness of our approach in low-resource scenarios, i.e., the 100 hours librispeech task. According to the results and analysis, we can see that the above issue can be obviously alleviated using our proposal. In addition, the experimental results show that, compared with the state-of-the-art SpecAugment, the proposed Policy-SpecAugment has a relative WER reduction of more than 10% on the Test/Dev-clean set, more than 5% on the Test/Dev-other set, and an absolute WER reduction of more than 1% on all test sets.
summary: SpecAugment is a very effective data augmentation method for both HMM and E2E-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. Especially, it also works in low-resource scenarios. However, SpecAugment masks the spectrum of time or the frequency domain in a fixed augmentation policy, which may bring relatively less data diversity to the low-resource ASR. In this paper, we propose a policy-based SpecAugment (Policy-SpecAugment) method to alleviate the above problem. The idea is to use the augmentation-select policy and the augmentation-parameter changing policy to solve the fixed way. These policies are learned based on the loss of validation set, which is applied to the corresponding augmentation policies. It aims to encourage the model to learn more diverse data, which the model relatively requires. In experiments, we evaluate the effectiveness of our approach in low-resource scenarios, i.e., the 100 hours librispeech task. According to the results and analysis, we can see that the above issue can be obviously alleviated using our proposal. In addition, the experimental results show that, compared with the state-of-the-art SpecAugment, the proposed Policy-SpecAugment has a relative WER reduction of more than 10% on the Test/Dev-clean set, more than 5% on the Test/Dev-other set, and an absolute WER reduction of more than 1% on all test sets.
abstract_zh: SpecAugment 是一种非常有效的数据增强方法，适用于 HMM 和基于 E2E 的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统。特别是，它也适用于资源匮乏的场景。然而，SpecAugment以固定的增强策略屏蔽了时域或频域的频谱，这可能会给低资源ASR带来相对较少的数据多样性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于策略的SpecAugment（Policy-SpecAugment）方法来缓解上述问题。其思想是使用增强选择策略和增强参数改变策略来解决固定方式。这些策略是基于验证集的损失来学习的，该验证集应用于相应的增强策略。它的目的是鼓励模型学习模型相对需要的更多样化的数据。在实验中，我们评估了我们的方法在低资源场景（即 100 小时 librispeech 任务）中的有效性。根据结果​​和分析，我们可以看到使用我们的方案可以明显缓解上述问题。此外，实验结果表明，与最先进的SpecAugment相比，所提出的Policy-SpecAugment在Test/Dev-clean集上相对WER降低了10%以上，在Test/Dev-other集上相对WER降低了5%以上，在所有测试集上绝对WER降低了1%以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于策略的SpecAugment方法（Policy-SpecAugment），旨在通过动态调整数据增强策略来提升低资源端到端语音识别（E2E ASR）系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SpecAugment方法在低资源场景下因使用固定增强策略导致数据多样性不足，限制了模型学习效果。本文希望通过动态策略优化解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过引入增强选择策略和增强参数调整策略，基于验证集损失动态学习最优增强政策，以提升数据多样性并适应模型需求。
AI.result: 在100小时LibriSpeech任务中，相比现有SpecAugment方法，在Test/Dev-clean集上相对词错误率（WER）降低超10%，在Test/Dev-other集上降低超5%，所有测试集绝对WER降低超1%。
AI.conclusion: Policy-SpecAugment有效缓解了低资源场景下的数据多样性不足问题，显著优于现有方法，为低资源ASR提供了更优的数据增强方案。
