According to the results and analysis, we can see that the above issue can be obviously alleviated using our proposal. In addition, the experimental results show that, compared with the state-of-the-art SpecAugment, the proposed Policy-SpecAugment has a relative WER reduction of more than 10% on the Test/Dev-clean set, more than 5% on the Test/Dev-other set, and an absolute WER reduction of more than 1% on all test sets. SpecAugment 是一种非常有效的数据增强方法，适用于 HMM 和基于 E2E 的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统。特别是，它也适用于资源匮乏的场景。然而，SpecAugment以固定的增强策略屏蔽了时域或频域的频谱，这可能会给低资源ASR带来相对较少的数据多样性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于策略的SpecAugment（Policy-SpecAugment）方法来缓解上述问题。其思想是使用增强选择策略和增强参数改变策略来解决固定方式。这些策略是基于验证集的损失来学习的，该验证集应用于相应的增强策略。它的目的是鼓励模型学习模型相对需要的更多样化的数据。在实验中，我们评估了我们的方法在低资源场景（即 100 小时 librispeech 任务）中的有效性。根据结果​​和分析，我们可以看到使用我们的方案可以明显缓解上述问题。此外，实验结果表明，与最先进的SpecAugment相比，所提出的Policy-SpecAugment在Test/Dev-clean集上相对WER降低了10%以上，在Test/Dev-other集上相对WER降低了5%以上，在所有测试集上绝对WER降低了1%以上。 本文提出了一种基于策略的SpecAugment方法（Policy-SpecAugment），旨在通过动态调整数据增强策略来提升低资源端到端语音识别（E2E ASR）系统的性能。 Rui Li,Guodong Ma,Dexin Zhao,Ranran Zeng,Xiaoyu Li,Hao Huang cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Pengchong Qiao,Zhidan Wei,Yu Wang,Zhennan Wang,Guoli Song,Fan Xu,Xiangyang Ji,Chang Liu,Jie Chen
title: Fuzzy Positive Learning for Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 半监督语义分割的模糊正向学习
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) essentially pursues class boundary exploration with less dependence on human annotations. Although typical attempts focus on ameliorating the inevitable error-prone pseudo-labeling, we think differently and resort to exhausting informative semantics from multiple probably correct candidate labels. In this paper, we introduce Fuzzy Positive Learning (FPL) for accurate SSL semantic segmentation in a plug-and-play fashion, targeting adaptively encouraging fuzzy positive predictions and suppressing highly-probable negatives. Being conceptually simple yet practically effective, FPL can remarkably alleviate interference from wrong pseudo labels and progressively achieve clear pixel-level semantic discrimination. Concretely, our FPL approach consists of two main components, including fuzzy positive assignment (FPA) to provide an adaptive number of labels for each pixel and fuzzy positive regularization (FPR) to restrict the predictions of fuzzy positive categories to be larger than the rest under different perturbations. Theoretical analysis and extensive experiments on Cityscapes and VOC 2012 with consistent performance gain justify the superiority of our approach.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) essentially pursues class boundary exploration with less dependence on human annotations. Although typical attempts focus on ameliorating the inevitable error-prone pseudo-labeling, we think differently and resort to exhausting informative semantics from multiple probably correct candidate labels. In this paper, we introduce Fuzzy Positive Learning (FPL) for accurate SSL semantic segmentation in a plug-and-play fashion, targeting adaptively encouraging fuzzy positive predictions and suppressing highly-probable negatives. Being conceptually simple yet practically effective, FPL can remarkably alleviate interference from wrong pseudo labels and progressively achieve clear pixel-level semantic discrimination. Concretely, our FPL approach consists of two main components, including fuzzy positive assignment (FPA) to provide an adaptive number of labels for each pixel and fuzzy positive regularization (FPR) to restrict the predictions of fuzzy positive categories to be larger than the rest under different perturbations. Theoretical analysis and extensive experiments on Cityscapes and VOC 2012 with consistent performance gain justify the superiority of our approach.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）本质上追求类边界探索，减少对人类注释的依赖。尽管典型的尝试侧重于改善不可避免的容易出错的伪标签，但我们的想法不同，并诉诸于从多个可能正确的候选标签中穷尽信息语义。在本文中，我们引入了模糊正学习（FPL），以即插即用的方式进行准确的 SSL 语义分割，目标是自适应地鼓励模糊正预测并抑制高概率的负预测。 FPL概念简单但实际上有效，可以显着减轻错误伪标签的干扰，并逐步实现清晰的像素级语义区分。具体来说，我们的 FPL 方法由两个主要组成部分组成，包括模糊正分配（FPA），为每个像素提供自适应数量的标签；模糊正正则化（FPR），以限制模糊正类别的预测在不同扰动下大于其他类别。对 Cityscapes 和 VOC 2012 的理论分析和广泛实验具有一致的性能增益，证明了我们方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Fuzzy Positive Learning (FPL)的半监督语义分割方法，通过自适应模糊正样本学习提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统半监督学习过度依赖伪标签修正，而本文认为应从多个可能正确的候选标签中挖掘信息，以减少错误伪标签的干扰。
AI.method: FPL包含两个核心组件：模糊正样本分配(FPA)为每个像素动态分配标签数量，模糊正则化(FPR)通过扰动约束模糊正类预测值高于其他类别。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和VOC 2012数据集上实验表明，FPL在保持模型简洁性的同时显著提升了分割性能，理论分析验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: FPL通过自适应模糊正样本学习有效抑制错误伪标签干扰，实现了像素级语义的清晰区分，为半监督分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiantong Zhao,Yinan Han,Shengjing Tian,Jian Liu,Xiuping Liu
title: OST: Efficient One-stream Network for 3D Single Object Tracking in Point Clouds
title_zh: MOST：用于点云中 3D 单对象跟踪的高效单流网络
abstract: Although recent Siamese network-based trackers have achieved impressive perceptual accuracy for single object tracking in LiDAR point clouds, they usually utilized heavy correlation operations to capture category-level characteristics only, and overlook the inherent merit of arbitrariness in contrast to multiple object tracking. In this work, we propose a radically novel one-stream network with the strength of the instance-level encoding, which avoids the correlation operations occurring in previous Siamese network, thus considerably reducing the computational effort. In particular, the proposed method mainly consists of a Template-aware Transformer Module (TTM) and a Multi-scale Feature Aggregation (MFA) module capable of fusing spatial and semantic information. The TTM stitches the specified template and the search region together and leverages an attention mechanism to establish the information flow, breaking the previous pattern of independent \textit{extraction-and-correlation}. As a result, this module makes it possible to directly generate template-aware features that are suitable for the arbitrary and continuously changing nature of the target, enabling the model to deal with unseen categories. In addition, the MFA is proposed to make spatial and semantic information complementary to each other, which is characterized by reverse directional feature propagation that aggregates information from shallow to deep layers. Extensive experiments on KITTI and nuScenes demonstrate that our method has achieved considerable performance not only for class-specific tracking but also for class-agnostic tracking with less computation and higher efficiency.
summary: Although recent Siamese network-based trackers have achieved impressive perceptual accuracy for single object tracking in LiDAR point clouds, they usually utilized heavy correlation operations to capture category-level characteristics only, and overlook the inherent merit of arbitrariness in contrast to multiple object tracking. In this work, we propose a radically novel one-stream network with the strength of the instance-level encoding, which avoids the correlation operations occurring in previous Siamese network, thus considerably reducing the computational effort. In particular, the proposed method mainly consists of a Template-aware Transformer Module (TTM) and a Multi-scale Feature Aggregation (MFA) module capable of fusing spatial and semantic information. The TTM stitches the specified template and the search region together and leverages an attention mechanism to establish the information flow, breaking the previous pattern of independent \textit{extraction-and-correlation}. As a result, this module makes it possible to directly generate template-aware features that are suitable for the arbitrary and continuously changing nature of the target, enabling the model to deal with unseen categories. In addition, the MFA is proposed to make spatial and semantic information complementary to each other, which is characterized by reverse directional feature propagation that aggregates information from shallow to deep layers. Extensive experiments on KITTI and nuScenes demonstrate that our method has achieved considerable performance not only for class-specific tracking but also for class-agnostic tracking with less computation and higher efficiency.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近的基于连体网络的跟踪器在激光雷达点云中的单个目标跟踪方面取得了令人印象深刻的感知精度，但它们通常利用大量的相关操作来仅捕获类别级特征，而忽略了与多个目标跟踪相比的任意性的固有优点。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有实例级编码强度的全新单流网络，它避免了先前暹罗网络中发生的相关操作，从而大大减少了计算量。特别地，所提出的方法主要由模板感知转换器模块（TTM）和能够融合空间和语义信息的多尺度特征聚合（MFA）模块组成。 TTM将指定模板和搜索区域拼接在一起，并利用注意力机制建立信息流，打破了之前独立\textit{提取和相关}的模式。因此，该模块可以直接生成适合目标的任意且不断变化的性质的模板感知特征，使模型能够处理看不见的类别。此外，MFA的提出是为了使空间信息和语义信息互补，其特点是反向特征传播，聚合从浅层到深层的信息。在 KITTI 和 nuScenes 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法不仅在特定于类的跟踪方面取得了相当大的性能，而且在与类无关的跟踪方面也取得了相当大的性能，计算量更少，效率更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的单流网络OST，用于点云中的3D单目标跟踪，通过避免传统相关操作并引入实例级编码提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Siamese网络的跟踪器在LiDAR点云中依赖计算量大的相关操作，仅捕捉类别级特征，忽视了单目标跟踪中目标任意性与动态变化的特性。
AI.method: 设计包含模板感知Transformer模块（TTM）和多尺度特征聚合模块（MFA）的单流网络，TTM通过注意力机制融合模板与搜索区域信息，MFA采用反向特征传播聚合空域与语义信息。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上，OST在类别特定跟踪和类别无关跟踪任务中均取得较高性能，计算量显著低于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: OST通过实例级编码与模块化设计，在保证跟踪精度的同时显著提升了点云单目标跟踪的计算效率。

authors_text: Azhan Mohammed
title: ResAttUNet: Detecting Marine Debris using an Attention activated Residual UNet
title_zh: ResAttUNet：使用注意力激活的残差 UNet 检测海洋碎片
abstract: Currently, a significant amount of research has been done in field of Remote Sensing with the use of deep learning techniques. The introduction of Marine Debris Archive (MARIDA), an open-source dataset with benchmark results, for marine debris detection opened new pathways to use deep learning techniques for the task of debris detection and segmentation. This paper introduces a novel attention based segmentation technique that outperforms the existing state-of-the-art results introduced with MARIDA. The paper presents a novel spatial aware encoder and decoder architecture to maintain the contextual information and structure of sparse ground truth patches present in the images. The attained results are expected to pave the path for further research involving deep learning using remote sensing images. The code is available at https://github.com/sheikhazhanmohammed/SADMA.git
summary: Currently, a significant amount of research has been done in field of Remote Sensing with the use of deep learning techniques. The introduction of Marine Debris Archive (MARIDA), an open-source dataset with benchmark results, for marine debris detection opened new pathways to use deep learning techniques for the task of debris detection and segmentation. This paper introduces a novel attention based segmentation technique that outperforms the existing state-of-the-art results introduced with MARIDA. The paper presents a novel spatial aware encoder and decoder architecture to maintain the contextual information and structure of sparse ground truth patches present in the images. The attained results are expected to pave the path for further research involving deep learning using remote sensing images. The code is available at https://github.com/sheikhazhanmohammed/SADMA.git
abstract_zh: 目前，利用深度学习技术在遥感领域进行了大量研究。海洋碎片档案 (MARIDA) 是一个具有基准结果的开源数据集，用于海洋碎片检测，它的推出为使用深度学习技术进行碎片检测和分割任务开辟了新途径。本文介绍了一种新颖的基于注意力的分割技术，该技术优于 MARIDA 引入的现有最先进的结果。该论文提出了一种新颖的空间感知编码器和解码器架构，以维护图像中存在的稀疏地面实况补丁的上下文信息和结构。所获得的结果预计将为涉及使用遥感图像的深度学习的进一步研究铺平道路。代码可在 https://github.com/sheikhazhanmohammed/SADMA.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的ResAttUNet模型，用于海洋垃圾检测与分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有海洋垃圾检测方法在处理稀疏标注数据时存在上下文信息丢失问题，需改进分割精度。
AI.method: 设计包含空间感知编码器-解码器结构的ResAttUNet，结合注意力机制增强特征表达与上下文关联性。
AI.result: 在MARIDA数据集上实现优于现有SOTA方法的分割性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的注意力激活残差UNet架构为遥感图像海洋垃圾检测提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Ben Zandonati,Adrian Alan Pol,Maurizio Pierini,Olya Sirkin,Tal Kopetz
title: FIT: A Metric for Model Sensitivity
title_zh: FIT：模型灵敏度的指标
abstract: Model compression is vital to the deployment of deep learning on edge devices. Low precision representations, achieved via quantization of weights and activations, can reduce inference time and memory requirements. However, quantifying and predicting the response of a model to the changes associated with this procedure remains challenging. This response is non-linear and heterogeneous throughout the network. Understanding which groups of parameters and activations are more sensitive to quantization than others is a critical stage in maximizing efficiency. For this purpose, we propose FIT. Motivated by an information geometric perspective, FIT combines the Fisher information with a model of quantization. We find that FIT can estimate the final performance of a network without retraining. FIT effectively fuses contributions from both parameter and activation quantization into a single metric. Additionally, FIT is fast to compute when compared to existing methods, demonstrating favourable convergence properties. These properties are validated experimentally across hundreds of quantization configurations, with a focus on layer-wise mixed-precision quantization.
summary: Model compression is vital to the deployment of deep learning on edge devices. Low precision representations, achieved via quantization of weights and activations, can reduce inference time and memory requirements. However, quantifying and predicting the response of a model to the changes associated with this procedure remains challenging. This response is non-linear and heterogeneous throughout the network. Understanding which groups of parameters and activations are more sensitive to quantization than others is a critical stage in maximizing efficiency. For this purpose, we propose FIT. Motivated by an information geometric perspective, FIT combines the Fisher information with a model of quantization. We find that FIT can estimate the final performance of a network without retraining. FIT effectively fuses contributions from both parameter and activation quantization into a single metric. Additionally, FIT is fast to compute when compared to existing methods, demonstrating favourable convergence properties. These properties are validated experimentally across hundreds of quantization configurations, with a focus on layer-wise mixed-precision quantization.
abstract_zh: 模型压缩对于在边缘设备上部署深度学习至关重要。通过权重和激活的量化实现的低精度表示可以减少推理时间和内存需求。然而，量化和预测模型对与此过程相关的变化的响应仍然具有挑战性。这种响应在整个网络中是非线性且异构的。了解哪些参数和激活组比其他组对量化更敏感是最大化效率的关键阶段。为此，我们提出FIT。受信息几何视角的推动，FIT 将 Fisher 信息与量化模型相结合。我们发现 FIT 可以估计网络的最终性能而无需重新训练。 FIT 有效地将参数和激活量化的贡献融合到单个度量中。此外，与现有方法相比，FIT 的计算速度很快，表现出良好的收敛特性。这些属性在数百种量化配置中进行了实验验证，重点是分层混合精度量化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FIT指标，用于评估深度学习模型在量化过程中的敏感性，以优化模型压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 量化过程导致模型响应非线性且异构，难以预测性能变化，需识别敏感参数以提升压缩效率。
AI.method: 基于信息几何视角，结合费舍尔信息与量化模型，设计FIT指标融合参数和激活量化的贡献。
AI.result: FIT无需重新训练即可估计模型性能，计算速度快且收敛性良好，实验验证了其在多种量化配置中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FIT为模型量化提供了快速有效的敏感性评估方法，有助于优化分层混合精度量化策略。

authors_text: Xi Lin,Zhiyuan Yang,Xiaoyuan Zhang,Qingfu Zhang
title: Pareto Set Learning for Expensive Multi-Objective Optimization
title_zh: 用于昂贵的多目标优化的帕累托集学习
comment: To appear in 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: To appear in 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Expensive multi-objective optimization problems can be found in many real-world applications, where their objective function evaluations involve expensive computations or physical experiments. It is desirable to obtain an approximate Pareto front with a limited evaluation budget. Multi-objective Bayesian optimization (MOBO) has been widely used for finding a finite set of Pareto optimal solutions. However, it is well-known that the whole Pareto set is on a continuous manifold and can contain infinite solutions. The structural properties of the Pareto set are not well exploited in existing MOBO methods, and the finite-set approximation may not contain the most preferred solution(s) for decision-makers. This paper develops a novel learning-based method to approximate the whole Pareto set for MOBO, which generalizes the decomposition-based multi-objective optimization algorithm (MOEA/D) from finite populations to models. We design a simple and powerful acquisition search method based on the learned Pareto set, which naturally supports batch evaluation. In addition, with our proposed model, decision-makers can readily explore any trade-off area in the approximate Pareto set for flexible decision-making. This work represents the first attempt to model the Pareto set for expensive multi-objective optimization. Experimental results on different synthetic and real-world problems demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Expensive multi-objective optimization problems can be found in many real-world applications, where their objective function evaluations involve expensive computations or physical experiments. It is desirable to obtain an approximate Pareto front with a limited evaluation budget. Multi-objective Bayesian optimization (MOBO) has been widely used for finding a finite set of Pareto optimal solutions. However, it is well-known that the whole Pareto set is on a continuous manifold and can contain infinite solutions. The structural properties of the Pareto set are not well exploited in existing MOBO methods, and the finite-set approximation may not contain the most preferred solution(s) for decision-makers. This paper develops a novel learning-based method to approximate the whole Pareto set for MOBO, which generalizes the decomposition-based multi-objective optimization algorithm (MOEA/D) from finite populations to models. We design a simple and powerful acquisition search method based on the learned Pareto set, which naturally supports batch evaluation. In addition, with our proposed model, decision-makers can readily explore any trade-off area in the approximate Pareto set for flexible decision-making. This work represents the first attempt to model the Pareto set for expensive multi-objective optimization. Experimental results on different synthetic and real-world problems demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在许多实际应用中都可以找到昂贵的多目标优化问题，其中目标函数评估涉及昂贵的计算或物理实验。希望在有限的评估预算下获得近似的帕累托前沿。多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO）已广泛用于寻找有限的帕累托最优解集。然而，众所周知，整个帕累托集位于连续流形上，并且可以包含无限个解。现有的 MOBO 方法没有很好地利用 Pareto 集的结构特性，并且有限集近似可能不包含决策者最优选的解。本文开发了一种新颖的基于学习的方法来近似 MOBO 的整个帕累托集，该方法将基于分解的多目标优化算法（MOEA/D）从有限总体推广到模型。我们基于学习到的 Pareto 集设计了一种简单而强大的采集搜索方法，它自然支持批量评估。此外，通过我们提出的模型，决策者可以轻松探索近似帕累托集中的任何权衡区域，以进行灵活的决策。这项工作代表了对帕累托集进行建模以进行昂贵的多目标优化的首次尝试。对不同合成问题和现实世界问题的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的方法，用于在昂贵的多目标优化问题中近似整个Pareto集，以克服现有方法对有限解集的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO）方法难以利用Pareto集的连续流形结构，导致有限解集可能遗漏决策者最偏好的解。
AI.method: 将分解式多目标优化算法（MOEA/D）从有限种群扩展为模型，设计基于学习到的Pareto集的获取搜索方法，并支持批量评估与灵活决策探索。
AI.result: 在多个合成和实际问题上的实验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次尝试对昂贵多目标优化的Pareto集进行建模，方法在近似整个Pareto集和决策灵活性方面表现优异。

search_text: Pareto Set Learning for Expensive Multi-Objective Optimization 用于昂贵的多目标优化的帕累托集学习 Expensive multi-objective optimization problems can be found in many real-world applications, where their objective function evaluations involve expensive computations or physical experiments. It is desirable to obtain an approximate Pareto front with a limited evaluation budget. Multi-objective Bayesian optimization (MOBO) has been widely used for finding a finite set of Pareto optimal solutions. However, it is well-known that the whole Pareto set is on a continuous manifold and can contain infinite solutions. The structural properties of the Pareto set are not well exploited in existing MOBO methods, and the finite-set approximation may not contain the most preferred solution(s) for decision-makers. This paper develops a novel learning-based method to approximate the whole Pareto set for MOBO, which generalizes the decomposition-based multi-objective optimization algorithm (MOEA/D) from finite populations to models. We design a simple and powerful acquisition search method based on the learned Pareto set, which naturally supports batch evaluation. In addition, with our proposed model, decision-makers can readily explore any trade-off area in the approximate Pareto set for flexible decision-making. This work represents the first attempt to model the Pareto set for expensive multi-objective optimization. Experimental results on different synthetic and real-world problems demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. 在许多实际应用中都可以找到昂贵的多目标优化问题，其中目标函数评估涉及昂贵的计算或物理实验。希望在有限的评估预算下获得近似的帕累托前沿。多目标贝叶斯优化（MOBO）已广泛用于寻找有限的帕累托最优解集。然而，众所周知，整个帕累托集位于连续流形上，并且可以包含无限个解。现有的 MOBO 方法没有很好地利用 Pareto 集的结构特性，并且有限集近似可能不包含决策者最优选的解。本文开发了一种新颖的基于学习的方法来近似 MOBO 的整个帕累托集，该方法将基于分解的多目标优化算法（MOEA/D）从有限总体推广到模型。我们基于学习到的 Pareto 集设计了一种简单而强大的采集搜索方法，它自然支持批量评估。此外，通过我们提出的模型，决策者可以轻松探索近似帕累托集中的任何权衡区域，以进行灵活的决策。这项工作代表了对帕累托集进行建模以进行昂贵的多目标优化的首次尝试。对不同合成问题和现实世界问题的实验结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于学习的方法，用于在昂贵的多目标优化问题中近似整个Pareto集，以克服现有方法对有限解集的局限性。 Xi Lin,Zhiyuan Yang,Xiaoyuan Zhang,Qingfu Zhang cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Wenjie Luo,Qun Song,Zhenyu Yan,Rui Tan,Guosheng Lin
title: Indoor Smartphone SLAM with Learned Echoic Location Features
title_zh: 具有学习回声定位功能的室内智能手机 SLAM
abstract: Indoor self-localization is a highly demanded system function for smartphones. The current solutions based on inertial, radio frequency, and geomagnetic sensing may have degraded performance when their limiting factors take effect. In this paper, we present a new indoor simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system that utilizes the smartphone's built-in audio hardware and inertial measurement unit (IMU). Our system uses a smartphone's loudspeaker to emit near-inaudible chirps and then the microphone to record the acoustic echoes from the indoor environment. Our profiling measurements show that the echoes carry location information with sub-meter granularity. To enable SLAM, we apply contrastive learning to construct an echoic location feature (ELF) extractor, such that the loop closures on the smartphone's trajectory can be accurately detected from the associated ELF trace. The detection results effectively regulate the IMU-based trajectory reconstruction. Extensive experiments show that our ELF-based SLAM achieves median localization errors of $0.1\,\text{m}$, $0.53\,\text{m}$, and $0.4\,\text{m}$ on the reconstructed trajectories in a living room, an office, and a shopping mall, and outperforms the Wi-Fi and geomagnetic SLAM systems.
summary: Indoor self-localization is a highly demanded system function for smartphones. The current solutions based on inertial, radio frequency, and geomagnetic sensing may have degraded performance when their limiting factors take effect. In this paper, we present a new indoor simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system that utilizes the smartphone's built-in audio hardware and inertial measurement unit (IMU). Our system uses a smartphone's loudspeaker to emit near-inaudible chirps and then the microphone to record the acoustic echoes from the indoor environment. Our profiling measurements show that the echoes carry location information with sub-meter granularity. To enable SLAM, we apply contrastive learning to construct an echoic location feature (ELF) extractor, such that the loop closures on the smartphone's trajectory can be accurately detected from the associated ELF trace. The detection results effectively regulate the IMU-based trajectory reconstruction. Extensive experiments show that our ELF-based SLAM achieves median localization errors of $0.1\,\text{m}$, $0.53\,\text{m}$, and $0.4\,\text{m}$ on the reconstructed trajectories in a living room, an office, and a shopping mall, and outperforms the Wi-Fi and geomagnetic SLAM systems.
abstract_zh: 室内自定位是智能手机要求很高的系统功能。当前基于惯性、射频和地磁传感的解决方案在其限制因素生效时可能会降低性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的室内同步定位和地图构建（SLAM）系统，该系统利用智能手机的内置音频硬件和惯性测量单元（IMU）。我们的系统使用智能手机的扬声器发出几乎听不见的声音，然后使用麦克风记录室内环境的声学回声。我们的分析测量表明，回波携带亚米级粒度的位置信息。为了实现 SLAM，我们应用对比学习来构建回声位置特征 (ELF) 提取器，以便可以从相关的 ELF 轨迹中准确检测智能手机轨迹上的闭环。检测结果有效调节了基于IMU的轨迹重建。大量实验表明，我们基于 ELF 的 SLAM 在客厅、办公室和购物中心的重建轨迹上实现了 $0.1\,\text{m}$、$0.53\,\text{m}$ 和 $0.4\,\text{m}$ 的中位定位误差，并且优于 Wi-Fi 和地磁 SLAM 系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于智能手机音频硬件和惯性测量单元（IMU）的室内同时定位与建图（SLAM）系统，利用回声特征实现高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 现有基于惯性、射频和地磁传感的室内定位方法在特定条件下性能下降，需探索更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过智能手机扬声器发射近无声 chirp 信号，麦克风记录环境回声，结合对比学习构建回声位置特征（ELF）提取器，实现轨迹闭环检测与IMU轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在客厅、办公室和商场场景中，ELF-SLAM 的定位中位数误差分别为 0.1m、0.53m 和 0.4m，优于 Wi-Fi 和地磁 SLAM 系统。
AI.conclusion: 基于音频回声特征的 SLAM 方法在室内环境中实现了亚米级定位精度，为智能手机提供了更可靠的位置服务方案。

The current solutions based on inertial, radio frequency, and geomagnetic sensing may have degraded performance when their limiting factors take effect. In this paper, we present a new indoor simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) system that utilizes the smartphone's built-in audio hardware and inertial measurement unit (IMU). authors_text: Jinshan Zeng,Ruiying Xu,Yu Wu,Hongwei Li,Jiaxing Lu
title: STAR: Zero-Shot Chinese Character Recognition with Stroke- and Radical-Level Decompositions
title_zh: STAR：具有笔画级和部首级分解的零样本汉字识别
abstract: Zero-shot Chinese character recognition has attracted rising attention in recent years. Existing methods for this problem are mainly based on either certain low-level stroke-based decomposition or medium-level radical-based decomposition. Considering that the stroke- and radical-level decompositions can provide different levels of information, we propose an effective zero-shot Chinese character recognition method by combining them. The proposed method consists of a training stage and an inference stage. In the training stage, we adopt two similar encoder-decoder models to yield the estimates of stroke and radical encodings, which together with the true encodings are then used to formalize the associated stroke and radical losses for training. A similarity loss is introduced to regularize stroke and radical encoders to yield features of the same characters with high correlation. In the inference stage, two key modules, i.e., the stroke screening module (SSM) and feature matching module (FMM) are introduced to tackle the deterministic and confusing cases respectively. In particular, we introduce an effective stroke rectification scheme in FMM to enlarge the candidate set of characters for final inference. Numerous experiments over three benchmark datasets covering the handwritten, printed artistic and street view scenarios are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Numerical results show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in both character and radical zero-shot settings, and maintains competitive performance in the traditional seen character setting.
summary: Zero-shot Chinese character recognition has attracted rising attention in recent years. Existing methods for this problem are mainly based on either certain low-level stroke-based decomposition or medium-level radical-based decomposition. Considering that the stroke- and radical-level decompositions can provide different levels of information, we propose an effective zero-shot Chinese character recognition method by combining them. The proposed method consists of a training stage and an inference stage. In the training stage, we adopt two similar encoder-decoder models to yield the estimates of stroke and radical encodings, which together with the true encodings are then used to formalize the associated stroke and radical losses for training. A similarity loss is introduced to regularize stroke and radical encoders to yield features of the same characters with high correlation. In the inference stage, two key modules, i.e., the stroke screening module (SSM) and feature matching module (FMM) are introduced to tackle the deterministic and confusing cases respectively. In particular, we introduce an effective stroke rectification scheme in FMM to enlarge the candidate set of characters for final inference. Numerous experiments over three benchmark datasets covering the handwritten, printed artistic and street view scenarios are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Numerical results show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in both character and radical zero-shot settings, and maintains competitive performance in the traditional seen character setting.
abstract_zh: 零样本汉字识别近年来引起了越来越多的关注。现有的解决该问题的方法主要基于某些低级笔画分解或中级部首分解。考虑到笔画级和部首级分解可以提供不同级别的信息，我们将它们结合起来提出了一种有效的零样本汉字识别方法。所提出的方法由训练阶段和推理阶段组成。在训练阶段，我们采用两个类似的编码器-解码器模型来产生笔画和部首编码的估计，然后将其与真实编码一起用于形式化相关笔画和部首损失以进行训练。引入相似性损失来规范笔画和部首编码器，以产生具有高相关性的相同字符的特征。在推理阶段，引入了两个关键模块，即笔划筛选模块（SSM）和特征匹配模块（FMM），分别处理确定性和混乱的情况。特别是，我们在 FMM 中引入了一种有效的笔画校正方案，以扩大最终推理的候选字符集。在涵盖手写、印刷艺术和街景场景的三个基准数据集上进行了大量实验，以证明所提出方法的有效性。数值结果表明，所提出的方法在字符和激进零样本设置中都优于最先进的方法，并在传统可见字符设置中保持竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合笔画和部首分解的零样本中文字符识别方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖单一分解层次，无法有效融合不同层次信息，限制了识别性能
AI.method: 采用双编码器-解码器模型进行训练，结合笔画和部首损失；推理阶段引入SSM和FMM模块，其中FMM包含笔画校正方案以扩展候选集
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，该方法在零样本和传统场景下均优于现有方法，且保持竞争力
AI.conclusion: 结合笔画与部首分解能有效提升零样本中文字符识别的准确性与鲁棒性

authors_text: Yuanyuan Qiao,Jiaxin Yin,Wei Wang,Fábio Duarte,Jie Yang,Carlo Ratti
title: Survey of Deep Learning for Autonomous Surface Vehicles in the Marine Environment
title_zh: 海洋环境中自主水面车辆深度学习综述
abstract: Within the next several years, there will be a high level of autonomous technology that will be available for widespread use, which will reduce labor costs, increase safety, save energy, enable difficult unmanned tasks in harsh environments, and eliminate human error. Compared to software development for other autonomous vehicles, maritime software development, especially on aging but still functional fleets, is described as being in a very early and emerging phase. This introduces very large challenges and opportunities for researchers and engineers to develop maritime autonomous systems. Recent progress in sensor and communication technology has introduced the use of autonomous surface vehicles (ASVs) in applications such as coastline surveillance, oceanographic observation, multi-vehicle cooperation, and search and rescue missions. Advanced artificial intelligence technology, especially deep learning (DL) methods that conduct nonlinear mapping with self-learning representations, has brought the concept of full autonomy one step closer to reality. This paper surveys the existing work regarding the implementation of DL methods in ASV-related fields. First, the scope of this work is described after reviewing surveys on ASV developments and technologies, which draws attention to the research gap between DL and maritime operations. Then, DL-based navigation, guidance, control (NGC) systems and cooperative operations, are presented. Finally, this survey is completed by highlighting the current challenges and future research directions.
summary: Within the next several years, there will be a high level of autonomous technology that will be available for widespread use, which will reduce labor costs, increase safety, save energy, enable difficult unmanned tasks in harsh environments, and eliminate human error. Compared to software development for other autonomous vehicles, maritime software development, especially on aging but still functional fleets, is described as being in a very early and emerging phase. This introduces very large challenges and opportunities for researchers and engineers to develop maritime autonomous systems. Recent progress in sensor and communication technology has introduced the use of autonomous surface vehicles (ASVs) in applications such as coastline surveillance, oceanographic observation, multi-vehicle cooperation, and search and rescue missions. Advanced artificial intelligence technology, especially deep learning (DL) methods that conduct nonlinear mapping with self-learning representations, has brought the concept of full autonomy one step closer to reality. This paper surveys the existing work regarding the implementation of DL methods in ASV-related fields. First, the scope of this work is described after reviewing surveys on ASV developments and technologies, which draws attention to the research gap between DL and maritime operations. Then, DL-based navigation, guidance, control (NGC) systems and cooperative operations, are presented. Finally, this survey is completed by highlighting the current challenges and future research directions.
abstract_zh: 未来几年内，高水平的自主技术将得到广泛应用，这将降低劳动力成本，提高安全性，节省能源，在恶劣环境中实现困难的无人任务，并消除人为错误。与其他自动驾驶车辆的软件开发相比，海事软件开发，尤其是老化但仍能正常运行的车队的软件开发，被描述为处于非常早期和新兴的阶段。这为研究人员和工程师开发海上自主系统带来了巨大的挑战和机遇。传感器和通信技术的最新进展使得自主水面车辆（ASV）在海岸线监视、海洋观测、多车辆协作以及搜索和救援任务等应用中得到应用。先进的人工智能技术，特别是利用自学习表示进行非线性映射的深度学习（DL）方法，使完全自治的概念更接近现实。本文调查了有关 ASV 相关领域中 DL 方法实施的现有工作。首先，在回顾了 ASV 发展和技术的调查后描述了这项工作的范围，这引起了人们对 DL 和海上作业之间研究差距的关注。然后，提出了基于深度学习的导航、制导、控制（NGC）系统和协作操作。最后，本次调查通过强调当前的挑战和未来的研究方向来完成。

AI.tldr: 综述深度学习在海上自主水面船舶（ASV）相关领域的现有研究，分析其应用现状、挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 海上自主系统开发处于早期阶段，面临技术挑战，需探索深度学习等先进AI技术以提升ASV的自主性与任务执行能力。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统梳理深度学习在ASV导航、控制、协作等关键领域的应用现状，识别技术差距。
AI.result: 总结了深度学习在ASV导航、控制及协作中的应用进展，明确了当前技术在复杂海况适应性、实时性及多车协同等方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 指出深度学习在ASV应用中需解决环境动态性、数据稀缺性及系统鲁棒性等问题，未来需结合强化学习、边缘计算等技术推动自主化发展。

Compared to software development for other autonomous vehicles, maritime software development, especially on aging but still functional fleets, is described as being in a very early and emerging phase. This introduces very large challenges and opportunities for researchers and engineers to develop maritime autonomous systems. Recent progress in sensor and communication technology has introduced the use of autonomous surface vehicles (ASVs) in applications such as coastline surveillance, oceanographic observation, multi-vehicle cooperation, and search and rescue missions. Advanced artificial intelligence technology, especially deep learning (DL) methods that conduct nonlinear mapping with self-learning representations, has brought the concept of full autonomy one step closer to reality. This paper surveys the existing work regarding the implementation of DL methods in ASV-related fields. First, the scope of this work is described after reviewing surveys on ASV developments and technologies, which draws attention to the research gap between DL and maritime operations. Then, DL-based navigation, guidance, control (NGC) systems and cooperative operations, are presented. authors_text: Tianyu Liu,Jie Lu,Zheng Yan,Guangquan Zhang
title: Streaming PAC-Bayes Gaussian process regression with a performance guarantee for online decision making
title_zh: 流式 PAC-贝叶斯高斯过程回归，为在线决策提供性能保证
abstract: As a powerful Bayesian non-parameterized algorithm, the Gaussian process (GP) has performed a significant role in Bayesian optimization and signal processing. GPs have also advanced online decision-making systems because their posterior distribution has a closed-form solution. However, its training and inference process requires all historic data to be stored and the GP model to be trained from scratch. For those reasons, several online GP algorithms, such as O-SGPR and O-SVGP, have been specifically designed for streaming settings. In this paper, we present a new theoretical framework for online GPs based on the online probably approximately correct (PAC) Bayes theory. The framework offers both a guarantee of generalized performance and good accuracy. Instead of minimizing the marginal likelihood, our algorithm optimizes both the empirical risk function and a regularization item, which is in proportion to the divergence between the prior distribution and posterior distribution of parameters. In addition to its theoretical appeal, the algorithm performs well empirically on several regression datasets. Compared to other online GP algorithms, ours yields a generalization guarantee and very competitive accuracy.
summary: As a powerful Bayesian non-parameterized algorithm, the Gaussian process (GP) has performed a significant role in Bayesian optimization and signal processing. GPs have also advanced online decision-making systems because their posterior distribution has a closed-form solution. However, its training and inference process requires all historic data to be stored and the GP model to be trained from scratch. For those reasons, several online GP algorithms, such as O-SGPR and O-SVGP, have been specifically designed for streaming settings. In this paper, we present a new theoretical framework for online GPs based on the online probably approximately correct (PAC) Bayes theory. The framework offers both a guarantee of generalized performance and good accuracy. Instead of minimizing the marginal likelihood, our algorithm optimizes both the empirical risk function and a regularization item, which is in proportion to the divergence between the prior distribution and posterior distribution of parameters. In addition to its theoretical appeal, the algorithm performs well empirically on several regression datasets. Compared to other online GP algorithms, ours yields a generalization guarantee and very competitive accuracy.
abstract_zh: 高斯过程（GP）作为一种强大的贝叶斯非参数化算法，在贝叶斯优化和信号处理中发挥了重要作用。全科医生还拥有先进的在线决策系统，因为他们的后验分布具有封闭式解决方案。然而，其训练和推理过程需要存储所有历史数据并从头开始训练 GP 模型。出于这些原因，一些在线 GP 算法（例如 O-SGPR 和 O-SVGP）是专门为流设置而设计的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于在线大概正确（PAC）贝叶斯理论的在线 GP 的新理论框架。该框架既保证了通用性能又保证了良好的准确性。我们的算法不是最小化边际似然，而是优化经验风险函数和正则化项，正则化项与参数的先验分布和后验分布之间的差异成比例。除了理论上的吸引力外，该算法在多个回归数据集上的经验表现也很好。与其他在线 GP 算法相比，我们的算法具有泛化保证和非常有竞争力的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于在线PAC-Bayes理论的流式高斯过程回归框架，为在线决策提供性能保证。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯过程需存储全部历史数据并从头训练，难以适应流式数据场景；现有在线GP算法缺乏理论性能保证。
AI.method: 通过联合优化经验风险函数与先验-后验分布散度的正则项，替代传统边缘似然最小化，构建在线PAC-Bayes理论框架。
AI.result: 算法在多个回归数据集上表现优异，相比其他在线GP方法具有竞争力的准确性与理论泛化保证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为流式数据的在线高斯过程回归提供了兼具理论保证与实际效果的解决方案。

For those reasons, several online GP algorithms, such as O-SGPR and O-SVGP, have been specifically designed for streaming settings. authors_text: Hongjiang Chen,Yang Wang,Leibo Liu,Shaojun Wei,Shouyi Yin
title: HQNAS: Auto CNN deployment framework for joint quantization and architecture search
title_zh: HQNAS：用于联合量化和架构搜索的自动 CNN 部署框架
abstract: Deep learning applications are being transferred from the cloud to edge with the rapid development of embedded computing systems. In order to achieve higher energy efficiency with the limited resource budget, neural networks(NNs) must be carefully designed in two steps, the architecture design and the quantization policy choice. Neural Architecture Search(NAS) and Quantization have been proposed separately when deploying NNs onto embedded devices. However, taking the two steps individually is time-consuming and leads to a sub-optimal final deployment. To this end, we propose a novel neural network design framework called Hardware-aware Quantized Neural Architecture Search(HQNAS) framework which combines the NAS and Quantization together in a very efficient manner using weight-sharing and bit-sharing. It takes only 4 GPU hours to discover an outstanding NN policy on CIFAR10. It also takes only %10 GPU time to generate a comparable model on Imagenet compared to the traditional NAS method with 1.8x decrease of latency and a negligible accuracy loss of only 0.7%. Besides, our method can be adapted in a lifelong situation where the neural network needs to evolve occasionally due to changes of local data, environment and user preference.
summary: Deep learning applications are being transferred from the cloud to edge with the rapid development of embedded computing systems. In order to achieve higher energy efficiency with the limited resource budget, neural networks(NNs) must be carefully designed in two steps, the architecture design and the quantization policy choice. Neural Architecture Search(NAS) and Quantization have been proposed separately when deploying NNs onto embedded devices. However, taking the two steps individually is time-consuming and leads to a sub-optimal final deployment. To this end, we propose a novel neural network design framework called Hardware-aware Quantized Neural Architecture Search(HQNAS) framework which combines the NAS and Quantization together in a very efficient manner using weight-sharing and bit-sharing. It takes only 4 GPU hours to discover an outstanding NN policy on CIFAR10. It also takes only %10 GPU time to generate a comparable model on Imagenet compared to the traditional NAS method with 1.8x decrease of latency and a negligible accuracy loss of only 0.7%. Besides, our method can be adapted in a lifelong situation where the neural network needs to evolve occasionally due to changes of local data, environment and user preference.
abstract_zh: 随着嵌入式计算系统的快速发展，深度学习应用正在从云端转移到边缘。为了在有限的资源预算下实现更高的能源效率，必须分两步精心设计神经网络（NN）：架构设计和量化策略选择。当将神经网络部署到嵌入式设备上时，神经架构搜索（NAS）和量化被分别提出。然而，单独执行这两个步骤非常耗时，并且会导致最终部署不理想。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络设计框架，称为硬件感知量化神经架构搜索（HQNAS）框架，该框架使用权重共享和位共享以非常有效的方式将 NAS 和量化结合在一起。只需 4 个 GPU 小时即可在 CIFAR10 上发现出色的神经网络策略。与传统的 NAS 方法相比，在 Imagenet 上生成类似模型只需要 10% 的 GPU 时间，延迟减少了 1.8 倍，准确度损失也可以忽略不计，仅为 0.7%。此外，我们的方法可以适应终生的情况，即神经网络由于本地数据、环境和用户偏好的变化而需要偶尔进化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HQNAS的联合量化与神经网络架构搜索框架，旨在高效部署CNN至边缘设备。
AI.motivation: 传统NAS与量化分步进行导致效率低下且结果次优，需联合优化以提升边缘设备部署的能效比。
AI.method: 通过权重共享与位共享技术，将NAS与量化整合至统一框架，减少计算资源消耗并加速模型搜索过程。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10上仅需4GPU小时发现优秀模型，在ImageNet上相比传统NAS节省1.8倍延迟且准确率损失仅0.7%。
AI.conclusion: HQNAS方法有效平衡了模型精度与部署效率，且具备适应动态环境变化的长期演化能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HQNAS的联合量化与神经网络架构搜索框架，旨在高效部署CNN至边缘设备。

ai_content.method: 通过权重共享与位共享技术，将NAS与量化整合至统一框架，减少计算资源消耗并加速模型搜索过程。

search_text: HQNAS: Auto CNN deployment framework for joint quantization and architecture search HQNAS：用于联合量化和架构搜索的自动 CNN 部署框架 Deep learning applications are being transferred from the cloud to edge with the rapid development of embedded computing systems. In order to achieve higher energy efficiency with the limited resource budget, neural networks(NNs) must be carefully designed in two steps, the architecture design and the quantization policy choice. Neural Architecture Search(NAS) and Quantization have been proposed separately when deploying NNs onto embedded devices. However, taking the two steps individually is time-consuming and leads to a sub-optimal final deployment. To this end, we propose a novel neural network design framework called Hardware-aware Quantized Neural Architecture Search(HQNAS) framework which combines the NAS and Quantization together in a very efficient manner using weight-sharing and bit-sharing. It takes only 4 GPU hours to discover an outstanding NN policy on CIFAR10. It also takes only %10 GPU time to generate a comparable model on Imagenet compared to the traditional NAS method with 1.8x decrease of latency and a negligible accuracy loss of only 0.7%. Besides, our method can be adapted in a lifelong situation where the neural network needs to evolve occasionally due to changes of local data, environment and user preference. 随着嵌入式计算系统的快速发展，深度学习应用正在从云端转移到边缘。为了在有限的资源预算下实现更高的能源效率，必须分两步精心设计神经网络（NN）：架构设计和量化策略选择。当将神经网络部署到嵌入式设备上时，神经架构搜索（NAS）和量化被分别提出。然而，单独执行这两个步骤非常耗时，并且会导致最终部署不理想。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络设计框架，称为硬件感知量化神经架构搜索（HQNAS）框架，该框架使用权重共享和位共享以非常有效的方式将 NAS 和量化结合在一起。只需 4 个 GPU 小时即可在 CIFAR10 上发现出色的神经网络策略。与传统的 NAS 方法相比，在 Imagenet 上生成类似模型只需要 10% 的 GPU 时间，延迟减少了 1.8 倍，准确度损失也可以忽略不计，仅为 0.7%。此外，我们的方法可以适应终生的情况，即神经网络由于本地数据、环境和用户偏好的变化而需要偶尔进化。 本文提出一种名为HQNAS的联合量化与神经网络架构搜索框架，旨在高效部署CNN至边缘设备。 Hongjiang Chen,Yang Wang,Leibo Liu,Shaojun Wei,Shouyi Yin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yijun Gong,Shupei Liu,Xiao-Lei Zhang
title: End-to-end Two-dimensional Sound Source Localization With Ad-hoc Microphone Arrays
title_zh: 使用特设麦克风阵列进行端到端二维声源​​定位
abstract: Conventional sound source localization methods are mostly based on a single microphone array that consists of multiple microphones. They are usually formulated as the estimation of the direction of arrival problem. In this paper, we propose a deep-learning-based end-to-end sound source localization method with ad-hoc microphone arrays, where an ad-hoc microphone array is a set of randomly distributed microphone arrays that collaborate with each other. It can produce two-dimensional locations of speakers with only a single microphone per node. Specifically, we divide a targeted indoor space into multiple local areas. We encode each local area by a one-hot code, therefore, the node and speaker locations can be represented by the one-hot codes. Accordingly, the sound source localization problem is formulated as such a classification task of recognizing the one-hot code of the speaker given the one hot codes of the microphone nodes and their speech recordings. An end-to-end spatial-temporal deep model is designed for the classification problem. It utilizes a spatial-temporal attention architecture with a fusion layer inserted in the middle of the architecture, which is able to handle arbitrarily different numbers of microphone nodes during the model training and test. Experimental results show that the proposed method yields good performance in highly reverberant and noisy environments.
summary: Conventional sound source localization methods are mostly based on a single microphone array that consists of multiple microphones. They are usually formulated as the estimation of the direction of arrival problem. In this paper, we propose a deep-learning-based end-to-end sound source localization method with ad-hoc microphone arrays, where an ad-hoc microphone array is a set of randomly distributed microphone arrays that collaborate with each other. It can produce two-dimensional locations of speakers with only a single microphone per node. Specifically, we divide a targeted indoor space into multiple local areas. We encode each local area by a one-hot code, therefore, the node and speaker locations can be represented by the one-hot codes. Accordingly, the sound source localization problem is formulated as such a classification task of recognizing the one-hot code of the speaker given the one hot codes of the microphone nodes and their speech recordings. An end-to-end spatial-temporal deep model is designed for the classification problem. It utilizes a spatial-temporal attention architecture with a fusion layer inserted in the middle of the architecture, which is able to handle arbitrarily different numbers of microphone nodes during the model training and test. Experimental results show that the proposed method yields good performance in highly reverberant and noisy environments.
abstract_zh: 传统的声源定位方法大多基于由多个麦克风组成的单个麦克风阵列。它们通常被表述为到达方向问题的估计。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的端到端声源定位方法，其中自组织麦克风阵列是一组相互协作的随机分布的麦克风阵列。它可以在每个节点仅使用一个麦克风的情况下生成扬声器的二维位置。具体来说，我们将目标室内空间划分为多个局部区域。我们用one-hot码对每个局部区域进行编码，因此，节点和说话者位置可以用one-hot码来表示。因此，声源定位问题被表述为一种分类任务，即在给定麦克风节点及其语音记录的单热代码的情况下识别说话者的单热代码。针对分类问题设计了端到端时空深度模型。它采用时空注意力架构，并在架构中间插入融合层，能够在模型训练和测试过程中处理任意不同数量的麦克风节点。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在高混响和噪声环境中具有良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的端到端二维声源定位方法，利用自组麦克风阵列实现高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 传统声源定位方法依赖固定麦克风阵列且难以应对复杂环境，而自组麦克风阵列因节点分布随机需新方法实现有效定位。
AI.method: 将空间划分为局部区域并用one-hot编码表征，构建时空注意机制与融合层的深度模型，实现麦克风节点与声源的联合分类。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在强混响和噪声环境下仍能保持良好的定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过端到端架构有效处理自组阵列的异构性，为复杂场景下的声源定位提供了新思路。

authors_text: Peggy Tang,Kun Hu,Lei Zhang,Jiebo Luo,Zhiyong Wang
title: TLDW: Extreme Multimodal Summarisation of News Videos
title_zh: TLDW：新闻视频的极端多模态摘要
abstract: Multimodal summarisation with multimodal output is drawing increasing attention due to the rapid growth of multimedia data. While several methods have been proposed to summarise visual-text contents, their multimodal outputs are not succinct enough at an extreme level to address the information overload issue. To the end of extreme multimodal summarisation, we introduce a new task, eXtreme Multimodal Summarisation with Multimodal Output (XMSMO) for the scenario of TL;DW - Too Long; Didn't Watch, akin to TL;DR. XMSMO aims to summarise a video-document pair into a summary with an extremely short length, which consists of one cover frame as the visual summary and one sentence as the textual summary. We propose a novel unsupervised Hierarchical Optimal Transport Network (HOT-Net) consisting of three components: hierarchical multimodal encoders, hierarchical multimodal fusion decoders, and optimal transport solvers. Our method is trained, without using reference summaries, by optimising the visual and textual coverage from the perspectives of the distance between the semantic distributions under optimal transport plans. To facilitate the study on this task, we collect a large-scale dataset XMSMO-News by harvesting 4,891 video-document pairs. The experimental results show that our method achieves promising performance in terms of ROUGE and IoU metrics.
summary: Multimodal summarisation with multimodal output is drawing increasing attention due to the rapid growth of multimedia data. While several methods have been proposed to summarise visual-text contents, their multimodal outputs are not succinct enough at an extreme level to address the information overload issue. To the end of extreme multimodal summarisation, we introduce a new task, eXtreme Multimodal Summarisation with Multimodal Output (XMSMO) for the scenario of TL;DW - Too Long; Didn't Watch, akin to TL;DR. XMSMO aims to summarise a video-document pair into a summary with an extremely short length, which consists of one cover frame as the visual summary and one sentence as the textual summary. We propose a novel unsupervised Hierarchical Optimal Transport Network (HOT-Net) consisting of three components: hierarchical multimodal encoders, hierarchical multimodal fusion decoders, and optimal transport solvers. Our method is trained, without using reference summaries, by optimising the visual and textual coverage from the perspectives of the distance between the semantic distributions under optimal transport plans. To facilitate the study on this task, we collect a large-scale dataset XMSMO-News by harvesting 4,891 video-document pairs. The experimental results show that our method achieves promising performance in terms of ROUGE and IoU metrics.
abstract_zh: 由于多媒体数据的快速增长，具有多模态输出的多模态摘要越来越受到关注。虽然已经提出了几种方法来总结视觉文本内容，但它们的多模式输出在极端水平上不够简洁，无法解决信息过载问题。为了结束极端多模态摘要，我们引入了一个新任务，针对 TL;DW - 太长;没看过，类似于 TL;DR。 XMSMO旨在将视频文档对总结为长度极短的摘要，其中由一个封面框架作为视觉摘要和一个句子作为文本摘要组成。我们提出了一种新颖的无监督分层最优传输网络（HOT-Net），由三个组件组成：分层多模态编码器、分层多模态融合解码器和最优传输求解器。我们的方法是在不使用参考摘要的情况下，通过从最佳运输计划下语义分布之间的距离的角度优化视觉和文本覆盖来进行训练的。为了促进这项任务的研究，我们通过收获 4,891 个视频文档对来收集大规模数据集 XMSMO-News。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 ROUGE 和 IoU 指标方面取得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种极端多模态新闻视频摘要任务XMSMO，将视频-文档对压缩为单帧图像和一句文本的极短摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有视频摘要方法生成的多模态输出仍存在冗余，无法有效解决信息过载问题，需实现类似TL;DR的极端简洁摘要。
AI.method: 设计无监督分层最优传输网络HOT-Net，包含分层多模态编码器、解码器和最优传输求解器，通过语义分布距离优化视觉文本覆盖率。
AI.result: 在自建的4891个视频-文档对数据集XMSMO-News上，方法在ROUGE和IoU指标上取得有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的极端多模态摘要框架为新闻视频理解提供了新范式，推动了多模态内容压缩技术的发展。

Our method is trained, without using reference summaries, by optimising the visual and textual coverage from the perspectives of the distance between the semantic distributions under optimal transport plans. To facilitate the study on this task, we collect a large-scale dataset XMSMO-News by harvesting 4,891 video-document pairs. The experimental results show that our method achieves promising performance in terms of ROUGE and IoU metrics. 由于多媒体数据的快速增长，具有多模态输出的多模态摘要越来越受到关注。虽然已经提出了几种方法来总结视觉文本内容，但它们的多模式输出在极端水平上不够简洁，无法解决信息过载问题。为了结束极端多模态摘要，我们引入了一个新任务，针对 TL;DW - 太长;没看过，类似于 TL;DR。 XMSMO旨在将视频文档对总结为长度极短的摘要，其中由一个封面框架作为视觉摘要和一个句子作为文本摘要组成。我们提出了一种新颖的无监督分层最优传输网络（HOT-Net），由三个组件组成：分层多模态编码器、分层多模态融合解码器和最优传输求解器。我们的方法是在不使用参考摘要的情况下，通过从最佳运输计划下语义分布之间的距离的角度优化视觉和文本覆盖来进行训练的。为了促进这项任务的研究，我们通过收获 4,891 个视频文档对来收集大规模数据集 XMSMO-News。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 ROUGE 和 IoU 指标方面取得了良好的性能。 本文提出一种极端多模态新闻视频摘要任务XMSMO，将视频-文档对压缩为单帧图像和一句文本的极短摘要。 Peggy Tang,Kun Hu,Lei Zhang,Jiebo Luo,Zhiyong Wang cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.MM

authors_text: Baijun Ji,Tong Zhang,Yicheng Zou,Bojie Hu,Si Shen
title: Increasing Visual Awareness in Multimodal Neural Machine Translation from an Information Theoretic Perspective
title_zh: 从信息论的角度提高多模态神经机器翻译的视觉意识
abstract: Multimodal machine translation (MMT) aims to improve translation quality by equipping the source sentence with its corresponding image. Despite the promising performance, MMT models still suffer the problem of input degradation: models focus more on textual information while visual information is generally overlooked. In this paper, we endeavor to improve MMT performance by increasing visual awareness from an information theoretic perspective. In detail, we decompose the informative visual signals into two parts: source-specific information and target-specific information. We use mutual information to quantify them and propose two methods for objective optimization to better leverage visual signals. Experiments on two datasets demonstrate that our approach can effectively enhance the visual awareness of MMT model and achieve superior results against strong baselines.
summary: Multimodal machine translation (MMT) aims to improve translation quality by equipping the source sentence with its corresponding image. Despite the promising performance, MMT models still suffer the problem of input degradation: models focus more on textual information while visual information is generally overlooked. In this paper, we endeavor to improve MMT performance by increasing visual awareness from an information theoretic perspective. In detail, we decompose the informative visual signals into two parts: source-specific information and target-specific information. We use mutual information to quantify them and propose two methods for objective optimization to better leverage visual signals. Experiments on two datasets demonstrate that our approach can effectively enhance the visual awareness of MMT model and achieve superior results against strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 多模态机器翻译（MMT）旨在通过为源句子配备相应的图像来提高翻译质量。尽管表现良好，MMT 模型仍然面临输入退化的问题：模型更多地关注文本信息，而视觉信息通常被忽视。在本文中，我们致力于从信息论的角度通过增强视觉意识来提高 MMT 性能。具体来说，我们将信息丰富的视觉信号分解为两部分：源特定信息和目标特定信息。我们使用互信息来量化它们，并提出两种目标优化方法，以更好地利用视觉信号。在两个数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法可以有效增强 MMT 模型的视觉意识，并在强基线上取得优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文从信息论角度出发，旨在通过增强视觉感知能力来提升多模态神经机器翻译（MMT）的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态机器翻译（MMT）在结合图像和文本信息方面表现出色，但现有模型普遍存在过度依赖文本信息而忽视视觉信息的问题，导致输入退化。
AI.method: 将视觉信号分解为源语言特定信息和目标语言特定信息，并利用互信息量化这两部分，提出两种目标优化方法以更有效地利用视觉信号。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效提升MMT模型的视觉感知能力，并在强基线模型上取得更优的翻译结果。
AI.conclusion: 从信息论视角优化视觉信号利用方式，可有效解决MMT中视觉信息被忽视的问题，为多模态翻译研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Hyung-Kwon Ko,Gwanmo Park,Hyeon Jeon,Jaemin Jo,Juho Kim,Jinwook Seo
title: Large-scale Text-to-Image Generation Models for Visual Artists' Creative Works
title_zh: 视觉艺术家创意作品的大规模文本到图像生成模型
abstract: Large-scale Text-to-image Generation Models (LTGMs) (e.g., DALL-E), self-supervised deep learning models trained on a huge dataset, have demonstrated the capacity for generating high-quality open-domain images from multi-modal input. Although they can even produce anthropomorphized versions of objects and animals, combine irrelevant concepts in reasonable ways, and give variation to any user-provided images, we witnessed such rapid technological advancement left many visual artists disoriented in leveraging LTGMs more actively in their creative works. Our goal in this work is to understand how visual artists would adopt LTGMs to support their creative works. To this end, we conducted an interview study as well as a systematic literature review of 72 system/application papers for a thorough examination. A total of 28 visual artists covering 35 distinct visual art domains acknowledged LTGMs' versatile roles with high usability to support creative works in automating the creation process (i.e., automation), expanding their ideas (i.e., exploration), and facilitating or arbitrating in communication (i.e., mediation). We conclude by providing four design guidelines that future researchers can refer to in making intelligent user interfaces using LTGMs.
summary: Large-scale Text-to-image Generation Models (LTGMs) (e.g., DALL-E), self-supervised deep learning models trained on a huge dataset, have demonstrated the capacity for generating high-quality open-domain images from multi-modal input. Although they can even produce anthropomorphized versions of objects and animals, combine irrelevant concepts in reasonable ways, and give variation to any user-provided images, we witnessed such rapid technological advancement left many visual artists disoriented in leveraging LTGMs more actively in their creative works. Our goal in this work is to understand how visual artists would adopt LTGMs to support their creative works. To this end, we conducted an interview study as well as a systematic literature review of 72 system/application papers for a thorough examination. A total of 28 visual artists covering 35 distinct visual art domains acknowledged LTGMs' versatile roles with high usability to support creative works in automating the creation process (i.e., automation), expanding their ideas (i.e., exploration), and facilitating or arbitrating in communication (i.e., mediation). We conclude by providing four design guidelines that future researchers can refer to in making intelligent user interfaces using LTGMs.
abstract_zh: 大规模文本到图像生成模型（LTGM）（例如 DALL-E）是在巨大数据集上训练的自监督深度学习模型，已经证明了从多模态输入生成高质量开放域图像的能力。尽管它们甚至可以制作物体和动物的拟人化版本，以合理的方式组合不相关的概念，并为任何用户提供的图像提供变化，但我们目睹了如此快速的技术进步让许多视觉艺术家在他们的创作作品中更积极地利用 LTGM 时迷失了方向。我们这项工作的目标是了解视觉艺术家如何采用 LTGM 来支持他们的创意作品。为此，我们对72篇系统/应用论文进行了访谈研究和系统文献综述，进行了彻底的检验。涵盖 35 个不同视觉艺术领域的总共 28 名视觉艺术家承认 LTGM 具有高度可用性的多功能角色，可在自动化创作过程（即自动化）、扩展想法（即探索）以及促进或仲裁沟通（即调解）方面支持创意作品。最后，我们提供了四个设计指南，未来的研究人员在使用 LTGM 制作智能用户界面时可以参考这些指南。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在探讨视觉艺术家如何将大规模文本到图像生成模型（LTGMs）融入其创作实践，并提出设计指南以支持未来智能用户界面开发。
AI.motivation: 尽管LTGMs在图像生成领域取得显著进展，但视觉艺术家在主动利用这些技术时面临困惑，需系统研究其创作支持方式。
AI.method: 通过访谈28位跨35个视觉艺术领域的艺术家，结合对72篇系统/应用论文的系统文献综述。
AI.result: 发现LTGMs在创作流程自动化、创意扩展及沟通调解中具有高可用性，总结出艺术家认可的三大核心功能角色。
AI.conclusion: 提出四项设计指南，为未来基于LTGMs的智能用户界面开发提供理论框架与实践方向。

authors_text: Jinming Zhao,Hao Yang,Gholamreza Haffari,Ehsan Shareghi
title: RedApt: An Adaptor for wav2vec 2 Encoding \\ Faster and Smaller Speech Translation without Quality Compromise
title_zh: RedApt：用于 wav2vec 2 编码的适配器 \\ 语音翻译更快、更小，且质量不受影响
abstract: Pre-trained speech Transformers in speech translation (ST) have facilitated state-of-the-art (SotA) results; yet, using such encoders is computationally expensive. To improve this, we present a novel Reducer Adaptor block, RedApt, that could be seamlessly integrated within any Transformer-based speech encoding architecture. Integrating the pretrained wav2vec 2 speech encoder with RedAptbrings 41% speedup, 33% memory reduction with 24% fewer FLOPs at inference. To our positive surprise, our ST model with RedApt outperforms the SotA architecture by an average of 0.68 BLEU score on 8 language pairs from Must-C.
summary: Pre-trained speech Transformers in speech translation (ST) have facilitated state-of-the-art (SotA) results; yet, using such encoders is computationally expensive. To improve this, we present a novel Reducer Adaptor block, RedApt, that could be seamlessly integrated within any Transformer-based speech encoding architecture. Integrating the pretrained wav2vec 2 speech encoder with RedAptbrings 41% speedup, 33% memory reduction with 24% fewer FLOPs at inference. To our positive surprise, our ST model with RedApt outperforms the SotA architecture by an average of 0.68 BLEU score on 8 language pairs from Must-C.
abstract_zh: 语音翻译 (ST) 中的预训练语音 Transformer 促进了最先进的 (SotA) 结果；然而，使用这种编码器的计算成本很高。为了改善这一点，我们提出了一种新颖的Reducer Adapter 块RedApt，它可以无缝集成到任何基于Transformer 的语音编码架构中。将预训练的 wav2vec 2 语音编码器与 RedApt 集成，可带来 41% 的加速、33% 的内存减少以及 24% 的推理失败次数。令我们惊喜的是，我们使用 RedApt 的 ST 模型在 Must-C 的 8 个语言对上的 BLEU 平均得分优于 SotA 架构。

AI.tldr: 提出RedApt适配器，在不牺牲质量的前提下优化语音翻译模型的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 预训练语音Transformer虽效果优异但计算成本高，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计Reducer Adaptor块RedApt，集成于Transformer架构以减少计算资源消耗。
AI.result: 实现41%加速、33%内存缩减及24% FLOPs减少，BLEU分数超越SotA 0.68分。
AI.conclusion: RedApt验证了高效语音翻译模型的可行性，为后续研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 提出RedApt适配器，在不牺牲质量的前提下优化语音翻译模型的计算效率。
ai_content.motivation: 预训练语音Transformer虽效果优异但计算成本高，需更高效解决方案。
ai_content.method: 设计Reducer Adaptor块RedApt，集成于Transformer架构以减少计算资源消耗。
ai_content.result: 实现41%加速、33%内存缩减及24% FLOPs减少，BLEU分数超越SotA 0.68分。
ai_content.conclusion: RedApt验证了高效语音翻译模型的可行性，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: RedApt: An Adaptor for wav2vec 2 Encoding \\ Faster and Smaller Speech Translation without Quality Compromise RedApt：用于 wav2vec 2 编码的适配器 \\ 语音翻译更快、更小，且质量不受影响 Pre-trained speech Transformers in speech translation (ST) have facilitated state-of-the-art (SotA) results; yet, using such encoders is computationally expensive. To improve this, we present a novel Reducer Adaptor block, RedApt, that could be seamlessly integrated within any Transformer-based speech encoding architecture. Integrating the pretrained wav2vec 2 speech encoder with RedAptbrings 41% speedup, 33% memory reduction with 24% fewer FLOPs at inference. To our positive surprise, our ST model with RedApt outperforms the SotA architecture by an average of 0.68 BLEU score on 8 language pairs from Must-C. 语音翻译 (ST) 中的预训练语音 Transformer 促进了最先进的 (SotA) 结果；然而，使用这种编码器的计算成本很高。为了改善这一点，我们提出了一种新颖的Reducer Adapter 块RedApt，它可以无缝集成到任何基于Transformer 的语音编码架构中。将预训练的 wav2vec 2 语音编码器与 RedApt 集成，可带来 41% 的加速、33% 的内存减少以及 24% 的推理失败次数。令我们惊喜的是，我们使用 RedApt 的 ST 模型在 Must-C 的 8 个语言对上的 BLEU 平均得分优于 SotA 架构。 提出RedApt适配器，在不牺牲质量的前提下优化语音翻译模型的计算效率。 Jinming Zhao,Hao Yang,Gholamreza Haffari,Ehsan Shareghi cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Shihao Shao,Qinghua Cui
title: 1st Place Solution in Google Universal Images Embedding
title_zh: Google 通用图像嵌入解决方案第一名
abstract: This paper presents the 1st place solution for the Google Universal Images Embedding Competition on Kaggle. The highlighted part of our solution is based on 1) A novel way to conduct training and fine-tuning; 2) The idea of a better ensemble in the pool of models that make embedding; 3) The potential trade-off between fine-tuning on high-resolution and overlapping patches; 4) The potential factors to work for the dynamic margin. Our solution reaches 0.728 in the private leader board, which achieve 1st place in Google Universal Images Embedding Competition.
summary: This paper presents the 1st place solution for the Google Universal Images Embedding Competition on Kaggle. The highlighted part of our solution is based on 1) A novel way to conduct training and fine-tuning; 2) The idea of a better ensemble in the pool of models that make embedding; 3) The potential trade-off between fine-tuning on high-resolution and overlapping patches; 4) The potential factors to work for the dynamic margin. Our solution reaches 0.728 in the private leader board, which achieve 1st place in Google Universal Images Embedding Competition.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Kaggle 上 Google 通用图像嵌入竞赛的第一名解决方案。我们的解决方案的重点部分基于： 1）一种进行训练和微调的新颖方法； 2）在进行嵌入的模型池中建立更好的集成的想法； 3）高分辨率微调和重叠补丁之间的潜在权衡； 4) 影响动态边际的潜在因素。我们的解决方案在私人排行榜上达到了 0.728，在 Google 通用图像嵌入竞赛中获得第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在Kaggle的Google Universal Images Embedding竞赛中获得第一名的解决方案，重点优化了图像嵌入模型的训练与集成方法。
AI.motivation: 通过改进训练策略、模型集成方式及权衡高分辨率与动态边距等因素，提升图像嵌入的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出新型训练与微调方法，优化模型集成策略，分析高分辨率与重叠补丁的权衡，并引入动态边距调整机制。
AI.result: 在竞赛私有排行榜中达到0.728分，获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 综合多种技术改进的解决方案有效提升了图像嵌入性能，验证了方法的有效性与创新性。

authors_text: Chao Zhou,Yuan-Gen Wang,Guopu Zhu
title: Object-Attentional Untargeted Adversarial Attack
title_zh: 对象注意无目标对抗性攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks are facing severe threats from adversarial attacks. Most existing black-box attacks fool target model by generating either global perturbations or local patches. However, both global perturbations and local patches easily cause annoying visual artifacts in adversarial example. Compared with some smooth regions of an image, the object region generally has more edges and a more complex texture. Thus small perturbations on it will be more imperceptible. On the other hand, the object region is undoubtfully the decisive part of an image to classification tasks. Motivated by these two facts, we propose an object-attentional adversarial attack method for untargeted attack. Specifically, we first generate an object region by intersecting the object detection region from YOLOv4 with the salient object detection (SOD) region from HVPNet. Furthermore, we design an activation strategy to avoid the reaction caused by the incomplete SOD. Then, we perform an adversarial attack only on the detected object region by leveraging Simple Black-box Adversarial Attack (SimBA). To verify the proposed method, we create a unique dataset by extracting all the images containing the object defined by COCO from ImageNet-1K, named COCO-Reduced-ImageNet in this paper. Experimental results on ImageNet-1K and COCO-Reduced-ImageNet show that under various system settings, our method yields the adversarial example with better perceptual quality meanwhile saving the query budget up to 24.16\% compared to the state-of-the-art approaches including SimBA.
summary: Deep neural networks are facing severe threats from adversarial attacks. Most existing black-box attacks fool target model by generating either global perturbations or local patches. However, both global perturbations and local patches easily cause annoying visual artifacts in adversarial example. Compared with some smooth regions of an image, the object region generally has more edges and a more complex texture. Thus small perturbations on it will be more imperceptible. On the other hand, the object region is undoubtfully the decisive part of an image to classification tasks. Motivated by these two facts, we propose an object-attentional adversarial attack method for untargeted attack. Specifically, we first generate an object region by intersecting the object detection region from YOLOv4 with the salient object detection (SOD) region from HVPNet. Furthermore, we design an activation strategy to avoid the reaction caused by the incomplete SOD. Then, we perform an adversarial attack only on the detected object region by leveraging Simple Black-box Adversarial Attack (SimBA). To verify the proposed method, we create a unique dataset by extracting all the images containing the object defined by COCO from ImageNet-1K, named COCO-Reduced-ImageNet in this paper. Experimental results on ImageNet-1K and COCO-Reduced-ImageNet show that under various system settings, our method yields the adversarial example with better perceptual quality meanwhile saving the query budget up to 24.16\% compared to the state-of-the-art approaches including SimBA.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络正面临来自对抗性攻击的严重威胁。大多数现有的黑盒攻击通过生成全局扰动或局部补丁来欺骗目标模型。然而，全局扰动和局部补丁都很容易在对抗性示例中引起恼人的视觉伪影。与图像中的一些平滑区域相比，目标区域通常具有更多的边缘和更复杂的纹理。因此，对其的微小扰动将更难以察觉。另一方面，目标区域无疑是图像分类任务的决定性部分。受这两个事实的启发，我们提出了一种用于非目标攻击的对象注意对抗性攻击方法。具体来说，我们首先通过将 YOLOv4 的对象检测区域与 HVPNet 的显着对象检测 (SOD) 区域相交来生成对象区域。此外，我们设计了一种激活策略来避免不完整的SOD引起的反应。然后，我们利用简单黑盒对抗攻击（SimBA）仅对检测到的对象区域执行对抗攻击。为了验证所提出的方法，我们通过从 ImageNet-1K 中提取包含 COCO 定义的对象的所有图像来创建一个唯一的数据集，在本文中命名为 COCO-Reduced-ImageNet。 ImageNet-1K 和 COCO-Reduced-ImageNet 上的实验结果表明，在各种系统设置下，我们的方法产生了具有更好感知质量的对抗性示例，同时与包括 SimBA 在内的最先进方法相比，节省了高达 24.16% 的查询预算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对象注意力的无目标对抗攻击方法，通过聚焦图像中的对象区域生成更隐蔽的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法生成的全局扰动或局部补丁容易产生视觉伪影，而对象区域具有更多边缘和复杂纹理，小扰动更不易被察觉，且对分类任务至关重要。
AI.method: 结合YOLOv4目标检测与HVPNet显著性检测生成对象区域，设计激活策略避免不完整显著性检测的影响，并基于SimBA仅在对象区域执行对抗攻击。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K和COCO-Reduced-ImageNet数据集上，对抗样本感知质量更优，查询预算节省达24.16%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 对象注意力机制有效提升了对抗攻击的隐蔽性与效率，为黑盒攻击提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jian Song,Di Liang,Rumei Li,Yuntao Li,Sirui Wang,Minlong Peng,Wei Wu,Yongxin Yu
title: Improving Semantic Matching through Dependency-Enhanced Pre-trained Model with Adaptive Fusion
title_zh: 通过自适应融合的依赖性增强预训练模型改进语义匹配
abstract: Transformer-based pre-trained models like BERT have achieved great progress on Semantic Sentence Matching. Meanwhile, dependency prior knowledge has also shown general benefits in multiple NLP tasks. However, how to efficiently integrate dependency prior structure into pre-trained models to better model complex semantic matching relations is still unsettled. In this paper, we propose the \textbf{D}ependency-Enhanced \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{F}usion \textbf{A}ttention (\textbf{DAFA}), which explicitly introduces dependency structure into pre-trained models and adaptively fuses it with semantic information. Specifically, \textbf{\emph{(i)}} DAFA first proposes a structure-sensitive paradigm to construct a dependency matrix for calibrating attention weights. It adopts an adaptive fusion module to integrate the obtained dependency information and the original semantic signals. Moreover, DAFA reconstructs the attention calculation flow and provides better interpretability. By applying it on BERT, our method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on 10 public datasets, demonstrating the benefits of adaptively fusing dependency structure in semantic matching task.
summary: Transformer-based pre-trained models like BERT have achieved great progress on Semantic Sentence Matching. Meanwhile, dependency prior knowledge has also shown general benefits in multiple NLP tasks. However, how to efficiently integrate dependency prior structure into pre-trained models to better model complex semantic matching relations is still unsettled. In this paper, we propose the \textbf{D}ependency-Enhanced \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{F}usion \textbf{A}ttention (\textbf{DAFA}), which explicitly introduces dependency structure into pre-trained models and adaptively fuses it with semantic information. Specifically, \textbf{\emph{(i)}} DAFA first proposes a structure-sensitive paradigm to construct a dependency matrix for calibrating attention weights. It adopts an adaptive fusion module to integrate the obtained dependency information and the original semantic signals. Moreover, DAFA reconstructs the attention calculation flow and provides better interpretability. By applying it on BERT, our method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on 10 public datasets, demonstrating the benefits of adaptively fusing dependency structure in semantic matching task.
abstract_zh: BERT 等基于 Transformer 的预训练模型在语义句子匹配方面取得了巨大进展。同时，依赖先验知识在多个 NLP 任务中也显示出了普遍的好处。然而，如何有效地将依赖先验结构集成到预训练模型中以更好地建模复杂的语义匹配关系仍然悬而未决。在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{D}ependency-Enhanced \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{F}usion \textbf{A}ttention (\textbf{DAFA})，它将依赖结构显式地引入到预训练模型中，并自适应地将其与语义信息融合。具体来说， \textbf{\emph{(i)}} DAFA 首先提出了一种结构敏感的范式来构建用于校准注意力权重的依赖矩阵。它采用自适应融合模块来整合获得的依赖信息和原始语义信号。此外，DAFA重构了注意力计算流程并提供了更好的可解释性。通过将其应用于 BERT，我们的方法在 10 个公共数据集上实现了最先进的或有竞争力的性能，展示了在语义匹配任务中自适应融合依赖结构的好处。

AI.tldr: 通过引入依赖关系增强的预训练模型与自适应融合方法，提升语义匹配任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管BERT等预训练模型在语义句子匹配中表现优异，但如何有效整合依赖结构先验知识以建模复杂语义关系仍是一个未解决的问题。
AI.method: 提出依赖增强自适应融合注意力（DAFA）方法，构建依赖矩阵校准注意力权重，并通过自适应融合模块整合依赖信息与语义信号，重构注意力计算流程以提升可解释性。
AI.result: 在BERT基础上应用DAFA后，在10个公开数据集上达到最先进或具有竞争力的性能，验证了依赖结构自适应融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应融合依赖结构能够有效提升语义匹配任务的性能，为预训练模型与先验知识的结合提供新思路。

search_text: Improving Semantic Matching through Dependency-Enhanced Pre-trained Model with Adaptive Fusion 通过自适应融合的依赖性增强预训练模型改进语义匹配 Transformer-based pre-trained models like BERT have achieved great progress on Semantic Sentence Matching. Meanwhile, dependency prior knowledge has also shown general benefits in multiple NLP tasks. However, how to efficiently integrate dependency prior structure into pre-trained models to better model complex semantic matching relations is still unsettled. In this paper, we propose the \textbf{D}ependency-Enhanced \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{F}usion \textbf{A}ttention (\textbf{DAFA}), which explicitly introduces dependency structure into pre-trained models and adaptively fuses it with semantic information. Specifically, \textbf{\emph{(i)}} DAFA first proposes a structure-sensitive paradigm to construct a dependency matrix for calibrating attention weights. It adopts an adaptive fusion module to integrate the obtained dependency information and the original semantic signals. Moreover, DAFA reconstructs the attention calculation flow and provides better interpretability. By applying it on BERT, our method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on 10 public datasets, demonstrating the benefits of adaptively fusing dependency structure in semantic matching task. BERT 等基于 Transformer 的预训练模型在语义句子匹配方面取得了巨大进展。同时，依赖先验知识在多个 NLP 任务中也显示出了普遍的好处。然而，如何有效地将依赖先验结构集成到预训练模型中以更好地建模复杂的语义匹配关系仍然悬而未决。在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{D}ependency-Enhanced \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{F}usion \textbf{A}ttention (\textbf{DAFA})，它将依赖结构显式地引入到预训练模型中，并自适应地将其与语义信息融合。具体来说， \textbf{\emph{(i)}} DAFA 首先提出了一种结构敏感的范式来构建用于校准注意力权重的依赖矩阵。它采用自适应融合模块来整合获得的依赖信息和原始语义信号。此外，DAFA重构了注意力计算流程并提供了更好的可解释性。通过将其应用于 BERT，我们的方法在 10 个公共数据集上实现了最先进的或有竞争力的性能，展示了在语义匹配任务中自适应融合依赖结构的好处。 通过引入依赖关系增强的预训练模型与自适应融合方法，提升语义匹配任务的性能。 Jian Song,Di Liang,Rumei Li,Yuntao Li,Sirui Wang,Minlong Peng,Wei Wu,Yongxin Yu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Hong Chen,Rujun Han,Te-Lin Wu,Hideki Nakayama,Nanyun Peng
title: Character-Centric Story Visualization via Visual Planning and Token Alignment
title_zh: 通过视觉规划和标记对齐实现以角色为中心的故事可视化
abstract: Story visualization advances the traditional text-to-image generation by enabling multiple image generation based on a complete story. This task requires machines to 1) understand long text inputs and 2) produce a globally consistent image sequence that illustrates the contents of the story. A key challenge of consistent story visualization is to preserve characters that are essential in stories. To tackle the challenge, we propose to adapt a recent work that augments Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoders (VQ-VAE) with a text-tovisual-token (transformer) architecture. Specifically, we modify the text-to-visual-token module with a two-stage framework: 1) character token planning model that predicts the visual tokens for characters only; 2) visual token completion model that generates the remaining visual token sequence, which is sent to VQ-VAE for finalizing image generations. To encourage characters to appear in the images, we further train the two-stage framework with a character-token alignment objective. Extensive experiments and evaluations demonstrate that the proposed method excels at preserving characters and can produce higher quality image sequences compared with the strong baselines. Codes can be found in https://github.com/sairin1202/VP-CSV
summary: Story visualization advances the traditional text-to-image generation by enabling multiple image generation based on a complete story. This task requires machines to 1) understand long text inputs and 2) produce a globally consistent image sequence that illustrates the contents of the story. A key challenge of consistent story visualization is to preserve characters that are essential in stories. To tackle the challenge, we propose to adapt a recent work that augments Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoders (VQ-VAE) with a text-tovisual-token (transformer) architecture. Specifically, we modify the text-to-visual-token module with a two-stage framework: 1) character token planning model that predicts the visual tokens for characters only; 2) visual token completion model that generates the remaining visual token sequence, which is sent to VQ-VAE for finalizing image generations. To encourage characters to appear in the images, we further train the two-stage framework with a character-token alignment objective. Extensive experiments and evaluations demonstrate that the proposed method excels at preserving characters and can produce higher quality image sequences compared with the strong baselines. Codes can be found in https://github.com/sairin1202/VP-CSV
abstract_zh: 故事可视化通过支持基于完整故事的多个图像生成，推进了传统的文本到图像生成。这项任务要求机器 1) 理解长文本输入，2) 生成全局一致的图像序列来说明故事的内容。一致的故事可视化的一个关键挑战是保留故事中必不可少的角色。为了应对这一挑战，我们建议采用最近的一项工作，通过文本到视觉令牌（转换器）架构来增强矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）。具体来说，我们用两阶段框架修改文本到视觉标记模块：1）仅预测字符的视觉标记的字符标记规划模型； 2）视觉标记完成模型，生成剩余的视觉标记序列，将其发送到VQ-VAE以最终确定图像生成。为了鼓励字符出现在图像中，我们进一步训练具有字符标记对齐目标的两阶段框架。大量的实验和评估表明，与强基线相比，所提出的方法在保留字符方面表现出色，并且可以产生更高质量的图像序列。代码可以在 https://github.com/sairin1202/VP-CSV 中找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉规划和标记对齐的字符中心故事可视化方法，旨在生成符合故事内容且保持角色一致性的多图像序列。
AI.motivation: 传统文本到图像生成难以处理长文本输入并保持故事中角色的一致性，现有方法在生成多图像序列时容易丢失关键角色信息。
AI.method: 通过改进VQ-VAE模型，设计两阶段框架：第一阶段预测角色视觉标记，第二阶段生成剩余视觉标记序列，并引入角色标记对齐目标优化训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在角色保留和图像序列质量上优于现有基准模型，生成结果更符合故事内容且视觉连贯。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过字符优先的视觉规划和标记对齐有效解决了故事可视化中的角色一致性难题，为长文本多模态生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xuan Gong,Liangchen Song,Rishi Vedula,Abhishek Sharma,Meng Zheng,Benjamin Planche,Arun Innanje,Terrence Chen,Junsong Yuan,David Doermann,Ziyan Wu
title: Federated Learning with Privacy-Preserving Ensemble Attention Distillation
title_zh: 具有隐私保护集成注意力蒸馏的联邦学习
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning paradigm where many local nodes collaboratively train a central model while keeping the training data decentralized. This is particularly relevant for clinical applications since patient data are usually not allowed to be transferred out of medical facilities, leading to the need for FL. Existing FL methods typically share model parameters or employ co-distillation to address the issue of unbalanced data distribution. However, they also require numerous rounds of synchronized communication and, more importantly, suffer from a privacy leakage risk. We propose a privacy-preserving FL framework leveraging unlabeled public data for one-way offline knowledge distillation in this work. The central model is learned from local knowledge via ensemble attention distillation. Our technique uses decentralized and heterogeneous local data like existing FL approaches, but more importantly, it significantly reduces the risk of privacy leakage. We demonstrate that our method achieves very competitive performance with more robust privacy preservation based on extensive experiments on image classification, segmentation, and reconstruction tasks.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning paradigm where many local nodes collaboratively train a central model while keeping the training data decentralized. This is particularly relevant for clinical applications since patient data are usually not allowed to be transferred out of medical facilities, leading to the need for FL. Existing FL methods typically share model parameters or employ co-distillation to address the issue of unbalanced data distribution. However, they also require numerous rounds of synchronized communication and, more importantly, suffer from a privacy leakage risk. We propose a privacy-preserving FL framework leveraging unlabeled public data for one-way offline knowledge distillation in this work. The central model is learned from local knowledge via ensemble attention distillation. Our technique uses decentralized and heterogeneous local data like existing FL approaches, but more importantly, it significantly reduces the risk of privacy leakage. We demonstrate that our method achieves very competitive performance with more robust privacy preservation based on extensive experiments on image classification, segmentation, and reconstruction tasks.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种机器学习范例，其中许多本地节点协作训练中央模型，同时保持训练数据分散。这对于临床应用尤其重要，因为通常不允许将患者数据转移出医疗机构，从而导致需要 FL。现有的 FL 方法通常共享模型参数或采用共蒸馏来解决数据分布不平衡的问题。然而，它们也需要多轮同步通信，更重要的是，存在隐私泄露风险。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种保护隐私的 FL 框架，利用未标记的公共数据进行单向离线知识蒸馏。中心模型是通过集成注意力蒸馏从局部知识中学习的。我们的技术像现有的 FL 方法一样使用去中心化和异构的本地数据，但更重要的是，它显着降低了隐私泄露的风险。我们基于图像分类、分割和重建任务的大量实验证明，我们的方法通过更强大的隐私保护实现了非常有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐私保护的联邦学习框架，利用未标记的公共数据进行单向离线知识蒸馏，以降低隐私泄露风险。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法存在隐私泄露风险且需频繁同步通信，需在保护隐私的同时提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过集成注意力蒸馏技术，利用本地数据与公共数据进行单向知识迁移，无需共享原始数据或模型参数。
AI.result: 在图像分类、分割和重建任务中，该方法在保持高模型性能的同时显著降低隐私泄露风险。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为医疗等敏感领域提供了兼顾隐私保护与模型效果的联邦学习解决方案。
