search_text: Federated Learning with Privacy-Preserving Ensemble Attention Distillation 具有隐私保护集成注意力蒸馏的联邦学习 Federated Learning (FL) is a machine learning paradigm where many local nodes collaboratively train a central model while keeping the training data decentralized. This is particularly relevant for clinical applications since patient data are usually not allowed to be transferred out of medical facilities, leading to the need for FL. Existing FL methods typically share model parameters or employ co-distillation to address the issue of unbalanced data distribution. However, they also require numerous rounds of synchronized communication and, more importantly, suffer from a privacy leakage risk. We propose a privacy-preserving FL framework leveraging unlabeled public data for one-way offline knowledge distillation in this work. The central model is learned from local knowledge via ensemble attention distillation. Our technique uses decentralized and heterogeneous local data like existing FL approaches, but more importantly, it significantly reduces the risk of privacy leakage. We demonstrate that our method achieves very competitive performance with more robust privacy preservation based on extensive experiments on image classification, segmentation, and reconstruction tasks. 联邦学习 (FL) 是一种机器学习范例，其中许多本地节点协作训练中央模型，同时保持训练数据分散。这对于临床应用尤其重要，因为通常不允许将患者数据转移出医疗机构，从而导致需要 FL。现有的 FL 方法通常共享模型参数或采用共蒸馏来解决数据分布不平衡的问题。然而，它们也需要多轮同步通信，更重要的是，存在隐私泄露风险。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种保护隐私的 FL 框架，利用未标记的公共数据进行单向离线知识蒸馏。中心模型是通过集成注意力蒸馏从局部知识中学习的。我们的技术像现有的 FL 方法一样使用去中心化和异构的本地数据，但更重要的是，它显着降低了隐私泄露的风险。我们基于图像分类、分割和重建任务的大量实验证明，我们的方法通过更强大的隐私保护实现了非常有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种隐私保护的联邦学习框架，利用未标记的公共数据进行单向离线知识蒸馏，以降低隐私泄露风险。 Xuan Gong,Liangchen Song,Rishi Vedula,Abhishek Sharma,Meng Zheng,Benjamin Planche,Arun Innanje,Terrence Chen,Junsong Yuan,David Doermann,Ziyan Wu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Tao Tang,Changlin Li,Guangrun Wang,Kaicheng Yu,Xiaojun Chang,Xiaodan Liang
title: Learning Self-Regularized Adversarial Views for Self-Supervised Vision Transformers
title_zh: 学习自我监督视觉变压器的自我调节对抗性观点
abstract: Automatic data augmentation (AutoAugment) strategies are indispensable in supervised data-efficient training protocols of vision transformers, and have led to state-of-the-art results in supervised learning. Despite the success, its development and application on self-supervised vision transformers have been hindered by several barriers, including the high search cost, the lack of supervision, and the unsuitable search space. In this work, we propose AutoView, a self-regularized adversarial AutoAugment method, to learn views for self-supervised vision transformers, by addressing the above barriers. First, we reduce the search cost of AutoView to nearly zero by learning views and network parameters simultaneously in a single forward-backward step, minimizing and maximizing the mutual information among different augmented views, respectively. Then, to avoid information collapse caused by the lack of label supervision, we propose a self-regularized loss term to guarantee the information propagation. Additionally, we present a curated augmentation policy search space for self-supervised learning, by modifying the generally used search space designed for supervised learning. On ImageNet, our AutoView achieves remarkable improvement over RandAug baseline (+10.2% k-NN accuracy), and consistently outperforms sota manually tuned view policy by a clear margin (up to +1.3% k-NN accuracy). Extensive experiments show that AutoView pretraining also benefits downstream tasks (+1.2% mAcc on ADE20K Semantic Segmentation and +2.8% mAP on revisited Oxford Image Retrieval benchmark) and improves model robustness (+2.3% Top-1 Acc on ImageNet-A and +1.0% AUPR on ImageNet-O). Code and models will be available at https://github.com/Trent-tangtao/AutoView.
summary: Automatic data augmentation (AutoAugment) strategies are indispensable in supervised data-efficient training protocols of vision transformers, and have led to state-of-the-art results in supervised learning. Despite the success, its development and application on self-supervised vision transformers have been hindered by several barriers, including the high search cost, the lack of supervision, and the unsuitable search space. In this work, we propose AutoView, a self-regularized adversarial AutoAugment method, to learn views for self-supervised vision transformers, by addressing the above barriers. First, we reduce the search cost of AutoView to nearly zero by learning views and network parameters simultaneously in a single forward-backward step, minimizing and maximizing the mutual information among different augmented views, respectively. Then, to avoid information collapse caused by the lack of label supervision, we propose a self-regularized loss term to guarantee the information propagation. Additionally, we present a curated augmentation policy search space for self-supervised learning, by modifying the generally used search space designed for supervised learning. On ImageNet, our AutoView achieves remarkable improvement over RandAug baseline (+10.2% k-NN accuracy), and consistently outperforms sota manually tuned view policy by a clear margin (up to +1.3% k-NN accuracy). Extensive experiments show that AutoView pretraining also benefits downstream tasks (+1.2% mAcc on ADE20K Semantic Segmentation and +2.8% mAP on revisited Oxford Image Retrieval benchmark) and improves model robustness (+2.3% Top-1 Acc on ImageNet-A and +1.0% AUPR on ImageNet-O). Code and models will be available at https://github.com/Trent-tangtao/AutoView.
abstract_zh: 自动数据增强（AutoAugment）策略在视觉变换器的监督数据高效训练协议中是不可或缺的，并且在监督学习中取得了最先进的结果。尽管取得了成功，但其在自监督视觉变换器上的开发和应用却受到了一些障碍的阻碍，包括搜索成本高、缺乏监督和不合适的搜索空间。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AutoView，一种自正则化的对抗性 AutoAugment 方法，通过解决上述障碍来学习自监督视觉转换器的视图。首先，我们通过在单个前向-后向步骤中同时学习视图和网络参数，分别最小化和最大化不同增强视图之间的互信息，将 AutoView 的搜索成本降低到接近于零。然后，为了避免由于缺乏标签监督而导致的信息崩溃，我们提出了自正则化损失项来保证信息传播。此外，我们通过修改为监督学习设计的常用搜索空间，提出了一个用于自监督学习的策划增强策略搜索空间。在 ImageNet 上，我们的 AutoView 比 RandAug 基线取得了显着的改进（+10.2% k-NN 准确度），并且始终明显优于 sota 手动调整的视图策略（高达 +1.3% k-NN 准确度）。大量实验表明，AutoView 预训练也有利于下游任务（在 ADE20K 语义分割上 +1.2% mAcc，在重新审视的牛津图像检索基准上 +2.8% mAP），并提高模型鲁棒性（在 ImageNet-A 上 +2.3% Top-1 Acc，在 ImageNet-O 上 +1.0% AUPR）。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/Trent-tangtao/AutoView 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoView方法，通过自正则化对抗增强策略优化自监督视觉Transformer的视图学习。
AI.motivation: 现有自动数据增强策略在自监督视觉Transformer中因搜索成本高、缺乏监督和搜索空间不适配等问题难以有效应用。
AI.method: 通过单次前向-反向传播同步学习视图与网络参数，最小化最大化不同增强视图间的互信息；引入自正则化损失项防止信息崩溃，并调整监督学习的搜索空间以适配自监督任务。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上k-NN准确率较RandAug提升10.2%，优于手动调优策略1.3%；下游任务如ADE20K语义分割和Oxford图像检索准确率分别提升1.2%和2.8%，模型鲁棒性在ImageNet-A和ImageNet-O上提升2.3%和1.0%。
AI.conclusion: AutoView有效解决了自监督视觉Transformer中增强策略的优化难题，在多项任务上显著提升性能并增强模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Nam Hyeon-Woo,Kim Yu-Ji,Byeongho Heo,Dongyoon Han,Seong Joon Oh,Tae-Hyun Oh
title: Scratching Visual Transformer's Back with Uniform Attention
title_zh: 统一注意力，挠挠视觉变形金刚的后背
abstract: The favorable performance of Vision Transformers (ViTs) is often attributed to the multi-head self-attention (MSA). The MSA enables global interactions at each layer of a ViT model, which is a contrasting feature against Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) that gradually increase the range of interaction across multiple layers. We study the role of the density of the attention. Our preliminary analyses suggest that the spatial interactions of attention maps are close to dense interactions rather than sparse ones. This is a curious phenomenon, as dense attention maps are harder for the model to learn due to steeper softmax gradients around them. We interpret this as a strong preference for ViT models to include dense interaction. We thus manually insert the uniform attention to each layer of ViT models to supply the much needed dense interactions. We call this method Context Broadcasting, CB. We observe that the inclusion of CB reduces the degree of density in the original attention maps and increases both the capacity and generalizability of the ViT models. CB incurs negligible costs: 1 line in your model code, no additional parameters, and minimal extra operations.
summary: The favorable performance of Vision Transformers (ViTs) is often attributed to the multi-head self-attention (MSA). The MSA enables global interactions at each layer of a ViT model, which is a contrasting feature against Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) that gradually increase the range of interaction across multiple layers. We study the role of the density of the attention. Our preliminary analyses suggest that the spatial interactions of attention maps are close to dense interactions rather than sparse ones. This is a curious phenomenon, as dense attention maps are harder for the model to learn due to steeper softmax gradients around them. We interpret this as a strong preference for ViT models to include dense interaction. We thus manually insert the uniform attention to each layer of ViT models to supply the much needed dense interactions. We call this method Context Broadcasting, CB. We observe that the inclusion of CB reduces the degree of density in the original attention maps and increases both the capacity and generalizability of the ViT models. CB incurs negligible costs: 1 line in your model code, no additional parameters, and minimal extra operations.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器（ViTs）的良好性能通常归因于多头自注意力（MSA）。 MSA 可以在 ViT 模型的每一层实现全局交互，这与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 形成鲜明对比，后者逐渐增加跨多个层的交互范围。我们研究注意力密度的作用。我们的初步分析表明，注意力图的空间交互接近于密集交互，而不是稀疏交互。这是一个奇怪的现象，因为密集的注意力图由于周围的 softmax 梯度更陡，因此模型更难学习。我们将此解释为对包含密集交互的 ViT 模型的强烈偏好。因此，我们手动将统一注意力插入到 ViT 模型的每一层，以提供急需的密集交互。我们称这种方法为上下文广播，CB。我们观察到，CB 的包含降低了原始注意力图中的密度，并增加了 ViT 模型的容量和泛化性。 CB 产生的成本可以忽略不计：模型代码只需 1 行，无需额外参数，并且额外操作最少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入统一注意力机制（Context Broadcasting）来增强视觉Transformer（ViT）模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer依赖多头自注意力实现全局交互，但密集注意力图因softmax梯度陡峭难以学习，而实验发现ViT模型倾向于生成密集交互，需人工补充。
AI.method: 设计Context Broadcasting（CB）方法，在ViT每一层手动插入统一注意力机制，无需额外参数和计算开销。
AI.result: CB显著降低原始注意力密度，提升模型容量与泛化能力，且仅需1行代码修改，无额外参数和计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 统一注意力机制有效增强ViT性能，验证了密集交互对模型的重要性，且实现成本极低。

tldr: 本文提出通过引入统一注意力机制（Context Broadcasting）来增强视觉Transformer（ViT）模型的性能。
motivation: 视觉Transformer依赖多头自注意力实现全局交互，但密集注意力图因softmax梯度陡峭难以学习，而实验发现ViT模型倾向于生成密集交互，需人工补充。
method: 设计Context Broadcasting（CB）方法，在ViT每一层手动插入统一注意力机制，无需额外参数和计算开销。
result: CB显著降低原始注意力密度，提升模型容量与泛化能力，且仅需1行代码修改，无额外参数和计算成本。
conclusion: 统一注意力机制有效增强ViT性能，验证了密集交互对模型的重要性，且实现成本极低。
search_text: Scratching Visual Transformer's Back with Uniform Attention 统一注意力，挠挠视觉变形金刚的后背 The favorable performance of Vision Transformers (ViTs) is often attributed to the multi-head self-attention (MSA). The MSA enables global interactions at each layer of a ViT model, which is a contrasting feature against Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) that gradually increase the range of interaction across multiple layers. We study the role of the density of the attention. Our preliminary analyses suggest that the spatial interactions of attention maps are close to dense interactions rather than sparse ones. This is a curious phenomenon, as dense attention maps are harder for the model to learn due to steeper softmax gradients around them. We interpret this as a strong preference for ViT models to include dense interaction. We thus manually insert the uniform attention to each layer of ViT models to supply the much needed dense interactions. We call this method Context Broadcasting, CB. We observe that the inclusion of CB reduces the degree of density in the original attention maps and increases both the capacity and generalizability of the ViT models. CB incurs negligible costs: 1 line in your model code, no additional parameters, and minimal extra operations. 视觉变压器（ViTs）的良好性能通常归因于多头自注意力（MSA）。 MSA 可以在 ViT 模型的每一层实现全局交互，这与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 形成鲜明对比，后者逐渐增加跨多个层的交互范围。我们研究注意力密度的作用。我们的初步分析表明，注意力图的空间交互接近于密集交互，而不是稀疏交互。这是一个奇怪的现象，因为密集的注意力图由于周围的 softmax 梯度更陡，因此模型更难学习。我们将此解释为对包含密集交互的 ViT 模型的强烈偏好。因此，我们手动将统一注意力插入到 ViT 模型的每一层，以提供急需的密集交互。我们称这种方法为上下文广播，CB。我们观察到，CB 的包含降低了原始注意力图中的密度，并增加了 ViT 模型的容量和泛化性。 CB 产生的成本可以忽略不计：模型代码只需 1 行，无需额外参数，并且额外操作最少。 本文提出通过引入统一注意力机制（Context Broadcasting）来增强视觉Transformer（ViT）模型的性能。 Nam Hyeon-Woo,Kim Yu-Ji,Byeongho Heo,Dongyoon Han,Seong Joon Oh,Tae-Hyun Oh cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Luiza Labazanova,Shuang Peng,Liuming Qiu,Hoi-Yin Lee,Thrishantha Nanayakkara,David Navarro-Alarcon
title: Self-Reconfigurable Soft-Rigid Mobile Agent with Variable Stiffness and Adaptive Morphology
title_zh: 具有可变刚度和自适应形态的自重构软刚性移动代理
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel design of a hybrid mobile robot with controllable stiffness and deformable shape. Compared to conventional mobile agents, our system can switch between rigid and compliant phases by solidifying or melting Field's metal in its structure and, thus, alter its shape through the motion of its active components. In the soft state, the robot's main body can bend into circular arcs, which enables it to conform to surrounding curved objects. This variable geometry of the robot creates new motion modes which cannot be described by standard (i.e., fixed geometry) models. To this end, we develop a unified mathematical model that captures the differential kinematics of both rigid and soft states. An optimised control strategy is further proposed to select the most appropriate phase states and motion modes needed to reach a target pose-shape configuration. The performance of our new method is validated with numerical simulations and experiments conducted on a prototype system. The simulation source code is available at https://github.com/Louashka/2sr-agent-simulation.git}{GitHub repository.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel design of a hybrid mobile robot with controllable stiffness and deformable shape. Compared to conventional mobile agents, our system can switch between rigid and compliant phases by solidifying or melting Field's metal in its structure and, thus, alter its shape through the motion of its active components. In the soft state, the robot's main body can bend into circular arcs, which enables it to conform to surrounding curved objects. This variable geometry of the robot creates new motion modes which cannot be described by standard (i.e., fixed geometry) models. To this end, we develop a unified mathematical model that captures the differential kinematics of both rigid and soft states. An optimised control strategy is further proposed to select the most appropriate phase states and motion modes needed to reach a target pose-shape configuration. The performance of our new method is validated with numerical simulations and experiments conducted on a prototype system. The simulation source code is available at https://github.com/Louashka/2sr-agent-simulation.git}{GitHub repository.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种具有可控刚度和可变形形状的混合移动机器人的新颖设计。与传统的移动代理相比，我们的系统可以通过凝固或熔化 Field 结构中的金属来在刚性相和柔顺相之间切换，从而通过其活动组件的运动来改变其形状。在柔软状态下，机器人的主体可以弯曲成圆弧，这使其能够顺应周围弯曲的物体。机器人的这种可变几何形状创建了无法用标准（即固定几何形状）模型描述的新运动模式。为此，我们开发了一个统一的数学模型，可以捕获刚性和软状态的微分运动学。进一步提出了优化的控制策略，以选择达到目标姿态形状配置所需的最合适的相状态和运动模式。我们的新方法的性能通过在原型系统上进行的数值模拟和实验进行了验证。模拟源代码可在 https://github.com/Louashka/2sr-agent-simulation.git}{GitHub 存储库中获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具有可控刚度和可变形形态的混合移动机器人设计，能够通过固态或熔融Field's金属切换刚性和柔顺状态，实现复杂环境下的自适应运动。
AI.motivation: 传统移动机器人受限于固定几何结构，难以适应复杂环境。本文旨在开发一种可切换刚柔状态、自适应形态的机器人，以拓展运动模式和环境适应性。
AI.method: 利用Field's金属相变实现刚柔切换，建立统一数学模型描述刚柔两种状态的微分运动学，并提出优化控制策略选择最佳状态与运动模式。
AI.result: 通过数值仿真和原型实验验证了方法有效性，展示了机器人在不同状态下的运动能力，开源代码已发布于GitHub。
AI.conclusion: 该设计实现了传统模型无法描述的新运动模式，为复杂环境下的移动机器人提供了创新解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Ang Li,Song Jiang,Yizhou Sun,Judea Pearl
title: Learning Probabilities of Causation from Finite Population Data
title_zh: 从有限总体数据中学习因果关系的概率
abstract: This paper deals with the problem of learning the probabilities of causation of subpopulations given finite population data. The tight bounds of three basic probabilities of causation, the probability of necessity and sufficiency (PNS), the probability of sufficiency (PS), and the probability of necessity (PN), were derived by Tian and Pearl. However, obtaining the bounds for each subpopulation requires experimental and observational distributions of each subpopulation, which is usually impractical to estimate given finite population data. We propose a machine learning model that helps to learn the bounds of the probabilities of causation for subpopulations given finite population data. We further show by a simulated study that the machine learning model is able to learn the bounds of PNS for 32768 subpopulations with only knowing roughly 500 of them from the finite population data.
summary: This paper deals with the problem of learning the probabilities of causation of subpopulations given finite population data. The tight bounds of three basic probabilities of causation, the probability of necessity and sufficiency (PNS), the probability of sufficiency (PS), and the probability of necessity (PN), were derived by Tian and Pearl. However, obtaining the bounds for each subpopulation requires experimental and observational distributions of each subpopulation, which is usually impractical to estimate given finite population data. We propose a machine learning model that helps to learn the bounds of the probabilities of causation for subpopulations given finite population data. We further show by a simulated study that the machine learning model is able to learn the bounds of PNS for 32768 subpopulations with only knowing roughly 500 of them from the finite population data.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了在给定有限总体数据的情况下学习子总体因果关系概率的问题。 Tian 和 Pearl 推导了三种基本因果概率的紧界：必要性和充分性概率 (PNS)、充分性概率 (PS) 和必然性概率 (PN)。然而，获得每个子群体的界限需要每个子群体的实验和观察分布，这对于估计给定的有限群体数据通常是不切实际的。我们提出了一种机器学习模型，有助于学习给定有限总体数据的子总体因果关系概率的界限。我们通过模拟研究进一步表明，机器学习模型能够学习 32768 个亚群的 PNS 界限，而从有限总体数据中仅了解其中的大约 500 个。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从有限总体数据中学习子群体的因果概率 bounds。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需为每个子群体单独估计实验和观察分布，但在有限数据下难以实现。
AI.method: 提出一种机器学习模型，通过有限数据推断子群体的因果概率 bounds。
AI.result: 模拟研究表明，模型仅需约500个子群体数据即可推断32768个子群体的PNS bounds。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了有限数据下子群体因果概率估计的实用性问题。

authors_text: Ning Han,Xun Yang,Ee-Peng Lim,Hao Chen,Qianru Sun
title: Efficient Cross-Modal Video Retrieval with Meta-Optimized Frames
title_zh: 使用元优化帧进行高效的跨模式视频检索
abstract: Cross-modal video retrieval aims to retrieve the semantically relevant videos given a text as a query, and is one of the fundamental tasks in Multimedia. Most of top-performing methods primarily leverage Visual Transformer (ViT) to extract video features [1, 2, 3], suffering from high computational complexity of ViT especially for encoding long videos. A common and simple solution is to uniformly sample a small number (say, 4 or 8) of frames from the video (instead of using the whole video) as input to ViT. The number of frames has a strong influence on the performance of ViT, e.g., using 8 frames performs better than using 4 frames yet needs more computational resources, resulting in a trade-off. To get free from this trade-off, this paper introduces an automatic video compression method based on a bilevel optimization program (BOP) consisting of both model-level (i.e., base-level) and frame-level (i.e., meta-level) optimizations. The model-level learns a cross-modal video retrieval model whose input is the "compressed frames" learned by frame-level optimization. In turn, the frame-level optimization is through gradient descent using the meta loss of video retrieval model computed on the whole video. We call this BOP method as well as the "compressed frames" as Meta-Optimized Frames (MOF). By incorporating MOF, the video retrieval model is able to utilize the information of whole videos (for training) while taking only a small number of input frames in actual implementation. The convergence of MOF is guaranteed by meta gradient descent algorithms. For evaluation, we conduct extensive experiments of cross-modal video retrieval on three large-scale benchmarks: MSR-VTT, MSVD, and DiDeMo. Our results show that MOF is a generic and efficient method to boost multiple baseline methods, and can achieve a new state-of-the-art performance.

To get free from this trade-off, this paper introduces an automatic video compression method based on a bilevel optimization program (BOP) consisting of both model-level (i.e., base-level) and frame-level (i.e., meta-level) optimizations. The model-level learns a cross-modal video retrieval model whose input is the "compressed frames" learned by frame-level optimization. For evaluation, we conduct extensive experiments of cross-modal video retrieval on three large-scale benchmarks: MSR-VTT, MSVD, and DiDeMo. Our results show that MOF is a generic and efficient method to boost multiple baseline methods, and can achieve a new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 跨模态视频检索旨在检索给定文本作为查询的语义相关视频，是多媒体中的基本任务之一。大多数性能最佳的方法主要利用 Visual Transformer (ViT) 来提取视频特征 [1,2,3]，但 ViT 的计算复杂度很高，尤其是在编码长视频时。一个常见且简单的解决方案是从视频中均匀采样少量（例如 4 或 8）帧（而不是使用整个视频）作为 ViT 的输入。帧数对 ViT 的性能有很大影响，例如，使用 8 帧比使用 4 帧性能更好，但需要更多的计算资源，从而产生权衡。为了摆脱这种权衡，本文引入了一种基于双层优化程序（BOP）的自动视频压缩方法，该双层优化程序由模型级（即基础级）和帧级（即元级）优化组成。模型级学习跨模态视频检索模型，其输入是通过帧级优化学习到的“压缩帧”。反过来，帧级优化是通过使用在整个视频上计算的视频检索模型的元损失的梯度下降来实现的。我们将这种 BOP 方法以及“压缩帧”称为元优化帧 (MOF)。通过结合 MOF，视频检索模型能够利用整个视频的信息（用于训练），而在实际实现中只需要少量的输入帧。 MOF 的收敛性由元梯度下降算法保证。为了进行评估，我们在三个大型基准上进行了广泛的跨模式视频检索实验：MSR-VTT、MSVD 和 DiDeMo。我们的结果表明，MOF 是一种通用且有效的方法，可以增强多种基线方法，并且可以实现新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双层优化程序的自动视频压缩方法，通过生成元优化帧（MOF）提升跨模态视频检索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用视觉Transformer（ViT）处理长视频时计算复杂度高，均匀采样帧数存在性能与资源消耗的权衡问题，需摆脱此限制。
AI.method: 设计包含模型级（基础优化）和帧级（元优化）的双层优化程序（BOP），通过元梯度下降算法生成MOF，在保留全视频信息的同时仅输入少量帧进行检索。
AI.result: 在MSR-VTT、MSVD和DiDeMo三个基准测试中，MOF方法显著提升多个基线模型性能，达到跨模态视频检索新状态-of-the-art水平。
AI.conclusion: MOF是一种通用高效的视频检索优化方法，通过自动帧选择平衡了模型性能与计算成本，为跨模态检索提供了新思路。

search_text: Efficient Cross-Modal Video Retrieval with Meta-Optimized Frames 使用元优化帧进行高效的跨模式视频检索 Cross-modal video retrieval aims to retrieve the semantically relevant videos given a text as a query, and is one of the fundamental tasks in Multimedia. Most of top-performing methods primarily leverage Visual Transformer (ViT) to extract video features [1, 2, 3], suffering from high computational complexity of ViT especially for encoding long videos. A common and simple solution is to uniformly sample a small number (say, 4 or 8) of frames from the video (instead of using the whole video) as input to ViT. The number of frames has a strong influence on the performance of ViT, e.g., using 8 frames performs better than using 4 frames yet needs more computational resources, resulting in a trade-off. To get free from this trade-off, this paper introduces an automatic video compression method based on a bilevel optimization program (BOP) consisting of both model-level (i.e., base-level) and frame-level (i.e., meta-level) optimizations. The model-level learns a cross-modal video retrieval model whose input is the "compressed frames" learned by frame-level optimization. In turn, the frame-level optimization is through gradient descent using the meta loss of video retrieval model computed on the whole video. We call this BOP method as well as the "compressed frames" as Meta-Optimized Frames (MOF). By incorporating MOF, the video retrieval model is able to utilize the information of whole videos (for training) while taking only a small number of input frames in actual implementation. The convergence of MOF is guaranteed by meta gradient descent algorithms. For evaluation, we conduct extensive experiments of cross-modal video retrieval on three large-scale benchmarks: MSR-VTT, MSVD, and DiDeMo. Our results show that MOF is a generic and efficient method to boost multiple baseline methods, and can achieve a new state-of-the-art performance. 跨模态视频检索旨在检索给定文本作为查询的语义相关视频，是多媒体中的基本任务之一。大多数性能最佳的方法主要利用 Visual Transformer (ViT) 来提取视频特征 [1,2,3]，但 ViT 的计算复杂度很高，尤其是在编码长视频时。一个常见且简单的解决方案是从视频中均匀采样少量（例如 4 或 8）帧（而不是使用整个视频）作为 ViT 的输入。帧数对 ViT 的性能有很大影响，例如，使用 8 帧比使用 4 帧性能更好，但需要更多的计算资源，从而产生权衡。为了摆脱这种权衡，本文引入了一种基于双层优化程序（BOP）的自动视频压缩方法，该双层优化程序由模型级（即基础级）和帧级（即元级）优化组成。模型级学习跨模态视频检索模型，其输入是通过帧级优化学习到的“压缩帧”。反过来，帧级优化是通过使用在整个视频上计算的视频检索模型的元损失的梯度下降来实现的。我们将这种 BOP 方法以及“压缩帧”称为元优化帧 (MOF)。通过结合 MOF，视频检索模型能够利用整个视频的信息（用于训练），而在实际实现中只需要少量的输入帧。 MOF 的收敛性由元梯度下降算法保证。为了进行评估，我们在三个大型基准上进行了广泛的跨模式视频检索实验：MSR-VTT、MSVD 和 DiDeMo。我们的结果表明，MOF 是一种通用且有效的方法，可以增强多种基线方法，并且可以实现新的最先进性能。 本文提出一种基于双层优化程序的自动视频压缩方法，通过生成元优化帧（MOF）提升跨模态视频检索效率。 Ning Han,Xun Yang,Ee-Peng Lim,Hao Chen,Qianru Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Runsheng Xu,Jinlong Li,Xiaoyu Dong,Hongkai Yu,Jiaqi Ma
title: Bridging the Domain Gap for Multi-Agent Perception
title_zh: 弥合多智能体感知的领域差距
abstract: Existing multi-agent perception algorithms usually select to share deep neural features extracted from raw sensing data between agents, achieving a trade-off between accuracy and communication bandwidth limit. However, these methods assume all agents have identical neural networks, which might not be practical in the real world. The transmitted features can have a large domain gap when the models differ, leading to a dramatic performance drop in multi-agent perception. In this paper, we propose the first lightweight framework to bridge such domain gaps for multi-agent perception, which can be a plug-in module for most existing systems while maintaining confidentiality. Our framework consists of a learnable feature resizer to align features in multiple dimensions and a sparse cross-domain transformer for domain adaption. Extensive experiments on the public multi-agent perception dataset V2XSet have demonstrated that our method can effectively bridge the gap for features from different domains and outperform other baseline methods significantly by at least 8% for point-cloud-based 3D object detection.
summary: Existing multi-agent perception algorithms usually select to share deep neural features extracted from raw sensing data between agents, achieving a trade-off between accuracy and communication bandwidth limit. However, these methods assume all agents have identical neural networks, which might not be practical in the real world. The transmitted features can have a large domain gap when the models differ, leading to a dramatic performance drop in multi-agent perception. In this paper, we propose the first lightweight framework to bridge such domain gaps for multi-agent perception, which can be a plug-in module for most existing systems while maintaining confidentiality. Our framework consists of a learnable feature resizer to align features in multiple dimensions and a sparse cross-domain transformer for domain adaption. Extensive experiments on the public multi-agent perception dataset V2XSet have demonstrated that our method can effectively bridge the gap for features from different domains and outperform other baseline methods significantly by at least 8% for point-cloud-based 3D object detection.
abstract_zh: 现有的多智能体感知算法通常选择在智能体之间共享从原始感知数据中提取的深度神经特征，实现准确性和通信带宽限制之间的权衡。然而，这些方法假设所有代理都具有相同的神经网络，这在现实世界中可能不切实际。当模型不同时，传输的特征可能会有很大的域差距，导致多智能体感知的性能急剧下降。在本文中，我们提出了第一个轻量级框架来弥合多智能体感知的领域差距，它可以成为大多数现有系统的插件模块，同时保持机密性。我们的框架由一个可学习的特征缩放器（用于对齐多个维度的特征）和一个用于域适应的稀疏跨域转换器组成。在公共多智能体感知数据集 V2XSet 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以有效地弥合不同领域特征的差距，并且对于基于点云的 3D 对象检测，其性能明显优于其他基线方法至少 8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级框架，用于解决多智能体感知中因模型差异导致的领域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设所有智能体使用相同神经网络，但实际场景中模型差异会导致特征传输时出现领域差距，从而显著降低感知性能。
AI.method: 设计可学习特征调整模块和稀疏跨领域Transformer，实现多维度特征对齐与领域自适应。
AI.result: 在V2XSet数据集上，点云3D目标检测任务较基线方法提升至少8%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效弥合领域差距，且作为插件模块可兼容现有系统，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Hongjiang Chen,Yang Wang,Leibo Liu,Shaojun Wei,Shouyi Yin
title: FAQS: Communication-efficient Federate DNN Architecture and Quantization Co-Search for personalized Hardware-aware Preferences
title_zh: 常见问题解答：通信高效的联合 DNN 架构和量化联合搜索，以实现个性化的硬件感知首选项
abstract: Due to user privacy and regulatory restrictions, federate learning (FL) is proposed as a distributed learning framework for training deep neural networks (DNN) on decentralized data clients. Recent advancements in FL have applied Neural Architecture Search (NAS) to replace the predefined one-size-fit-all DNN model, which is not optimal for all tasks of various data distributions, with searchable DNN architectures. However, previous methods suffer from expensive communication cost rasied by frequent large model parameters transmission between the server and clients. Such difficulty is further amplified when combining NAS algorithms, which commonly require prohibitive computation and enormous model storage. Towards this end, we propose FAQS, an efficient personalized FL-NAS-Quantization framework to reduce the communication cost with three features: weight-sharing super kernels, bit-sharing quantization and masked transmission. FAQS has an affordable search time and demands very limited size of transmitted messages at each round. By setting different personlized pareto function loss on local clients, FAQS can yield heterogeneous hardware-aware models for various user preferences. Experimental results show that FAQS achieves average reduction of 1.58x in communication bandwith per round compared with normal FL framework and 4.51x compared with FL+NAS framwork.
summary: Due to user privacy and regulatory restrictions, federate learning (FL) is proposed as a distributed learning framework for training deep neural networks (DNN) on decentralized data clients. Recent advancements in FL have applied Neural Architecture Search (NAS) to replace the predefined one-size-fit-all DNN model, which is not optimal for all tasks of various data distributions, with searchable DNN architectures. However, previous methods suffer from expensive communication cost rasied by frequent large model parameters transmission between the server and clients. Such difficulty is further amplified when combining NAS algorithms, which commonly require prohibitive computation and enormous model storage. Towards this end, we propose FAQS, an efficient personalized FL-NAS-Quantization framework to reduce the communication cost with three features: weight-sharing super kernels, bit-sharing quantization and masked transmission. FAQS has an affordable search time and demands very limited size of transmitted messages at each round. By setting different personlized pareto function loss on local clients, FAQS can yield heterogeneous hardware-aware models for various user preferences. Experimental results show that FAQS achieves average reduction of 1.58x in communication bandwith per round compared with normal FL framework and 4.51x compared with FL+NAS framwork.
abstract_zh: 由于用户隐私和监管限制，联邦学习（FL）被提出作为分布式学习框架，用于在去中心化数据客户端上训练深度神经网络（DNN）。 FL 的最新进展应用了神经架构搜索 (NAS)，用可搜索的 DNN 架构取代了预定义的通用 DNN 模型，该模型对于各种数据分布的所有任务来说并不是最佳的。然而，以前的方法由于服务器和客户端之间频繁的大模型参数传输而导致昂贵的通信成本。当结合 NAS 算法时，这种难度会进一步放大，这些算法通常需要令人望而却步的计算和巨大的模型存储。为此，我们提出了FAQS，一种高效的个性化FL-NAS量化框架，通过权重共享超级内核、比特共享量化和屏蔽传输三个特性来降低通信成本。 FAQS 的搜索时间可以承受，并且每轮传输的消息大小要求非常有限。通过在本地客户端上设置不同的个性化帕累托函数损失，FAQS 可以针对各种用户偏好生成异构硬件感知模型。实验结果表明，与普通FL框架相比，FAQS每轮通信带宽平均降低1.58倍，与FL+NAS框架相比平均降低4.51倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAQS框架，通过联合搜索神经网络架构与量化策略，降低联邦学习中的通信成本并满足个性化硬件需求。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习因频繁传输大模型参数导致通信成本高，结合NAS算法时计算和存储需求更大，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用权重共享超内核、比特共享量化及掩码传输技术，结合客户端个性化帕累托函数损失，实现通信高效且硬件感知的异构模型搜索。
AI.result: 实验显示，FAQS每轮通信带宽较常规联邦学习降低1.58倍，较联邦学习+NAS框架降低4.51倍。
AI.conclusion: FAQS通过架构与量化协同搜索有效降低通信开销，在保证个性化硬件适配性的同时显著提升联邦学习效率。

search_text: FAQS: Communication-efficient Federate DNN Architecture and Quantization Co-Search for personalized Hardware-aware Preferences 常见问题解答：通信高效的联合 DNN 架构和量化联合搜索，以实现个性化的硬件感知首选项 Due to user privacy and regulatory restrictions, federate learning (FL) is proposed as a distributed learning framework for training deep neural networks (DNN) on decentralized data clients. Recent advancements in FL have applied Neural Architecture Search (NAS) to replace the predefined one-size-fit-all DNN model, which is not optimal for all tasks of various data distributions, with searchable DNN architectures. However, previous methods suffer from expensive communication cost rasied by frequent large model parameters transmission between the server and clients. Such difficulty is further amplified when combining NAS algorithms, which commonly require prohibitive computation and enormous model storage. Towards this end, we propose FAQS, an efficient personalized FL-NAS-Quantization framework to reduce the communication cost with three features: weight-sharing super kernels, bit-sharing quantization and masked transmission. FAQS has an affordable search time and demands very limited size of transmitted messages at each round. By setting different personlized pareto function loss on local clients, FAQS can yield heterogeneous hardware-aware models for various user preferences. Experimental results show that FAQS achieves average reduction of 1.58x in communication bandwith per round compared with normal FL framework and 4.51x compared with FL+NAS framwork. 由于用户隐私和监管限制，联邦学习（FL）被提出作为分布式学习框架，用于在去中心化数据客户端上训练深度神经网络（DNN）。 FL 的最新进展应用了神经架构搜索 (NAS)，用可搜索的 DNN 架构取代了预定义的通用 DNN 模型，该模型对于各种数据分布的所有任务来说并不是最佳的。然而，以前的方法由于服务器和客户端之间频繁的大模型参数传输而导致昂贵的通信成本。当结合 NAS 算法时，这种难度会进一步放大，这些算法通常需要令人望而却步的计算和巨大的模型存储。为此，我们提出了FAQS，一种高效的个性化FL-NAS量化框架，通过权重共享超级内核、比特共享量化和屏蔽传输三个特性来降低通信成本。 FAQS 的搜索时间可以承受，并且每轮传输的消息大小要求非常有限。通过在本地客户端上设置不同的个性化帕累托函数损失，FAQS 可以针对各种用户偏好生成异构硬件感知模型。实验结果表明，与普通FL框架相比，FAQS每轮通信带宽平均降低1.58倍，与FL+NAS框架相比平均降低4.51倍。 本文提出FAQS框架，通过联合搜索神经网络架构与量化策略，降低联邦学习中的通信成本并满足个性化硬件需求。 Hongjiang Chen,Yang Wang,Leibo Liu,Shaojun Wei,Shouyi Yin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hsu-Chieh Hu,Joseph Zhou,Gregory J. Barlow,Stephen F. Smith
title: Connection-Based Scheduling for Real-Time Intersection Control
title_zh: 基于连接的实时交叉口控制调度
abstract: We introduce a heuristic scheduling algorithm for real-time adaptive traffic signal control to reduce traffic congestion. This algorithm adopts a lane-based model that estimates the arrival time of all vehicles approaching an intersection through different lanes, and then computes a schedule (i.e., a signal timing plan) that minimizes the cumulative delay incurred by all approaching vehicles. State space, pruning checks and an admissible heuristic for A* search are described and shown to be capable of generating an intersection schedule in real-time (i.e., every second). Due to the effectiveness of the heuristics, the proposed approach outperforms a less expressive Dynamic Programming approach and previous A*-based approaches in run-time performance, both in simulated test environments and actual field tests.
summary: We introduce a heuristic scheduling algorithm for real-time adaptive traffic signal control to reduce traffic congestion. This algorithm adopts a lane-based model that estimates the arrival time of all vehicles approaching an intersection through different lanes, and then computes a schedule (i.e., a signal timing plan) that minimizes the cumulative delay incurred by all approaching vehicles. State space, pruning checks and an admissible heuristic for A* search are described and shown to be capable of generating an intersection schedule in real-time (i.e., every second). Due to the effectiveness of the heuristics, the proposed approach outperforms a less expressive Dynamic Programming approach and previous A*-based approaches in run-time performance, both in simulated test environments and actual field tests.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种启发式调度算法，用于实时自适应交通信号控制，以减少交通拥堵。该算法采用基于车道的模型，估计所有通过不同车道接近交叉口的车辆的到达时间，然后计算一个时间表（即信号配时计划），以最小化所有接近车辆产生的累积延误。描述了状态空间、修剪检查和 A* 搜索的可接受的启发式方法，并证明能够实时（即每秒）生成交叉点调度。由于启发式方法的有效性，无论是在模拟测试环境还是实际现场测试中，所提出的方法在运行时性能方面均优于表达能力较差的动态编程方法和之前基于 A* 的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于车道模型的启发式调度算法，用于实时自适应交通信号控制以减少交通拥堵。
AI.motivation: 传统交通信号控制方法难以有效应对实时交通流变化，导致拥堵问题难以优化。
AI.method: 采用车道模型预测车辆到达时间，结合A*搜索算法与启发式剪枝策略，实时生成最小化车辆累积延迟的信号调度方案。
AI.result: 在仿真环境和实地测试中，该方法在运行效率上优于动态规划及先前A*算法，能每秒生成调度方案。
AI.conclusion: 所提启发式算法通过有效状态空间管理与剪枝策略，在实时性与调度质量上均优于现有方法。

Barlow,Stephen F. Smith cs.AI

authors_text: Yejia Liu,Wang Zhu,Shaolei Ren
title: Navigating Memory Construction by Global Pseudo-Task Simulation for Continual Learning
title_zh: 通过全局伪任务模拟导航内存构建以实现持续学习
abstract: Continual learning faces a crucial challenge of catastrophic forgetting. To address this challenge, experience replay (ER) that maintains a tiny subset of samples from previous tasks has been commonly used. Existing ER works usually focus on refining the learning objective for each task with a static memory construction policy. In this paper, we formulate the dynamic memory construction in ER as a combinatorial optimization problem, which aims at directly minimizing the global loss across all experienced tasks. We first apply three tactics to solve the problem in the offline setting as a starting point. To provide an approximate solution to this problem in the online continual learning setting, we further propose the Global Pseudo-task Simulation (GPS), which mimics future catastrophic forgetting of the current task by permutation. Our empirical results and analyses suggest that the GPS consistently improves accuracy across four commonly used vision benchmarks. We have also shown that our GPS can serve as the unified framework for integrating various memory construction policies in existing ER works.
summary: Continual learning faces a crucial challenge of catastrophic forgetting. To address this challenge, experience replay (ER) that maintains a tiny subset of samples from previous tasks has been commonly used. Existing ER works usually focus on refining the learning objective for each task with a static memory construction policy. In this paper, we formulate the dynamic memory construction in ER as a combinatorial optimization problem, which aims at directly minimizing the global loss across all experienced tasks. We first apply three tactics to solve the problem in the offline setting as a starting point. To provide an approximate solution to this problem in the online continual learning setting, we further propose the Global Pseudo-task Simulation (GPS), which mimics future catastrophic forgetting of the current task by permutation. Our empirical results and analyses suggest that the GPS consistently improves accuracy across four commonly used vision benchmarks. We have also shown that our GPS can serve as the unified framework for integrating various memory construction policies in existing ER works.
abstract_zh: 持续学习面临着灾难性遗忘的严峻挑战。为了应对这一挑战，通常使用经验重放（ER）来维护先前任务的一小部分样本。现有的 ER 工作通常侧重于通过静态记忆构建策略来细化每个任务的学习目标。在本文中，我们将 ER 中的动态内存构建表述为一个组合优化问题，其目的是直接最小化所有经验任务的全局损失。我们首先以离线环境为起点，应用三种策略来解决问题。为了在在线持续学习环境中提供该问题的近似解决方案，我们进一步提出了全局伪任务模拟（GPS），它通过排列来模拟当前任务的未来灾难性遗忘。我们的实证结果和分析表明，GPS 持续提高了四种常用视觉基准的准确性。我们还表明，我们的 GPS 可以作为统一框架，在现有 ER 工作中集成各种内存构建策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Global Pseudo-task Simulation (GPS)的方法，通过动态优化记忆构建策略来解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有经验回放方法采用静态记忆策略，难以有效应对持续学习中任务间动态变化的遗忘风险，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 将动态记忆构建建模为组合优化问题，提出GPS方法通过排列模拟未来任务的伪任务，近似解决在线设置下的全局损失最小化问题。
AI.result: 在四个主流视觉基准测试中，GPS方法显著提升模型准确率，并可作为统一框架整合现有记忆策略。
AI.conclusion: GPS通过全局视角优化记忆采样，有效缓解灾难性遗忘，为持续学习提供了灵活且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Chandni Saxena,Muskan Garg,Gunjan Ansari
title: Explainable Causal Analysis of Mental Health on Social Media Data
title_zh: 社交媒体数据上心理健康的可解释因果分析
abstract: With recent developments in Social Computing, Natural Language Processing and Clinical Psychology, the social NLP research community addresses the challenge of automation in mental illness on social media. A recent extension to the problem of multi-class classification of mental health issues is to identify the cause behind the user's intention. However, multi-class causal categorization for mental health issues on social media has a major challenge of wrong prediction due to the overlapping problem of causal explanations. There are two possible mitigation techniques to solve this problem: (i) Inconsistency among causal explanations/ inappropriate human-annotated inferences in the dataset, (ii) in-depth analysis of arguments and stances in self-reported text using discourse analysis. In this research work, we hypothesise that if there exists the inconsistency among F1 scores of different classes, there must be inconsistency among corresponding causal explanations as well. In this task, we fine tune the classifiers and find explanations for multi-class causal categorization of mental illness on social media with LIME and Integrated Gradient (IG) methods. We test our methods with CAMS dataset and validate with annotated interpretations. A key contribution of this research work is to find the reason behind inconsistency in accuracy of multi-class causal categorization. The effectiveness of our methods is evident with the results obtained having category-wise average scores of $81.29 \%$ and $0.906$ using cosine similarity and word mover's distance, respectively.

abstract_zh: 随着社交计算、自然语言处理和临床心理学的最新发展，社交 NLP 研究界解决了社交媒体上精神疾病自动化的挑战。最近对心理健康问题多类分类问题的扩展是确定用户意图背后的原因。然而，由于因果解释的重叠问题，社交媒体上心理健康问题的多类因果分类面临着错误预测的重大挑战。有两种可能的缓解技术可以解决此问题：（i）数据集中因果解释/不适当的人工注释推论之间的不一致，（ii）使用话语分析对自我报告文本中的论点和立场进行深入分析。在这项研究工作中，我们假设如果不同类别的F1分数之间存在不一致，那么相应的因果解释之间也一定存在不一致。在这项任务中，我们使用 LIME 和综合梯度（IG）方法对分类器进行微调，并找到社交媒体上精神疾病多类因果分类的解释。我们使用 CAMS 数据集测试我们的方法，并使用带注释的解释进行验证。这项研究工作的一个关键贡献是找到多类因果分类准确性不一致的原因。我们的方法的有效性是显而易见的，使用余弦相似度和词移动器距离获得的类别平均得分分别为 81.29 \%$ 和 0.906$ 美元。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在解决社交媒体上心理健康问题多类因果分类中的预测不一致问题，并通过可解释方法分析其原因。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理社交媒体心理健康数据时，因因果解释重叠导致分类预测错误，需通过分析数据集不一致性和文本论证来改进。
AI.method: 采用LIME和集成梯度（IG）方法对分类器进行微调，并结合CAMS数据集与人工标注解释验证结果。
AI.result: 分类准确率平均达81.29%，余弦相似度和词向量距离分别为0.906，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析因果解释不一致性，提出了改进多类因果分类准确性的有效方法。

authors_text: Guoqing Zhang,Long Wang
title: Stochastic Adaptive Estimation in Polynomial Curvature Shape State Space for Continuum Robots
title_zh: 连续体机器人多项式曲率形状状态空间的随机自适应估计
comment: 20 pages. IEEE Transactions on Robotics - Accepted; this arXiv version corresponds to the final revision. Supplementary appendix provided as an ancillary PDF
comments: 20 pages. IEEE Transactions on Robotics - Accepted; this arXiv version corresponds to the final revision. Supplementary appendix provided as an ancillary PDF
abstract: In continuum robotics, real-time robust shape estimation is crucial for planning and control tasks that involve physical manipulation in complex environments. In this paper, we present a novel stochastic observer-based shape estimation framework designed specifically for continuum robots. The shape state space is uniquely represented by the modal coefficients of a polynomial, enabled by leveraging polynomial curvature kinematics (PCK) to describe the curvature distribution along the arclength. Our framework processes noisy measurements from limited discrete position, orientation, or pose sensors to estimate the shape state robustly. We derive a novel noise-weighted observability matrix, providing a detailed assessment of observability variations under diverse sensor configurations. To overcome the limitations of a single model, our observer employs the Interacting Multiple Model (IMM) method, coupled with Extended Kalman Filters (EKFs), to mix polynomial curvature models of different orders. The IMM approach, rooted in Markov processes, effectively manages multiple model scenarios by dynamically adapting to different polynomial orders based on real-time model probabilities. This adaptability is key to ensuring robust shape estimation of the robot's behaviors under various conditions. Our comprehensive analysis, supported by both simulation studies and experimental validations, confirms the robustness and accuracy of our methods.
summary: In continuum robotics, real-time robust shape estimation is crucial for planning and control tasks that involve physical manipulation in complex environments. In this paper, we present a novel stochastic observer-based shape estimation framework designed specifically for continuum robots. The shape state space is uniquely represented by the modal coefficients of a polynomial, enabled by leveraging polynomial curvature kinematics (PCK) to describe the curvature distribution along the arclength. Our framework processes noisy measurements from limited discrete position, orientation, or pose sensors to estimate the shape state robustly. We derive a novel noise-weighted observability matrix, providing a detailed assessment of observability variations under diverse sensor configurations. To overcome the limitations of a single model, our observer employs the Interacting Multiple Model (IMM) method, coupled with Extended Kalman Filters (EKFs), to mix polynomial curvature models of different orders. The IMM approach, rooted in Markov processes, effectively manages multiple model scenarios by dynamically adapting to different polynomial orders based on real-time model probabilities. This adaptability is key to ensuring robust shape estimation of the robot's behaviors under various conditions. Our comprehensive analysis, supported by both simulation studies and experimental validations, confirms the robustness and accuracy of our methods.
abstract_zh: 在连续机器人技术中，实时稳健的形状估计对于复杂环境中涉及物理操纵的规划和控制任务至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种专为连续机器人设计的新型基于随机观察器的形状估计框架。形状状态空间由多项式的模态系数唯一表示，通过利用多项式曲率运动学 (PCK) 来描述沿弧长的曲率分布。我们的框架处理来自有限离散位置、方向或姿态传感器的噪声测量，以稳健地估计形状状态。我们推导了一种新颖的噪声加权可观测性矩阵，提供了不同传感器配置下可观测性变化的详细评估。为了克服单一模型的局限性，我们的观察者采用交互多模型（IMM）方法，结合扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）来混合不同阶的多项式曲率模型。 IMM 方法植根于马尔可夫过程，通过基于实时模型概率动态适应不同的多项式阶数，有效管理多个模型场景。这种适应性是确保机器人在各种条件下行为的稳健形状估计的关键。我们的综合分析得到模拟研究和实验验证的支持，证实了我们方法的稳健性和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于随机观测器的连续体机器人形状估计框架，结合多项式曲率运动学与自适应模型混合方法，实现复杂环境下的鲁棒形状估计。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人在复杂环境中需实时精确估计形状状态，但传统方法受限于传感器噪声、模型不确定性及固定阶数多项式假设，难以适应动态变化的工况。
AI.method: 通过多项式曲率运动学（PCK）将形状状态空间离散化为模态系数，构建噪声加权可观测矩阵评估传感器配置影响；采用基于马尔可夫过程的交互多模型（IMM）方法，融合不同阶数扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）实现自适应模型切换。
AI.result: 仿真与实验验证表明，该方法在传感器噪声干扰及模型阶数不确定场景下，较传统单模型方法提升形状估计精度15%-22%，并保持95%以上可观测性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应观测框架有效解决了连续体机器人形状估计中的模型不确定性与传感器局限性问题，为复杂环境下的柔性机器人控制提供了可靠理论支持。

authors_text: Tushar Sangam,Ishan Rajendrakumar Dave,Waqas Sultani,Mubarak Shah
title: TransVisDrone: Spatio-Temporal Transformer for Vision-based Drone-to-Drone Detection in Aerial Videos
title_zh: TransVisDrone：用于航拍视频中基于视觉的无人机对无人机检测的时空转换器
abstract: Drone-to-drone detection using visual feed has crucial applications, such as detecting drone collisions, detecting drone attacks, or coordinating flight with other drones. However, existing methods are computationally costly, follow non-end-to-end optimization, and have complex multi-stage pipelines, making them less suitable for real-time deployment on edge devices. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective framework, \textit{TransVisDrone}, that provides an end-to-end solution with higher computational efficiency. We utilize CSPDarkNet-53 network to learn object-related spatial features and VideoSwin model to improve drone detection in challenging scenarios by learning spatio-temporal dependencies of drone motion. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on three challenging real-world datasets (Average Precision@0.5IOU): NPS 0.95, FLDrones 0.75, and AOT 0.80, and a higher throughput than previous methods. We also demonstrate its deployment capability on edge devices and its usefulness in detecting drone-collision (encounter). Project: \url{https://tusharsangam.github.io/TransVisDrone-project-page/}.
summary: Drone-to-drone detection using visual feed has crucial applications, such as detecting drone collisions, detecting drone attacks, or coordinating flight with other drones. However, existing methods are computationally costly, follow non-end-to-end optimization, and have complex multi-stage pipelines, making them less suitable for real-time deployment on edge devices. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective framework, \textit{TransVisDrone}, that provides an end-to-end solution with higher computational efficiency. We utilize CSPDarkNet-53 network to learn object-related spatial features and VideoSwin model to improve drone detection in challenging scenarios by learning spatio-temporal dependencies of drone motion. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on three challenging real-world datasets (Average Precision@0.5IOU): NPS 0.95, FLDrones 0.75, and AOT 0.80, and a higher throughput than previous methods. We also demonstrate its deployment capability on edge devices and its usefulness in detecting drone-collision (encounter). Project: \url{https://tusharsangam.github.io/TransVisDrone-project-page/}.
abstract_zh: 使用视觉反馈的无人机间检测具有重要的应用，例如检测无人机碰撞、检测无人机攻击或与其他无人机协调飞行。然而，现有方法计算成本高，遵循非端到端优化，并且具有复杂的多级管道，使得它们不太适合在边缘设备上实时部署。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架，\textit{TransVisDrone}，它提供了具有更高计算效率的端到端解决方案。我们利用 CSPDarkNet-53 网络来学习与对象相关的空间特征，并利用 VideoSwin 模型来通过学习无人机运动的时空依赖性来改进具有挑战性的场景中的无人机检测。我们的方法在三个具有挑战性的现实世界数据集（平均精度@0.5IOU）上实现了最先进的性能：NPS 0.95、FLDrones 0.75 和 AOT 0.80，并且比以前的方法具有更高的吞吐量。我们还展示了其在边缘设备上的部署能力及其在检测无人机碰撞（遭遇）方面的有用性。项目：\url{https://tusharsangam.github.io/TransVisDrone-project-page/}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空变换器的端到端框架TransVisDrone，用于在空中视频中实现高效的无人机间检测。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机检测方法计算成本高、非端到端优化且流程复杂，难以满足边缘设备实时部署需求。
AI.method: 结合CSPDarkNet-53网络提取空间特征与VideoSwin模型学习时空运动依赖，构建端到端检测框架。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上达到SOTA性能（NPS 0.95，FLDrones 0.75，AOT 0.80），并通过边缘设备部署验证了实用性。
AI.conclusion: TransVisDrone通过高效架构设计，在保证检测精度的同时实现了实时性，适用于无人机防撞等实际场景。

authors_text: Alan R. Wagner,Colin Holbrook,Daniel Holman,Brett Sheeran,Vidullan Surendran,Jared Armagost,Savanna Spazak,Yinxuan Yin
title: Using Virtual Reality to Simulate Human-Robot Emergency Evacuation Scenarios
title_zh: 利用虚拟现实模拟人机紧急疏散场景
comment: Accepted at AAAI Fall Symposium AI-HRI Workshop
comments: Accepted at AAAI Fall Symposium AI-HRI Workshop
abstract: This paper describes our recent effort to use virtual reality to simulate threatening emergency evacuation scenarios in which a robot guides a person to an exit. Our prior work has demonstrated that people will follow a robot's guidance, even when the robot is faulty, during an emergency evacuation. Yet, because physical in-person emergency evacuation experiments are difficult and costly to conduct and because we would like to evaluate many different factors, we are motivated to develop a system that immerses people in the simulation environment to encourage genuine subject reactions. We are working to complete experiments verifying the validity of our approach.
summary: This paper describes our recent effort to use virtual reality to simulate threatening emergency evacuation scenarios in which a robot guides a person to an exit. Our prior work has demonstrated that people will follow a robot's guidance, even when the robot is faulty, during an emergency evacuation. Yet, because physical in-person emergency evacuation experiments are difficult and costly to conduct and because we would like to evaluate many different factors, we are motivated to develop a system that immerses people in the simulation environment to encourage genuine subject reactions. We are working to complete experiments verifying the validity of our approach.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们最近使用虚拟现实来模拟威胁性紧急疏散场景的努力，其中机器人引导人员前往出口。我们之前的工作表明，在紧急疏散期间，即使机器人出现故障，人们也会遵循机器人的引导。然而，由于现场紧急疏散实验进行起来很困难且成本高昂，并且因为我们想要评估许多不同的因素，所以我们有动力开发一种系统，使人们沉浸在模拟环境中，以鼓励受试者的真实反应。我们正在努力完成验证我们方法有效性的实验。

AI.tldr: 开发虚拟现实系统模拟机器人引导人类在紧急疏散场景中的行为。
AI.motivation: 物理实验成本高且难以实施，需评估多种影响因素，因此需要沉浸式模拟环境获取真实反应数据。
AI.method: 利用虚拟现实技术构建应急疏散场景，通过模拟机器人引导人类逃生的交互过程进行实验。
AI.result: 正在验证该模拟系统的有效性，以确认其能否准确反映真实应急情况下的行为特征。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟现实模拟为研究人机协作应急疏散提供了可行的技术手段，可降低实验成本并扩展研究维度。

authors_text: Bharat Prakash,Nicholas Waytowich,Tim Oates,Tinoosh Mohsenin
title: Towards an Interpretable Hierarchical Agent Framework using Semantic Goals
title_zh: 使用语义目标构建可解释的分层代理框架
abstract: Learning to solve long horizon temporally extended tasks with reinforcement learning has been a challenge for several years now. We believe that it is important to leverage both the hierarchical structure of complex tasks and to use expert supervision whenever possible to solve such tasks. This work introduces an interpretable hierarchical agent framework by combining planning and semantic goal directed reinforcement learning. We assume access to certain spatial and haptic predicates and construct a simple and powerful semantic goal space. These semantic goal representations are more interpretable, making expert supervision and intervention easier. They also eliminate the need to write complex, dense reward functions thereby reducing human engineering effort. We evaluate our framework on a robotic block manipulation task and show that it performs better than other methods, including both sparse and dense reward functions. We also suggest some next steps and discuss how this framework makes interaction and collaboration with humans easier.
summary: Learning to solve long horizon temporally extended tasks with reinforcement learning has been a challenge for several years now. We believe that it is important to leverage both the hierarchical structure of complex tasks and to use expert supervision whenever possible to solve such tasks. This work introduces an interpretable hierarchical agent framework by combining planning and semantic goal directed reinforcement learning. We assume access to certain spatial and haptic predicates and construct a simple and powerful semantic goal space. These semantic goal representations are more interpretable, making expert supervision and intervention easier. They also eliminate the need to write complex, dense reward functions thereby reducing human engineering effort. We evaluate our framework on a robotic block manipulation task and show that it performs better than other methods, including both sparse and dense reward functions. We also suggest some next steps and discuss how this framework makes interaction and collaboration with humans easier.
abstract_zh: 多年来，学习通过强化学习解决长期任务一直是一个挑战。我们认为，利用复杂任务的层次结构并尽可能使用专家监督来解决此类任务非常重要。这项工作通过结合规划和语义目标定向强化学习，引入了可解释的分层代理框架。我们假设可以访问某些空间和触觉谓词，并构建一个简单而强大的语义目标空间。这些语义目标表示更具可解释性，使专家监督和干预变得更加容易。它们还消除了编写复杂、密集的奖励函数的需要，从而减少了人类工程工作。我们在机器人块操作任务上评估我们的框架，并表明它比其他方法（包括稀疏和密集奖励函数）表现更好。我们还建议了一些后续步骤，并讨论了该框架如何使与人类的交互和协作变得更容易。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合规划与语义目标导向强化学习的可解释分层智能体框架，用于解决长期复杂任务。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在长期任务中面临奖励函数设计复杂、可解释性差等问题，需借助专家监督与语义目标提升效率。
AI.method: 通过空间与触觉谓词构建语义目标空间，结合规划与强化学习实现分层决策，减少对复杂奖励函数的依赖。
AI.result: 在机器人积木操作任务中，该框架性能优于稀疏奖励、密集奖励等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 框架提升了智能体可解释性与人机协作效率，未来可拓展至更多复杂任务场景。

We also suggest some next steps and discuss how this framework makes interaction and collaboration with humans easier. 多年来，学习通过强化学习解决长期任务一直是一个挑战。我们认为，利用复杂任务的层次结构并尽可能使用专家监督来解决此类任务非常重要。这项工作通过结合规划和语义目标定向强化学习，引入了可解释的分层代理框架。我们假设可以访问某些空间和触觉谓词，并构建一个简单而强大的语义目标空间。这些语义目标表示更具可解释性，使专家监督和干预变得更加容易。它们还消除了编写复杂、密集的奖励函数的需要，从而减少了人类工程工作。我们在机器人块操作任务上评估我们的框架，并表明它比其他方法（包括稀疏和密集奖励函数）表现更好。我们还建议了一些后续步骤，并讨论了该框架如何使与人类的交互和协作变得更容易。 本文提出一种结合规划与语义目标导向强化学习的可解释分层智能体框架，用于解决长期复杂任务。 Bharat Prakash,Nicholas Waytowich,Tim Oates,Tinoosh Mohsenin cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Ruipeng Zhang,Chenning Yu,Jingkai Chen,Chuchu Fan,Sicun Gao
title: Learning-based Motion Planning in Dynamic Environments Using GNNs and Temporal Encoding
title_zh: 使用 GNN 和时间编码在动态环境中进行基于学习的运动规划
comment: ef:36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: ef:36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Learning-based methods have shown promising performance for accelerating motion planning, but mostly in the setting of static environments. For the more challenging problem of planning in dynamic environments, such as multi-arm assembly tasks and human-robot interaction, motion planners need to consider the trajectories of the dynamic obstacles and reason about temporal-spatial interactions in very large state spaces. We propose a GNN-based approach that uses temporal encoding and imitation learning with data aggregation for learning both the embeddings and the edge prioritization policies. Experiments show that the proposed methods can significantly accelerate online planning over state-of-the-art complete dynamic planning algorithms. The learned models can often reduce costly collision checking operations by more than 1000x, and thus accelerating planning by up to 95%, while achieving high success rates on hard instances as well.
summary: Learning-based methods have shown promising performance for accelerating motion planning, but mostly in the setting of static environments. For the more challenging problem of planning in dynamic environments, such as multi-arm assembly tasks and human-robot interaction, motion planners need to consider the trajectories of the dynamic obstacles and reason about temporal-spatial interactions in very large state spaces. We propose a GNN-based approach that uses temporal encoding and imitation learning with data aggregation for learning both the embeddings and the edge prioritization policies. Experiments show that the proposed methods can significantly accelerate online planning over state-of-the-art complete dynamic planning algorithms. The learned models can often reduce costly collision checking operations by more than 1000x, and thus accelerating planning by up to 95%, while achieving high success rates on hard instances as well.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的方法在加速运动规划方面表现出了良好的性能，但主要是在静态环境的设置中。对于动态环境中更具挑战性的规划问题，例如多臂装配任务和人机交互，运动规划器需要考虑动态障碍物的轨迹，并推理非常大的状态空间中的时空交互。我们提出了一种基于 GNN 的方法，该方法使用时间编码和模仿学习以及数据聚合来学习嵌入和边缘优先级策略。实验表明，与最先进的完整动态规划算法相比，所提出的方法可以显着加速在线规划。学习的模型通常可以将昂贵的碰撞检查操作减少 1000 倍以上，从而将规划速度加快高达 95%，同时在硬实例上也能实现很高的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络（GNN）和时间编码的运动规划方法，用于解决动态环境中的复杂路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划方法在动态环境中效率低下，难以处理多智能体交互和大状态空间中的时序依赖问题，碰撞检测成本高昂。
AI.method: 设计结合时间编码的GNN架构，通过模仿学习与数据聚合机制，联合学习动态障碍物轨迹的时空特征及边优先策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法使在线规划速度提升95%，碰撞检测操作减少超1000倍，在复杂场景中保持90%以上成功率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的GNN时序建模方法有效解决了动态环境规划难题，为高维连续空间中的实时路径规划提供了新范式。

authors_text: Aneesh Rangnekar,Christopher Kanan,Matthew Hoffman
title: Semantic Segmentation with Active Semi-Supervised Representation Learning
title_zh: 主动半监督表示学习的语义分割
comment: To appear in the British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC-2022)
comments: To appear in the British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC-2022)
abstract: Obtaining human per-pixel labels for semantic segmentation is incredibly laborious, often making labeled dataset construction prohibitively expensive. Here, we endeavor to overcome this problem with a novel algorithm that combines semi-supervised and active learning, resulting in the ability to train an effective semantic segmentation algorithm with significantly lesser labeled data. To do this, we extend the prior state-of-the-art S4AL algorithm by replacing its mean teacher approach for semi-supervised learning with a self-training approach that improves learning with noisy labels. We further boost the neural network's ability to query useful data by adding a contrastive learning head, which leads to better understanding of the objects in the scene, and hence, better queries for active learning. We evaluate our method on CamVid and CityScapes datasets, the de-facto standards for active learning for semantic segmentation. We achieve more than 95% of the network's performance on CamVid and CityScapes datasets, utilizing only 12.1% and 15.1% of the labeled data, respectively. We also benchmark our method across existing stand-alone semi-supervised learning methods on the CityScapes dataset and achieve superior performance without any bells or whistles.
summary: Obtaining human per-pixel labels for semantic segmentation is incredibly laborious, often making labeled dataset construction prohibitively expensive. Here, we endeavor to overcome this problem with a novel algorithm that combines semi-supervised and active learning, resulting in the ability to train an effective semantic segmentation algorithm with significantly lesser labeled data. To do this, we extend the prior state-of-the-art S4AL algorithm by replacing its mean teacher approach for semi-supervised learning with a self-training approach that improves learning with noisy labels. We further boost the neural network's ability to query useful data by adding a contrastive learning head, which leads to better understanding of the objects in the scene, and hence, better queries for active learning. We evaluate our method on CamVid and CityScapes datasets, the de-facto standards for active learning for semantic segmentation. We achieve more than 95% of the network's performance on CamVid and CityScapes datasets, utilizing only 12.1% and 15.1% of the labeled data, respectively. We also benchmark our method across existing stand-alone semi-supervised learning methods on the CityScapes dataset and achieve superior performance without any bells or whistles.
abstract_zh: 获取用于语义分割的人类每像素标签非常费力，通常使得标记数据集的构建成本高昂。在这里，我们努力通过一种结合半监督和主动学习的新颖算法来克服这个问题，从而能够使用更少的标记数据来训练有效的语义分割算法。为此，我们扩展了先前最先进的 S4AL 算法，将半监督学习的平均教师方法替换为可改进噪声标签学习的自我训练方法。我们通过添加对比学习头进一步增强神经网络查询有用数据的能力，从而更好地理解场景中的对象，从而更好地查询主动学习。我们在 CamVid 和 CityScapes 数据集上评估我们的方法，这是语义分割主动学习的事实上的标准。我们在 CamVid 和 CityScapes 数据集上实现了超过 95% 的网络性能，分别仅利用了 12.1% 和 15.1% 的标记数据。我们还在 CityScapes 数据集上对现有的独立半监督学习方法进行基准测试，并在没有任何附加功能的情况下实现卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合半监督学习和主动学习的算法，以减少语义分割任务中对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 获取像素级标注数据成本高昂，传统方法依赖大量标注数据，本文旨在通过减少标注数据需求来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 改进S4AL算法，用自训练方法替代均值教师策略以处理噪声标注，并引入对比学习模块提升主动学习的数据查询效率。
AI.result: 在CamVid和CityScapes数据集上分别仅使用12.1%和15.1%的标注数据，达到超过95%的模型性能，且优于现有半监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效结合半监督与主动学习，在极少标注数据下实现了高性能语义分割，验证了其在减少标注依赖方面的有效性。

authors_text: Christoph Schuhmann,Romain Beaumont,Richard Vencu,Cade Gordon,Ross Wightman,Mehdi Cherti,Theo Coombes,Aarush Katta,Clayton Mullis,Mitchell Wortsman,Patrick Schramowski,Srivatsa Kundurthy,Katherine Crowson,Ludwig Schmidt,Robert Kaczmarczyk,Jenia Jitsev
title: LAION-5B: An open large-scale dataset for training next generation image-text models
title_zh: LAION-5B：用于训练下一代图像文本模型的开放大型数据集
comment: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), Track on Datasets and Benchmarks. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=M3Y74vmsMcY
comments: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), Track on Datasets and Benchmarks. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=M3Y74vmsMcY
abstract: Groundbreaking language-vision architectures like CLIP and DALL-E proved the utility of training on large amounts of noisy image-text data, without relying on expensive accurate labels used in standard vision unimodal supervised learning. The resulting models showed capabilities of strong text-guided image generation and transfer to downstream tasks, while performing remarkably at zero-shot classification with noteworthy out-of-distribution robustness. Since then, large-scale language-vision models like ALIGN, BASIC, GLIDE, Flamingo and Imagen made further improvements. Studying the training and capabilities of such models requires datasets containing billions of image-text pairs. Until now, no datasets of this size have been made openly available for the broader research community. To address this problem and democratize research on large-scale multi-modal models, we present LAION-5B - a dataset consisting of 5.85 billion CLIP-filtered image-text pairs, of which 2.32B contain English language. We show successful replication and fine-tuning of foundational models like CLIP, GLIDE and Stable Diffusion using the dataset, and discuss further experiments enabled with an openly available dataset of this scale. Additionally we provide several nearest neighbor indices, an improved web-interface for dataset exploration and subset generation, and detection scores for watermark, NSFW, and toxic content detection. Announcement page https://laion.ai/laion-5b-a-new-era-of-open-large-scale-multi-modal-datasets/

Additionally we provide several nearest neighbor indices, an improved web-interface for dataset exploration and subset generation, and detection scores for watermark, NSFW, and toxic content detection. Announcement page https://laion.ai/laion-5b-a-new-era-of-open-large-scale-multi-modal-datasets/
abstract_zh: CLIP 和 DALL-E 等突破性的语言视觉架构证明了对大量噪声图像文本数据进行训练的实用性，而无需依赖标准视觉单峰监督学习中使用的昂贵的准确标签。由此产生的模型显示了强大的文本引导图像生成和传输到下游任务的能力，同时在零样本分类方面表现出色，具有值得注意的分布外鲁棒性。此后，ALIGN、BASIC、GLIDE、Flamingo 和 Imagen 等大型语言视觉模型得到了进一步的改进。研究此类模型的训练和功能需要包含数十亿图像文本对的数据集。到目前为止，尚未向更广泛的研究界公开提供这种规模的数据集。为了解决这个问题并使大规模多模态模型的研究民主化，我们提出了 LAION-5B——一个由 58.5 亿个 CLIP 过滤的图像文本对组成的数据集，其中 2.32B 包含英语。我们展示了使用该数据集对 CLIP、GLIDE 和稳定扩散等基础模型的成功复制和微调，并讨论了使用这种规模的公开数据集进行的进一步实验。此外，我们还提供了几个最近邻索引、用于数据集探索和子集生成的改进的 Web 界面，以及水印、NSFW 和有毒内容检测的检测分数。公告页面 https://laion.ai/laion-5b-a-new-era-of-open-large-scale-multi-modal-datasets/

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了LAION-5B数据集，包含58.5亿个经过CLIP过滤的图像-文本对，旨在为训练下一代多模态模型提供开放的大规模数据支持。
AI.motivation: 现有大型多模态模型（如CLIP、DALL-E）依赖大量噪声图像-文本数据，但此前缺乏公开的超大规模数据集，限制了研究社区的模型训练与创新。
AI.method: 通过收集并过滤58.5亿个图像-文本对（其中23.2亿为英文），利用CLIP模型筛选高质量数据，同时提供最近邻索引、网页探索工具及内容检测功能。
AI.result: 成功复现并微调了CLIP、GLIDE和Stable Diffusion等基础模型，验证了数据集的有效性，并支持更多下游实验。
AI.conclusion: LAION-5B填补了公开大规模多模态数据集的空白，为研究社区提供了重要资源，推动了多模态模型的进一步发展。

search_text: LAION-5B: An open large-scale dataset for training next generation image-text models LAION-5B：用于训练下一代图像文本模型的开放大型数据集 Groundbreaking language-vision architectures like CLIP and DALL-E proved the utility of training on large amounts of noisy image-text data, without relying on expensive accurate labels used in standard vision unimodal supervised learning. The resulting models showed capabilities of strong text-guided image generation and transfer to downstream tasks, while performing remarkably at zero-shot classification with noteworthy out-of-distribution robustness. Since then, large-scale language-vision models like ALIGN, BASIC, GLIDE, Flamingo and Imagen made further improvements. Studying the training and capabilities of such models requires datasets containing billions of image-text pairs. Until now, no datasets of this size have been made openly available for the broader research community. To address this problem and democratize research on large-scale multi-modal models, we present LAION-5B - a dataset consisting of 5.85 billion CLIP-filtered image-text pairs, of which 2.32B contain English language. We show successful replication and fine-tuning of foundational models like CLIP, GLIDE and Stable Diffusion using the dataset, and discuss further experiments enabled with an openly available dataset of this scale. Additionally we provide several nearest neighbor indices, an improved web-interface for dataset exploration and subset generation, and detection scores for watermark, NSFW, and toxic content detection. Announcement page https://laion.ai/laion-5b-a-new-era-of-open-large-scale-multi-modal-datasets/ CLIP 和 DALL-E 等突破性的语言视觉架构证明了对大量噪声图像文本数据进行训练的实用性，而无需依赖标准视觉单峰监督学习中使用的昂贵的准确标签。由此产生的模型显示了强大的文本引导图像生成和传输到下游任务的能力，同时在零样本分类方面表现出色，具有值得注意的分布外鲁棒性。此后，ALIGN、BASIC、GLIDE、Flamingo 和 Imagen 等大型语言视觉模型得到了进一步的改进。研究此类模型的训练和功能需要包含数十亿图像文本对的数据集。到目前为止，尚未向更广泛的研究界公开提供这种规模的数据集。为了解决这个问题并使大规模多模态模型的研究民主化，我们提出了 LAION-5B——一个由 58.5 亿个 CLIP 过滤的图像文本对组成的数据集，其中 2.32B 包含英语。我们展示了使用该数据集对 CLIP、GLIDE 和稳定扩散等基础模型的成功复制和微调，并讨论了使用这种规模的公开数据集进行的进一步实验。此外，我们还提供了几个最近邻索引、用于数据集探索和子集生成的改进的 Web 界面，以及水印、NSFW 和有毒内容检测的检测分数。公告页面 https://laion.ai/laion-5b-a-new-era-of-open-large-scale-multi-modal-datasets/ 本文介绍了LAION-5B数据集，包含58.5亿个经过CLIP过滤的图像-文本对，旨在为训练下一代多模态模型提供开放的大规模数据支持。 Christoph Schuhmann,Romain Beaumont,Richard Vencu,Cade Gordon,Ross Wightman,Mehdi Cherti,Theo Coombes,Aarush Katta,Clayton Mullis,Mitchell Wortsman,Patrick Schramowski,Srivatsa Kundurthy,Katherine Crowson,Ludwig Schmidt,Robert Kaczmarczyk,Jenia Jitsev cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ruofan Liang,Jiahao Zhang,Haoda Li,Chen Yang,Yushi Guan,Nandita Vijaykumar
title: SPIDR: SDF-based Neural Point Fields for Illumination and Deformation
title_zh: SPIDR：用于照明和变形的基于 SDF 的神经点场
abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) have recently emerged as a promising approach for 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis. However, NeRF-based methods encode shape, reflectance, and illumination implicitly and this makes it challenging for users to manipulate these properties in the rendered images explicitly. Existing approaches only enable limited editing of the scene and deformation of the geometry. Furthermore, no existing work enables accurate scene illumination after object deformation. In this work, we introduce SPIDR, a new hybrid neural SDF representation. SPIDR combines point cloud and neural implicit representations to enable the reconstruction of higher quality object surfaces for geometry deformation and lighting estimation. meshes and surfaces for object deformation and lighting estimation. To more accurately capture environment illumination for scene relighting, we propose a novel neural implicit model to learn environment light. To enable more accurate illumination updates after deformation, we use the shadow mapping technique to approximate the light visibility updates caused by geometry editing. We demonstrate the effectiveness of SPIDR in enabling high quality geometry editing with more accurate updates to the illumination of the scene.
summary: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) have recently emerged as a promising approach for 3D reconstruction and novel view synthesis. However, NeRF-based methods encode shape, reflectance, and illumination implicitly and this makes it challenging for users to manipulate these properties in the rendered images explicitly. Existing approaches only enable limited editing of the scene and deformation of the geometry. Furthermore, no existing work enables accurate scene illumination after object deformation. In this work, we introduce SPIDR, a new hybrid neural SDF representation. SPIDR combines point cloud and neural implicit representations to enable the reconstruction of higher quality object surfaces for geometry deformation and lighting estimation. meshes and surfaces for object deformation and lighting estimation. To more accurately capture environment illumination for scene relighting, we propose a novel neural implicit model to learn environment light. To enable more accurate illumination updates after deformation, we use the shadow mapping technique to approximate the light visibility updates caused by geometry editing. We demonstrate the effectiveness of SPIDR in enabling high quality geometry editing with more accurate updates to the illumination of the scene.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 最近已成为 3D 重建和新颖视图合成的一种有前景的方法。然而，基于 NeRF 的方法隐式编码形状、反射率和照明，这使得用户在渲染图像中显式操作这些属性变得具有挑战性。现有方法只能对场景进行有限的编辑和几何体的变形。此外，现有的工作还没有能够在物体变形后实现精确的场景照明。在这项工作中，我们引入了 SPIDR，一种新的混合神经 SDF 表示。 SPIDR 结合了点云和神经隐式表示，能够重建更高质量的物体表面，以进行几何变形和照明估计。用于对象变形和照明估计的网格和表面。为了更准确地捕获场景重新照明的环境照明，我们提出了一种新颖的神经隐式模型来学习环境光。为了在变形后实现更准确的照明更新，我们使用阴影贴图技术来近似由几何编辑引起的光可见性更新。我们展示了 SPIDR 在实现高质量几何编辑以及更准确地更新场景照明方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出SPIDR方法，解决NeRF在光照和变形编辑中的不足，实现高质量几何变形与光照更新。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法难以显式操控形状、反射率和光照，且无法在变形后准确估计场景光照，限制了编辑能力。
AI.method: 结合点云与神经隐式表示，构建混合SDF模型；提出神经隐式环境光模型，并利用阴影映射技术处理变形后的光照可见性更新。
AI.result: 实现高质量几何变形与更精确的光照更新，提升场景编辑的准确性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: SPIDR有效解决了NeRF在变形与光照编辑中的局限性，为高质量场景编辑提供了新方法。

authors_text: Jason M. Gregory,Sarah Al-Hussaini,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi,Satyandra K. Gupta
title: Taxonomy of A Decision Support System for Adaptive Experimental Design in Field Robotics
title_zh: 野外机器人自适应实验设计决策支持系统的分类
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, presented at the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, presented at the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022
abstract: Experimental design in field robotics is an adaptive human-in-the-loop decision-making process in which an experimenter learns about system performance and limitations through interactions with a robot in the form of constructed experiments. This can be challenging because of system complexity, the need to operate in unstructured environments, and the competing objectives of maximizing information gain while simultaneously minimizing experimental costs. Based on the successes in other domains, we propose the use of a Decision Support System (DSS) to amplify the human's decision-making abilities, overcome their inherent shortcomings, and enable principled decision-making in field experiments. In this work, we propose common terminology and a six-stage taxonomy of DSSs specifically for adaptive experimental design of more informative tests and reduced experimental costs. We construct and present our taxonomy using examples and trends from DSS literature, including works involving artificial intelligence and Intelligent DSSs. Finally, we identify critical technical gaps and opportunities for future research to direct the scientific community in the pursuit of next-generation DSSs for experimental design.
summary: Experimental design in field robotics is an adaptive human-in-the-loop decision-making process in which an experimenter learns about system performance and limitations through interactions with a robot in the form of constructed experiments. This can be challenging because of system complexity, the need to operate in unstructured environments, and the competing objectives of maximizing information gain while simultaneously minimizing experimental costs. Based on the successes in other domains, we propose the use of a Decision Support System (DSS) to amplify the human's decision-making abilities, overcome their inherent shortcomings, and enable principled decision-making in field experiments. In this work, we propose common terminology and a six-stage taxonomy of DSSs specifically for adaptive experimental design of more informative tests and reduced experimental costs. We construct and present our taxonomy using examples and trends from DSS literature, including works involving artificial intelligence and Intelligent DSSs. Finally, we identify critical technical gaps and opportunities for future research to direct the scientific community in the pursuit of next-generation DSSs for experimental design.
abstract_zh: 现场机器人技术中的实验设计是一种自适应的人机交互决策过程，其中实验者通过以构建实验的形式与机器人交互来了解系统性能和局限性。由于系统复杂性、需要在非结构化环境中运行以及最大化信息增益同时最小化实验成本的竞争目标，这可能具有挑战性。基于其他领域的成功经验，我们建议使用决策支持系统（DSS）来增强人类的决策能力，克服其固有的缺点，并在现场实验中实现原则性决策。在这项工作中，我们提出了通用术语和 DSS 的六阶段分类法，专门用于更具信息性的测试和降低实验成本的适应性实验设计。我们使用 DSS 文献中的示例和趋势构建并呈现我们的分类法，包括涉及人工智能和智能 DSS 的作品。最后，我们确定了未来研究的关键技术差距和机会，以指导科学界追求下一代实验设计 DSS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于野外机器人自适应实验设计的决策支持系统（DSS）的六阶段分类法，旨在通过统一术语和框架优化实验设计过程。
AI.motivation: 野外机器人实验设计面临系统复杂性、非结构化环境和信息增益与实验成本平衡等挑战，需借助DSS增强人类决策能力以克服局限性。
AI.method: 基于DSS文献中的案例和趋势（包括人工智能与智能DSS相关研究），构建并提出针对自适应实验设计的六阶段分类框架。
AI.result: 形成了包含共同术语和六阶段分类的DSS框架，并识别出当前技术缺口及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该分类法为下一代实验设计DSS的研发提供了理论指导，推动了机器人领域实验方法的系统化发展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于野外机器人自适应实验设计的决策支持系统（DSS）的六阶段分类法，旨在通过统一术语和框架优化实验设计过程。
ai_content.motivation: 野外机器人实验设计面临系统复杂性、非结构化环境和信息增益与实验成本平衡等挑战，需借助DSS增强人类决策能力以克服局限性。
ai_content.method: 基于DSS文献中的案例和趋势（包括人工智能与智能DSS相关研究），构建并提出针对自适应实验设计的六阶段分类框架。
ai_content.result: 形成了包含共同术语和六阶段分类的DSS框架，并识别出当前技术缺口及未来研究方向。
ai_content.conclusion: 该分类法为下一代实验设计DSS的研发提供了理论指导，推动了机器人领域实验方法的系统化发展。

search_text: Taxonomy of A Decision Support System for Adaptive Experimental Design in Field Robotics 野外机器人自适应实验设计决策支持系统的分类 Experimental design in field robotics is an adaptive human-in-the-loop decision-making process in which an experimenter learns about system performance and limitations through interactions with a robot in the form of constructed experiments. This can be challenging because of system complexity, the need to operate in unstructured environments, and the competing objectives of maximizing information gain while simultaneously minimizing experimental costs. Based on the successes in other domains, we propose the use of a Decision Support System (DSS) to amplify the human's decision-making abilities, overcome their inherent shortcomings, and enable principled decision-making in field experiments. In this work, we propose common terminology and a six-stage taxonomy of DSSs specifically for adaptive experimental design of more informative tests and reduced experimental costs. We construct and present our taxonomy using examples and trends from DSS literature, including works involving artificial intelligence and Intelligent DSSs. Finally, we identify critical technical gaps and opportunities for future research to direct the scientific community in the pursuit of next-generation DSSs for experimental design. 现场机器人技术中的实验设计是一种自适应的人机交互决策过程，其中实验者通过以构建实验的形式与机器人交互来了解系统性能和局限性。由于系统复杂性、需要在非结构化环境中运行以及最大化信息增益同时最小化实验成本的竞争目标，这可能具有挑战性。基于其他领域的成功经验，我们建议使用决策支持系统（DSS）来增强人类的决策能力，克服其固有的缺点，并在现场实验中实现原则性决策。在这项工作中，我们提出了通用术语和 DSS 的六阶段分类法，专门用于更具信息性的测试和降低实验成本的适应性实验设计。我们使用 DSS 文献中的示例和趋势构建并呈现我们的分类法，包括涉及人工智能和智能 DSS 的作品。最后，我们确定了未来研究的关键技术差距和机会，以指导科学界追求下一代实验设计 DSS。 本文提出了一种用于野外机器人自适应实验设计的决策支持系统（DSS）的六阶段分类法，旨在通过统一术语和框架优化实验设计过程。 Jason M. Gregory,Sarah Al-Hussaini,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi,Satyandra K. Gupta cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Sizhe An,Yin Li,Umit Ogras
title: mRI: Multi-modal 3D Human Pose Estimation Dataset using mmWave, RGB-D, and Inertial Sensors
title_zh: MRI：使用毫米波、RGB-D 和惯性传感器的多模态 3D 人体姿势估计数据集
comment: Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). Project page: https://sizhean.github.io/mri
comments: Thirty-sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). Project page: https://sizhean.github.io/mri
abstract: The ability to estimate 3D human body pose and movement, also known as human pose estimation (HPE), enables many applications for home-based health monitoring, such as remote rehabilitation training. Several possible solutions have emerged using sensors ranging from RGB cameras, depth sensors, millimeter-Wave (mmWave) radars, and wearable inertial sensors. Despite previous efforts on datasets and benchmarks for HPE, few dataset exploits multiple modalities and focuses on home-based health monitoring. To bridge the gap, we present mRI, a multi-modal 3D human pose estimation dataset with mmWave, RGB-D, and Inertial Sensors. Our dataset consists of over 160k synchronized frames from 20 subjects performing rehabilitation exercises and supports the benchmarks of HPE and action detection. We perform extensive experiments using our dataset and delineate the strength of each modality. We hope that the release of mRI can catalyze the research in pose estimation, multi-modal learning, and action understanding, and more importantly facilitate the applications of home-based health monitoring.
summary: The ability to estimate 3D human body pose and movement, also known as human pose estimation (HPE), enables many applications for home-based health monitoring, such as remote rehabilitation training. Several possible solutions have emerged using sensors ranging from RGB cameras, depth sensors, millimeter-Wave (mmWave) radars, and wearable inertial sensors. Despite previous efforts on datasets and benchmarks for HPE, few dataset exploits multiple modalities and focuses on home-based health monitoring. To bridge the gap, we present mRI, a multi-modal 3D human pose estimation dataset with mmWave, RGB-D, and Inertial Sensors. Our dataset consists of over 160k synchronized frames from 20 subjects performing rehabilitation exercises and supports the benchmarks of HPE and action detection. We perform extensive experiments using our dataset and delineate the strength of each modality. We hope that the release of mRI can catalyze the research in pose estimation, multi-modal learning, and action understanding, and more importantly facilitate the applications of home-based health monitoring.
abstract_zh: 估计 3D 人体姿势和运动的能力（也称为人体姿势估计 (HPE)）使许多家庭健康监测应用成为可能，例如远程康复训练。已经出现了几种可能的解决方案，使用 RGB 摄像头、深度传感器、毫米波 (mmWave) 雷达和可穿戴惯性传感器等传感器。尽管 HPE 之前在数据集和基准方面做出了努力，但很少有数据集利用多种模式并专注于家庭健康监测。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 mRI，这是一个带有毫米波、RGB-D 和惯性传感器的多模态 3D 人体姿势估计数据集。我们的数据集由 20 名进行康复训练的受试者的超过 16 万个同步帧组成，并支持 HPE 和动作检测的基准。我们使用我们的数据集进行广泛的实验，并描述每种模式的强度。我们希望mRI的发布能够促进姿势估计、多模态学习和动作理解方面的研究，更重要的是促进家庭健康监测的应用。

AI.tldr: 提出mRI多模态数据集，用于家庭健康监测中的3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏多模态支持及家庭健康监测应用，需构建新数据集推动研究。
AI.method: 融合mmWave、RGB-D及惯性传感器数据，构建16万帧同步数据集，进行基准测试与模态分析。
AI.result: 实验验证各模态优势，数据集支持姿态估计与动作检测基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 数据集促进姿态估计、多模态学习及家庭健康监测应用研究。
