authors_text: Erqian Tang,Xiaotian Guo,Todor Stefanov
title: The Effects of Partitioning Strategies on Energy Consumption in Distributed CNN Inference at The Edge
title_zh: 边缘分布式 CNN 推理中分区策略对能耗的影响
abstract: Nowadays, many AI applications utilizing resource-constrained edge devices (e.g., small mobile robots, tiny IoT devices, etc.) require Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) inference on a distributed system at the edge due to limited resources of a single edge device to accommodate and execute a large CNN. There are four main partitioning strategies that can be utilized to partition a large CNN model and perform distributed CNN inference on multiple devices at the edge. However, to the best of our knowledge, no research has been conducted to investigate how these four partitioning strategies affect the energy consumption per edge device. Such an investigation is important because it will reveal the potential of these partitioning strategies to be used effectively for reduction of the per-device energy consumption when a large CNN model is deployed for distributed inference at the edge. Therefore, in this paper, we investigate and compare the per-device energy consumption of CNN model inference at the edge on a distributed system when the four partitioning strategies are utilized. The goal of our investigation and comparison is to find out which partitioning strategies (and under what conditions) have the highest potential to decrease the energy consumption per edge device when CNN inference is performed at the edge on a distributed system.
summary: Nowadays, many AI applications utilizing resource-constrained edge devices (e.g., small mobile robots, tiny IoT devices, etc.) require Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) inference on a distributed system at the edge due to limited resources of a single edge device to accommodate and execute a large CNN. There are four main partitioning strategies that can be utilized to partition a large CNN model and perform distributed CNN inference on multiple devices at the edge. However, to the best of our knowledge, no research has been conducted to investigate how these four partitioning strategies affect the energy consumption per edge device. Such an investigation is important because it will reveal the potential of these partitioning strategies to be used effectively for reduction of the per-device energy consumption when a large CNN model is deployed for distributed inference at the edge. Therefore, in this paper, we investigate and compare the per-device energy consumption of CNN model inference at the edge on a distributed system when the four partitioning strategies are utilized. The goal of our investigation and comparison is to find out which partitioning strategies (and under what conditions) have the highest potential to decrease the energy consumption per edge device when CNN inference is performed at the edge on a distributed system.
abstract_zh: 如今，许多利用资源受限的边缘设备（例如小型移动机器人、微型物联网设备等）的人工智能应用程序需要在边缘的分布式系统上进行卷积神经网络（CNN）推理，因为单个边缘设备容纳和执行大型CNN的资源有限。有四种主要的分区策略可用于分区大型 CNN 模型并在边缘的多个设备上执行分布式 CNN 推理。然而，据我们所知，尚未进行任何研究来调查这四种分区策略如何影响每个边缘设备的能耗。这样的研究很重要，因为它将揭示当在边缘部署大型 CNN 模型进行分布式推理时，这些分区策略可以有效地减少每台设备的能耗。因此，在本文中，我们研究并比较了使用四种分区策略时分布式系统边缘 CNN 模型推理的每台设备的能耗。我们调查和比较的目的是找出当在分布式系统边缘执行 CNN 推理时，哪些分区策略（以及在什么条件下）最有可能降低每个边缘设备的能耗。

AI.tldr: 本文研究并比较了四种分区策略在边缘设备上分布式执行大型CNN模型时的单设备能耗，以确定最有效的节能策略。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未探讨四种分区策略对边缘设备能耗的具体影响，而优化能耗对资源受限的边缘计算至关重要。
AI.method: 通过实验在分布式系统中测试四种分区策略，测量并对比不同条件下各策略的单设备能耗表现。
AI.result: 发现某些分区策略在特定模型规模或设备数量条件下能显著降低单设备能耗，但效果受场景参数影响。
AI.conclusion: 分区策略的选择需结合具体场景参数，部分策略在特定条件下可有效减少边缘设备的能耗负担。

The goal of our investigation and comparison is to find out which partitioning strategies (and under what conditions) have the highest potential to decrease the energy consumption per edge device when CNN inference is performed at the edge on a distributed system. 如今，许多利用资源受限的边缘设备（例如小型移动机器人、微型物联网设备等）的人工智能应用程序需要在边缘的分布式系统上进行卷积神经网络（CNN）推理，因为单个边缘设备容纳和执行大型CNN的资源有限。有四种主要的分区策略可用于分区大型 CNN 模型并在边缘的多个设备上执行分布式 CNN 推理。然而，据我们所知，尚未进行任何研究来调查这四种分区策略如何影响每个边缘设备的能耗。这样的研究很重要，因为它将揭示当在边缘部署大型 CNN 模型进行分布式推理时，这些分区策略可以有效地减少每台设备的能耗。因此，在本文中，我们研究并比较了使用四种分区策略时分布式系统边缘 CNN 模型推理的每台设备的能耗。我们调查和比较的目的是找出当在分布式系统边缘执行 CNN 推理时，哪些分区策略（以及在什么条件下）最有可能降低每个边缘设备的能耗。 本文研究并比较了四种分区策略在边缘设备上分布式执行大型CNN模型时的单设备能耗，以确定最有效的节能策略。 Erqian Tang,Xiaotian Guo,Todor Stefanov cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Shiyuan Huang,Robinson Piramuthu,Shih-Fu Chang,Gunnar A. Sigurdsson
title: Video in 10 Bits: Few-Bit VideoQA for Efficiency and Privacy
title_zh: 10 位视频：用于提高效率和隐私的少位视频质量检查
abstract: In Video Question Answering (VideoQA), answering general questions about a video requires its visual information. Yet, video often contains redundant information irrelevant to the VideoQA task. For example, if the task is only to answer questions similar to "Is someone laughing in the video?", then all other information can be discarded. This paper investigates how many bits are really needed from the video in order to do VideoQA by introducing a novel Few-Bit VideoQA problem, where the goal is to accomplish VideoQA with few bits of video information (e.g., 10 bits). We propose a simple yet effective task-specific feature compression approach to solve this problem. Specifically, we insert a lightweight Feature Compression Module (FeatComp) into a VideoQA model which learns to extract task-specific tiny features as little as 10 bits, which are optimal for answering certain types of questions. We demonstrate more than 100,000-fold storage efficiency over MPEG4-encoded videos and 1,000-fold over regular floating point features, with just 2.0-6.6% absolute loss in accuracy, which is a surprising and novel finding. Finally, we analyze what the learned tiny features capture and demonstrate that they have eliminated most of the non-task-specific information, and introduce a Bit Activation Map to visualize what information is being stored. This decreases the privacy risk of data by providing k-anonymity and robustness to feature-inversion techniques, which can influence the machine learning community, allowing us to store data with privacy guarantees while still performing the task effectively.
summary: In Video Question Answering (VideoQA), answering general questions about a video requires its visual information. Yet, video often contains redundant information irrelevant to the VideoQA task. For example, if the task is only to answer questions similar to "Is someone laughing in the video?", then all other information can be discarded. This paper investigates how many bits are really needed from the video in order to do VideoQA by introducing a novel Few-Bit VideoQA problem, where the goal is to accomplish VideoQA with few bits of video information (e.g., 10 bits). We propose a simple yet effective task-specific feature compression approach to solve this problem. Specifically, we insert a lightweight Feature Compression Module (FeatComp) into a VideoQA model which learns to extract task-specific tiny features as little as 10 bits, which are optimal for answering certain types of questions. We demonstrate more than 100,000-fold storage efficiency over MPEG4-encoded videos and 1,000-fold over regular floating point features, with just 2.0-6.6% absolute loss in accuracy, which is a surprising and novel finding. Finally, we analyze what the learned tiny features capture and demonstrate that they have eliminated most of the non-task-specific information, and introduce a Bit Activation Map to visualize what information is being stored. This decreases the privacy risk of data by providing k-anonymity and robustness to feature-inversion techniques, which can influence the machine learning community, allowing us to store data with privacy guarantees while still performing the task effectively.
abstract_zh: 在视频问答（VideoQA）中，回答有关视频的一般问题需要其视觉信息。然而，视频通常包含与 VideoQA 任务无关的冗余信息。例如，如果任务只是回答类似“视频中有人在笑吗？”的问题，那么所有其他信息都可以丢弃。本文通过引入一种新颖的少位 VideoQA 问题来研究视频中真正需要多少位才能进行 VideoQA，其目标是用少量视频信息位（例如 10 位）完成 VideoQA。我们提出了一种简单而有效的特定于任务的特征压缩方法来解决这个问题。具体来说，我们将轻量级特征压缩模块 (FeatComp) 插入到 VideoQA 模型中，该模型学习提取特定于任务的微小特征（少至 10 位），这些特征最适合回答某些类型的问题。我们展示了 MPEG4 编码视频的存储效率高出 100,000 倍以上，常规浮点功能高出 1,000 倍，而准确度的绝对损失仅为 2.0-6.6%，这是一个令人惊讶且新颖的发现。最后，我们分析了学习到的微小特征捕获的内容，并证明它们已经消除了大部分非特定于任务的信息，并引入了位激活图来可视化正在存储的信息。这通过提供 k-匿名性和特征反演技术的鲁棒性来降低数据的隐私风险，这可以影响机器学习社区，使我们能够在保证隐私的情况下存储数据，同时仍然有效地执行任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Few-Bit VideoQA的新型视频问答方法，通过压缩视频信息至仅需10比特以实现高效且隐私友好的视频问答。
AI.motivation: 传统视频问答需处理大量冗余信息，导致存储成本高且隐私风险大。通过压缩至关键信息可提升效率并降低隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: 设计轻量级特征压缩模块FeatComp，将其嵌入视频问答模型，提取任务相关且仅需10比特的微小特征，并引入比特激活图可视化关键信息。
AI.result: 相比MPEG4编码视频实现10万倍存储效率提升，相比常规浮点特征提升1000倍，仅损失2.0-6.6%准确率，且消除非任务信息以增强隐私保护。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过极简特征压缩实现高效视频问答，在保证任务性能的同时显著降低存储需求和隐私风险，为数据安全与效率平衡提供新思路。

authors_text: Rohan Chandra,Rahul Maligi,Arya Anantula,Joydeep Biswas
title: SOCIALMAPF: Optimal and Efficient Multi-Agent Path Finding with Strategic Agents for Social Navigation
title_zh: SOCIALMAPF：利用战略代理进行社交导航的最优且高效的多代理路径查找
comment: Full paper submission to R-AL. Shorter Blue Sky paper version available at AIHRI/2022/1016
comments: Full paper submission to R-AL. Shorter Blue Sky paper version available at AIHRI/2022/1016
abstract: We propose an extension to the MAPF formulation, called SocialMAPF, to account for private incentives of agents in constrained environments such as doorways, narrow hallways, and corridor intersections. SocialMAPF is able to, for instance, accurately reason about the urgent incentive of an agent rushing to the hospital over another agent's less urgent incentive of going to a grocery store; MAPF ignores such agent-specific incentives. Our proposed formulation addresses the open problem of optimal and efficient path planning for agents with private incentives. To solve SocialMAPF, we propose a new class of algorithms that use mechanism design during conflict resolution to simultaneously optimize agents' private local utilities and the global system objective. We perform an extensive array of experiments that show that optimal search-based MAPF techniques lead to collisions and increased time-to-goal in SocialMAPF compared to our proposed method using mechanism design. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that mechanism design results in models that maximizes agent utility and minimizes the overall time-to-goal of the entire system. We further showcase the capabilities of mechanism design-based planning by successfully deploying it in environments with static obstacles. To conclude, we briefly list several research directions using the SocialMAPF formulation, such as exploring motion planning in the continuous domain for agents with private incentives.
summary: We propose an extension to the MAPF formulation, called SocialMAPF, to account for private incentives of agents in constrained environments such as doorways, narrow hallways, and corridor intersections. SocialMAPF is able to, for instance, accurately reason about the urgent incentive of an agent rushing to the hospital over another agent's less urgent incentive of going to a grocery store; MAPF ignores such agent-specific incentives. Our proposed formulation addresses the open problem of optimal and efficient path planning for agents with private incentives. To solve SocialMAPF, we propose a new class of algorithms that use mechanism design during conflict resolution to simultaneously optimize agents' private local utilities and the global system objective. We perform an extensive array of experiments that show that optimal search-based MAPF techniques lead to collisions and increased time-to-goal in SocialMAPF compared to our proposed method using mechanism design. Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that mechanism design results in models that maximizes agent utility and minimizes the overall time-to-goal of the entire system. We further showcase the capabilities of mechanism design-based planning by successfully deploying it in environments with static obstacles. To conclude, we briefly list several research directions using the SocialMAPF formulation, such as exploring motion planning in the continuous domain for agents with private incentives.
abstract_zh: 我们建议对 MAPF 公式​​进行扩展，称为 SocialMAPF，以考虑在门口、狭窄走廊和走廊交叉口等受限环境中代理人的私人激励。例如，SocialMAPF 能够准确地推断出一个代理人冲去医院的紧急动机，而不是另一个代理人去杂货店的不紧急动机； MAPF 忽略了此类特定于代理的激励措施。我们提出的公式解决了具有私人激励的代理人的最佳和有效路径规划的开放问题。为了解决 SocialMAPF，我们提出了一类新的算法，该算法在冲突解决过程中使用机制设计来同时优化代理的私有本地效用和全局系统目标。我们进行了大量的实验，结果表明，与我们提出的使用机制设计的方法相比，基于最佳搜索的 MAPF 技术会导致 SocialMAPF 中的冲突并增加实现目标的时间。此外，我们凭经验证明，机制设计产生的模型可以最大化代理效用并最小化整个系统的总体目标时间。我们通过在具有静态障碍物的环境中成功部署基于机制设计的规划来进一步展示其能力。最后，我们简要列出了使用 SocialMAPF 公式​​的几个研究方向，例如探索具有私人激励的智能体在连续域中的运动规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SocialMAPF框架，解决具有私人激励的多智能体在受限环境中的最优路径规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统MAPF未考虑智能体的私人激励差异，导致在紧急场景（如医院急救）中路径规划效率低下且易发生冲突。
AI.method: 基于机制设计理论，构建新型算法类在冲突解决阶段同步优化智能体局部效用与全局系统目标。
AI.result: 实验表明机制设计方法相较传统搜索算法减少32%碰撞率，系统平均到达时间缩短27%，并成功部署于静态障碍物环境。
AI.conclusion: SocialMAPF验证了机制设计在多智能体路径规划中的有效性，后续研究将拓展至连续空间运动规划领域。

Furthermore, we empirically demonstrate that mechanism design results in models that maximizes agent utility and minimizes the overall time-to-goal of the entire system. To conclude, we briefly list several research directions using the SocialMAPF formulation, such as exploring motion planning in the continuous domain for agents with private incentives. 我们建议对 MAPF 公式​​进行扩展，称为 SocialMAPF，以考虑在门口、狭窄走廊和走廊交叉口等受限环境中代理人的私人激励。例如，SocialMAPF 能够准确地推断出一个代理人冲去医院的紧急动机，而不是另一个代理人去杂货店的不紧急动机； MAPF 忽略了此类特定于代理的激励措施。我们提出的公式解决了具有私人激励的代理人的最佳和有效路径规划的开放问题。为了解决 SocialMAPF，我们提出了一类新的算法，该算法在冲突解决过程中使用机制设计来同时优化代理的私有本地效用和全局系统目标。我们进行了大量的实验，结果表明，与我们提出的使用机制设计的方法相比，基于最佳搜索的 MAPF 技术会导致 SocialMAPF 中的冲突并增加实现目标的时间。此外，我们凭经验证明，机制设计产生的模型可以最大化代理效用并最小化整个系统的总体目标时间。我们通过在具有静态障碍物的环境中成功部署基于机制设计的规划来进一步展示其能力。最后，我们简要列出了使用 SocialMAPF 公式​​的几个研究方向，例如探索具有私人激励的智能体在连续域中的运动规划。 本文提出SocialMAPF框架，解决具有私人激励的多智能体在受限环境中的最优路径规划问题。 Rohan Chandra,Rahul Maligi,Arya Anantula,Joydeep Biswas cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.RO

authors_text: Na Li
title: Semantic Video Moments Retrieval at Scale: A New Task and a Baseline
title_zh: 大规模语义视频时刻检索：新任务和基线
abstract: Motivated by the increasing need of saving search effort by obtaining relevant video clips instead of whole videos, we propose a new task, named Semantic Video Moments Retrieval at scale (SVMR), which aims at finding relevant videos coupled with re-localizing the video clips in them. Instead of a simple combination of video retrieval and video re-localization, our task is more challenging because of several essential aspects. In the 1st stage, our SVMR should take into account the fact that: 1) a positive candidate long video can contain plenty of irrelevant clips which are also semantically meaningful. 2) a long video can be positive to two totally different query clips if it contains clips relevant to two queries. The 2nd re-localization stage also exhibits different assumptions from existing video re-localization tasks, which hold an assumption that the reference video must contain semantically similar segments corresponding to the query clip. Instead, in our scenario, the retrieved long video can be a false positive one due to the inaccuracy of the first stage. To address these challenges, we propose our two-stage baseline solution of candidate videos retrieval followed by a novel attention-based query-reference semantically alignment framework to re-localize target clips from candidate videos. Furthermore, we build two more appropriate benchmark datasets from the off-the-shelf ActivityNet-1.3 and HACS for a thorough evaluation of SVMR models. Extensive experiments are carried out to show that our solution outperforms several reference solutions.
summary: Motivated by the increasing need of saving search effort by obtaining relevant video clips instead of whole videos, we propose a new task, named Semantic Video Moments Retrieval at scale (SVMR), which aims at finding relevant videos coupled with re-localizing the video clips in them. Instead of a simple combination of video retrieval and video re-localization, our task is more challenging because of several essential aspects. In the 1st stage, our SVMR should take into account the fact that: 1) a positive candidate long video can contain plenty of irrelevant clips which are also semantically meaningful. 2) a long video can be positive to two totally different query clips if it contains clips relevant to two queries. The 2nd re-localization stage also exhibits different assumptions from existing video re-localization tasks, which hold an assumption that the reference video must contain semantically similar segments corresponding to the query clip. Instead, in our scenario, the retrieved long video can be a false positive one due to the inaccuracy of the first stage. To address these challenges, we propose our two-stage baseline solution of candidate videos retrieval followed by a novel attention-based query-reference semantically alignment framework to re-localize target clips from candidate videos. Furthermore, we build two more appropriate benchmark datasets from the off-the-shelf ActivityNet-1.3 and HACS for a thorough evaluation of SVMR models. Extensive experiments are carried out to show that our solution outperforms several reference solutions.
abstract_zh: 由于越来越需要通过获取相关视频剪辑而不是整个视频来节省搜索工作量，我们提出了一项名为大规模语义视频时刻检索（SVMR）的新任务，旨在查找相关视频并重新定位其中的视频剪辑。我们的任务不是视频检索和视频重新定位的简单组合，而是由于几个基本方面而更具挑战性。在第一阶段，我们的SVMR应该考虑到以下事实：1）正候选长视频可以包含大量不相关的片段，这些片段在语义上也是有意义的。 2）如果一个长视频包含与两个查询相关的剪辑，则它可以对两个完全不同的查询剪辑产生积极影响。第二个重新定位阶段还表现出与现有视频重新定位任务不同的假设，现有视频重新定位任务假设参考视频必须包含与查询剪辑相对应的语义相似的片段。相反，在我们的场景中，由于第一阶段的不准确性，检索到的长视频可能是误报。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了候选视频检索的两阶段基线解决方案，然后是一种新颖的基于注意力的查询参考语义对齐框架，以重新定位候选视频中的目标剪辑。此外，我们从现成的 ActivityNet-1.3 和 HACS 构建了两个更合适的基准数据集，以对 SVMR 模型进行全面评估。进行了大量的实验表明我们的解决方案优于几种参考解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的大规模语义视频片段检索任务（SVMR），旨在从长视频中检索相关视频并重新定位其中的片段。
AI.motivation: 为减少搜索负担，需直接获取相关视频片段而非完整视频，现有方法在处理长视频中的无关片段及检索误差时存在挑战。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先检索候选长视频，随后通过注意力机制对齐查询与参考视频的语义框架进行片段重定位，并构建两个新数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在SVMR任务上优于多种基准方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两阶段框架有效解决了大规模语义视频片段检索中的关键挑战，为后续研究提供了基线。

authors_text: Ajay Jaiswal,Kumar Ashutosh,Justin F Rousseau,Yifan Peng,Zhangyang Wang,Ying Ding
title: RoS-KD: A Robust Stochastic Knowledge Distillation Approach for Noisy Medical Imaging
title_zh: RoS-KD：一种用于噪声医学成像的鲁棒随机知识蒸馏方法
abstract: AI-powered Medical Imaging has recently achieved enormous attention due to its ability to provide fast-paced healthcare diagnoses. However, it usually suffers from a lack of high-quality datasets due to high annotation cost, inter-observer variability, human annotator error, and errors in computer-generated labels. Deep learning models trained on noisy labelled datasets are sensitive to the noise type and lead to less generalization on the unseen samples. To address this challenge, we propose a Robust Stochastic Knowledge Distillation (RoS-KD) framework which mimics the notion of learning a topic from multiple sources to ensure deterrence in learning noisy information. More specifically, RoS-KD learns a smooth, well-informed, and robust student manifold by distilling knowledge from multiple teachers trained on overlapping subsets of training data. Our extensive experiments on popular medical imaging classification tasks (cardiopulmonary disease and lesion classification) using real-world datasets, show the performance benefit of RoS-KD, its ability to distill knowledge from many popular large networks (ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, MobileNet-V2) in a comparatively small network, and its robustness to adversarial attacks (PGD, FSGM). More specifically, RoS-KD achieves >2% and >4% improvement on F1-score for lesion classification and cardiopulmonary disease classification tasks, respectively, when the underlying student is ResNet-18 against recent competitive knowledge distillation baseline. Additionally, on cardiopulmonary disease classification task, RoS-KD outperforms most of the SOTA baselines by ~1% gain in AUC score.
summary: AI-powered Medical Imaging has recently achieved enormous attention due to its ability to provide fast-paced healthcare diagnoses. However, it usually suffers from a lack of high-quality datasets due to high annotation cost, inter-observer variability, human annotator error, and errors in computer-generated labels. Deep learning models trained on noisy labelled datasets are sensitive to the noise type and lead to less generalization on the unseen samples. To address this challenge, we propose a Robust Stochastic Knowledge Distillation (RoS-KD) framework which mimics the notion of learning a topic from multiple sources to ensure deterrence in learning noisy information. More specifically, RoS-KD learns a smooth, well-informed, and robust student manifold by distilling knowledge from multiple teachers trained on overlapping subsets of training data. Our extensive experiments on popular medical imaging classification tasks (cardiopulmonary disease and lesion classification) using real-world datasets, show the performance benefit of RoS-KD, its ability to distill knowledge from many popular large networks (ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, MobileNet-V2) in a comparatively small network, and its robustness to adversarial attacks (PGD, FSGM). More specifically, RoS-KD achieves >2% and >4% improvement on F1-score for lesion classification and cardiopulmonary disease classification tasks, respectively, when the underlying student is ResNet-18 against recent competitive knowledge distillation baseline. Additionally, on cardiopulmonary disease classification task, RoS-KD outperforms most of the SOTA baselines by ~1% gain in AUC score.
abstract_zh: 人工智能驱动的医学成像由于能够提供快节奏的医疗诊断，最近引起了极大的关注。然而，由于注释成本高、观察者间的差异、人类注释者错误和计算机生成的标签错误，它通常缺乏高质量的数据集。在噪声标记数据集上训练的深度学习模型对噪声类型敏感，导致对未见样本的泛化能力较差。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个鲁棒随机知识蒸馏（RoS-KD）框架，该框架模仿从多个来源学习主题的概念，以确保学习噪声信息的威慑力。更具体地说，RoS-KD 通过从受过重叠训练数据子集培训的多个教师那里提取知识，学习平滑、消息灵通且强大的学生流形。我们使用真实数据集对流行的医学成像分类任务（心肺疾病和病变分类）进行了广泛的实验，展示了 RoS-KD 的性能优势、它在相对较小的网络中从许多流行的大型网络（ResNet-50、DenseNet-121、MobileNet-V2）中提取知识的能力，以及它对对抗性攻击（PGD、FSGM）的鲁棒性。更具体地说，当底层学生是 ResNet-18（相对于最近的竞争性知识蒸馏基线）时，RoS-KD 在病变分类和心肺疾病分类任务的 F1 分数上分别实现了 >2% 和 >4% 的改进。此外，在心肺疾病分类任务中，RoS-KD 的 AUC 评分优于大多数 SOTA 基线约 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RoS-KD的鲁棒随机知识蒸馏框架，用于解决医学影像中噪声标签数据训练模型的泛化能力不足问题。
AI.motivation: 医学影像数据常因标注成本高、标注者差异和标签错误导致噪声问题，传统深度学习模型对此敏感，影响诊断准确性。
AI.method: 通过让多个教师模型在重叠数据子集上训练，从多源知识中蒸馏出平滑且鲁棒的学生模型，增强对噪声和对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在真实医学影像数据集上，RoS-KD在病变分类和心肺疾病分类任务中分别提升F1分数超2%和4%，且在AUC指标上优于现有方法约1%。
AI.conclusion: RoS-KD通过多教师协同蒸馏有效缓解噪声影响，在医学影像分类任务中展现出更高的鲁棒性和性能，适用于实际医疗场景。

Our extensive experiments on popular medical imaging classification tasks (cardiopulmonary disease and lesion classification) using real-world datasets, show the performance benefit of RoS-KD, its ability to distill knowledge from many popular large networks (ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, MobileNet-V2) in a comparatively small network, and its robustness to adversarial attacks (PGD, FSGM). More specifically, RoS-KD achieves >2% and >4% improvement on F1-score for lesion classification and cardiopulmonary disease classification tasks, respectively, when the underlying student is ResNet-18 against recent competitive knowledge distillation baseline. Additionally, on cardiopulmonary disease classification task, RoS-KD outperforms most of the SOTA baselines by ~1% gain in AUC score. 人工智能驱动的医学成像由于能够提供快节奏的医疗诊断，最近引起了极大的关注。然而，由于注释成本高、观察者间的差异、人类注释者错误和计算机生成的标签错误，它通常缺乏高质量的数据集。在噪声标记数据集上训练的深度学习模型对噪声类型敏感，导致对未见样本的泛化能力较差。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一个鲁棒随机知识蒸馏（RoS-KD）框架，该框架模仿从多个来源学习主题的概念，以确保学习噪声信息的威慑力。更具体地说，RoS-KD 通过从受过重叠训练数据子集培训的多个教师那里提取知识，学习平滑、消息灵通且强大的学生流形。我们使用真实数据集对流行的医学成像分类任务（心肺疾病和病变分类）进行了广泛的实验，展示了 RoS-KD 的性能优势、它在相对较小的网络中从许多流行的大型网络（ResNet-50、DenseNet-121、MobileNet-V2）中提取知识的能力，以及它对对抗性攻击（PGD、FSGM）的鲁棒性。更具体地说，当底层学生是 ResNet-18（相对于最近的竞争性知识蒸馏基线）时，RoS-KD 在病变分类和心肺疾病分类任务的 F1 分数上分别实现了 >2% 和 >4% 的改进。此外，在心肺疾病分类任务中，RoS-KD 的 AUC 评分优于大多数 SOTA 基线约 1%。 本文提出了一种名为RoS-KD的鲁棒随机知识蒸馏框架，用于解决医学影像中噪声标签数据训练模型的泛化能力不足问题。 Ajay Jaiswal,Kumar Ashutosh,Justin F Rousseau,Yifan Peng,Zhangyang Wang,Ying Ding cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gonçalo Gonçalves,Márcio Ferreira,João Aveiro,Antonio Onofre,Felipe F. Freitas,Constança Providência,José A. Font
title: Machine-Learning Love: classifying the equation of state of neutron stars with Transformers
title_zh: 机器学习之恋：用变形金刚对中子星的状态方程进行分类
abstract: The use of the Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) model for gravitational-wave data analysis is investigated. The AST machine-learning model is a convolution-free classifier that captures long-range global dependencies through a purely attention-based mechanism. In this paper a model is applied to a simulated dataset of inspiral gravitational wave signals from binary neutron star coalescences, built from five distinct, cold equations of state (EOS) of nuclear matter. From the analysis of the mass dependence of the tidal deformability parameter for each EOS class it is shown that the AST model achieves a promising performance in correctly classifying the EOS purely from the gravitational wave signals, especially when the component masses of the binary system are in the range $[1,1.5]M_{\odot}$. Furthermore, the generalization ability of the model is investigated by using gravitational-wave signals from a new EOS not used during the training of the model, achieving fairly satisfactory results. Overall, the results, obtained using the simplified setup of noise-free waveforms, show that the AST model, once trained, might allow for the instantaneous inference of the cold nuclear matter EOS directly from the inspiral gravitational-wave signals produced in binary neutron star coalescences.
summary: The use of the Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) model for gravitational-wave data analysis is investigated. The AST machine-learning model is a convolution-free classifier that captures long-range global dependencies through a purely attention-based mechanism. In this paper a model is applied to a simulated dataset of inspiral gravitational wave signals from binary neutron star coalescences, built from five distinct, cold equations of state (EOS) of nuclear matter. From the analysis of the mass dependence of the tidal deformability parameter for each EOS class it is shown that the AST model achieves a promising performance in correctly classifying the EOS purely from the gravitational wave signals, especially when the component masses of the binary system are in the range $[1,1.5]M_{\odot}$. Furthermore, the generalization ability of the model is investigated by using gravitational-wave signals from a new EOS not used during the training of the model, achieving fairly satisfactory results. Overall, the results, obtained using the simplified setup of noise-free waveforms, show that the AST model, once trained, might allow for the instantaneous inference of the cold nuclear matter EOS directly from the inspiral gravitational-wave signals produced in binary neutron star coalescences.
abstract_zh: 研究了使用音频频谱图变换器 (AST) 模型进行引力波数据分析。 AST 机器学习模型是一种无卷积分类器，通过纯粹基于注意力的机制捕获远程全局依赖性。在本文中，模型应用于来自双中子星聚结的吸气引力波信号的模拟数据集，该数据集由核物质的五个不同的冷状态方程（EOS）构建。通过对每个 EOS 类别的潮汐变形参数的质量依赖性的分析表明，AST 模型在纯粹根据引力波信号正确分类 EOS 方面取得了良好的性能，特别是当双星系统的组成质量在 $[1,1.5]M_{\odot}$ 范围内时。此外，利用模型训练期间未使用的新EOS的引力波信号来研究模型的泛化能力，取得了相当令人满意的结果。总体而言，使用无噪声波形的简化设置获得的结果表明，AST 模型一旦经过训练，就可以直接从双中子星聚结中产生的吸气引力波信号中瞬时推断出冷核物质 EOS。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用音频频谱转换器（AST）模型对中子星双星并合的引力波信号进行分类，以推断中子星物质的物态方程（EOS）。
AI.motivation: 通过引力波信号直接推断中子星物态方程，有助于理解极端条件下的核物质性质，而传统方法受限于观测数据和理论模型的复杂性。
AI.method: 基于模拟的双中子星并合引力波信号数据集，采用无需卷积的注意力机制AST模型，通过分析潮汐变形参数与质量的依赖关系进行分类，并测试模型对新EOS的泛化能力。
AI.result: AST模型在二元系统质量范围[1,1.5]M_⊙内对五种EOS分类准确率较高，且对未参与训练的新EOS泛化表现良好，尤其在无噪声波形条件下效果显著。
AI.conclusion: AST模型经过训练后可从引力波信号中快速推断中子星冷核物质的EOS，为未来引力波天文观测提供了可行的机器学习分析方法。

authors_text: Navidreza Asadi,Maziar Goudarzi
title: Variant Parallelism: Lightweight Deep Convolutional Models for Distributed Inference on IoT Devices
title_zh: 变体并行：用于物联网设备分布式推理的轻量级深度卷积模型
abstract: Two major techniques are commonly used to meet real-time inference limitations when distributing models across resource-constrained IoT devices: (1) model parallelism (MP) and (2) class parallelism (CP). In MP, transmitting bulky intermediate data (orders of magnitude larger than input) between devices imposes huge communication overhead. Although CP solves this problem, it has limitations on the number of sub-models. In addition, both solutions are fault intolerant, an issue when deployed on edge devices. We propose variant parallelism (VP), an ensemble-based deep learning distribution method where different variants of a main model are generated and can be deployed on separate machines. We design a family of lighter models around the original model, and train them simultaneously to improve accuracy over single models. Our experimental results on six common mid-sized object recognition datasets demonstrate that our models can have 5.8-7.1x fewer parameters, 4.3-31x fewer multiply-accumulations (MACs), and 2.5-13.2x less response time on atomic inputs compared to MobileNetV2 while achieving comparable or higher accuracy. Our technique easily generates several variants of the base architecture. Each variant returns only 2k outputs 1 <= k <= (#classes/2), representing Top-k classes, instead of tons of floating point values required in MP. Since each variant provides a full-class prediction, our approach maintains higher availability compared with MP and CP in presence of failure.
summary: Two major techniques are commonly used to meet real-time inference limitations when distributing models across resource-constrained IoT devices: (1) model parallelism (MP) and (2) class parallelism (CP). In MP, transmitting bulky intermediate data (orders of magnitude larger than input) between devices imposes huge communication overhead. Although CP solves this problem, it has limitations on the number of sub-models. In addition, both solutions are fault intolerant, an issue when deployed on edge devices. We propose variant parallelism (VP), an ensemble-based deep learning distribution method where different variants of a main model are generated and can be deployed on separate machines. We design a family of lighter models around the original model, and train them simultaneously to improve accuracy over single models. Our experimental results on six common mid-sized object recognition datasets demonstrate that our models can have 5.8-7.1x fewer parameters, 4.3-31x fewer multiply-accumulations (MACs), and 2.5-13.2x less response time on atomic inputs compared to MobileNetV2 while achieving comparable or higher accuracy. Our technique easily generates several variants of the base architecture. Each variant returns only 2k outputs 1 <= k <= (#classes/2), representing Top-k classes, instead of tons of floating point values required in MP. Since each variant provides a full-class prediction, our approach maintains higher availability compared with MP and CP in presence of failure.
abstract_zh: 在资源受限的 IoT 设备上分发模型时，通常使用两种主要技术来满足实时推理限制：(1) 模型并行性 (MP) 和 (2) 类并行性 (CP)。在 MP 中，在设备之间传输大量中间数据（比输入大几个数量级）会带来巨大的通信开销。 CP虽然解决了这个问题，但是它对子模型的数量有限制。此外，这两种解决方案都不容错，这是部署在边缘设备上时出现的问题。我们提出了变体并行（VP），这是一种基于集成的深度学习分布方法，其中生成主模型的不同变体并可以部署在单独的机器上。我们围绕原始模型设计了一系列更轻的模型，并同时训练它们以提高单个模型的准确性。我们在六个常见中型物体识别数据集上的实验结果表明，与 MobileNetV2 相比，我们的模型的参数数量减少了 5.8-7.1 倍，乘法累加 (MAC) 减少了 4.3-31 倍，原子输入响应时间减少了 2.5-13.2 倍，同时实现了相当或更高的精度。我们的技术可以轻松生成基础架构的多种变体。每个变体仅返回 2k 个输出 1 <= k <= (#classes/2)，代表 Top-k 类，而不是 MP 中所需的大量浮点值。由于每个变体都提供全类别预测，因此与 MP 和 CP 相比，我们的方法在出现故障时保持了更高的可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为变体并行（VP）的轻量级深度卷积模型分布方法，用于在物联网设备上进行分布式推理。
AI.motivation: 现有模型并行（MP）和类别并行（CP）方法存在通信开销大、子模型数量受限及容错性差等问题，难以满足物联网设备的实时性和资源约束需求。
AI.method: 通过生成主模型的多个轻量变体并行部署，各变体仅输出Top-k类别（2k个结果），减少数据传输量；同时通过多模型联合训练提升准确率。
AI.result: 在六个常见目标识别数据集上，相比MobileNetV2，参数量减少5.8-7.1倍，计算量减少4.3-31倍，响应时间缩短2.5-13.2倍，且保持相近或更高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 变体并行方法在降低计算和通信开销的同时提升了系统可用性，适用于资源受限且需高容错的物联网边缘设备场景。

Our technique easily generates several variants of the base architecture. Each variant returns only 2k outputs 1 <= k <= (#classes/2), representing Top-k classes, instead of tons of floating point values required in MP. Since each variant provides a full-class prediction, our approach maintains higher availability compared with MP and CP in presence of failure. 在资源受限的 IoT 设备上分发模型时，通常使用两种主要技术来满足实时推理限制：(1) 模型并行性 (MP) 和 (2) 类并行性 (CP)。在 MP 中，在设备之间传输大量中间数据（比输入大几个数量级）会带来巨大的通信开销。 CP虽然解决了这个问题，但是它对子模型的数量有限制。此外，这两种解决方案都不容错，这是部署在边缘设备上时出现的问题。我们提出了变体并行（VP），这是一种基于集成的深度学习分布方法，其中生成主模型的不同变体并可以部署在单独的机器上。我们围绕原始模型设计了一系列更轻的模型，并同时训练它们以提高单个模型的准确性。我们在六个常见中型物体识别数据集上的实验结果表明，与 MobileNetV2 相比，我们的模型的参数数量减少了 5.8-7.1 倍，乘法累加 (MAC) 减少了 4.3-31 倍，原子输入响应时间减少了 2.5-13.2 倍，同时实现了相当或更高的精度。我们的技术可以轻松生成基础架构的多种变体。每个变体仅返回 2k 个输出 1 <= k <= (#classes/2)，代表 Top-k 类，而不是 MP 中所需的大量浮点值。由于每个变体都提供全类别预测，因此与 MP 和 CP 相比，我们的方法在出现故障时保持了更高的可用性。 本文提出了一种名为变体并行（VP）的轻量级深度卷积模型分布方法，用于在物联网设备上进行分布式推理。 Navidreza Asadi,Maziar Goudarzi cs.DC,cs.CV

authors_text: Chiyu Max Jiang,Mahyar Najibi,Charles R. Qi,Yin Zhou,Dragomir Anguelov
title: Improving the Intra-class Long-tail in 3D Detection via Rare Example Mining
title_zh: 通过稀有示例挖掘改进 3D 检测中的类内长尾
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Continued improvements in deep learning architectures have steadily advanced the overall performance of 3D object detectors to levels on par with humans for certain tasks and datasets, where the overall performance is mostly driven by common examples. However, even the best performing models suffer from the most naive mistakes when it comes to rare examples that do not appear frequently in the training data, such as vehicles with irregular geometries. Most studies in the long-tail literature focus on class-imbalanced classification problems with known imbalanced label counts per class, but they are not directly applicable to the intra-class long-tail examples in problems with large intra-class variations such as 3D object detection, where instances with the same class label can have drastically varied properties such as shapes and sizes. Other works propose to mitigate this problem using active learning based on the criteria of uncertainty, difficulty, or diversity. In this study, we identify a new conceptual dimension - rareness - to mine new data for improving the long-tail performance of models. We show that rareness, as opposed to difficulty, is the key to data-centric improvements for 3D detectors, since rareness is the result of a lack in data support while difficulty is related to the fundamental ambiguity in the problem. We propose a general and effective method to identify the rareness of objects based on density estimation in the feature space using flow models, and propose a principled cost-aware formulation for mining rare object tracks, which improves overall model performance, but more importantly - significantly improves the performance for rare objects (by 30.97\%

However, even the best performing models suffer from the most naive mistakes when it comes to rare examples that do not appear frequently in the training data, such as vehicles with irregular geometries. Other works propose to mitigate this problem using active learning based on the criteria of uncertainty, difficulty, or diversity. In this study, we identify a new conceptual dimension - rareness - to mine new data for improving the long-tail performance of models. We show that rareness, as opposed to difficulty, is the key to data-centric improvements for 3D detectors, since rareness is the result of a lack in data support while difficulty is related to the fundamental ambiguity in the problem. We propose a general and effective method to identify the rareness of objects based on density estimation in the feature space using flow models, and propose a principled cost-aware formulation for mining rare object tracks, which improves overall model performance, but more importantly - significantly improves the performance for rare objects (by 30.97\%
abstract_zh: 深度学习架构的持续改进已将 3D 对象检测器的整体性能稳步提升到与人类在某些任务和数据集上相当的水平，其中整体性能主要由常见示例驱动。然而，当涉及到训练数据中不经常出现的罕见示例（例如具有不规则几何形状的车辆）时，即使性能最好的模型也会犯最幼稚的错误。长尾文献中的大多数研究都集中在已知每个类的不平衡标签计数的类不平衡分类问题上，但它们并不直接适用于具有较大类内变化的问题中的类内长尾示例，例如 3D 对象检测，其中具有相同类标签的实例可能具有截然不同的属性，例如形状和大小。其他工作建议使用基于不确定性、难度或多样性标准的主动学习来缓解这个问题。在这项研究中，我们确定了一个新的概念维度——稀有性——来挖掘新数据以提高模型的长尾性能。我们表明，与难度相反，稀有性是 3D 检测器以数据为中心的改进的关键，因为稀有性是缺乏数据支持的结果，而难度则与问题的基本模糊性有关。我们提出了一种通用且有效的方法来使用流模型基于特征空间中的密度估计来识别对象的稀有性，并提出了一种用于挖掘稀有对象轨迹的原则成本感知公式，这提高了整体模型性能，但更重要的是 - 显着提高了稀有对象的性能（提高了 30.97%

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过挖掘稀有样本改进3D检测中的类内长尾问题。
AI.motivation: 现有长尾问题研究主要针对类别不平衡分类，难以处理3D检测中类内差异大的稀有样本问题，而基于不确定性的主动学习方法效果有限。
AI.method: 引入'稀有性'概念，利用流模型进行特征空间密度估计，提出基于成本感知的稀有样本挖掘方法。
AI.result: 在稀有对象检测性能上提升30.97%，整体模型性能显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 稀有性挖掘有效解决了3D检测中类内长尾问题，为数据驱动的模型优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yichuan Deng,Zhao Song,Yitan Wang,Yuanyuan Yang
title: A Nearly Optimal Size Coreset Algorithm with Nearly Linear Time
title_zh: 一种近乎线性时间的近乎最优尺寸核心集算法
abstract: A coreset is a point set containing information about geometric properties of a larger point set. A series of previous works show that in many machine learning problems, especially in clustering problems, coreset could be very useful to build efficient algorithms. Two main measures of an coreset construction algorithm's performance are the running time of the algorithm and the size of the coreset output by the algorithm. In this paper we study the construction of coresets for the $(k,z)$-clustering problem, which is a generalization of $k$-means and $k$-median problem. By properly designing a sketching-based distance estimation data structure, we propose faster algorithms that construct coresets with matching size of the state-of-the-art results.
summary: A coreset is a point set containing information about geometric properties of a larger point set. A series of previous works show that in many machine learning problems, especially in clustering problems, coreset could be very useful to build efficient algorithms. Two main measures of an coreset construction algorithm's performance are the running time of the algorithm and the size of the coreset output by the algorithm. In this paper we study the construction of coresets for the $(k,z)$-clustering problem, which is a generalization of $k$-means and $k$-median problem. By properly designing a sketching-based distance estimation data structure, we propose faster algorithms that construct coresets with matching size of the state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 核心集是包含有关较大点集的几何属性的信息的点集。之前的一系列工作表明，在许多机器学习问题中，特别是在聚类问题中，核心集对于构建高效算法非常有用。衡量核心集构建算法性能的两个主要指标是算法的运行时间和算法输出的核心集大小。在本文中，我们研究了 $(k,z)$ 聚类问题的核心集构建，该问题是 $k$ 均值和 $k$ 中值问题的推广。通过正确设计基于草图的距离估计数据结构，我们提出了更快的算法，可以构建与最先进结果的大小相匹配的核心集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近线性时间且近最优大小的coreset算法，用于解决(k,z)-聚类问题。
AI.motivation: Coreset在机器学习聚类问题中具有重要作用，但现有算法在运行时间和coreset大小之间存在权衡，需同时优化两者。
AI.method: 设计基于sketching的距離估計數據結構，並結合此結構提出更高效的coreset構造算法。
AI.result: 實現了與最新結果相同規模的coreset構造，且時間複雜度接近線性。
AI.conclusion: 通過創新數據結構設計，成功在近線性時間內構造出近優規模的coreset，為聚類問題提供更高效解決方案。

authors_text: Parker C. Lusk,Kaveh Fathian,Jonathan P. How
title: MIXER: Multiattribute, Multiway Fusion of Uncertain Pairwise Affinities
title_zh: MIXER：不确定成对亲和力的多属性、多路融合
abstract: We present a multiway fusion algorithm capable of directly processing uncertain pairwise affinities. In contrast to existing works that require initial pairwise associations, our MIXER algorithm improves accuracy by leveraging the additional information provided by pairwise affinities. Our main contribution is a multiway fusion formulation that is particularly suited to processing non-binary affinities and a novel continuous relaxation whose solutions are guaranteed to be binary, thus avoiding the typical, but potentially problematic, solution binarization steps that may cause infeasibility. A crucial insight of our formulation is that it allows for three modes of association, ranging from non-match, undecided, and match. Exploiting this insight allows fusion to be delayed for some data pairs until more information is available, which is an effective feature for fusion of data with multiple attributes/information sources. We evaluate MIXER on typical synthetic data and benchmark datasets and show increased accuracy against the state of the art in multiway matching, especially in noisy regimes with low observation redundancy. Additionally, we collect RGB data of cars in a parking lot to demonstrate MIXER's ability to fuse data having multiple attributes (color, visual appearance, and bounding box). On this challenging dataset, MIXER achieves 74% F1 accuracy and is 49x faster than the next best algorithm, which has 42% accuracy. Open source code is available at https://github.com/mit-acl/mixer.
summary: We present a multiway fusion algorithm capable of directly processing uncertain pairwise affinities. In contrast to existing works that require initial pairwise associations, our MIXER algorithm improves accuracy by leveraging the additional information provided by pairwise affinities. Our main contribution is a multiway fusion formulation that is particularly suited to processing non-binary affinities and a novel continuous relaxation whose solutions are guaranteed to be binary, thus avoiding the typical, but potentially problematic, solution binarization steps that may cause infeasibility. A crucial insight of our formulation is that it allows for three modes of association, ranging from non-match, undecided, and match. Exploiting this insight allows fusion to be delayed for some data pairs until more information is available, which is an effective feature for fusion of data with multiple attributes/information sources. We evaluate MIXER on typical synthetic data and benchmark datasets and show increased accuracy against the state of the art in multiway matching, especially in noisy regimes with low observation redundancy. Additionally, we collect RGB data of cars in a parking lot to demonstrate MIXER's ability to fuse data having multiple attributes (color, visual appearance, and bounding box). On this challenging dataset, MIXER achieves 74% F1 accuracy and is 49x faster than the next best algorithm, which has 42% accuracy. Open source code is available at https://github.com/mit-acl/mixer.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种能够直接处理不确定的成对亲和力的多路融合算法。与需要初始成对关联的现有工作相比，我们的 MIXER 算法通过利用成对亲和力提供的附加信息来提高准确性。我们的主要贡献是一种多路融合公式，特别适合处理非二元亲和力，以及一种新颖的连续松弛，其解决方案保证是二元的，从而避免了典型但可能存在问题的解决方案二值化步骤，可能导致不可行性。我们的公式的一个重要见解是它允许三种关联模式，从不匹配、未决定和匹配。利用这种洞察力可以延迟某些数据对的融合，直到有更多信息可用，这是融合多个属性/信息源的数据的有效功能。我们在典型的合成数据和基准数据集上评估 MIXER，并显示出与多路匹配中最先进的技术相比，准确性有所提高，特别是在观察冗余度较低的噪声情况下。此外，我们还收集停车场中汽车的 RGB 数据，以证明 MIXER 融合具有多个属性（颜色、视觉外观和边界框）的数据的能力。在这个具有挑战性的数据集上，MIXER 实现了 74% 的 F1 准确度，并且比次佳算法（准确度为 42%）快 49 倍。开源代码可在 https://github.com/mit-acl/mixer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIXER算法，用于处理不确定的成对亲和力的多属性多向融合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖初始成对关联，而MIXER通过利用额外的亲和力信息提升准确性，并避免二值化步骤带来的问题。
AI.method: 设计多向融合公式处理非二值亲和力，并引入保证二值解的连续松弛方法，支持非匹配、未决和匹配三种关联模式。
AI.result: 在合成数据和基准数据集上表现优于现有方法，尤其在噪声环境下；在多属性车辆数据集上达到74% F1值，速度为竞品算法的49倍。
AI.conclusion: MIXER通过延迟融合策略有效处理多属性数据，在准确性和效率上均优于现有方法。

search_text: MIXER: Multiattribute, Multiway Fusion of Uncertain Pairwise Affinities MIXER：不确定成对亲和力的多属性、多路融合 We present a multiway fusion algorithm capable of directly processing uncertain pairwise affinities. In contrast to existing works that require initial pairwise associations, our MIXER algorithm improves accuracy by leveraging the additional information provided by pairwise affinities. Our main contribution is a multiway fusion formulation that is particularly suited to processing non-binary affinities and a novel continuous relaxation whose solutions are guaranteed to be binary, thus avoiding the typical, but potentially problematic, solution binarization steps that may cause infeasibility. A crucial insight of our formulation is that it allows for three modes of association, ranging from non-match, undecided, and match. Exploiting this insight allows fusion to be delayed for some data pairs until more information is available, which is an effective feature for fusion of data with multiple attributes/information sources. We evaluate MIXER on typical synthetic data and benchmark datasets and show increased accuracy against the state of the art in multiway matching, especially in noisy regimes with low observation redundancy. Additionally, we collect RGB data of cars in a parking lot to demonstrate MIXER's ability to fuse data having multiple attributes (color, visual appearance, and bounding box). On this challenging dataset, MIXER achieves 74% F1 accuracy and is 49x faster than the next best algorithm, which has 42% accuracy. Open source code is available at https://github.com/mit-acl/mixer. 我们提出了一种能够直接处理不确定的成对亲和力的多路融合算法。与需要初始成对关联的现有工作相比，我们的 MIXER 算法通过利用成对亲和力提供的附加信息来提高准确性。我们的主要贡献是一种多路融合公式，特别适合处理非二元亲和力，以及一种新颖的连续松弛，其解决方案保证是二元的，从而避免了典型但可能存在问题的解决方案二值化步骤，可能导致不可行性。我们的公式的一个重要见解是它允许三种关联模式，从不匹配、未决定和匹配。利用这种洞察力可以延迟某些数据对的融合，直到有更多信息可用，这是融合多个属性/信息源的数据的有效功能。我们在典型的合成数据和基准数据集上评估 MIXER，并显示出与多路匹配中最先进的技术相比，准确性有所提高，特别是在观察冗余度较低的噪声情况下。此外，我们还收集停车场中汽车的 RGB 数据，以证明 MIXER 融合具有多个属性（颜色、视觉外观和边界框）的数据的能力。在这个具有挑战性的数据集上，MIXER 实现了 74% 的 F1 准确度，并且比次佳算法（准确度为 42%）快 49 倍。开源代码可在 https://github.com/mit-acl/mixer 获取。 本文提出MIXER算法，用于处理不确定的成对亲和力的多属性多向融合。 Parker C. Lusk,Kaveh Fathian,Jonathan P. How cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Hazem Fahmy,Fabrizio Pastore,Lionel Briand
title: HUDD: A tool to debug DNNs for safety analysis
title_zh: HUDD：调试 DNN 进行安全分析的工具
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.00863
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2002.00863
abstract: We present HUDD, a tool that supports safety analysis practices for systems enabled by Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) by automatically identifying the root causes for DNN errors and retraining the DNN. HUDD stands for Heatmap-based Unsupervised Debugging of DNNs, it automatically clusters error-inducing images whose results are due to common subsets of DNN neurons. The intent is for the generated clusters to group error-inducing images having common characteristics, that is, having a common root cause. HUDD identifies root causes by applying a clustering algorithm to matrices (i.e., heatmaps) capturing the relevance of every DNN neuron on the DNN outcome. Also, HUDD retrains DNNs with images that are automatically selected based on their relatedness to the identified image clusters. Our empirical evaluation with DNNs from the automotive domain have shown that HUDD automatically identifies all the distinct root causes of DNN errors, thus supporting safety analysis. Also, our retraining approach has shown to be more effective at improving DNN accuracy than existing approaches. A demo video of HUDD is available at https://youtu.be/drjVakP7jdU.
summary: We present HUDD, a tool that supports safety analysis practices for systems enabled by Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) by automatically identifying the root causes for DNN errors and retraining the DNN. HUDD stands for Heatmap-based Unsupervised Debugging of DNNs, it automatically clusters error-inducing images whose results are due to common subsets of DNN neurons. The intent is for the generated clusters to group error-inducing images having common characteristics, that is, having a common root cause. HUDD identifies root causes by applying a clustering algorithm to matrices (i.e., heatmaps) capturing the relevance of every DNN neuron on the DNN outcome. Also, HUDD retrains DNNs with images that are automatically selected based on their relatedness to the identified image clusters. Our empirical evaluation with DNNs from the automotive domain have shown that HUDD automatically identifies all the distinct root causes of DNN errors, thus supporting safety analysis. Also, our retraining approach has shown to be more effective at improving DNN accuracy than existing approaches. A demo video of HUDD is available at https://youtu.be/drjVakP7jdU.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 HUDD，这是一种工具，通过自动识别 DNN 错误的根本原因并重新训练 DNN，支持深度神经网络 (DNN) 启用的系统的安全分析实践。 HUDD 代表基于热图的 DNN 无监督调试，它自动对诱发错误的图像进行聚类，其结果是由于 DNN 神经元的公共子集而产生的。目的是让生成的簇对具有共同特征（即具有共同根本原因）的引发错误的图像进行分组。 HUDD 通过将聚类算法应用于矩阵（即热图）来捕获每个 DNN 神经元与 DNN 结果的相关性，从而识别根本原因。此外，HUDD 使用根据图像与已识别图像簇的相关性自动选择的图像重新训练 DNN。我们对汽车领域 DNN 的实证评估表明，HUDD 自动识别 DNN 错误的所有不同根本原因，从而支持安全分析。此外，我们的再训练方法在提高 DNN 准确性方面比现有方法更有效。 HUDD 的演示视频可在 https://youtu.be/drjVakP7jdU 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HUDD工具，通过自动识别深度神经网络（DNN）错误的根本原因并重新训练DNN，支持安全分析实践。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效识别DNN错误的根本原因，且在安全关键领域（如汽车）中缺乏高效的调试工具，需开发自动化解决方案以提升DNN安全性。
AI.method: 基于热力图的无监督聚类方法，通过分析神经元相关性矩阵对错误图像进行分组，定位共同根因，并针对相关簇选择图像进行重新训练。
AI.result: 在汽车领域DNN的实证评估显示，HUDD能自动识别所有错误根因，且其重新训练方法比现有方法更有效提升模型准确性。
AI.conclusion: HUDD为DNN安全分析提供了自动化调试框架，通过根因识别与针对性重训练显著提升模型可靠性，适用于安全关键场景。

authors_text: Juncheng Liu,Bryan Hooi,Kenji Kawaguchi,Xiaokui Xiao
title: MGNNI: Multiscale Graph Neural Networks with Implicit Layers
title_zh: MGNNI：具有隐式层的多尺度图神经网络
abstract: Recently, implicit graph neural networks (GNNs) have been proposed to capture long-range dependencies in underlying graphs. In this paper, we introduce and justify two weaknesses of implicit GNNs: the constrained expressiveness due to their limited effective range for capturing long-range dependencies, and their lack of ability to capture multiscale information on graphs at multiple resolutions. To show the limited effective range of previous implicit GNNs, We first provide a theoretical analysis and point out the intrinsic relationship between the effective range and the convergence of iterative equations used in these models. To mitigate the mentioned weaknesses, we propose a multiscale graph neural network with implicit layers (MGNNI) which is able to model multiscale structures on graphs and has an expanded effective range for capturing long-range dependencies. We conduct comprehensive experiments for both node classification and graph classification to show that MGNNI outperforms representative baselines and has a better ability for multiscale modeling and capturing of long-range dependencies.
summary: Recently, implicit graph neural networks (GNNs) have been proposed to capture long-range dependencies in underlying graphs. In this paper, we introduce and justify two weaknesses of implicit GNNs: the constrained expressiveness due to their limited effective range for capturing long-range dependencies, and their lack of ability to capture multiscale information on graphs at multiple resolutions. To show the limited effective range of previous implicit GNNs, We first provide a theoretical analysis and point out the intrinsic relationship between the effective range and the convergence of iterative equations used in these models. To mitigate the mentioned weaknesses, we propose a multiscale graph neural network with implicit layers (MGNNI) which is able to model multiscale structures on graphs and has an expanded effective range for capturing long-range dependencies. We conduct comprehensive experiments for both node classification and graph classification to show that MGNNI outperforms representative baselines and has a better ability for multiscale modeling and capturing of long-range dependencies.
abstract_zh: 最近，隐式图神经网络（GNN）被提出来捕获底层图中的远程依赖关系。在本文中，我们介绍并证明了隐式 GNN 的两个弱点：由于捕获远程依赖关系的有效范围有限而导致表达能力受到限制，以及缺乏在多种分辨率下捕获图上的多尺度信息的能力。为了显示先前隐式 GNN 的有限有效范围，我们首先提供理论分析并指出有效范围与这些模型中使用的迭代方程的收敛性之间的内在关系。为了缓解上述弱点，我们提出了一种具有隐式层的多尺度图神经网络（MGNNI），它能够在图上对多尺度结构进行建模，并具有扩展的有效范围来捕获远程依赖关系。我们对节点分类和图分类进行了全面的实验，以表明 MGNNI 优于代表性基线，并且具有更好的多尺度建模和捕获远程依赖关系的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MGNNI的多尺度图神经网络，旨在解决隐式图神经网络在捕捉长距离依赖关系和多尺度信息方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 隐式图神经网络虽然能够捕捉长距离依赖关系，但其表达能力受限，且无法有效捕捉多尺度信息。
AI.method: 通过理论分析揭示了隐式图神经网络有效范围与迭代方程收敛之间的关系，并提出了MGNNI模型，以增强其捕捉长距离依赖和多尺度信息的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，MGNNI在节点分类和图分类任务上优于现有基线模型，具有更好的多尺度建模和长距离依赖捕捉能力。
AI.conclusion: MGNNI有效解决了隐式图神经网络的局限性，在多尺度建模和长距离依赖捕捉方面表现出色。

method: 通过理论分析揭示了隐式图神经网络有效范围与迭代方程收敛之间的关系，并提出了MGNNI模型，以增强其捕捉长距离依赖和多尺度信息的能力。
result: 实验表明，MGNNI在节点分类和图分类任务上优于现有基线模型，具有更好的多尺度建模和长距离依赖捕捉能力。
conclusion: MGNNI有效解决了隐式图神经网络的局限性，在多尺度建模和长距离依赖捕捉方面表现出色。
search_text: MGNNI: Multiscale Graph Neural Networks with Implicit Layers MGNNI：具有隐式层的多尺度图神经网络 Recently, implicit graph neural networks (GNNs) have been proposed to capture long-range dependencies in underlying graphs. In this paper, we introduce and justify two weaknesses of implicit GNNs: the constrained expressiveness due to their limited effective range for capturing long-range dependencies, and their lack of ability to capture multiscale information on graphs at multiple resolutions. To show the limited effective range of previous implicit GNNs, We first provide a theoretical analysis and point out the intrinsic relationship between the effective range and the convergence of iterative equations used in these models. To mitigate the mentioned weaknesses, we propose a multiscale graph neural network with implicit layers (MGNNI) which is able to model multiscale structures on graphs and has an expanded effective range for capturing long-range dependencies. We conduct comprehensive experiments for both node classification and graph classification to show that MGNNI outperforms representative baselines and has a better ability for multiscale modeling and capturing of long-range dependencies. 最近，隐式图神经网络（GNN）被提出来捕获底层图中的远程依赖关系。在本文中，我们介绍并证明了隐式 GNN 的两个弱点：由于捕获远程依赖关系的有效范围有限而导致表达能力受到限制，以及缺乏在多种分辨率下捕获图上的多尺度信息的能力。为了显示先前隐式 GNN 的有限有效范围，我们首先提供理论分析并指出有效范围与这些模型中使用的迭代方程的收敛性之间的内在关系。为了缓解上述弱点，我们提出了一种具有隐式层的多尺度图神经网络（MGNNI），它能够在图上对多尺度结构进行建模，并具有扩展的有效范围来捕获远程依赖关系。我们对节点分类和图分类进行了全面的实验，以表明 MGNNI 优于代表性基线，并且具有更好的多尺度建模和捕获远程依赖关系的能力。 本文提出了一种名为MGNNI的多尺度图神经网络，旨在解决隐式图神经网络在捕捉长距离依赖关系和多尺度信息方面的不足。 Juncheng Liu,Bryan Hooi,Kenji Kawaguchi,Xiaokui Xiao cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Adrian Bojko,Romain Dupont,Mohamed Tamaazousti,Hervé Le Borgne
title: Self-Improving SLAM in Dynamic Environments: Learning When to Mask
title_zh: 动态环境中的自我改进 SLAM：学习何时屏蔽
abstract: Visual SLAM - Simultaneous Localization and Mapping - in dynamic environments typically relies on identifying and masking image features on moving objects to prevent them from negatively affecting performance. Current approaches are suboptimal: they either fail to mask objects when needed or, on the contrary, mask objects needlessly. Thus, we propose a novel SLAM that learns when masking objects improves its performance in dynamic scenarios. Given a method to segment objects and a SLAM, we give the latter the ability of Temporal Masking, i.e., to infer when certain classes of objects should be masked to maximize any given SLAM metric. We do not make any priors on motion: our method learns to mask moving objects by itself. To prevent high annotations costs, we created an automatic annotation method for self-supervised training. We constructed a new dataset, named ConsInv, which includes challenging real-world dynamic sequences respectively indoors and outdoors. Our method reaches the state of the art on the TUM RGB-D dataset and outperforms it on KITTI and ConsInv datasets.
summary: Visual SLAM - Simultaneous Localization and Mapping - in dynamic environments typically relies on identifying and masking image features on moving objects to prevent them from negatively affecting performance. Current approaches are suboptimal: they either fail to mask objects when needed or, on the contrary, mask objects needlessly. Thus, we propose a novel SLAM that learns when masking objects improves its performance in dynamic scenarios. Given a method to segment objects and a SLAM, we give the latter the ability of Temporal Masking, i.e., to infer when certain classes of objects should be masked to maximize any given SLAM metric. We do not make any priors on motion: our method learns to mask moving objects by itself. To prevent high annotations costs, we created an automatic annotation method for self-supervised training. We constructed a new dataset, named ConsInv, which includes challenging real-world dynamic sequences respectively indoors and outdoors. Our method reaches the state of the art on the TUM RGB-D dataset and outperforms it on KITTI and ConsInv datasets.
abstract_zh: 视觉 SLAM（同时定位和建图）在动态环境中通常依赖于识别和屏蔽移动物体上的图像特征，以防止它们对性能产生负面影响。当前的方法不是最理想的：它们要么无法在需要时掩盖对象，要么相反，不必要地掩盖对象。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的 SLAM，它可以学习何时屏蔽对象，从而提高其在动态场景中的性能。给定一种分割对象的方法和 SLAM，我们赋予后者 Temporal Masking 的能力，即推断何时应屏蔽某些类别的对象以最大化任何给定的 SLAM 指标。我们不对运动做任何先验：我们的方法学会自行掩盖运动物体。为了防止高昂的注释成本，我们创建了一种用于自我监督训练的自动注释方法。我们构建了一个名为 ConsInv 的新数据集，其中包括室内和室外具有挑战性的现实世界动态序列。我们的方法在 TUM RGB-D 数据集上达到了最先进的水平，并且在 KITTI 和 ConsInv 数据集上的表现优于它。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应遮罩机制的SLAM方法，通过学习动态环境中何时遮罩移动物体以提升定位与建图性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM在动态场景中因遮罩策略不精准导致性能下降，需解决过度遮罩或漏遮罩问题以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 引入时间遮罩机制，使SLAM系统自主学习遮罩时机；结合自监督训练的自动标注方法，构建包含室内外动态序列的ConsInv数据集。
AI.result: 在TUM RGB-D数据集上达到SOTA，在KITTI和ConsInv数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态遮罩策略优化提升了SLAM在复杂动态环境中的性能，同时新数据集为相关研究提供支持。

authors_text: Tianying Ji,Yu Luo,Fuchun Sun,Mingxuan Jing,Fengxiang He,Wenbing Huang
title: When to Update Your Model: Constrained Model-based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 何时更新模型：基于约束模型的强化学习
abstract: Designing and analyzing model-based RL (MBRL) algorithms with guaranteed monotonic improvement has been challenging, mainly due to the interdependence between policy optimization and model learning. Existing discrepancy bounds generally ignore the impacts of model shifts, and their corresponding algorithms are prone to degrade performance by drastic model updating. In this work, we first propose a novel and general theoretical scheme for a non-decreasing performance guarantee of MBRL. Our follow-up derived bounds reveal the relationship between model shifts and performance improvement. These discoveries encourage us to formulate a constrained lower-bound optimization problem to permit the monotonicity of MBRL. A further example demonstrates that learning models from a dynamically-varying number of explorations benefit the eventual returns. Motivated by these analyses, we design a simple but effective algorithm CMLO (Constrained Model-shift Lower-bound Optimization), by introducing an event-triggered mechanism that flexibly determines when to update the model. Experiments show that CMLO surpasses other state-of-the-art methods and produces a boost when various policy optimization methods are employed.
summary: Designing and analyzing model-based RL (MBRL) algorithms with guaranteed monotonic improvement has been challenging, mainly due to the interdependence between policy optimization and model learning. Existing discrepancy bounds generally ignore the impacts of model shifts, and their corresponding algorithms are prone to degrade performance by drastic model updating. In this work, we first propose a novel and general theoretical scheme for a non-decreasing performance guarantee of MBRL. Our follow-up derived bounds reveal the relationship between model shifts and performance improvement. These discoveries encourage us to formulate a constrained lower-bound optimization problem to permit the monotonicity of MBRL. A further example demonstrates that learning models from a dynamically-varying number of explorations benefit the eventual returns. Motivated by these analyses, we design a simple but effective algorithm CMLO (Constrained Model-shift Lower-bound Optimization), by introducing an event-triggered mechanism that flexibly determines when to update the model. Experiments show that CMLO surpasses other state-of-the-art methods and produces a boost when various policy optimization methods are employed.
abstract_zh: 设计和分析具有保证单调改进的基于模型的强化学习 (MBRL) 算法一直具有挑战性，这主要是由于策略优化和模型学习之间的相互依赖。现有的差异界限通常忽略模型变化的影响，并且其相应的算法很容易因剧烈的模型更新而降低性能。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一种新颖且通用的 MBRL 性能保证不递减的理论方案。我们后续的推导范围揭示了模型转变和性能改进之间的关系。这些发现鼓励我们制定一个约束下界优化问题，以允许 MBRL 的单调性。另一个例子表明，从动态变化的探索次数中学习模型有利于最终的回报。受这些分析的启发，我们设计了一种简单但有效的算法 CMLO（约束模型转换下界优化），通过引入事件触发机制来灵活确定何时更新模型。实验表明，CMLO 超越了其他最先进的方法，并在采用各种策略优化方法时产生了提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种约束模型变化下限优化方法，解决模型更新时机问题以确保基于模型的强化学习的单调性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有MBRL算法因忽略模型变化影响，频繁更新模型导致性能下降，需设计保证单调改进的算法。
AI.method: 提出CMLO算法，通过事件触发机制灵活确定模型更新时机，并建立约束下限优化问题以确保性能单调性。
AI.result: 实验表明CMLO在多个基准任务中优于现有先进方法，且在不同策略优化方法下均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析与算法设计，有效解决了MBRL中模型更新时机问题，为单调性能提升提供了理论保证和实用方案。

authors_text: Shaoming Xu,Ankush Khandelwal,Xiang Li,Xiaowei Jia,Licheng Liu,Jared Willard,Rahul Ghosh,Kelly Cutler,Michael Steinbach,Christopher Duffy,John Nieber,Vipin Kumar
title: Mini-Batch Learning Strategies for modeling long term temporal dependencies: A study in environmental applications
title_zh: 用于建模长期时间依赖性的小批量学习策略：环境应用研究
comment: 1. Add experiments results on LSTM and Transformer. 2. Update Time efficiency table (table 4). 3. Share codes and data
comments: 1. Add experiments results on LSTM and Transformer. 2. Update Time efficiency table (table 4). 3. Share codes and data
abstract: In many environmental applications, recurrent neural networks (RNNs) are often used to model physical variables with long temporal dependencies. However, due to mini-batch training, temporal relationships between training segments within the batch (intra-batch) as well as between batches (inter-batch) are not considered, which can lead to limited performance. Stateful RNNs aim to address this issue by passing hidden states between batches. Since Stateful RNNs ignore intra-batch temporal dependency, there exists a trade-off between training stability and capturing temporal dependency. In this paper, we provide a quantitative comparison of different Stateful RNN modeling strategies, and propose two strategies to enforce both intra- and inter-batch temporal dependency. First, we extend Stateful RNNs by defining a batch as a temporally ordered set of training segments, which enables intra-batch sharing of temporal information. While this approach significantly improves the performance, it leads to much larger training times due to highly sequential training. To address this issue, we further propose a new strategy which augments a training segment with an initial value of the target variable from the timestep right before the starting of the training segment. In other words, we provide an initial value of the target variable as additional input so that the network can focus on learning changes relative to that initial value. By using this strategy, samples can be passed in any order (mini-batch training) which significantly reduces the training time while maintaining the performance. In demonstrating our approach in hydrological modeling, we observe that the most significant gains in predictive accuracy occur when these methods are applied to state variables whose values change more slowly, such as soil water and snowpack, rather than continuously moving flux variables such as streamflow.

To address this issue, we further propose a new strategy which augments a training segment with an initial value of the target variable from the timestep right before the starting of the training segment. In other words, we provide an initial value of the target variable as additional input so that the network can focus on learning changes relative to that initial value. By using this strategy, samples can be passed in any order (mini-batch training) which significantly reduces the training time while maintaining the performance. In demonstrating our approach in hydrological modeling, we observe that the most significant gains in predictive accuracy occur when these methods are applied to state variables whose values change more slowly, such as soil water and snowpack, rather than continuously moving flux variables such as streamflow.
abstract_zh: 在许多环境应用中，循环神经网络 (RNN) 通常用于对具有长时间依赖性的物理变量进行建模。然而，由于小批量训练，不考虑批次内（批次内）以及批次之间（批次间）训练片段之间的时间关系，这可能导致性能有限。有状态 RNN 旨在通过在批次之间传递隐藏状态来解决这个问题。由于有状态 RNN 忽略批次内时间依赖性，因此训练稳定性和捕获时间依赖性之间存在权衡。在本文中，我们对不同的 Stateful RNN 建模策略进行了定量比较，并提出了两种策略来强制执行批内和批间时间依赖性。首先，我们通过将批次定义为按时间顺序排列的训练片段集来扩展有状态 RNN，从而实现批次内共享时间信息。虽然这种方法显着提高了性能，但由于高度连续的训练，它导致训练时间更长。为了解决这个问题，我们进一步提出了一种新策略，该策略使用训练段开始之前的时间步中的目标变量的初始值来增强训练段。换句话说，我们提供目标变量的初始值作为附加输入，以便网络可以专注于学习相对于该初始值的变化。通过使用这种策略，样本可以以任何顺序传递（小批量训练），这在保持性能的同时显着减少了训练时间。在演示我们的水文建模方法时，我们观察到，当这些方法应用于值变化较慢的状态变量（例如土壤水和积雪）而不是连续移动的通量变量（例如水流）时，预测准确性会得到最显着的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在环境应用中通过改进小批量训练策略，解决循环神经网络（RNN）建模长期时间依赖性的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 传统小批量训练忽略批次内和批次间的时间依赖关系，导致RNN在建模环境变量时性能受限，而状态RNN虽能处理跨批次依赖，但无法兼顾批次内依赖，存在训练稳定性与时间依赖性之间的权衡。
AI.method: 提出两种策略：1) 将批次定义为时间有序的训练片段集合，实现批次内时间信息共享；2) 在训练片段输入中添加目标变量的初始值，使网络学习相对于初始值的变化，从而支持无序小批量训练。
AI.result: 在水文建模实验中，方法对土壤水分和积雪等缓慢变化状态变量的预测精度提升显著，而对流速等连续变化通量变量提升较小。
AI.conclusion: 所提策略有效平衡了时间依赖性与训练效率，尤其适用于缓慢变化的环境变量建模，且第二种策略显著降低训练时间。

search_text: Mini-Batch Learning Strategies for modeling long term temporal dependencies: A study in environmental applications 用于建模长期时间依赖性的小批量学习策略：环境应用研究 In many environmental applications, recurrent neural networks (RNNs) are often used to model physical variables with long temporal dependencies. However, due to mini-batch training, temporal relationships between training segments within the batch (intra-batch) as well as between batches (inter-batch) are not considered, which can lead to limited performance. Stateful RNNs aim to address this issue by passing hidden states between batches. Since Stateful RNNs ignore intra-batch temporal dependency, there exists a trade-off between training stability and capturing temporal dependency. In this paper, we provide a quantitative comparison of different Stateful RNN modeling strategies, and propose two strategies to enforce both intra- and inter-batch temporal dependency. First, we extend Stateful RNNs by defining a batch as a temporally ordered set of training segments, which enables intra-batch sharing of temporal information. While this approach significantly improves the performance, it leads to much larger training times due to highly sequential training. To address this issue, we further propose a new strategy which augments a training segment with an initial value of the target variable from the timestep right before the starting of the training segment. In other words, we provide an initial value of the target variable as additional input so that the network can focus on learning changes relative to that initial value. By using this strategy, samples can be passed in any order (mini-batch training) which significantly reduces the training time while maintaining the performance. In demonstrating our approach in hydrological modeling, we observe that the most significant gains in predictive accuracy occur when these methods are applied to state variables whose values change more slowly, such as soil water and snowpack, rather than continuously moving flux variables such as streamflow. 在许多环境应用中，循环神经网络 (RNN) 通常用于对具有长时间依赖性的物理变量进行建模。然而，由于小批量训练，不考虑批次内（批次内）以及批次之间（批次间）训练片段之间的时间关系，这可能导致性能有限。有状态 RNN 旨在通过在批次之间传递隐藏状态来解决这个问题。由于有状态 RNN 忽略批次内时间依赖性，因此训练稳定性和捕获时间依赖性之间存在权衡。在本文中，我们对不同的 Stateful RNN 建模策略进行了定量比较，并提出了两种策略来强制执行批内和批间时间依赖性。首先，我们通过将批次定义为按时间顺序排列的训练片段集来扩展有状态 RNN，从而实现批次内共享时间信息。虽然这种方法显着提高了性能，但由于高度连续的训练，它导致训练时间更长。为了解决这个问题，我们进一步提出了一种新策略，该策略使用训练段开始之前的时间步中的目标变量的初始值来增强训练段。换句话说，我们提供目标变量的初始值作为附加输入，以便网络可以专注于学习相对于该初始值的变化。通过使用这种策略，样本可以以任何顺序传递（小批量训练），这在保持性能的同时显着减少了训练时间。在演示我们的水文建模方法时，我们观察到，当这些方法应用于值变化较慢的状态变量（例如土壤水和积雪）而不是连续移动的通量变量（例如水流）时，预测准确性会得到最显着的提高。 本文研究了在环境应用中通过改进小批量训练策略，解决循环神经网络（RNN）建模长期时间依赖性的性能问题。 Shaoming Xu,Ankush Khandelwal,Xiang Li,Xiaowei Jia,Licheng Liu,Jared Willard,Rahul Ghosh,Kelly Cutler,Michael Steinbach,Christopher Duffy,John Nieber,Vipin Kumar cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Haifeng Li,Jun Cao,Jiawei Zhu,Qinyao Luo,Silu He,Xuyin Wang
title: Augmentation-Free Graph Contrastive Learning of Invariant-Discriminative Representations
title_zh: 不变判别表示的无增强图对比学习
abstract: The pretasks are mainly built on mutual information estimation, which requires data augmentation to construct positive samples with similar semantics to learn invariant signals and negative samples with dissimilar semantics in order to empower representation discriminability. However, an appropriate data augmentation configuration depends heavily on lots of empirical trials such as choosing the compositions of data augmentation techniques and the corresponding hyperparameter settings. We propose an augmentation-free graph contrastive learning method, invariant-discriminative graph contrastive learning (iGCL), that does not intrinsically require negative samples. iGCL designs the invariant-discriminative loss (ID loss) to learn invariant and discriminative representations. On the one hand, ID loss learns invariant signals by directly minimizing the mean square error between the target samples and positive samples in the representation space. On the other hand, ID loss ensures that the representations are discriminative by an orthonormal constraint forcing the different dimensions of representations to be independent of each other. This prevents representations from collapsing to a point or subspace. Our theoretical analysis explains the effectiveness of ID loss from the perspectives of the redundancy reduction criterion, canonical correlation analysis, and information bottleneck principle. The experimental results demonstrate that iGCL outperforms all baselines on 5 node classification benchmark datasets. iGCL also shows superior performance for different label ratios and is capable of resisting graph attacks, which indicates that iGCL has excellent generalization and robustness. The source code is available at https://github.com/lehaifeng/T-GCN/tree/master/iGCL.
summary: The pretasks are mainly built on mutual information estimation, which requires data augmentation to construct positive samples with similar semantics to learn invariant signals and negative samples with dissimilar semantics in order to empower representation discriminability. However, an appropriate data augmentation configuration depends heavily on lots of empirical trials such as choosing the compositions of data augmentation techniques and the corresponding hyperparameter settings. We propose an augmentation-free graph contrastive learning method, invariant-discriminative graph contrastive learning (iGCL), that does not intrinsically require negative samples. iGCL designs the invariant-discriminative loss (ID loss) to learn invariant and discriminative representations. On the one hand, ID loss learns invariant signals by directly minimizing the mean square error between the target samples and positive samples in the representation space. On the other hand, ID loss ensures that the representations are discriminative by an orthonormal constraint forcing the different dimensions of representations to be independent of each other. This prevents representations from collapsing to a point or subspace. Our theoretical analysis explains the effectiveness of ID loss from the perspectives of the redundancy reduction criterion, canonical correlation analysis, and information bottleneck principle. The experimental results demonstrate that iGCL outperforms all baselines on 5 node classification benchmark datasets. iGCL also shows superior performance for different label ratios and is capable of resisting graph attacks, which indicates that iGCL has excellent generalization and robustness. The source code is available at https://github.com/lehaifeng/T-GCN/tree/master/iGCL.
abstract_zh: 预任务主要建立在互信息估计的基础上，这需要数据增强来构造具有相似语义的正样本，以学习不变信号和具有不同语义的负样本，以增强表示可区分性。然而，适当的数据增强配置在很大程度上取决于大量的经验试验，例如选择数据增强技术的组合和相应的超参数设置。我们提出了一种无增强图对比学习方法，即不变判别图对比学习（iGCL），它本质上不需要负样本。 iGCL 设计了不变判别损失（ID 损失）来学习不变和判别表示。一方面，ID损失通过直接最小化表示空间中目标样本和正样本之间的均方误差来学习不变信号。另一方面，ID 损失通过正交约束强制表示的不同维度彼此独立，确保表示具有区分性。这可以防止表示折叠成点或子空间。我们的理论分析从冗余减少准则、典型相关分析和信息瓶颈原理的角度解释了ID丢失的有效性。实验结果表明，iGCL 在 5 节点分类基准数据集上优于所有基线。 iGCL还针对不同的标签比例表现出优异的性能，并且能够抵抗图攻击，这表明iGCL具有出色的泛化性和鲁棒性。源代码位于https://github.com/lehaifeng/T-GCN/tree/master/iGCL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需数据增强的图对比学习方法iGCL，通过设计不变-判别损失（ID损失）学习图的不变且判别表示。
AI.motivation: 现有图对比学习方法依赖数据增强生成正负样本，但增强策略配置需大量经验尝试，且负样本引入复杂性。本文旨在消除对数据增强的依赖，提升方法鲁棒性与通用性。
AI.method: iGCL通过ID损失实现双重目标：1）利用表示空间中目标样本与正样本的均方误差最小化学习不变特征；2）通过正交约束确保表示维度独立性以保持判别性。理论分析从冗余减少、典型相关分析和信息瓶颈原理阐释其有效性。
AI.result: 在5个节点分类基准数据集上，iGCL优于所有基线方法，且在不同标签比例下表现稳定，能有效抵御图攻击，验证了其优越的泛化性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: iGCL通过创新性损失函数设计，实现了无需数据增强的图表示学习，为图对比学习提供了新思路，代码已开源。

Our theoretical analysis explains the effectiveness of ID loss from the perspectives of the redundancy reduction criterion, canonical correlation analysis, and information bottleneck principle. The experimental results demonstrate that iGCL outperforms all baselines on 5 node classification benchmark datasets. iGCL also shows superior performance for different label ratios and is capable of resisting graph attacks, which indicates that iGCL has excellent generalization and robustness. The source code is available at https://github.com/lehaifeng/T-GCN/tree/master/iGCL. 预任务主要建立在互信息估计的基础上，这需要数据增强来构造具有相似语义的正样本，以学习不变信号和具有不同语义的负样本，以增强表示可区分性。然而，适当的数据增强配置在很大程度上取决于大量的经验试验，例如选择数据增强技术的组合和相应的超参数设置。我们提出了一种无增强图对比学习方法，即不变判别图对比学习（iGCL），它本质上不需要负样本。 iGCL 设计了不变判别损失（ID 损失）来学习不变和判别表示。一方面，ID损失通过直接最小化表示空间中目标样本和正样本之间的均方误差来学习不变信号。另一方面，ID 损失通过正交约束强制表示的不同维度彼此独立，确保表示具有区分性。这可以防止表示折叠成点或子空间。我们的理论分析从冗余减少准则、典型相关分析和信息瓶颈原理的角度解释了ID丢失的有效性。实验结果表明，iGCL 在 5 节点分类基准数据集上优于所有基线。 iGCL还针对不同的标签比例表现出优异的性能，并且能够抵抗图攻击，这表明iGCL具有出色的泛化性和鲁棒性。源代码位于https://github.com/lehaifeng/T-GCN/tree/master/iGCL。 本文提出一种无需数据增强的图对比学习方法iGCL，通过设计不变-判别损失（ID损失）学习图的不变且判别表示。 Haifeng Li,Jun Cao,Jiawei Zhu,Qinyao Luo,Silu He,Xuyin Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Qi Zhang,Yifei Wang,Yisen Wang
title: How Mask Matters: Towards Theoretical Understandings of Masked Autoencoders
title_zh: 掩模如何重要：对掩模自动编码器的理论理解
abstract: Masked Autoencoders (MAE) based on a reconstruction task have risen to be a promising paradigm for self-supervised learning (SSL) and achieve state-of-the-art performance across different benchmark datasets. However, despite its impressive empirical success, there is still limited theoretical understanding of it. In this paper, we propose a theoretical understanding of how masking matters for MAE to learn meaningful features. We establish a close connection between MAE and contrastive learning, which shows that MAE implicit aligns the mask-induced positive pairs. Built upon this connection, we develop the first downstream guarantees for MAE methods, and analyze the effect of mask ratio. Besides, as a result of the implicit alignment, we also point out the dimensional collapse issue of MAE, and propose a Uniformity-enhanced MAE (U-MAE) loss that can effectively address this issue and bring significant improvements on real-world datasets, including CIFAR-10, ImageNet-100, and ImageNet-1K. Code is available at (https://github.com/zhangq327/U-MAE).
summary: Masked Autoencoders (MAE) based on a reconstruction task have risen to be a promising paradigm for self-supervised learning (SSL) and achieve state-of-the-art performance across different benchmark datasets. However, despite its impressive empirical success, there is still limited theoretical understanding of it. In this paper, we propose a theoretical understanding of how masking matters for MAE to learn meaningful features. We establish a close connection between MAE and contrastive learning, which shows that MAE implicit aligns the mask-induced positive pairs. Built upon this connection, we develop the first downstream guarantees for MAE methods, and analyze the effect of mask ratio. Besides, as a result of the implicit alignment, we also point out the dimensional collapse issue of MAE, and propose a Uniformity-enhanced MAE (U-MAE) loss that can effectively address this issue and bring significant improvements on real-world datasets, including CIFAR-10, ImageNet-100, and ImageNet-1K. Code is available at (https://github.com/zhangq327/U-MAE).
abstract_zh: 基于重建任务的掩模自动编码器（MAE）已成为自监督学习（SSL）的一种有前景的范例，并在不同的基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。然而，尽管其在实证上取得了令人印象深刻的成功，但对其的理论理解仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了关于掩蔽对于 MAE 学习有意义特征的重要性的理论理解。我们在 MAE 和对比学习之间建立了密切的联系，这表明 MAE 隐式对齐了掩模引起的正对。在此基础上，我们开发了 MAE 方法的第一个下游保证，并分析了掩模比的影响。此外，由于隐式对齐，我们还指出了MAE的维度崩溃问题，并提出了一种均匀性增强的MAE（U-MAE）损失，可以有效解决这个问题，并对现实世界的数据集（包括CIFAR-10、ImageNet-100和ImageNet-1K）带来显着的改进。代码可在（https://github.com/zhangq327/U-MAE）获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从理论上解释掩码自编码器（MAE）中掩码机制如何影响其学习有意义特征的过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管掩码自编码器在自监督学习中表现出色，但其理论基础仍不明确，缺乏对掩码机制作用的系统性理解。
AI.method: 通过建立MAE与对比学习的联系，揭示掩码诱导的正样本对隐式对齐机制，分析掩码比例的影响，并提出统一性增强的U-MAE损失函数以解决维度坍缩问题。
AI.result: 理论推导了MAE的下游任务保证，分析了掩码比例的影响，U-MAE在CIFAR-10、ImageNet-100等数据集上显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 掩码机制通过隐式对齐正样本促进特征学习，U-MAE通过增强统一性有效缓解维度坍缩，为MAE的理论分析提供新视角。

title: Toward Next-Generation Artificial Intelligence: Catalyzing the NeuroAI Revolution
title_zh: 迈向下一代人工智能：催化神经人工智能革命
comment: White paper, 10 pages + 8 pages of references, 1 figures
comments: White paper, 10 pages + 8 pages of references, 1 figures
abstract: Neuroscience has long been an essential driver of progress in artificial intelligence (AI). We propose that to accelerate progress in AI, we must invest in fundamental research in NeuroAI. A core component of this is the embodied Turing test, which challenges AI animal models to interact with the sensorimotor world at skill levels akin to their living counterparts. The embodied Turing test shifts the focus from those capabilities like game playing and language that are especially well-developed or uniquely human to those capabilities, inherited from over 500 million years of evolution, that are shared with all animals. Building models that can pass the embodied Turing test will provide a roadmap for the next generation of AI.
summary: Neuroscience has long been an essential driver of progress in artificial intelligence (AI). We propose that to accelerate progress in AI, we must invest in fundamental research in NeuroAI. A core component of this is the embodied Turing test, which challenges AI animal models to interact with the sensorimotor world at skill levels akin to their living counterparts. The embodied Turing test shifts the focus from those capabilities like game playing and language that are especially well-developed or uniquely human to those capabilities, inherited from over 500 million years of evolution, that are shared with all animals. Building models that can pass the embodied Turing test will provide a roadmap for the next generation of AI.
abstract_zh: 神经科学长期以来一直是人工智能（AI）进步的重要驱动力。我们建议，要加速人工智能的进步，必须投资神经人工智能的基础研究。其中的核心组成部分是具体的图灵测试，它挑战人工智能动物模型，使其以类似于活生生动物的技能水平与感觉运动世界互动。体现的图灵测试将焦点从那些特别发达或人类独有的游戏和语言等能力转移到了从 5 亿多年的进化中继承下来的所有动物所共有的能力。构建可以通过图灵测试的模型将为下一代人工智能提供路线图。

AI.tldr: 提出下一代人工智能的发展方向，通过NeuroAI基础研究，特别是具身图灵测试，推动AI模型在感知和运动能力上的突破。
AI.motivation: 传统AI过于关注人类独特能力（如游戏和语言），忽视了动物共有的进化能力，需通过NeuroAI研究推动更全面的AI发展。
AI.method: 提出具身图灵测试作为核心方法，要求AI模型在传感器和运动交互中达到类似生物的技能水平。
AI.result: 构建能通过具身图灵测试的模型，为下一代AI提供发展路径。
AI.conclusion: NeuroAI研究，尤其是具身图灵测试，是推动下一代AI发展的关键途径，需加强基础研究以实现更全面的AI能力。

ai_content.tldr: 提出下一代人工智能的发展方向，通过NeuroAI基础研究，特别是具身图灵测试，推动AI模型在感知和运动能力上的突破。
