tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的混合系统LAD，用于通过分析患者眼动信息来诊断良性阵发性位置性眩晕（BPPV）的六种类型。
motivation: BPPV的诊断依赖于医生对患者眼动的主观观察，存在误判风险。开发自动化辅助系统可提高诊断准确性和效率。
method: 系统包含两个流：1）RNN流提取双眼RGB图像的视觉特征和光流信息，进行三分类（左右后半规管或其他）；2）瞳孔检测流对非后半规管病例进行分类，判断跳动方向和强度以区分地垂型和天垂型BPPV。
result: 在验证集上达到91%的总体准确率，后半规管分类准确率为93%，地垂型和天垂型分类准确率分别为95%。
conclusion: LAD通过整合视觉特征与瞳孔动态分析，为BPPV诊断提供了高精度的自动化解决方案，验证了医疗AI在辅助诊断中的潜力。
search_text: LAD: A Hybrid Deep Learning System for Benign Paroxysmal Positional Vertigo Disorders Diagnostic LAD：用于良性阵发性位置性眩晕疾病诊断的混合深度学习系统 Herein, we introduce "Look and Diagnose" (LAD), a hybrid deep learning-based system that aims to support doctors in the medical field in diagnosing effectively the Benign Paroxysmal Positional Vertigo (BPPV) disorder. Given the body postures of the patient in the Dix-Hallpike and lateral head turns test, the visual information of both eyes is captured and fed into LAD for analyzing and classifying into one of six possible disorders the patient might be suffering from. The proposed system consists of two streams: (1) an RNN-based stream that takes raw RGB images of both eyes to extract visual features and optical flow of each eye followed by ternary classification to determine left/right posterior canal (PC) or other; and (2) pupil detector stream that detects the pupil when it is classified as Non-PC and classifies the direction and strength of the beating to categorize the Non-PC types into the remaining four classes: Geotropic BPPV (left and right) and Apogeotropic BPPV (left and right). Experimental results show that with the patient's body postures, the system can accurately classify given BPPV disorder into the six types of disorders with an accuracy of 91% on the validation set. The proposed method can successfully classify disorders with an accuracy of 93% for the Posterior Canal disorder and 95% for the Geotropic and Apogeotropic disorder, paving a potential direction for research with the medical data. 在此，我们介绍“观察与诊断”（LAD），这是一种基于深度学习的混合系统，旨在支持医学领域的医生有效诊断良性阵发性位置性眩晕（BPPV）疾病。考虑到 Dix-Hallpike 和侧头转动测试中患者的身体姿势，双眼的视觉信息被捕获并输入 LAD，用于分析和分类为患者可能患有的六种可能的疾病之一。所提出的系统由两个流组成：（1）基于 RNN 的流，获取双眼的原始 RGB 图像来提取每只眼睛的视觉特征和光流，然后进行三元分类以确定左/右后管（PC）或其他； (2) 瞳孔检测器流，当瞳孔被分类为非 PC 时检测瞳孔，并对跳动的方向和强度进行分类，以将非 PC 类型分为其余四类：向地性 BPPV（左和右）和远向性 BPPV（左和右）。实验结果表明，根据患者的身体姿势，系统可以准确地将给定的 BPPV 疾病分为六类疾病，在验证集上的准确率达到 91%。所提出的方法可以成功地对后管疾病进行疾病分类，准确率达到 93%，对向地性和逆向性疾病的准确率达到 95%，为医学数据研究奠定了潜在的方向。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的混合系统LAD，用于通过分析患者眼动信息来诊断良性阵发性位置性眩晕（BPPV）的六种类型。 Trung Xuan Pham,Jin Woong Choi,Rusty John Lloyd Mina,Thanh Nguyen,Sultan Rizky Madjid,Chang Dong Yoo cs.CV

authors_text: Óscar Gil,Alberto Sanfeliu
title: Robot Navigation Anticipative Strategies in Deep Reinforcement Motion Planning
title_zh: 深度强化运动规划中的机器人导航预期策略
comment: This is a preprint. This paper has been accepted to the fifth Iberian Robotics Conference (Robot 2022)
comments: This is a preprint. This paper has been accepted to the fifth Iberian Robotics Conference (Robot 2022)
abstract: The navigation of robots in dynamic urban environments, requires elaborated anticipative strategies for the robot to avoid collisions with dynamic objects, like bicycles or pedestrians, and to be human aware. We have developed and analyzed three anticipative strategies in motion planning taking into account the future motion of the mobile objects that can move up to 18 km/h. First, we have used our hybrid policy resulting from a Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) training and the Social Force Model (SFM), and we have tested it in simulation in four complex map scenarios with many pedestrians. Second, we have used these anticipative strategies in real-life experiments using the hybrid motion planning method and the ROS Navigation Stack with Dynamic Windows Approach (NS-DWA). The results in simulations and real-life experiments show very good results in open environments and also in mixed scenarios with narrow spaces.
summary: The navigation of robots in dynamic urban environments, requires elaborated anticipative strategies for the robot to avoid collisions with dynamic objects, like bicycles or pedestrians, and to be human aware. We have developed and analyzed three anticipative strategies in motion planning taking into account the future motion of the mobile objects that can move up to 18 km/h. First, we have used our hybrid policy resulting from a Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) training and the Social Force Model (SFM), and we have tested it in simulation in four complex map scenarios with many pedestrians. Second, we have used these anticipative strategies in real-life experiments using the hybrid motion planning method and the ROS Navigation Stack with Dynamic Windows Approach (NS-DWA). The results in simulations and real-life experiments show very good results in open environments and also in mixed scenarios with narrow spaces.
abstract_zh: 机器人在动态城市环境中的导航需要精心设计的预期策略，以避免与自行车或行人等动态物体发生碰撞，并具有人类意识。我们开发并分析了运动规划中的三种预期策略，考虑到运动速度最高可达 18 km/h 的移动物体的未来运动。首先，我们使用了深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）训练和社会力模型（SFM）产生的混合策略，并在四个有许多行人的复杂地图场景中进行了模拟测试。其次，我们在现实实验中使用了这些预期策略，使用混合运动规划方法和采用动态窗口方法的 ROS 导航堆栈 (NS-DWA)。模拟和现实实验的结果在开放环境以及狭窄空间的混合场景中都显示出非常好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了机器人在动态城市环境中导航时的预见策略，开发并测试了三种结合未来运动预测的避障方法。
AI.motivation: 动态环境中机器人需预测行人/车辆运动轨迹以避免碰撞，传统方法难以应对复杂场景中高速移动的动态障碍物。
AI.method: 提出混合策略：1) 结合DDPG深度强化学习与社会力模型进行仿真测试；2) 基于ROS导航栈的NS-DWA方法进行实物实验，验证多场景适应性。
AI.result: 仿真与实物实验均显示，所提策略在开放区域及狭窄空间混合场景中表现出优异的避障性能和路径规划能力。
AI.conclusion: 融合深度学习与物理模型的预见策略能有效提升动态环境下的机器人导航安全性，为复杂场景应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yingjian Wang,Xiangyong Wen,Yanjun Cao,Chao Xu,Fei Gao
title: Bearing-based Relative Localization for Robotic Swarm with Partially Mutual Observations
title_zh: 具有部分相互观测的机器人群基于方位的相对定位
abstract: Mutual localization provides a consensus of reference frame as an essential basis for cooperation in multirobot systems. Previous works have developed certifiable and robust solvers for relative transformation estimation between each pair of robots. However, recovering relative poses for robotic swarm with partially mutual observations is still an unexploited problem. In this paper, we present a complete algorithm for it with optimality, scalability and robustness. Firstly, we fuse all odometry and bearing measurements in a unified minimization problem among the Stiefel manifold. Furthermore, we relax the original non-convex problem into a semi-definite programming (SDP) problem with a strict tightness guarantee. Then, to hold the exactness in noised cases, we add a convex (linear) rank cost and apply a convex iteration algorithm. We compare our approach with local optimization methods on extensive simulations with different robot amounts under various noise levels to show our global optimality and scalability advantage. Finally, we conduct real-world experiments to show the practicality and robustness.
summary: Mutual localization provides a consensus of reference frame as an essential basis for cooperation in multirobot systems. Previous works have developed certifiable and robust solvers for relative transformation estimation between each pair of robots. However, recovering relative poses for robotic swarm with partially mutual observations is still an unexploited problem. In this paper, we present a complete algorithm for it with optimality, scalability and robustness. Firstly, we fuse all odometry and bearing measurements in a unified minimization problem among the Stiefel manifold. Furthermore, we relax the original non-convex problem into a semi-definite programming (SDP) problem with a strict tightness guarantee. Then, to hold the exactness in noised cases, we add a convex (linear) rank cost and apply a convex iteration algorithm. We compare our approach with local optimization methods on extensive simulations with different robot amounts under various noise levels to show our global optimality and scalability advantage. Finally, we conduct real-world experiments to show the practicality and robustness.
abstract_zh: 相互定位提供了参考系的共识，作为多机器人系统合作的重要基础。之前的工作已经开发了可认证且强大的求解器，用于每对机器人之间的相对变换估计。然而，通过部分相互观察来恢复机器人群的相对姿势仍然是一个尚未开发的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一个完整的算法，具有最优性、可扩展性和鲁棒性。首先，我们将所有里程计和方位测量融合在 Stiefel 流形中的统一最小化问题中。此外，我们将原始非凸问题放松为具有严格紧密性保证的半定规划（SDP）问题。然后，为了保持噪声情况下的准确性，我们添加凸（线性）秩成本并应用凸迭代算法。我们将我们的方法与局部优化方法进行了广泛的模拟，在不同的噪声水平下对不同的机器人数量进行了比较，以展示我们的全局最优性和可扩展性优势。最后，我们进行了现实世界的实验来证明实用性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种具有最优性、可扩展性和鲁棒性的算法，用于在部分相互观测的机器人集群中实现基于轴承的相对定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法处理部分相互观测的机器人集群的相对位姿恢复问题，需开发具有全局最优性和鲁棒性的算法。
AI.method: 在Stiefel流形中融合里程计和轴承测量，松弛为半定规划问题，并引入凸秩成本与凸迭代算法以保证噪声下的精确性。
AI.result: 通过仿真和实际实验验证了算法的全局最优性、可扩展性及鲁棒性，证明了其在不同噪声水平下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种完整的算法，有效解决了部分相互观测下机器人集群的相对定位问题，具有全局最优性、可扩展性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Sheel Shah,Shubham Gupta
title: Reinforcement Learning for ConnectX
title_zh: ConnectX 的强化学习
abstract: ConnectX is a two-player game that generalizes the popular game Connect 4. The objective is to get X coins across a row, column, or diagonal of an M x N board. The first player to do so wins the game. The parameters (M, N, X) are allowed to change in each game, making ConnectX a novel and challenging problem. In this paper, we present our work on the implementation and modification of various reinforcement learning algorithms to play ConnectX.
summary: ConnectX is a two-player game that generalizes the popular game Connect 4. The objective is to get X coins across a row, column, or diagonal of an M x N board. The first player to do so wins the game. The parameters (M, N, X) are allowed to change in each game, making ConnectX a novel and challenging problem. In this paper, we present our work on the implementation and modification of various reinforcement learning algorithms to play ConnectX.
abstract_zh: ConnectX 是一款两人游戏，概括了流行游戏 Connect 4。目标是在 M x N 棋盘的行、列或对角线上获得 X 个硬币。第一个这样做的玩家赢得了比赛。参数（M、N、X）在每个游戏中都可以改变，这使得 ConnectX 成为一个新颖且具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们介绍了我们在玩 ConnectX 时实施和修改各种强化学习算法的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过实现和改进多种强化学习算法，使AI能够有效应对参数可变的ConnectX游戏。
AI.motivation: ConnectX游戏的参数（M, N, X）可动态变化，导致传统算法难以适应，因此需要探索强化学习在该动态环境中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 作者实施并调整了多种强化学习算法，针对ConnectX的变参数特性进行优化，以提升AI在不同游戏设置下的决策能力。
AI.result: 成功训练出能够在不同参数配置下进行ConnectX游戏的AI模型，验证了强化学习方法的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习在处理参数动态变化的ConnectX游戏中表现出有效性，未来可进一步优化算法以提高效率和泛化能力。

authors_text: Haoran Hong,Eduardo Pavez,Antonio Ortega,Ryosuke Watanabe,Keisuke Nonaka
title: Motion estimation and filtered prediction for dynamic point cloud attribute compression
title_zh: 动态点云属性压缩的运动估计和滤波预测
abstract: In point cloud compression, exploiting temporal redundancy for inter predictive coding is challenging because of the irregular geometry. This paper proposes an efficient block-based inter-coding scheme for color attribute compression. The scheme includes integer-precision motion estimation and an adaptive graph based in-loop filtering scheme for improved attribute prediction. The proposed block-based motion estimation scheme consists of an initial motion search that exploits geometric and color attributes, followed by a motion refinement that only minimizes color prediction error. To further improve color prediction, we propose a vertex-domain low-pass graph filtering scheme that can adaptively remove noise from predictors computed from motion estimation with different accuracy. Our experiments demonstrate significant coding gain over state-of-the-art coding methods.
summary: In point cloud compression, exploiting temporal redundancy for inter predictive coding is challenging because of the irregular geometry. This paper proposes an efficient block-based inter-coding scheme for color attribute compression. The scheme includes integer-precision motion estimation and an adaptive graph based in-loop filtering scheme for improved attribute prediction. The proposed block-based motion estimation scheme consists of an initial motion search that exploits geometric and color attributes, followed by a motion refinement that only minimizes color prediction error. To further improve color prediction, we propose a vertex-domain low-pass graph filtering scheme that can adaptively remove noise from predictors computed from motion estimation with different accuracy. Our experiments demonstrate significant coding gain over state-of-the-art coding methods.
abstract_zh: 在点云压缩中，由于几何形状不规则，利用时间冗余进行帧间预测编码具有挑战性。本文提出了一种有效的基于块的颜色属性压缩帧间编码方案。该方案包括整数精度运动估计和基于自适应图的环路滤波方案，以改进属性预测。所提出的基于块的运动估计方案包括利用几何和颜色属性的初始运动搜索，以及仅最小化颜色预测误差的运动细化。为了进一步改进颜色预测，我们提出了一种顶点域低通图滤波方案，该方案可以自适应地去除根据不同精度的运动估计计算出的预测器中的噪声。我们的实验证明了与最先进的编码方法相比具有显着的编码增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的块间编码方案，用于动态点云颜色属性压缩，结合运动估计与自适应滤波技术。
AI.motivation: 点云几何结构不规则导致时间冗余利用困难，现有方法在颜色预测精度和噪声抑制方面存在不足。
AI.method: 采用整数精度运动估计分两阶段：几何-颜色联合初搜与仅颜色误差优化的精搜；设计顶点域低通图滤波器自适应去除预测噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明该方案在编码效率上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过联合优化运动估计与自适应滤波，有效提升了动态点云颜色属性压缩性能。

authors_text: Huanjie Wang,Haibin Liu,Wenshuo Wang,Lijun Sun
title: On Trustworthy Decision-Making Process of Human Drivers from the View of Perceptual Uncertainty Reduction
title_zh: 从感知不确定性降低的角度论人类驾驶员的可信决策过程
abstract: Humans are experts in making decisions for challenging driving tasks with uncertainties. Many efforts have been made to model the decision-making process of human drivers at the behavior level. However, limited studies explain how human drivers actively make reliable sequential decisions to complete interactive driving tasks in an uncertain environment. This paper argues that human drivers intently search for actions to reduce the uncertainty of their perception of the environment, i.e., perceptual uncertainty, to a low level that allows them to make a trustworthy decision easily. This paper provides a proof of concept framework to empirically reveal that human drivers' perceptual uncertainty decreases when executing interactive tasks with uncertainties. We first introduce an explainable-artificial intelligence approach (i.e., SHapley Additive exPlanation, SHAP) to determine the salient features on which human drivers make decisions. Then, we use entropy-based measures to quantify the drivers' perceptual changes in these ranked salient features across the decision-making process, reflecting the changes in uncertainties. The validation and verification of our proposed method are conducted in the highway on-ramp merging scenario with congested traffic using the INTERACTION dataset. Experimental results support that human drivers intentionally seek information to reduce their perceptual uncertainties in the number and rank of salient features of their perception of environments to make a trustworthy decision.
summary: Humans are experts in making decisions for challenging driving tasks with uncertainties. Many efforts have been made to model the decision-making process of human drivers at the behavior level. However, limited studies explain how human drivers actively make reliable sequential decisions to complete interactive driving tasks in an uncertain environment. This paper argues that human drivers intently search for actions to reduce the uncertainty of their perception of the environment, i.e., perceptual uncertainty, to a low level that allows them to make a trustworthy decision easily. This paper provides a proof of concept framework to empirically reveal that human drivers' perceptual uncertainty decreases when executing interactive tasks with uncertainties. We first introduce an explainable-artificial intelligence approach (i.e., SHapley Additive exPlanation, SHAP) to determine the salient features on which human drivers make decisions. Then, we use entropy-based measures to quantify the drivers' perceptual changes in these ranked salient features across the decision-making process, reflecting the changes in uncertainties. The validation and verification of our proposed method are conducted in the highway on-ramp merging scenario with congested traffic using the INTERACTION dataset. Experimental results support that human drivers intentionally seek information to reduce their perceptual uncertainties in the number and rank of salient features of their perception of environments to make a trustworthy decision.
abstract_zh: 人类是针对具有不确定性的挑战性驾驶任务做出决策的专家。人们已经做出了许多努力来在行为层面上模拟人类驾驶员的决策过程。然而，有限的研究解释了人类驾驶员如何在不确定的环境中主动做出可靠的顺序决策来完成交互式驾驶任务。本文认为，人类驾驶员会专心寻找行动，以将他们对环境感知的不确定性（即感知不确定性）降低到较低水平，以便他们能够轻松做出值得信赖的决定。本文提供了一个概念验证框架，以实证揭示人类驾驶员在执行具有不确定性的交互任务时感知不确定性会降低。我们首先引入一种可解释的人工智能方法（即 SHapley Additive exPlanation，SHAP）来确定人类驾驶员做出决策的显着特征。然后，我们使用基于熵的度量来量化驾驶员在整个决策过程中对这些排名显着特征的感知变化，反映不确定性的变化。我们提出的方法的验证和验证是在交通拥堵的高速公路入口匝道合并场景中使用 INTERACTION 数据集进行的。实验结果表明，人类驾驶员有意寻求信息，以减少其对环境感知的显着特征的数量和等级的感知不确定性，从而做出值得信赖的决定。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从感知不确定性降低的角度，探讨人类驾驶员在不确定环境中进行可信决策的机制，并提出验证该机制的框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于驾驶员行为建模，但缺乏对驾驶员如何主动降低感知不确定性以完成交互任务的解释，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 采用SHAP方法识别驾驶员决策的关键特征，结合熵值量化感知变化，并通过INTERACTION数据集在高速公路匝道合并场景中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，驾驶员通过降低感知特征的数量和重要性排名来减少不确定性，从而实现可信决策。
AI.conclusion: 人类驾驶员通过主动获取信息降低感知不确定性，该框架有效揭示了其决策过程的核心机制。

Experimental results support that human drivers intentionally seek information to reduce their perceptual uncertainties in the number and rank of salient features of their perception of environments to make a trustworthy decision. 人类是针对具有不确定性的挑战性驾驶任务做出决策的专家。人们已经做出了许多努力来在行为层面上模拟人类驾驶员的决策过程。然而，有限的研究解释了人类驾驶员如何在不确定的环境中主动做出可靠的顺序决策来完成交互式驾驶任务。本文认为，人类驾驶员会专心寻找行动，以将他们对环境感知的不确定性（即感知不确定性）降低到较低水平，以便他们能够轻松做出值得信赖的决定。本文提供了一个概念验证框架，以实证揭示人类驾驶员在执行具有不确定性的交互任务时感知不确定性会降低。我们首先引入一种可解释的人工智能方法（即 SHapley Additive exPlanation，SHAP）来确定人类驾驶员做出决策的显着特征。然后，我们使用基于熵的度量来量化驾驶员在整个决策过程中对这些排名显着特征的感知变化，反映不确定性的变化。我们提出的方法的验证和验证是在交通拥堵的高速公路入口匝道合并场景中使用 INTERACTION 数据集进行的。实验结果表明，人类驾驶员有意寻求信息，以减少其对环境感知的显着特征的数量和等级的感知不确定性，从而做出值得信赖的决定。 本文旨在从感知不确定性降低的角度，探讨人类驾驶员在不确定环境中进行可信决策的机制，并提出验证该机制的框架。 Huanjie Wang,Haibin Liu,Wenshuo Wang,Lijun Sun cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Chao Wang,Joerg Deigmoeller
title: A User Interface for Sense-making of the Reasoning Process while Interacting with Robots
title_zh: 与机器人交互时推理过程有意义的用户界面
abstract: As knowledge graph has the potential to bridge the gap between commonsense knowledge and reasoning over actionable capabilities of mobile robotic platforms, incorporating knowledge graph into robotic system attracted increasing attention in recent years. Previously, graph visualization has been used wildly by developers to make sense of knowledge representations. However, due to lacking the link between abstract knowledge of the real-world environment and the robot's actions, transitional visualization tools are incompatible for expert-user to understand, test, supervise and modify the graph-based reasoning system with the embodiment of the robots. Therefore, we developed an interface which enables robotic experts to send commands to the robot in natural language, then interface visualizes the procedures of the robot mapping the command to the functions for querying in the commonsense knowledge database, links the result to the real world instances in a 3D map and demonstrate the execution of the robot from the first-person perspective of the robot. After 3 weeks of usage of the system by robotic experts in their daily development, some feedback was collected, which provides insight for designing such systems.
summary: As knowledge graph has the potential to bridge the gap between commonsense knowledge and reasoning over actionable capabilities of mobile robotic platforms, incorporating knowledge graph into robotic system attracted increasing attention in recent years. Previously, graph visualization has been used wildly by developers to make sense of knowledge representations. However, due to lacking the link between abstract knowledge of the real-world environment and the robot's actions, transitional visualization tools are incompatible for expert-user to understand, test, supervise and modify the graph-based reasoning system with the embodiment of the robots. Therefore, we developed an interface which enables robotic experts to send commands to the robot in natural language, then interface visualizes the procedures of the robot mapping the command to the functions for querying in the commonsense knowledge database, links the result to the real world instances in a 3D map and demonstrate the execution of the robot from the first-person perspective of the robot. After 3 weeks of usage of the system by robotic experts in their daily development, some feedback was collected, which provides insight for designing such systems.
abstract_zh: 由于知识图有潜力弥合常识知识和移动机器人平台可操作能力推理之间的差距，因此近年来将知识图纳入机器人系统引起了越来越多的关注。此前，开发人员广泛使用图形可视化来理解知识表示。然而，由于缺乏现实世界环境的抽象知识和机器人动作之间的联系，过渡可视化工具不适合专家用户理解、测试、监督和修改基于图的推理系统与机器人的具体化。因此，我们开发了一个界面，使机器人专家能够用自然语言向机器人发送命令，然后界面将机器人将命令映射到常识知识数据库中用于查询的功能的过程可视化，将结果链接到3D地图中的现实世界实例，并从机器人的第一人称视角演示机器人的执行情况。机器人专家在日常开发中使用该系统三周后，收集了一些反馈，这为设计此类系统提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个用户界面，帮助专家在与机器人交互时理解基于知识图谱的推理过程。
AI.motivation: 现有可视化工具无法将现实环境的抽象知识与机器人动作关联，导致专家难以理解和修改基于知识图谱的推理系统。
AI.method: 开发支持自然语言指令的界面，可视化机器人将指令映射为知识库查询的过程，并在3D地图中链接结果与现实实例，展示机器人执行过程。
AI.result: 专家使用三周后反馈表明，该系统有助于理解、测试和调整机器人推理流程。
AI.conclusion: 集成知识图谱与机器人系统的可视化界面能有效提升专家对推理过程的掌控力，为未来设计提供参考。

authors_text: Yinger Zhang,Zhouyi Wu,Peiying Lin,Yang Pan,Yuting Wu,Liufang Zhang,Jiangtao Huangfu
title: Hand Gestures Recognition in Videos Taken with Lensless Camera
title_zh: 无镜头相机拍摄的视频中的手势识别
abstract: A lensless camera is an imaging system that uses a mask in place of a lens, making it thinner, lighter, and less expensive than a lensed camera. However, additional complex computation and time are required for image reconstruction. This work proposes a deep learning model named Raw3dNet that recognizes hand gestures directly on raw videos captured by a lensless camera without the need for image restoration. In addition to conserving computational resources, the reconstruction-free method provides privacy protection. Raw3dNet is a novel end-to-end deep neural network model for the recognition of hand gestures in lensless imaging systems. It is created specifically for raw video captured by a lensless camera and has the ability to properly extract and combine temporal and spatial features. The network is composed of two stages: 1. spatial feature extractor (SFE), which enhances the spatial features of each frame prior to temporal convolution; 2. 3D-ResNet, which implements spatial and temporal convolution of video streams. The proposed model achieves 98.59% accuracy on the Cambridge Hand Gesture dataset in the lensless optical experiment, which is comparable to the lensed-camera result. Additionally, the feasibility of physical object recognition is assessed. Furtherly, we show that the recognition can be achieved with respectable accuracy using only a tiny portion of the original raw data, indicating the potential for reducing data traffic in cloud computing scenarios.
summary: A lensless camera is an imaging system that uses a mask in place of a lens, making it thinner, lighter, and less expensive than a lensed camera. However, additional complex computation and time are required for image reconstruction. This work proposes a deep learning model named Raw3dNet that recognizes hand gestures directly on raw videos captured by a lensless camera without the need for image restoration. In addition to conserving computational resources, the reconstruction-free method provides privacy protection. Raw3dNet is a novel end-to-end deep neural network model for the recognition of hand gestures in lensless imaging systems. It is created specifically for raw video captured by a lensless camera and has the ability to properly extract and combine temporal and spatial features. The network is composed of two stages: 1. spatial feature extractor (SFE), which enhances the spatial features of each frame prior to temporal convolution; 2. 3D-ResNet, which implements spatial and temporal convolution of video streams. The proposed model achieves 98.59% accuracy on the Cambridge Hand Gesture dataset in the lensless optical experiment, which is comparable to the lensed-camera result. Additionally, the feasibility of physical object recognition is assessed. Furtherly, we show that the recognition can be achieved with respectable accuracy using only a tiny portion of the original raw data, indicating the potential for reducing data traffic in cloud computing scenarios.
abstract_zh: 无镜头相机是一种使用掩模代替镜头的成像系统，使其比带镜头相机更薄、更轻且更便宜。然而，图像重建需要额外的复杂计算和时间。这项工作提出了一种名为 Raw3dNet 的深度学习模型，可以直接在无镜头相机捕获的原始视频上识别手势，而无需图像恢复。除了节省计算资源之外，免重建方法还提供隐私保护。 Raw3dNet 是一种新颖的端到端深度神经网络模型，用于识别无镜头成像系统中的手势。它是专门为无镜头相机捕获的原始视频创建的，并且能够正确提取和组合时间和空间特征。该网络由两个阶段组成：1.空间特征提取器（SFE），在时间卷积之前增强每帧的空间特征； 2. 3D-ResNet，实现视频流的空间和时间卷积。在无镜头光学实验中，所提出的模型在剑桥手势数据集上实现了 98.59% 的准确率，与镜头相机的结果相当。此外，还评估了物理对象识别的可行性。此外，我们表明，仅使用原始原始数据的一小部分就可以以相当高的精度实现识别，这表明云计算场景中减少数据流量的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需图像重建的深度学习模型Raw3dNet，直接在镜头less相机拍摄的原始视频上进行手部手势识别。
AI.motivation: 镜头less相机虽具有轻薄低成本优势，但图像重建过程复杂耗时。本文旨在通过直接处理原始视频数据，减少计算资源消耗并提升隐私保护，同时探索其在云计算场景下的数据传输优化潜力。
AI.method: 设计端到端神经网络Raw3dNet，包含两个阶段：1. 空间特征提取器（SFE）增强帧间空间特征；2. 3D-ResNet实现时空卷积。模型直接处理原始视频数据，无需图像重建。
AI.result: 在Cambridge手部手势数据集上达到98.59%的识别准确率（与传统相机相当），且证明仅需少量原始数据即可保持较高识别精度。
AI.conclusion: Raw3dNet验证了镜头less相机在手势识别中的可行性，其无需重建的特性兼顾计算效率与隐私保护，为低带宽云计算场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Hengsheng Zhang,Xueyi Zou,Jiaming Guo,Youliang Yan,Rong Xie,Li Song
title: A Codec Information Assisted Framework for Efficient Compressed Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: 高效压缩视频超分辨率编解码器信息辅助框架
abstract: Online processing of compressed videos to increase their resolutions attracts increasing and broad attention. Video Super-Resolution (VSR) using recurrent neural network architecture is a promising solution due to its efficient modeling of long-range temporal dependencies. However, state-of-the-art recurrent VSR models still require significant computation to obtain a good performance, mainly because of the complicated motion estimation for frame/feature alignment and the redundant processing of consecutive video frames. In this paper, considering the characteristics of compressed videos, we propose a Codec Information Assisted Framework (CIAF) to boost and accelerate recurrent VSR models for compressed videos. Firstly, the framework reuses the coded video information of Motion Vectors to model the temporal relationships between adjacent frames. Experiments demonstrate that the models with Motion Vector based alignment can significantly boost the performance with negligible additional computation, even comparable to those using more complex optical flow based alignment. Secondly, by further making use of the coded video information of Residuals, the framework can be informed to skip the computation on redundant pixels. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework can save up to 70% of the computation without performance drop on the REDS4 test videos encoded by H.264 when CRF is 23.
summary: Online processing of compressed videos to increase their resolutions attracts increasing and broad attention. Video Super-Resolution (VSR) using recurrent neural network architecture is a promising solution due to its efficient modeling of long-range temporal dependencies. However, state-of-the-art recurrent VSR models still require significant computation to obtain a good performance, mainly because of the complicated motion estimation for frame/feature alignment and the redundant processing of consecutive video frames. In this paper, considering the characteristics of compressed videos, we propose a Codec Information Assisted Framework (CIAF) to boost and accelerate recurrent VSR models for compressed videos. Firstly, the framework reuses the coded video information of Motion Vectors to model the temporal relationships between adjacent frames. Experiments demonstrate that the models with Motion Vector based alignment can significantly boost the performance with negligible additional computation, even comparable to those using more complex optical flow based alignment. Secondly, by further making use of the coded video information of Residuals, the framework can be informed to skip the computation on redundant pixels. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework can save up to 70% of the computation without performance drop on the REDS4 test videos encoded by H.264 when CRF is 23.
abstract_zh: 在线处理压缩视频以提高其分辨率引起了越来越多的广泛关注。使用循环神经网络架构的视频超分辨率 (VSR) 是一种很有前途的解决方案，因为它可以有效地对远程时间依赖性进行建模。然而，最先进的循环 VSR 模型仍然需要大量计算才能获得良好的性能，这主要是因为帧/特征对齐的复杂运动估计以及连续视频帧的冗余处理。在本文中，考虑到压缩视频的特点，我们提出了一种编解码器信息辅助框架（CIAF）来增强和加速压缩视频的循环 VSR 模型。首先，该框架重用运动矢量的编码视频信息来建模相邻帧之间的时间关系。实验表明，具有基于运动矢量的对齐的模型可以通过可忽略的额外计算显着提高性能，甚至可以与使用更复杂的基于光流的对齐的模型相媲美。其次，通过进一步利用残差的编码视频信息，可以通知框架跳过对冗余像素的计算。实验表明，当 CRF 为 23 时，所提出的框架可以在 H.264 编码的 REDS4 测试视频上节省高达 70% 的计算量，且性能不会下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用编解码器信息辅助的高效压缩视频超分辨率框架（CIAF），通过复用压缩视频中的运动矢量和残差信息，减少计算量并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于递归神经网络的视频超分辨率模型计算复杂度高，主要受限于帧间运动估计和冗余帧处理，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: CIAF框架通过复用压缩视频中的运动矢量建模帧间时序关系，并利用残差信息跳过冗余像素计算，从而降低计算开销。
AI.result: 实验表明，CIAF在H.264编码的REDS4测试视频上可节省70%计算量且无性能损失，运动矢量对齐效果接近复杂光流对齐方法。
AI.conclusion: CIAF通过有效利用压缩视频编解码信息，在保证超分辨率质量的同时显著提升了计算效率，为压缩视频处理提供了新思路。

search_text: A Codec Information Assisted Framework for Efficient Compressed Video Super-Resolution 高效压缩视频超分辨率编解码器信息辅助框架 Online processing of compressed videos to increase their resolutions attracts increasing and broad attention. Video Super-Resolution (VSR) using recurrent neural network architecture is a promising solution due to its efficient modeling of long-range temporal dependencies. However, state-of-the-art recurrent VSR models still require significant computation to obtain a good performance, mainly because of the complicated motion estimation for frame/feature alignment and the redundant processing of consecutive video frames. In this paper, considering the characteristics of compressed videos, we propose a Codec Information Assisted Framework (CIAF) to boost and accelerate recurrent VSR models for compressed videos. Firstly, the framework reuses the coded video information of Motion Vectors to model the temporal relationships between adjacent frames. Experiments demonstrate that the models with Motion Vector based alignment can significantly boost the performance with negligible additional computation, even comparable to those using more complex optical flow based alignment. Secondly, by further making use of the coded video information of Residuals, the framework can be informed to skip the computation on redundant pixels. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework can save up to 70% of the computation without performance drop on the REDS4 test videos encoded by H.264 when CRF is 23. 在线处理压缩视频以提高其分辨率引起了越来越多的广泛关注。使用循环神经网络架构的视频超分辨率 (VSR) 是一种很有前途的解决方案，因为它可以有效地对远程时间依赖性进行建模。然而，最先进的循环 VSR 模型仍然需要大量计算才能获得良好的性能，这主要是因为帧/特征对齐的复杂运动估计以及连续视频帧的冗余处理。在本文中，考虑到压缩视频的特点，我们提出了一种编解码器信息辅助框架（CIAF）来增强和加速压缩视频的循环 VSR 模型。首先，该框架重用运动矢量的编码视频信息来建模相邻帧之间的时间关系。实验表明，具有基于运动矢量的对齐的模型可以通过可忽略的额外计算显着提高性能，甚至可以与使用更复杂的基于光流的对齐的模型相媲美。其次，通过进一步利用残差的编码视频信息，可以通知框架跳过对冗余像素的计算。实验表明，当 CRF 为 23 时，所提出的框架可以在 H.264 编码的 REDS4 测试视频上节省高达 70% 的计算量，且性能不会下降。 本文提出了一种利用编解码器信息辅助的高效压缩视频超分辨率框架（CIAF），通过复用压缩视频中的运动矢量和残差信息，减少计算量并提升性能。 Hengsheng Zhang,Xueyi Zou,Jiaming Guo,Youliang Yan,Rong Xie,Li Song cs.CV

authors_text: Adriano Cardace,Riccardo Spezialetti,Pierluigi Zama Ramirez,Samuele Salti,Luigi Di Stefano
title: Self-Distillation for Unsupervised 3D Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于无监督 3D 域适应的自蒸馏
abstract: Point cloud classification is a popular task in 3D vision. However, previous works, usually assume that point clouds at test time are obtained with the same procedure or sensor as those at training time. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) instead, breaks this assumption and tries to solve the task on an unlabeled target domain, leveraging only on a supervised source domain. For point cloud classification, recent UDA methods try to align features across domains via auxiliary tasks such as point cloud reconstruction, which however do not optimize the discriminative power in the target domain in feature space. In contrast, in this work, we focus on obtaining a discriminative feature space for the target domain enforcing consistency between a point cloud and its augmented version. We then propose a novel iterative self-training methodology that exploits Graph Neural Networks in the UDA context to refine pseudo-labels. We perform extensive experiments and set the new state-of-the-art in standard UDA benchmarks for point cloud classification. Finally, we show how our approach can be extended to more complex tasks such as part segmentation.
summary: Point cloud classification is a popular task in 3D vision. However, previous works, usually assume that point clouds at test time are obtained with the same procedure or sensor as those at training time. Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) instead, breaks this assumption and tries to solve the task on an unlabeled target domain, leveraging only on a supervised source domain. For point cloud classification, recent UDA methods try to align features across domains via auxiliary tasks such as point cloud reconstruction, which however do not optimize the discriminative power in the target domain in feature space. In contrast, in this work, we focus on obtaining a discriminative feature space for the target domain enforcing consistency between a point cloud and its augmented version. We then propose a novel iterative self-training methodology that exploits Graph Neural Networks in the UDA context to refine pseudo-labels. We perform extensive experiments and set the new state-of-the-art in standard UDA benchmarks for point cloud classification. Finally, we show how our approach can be extended to more complex tasks such as part segmentation.
abstract_zh: 点云分类是 3D 视觉中的一项热门任务。然而，以前的工作通常假设测试时的点云是通过与训练时相同的程序或传感器获得的。相反，无监督域适应（UDA）打破了这一假设，并尝试仅利用有监督的源域来解决未标记的目标域上的任务。对于点云分类，最近的 UDA 方法尝试通过点云重建等辅助任务跨域对齐特征，但这并没有优化特征空间中目标域的判别能力。相比之下，在这项工作中，我们专注于获得目标域的判别性特征空间，以强制点云与其增强版本之间的一致性。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的迭代自我训练方法，该方法利用 UDA 上下文中的图神经网络来细化伪标签。我们进行了大量的实验，并在标准 UDA 基准中为点云分类设置了最新的技术。最后，我们展示了如何将我们的方法扩展到更复杂的任务，例如零件分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自蒸馏的无监督三维领域自适应方法，通过增强点云一致性与图神经网络迭代优化伪标签，提升点云分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督领域自适应方法依赖辅助任务对齐特征，但未能有效优化目标领域的判别能力，导致分类性能受限。
AI.method: 强制点云与其增强版本在特征空间的一致性，结合图神经网络设计迭代自训练框架，逐步优化目标域伪标签。
AI.result: 在标准UDA基准测试中达到新的SOTA性能，并成功扩展至更复杂的部件分割任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自蒸馏机制有效提升目标域特征判别性，为三维领域自适应提供了新思路与实用框架。

authors_text: Yung-Han Ho,Chih-Hsuan Lin,Peng-Yu Chen,Mu-Jung Chen,Chih-Peng Chang,Wen-Hsiao Peng,Hsueh-Ming Hang
title: Learned Video Compression for YUV 4:2:0 Content Using Flow-based Conditional Inter-frame Coding
title_zh: 使用基于流的条件帧间编码学习 YUV 4:2:0 内容的视频压缩
abstract: This paper proposes a learning-based video compression framework for variable-rate coding on YUV 4:2:0 content. Most existing learning-based video compression models adopt the traditional hybrid-based coding architecture, which involves temporal prediction followed by residual coding. However, recent studies have shown that residual coding is sub-optimal from the information-theoretic perspective. In addition, most existing models are optimized with respect to RGB content. Furthermore, they require separate models for variable-rate coding. To address these issues, this work presents an attempt to incorporate the conditional inter-frame coding for YUV 4:2:0 content. We introduce a conditional flow-based inter-frame coder to improve the inter-frame coding efficiency. To adapt our codec to YUV 4:2:0 content, we adopt a simple strategy of using space-to-depth and depth-to-space conversions. Lastly, we employ a rate-adaption net to achieve variable-rate coding without training multiple models. Experimental results show that our model performs better than x265 on UVG and MCL-JCV datasets in terms of PSNR-YUV. However, on the more challenging datasets from ISCAS'22 GC, there is still ample room for improvement. This insufficient performance is due to the lack of inter-frame coding capability at a large GOP size and can be mitigated by increasing the model capacity and applying an error propagation-aware training strategy.
summary: This paper proposes a learning-based video compression framework for variable-rate coding on YUV 4:2:0 content. Most existing learning-based video compression models adopt the traditional hybrid-based coding architecture, which involves temporal prediction followed by residual coding. However, recent studies have shown that residual coding is sub-optimal from the information-theoretic perspective. In addition, most existing models are optimized with respect to RGB content. Furthermore, they require separate models for variable-rate coding. To address these issues, this work presents an attempt to incorporate the conditional inter-frame coding for YUV 4:2:0 content. We introduce a conditional flow-based inter-frame coder to improve the inter-frame coding efficiency. To adapt our codec to YUV 4:2:0 content, we adopt a simple strategy of using space-to-depth and depth-to-space conversions. Lastly, we employ a rate-adaption net to achieve variable-rate coding without training multiple models. Experimental results show that our model performs better than x265 on UVG and MCL-JCV datasets in terms of PSNR-YUV. However, on the more challenging datasets from ISCAS'22 GC, there is still ample room for improvement. This insufficient performance is due to the lack of inter-frame coding capability at a large GOP size and can be mitigated by increasing the model capacity and applying an error propagation-aware training strategy.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于学习的视频压缩框架，用于对 YUV 4:2:0 内容进行可变速率编码。大多数现有的基于学习的视频压缩模型采用传统的混合编码架构，其中涉及时间预测和残差编码。然而，最近的研究表明，从信息论的角度来看，残差编码并不是最优的。此外，大多数现有模型都针对 RGB 内容进行了优化。此外，它们需要单独的可变速率编码模型。为了解决这些问题，这项工作尝试将 YUV 4:2:0 内容的条件帧间编码纳入其中。我们引入了基于条件流的帧间编码器来提高帧间编码效率。为了使我们的编解码器适应 YUV 4:2:0 内容，我们采用了一种简单的策略，即使用空间到深度和深度到空间转换。最后，我们采用速率适应网络来实现可变速率编码，而无需训练多个模型。实验结果表明，我们的模型在 UVG 和 MCL-JCV 数据集上的 PSNR-YUV 性能优于 x265。然而，在 ISCAS'22 GC 更具挑战性的数据集上，仍有很大的改进空间。这种性能不足的原因是在大 GOP 大小下缺乏帧间编码能力，并且可以通过增加模型容量和应用错误传播感知训练策略来缓解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的视频压缩框架，用于YUV 4:2:0内容的可变比特率编码。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的视频压缩模型采用传统混合编码架构，残差编码信息论视角下非最优，且多针对RGB内容优化，需独立模型实现可变比特率编码。
AI.method: 引入条件流基间帧编码器提升编码效率，通过空域-深度转换适配YUV 4:2:0格式，并采用速率自适应网络实现无需多模型训练的可变比特率编码。
AI.result: 在UVG和MCL-JCV数据集上PSNR-YUV优于x265，但在ISCAS'22 GC数据集表现不足，因大GOP尺寸下帧间编码能力不足。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在YUV 4:2:0内容压缩中有效，但需通过扩大模型规模和引入误差传播感知训练策略进一步提升性能。

search_text: Learned Video Compression for YUV 4:2:0 Content Using Flow-based Conditional Inter-frame Coding 使用基于流的条件帧间编码学习 YUV 4:2:0 内容的视频压缩 This paper proposes a learning-based video compression framework for variable-rate coding on YUV 4:2:0 content. Most existing learning-based video compression models adopt the traditional hybrid-based coding architecture, which involves temporal prediction followed by residual coding. However, recent studies have shown that residual coding is sub-optimal from the information-theoretic perspective. In addition, most existing models are optimized with respect to RGB content. Furthermore, they require separate models for variable-rate coding. To address these issues, this work presents an attempt to incorporate the conditional inter-frame coding for YUV 4:2:0 content. We introduce a conditional flow-based inter-frame coder to improve the inter-frame coding efficiency. To adapt our codec to YUV 4:2:0 content, we adopt a simple strategy of using space-to-depth and depth-to-space conversions. Lastly, we employ a rate-adaption net to achieve variable-rate coding without training multiple models. Experimental results show that our model performs better than x265 on UVG and MCL-JCV datasets in terms of PSNR-YUV. However, on the more challenging datasets from ISCAS'22 GC, there is still ample room for improvement. This insufficient performance is due to the lack of inter-frame coding capability at a large GOP size and can be mitigated by increasing the model capacity and applying an error propagation-aware training strategy. 本文提出了一种基于学习的视频压缩框架，用于对 YUV 4:2:0 内容进行可变速率编码。大多数现有的基于学习的视频压缩模型采用传统的混合编码架构，其中涉及时间预测和残差编码。然而，最近的研究表明，从信息论的角度来看，残差编码并不是最优的。此外，大多数现有模型都针对 RGB 内容进行了优化。此外，它们需要单独的可变速率编码模型。为了解决这些问题，这项工作尝试将 YUV 4:2:0 内容的条件帧间编码纳入其中。我们引入了基于条件流的帧间编码器来提高帧间编码效率。为了使我们的编解码器适应 YUV 4:2:0 内容，我们采用了一种简单的策略，即使用空间到深度和深度到空间转换。最后，我们采用速率适应网络来实现可变速率编码，而无需训练多个模型。实验结果表明，我们的模型在 UVG 和 MCL-JCV 数据集上的 PSNR-YUV 性能优于 x265。然而，在 ISCAS'22 GC 更具挑战性的数据集上，仍有很大的改进空间。这种性能不足的原因是在大 GOP 大小下缺乏帧间编码能力，并且可以通过增加模型容量和应用错误传播感知训练策略来缓解。 本文提出一种基于学习的视频压缩框架，用于YUV 4:2:0内容的可变比特率编码。 Yung-Han Ho,Chih-Hsuan Lin,Peng-Yu Chen,Mu-Jung Chen,Chih-Peng Chang,Wen-Hsiao Peng,Hsueh-Ming Hang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kuang-Huei Lee,Ted Xiao,Adrian Li,Paul Wohlhart,Ian Fischer,Yao Lu
title: PI-QT-Opt: Predictive Information Improves Multi-Task Robotic Reinforcement Learning at Scale
title_zh: PI-QT-Opt：预测信息大规模改进多任务机器人强化学习
comment: CoRL 2022. 21 pages, 9 figures. The supplementary video is available at https://kuanghuei.github.io/piqtopt
comments: CoRL 2022. 21 pages, 9 figures. The supplementary video is available at https://kuanghuei.github.io/piqtopt
abstract: The predictive information, the mutual information between the past and future, has been shown to be a useful representation learning auxiliary loss for training reinforcement learning agents, as the ability to model what will happen next is critical to success on many control tasks. While existing studies are largely restricted to training specialist agents on single-task settings in simulation, in this work, we study modeling the predictive information for robotic agents and its importance for general-purpose agents that are trained to master a large repertoire of diverse skills from large amounts of data. Specifically, we introduce Predictive Information QT-Opt (PI-QT-Opt), a QT-Opt agent augmented with an auxiliary loss that learns representations of the predictive information to solve up to 297 vision-based robot manipulation tasks in simulation and the real world with a single set of parameters. We demonstrate that modeling the predictive information significantly improves success rates on the training tasks and leads to better zero-shot transfer to unseen novel tasks. Finally, we evaluate PI-QT-Opt on real robots, achieving substantial and consistent improvement over QT-Opt in multiple experimental settings of varying environments, skills, and multi-task configurations.
summary: The predictive information, the mutual information between the past and future, has been shown to be a useful representation learning auxiliary loss for training reinforcement learning agents, as the ability to model what will happen next is critical to success on many control tasks. While existing studies are largely restricted to training specialist agents on single-task settings in simulation, in this work, we study modeling the predictive information for robotic agents and its importance for general-purpose agents that are trained to master a large repertoire of diverse skills from large amounts of data. Specifically, we introduce Predictive Information QT-Opt (PI-QT-Opt), a QT-Opt agent augmented with an auxiliary loss that learns representations of the predictive information to solve up to 297 vision-based robot manipulation tasks in simulation and the real world with a single set of parameters. We demonstrate that modeling the predictive information significantly improves success rates on the training tasks and leads to better zero-shot transfer to unseen novel tasks. Finally, we evaluate PI-QT-Opt on real robots, achieving substantial and consistent improvement over QT-Opt in multiple experimental settings of varying environments, skills, and multi-task configurations.
abstract_zh: 预测信息，即过去和未来之间的相互信息，已被证明是训练强化学习代理的有用表示学习辅助损失，因为对接下来发生的事情进行建模的能力对于许多控制任务的成功至关重要。虽然现有的研究主要局限于在模拟中的单任务设置上训练专业智能体，但在这项工作中，我们研究了机器人智能体的预测信息建模及其对于经过训练以从大量数据中掌握大量不同技能的通用智能体的重要性。具体来说，我们引入了预测信息 QT-Opt (PI-QT-Opt)，这是一种增强了辅助损失的 QT-Opt 代理，可以学习预测信息的表示，从而使用一组参数在模拟和现实世界中解决多达 297 个基于视觉的机器人操作任务。我们证明，对预测信息进行建模可以显着提高训练任务的成功率，并可以更好地零样本迁移到未见过的新任务。最后，我们在真实机器人上评估 PI-QT-Opt，在不同环境、技能和多任务配置的多个实验设置中实现了比 QT-Opt 显着且一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 提出PI-QT-Opt方法，通过预测信息提升大规模多任务机器人强化学习的性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法局限于单任务模拟环境，难以扩展到多任务和真实场景，需更通用的机器人学习方案
AI.method: 在QT-Opt框架中引入预测信息辅助损失，学习时空关联表征以解决多任务机器人操作问题
AI.result: 在297个视觉任务中成功率提升，零样本迁移能力增强，并在真实机器人实验中持续优于基线方法
AI.conclusion: 预测信息建模有效提升多任务机器人学习的泛化能力与实际应用效果

authors_text: Yonghui Wang,Wengang Zhou,Zhenbo Lu,Houqiang Li
title: UDoc-GAN: Unpaired Document Illumination Correction with Background Light Prior
title_zh: UDoc-GAN：背景光优先的不成对文档照明校正
abstract: Document images captured by mobile devices are usually degraded by uncontrollable illumination, which hampers the clarity of document content. Recently, a series of research efforts have been devoted to correcting the uneven document illumination. However, existing methods rarely consider the use of ambient light information, and usually rely on paired samples including degraded and the corrected ground-truth images which are not always accessible. To this end, we propose UDoc-GAN, the first framework to address the problem of document illumination correction under the unpaired setting. Specifically, we first predict the ambient light features of the document. Then, according to the characteristics of different level of ambient lights, we re-formulate the cycle consistency constraint to learn the underlying relationship between normal and abnormal illumination domains. To prove the effectiveness of our approach, we conduct extensive experiments on DocProj dataset under the unpaired setting. Compared with the state-of-the-art approaches, our method demonstrates promising performance in terms of character error rate (CER) and edit distance (ED), together with better qualitative results for textual detail preservation. The source code is now publicly available at https://github.com/harrytea/UDoc-GAN.
summary: Document images captured by mobile devices are usually degraded by uncontrollable illumination, which hampers the clarity of document content. Recently, a series of research efforts have been devoted to correcting the uneven document illumination. However, existing methods rarely consider the use of ambient light information, and usually rely on paired samples including degraded and the corrected ground-truth images which are not always accessible. To this end, we propose UDoc-GAN, the first framework to address the problem of document illumination correction under the unpaired setting. Specifically, we first predict the ambient light features of the document. Then, according to the characteristics of different level of ambient lights, we re-formulate the cycle consistency constraint to learn the underlying relationship between normal and abnormal illumination domains. To prove the effectiveness of our approach, we conduct extensive experiments on DocProj dataset under the unpaired setting. Compared with the state-of-the-art approaches, our method demonstrates promising performance in terms of character error rate (CER) and edit distance (ED), together with better qualitative results for textual detail preservation. The source code is now publicly available at https://github.com/harrytea/UDoc-GAN.
abstract_zh: 移动设备捕获的文档图像通常会因无法控制的照明而降低质量，从而影响文档内容的清晰度。最近，一系列的研究工作致力于纠正不均匀的文档照明。然而，现有的方法很少考虑环境光信息的使用，并且通常依赖于配对样本，包括并不总是可访问的降级和校正的地面实况图像。为此，我们提出了 UDoc-GAN，这是第一个解决未配对设置下文档照明校正问题的框架。具体来说，我们首先预测文档的环境光特征。然后，根据不同级别环境光的特征，我们重新制定循环一致性约束，以了解正常和异常照明域之间的潜在关系。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们在未配对设置下对 DocProj 数据集进行了广泛的实验。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在字符错误率（CER）和编辑距离（ED）方面表现出良好的性能，并且在文本细节保留方面具有更好的定性结果。源代码现已在 https://github.com/harrytea/UDoc-GAN 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UDoc-GAN框架，在无配对样本情况下利用背景光先验实现文档图像照明校正。
AI.motivation: 现有文档照明校正方法依赖难以获取的配对样本，且未充分利用环境光信息导致校正效果受限。
AI.method: 通过预测文档环境光特征，结合不同光照水平重构循环一致性约束，建立异常与正常光照域的映射关系。
AI.result: 在DocProj数据集无配对实验中，字符错误率(CER)和编辑距离(ED)指标优于现有方法，文本细节保留效果更优。
AI.conclusion: UDoc-GAN是首个无配对文档照明校正框架，通过环境光先验和循环约束优化，有效提升了校正精度与文本保真度。

ai_content.result: 在DocProj数据集无配对实验中，字符错误率(CER)和编辑距离(ED)指标优于现有方法，文本细节保留效果更优。
ai_content.conclusion: UDoc-GAN是首个无配对文档照明校正框架，通过环境光先验和循环约束优化，有效提升了校正精度与文本保真度。

search_text: UDoc-GAN: Unpaired Document Illumination Correction with Background Light Prior UDoc-GAN：背景光优先的不成对文档照明校正 Document images captured by mobile devices are usually degraded by uncontrollable illumination, which hampers the clarity of document content. Recently, a series of research efforts have been devoted to correcting the uneven document illumination. However, existing methods rarely consider the use of ambient light information, and usually rely on paired samples including degraded and the corrected ground-truth images which are not always accessible. To this end, we propose UDoc-GAN, the first framework to address the problem of document illumination correction under the unpaired setting. Specifically, we first predict the ambient light features of the document. Then, according to the characteristics of different level of ambient lights, we re-formulate the cycle consistency constraint to learn the underlying relationship between normal and abnormal illumination domains. To prove the effectiveness of our approach, we conduct extensive experiments on DocProj dataset under the unpaired setting. Compared with the state-of-the-art approaches, our method demonstrates promising performance in terms of character error rate (CER) and edit distance (ED), together with better qualitative results for textual detail preservation. The source code is now publicly available at https://github.com/harrytea/UDoc-GAN. 移动设备捕获的文档图像通常会因无法控制的照明而降低质量，从而影响文档内容的清晰度。最近，一系列的研究工作致力于纠正不均匀的文档照明。然而，现有的方法很少考虑环境光信息的使用，并且通常依赖于配对样本，包括并不总是可访问的降级和校正的地面实况图像。为此，我们提出了 UDoc-GAN，这是第一个解决未配对设置下文档照明校正问题的框架。具体来说，我们首先预测文档的环境光特征。然后，根据不同级别环境光的特征，我们重新制定循环一致性约束，以了解正常和异常照明域之间的潜在关系。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们在未配对设置下对 DocProj 数据集进行了广泛的实验。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在字符错误率（CER）和编辑距离（ED）方面表现出良好的性能，并且在文本细节保留方面具有更好的定性结果。源代码现已在 https://github.com/harrytea/UDoc-GAN 上公开提供。 本文提出UDoc-GAN框架，在无配对样本情况下利用背景光先验实现文档图像照明校正。 Yonghui Wang,Wengang Zhou,Zhenbo Lu,Houqiang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Shuli Jiang,Robson Leonardo Ferreira Cordeiro,Leman Akoglu
title: D.MCA: Outlier Detection with Explicit Micro-Cluster Assignments
title_zh: D.MCA：使用显式微簇分配进行异常值检测
comment: Proceedings of the 22nd IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM 2022)
comments: Proceedings of the 22nd IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM 2022)
abstract: How can we detect outliers, both scattered and clustered, and also explicitly assign them to respective micro-clusters, without knowing apriori how many micro-clusters exist? How can we perform both tasks in-house, i.e., without any post-hoc processing, so that both detection and assignment can benefit simultaneously from each other? Presenting outliers in separate micro-clusters is informative to analysts in many real-world applications. However, a naïve solution based on post-hoc clustering of the outliers detected by any existing method suffers from two main drawbacks: (a) appropriate hyperparameter values are commonly unknown for clustering, and most algorithms struggle with clusters of varying shapes and densities; (b) detection and assignment cannot benefit from one another. In this paper, we propose D.MCA to $\underline{D}$etect outliers with explicit $\underline{M}$icro-$\underline{C}$luster $\underline{A}$ssignment. Our method performs both detection and assignment iteratively, and in-house, by using a novel strategy that prunes entire micro-clusters out of the training set to improve the performance of the detection. It also benefits from a novel strategy that avoids clustered outliers to mask each other, which is a well-known problem in the literature. Also, D.MCA is designed to be robust to a critical hyperparameter by employing a hyperensemble "warm up" phase. Experiments performed on 16 real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that D.MCA outperforms 8 state-of-the-art competitors, especially on the explicit outlier micro-cluster assignment task.
summary: How can we detect outliers, both scattered and clustered, and also explicitly assign them to respective micro-clusters, without knowing apriori how many micro-clusters exist? How can we perform both tasks in-house, i.e., without any post-hoc processing, so that both detection and assignment can benefit simultaneously from each other? Presenting outliers in separate micro-clusters is informative to analysts in many real-world applications. However, a naïve solution based on post-hoc clustering of the outliers detected by any existing method suffers from two main drawbacks: (a) appropriate hyperparameter values are commonly unknown for clustering, and most algorithms struggle with clusters of varying shapes and densities; (b) detection and assignment cannot benefit from one another. In this paper, we propose D.MCA to $\underline{D}$etect outliers with explicit $\underline{M}$icro-$\underline{C}$luster $\underline{A}$ssignment. Our method performs both detection and assignment iteratively, and in-house, by using a novel strategy that prunes entire micro-clusters out of the training set to improve the performance of the detection. It also benefits from a novel strategy that avoids clustered outliers to mask each other, which is a well-known problem in the literature. Also, D.MCA is designed to be robust to a critical hyperparameter by employing a hyperensemble "warm up" phase. Experiments performed on 16 real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that D.MCA outperforms 8 state-of-the-art competitors, especially on the explicit outlier micro-cluster assignment task.
abstract_zh: 在不知道存在多少个微簇的情况下，我们如何检测分散的和聚集的异常值，并明确地将它们分配给各自的微簇？我们如何在内部执行这两项任务，即无需任何事后处理，以便检测和分配可以同时受益？在单独的微集群中呈现异常值对于许多实际应用中的分析师来说可以提供丰富的信息。然而，基于任何现有方法检测到的异常值的事后聚类的简单解决方案存在两个主要缺点：（a）对于聚类来说，适当的超参数值通常是未知的，并且大多数算法都难以处理不同形状和密度的聚类； (b) 检测和分配不能相互受益。在本文中，我们提出 D.MCA 来通过明确的 $\underline{M}$icro-$\underline{C}$luster $\underline{A}$ssignment 来 $\underline{D}$eect 异常值。我们的方法通过使用一种新颖的策略在内部迭代地执行检测和分配，该策略从训练集中修剪整个微簇以提高检测的性能。它还受益于一种新颖的策略，可以避免聚集的异常值相互掩盖，这是文献中众所周知的问题。此外，D.MCA 设计为通过采用超集成“预热”阶段，对关键超参数具有鲁棒性。在 16 个真实数据集和合成数据集上进行的实验表明，D.MCA 优于 8 个最先进的竞争对手，尤其是在显式异常值微簇分配任务上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出D.MCA方法，旨在无需预设微簇数量的情况下，同时检测离群点并将其显式分配到对应的微簇中。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖后处理聚类，存在超参数选择困难、对复杂形状密度簇适应性差以及检测与分配无法协同优化等问题。
AI.method: 通过迭代策略从训练集中剔除整个微簇以提升检测性能，并采用超集成'预热'阶段增强鲁棒性，同时解决簇内离群点相互掩盖的问题。
AI.result: 在16个真实与合成数据集上，D.MCA在显式微簇分配任务中优于8种先进方法，尤其在复杂场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: D.MCA通过协同优化检测与分配流程，有效解决了离群点检测与微簇结构学习的耦合难题。

authors_text: Mohammad Mahdi Karimi,Azin Heidarshenas,William W. Edmonson
title: Providing Error Detection for Deep Learning Image Classifiers Using Self-Explainability
title_zh: 使用自解释性为深度学习图像分类器提供错误检测
abstract: This paper proposes a self-explainable Deep Learning (SE-DL) system for an image classification problem that performs self-error detection. The self-error detection is key to improving the DL system's safe operation, especially in safety-critical applications such as automotive systems. A SE-DL system outputs both the class prediction and an explanation for that prediction, which provides insight into how the system makes its predictions for humans. Additionally, we leverage the explanation of the proposed SE-DL system to detect potential class prediction errors of the system. The proposed SE-DL system uses a set of concepts to generate the explanation. The concepts are human-understandable lower-level image features in each input image relevant to the higher-level class of that image. We present a concept selection methodology for scoring all concepts and selecting a subset of them based on their contribution to the error detection performance of the proposed SE-DL system. Finally, we present different error detection schemes using the proposed SE-DL system to compare them against an error detection scheme without any SE-DL system.
summary: This paper proposes a self-explainable Deep Learning (SE-DL) system for an image classification problem that performs self-error detection. The self-error detection is key to improving the DL system's safe operation, especially in safety-critical applications such as automotive systems. A SE-DL system outputs both the class prediction and an explanation for that prediction, which provides insight into how the system makes its predictions for humans. Additionally, we leverage the explanation of the proposed SE-DL system to detect potential class prediction errors of the system. The proposed SE-DL system uses a set of concepts to generate the explanation. The concepts are human-understandable lower-level image features in each input image relevant to the higher-level class of that image. We present a concept selection methodology for scoring all concepts and selecting a subset of them based on their contribution to the error detection performance of the proposed SE-DL system. Finally, we present different error detection schemes using the proposed SE-DL system to compare them against an error detection scheme without any SE-DL system.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种可自解释的深度学习（SE-DL）系统，用于执行自错误检测的图像分类问题。自错误检测是提高深度学习系统安全运行的关键，特别是在汽车系统等安全关键型应用中。 SE-DL 系统会输出类别预测和对该预测的解释，从而深入了解系统如何为人类做出预测。此外，我们利用所提出的 SE-DL 系统的解释来检测系统潜在的类别预测错误。所提出的 SE-DL 系统使用一组概念来生成解释。这些概念是每个输入图像中与该图像的较高级别类别相关的人类可理解的较低级别图像特征。我们提出了一种概念选择方法，用于对所有概念进行评分，并根据它们对所提出的 SE-DL 系统的错误检测性能的贡献来选择它们的子集。最后，我们使用所提出的 SE-DL 系统提出不同的错误检测方案，将它们与没有任何 SE-DL 系统的错误检测方案进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自解释的深度学习图像分类系统（SE-DL），通过生成可解释的预测依据来实现系统错误检测，提升安全关键场景下的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型在安全关键领域（如自动驾驶）存在预测错误难以检测的问题，需通过可解释性机制增强系统安全性和透明度。
AI.method: 构建包含概念生成与选择机制的SE-DL框架，利用可解释的低级图像特征进行预测解释，并基于概念贡献度筛选优化错误检测性能，对比不同检测方案有效性。
AI.result: 实验验证了SE-DL系统能有效检测预测错误，概念选择方法显著提升检测准确率，且优于无解释机制的传统错误检测方案。
AI.conclusion: 自解释机制可作为深度学习系统安全性的有效补充，为高风险应用场景提供更可靠的错误检测解决方案。

method: 构建包含概念生成与选择机制的SE-DL框架，利用可解释的低级图像特征进行预测解释，并基于概念贡献度筛选优化错误检测性能，对比不同检测方案有效性。
result: 实验验证了SE-DL系统能有效检测预测错误，概念选择方法显著提升检测准确率，且优于无解释机制的传统错误检测方案。
conclusion: 自解释机制可作为深度学习系统安全性的有效补充，为高风险应用场景提供更可靠的错误检测解决方案。
search_text: Providing Error Detection for Deep Learning Image Classifiers Using Self-Explainability 使用自解释性为深度学习图像分类器提供错误检测 This paper proposes a self-explainable Deep Learning (SE-DL) system for an image classification problem that performs self-error detection. The self-error detection is key to improving the DL system's safe operation, especially in safety-critical applications such as automotive systems. A SE-DL system outputs both the class prediction and an explanation for that prediction, which provides insight into how the system makes its predictions for humans. Additionally, we leverage the explanation of the proposed SE-DL system to detect potential class prediction errors of the system. The proposed SE-DL system uses a set of concepts to generate the explanation. The concepts are human-understandable lower-level image features in each input image relevant to the higher-level class of that image. We present a concept selection methodology for scoring all concepts and selecting a subset of them based on their contribution to the error detection performance of the proposed SE-DL system. Finally, we present different error detection schemes using the proposed SE-DL system to compare them against an error detection scheme without any SE-DL system. 本文提出了一种可自解释的深度学习（SE-DL）系统，用于执行自错误检测的图像分类问题。自错误检测是提高深度学习系统安全运行的关键，特别是在汽车系统等安全关键型应用中。 SE-DL 系统会输出类别预测和对该预测的解释，从而深入了解系统如何为人类做出预测。此外，我们利用所提出的 SE-DL 系统的解释来检测系统潜在的类别预测错误。所提出的 SE-DL 系统使用一组概念来生成解释。这些概念是每个输入图像中与该图像的较高级别类别相关的人类可理解的较低级别图像特征。我们提出了一种概念选择方法，用于对所有概念进行评分，并根据它们对所提出的 SE-DL 系统的错误检测性能的贡献来选择它们的子集。最后，我们使用所提出的 SE-DL 系统提出不同的错误检测方案，将它们与没有任何 SE-DL 系统的错误检测方案进行比较。 本文提出一种自解释的深度学习图像分类系统（SE-DL），通过生成可解释的预测依据来实现系统错误检测，提升安全关键场景下的可靠性。 Mohammad Mahdi Karimi,Azin Heidarshenas,William W. Edmonson cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ang Li,Song Jiang,Yizhou Sun,Judea Pearl
title: Unit Selection: Learning Benefit Function from Finite Population Data
title_zh: 单元选择：从有限人口数据中学习效益函数
abstract: The unit selection problem is to identify a group of individuals who are most likely to exhibit a desired mode of behavior, for example, selecting individuals who would respond one way if incentivized and a different way if not. The unit selection problem consists of evaluation and search subproblems. Li and Pearl defined the "benefit function" to evaluate the average payoff of selecting a certain individual with given characteristics. The search subproblem is then to design an algorithm to identify the characteristics that maximize the above benefit function. The hardness of the search subproblem arises due to the large number of characteristics available for each individual and the sparsity of the data available in each cell of characteristics. In this paper, we present a machine learning framework that uses the bounds of the benefit function that are estimable from the finite population data to learn the bounds of the benefit function for each cell of characteristics. Therefore, we could easily obtain the characteristics that maximize the benefit function.
summary: The unit selection problem is to identify a group of individuals who are most likely to exhibit a desired mode of behavior, for example, selecting individuals who would respond one way if incentivized and a different way if not. The unit selection problem consists of evaluation and search subproblems. Li and Pearl defined the "benefit function" to evaluate the average payoff of selecting a certain individual with given characteristics. The search subproblem is then to design an algorithm to identify the characteristics that maximize the above benefit function. The hardness of the search subproblem arises due to the large number of characteristics available for each individual and the sparsity of the data available in each cell of characteristics. In this paper, we present a machine learning framework that uses the bounds of the benefit function that are estimable from the finite population data to learn the bounds of the benefit function for each cell of characteristics. Therefore, we could easily obtain the characteristics that maximize the benefit function.
abstract_zh: 单元选择问题是确定一组最有可能表现出所需行为模式的个体，例如，选择如果受到激励则以一种方式做出反应，如果没有则以不同方式做出反应的个体。单元选择问题由评估子问题和搜索子问题组成。 Li和Pearl定义了“效益函数”来评估选择具有给定特征的特定个体的平均收益。然后，搜索子问题是设计一种算法来识别最大化上述收益函数的特征。搜索子问题的难度是由于每个个体可用的特征数量众多以及每个特征单元格中可用数据的稀疏性而产生的。在本文中，我们提出了一个机器学习框架，该框架使用可从有限总体数据估计的收益函数的界限来学习每个特征单元格的收益函数的界限。因此，我们可以很容易地获得使效益函数最大化的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从有限总体数据中学习效益函数边界的机器学习框架，以解决单元选择问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高维特征稀疏数据时难以有效识别最大化效益函数的个体特征组合。
AI.method: 通过估计可从有限总体数据中计算的效益函数边界，构建机器学习框架学习各特征单元的效益边界。
AI.result: 实现了在数据稀疏条件下高效识别最大化效益函数的个体特征组合。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为有限数据下的单元选择问题提供了可扩展的解决方案，提升了特征组合优化效率。

authors_text: Changwoon Choi,Juhyeon Kim,Young Min Kim
title: IBL-NeRF: Image-Based Lighting Formulation of Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: IBL-NeRF：基于图像的神经辐射场照明公式
abstract: We propose IBL-NeRF, which decomposes the neural radiance fields (NeRF) of large-scale indoor scenes into intrinsic components. Recent approaches further decompose the baked radiance of the implicit volume into intrinsic components such that one can partially approximate the rendering equation. However, they are limited to representing isolated objects with a shared environment lighting, and suffer from computational burden to aggregate rays with Monte Carlo integration. In contrast, our prefiltered radiance field extends the original NeRF formulation to capture the spatial variation of lighting within the scene volume, in addition to surface properties. Specifically, the scenes of diverse materials are decomposed into intrinsic components for rendering, namely, albedo, roughness, surface normal, irradiance, and prefiltered radiance. All of the components are inferred as neural images from MLP, which can model large-scale general scenes. Especially the prefiltered radiance effectively models the volumetric light field, and captures spatial variation beyond a single environment light. The prefiltering aggregates rays in a set of predefined neighborhood sizes such that we can replace the costly Monte Carlo integration of global illumination with a simple query from a neural image. By adopting NeRF, our approach inherits superior visual quality and multi-view consistency for synthesized images as well as the intrinsic components. We demonstrate the performance on scenes with complex object layouts and light configurations, which could not be processed in any of the previous works.
summary: We propose IBL-NeRF, which decomposes the neural radiance fields (NeRF) of large-scale indoor scenes into intrinsic components. Recent approaches further decompose the baked radiance of the implicit volume into intrinsic components such that one can partially approximate the rendering equation. However, they are limited to representing isolated objects with a shared environment lighting, and suffer from computational burden to aggregate rays with Monte Carlo integration. In contrast, our prefiltered radiance field extends the original NeRF formulation to capture the spatial variation of lighting within the scene volume, in addition to surface properties. Specifically, the scenes of diverse materials are decomposed into intrinsic components for rendering, namely, albedo, roughness, surface normal, irradiance, and prefiltered radiance. All of the components are inferred as neural images from MLP, which can model large-scale general scenes. Especially the prefiltered radiance effectively models the volumetric light field, and captures spatial variation beyond a single environment light. The prefiltering aggregates rays in a set of predefined neighborhood sizes such that we can replace the costly Monte Carlo integration of global illumination with a simple query from a neural image. By adopting NeRF, our approach inherits superior visual quality and multi-view consistency for synthesized images as well as the intrinsic components. We demonstrate the performance on scenes with complex object layouts and light configurations, which could not be processed in any of the previous works.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 IBL-NeRF，它将大规模室内场景的神经辐射场（NeRF）分解为内在分量。最近的方法进一步将隐式体积的烘焙辐射分解为内在分量，以便可以部分近似渲染方程。然而，它们仅限于表示具有共享环境照明的孤立对象，并且承受着通过蒙特卡罗积分聚合光线的计算负担。相比之下，我们的预过滤辐射场扩展了原始 NeRF 公式，除了表面属性之外，还可以捕获场景体积内照明的空间变化。具体来说，不同材质的场景被分解为渲染的内在组件，即反照率、粗糙度、表面法线、辐照度和预过滤辐射度。所有组件都从 MLP 推断为神经图像，可以对大规模通用场景进行建模。特别是预过滤的辐射率可以有效地模拟体积光场，并捕获超出单一环境光的空间变化。预过滤将光线聚集在一组预定义的邻域大小中，这样我们就可以用来自神经图像的简单查询来取代昂贵的全局照明蒙特卡罗积分。通过采用 NeRF，我们的方法继承了合成图像以及内在组件的卓越视觉质量和多视图一致性。我们展示了在具有复杂对象布局和灯光配置的场景上的性能，这是之前任何作品都无法处理的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IBL-NeRF方法，将大规模室内场景的神经辐射场（NeRF）分解为内在成分，以提升渲染效果和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理孤立物体和共享环境光照时存在局限性，且依赖蒙特卡洛积分导致计算负担大，难以处理复杂场景。
AI.method: 通过预过滤辐射场扩展NeRF，结合MLP网络推断场景的反照率、粗糙度、表面法线等内在成分，并用预过滤辐射建模体光照场以替代蒙特卡洛积分。
AI.result: 成功处理了复杂物体布局和光照配置的场景，实现了高质量的合成图像和内在成分分解，优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: IBL-NeRF通过分解NeRF的内在成分和优化光照建模，有效提升了大规模场景的渲染效率与视觉质量。

authors_text: Ruidi Chen,Boran Hao,Ioannis Ch. Paschalidis
title: Distributionally Robust Multiclass Classification and Applications in Deep Image Classifiers
title_zh: 分布式鲁棒多类分类及其在深度图像分类器中的应用
comment: This work was intended as a replacement of arXiv:2109.12772 and any subsequent updates will appear there
comments: This work was intended as a replacement of arXiv:2109.12772 and any subsequent updates will appear there
abstract: We develop a Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO) formulation for Multiclass Logistic Regression (MLR), which could tolerate data contaminated by outliers. The DRO framework uses a probabilistic ambiguity set defined as a ball of distributions that are close to the empirical distribution of the training set in the sense of the Wasserstein metric. We relax the DRO formulation into a regularized learning problem whose regularizer is a norm of the coefficient matrix. We establish out-of-sample performance guarantees for the solutions to our model, offering insights on the role of the regularizer in controlling the prediction error. We apply the proposed method in rendering deep Vision Transformer (ViT)-based image classifiers robust to random and adversarial attacks. Specifically, using the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets, we demonstrate reductions in test error rate by up to 83.5% and loss by up to 91.3% compared with baseline methods, by adopting a novel random training method.
summary: We develop a Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO) formulation for Multiclass Logistic Regression (MLR), which could tolerate data contaminated by outliers. The DRO framework uses a probabilistic ambiguity set defined as a ball of distributions that are close to the empirical distribution of the training set in the sense of the Wasserstein metric. We relax the DRO formulation into a regularized learning problem whose regularizer is a norm of the coefficient matrix. We establish out-of-sample performance guarantees for the solutions to our model, offering insights on the role of the regularizer in controlling the prediction error. We apply the proposed method in rendering deep Vision Transformer (ViT)-based image classifiers robust to random and adversarial attacks. Specifically, using the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets, we demonstrate reductions in test error rate by up to 83.5% and loss by up to 91.3% compared with baseline methods, by adopting a novel random training method.
abstract_zh: 我们为多类 Logistic 回归 (MLR) 开发了一种分布稳健优化 (DRO) 公式，它可以容忍受异常值污染的数据。 DRO 框架使用概率模糊集，定义为接近于 Wasserstein 度量意义上的训练集经验分布的分布球。我们将 DRO 公式放松为正则化学习问题，其正则化项是系数矩阵的范数。我们为模型的解决方案建立了样本外性能保证，提供了关于正则化器在控制预测误差中的作用的见解。我们应用所提出的方法来渲染基于深度视觉变换器（ViT）的图像分类器，对随机和对抗性攻击具有鲁棒性。具体来说，使用 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集，通过采用一种新颖的随机训练方法，与基线方法相比，我们的测试错误率降低了高达 83.5%，损失率降低了高达 91.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布鲁棒优化（DRO）的多类分类方法，并将其应用于深度图像分类器，以提高对随机和对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法在面对数据中的异常值或分布偏移时表现不佳，需开发一种能容忍数据污染并提升模型鲁棒性的新方法。
AI.method: 通过Wasserstein度量定义概率模糊集，将DRO问题转化为正则化学习问题，利用系数矩阵范数作为正则化项，并应用于Vision Transformer模型。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上，测试误差率最高降低83.5%，损失降低91.3%，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过DRO框架有效提升了深度图像分类器的鲁棒性，正则化项在控制预测误差中起关键作用，且新训练方法具有实际应用价值。

The DRO framework uses a probabilistic ambiguity set defined as a ball of distributions that are close to the empirical distribution of the training set in the sense of the Wasserstein metric. We relax the DRO formulation into a regularized learning problem whose regularizer is a norm of the coefficient matrix. We establish out-of-sample performance guarantees for the solutions to our model, offering insights on the role of the regularizer in controlling the prediction error. We apply the proposed method in rendering deep Vision Transformer (ViT)-based image classifiers robust to random and adversarial attacks. Specifically, using the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets, we demonstrate reductions in test error rate by up to 83.5% and loss by up to 91.3% compared with baseline methods, by adopting a novel random training method. 我们为多类 Logistic 回归 (MLR) 开发了一种分布稳健优化 (DRO) 公式，它可以容忍受异常值污染的数据。 DRO 框架使用概率模糊集，定义为接近于 Wasserstein 度量意义上的训练集经验分布的分布球。我们将 DRO 公式放松为正则化学习问题，其正则化项是系数矩阵的范数。我们为模型的解决方案建立了样本外性能保证，提供了关于正则化器在控制预测误差中的作用的见解。我们应用所提出的方法来渲染基于深度视觉变换器（ViT）的图像分类器，对随机和对抗性攻击具有鲁棒性。具体来说，使用 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集，通过采用一种新颖的随机训练方法，与基线方法相比，我们的测试错误率降低了高达 83.5%，损失率降低了高达 91.3%。 本文提出了一种基于分布鲁棒优化（DRO）的多类分类方法，并将其应用于深度图像分类器，以提高对随机和对抗攻击的鲁棒性。 Ruidi Chen,Boran Hao,Ioannis Ch. authors_text: Jiahao Liu,Dongsheng Li,Hansu Gu,Tun Lu,Peng Zhang,Ning Gu
title: Parameter-free Dynamic Graph Embedding for Link Prediction
title_zh: 用于链接预测的无参数动态图嵌入
comment: 19 pages, 9 figures, 13 tables, Thirty-Sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), preprint version
comments: 19 pages, 9 figures, 13 tables, Thirty-Sixth Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), preprint version
abstract: Dynamic interaction graphs have been widely adopted to model the evolution of user-item interactions over time. There are two crucial factors when modelling user preferences for link prediction in dynamic interaction graphs: 1) collaborative relationship among users and 2) user personalized interaction patterns. Existing methods often implicitly consider these two factors together, which may lead to noisy user modelling when the two factors diverge. In addition, they usually require time-consuming parameter learning with back-propagation, which is prohibitive for real-time user preference modelling. To this end, this paper proposes FreeGEM, a parameter-free dynamic graph embedding method for link prediction. Firstly, to take advantage of the collaborative relationships, we propose an incremental graph embedding engine to obtain user/item embeddings, which is an Online-Monitor-Offline architecture consisting of an Online module to approximately embed users/items over time, a Monitor module to estimate the approximation error in real time and an Offline module to calibrate the user/item embeddings when the online approximation errors exceed a threshold. Meanwhile, we integrate attribute information into the model, which enables FreeGEM to better model users belonging to some under represented groups. Secondly, we design a personalized dynamic interaction pattern modeller, which combines dynamic time decay with attention mechanism to model user short-term interests. Experimental results on two link prediction tasks show that FreeGEM can outperform the state-of-the-art methods in accuracy while achieving over 36X improvement in efficiency. All code and datasets can be found in https://github.com/FudanCISL/FreeGEM.
summary: Dynamic interaction graphs have been widely adopted to model the evolution of user-item interactions over time. There are two crucial factors when modelling user preferences for link prediction in dynamic interaction graphs: 1) collaborative relationship among users and 2) user personalized interaction patterns. Existing methods often implicitly consider these two factors together, which may lead to noisy user modelling when the two factors diverge. In addition, they usually require time-consuming parameter learning with back-propagation, which is prohibitive for real-time user preference modelling. To this end, this paper proposes FreeGEM, a parameter-free dynamic graph embedding method for link prediction. Firstly, to take advantage of the collaborative relationships, we propose an incremental graph embedding engine to obtain user/item embeddings, which is an Online-Monitor-Offline architecture consisting of an Online module to approximately embed users/items over time, a Monitor module to estimate the approximation error in real time and an Offline module to calibrate the user/item embeddings when the online approximation errors exceed a threshold. Meanwhile, we integrate attribute information into the model, which enables FreeGEM to better model users belonging to some under represented groups. Secondly, we design a personalized dynamic interaction pattern modeller, which combines dynamic time decay with attention mechanism to model user short-term interests. Experimental results on two link prediction tasks show that FreeGEM can outperform the state-of-the-art methods in accuracy while achieving over 36X improvement in efficiency. All code and datasets can be found in https://github.com/FudanCISL/FreeGEM.
abstract_zh: 动态交互图已被广泛采用来模拟用户-项目交互随时间的演变。在对动态交互图中的链接预测的用户偏好进行建模时，有两个关键因素：1）用户之间的协作关系；2）用户个性化交互模式。现有的方法通常隐式地同时考虑这两个因素，当这两个因素出现分歧时，这可能会导致噪声用户建模。此外，它们通常需要通过反向传播进行耗时的参数学习，这对于实时用户偏好建模来说是令人望而却步的。为此，本文提出了FreeGEM，一种用于链接预测的无参数动态图嵌入方法。首先，为了利用协作关系，我们提出了一种增量图嵌入引擎来获取用户/项目嵌入，这是一种在线-监控-离线架构，由一个在线模块组成，用于随时间近似嵌入用户/项目，一个监控模块用于实时估计近似误差，一个离线模块用于在在线近似误差超过阈值时校准用户/项目嵌入。同时，我们将属性信息集成到模型中，这使得 FreeGEM 能够更好地对属于某些代表性不足群体的用户进行建模。其次，我们设计了一个个性化的动态交互模式建模器，它将动态时间衰减与注意力机制相结合来建模用户的短期兴趣。两个链路预测任务的实验结果表明，FreeGEM 在准确度上优于最先进的方法，同时在效率上实现超过 36 倍的提升。所有代码和数据集都可以在 https://github.com/FudanCISL/FreeGEM 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需参数的动态图嵌入方法FreeGEM，用于解决动态交互图中的链接预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在建模用户协作关系和个性化交互模式时存在噪声干扰，且依赖耗时的参数学习，难以实现实时用户偏好建模。
AI.method: 设计了包含在线监控离线校准的增量图嵌入引擎，并融合属性信息与动态衰减注意力机制建模短期兴趣。
AI.result: 在两个链接预测任务中，FreeGEM在准确率上优于现有方法，效率提升36倍以上。
AI.conclusion: FreeGEM通过分离建模协作关系与个性化模式，结合属性信息和实时校准机制，实现了高效准确的动态链接预测。

authors_text: Fidelia A. Orji,Julita Vassileva
title: Machine Learning Approach for Predicting Students Academic Performance and Study Strategies based on their Motivation
title_zh: 基于学生动机预测学生学业表现和学习策略的机器学习方法
abstract: This research aims to develop machine learning models for students academic performance and study strategies prediction which could be generalized to all courses in higher education. Key learning attributes (intrinsic, extrinsic, autonomy, relatedness, competence, and self-esteem) essential for students learning process were used in building the models. Determining the broad effect of these attributes on students' academic performance and study strategy is the center of our interest. To investigate this, we used Scikit-learn in python to build five machine learning models (Decision Tree, K-Nearest Neighbour, Random Forest, Linear/Logistic Regression, and Support Vector Machine) for both regression and classification tasks to perform our analysis. The models were trained, evaluated, and tested for accuracy using 924 university dentistry students' data collected by Chilean authors through quantitative research design. A comparative analysis of the models revealed that the tree-based models such as the random forest (with prediction accuracy of 94.9%) and decision tree show the best results compared to the linear, support vector, and k-nearest neighbours. The models built in this research can be used in predicting student performance and study strategy so that appropriate interventions could be implemented to improve student learning progress. Thus, incorporating strategies that could improve diverse student learning attributes in the design of online educational systems may increase the likelihood of students continuing with their learning tasks as required. Moreover, the results show that the attributes could be modelled together and used to adapt/personalize the learning process.

Thus, incorporating strategies that could improve diverse student learning attributes in the design of online educational systems may increase the likelihood of students continuing with their learning tasks as required. Moreover, the results show that the attributes could be modelled together and used to adapt/personalize the learning process.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在开发用于学生学业成绩和学习策略预测的机器学习模型，该模型可以推广到高等教育的所有课程。在构建模型时使用了学生学习过程所必需的关键学习属性（内在的、外在的、自主性、相关性、能力和自尊）。确定这些属性对学生学业成绩和学习策略的广泛影响是我们感兴趣的中心。为了研究这个问题，我们使用 Python 中的 Scikit-learn 为回归和分类任务构建了五种机器学习模型（决策树、K 最近邻、随机森林、线性/逻辑回归和支持向量机）来执行我们的分析。使用智利作者通过定量研究设计收集的 924 名大学牙科学生的数据来训练、评估和测试模型的准确性。对模型的比较分析表明，与线性模型、支持向量模型和 k 最近邻模型相比，基于树的模型（例如随机森林（预测精度为 94.9%）和决策树）显示出最佳结果。本研究建立的模型可用于预测学生的表现和学习策略，以便采取适当的干预措施来提高学生的学习进度。因此，在在线教育系统的设计中纳入可以改善不同学生学习属性的策略可能会增加学生根据需要继续完成学习任务的可能性。此外，结果表明，这些属性可以一起建模并用于调整/个性化学习过程。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在开发基于学生动机属性的机器学习模型，以预测其学业表现和学习策略，并适用于所有高等教育课程。
AI.motivation: 通过分析学生内在动机、自主性等关键学习属性，建立可推广的预测模型，以支持个性化教育干预并提升学习效果。
AI.method: 使用Scikit-learn构建五种机器学习模型（决策树、K近邻、随机森林、线性/逻辑回归、支持向量机），基于924名大学生的量化数据进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 树模型（随机森林和决策树）表现最佳，预测准确率达94.9%，显著优于线性回归、支持向量机和K近邻模型。
AI.conclusion: 模型可有效预测学业表现与学习策略，为教育系统设计个性化干预措施提供依据，提升学生学习持续性与适应性。
