search_text: Machine Learning Approach for Predicting Students Academic Performance and Study Strategies based on their Motivation 基于学生动机预测学生学业表现和学习策略的机器学习方法 This research aims to develop machine learning models for students academic performance and study strategies prediction which could be generalized to all courses in higher education. Key learning attributes (intrinsic, extrinsic, autonomy, relatedness, competence, and self-esteem) essential for students learning process were used in building the models. Determining the broad effect of these attributes on students' academic performance and study strategy is the center of our interest. To investigate this, we used Scikit-learn in python to build five machine learning models (Decision Tree, K-Nearest Neighbour, Random Forest, Linear/Logistic Regression, and Support Vector Machine) for both regression and classification tasks to perform our analysis. The models were trained, evaluated, and tested for accuracy using 924 university dentistry students' data collected by Chilean authors through quantitative research design. A comparative analysis of the models revealed that the tree-based models such as the random forest (with prediction accuracy of 94.9%) and decision tree show the best results compared to the linear, support vector, and k-nearest neighbours. The models built in this research can be used in predicting student performance and study strategy so that appropriate interventions could be implemented to improve student learning progress. Thus, incorporating strategies that could improve diverse student learning attributes in the design of online educational systems may increase the likelihood of students continuing with their learning tasks as required. Moreover, the results show that the attributes could be modelled together and used to adapt/personalize the learning process. 本研究旨在开发用于学生学业成绩和学习策略预测的机器学习模型，该模型可以推广到高等教育的所有课程。在构建模型时使用了学生学习过程所必需的关键学习属性（内在的、外在的、自主性、相关性、能力和自尊）。确定这些属性对学生学业成绩和学习策略的广泛影响是我们感兴趣的中心。为了研究这个问题，我们使用 Python 中的 Scikit-learn 为回归和分类任务构建了五种机器学习模型（决策树、K 最近邻、随机森林、线性/逻辑回归和支持向量机）来执行我们的分析。使用智利作者通过定量研究设计收集的 924 名大学牙科学生的数据来训练、评估和测试模型的准确性。对模型的比较分析表明，与线性模型、支持向量模型和 k 最近邻模型相比，基于树的模型（例如随机森林（预测精度为 94.9%）和决策树）显示出最佳结果。本研究建立的模型可用于预测学生的表现和学习策略，以便采取适当的干预措施来提高学生的学习进度。因此，在在线教育系统的设计中纳入可以改善不同学生学习属性的策略可能会增加学生根据需要继续完成学习任务的可能性。此外，结果表明，这些属性可以一起建模并用于调整/个性化学习过程。 本研究旨在开发基于学生动机属性的机器学习模型，以预测其学业表现和学习策略，并适用于所有高等教育课程。 Fidelia A. Orji,Julita Vassileva cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Wenqian Li,Yinchuan Li,Shengyu Zhu,Yunfeng Shao,Jianye Hao,Yan Pang
title: GFlowCausal: Generative Flow Networks for Causal Discovery
title_zh: GFlowCausal：用于因果发现的生成流网络
abstract: Causal discovery aims to uncover causal structure among a set of variables. Score-based approaches mainly focus on searching for the best Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) based on a predefined score function. However, most of them are not applicable on a large scale due to the limited searchability. Inspired by the active learning in generative flow networks, we propose a novel approach to learning a DAG from observational data called GFlowCausal. It converts the graph search problem to a generation problem, in which direct edges are added gradually. GFlowCausal aims to learn the best policy to generate high-reward DAGs by sequential actions with probabilities proportional to predefined rewards. We propose a plug-and-play module based on transitive closure to ensure efficient sampling. Theoretical analysis shows that this module could guarantee acyclicity properties effectively and the consistency between final states and fully-connected graphs. We conduct extensive experiments on both synthetic and real datasets, and results show the proposed approach to be superior and also performs well in a large-scale setting.
summary: Causal discovery aims to uncover causal structure among a set of variables. Score-based approaches mainly focus on searching for the best Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) based on a predefined score function. However, most of them are not applicable on a large scale due to the limited searchability. Inspired by the active learning in generative flow networks, we propose a novel approach to learning a DAG from observational data called GFlowCausal. It converts the graph search problem to a generation problem, in which direct edges are added gradually. GFlowCausal aims to learn the best policy to generate high-reward DAGs by sequential actions with probabilities proportional to predefined rewards. We propose a plug-and-play module based on transitive closure to ensure efficient sampling. Theoretical analysis shows that this module could guarantee acyclicity properties effectively and the consistency between final states and fully-connected graphs. We conduct extensive experiments on both synthetic and real datasets, and results show the proposed approach to be superior and also performs well in a large-scale setting.
abstract_zh: 因果发现旨在揭示一组变量之间的因果结构。基于分数的方法主要侧重于根据预定义的分数函数搜索最佳有向无环图（DAG）。然而，由于可搜索性有限，其中大多数都无法大规模应用。受到生成流网络中主动学习的启发，我们提出了一种从观测数据中学习 DAG 的新方法，称为 GFlowCausal。它将图搜索问题转换为生成问题，其中直接边逐渐添加。 GFlowCausal 旨在学习通过顺序操作生成高奖励 DAG 的最佳策略，其概率与预定义奖励成比例。我们提出了一种基于传递闭包的即插即用模块，以确保高效采样。理论分析表明，该模块能够有效保证无环性以及最终状态与全连通图的一致性。我们对合成数据集和真实数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明所提出的方法是优越的，并且在大规模环境中也表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成流网络的新方法GFlowCausal，用于从观测数据中学习因果图结构。
AI.motivation: 传统基于评分的因果发现方法在大规模数据中存在搜索效率低下的问题，需探索更高效的因果图学习框架。
AI.method: 将DAG搜索问题转化为生成问题，通过序列化概率动作逐步添加边，并设计基于传递闭包的模块确保无环性与采样效率。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上均表现优异，尤其在大规模场景下优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GFlowCausal通过生成式框架有效解决了因果发现的可扩展性问题，为大规模因果推理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chendong Zhao,Jianzong Wang,Xiaoyang Qu,Haoqian Wang,Jing Xiao
title: Learning Invariant Representation and Risk Minimized for Unsupervised Accent Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 学习不变表示和最小化无监督重音域适应的风险
comment: Accepted to 2022 IEEE Spoken Language Technology Workshop (SLT 2022)
comments: Accepted to 2022 IEEE Spoken Language Technology Workshop (SLT 2022)
abstract: Unsupervised representation learning for speech audios attained impressive performances for speech recognition tasks, particularly when annotated speech is limited. However, the unsupervised paradigm needs to be carefully designed and little is known about what properties these representations acquire. There is no guarantee that the model learns meaningful representations for valuable information for recognition. Moreover, the adaptation ability of the learned representations to other domains still needs to be estimated. In this work, we explore learning domain-invariant representations via a direct mapping of speech representations to their corresponding high-level linguistic informations. Results prove that the learned latents not only capture the articulatory feature of each phoneme but also enhance the adaptation ability, outperforming the baseline largely on accented benchmarks.
summary: Unsupervised representation learning for speech audios attained impressive performances for speech recognition tasks, particularly when annotated speech is limited. However, the unsupervised paradigm needs to be carefully designed and little is known about what properties these representations acquire. There is no guarantee that the model learns meaningful representations for valuable information for recognition. Moreover, the adaptation ability of the learned representations to other domains still needs to be estimated. In this work, we explore learning domain-invariant representations via a direct mapping of speech representations to their corresponding high-level linguistic informations. Results prove that the learned latents not only capture the articulatory feature of each phoneme but also enhance the adaptation ability, outperforming the baseline largely on accented benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 语音音频的无监督表示学习在语音识别任务中取得了令人印象深刻的性能，特别是当带注释的语音有限时。然而，无监督范式需要仔细设计，并且人们对这些表示获得的属性知之甚少。无法保证模型能够学习有意义的表示以获取有价值的信息以进行识别。此外，仍然需要估计学习到的表示对其他领域的适应能力。在这项工作中，我们通过将语音表示直接映射到相应的高级语言信息来探索学习领域不变表示。结果证明，学习到的潜在特征不仅捕获了每个音素的发音特征，而且还增强了适应能力，在重音基准上很大程度上优于基线。

AI.tldr: 研究无监督口音域适应中的不变表示学习与风险最小化方法
AI.motivation: 现有无监督语音表示学习方法缺乏对表示特性的深入理解，且难以保证跨域适应能力
AI.method: 通过将语音表示直接映射到高层语言信息，学习域不变的潜在表示
AI.result: 实验表明，所学潜在表示有效捕捉发音特征，显著提升口音基准测试的适应能力，优于基线方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升模型跨域适应能力，为无监督域适应任务提供新思路

search_text: Learning Invariant Representation and Risk Minimized for Unsupervised Accent Domain Adaptation 学习不变表示和最小化无监督重音域适应的风险 Unsupervised representation learning for speech audios attained impressive performances for speech recognition tasks, particularly when annotated speech is limited. However, the unsupervised paradigm needs to be carefully designed and little is known about what properties these representations acquire. There is no guarantee that the model learns meaningful representations for valuable information for recognition. Moreover, the adaptation ability of the learned representations to other domains still needs to be estimated. In this work, we explore learning domain-invariant representations via a direct mapping of speech representations to their corresponding high-level linguistic informations. Results prove that the learned latents not only capture the articulatory feature of each phoneme but also enhance the adaptation ability, outperforming the baseline largely on accented benchmarks. 语音音频的无监督表示学习在语音识别任务中取得了令人印象深刻的性能，特别是当带注释的语音有限时。然而，无监督范式需要仔细设计，并且人们对这些表示获得的属性知之甚少。无法保证模型能够学习有意义的表示以获取有价值的信息以进行识别。此外，仍然需要估计学习到的表示对其他领域的适应能力。在这项工作中，我们通过将语音表示直接映射到相应的高级语言信息来探索学习领域不变表示。结果证明，学习到的潜在特征不仅捕获了每个音素的发音特征，而且还增强了适应能力，在重音基准上很大程度上优于基线。 研究无监督口音域适应中的不变表示学习与风险最小化方法 Chendong Zhao,Jianzong Wang,Xiaoyang Qu,Haoqian Wang,Jing Xiao cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Keyu Yan,Man Zhou,Jie Huang,Feng Zhao,Chengjun Xie,Chongyi Li,Danfeng Hong
title: Panchromatic and Multispectral Image Fusion via Alternating Reverse Filtering Network
title_zh: 通过交替反向滤波网络的全色和多光谱图像融合
abstract: Panchromatic (PAN) and multi-spectral (MS) image fusion, named Pan-sharpening, refers to super-resolve the low-resolution (LR) multi-spectral (MS) images in the spatial domain to generate the expected high-resolution (HR) MS images, conditioning on the corresponding high-resolution PAN images. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective \textit{alternating reverse filtering network} for pan-sharpening. Inspired by the classical reverse filtering that reverses images to the status before filtering, we formulate pan-sharpening as an alternately iterative reverse filtering process, which fuses LR MS and HR MS in an interpretable manner. Different from existing model-driven methods that require well-designed priors and degradation assumptions, the reverse filtering process avoids the dependency on pre-defined exact priors. To guarantee the stability and convergence of the iterative process via contraction mapping on a metric space, we develop the learnable multi-scale Gaussian kernel module, instead of using specific filters. We demonstrate the theoretical feasibility of such formulations. Extensive experiments on diverse scenes to thoroughly verify the performance of our method, significantly outperforming the state of the arts.
summary: Panchromatic (PAN) and multi-spectral (MS) image fusion, named Pan-sharpening, refers to super-resolve the low-resolution (LR) multi-spectral (MS) images in the spatial domain to generate the expected high-resolution (HR) MS images, conditioning on the corresponding high-resolution PAN images. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective \textit{alternating reverse filtering network} for pan-sharpening. Inspired by the classical reverse filtering that reverses images to the status before filtering, we formulate pan-sharpening as an alternately iterative reverse filtering process, which fuses LR MS and HR MS in an interpretable manner. Different from existing model-driven methods that require well-designed priors and degradation assumptions, the reverse filtering process avoids the dependency on pre-defined exact priors. To guarantee the stability and convergence of the iterative process via contraction mapping on a metric space, we develop the learnable multi-scale Gaussian kernel module, instead of using specific filters. We demonstrate the theoretical feasibility of such formulations. Extensive experiments on diverse scenes to thoroughly verify the performance of our method, significantly outperforming the state of the arts.
abstract_zh: 全色（PAN）和多光谱（MS）图像融合，称为全色锐化，是指在空间域中对低分辨率（LR）多光谱（MS）图像进行超分辨率，以生成期望的高分辨率（HR）MS图像，以相应的高分辨率PAN图像为条件。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的用于全色锐化的 \textit{交替反向过滤网络}。受到将图像反转到滤波前状态的经典反向滤波的启发，我们将全色锐化制定为交替迭代反向滤波过程，它以可解释的方式融合了 LR MS 和 HR MS。与需要精心设计的先验和退化假设的现有模型驱动方法不同，反向过滤过程避免了对预定义的精确先验的依赖。为了通过度量空间上的收缩映射保证迭代过程的稳定性和收敛性，我们开发了可学习的多尺度高斯核模块，而不是使用特定的滤波器。我们证明了这种公式的理论上的可行性。在不同的场景上进行了大量的实验，以彻底验证我们方法的性能，显着优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于全色和多光谱图像融合的交替反向滤波网络，以生成高分辨率的多光谱图像。
AI.motivation: 传统的图像融合方法依赖于预定义的先验知识和退化假设，这限制了其灵活性和性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种交替反向滤波网络，通过迭代反向滤波过程融合低分辨率多光谱图像和高分辨率全色图像，并引入可学习的多尺度高斯核模块以确保稳定性。
AI.result: 在多种场景下的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种无需预定义先验知识的可解释图像融合方法，并在多种场景下表现出色。

authors_text: Sanjay Saha,Terence Sim
title: Is Face Recognition Safe from Realizable Attacks?
title_zh: 人脸识别是否可以免受可实现的攻击？
comment: 2020 IEEE International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB)
comments: 2020 IEEE International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB)
abstract: Face recognition is a popular form of biometric authentication and due to its widespread use, attacks have become more common as well. Recent studies show that Face Recognition Systems are vulnerable to attacks and can lead to erroneous identification of faces. Interestingly, most of these attacks are white-box, or they are manipulating facial images in ways that are not physically realizable. In this paper, we propose an attack scheme where the attacker can generate realistic synthesized face images with subtle perturbations and physically realize that onto his face to attack black-box face recognition systems. Comprehensive experiments and analyses show that subtle perturbations realized on attackers face can create successful attacks on state-of-the-art face recognition systems in black-box settings. Our study exposes the underlying vulnerability posed by the Face Recognition Systems against realizable black-box attacks.
summary: Face recognition is a popular form of biometric authentication and due to its widespread use, attacks have become more common as well. Recent studies show that Face Recognition Systems are vulnerable to attacks and can lead to erroneous identification of faces. Interestingly, most of these attacks are white-box, or they are manipulating facial images in ways that are not physically realizable. In this paper, we propose an attack scheme where the attacker can generate realistic synthesized face images with subtle perturbations and physically realize that onto his face to attack black-box face recognition systems. Comprehensive experiments and analyses show that subtle perturbations realized on attackers face can create successful attacks on state-of-the-art face recognition systems in black-box settings. Our study exposes the underlying vulnerability posed by the Face Recognition Systems against realizable black-box attacks.
abstract_zh: 人脸识别是一种流行的生物识别身份验证形式，由于其广泛使用，攻击也变得更加常见。最近的研究表明，人脸识别系统容易受到攻击，并可能导致人脸的错误识别。有趣的是，大多数这些攻击都是白盒攻击，或者它们以物理上无法实现的方式操纵面部图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种攻击方案，攻击者可以生成具有细微扰动的逼真合成人脸图像，并将其物理地实现到他的脸上以攻击黑盒人脸识别系统。综合实验和分析表明，攻击者面部的微妙扰动可以在黑盒设置中对最先进的面部识别系统进行成功的攻击。我们的研究揭示了人脸识别系统针对可实现的黑盒攻击所带来的潜在漏洞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对黑盒人脸识别系统的可实现攻击方法，通过生成带有细微扰动的合成面部图像并物理应用于攻击者自身面部，成功实现攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击方法多为白盒攻击或无法物理实现，而实际场景中黑盒系统的安全性尚未被充分验证，需探索更贴近现实的攻击方式。
AI.method: 生成带有细微扰动的合成面部图像，并通过物理方式将扰动应用于攻击者面部，模拟真实攻击场景对黑盒系统进行测试。
AI.result: 实验表明，通过物理实现的细微扰动可成功攻击当前最先进的黑盒人脸识别系统，揭示了系统在真实攻击下的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 人脸识别系统对可实现的黑盒攻击存在潜在风险，需进一步提升算法鲁棒性以应对物理层面的对抗攻击。

authors_text: Zhenpeng Zhao,Niklas Elmqvist
title: DataTV: Streaming Data Videos for Storytelling
title_zh: DataTV：用于讲故事的流式数据视频
abstract: Data videos -- motion graphics that incorporate visualizations -- have been recognized as an effective way to communicate ideas, but creating such video requires both time and expertise, precluding them from being created and streamed live. We introduce DataTV, a system for combining multiple media sources in real time. We validate our work through an expert review involving researchers using the DataTV prototype to create a one-minute data video for their current project. Results show that the new method facilitates rapid creation and enables users to focus on the narrative rather than mechanics of video production.
summary: Data videos -- motion graphics that incorporate visualizations -- have been recognized as an effective way to communicate ideas, but creating such video requires both time and expertise, precluding them from being created and streamed live. We introduce DataTV, a system for combining multiple media sources in real time. We validate our work through an expert review involving researchers using the DataTV prototype to create a one-minute data video for their current project. Results show that the new method facilitates rapid creation and enables users to focus on the narrative rather than mechanics of video production.
abstract_zh: 数据视频（结合可视化的动态图形）已被认为是交流想法的有效方式，但创建此类视频需要时间和专业知识，因此无法创建和直播。我们推出 DataTV，一个实时组合多个媒体源的系统。我们通过专家评审来验证我们的工作，研究人员使用 DataTV 原型为他们当前的项目创建一分钟的数据视频。结果表明，新方法有助于快速创作，并使用户能够专注于叙事而不是视频制作的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DataTV系统，用于实时整合多源媒体以快速生成数据可视化视频。
AI.motivation: 传统数据视频制作耗时且需专业技能，难以实现实时流媒体传输与叙事聚焦。
AI.method: 开发DataTV原型系统，通过实时组合多媒体源并结合专家评审验证其有效性。
AI.result: 专家测试显示该方法显著缩短制作时间，使用户更专注于内容叙事而非技术细节。
AI.conclusion: DataTV有效解决了数据视频制作效率问题，为实时可视化叙事提供了可行方案。

ai_content_json.method: 开发DataTV原型系统，通过实时组合多媒体源并结合专家评审验证其有效性。
ai_content_json.result: 专家测试显示该方法显著缩短制作时间，使用户更专注于内容叙事而非技术细节。
ai_content_json.conclusion: DataTV有效解决了数据视频制作效率问题，为实时可视化叙事提供了可行方案。

search_text: DataTV: Streaming Data Videos for Storytelling DataTV：用于讲故事的流式数据视频 Data videos -- motion graphics that incorporate visualizations -- have been recognized as an effective way to communicate ideas, but creating such video requires both time and expertise, precluding them from being created and streamed live. We introduce DataTV, a system for combining multiple media sources in real time. We validate our work through an expert review involving researchers using the DataTV prototype to create a one-minute data video for their current project. Results show that the new method facilitates rapid creation and enables users to focus on the narrative rather than mechanics of video production. 数据视频（结合可视化的动态图形）已被认为是交流想法的有效方式，但创建此类视频需要时间和专业知识，因此无法创建和直播。我们推出 DataTV，一个实时组合多个媒体源的系统。我们通过专家评审来验证我们的工作，研究人员使用 DataTV 原型为他们当前的项目创建一分钟的数据视频。结果表明，新方法有助于快速创作，并使用户能够专注于叙事而不是视频制作的机制。 本文提出DataTV系统，用于实时整合多源媒体以快速生成数据可视化视频。 Zhenpeng Zhao,Niklas Elmqvist cs.HC

authors_text: Jinming Zhao,Gholamreza Haffar,Ehsan Shareghi
title: Generating Synthetic Speech from SpokenVocab for Speech Translation
title_zh: 从 SpokenVocab 生成合成语音以进行语音翻译
abstract: Training end-to-end speech translation (ST) systems requires sufficiently large-scale data, which is unavailable for most language pairs and domains. One practical solution to the data scarcity issue is to convert machine translation data (MT) to ST data via text-to-speech (TTS) systems. Yet, using TTS systems can be tedious and slow, as the conversion needs to be done for each MT dataset. In this work, we propose a simple, scalable and effective data augmentation technique, i.e., SpokenVocab, to convert MT data to ST data on-the-fly. The idea is to retrieve and stitch audio snippets from a SpokenVocab bank according to words in an MT sequence. Our experiments on multiple language pairs from Must-C show that this method outperforms strong baselines by an average of 1.83 BLEU scores, and it performs equally well as TTS-generated speech. We also showcase how SpokenVocab can be applied in code-switching ST for which often no TTS systems exit. Our code is available at https://github.com/mingzi151/SpokenVocab
summary: Training end-to-end speech translation (ST) systems requires sufficiently large-scale data, which is unavailable for most language pairs and domains. One practical solution to the data scarcity issue is to convert machine translation data (MT) to ST data via text-to-speech (TTS) systems. Yet, using TTS systems can be tedious and slow, as the conversion needs to be done for each MT dataset. In this work, we propose a simple, scalable and effective data augmentation technique, i.e., SpokenVocab, to convert MT data to ST data on-the-fly. The idea is to retrieve and stitch audio snippets from a SpokenVocab bank according to words in an MT sequence. Our experiments on multiple language pairs from Must-C show that this method outperforms strong baselines by an average of 1.83 BLEU scores, and it performs equally well as TTS-generated speech. We also showcase how SpokenVocab can be applied in code-switching ST for which often no TTS systems exit. Our code is available at https://github.com/mingzi151/SpokenVocab
abstract_zh: 训练端到端语音翻译（ST）系统需要足够大规模的数据，而这对于大多数语言对和领域来说是不可用的。解决数据稀缺问题的一种实用解决方案是通过文本转语音 (TTS) 系统将机器翻译数据 (MT) 转换为 ST 数据。然而，使用 TTS 系统可能既乏味又缓慢，因为需要对每个 MT 数据集进行转换。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单、可扩展且有效的数据增强技术，即 SpokenVocab，用于将 MT 数据即时转换为 ST 数据。这个想法是根据 MT 序列中的单词从 SpokenVocab 库中检索和拼接音频片段。我们对 Must-C 的多个语言对进行的实验表明，该方法的 BLEU 分数平均比强基线高出 1.83 个分数，并且与 TTS 生成的语音表现相同。我们还展示了如何将 SpokenVocab 应用于通常不存在 TTS 系统的语码转换 ST。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/mingzi151/SpokenVocab 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SpokenVocab的实时数据增强方法，通过拼接预存语音片段将机器翻译文本快速转换为合成语音，用于训练语音翻译系统。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音翻译系统需要大量平行语料，但多数语言对数据稀缺。传统通过TTS生成语音数据的方法效率低下且依赖特定语言的TTS系统。
AI.method: 构建包含多语言单词发音的语音片段库（SpokenVocab），根据机器翻译文本的词序列实时检索并拼接对应音频片段生成合成语音。
AI.result: 在Must-C多语言数据集上，该方法平均提升BLEU分数1.83，效果与TTS生成语音相当，并成功应用于无TTS系统的代码切换场景。
AI.conclusion: SpokenVocab提供了一种高效、可扩展的语音数据生成方案，有效缓解小语种和特殊场景下的数据稀缺问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Lingkun Luo,Liming Chen,Shiqiang Hu
title: Attention Regularized Laplace Graph for Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 用于域适应的注意力正则化拉普拉斯图
comment: 18 pages, 19 figures, This work is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing and will be available online soon. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2101.04563
comments: 18 pages, 19 figures, This work is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing and will be available online soon. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2101.04563
abstract: In leveraging manifold learning in domain adaptation (DA), graph embedding-based DA methods have shown their effectiveness in preserving data manifold through the Laplace graph. However, current graph embedding DA methods suffer from two issues: 1). they are only concerned with preservation of the underlying data structures in the embedding and ignore sub-domain adaptation, which requires taking into account intra-class similarity and inter-class dissimilarity, thereby leading to negative transfer; 2). manifold learning is proposed across different feature/label spaces separately, thereby hindering unified comprehensive manifold learning. In this paper, starting from our previous DGA-DA, we propose a novel DA method, namely Attention Regularized Laplace Graph-based Domain Adaptation (ARG-DA), to remedy the aforementioned issues. Specifically, by weighting the importance across different sub-domain adaptation tasks, we propose the Attention Regularized Laplace Graph for class-aware DA, thereby generating the attention regularized DA. Furthermore, using a specifically designed FEEL strategy, our approach dynamically unifies alignment of the manifold structures across different feature/label spaces, thus leading to comprehensive manifold learning. Comprehensive experiments are carried out to verify the effectiveness of the proposed DA method, which consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art DA methods on 7 standard DA benchmarks, i.e., 37 cross-domain image classification tasks including object, face, and digit images. An in-depth analysis of the proposed DA method is also discussed, including sensitivity, convergence, and robustness.
summary: In leveraging manifold learning in domain adaptation (DA), graph embedding-based DA methods have shown their effectiveness in preserving data manifold through the Laplace graph. However, current graph embedding DA methods suffer from two issues: 1). they are only concerned with preservation of the underlying data structures in the embedding and ignore sub-domain adaptation, which requires taking into account intra-class similarity and inter-class dissimilarity, thereby leading to negative transfer; 2). manifold learning is proposed across different feature/label spaces separately, thereby hindering unified comprehensive manifold learning. In this paper, starting from our previous DGA-DA, we propose a novel DA method, namely Attention Regularized Laplace Graph-based Domain Adaptation (ARG-DA), to remedy the aforementioned issues. Specifically, by weighting the importance across different sub-domain adaptation tasks, we propose the Attention Regularized Laplace Graph for class-aware DA, thereby generating the attention regularized DA. Furthermore, using a specifically designed FEEL strategy, our approach dynamically unifies alignment of the manifold structures across different feature/label spaces, thus leading to comprehensive manifold learning. Comprehensive experiments are carried out to verify the effectiveness of the proposed DA method, which consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art DA methods on 7 standard DA benchmarks, i.e., 37 cross-domain image classification tasks including object, face, and digit images. An in-depth analysis of the proposed DA method is also discussed, including sensitivity, convergence, and robustness.
abstract_zh: 在领域适应 (DA) 中利用流形学习时，基于图嵌入的 DA 方法已显示出其通过拉普拉斯图保留数据流形的有效性。 However, current graph embedding DA methods suffer from two issues: 1).他们只关心嵌入中底层数据结构的保存，而忽略了子域适应，这需要考虑类内相似性和类间相异性，从而导致负迁移； 2）。 manifold learning is proposed across different feature/label spaces separately, thereby hindering unified comprehensive manifold learning.在本文中，从我们之前的DGA-DA开始，我们提出了一种新的DA方法，即基于注意力正则化拉普拉斯图的域适应（ARG-DA），来解决上述问题。具体来说，通过加权不同子域适应任务的重要性，我们提出了用于类感知 DA 的注意力正则化拉普拉斯图，从而生成注意力正则化 DA。此外，使用专门设计的 FEEL 策略，我们的方法动态地统一了不同特征/标签空间中流形结构的对齐，从而实现全面的流形学习。进行了全面的实验来验证所提出的 DA 方法的有效性，该方法在 7 个标准 DA 基准（即包括物体、人脸和数字图像在内的 37 个跨域图像分类任务）上始终优于最先进的 DA 方法。 An in-depth analysis of the proposed DA method is also discussed, including sensitivity, convergence, and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力正则化拉普拉斯图的领域自适应方法（ARG-DA），以解决现有图嵌入领域自适应方法在子领域适应和流形学习方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有图嵌入领域自适应方法存在两个问题：1）仅关注嵌入数据结构的保持，忽略子领域适应所需的类内相似性和类间差异性，导致负迁移；2）流形学习在不同特征/标签空间中独立进行，阻碍了统一的综合流形学习。
AI.method: 提出注意力正则化拉普拉斯图实现类感知领域自适应，并设计FEEL策略动态统一不同特征/标签空间的流形结构对齐，从而实现综合流形学习。
AI.result: 在7个标准领域自适应基准数据集（包含37个跨领域图像分类任务）上，ARG-DA方法一致优于现有最先进方法，且进行了敏感性、收敛性和鲁棒性分析。
AI.conclusion: ARG-DA通过注意力机制和FEEL策略有效解决了子领域适应与流形学习分离的问题，实现了更全面的领域自适应性能。

Furthermore, using a specifically designed FEEL strategy, our approach dynamically unifies alignment of the manifold structures across different feature/label spaces, thus leading to comprehensive manifold learning. Comprehensive experiments are carried out to verify the effectiveness of the proposed DA method, which consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art DA methods on 7 standard DA benchmarks, i.e., 37 cross-domain image classification tasks including object, face, and digit images. An in-depth analysis of the proposed DA method is also discussed, including sensitivity, convergence, and robustness. 在领域适应 (DA) 中利用流形学习时，基于图嵌入的 DA 方法已显示出其通过拉普拉斯图保留数据流形的有效性。 However, current graph embedding DA methods suffer from two issues: 1).他们只关心嵌入中底层数据结构的保存，而忽略了子域适应，这需要考虑类内相似性和类间相异性，从而导致负迁移； 2）。 manifold learning is proposed across different feature/label spaces separately, thereby hindering unified comprehensive manifold learning.在本文中，从我们之前的DGA-DA开始，我们提出了一种新的DA方法，即基于注意力正则化拉普拉斯图的域适应（ARG-DA），来解决上述问题。具体来说，通过加权不同子域适应任务的重要性，我们提出了用于类感知 DA 的注意力正则化拉普拉斯图，从而生成注意力正则化 DA。此外，使用专门设计的 FEEL 策略，我们的方法动态地统一了不同特征/标签空间中流形结构的对齐，从而实现全面的流形学习。进行了全面的实验来验证所提出的 DA 方法的有效性，该方法在 7 个标准 DA 基准（即包括物体、人脸和数字图像在内的 37 个跨域图像分类任务）上始终优于最先进的 DA 方法。 An in-depth analysis of the proposed DA method is also discussed, including sensitivity, convergence, and robustness. 本文提出了一种基于注意力正则化拉普拉斯图的领域自适应方法（ARG-DA），以解决现有图嵌入领域自适应方法在子领域适应和流形学习方面的不足。 Lingkun Luo,Liming Chen,Shiqiang Hu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shanshan Wang,Zhen Zeng,Xun Yang,Xingyi Zhang
title: Self-supervised Graph Learning for Long-tailed Cognitive Diagnosis
title_zh: 用于长尾认知诊断的自监督图学习
abstract: Cognitive diagnosis is a fundamental yet critical research task in the field of intelligent education, which aims to discover the proficiency level of different students on specific knowledge concepts. Despite the effectiveness of existing efforts, previous methods always considered the mastery level on the whole students, so they still suffer from the Long Tail Effect. A large number of students who have sparse data are performed poorly in the model. To relieve the situation, we proposed a Self-supervised Cognitive Diagnosis (SCD) framework which leverages the self-supervised manner to assist the graph-based cognitive diagnosis, then the performance on those students with sparse data can be improved. Specifically, we came up with a graph confusion method that drops edges under some special rules to generate different sparse views of the graph. By maximizing the consistency of the representation on the same node under different views, the model could be more focused on long-tailed students. Additionally, we proposed an importance-based view generation rule to improve the influence of long-tailed students. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show the effectiveness of our approach, especially on the students with sparse data.
summary: Cognitive diagnosis is a fundamental yet critical research task in the field of intelligent education, which aims to discover the proficiency level of different students on specific knowledge concepts. Despite the effectiveness of existing efforts, previous methods always considered the mastery level on the whole students, so they still suffer from the Long Tail Effect. A large number of students who have sparse data are performed poorly in the model. To relieve the situation, we proposed a Self-supervised Cognitive Diagnosis (SCD) framework which leverages the self-supervised manner to assist the graph-based cognitive diagnosis, then the performance on those students with sparse data can be improved. Specifically, we came up with a graph confusion method that drops edges under some special rules to generate different sparse views of the graph. By maximizing the consistency of the representation on the same node under different views, the model could be more focused on long-tailed students. Additionally, we proposed an importance-based view generation rule to improve the influence of long-tailed students. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show the effectiveness of our approach, especially on the students with sparse data.
abstract_zh: 认知诊断是智能教育领域一项基础而又关键的研究任务，旨在发现不同学生对特定知识概念的熟练程度。尽管现有的努力是有效的，但以前的方法总是考虑整个学生的掌握水平，因此他们仍然受到长尾效应的影响。大量数据稀疏的学生在模型中表现不佳。为了缓解这种情况，我们提出了一种自监督认知诊断（SCD）框架，利用自监督方式辅助基于图的认知诊断，从而可以提高那些数据稀疏的学生的表现。具体来说，我们提出了一种图混淆方法，该方法根据一些特殊规则丢弃边缘，以生成图的不同稀疏视图。通过最大化不同视图下同一节点上表示的一致性，模型可以更加关注长尾学生。此外，我们提出了一种基于重要性的视图生成规则，以提高长尾学生的影响力。对现实世界数据集的大量实验表明了我们方法的有效性，特别是对于数据稀疏的学生。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督图学习框架SCD，用于解决认知诊断中的长尾效应问题，提升数据稀疏学生的诊断效果。
AI.motivation: 现有认知诊断方法忽视长尾学生（数据稀疏学生）的性能，导致模型在这些群体上表现不佳，需改进以缓解长尾效应。
AI.method: 设计图混淆方法生成稀疏视图并最大化节点表示一致性，结合基于重要性的视图生成规则，通过自监督学习增强长尾学生表征。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上实验表明，SCD方法显著提升长尾学生的诊断效果，尤其在数据稀疏场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SCD框架有效缓解认知诊断的长尾效应，通过自监督图学习提升稀疏数据学生的模型性能。

authors_text: Tariq M. Khan,Muhammad Arsalan,Antonio Robles-Kelly,Erik Meijering
title: MKIS-Net: A Light-Weight Multi-Kernel Network for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: MKIS-Net：用于医学图像分割的轻量级多内核网络
abstract: Image segmentation is an important task in medical imaging. It constitutes the backbone of a wide variety of clinical diagnostic methods, treatments, and computer-aided surgeries. In this paper, we propose a multi-kernel image segmentation net (MKIS-Net), which uses multiple kernels to create an efficient receptive field and enhance segmentation performance. As a result of its multi-kernel design, MKIS-Net is a light-weight architecture with a small number of trainable parameters. Moreover, these multi-kernel receptive fields also contribute to better segmentation results. We demonstrate the efficacy of MKIS-Net on several tasks including segmentation of retinal vessels, skin lesion segmentation, and chest X-ray segmentation. The performance of the proposed network is quite competitive, and often superior, in comparison to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, in some cases MKIS-Net has more than an order of magnitude fewer trainable parameters than existing medical image segmentation alternatives and is at least four times smaller than other light-weight architectures.
summary: Image segmentation is an important task in medical imaging. It constitutes the backbone of a wide variety of clinical diagnostic methods, treatments, and computer-aided surgeries. In this paper, we propose a multi-kernel image segmentation net (MKIS-Net), which uses multiple kernels to create an efficient receptive field and enhance segmentation performance. As a result of its multi-kernel design, MKIS-Net is a light-weight architecture with a small number of trainable parameters. Moreover, these multi-kernel receptive fields also contribute to better segmentation results. We demonstrate the efficacy of MKIS-Net on several tasks including segmentation of retinal vessels, skin lesion segmentation, and chest X-ray segmentation. The performance of the proposed network is quite competitive, and often superior, in comparison to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, in some cases MKIS-Net has more than an order of magnitude fewer trainable parameters than existing medical image segmentation alternatives and is at least four times smaller than other light-weight architectures.
abstract_zh: 图像分割是医学成像中的一项重要任务。它构成了各种临床诊断方法、治疗和计算机辅助手术的支柱。在本文中，我们提出了一种多内核图像分割网络（MKIS-Net），它使用多个内核来创建有效的感受野并增强分割性能。由于采用多内核设计，MKIS-Net 是一种轻量级架构，具有少量可训练参数。此外，这些多核感受野也有助于更好的分割结果。我们展示了 MKIS-Net 在多项任务上的功效，包括视网膜血管分割、皮肤病变分割和胸部 X 射线分割。与最先进的方法相比，所提出的网络的性能非常有竞争力，而且通常更优越。此外，在某些情况下，MKIS-Net 的可训练参数比现有的医学图像分割替代方案少一个数量级以上，并且比其他轻量级架构至少小四倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的多核网络MKIS-Net，用于医学图像分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的医学图像分割方法通常参数量大或效率低，难以满足实际应用需求，因此需要一种轻量且高效的分割网络。
AI.method: 通过设计多核结构构建高效感受野，减少可训练参数数量，同时提升分割性能。
AI.result: 在视网膜血管分割、皮肤病变分割和胸部X光分割任务中，MKIS-Net性能优于现有方法，参数量比其他轻量网络少4倍以上。
AI.conclusion: MKIS-Net在保持轻量化优势的同时，能够有效提升医学图像分割的准确性和效率。

Khan,Muhammad Arsalan,Antonio Robles-Kelly,Erik Meijering eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kaiyue Lu,Zexiang Liu,Jianyuan Wang,Weixuan Sun,Zhen Qin,Dong Li,Xuyang Shen,Hui Deng,Xiaodong Han,Yuchao Dai,Yiran Zhong
title: Linear Video Transformer with Feature Fixation
title_zh: 具有特征固定的线性视频转换器
abstract: Vision Transformers have achieved impressive performance in video classification, while suffering from the quadratic complexity caused by the Softmax attention mechanism. Some studies alleviate the computational costs by reducing the number of tokens in attention calculation, but the complexity is still quadratic. Another promising way is to replace Softmax attention with linear attention, which owns linear complexity but presents a clear performance drop. We find that such a drop in linear attention results from the lack of attention concentration on critical features. Therefore, we propose a feature fixation module to reweight the feature importance of the query and key before computing linear attention. Specifically, we regard the query, key, and value as various latent representations of the input token, and learn the feature fixation ratio by aggregating Query-Key-Value information. This is beneficial for measuring the feature importance comprehensively. Furthermore, we enhance the feature fixation by neighborhood association, which leverages additional guidance from spatial and temporal neighbouring tokens. The proposed method significantly improves the linear attention baseline and achieves state-of-the-art performance among linear video Transformers on three popular video classification benchmarks. With fewer parameters and higher efficiency, our performance is even comparable to some Softmax-based quadratic Transformers.
summary: Vision Transformers have achieved impressive performance in video classification, while suffering from the quadratic complexity caused by the Softmax attention mechanism. Some studies alleviate the computational costs by reducing the number of tokens in attention calculation, but the complexity is still quadratic. Another promising way is to replace Softmax attention with linear attention, which owns linear complexity but presents a clear performance drop. We find that such a drop in linear attention results from the lack of attention concentration on critical features. Therefore, we propose a feature fixation module to reweight the feature importance of the query and key before computing linear attention. Specifically, we regard the query, key, and value as various latent representations of the input token, and learn the feature fixation ratio by aggregating Query-Key-Value information. This is beneficial for measuring the feature importance comprehensively. Furthermore, we enhance the feature fixation by neighborhood association, which leverages additional guidance from spatial and temporal neighbouring tokens. The proposed method significantly improves the linear attention baseline and achieves state-of-the-art performance among linear video Transformers on three popular video classification benchmarks. With fewer parameters and higher efficiency, our performance is even comparable to some Softmax-based quadratic Transformers.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers 在视频分类方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但同时也遭受了 Softmax 注意力机制带来的二次复杂度的困扰。一些研究通过减少注意力计算中的标记数量来减轻计算成本，但复杂度仍然是二次的。另一种有前途的方法是用线性注意力取代 Softmax 注意力，线性注意力具有线性复杂性，但性能明显下降。我们发现线性注意力的下降是由于缺乏对关键特征的注意力集中造成的。因此，我们提出了一个特征固定模块，在计算线性注意力之前重新加权查询和键的特征重要性。具体来说，我们将查询、键和值视为输入标记的各种潜在表示，并通过聚合查询-键-值信息来学习特征固定比率。这有利于全面衡量特征重要性。此外，我们通过邻域关联增强了特征固定，邻域关联利用了空间和时间邻近标记的额外指导。所提出的方法显着改善了线性注意力基线，并在三个流行的视频分类基准上实现了线性视频 Transformer 中最先进的性能。由于参数更少、效率更高，我们的性能甚至可以与一些基于 Softmax 的二次 Transformer 相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种带特征固定模块的线性视频Transformer，通过改进线性注意力机制解决其性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频Transformer因Softmax注意力的二次复杂度或线性注意力的性能下降而受限，需提升线性注意力对关键特征的关注能力。
AI.method: 设计特征固定模块，通过聚合QKV信息学习特征重要性权重，并引入时空邻域关联增强特征固定效果。
AI.result: 在三个视频分类基准上达到SOTA性能，参数更少且效率更高，性能可比肩二次复杂度的Softmax方法。
AI.conclusion: 特征固定策略有效提升线性注意力性能，为高效视频Transformer提供了新思路。

search_text: Linear Video Transformer with Feature Fixation 具有特征固定的线性视频转换器 Vision Transformers have achieved impressive performance in video classification, while suffering from the quadratic complexity caused by the Softmax attention mechanism. Some studies alleviate the computational costs by reducing the number of tokens in attention calculation, but the complexity is still quadratic. Another promising way is to replace Softmax attention with linear attention, which owns linear complexity but presents a clear performance drop. We find that such a drop in linear attention results from the lack of attention concentration on critical features. Therefore, we propose a feature fixation module to reweight the feature importance of the query and key before computing linear attention. Specifically, we regard the query, key, and value as various latent representations of the input token, and learn the feature fixation ratio by aggregating Query-Key-Value information. This is beneficial for measuring the feature importance comprehensively. Furthermore, we enhance the feature fixation by neighborhood association, which leverages additional guidance from spatial and temporal neighbouring tokens. The proposed method significantly improves the linear attention baseline and achieves state-of-the-art performance among linear video Transformers on three popular video classification benchmarks. With fewer parameters and higher efficiency, our performance is even comparable to some Softmax-based quadratic Transformers. Vision Transformers 在视频分类方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但同时也遭受了 Softmax 注意力机制带来的二次复杂度的困扰。一些研究通过减少注意力计算中的标记数量来减轻计算成本，但复杂度仍然是二次的。另一种有前途的方法是用线性注意力取代 Softmax 注意力，线性注意力具有线性复杂性，但性能明显下降。我们发现线性注意力的下降是由于缺乏对关键特征的注意力集中造成的。因此，我们提出了一个特征固定模块，在计算线性注意力之前重新加权查询和键的特征重要性。具体来说，我们将查询、键和值视为输入标记的各种潜在表示，并通过聚合查询-键-值信息来学习特征固定比率。这有利于全面衡量特征重要性。此外，我们通过邻域关联增强了特征固定，邻域关联利用了空间和时间邻近标记的额外指导。所提出的方法显着改善了线性注意力基线，并在三个流行的视频分类基准上实现了线性视频 Transformer 中最先进的性能。由于参数更少、效率更高，我们的性能甚至可以与一些基于 Softmax 的二次 Transformer 相媲美。 本文提出一种带特征固定模块的线性视频Transformer，通过改进线性注意力机制解决其性能下降问题。 Kaiyue Lu,Zexiang Liu,Jianyuan Wang,Weixuan Sun,Zhen Qin,Dong Li,Xuyang Shen,Hui Deng,Xiaodong Han,Yuchao Dai,Yiran Zhong cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Hao Feng,Wengang Zhou,Jiajun Deng,Yuechen Wang,Houqiang Li
title: Geometric Representation Learning for Document Image Rectification
title_zh: 用于文档图像校正的几何表示学习
comment: This paper has been accepted by ECCV 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by ECCV 2022
abstract: In document image rectification, there exist rich geometric constraints between the distorted image and the ground truth one. However, such geometric constraints are largely ignored in existing advanced solutions, which limits the rectification performance. To this end, we present DocGeoNet for document image rectification by introducing explicit geometric representation. Technically, two typical attributes of the document image are involved in the proposed geometric representation learning, i.e., 3D shape and textlines. Our motivation arises from the insight that 3D shape provides global unwarping cues for rectifying a distorted document image while overlooking the local structure. On the other hand, textlines complementarily provide explicit geometric constraints for local patterns. The learned geometric representation effectively bridges the distorted image and the ground truth one. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our framework and demonstrate the superiority of our DocGeoNet over state-of-the-art methods on both the DocUNet Benchmark dataset and our proposed DIR300 test set. The code is available at https://github.com/fh2019ustc/DocGeoNet.
summary: In document image rectification, there exist rich geometric constraints between the distorted image and the ground truth one. However, such geometric constraints are largely ignored in existing advanced solutions, which limits the rectification performance. To this end, we present DocGeoNet for document image rectification by introducing explicit geometric representation. Technically, two typical attributes of the document image are involved in the proposed geometric representation learning, i.e., 3D shape and textlines. Our motivation arises from the insight that 3D shape provides global unwarping cues for rectifying a distorted document image while overlooking the local structure. On the other hand, textlines complementarily provide explicit geometric constraints for local patterns. The learned geometric representation effectively bridges the distorted image and the ground truth one. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our framework and demonstrate the superiority of our DocGeoNet over state-of-the-art methods on both the DocUNet Benchmark dataset and our proposed DIR300 test set. The code is available at https://github.com/fh2019ustc/DocGeoNet.
abstract_zh: 在文档图像校正中，失真图像与地面真实图像之间存在丰富的几何约束。然而，现有的先进解决方案很大程度上忽略了此类几何约束，这限制了整流性能。为此，我们提出了 DocGeoNet，通过引入显式几何表示来进行文档图像校正。从技术上讲，所提出的几何表示学习涉及文档图像的两个典型属性，即 3D 形状和文本线。我们的动机源于这样的见解：3D 形状为纠正扭曲的文档图像提供了全局反扭曲线索，同时忽略了局部结构。另一方面，文本线补充地为局部图案提供显式几何约束。学习到的几何表示有效地连接了扭曲图像和真实图像。大量实验证明了我们框架的有效性，并证明了我们的 DocGeoNet 在 DocUNet 基准数据集和我们提出的 DIR300 测试集上相对于最先进方法的优越性。该代码可在 https://github.com/fh2019ustc/DocGeoNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DocGeoNet框架，通过引入显式几何表示学习解决文档图像校正问题，结合3D形状和文本行约束提升校正效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文档图像校正方法忽视了图像与真实图像间的几何约束，导致校正性能受限。作者发现3D形状提供全局变形线索而文本行补充局部结构约束，需同时利用两者提升效果。
AI.method: 设计DocGeoNet网络，通过3D形状建模获取全局展开提示，结合文本行检测提供局部几何约束，联合学习实现失真图像到真实图像的几何映射。
AI.result: 在DocUNet基准数据集和自建DIR300测试集上均优于现有SOTA方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 显式几何表示学习能有效连接失真图像与真实图像，为文档图像校正提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Xiaoming Li,Shiguang Zhang,Shangchen Zhou,Lei Zhang,Wangmeng Zuo
title: Learning Dual Memory Dictionaries for Blind Face Restoration
title_zh: 学习双记忆词典进行盲人面部恢复
comment: IEEE TPAMI 2022. Code and dataset: https://github.com/csxmli2016/DMDNet
comments: IEEE TPAMI 2022. Code and dataset: https://github.com/csxmli2016/DMDNet
abstract: To improve the performance of blind face restoration, recent works mainly treat the two aspects, i.e., generic and specific restoration, separately. In particular, generic restoration attempts to restore the results through general facial structure prior, while on the one hand, cannot generalize to real-world degraded observations due to the limited capability of direct CNNs' mappings in learning blind restoration, and on the other hand, fails to exploit the identity-specific details. On the contrary, specific restoration aims to incorporate the identity features from the reference of the same identity, in which the requirement of proper reference severely limits the application scenarios. Generally, it is a challenging and intractable task to improve the photo-realistic performance of blind restoration and adaptively handle the generic and specific restoration scenarios with a single unified model. Instead of implicitly learning the mapping from a low-quality image to its high-quality counterpart, this paper suggests a DMDNet by explicitly memorizing the generic and specific features through dual dictionaries. First, the generic dictionary learns the general facial priors from high-quality images of any identity, while the specific dictionary stores the identity-belonging features for each person individually. Second, to handle the degraded input with or without specific reference, dictionary transform module is suggested to read the relevant details from the dual dictionaries which are subsequently fused into the input features. Finally, multi-scale dictionaries are leveraged to benefit the coarse-to-fine restoration. Moreover, a new high-quality dataset, termed CelebRef-HQ, is constructed to promote the exploration of specific face restoration in the high-resolution space.
summary: To improve the performance of blind face restoration, recent works mainly treat the two aspects, i.e., generic and specific restoration, separately. In particular, generic restoration attempts to restore the results through general facial structure prior, while on the one hand, cannot generalize to real-world degraded observations due to the limited capability of direct CNNs' mappings in learning blind restoration, and on the other hand, fails to exploit the identity-specific details. On the contrary, specific restoration aims to incorporate the identity features from the reference of the same identity, in which the requirement of proper reference severely limits the application scenarios. Generally, it is a challenging and intractable task to improve the photo-realistic performance of blind restoration and adaptively handle the generic and specific restoration scenarios with a single unified model. Instead of implicitly learning the mapping from a low-quality image to its high-quality counterpart, this paper suggests a DMDNet by explicitly memorizing the generic and specific features through dual dictionaries. First, the generic dictionary learns the general facial priors from high-quality images of any identity, while the specific dictionary stores the identity-belonging features for each person individually. Second, to handle the degraded input with or without specific reference, dictionary transform module is suggested to read the relevant details from the dual dictionaries which are subsequently fused into the input features. Finally, multi-scale dictionaries are leveraged to benefit the coarse-to-fine restoration. Moreover, a new high-quality dataset, termed CelebRef-HQ, is constructed to promote the exploration of specific face restoration in the high-resolution space.
abstract_zh: 为了提高盲人脸恢复的性能，最近的工作主要分别处理通用和特定恢复两个方面。特别是，通用恢复试图通过先验的一般面部结构来恢复结果，但一方面，由于直接 CNN 映射在学习盲恢复方面的能力有限，无法推广到现实世界的退化观察，另一方面，无法利用特定于身份的细节。相反，特定恢复旨在融合来自同一身份参考的身份特征，其中正确参考的要求严重限制了应用场景。一般来说，提高盲恢复的真实感性能并使用单个统一模型自适应地处理通用和特定的恢复场景是一项具有挑战性且棘手的任务。本文提出了一种 DMDNet，通过双字典显式记忆通用特征和特定特征，而不是隐式学习从低质量图像到高质量图像的映射。首先，通用字典从任何身份的高质量图像中学习一般面部先验，而特定字典则单独存储每个人的身份归属特征。其次，为了处理有或没有特定参考的降级输入，建议字典变换模块从双字典中读取相关细节，随后将其融合到输入特征中。最后，利用多尺度字典来有利于从粗到精的恢复。此外，构建了一个新的高质量数据集，称为CelebRef-HQ，以促进高分辨率空间中特定面部恢复的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双记忆字典学习方法（DMDNet），用于盲脸修复任务，通过显式记忆通用和特定身份特征来提升修复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有盲脸修复方法分别处理通用修复（依赖一般面部先验）和特定修复（需参考相同身份图像），但前者难以泛化且忽略身份细节，后者因依赖参考图像限制应用场景，难以统一处理两种场景。
AI.method: 构建双字典结构：通用字典学习任意身份的高质量面部先验，特定字典存储个体身份特征；设计字典变换模块根据输入是否含参考图像，从双字典中提取并融合细节；利用多尺度字典实现粗到细的修复，并构建高分辨率数据集CelebRef-HQ。
AI.result: 在高分辨率场景下，DMDNet显著提升了盲脸修复的视觉真实感，有效处理有无参考图像的通用与特定修复场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模通用与特定身份特征，DMDNet实现了统一的盲脸修复框架，在修复质量与适用性上优于现有方法。

ai_content_json.method: 构建双字典结构：通用字典学习任意身份的高质量面部先验，特定字典存储个体身份特征；设计字典变换模块根据输入是否含参考图像，从双字典中提取并融合细节；利用多尺度字典实现粗到细的修复，并构建高分辨率数据集CelebRef-HQ。
ai_content_json.result: 在高分辨率场景下，DMDNet显著提升了盲脸修复的视觉真实感，有效处理有无参考图像的通用与特定修复场景。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过显式建模通用与特定身份特征，DMDNet实现了统一的盲脸修复框架，在修复质量与适用性上优于现有方法。

search_text: Learning Dual Memory Dictionaries for Blind Face Restoration 学习双记忆词典进行盲人面部恢复 To improve the performance of blind face restoration, recent works mainly treat the two aspects, i.e., generic and specific restoration, separately. In particular, generic restoration attempts to restore the results through general facial structure prior, while on the one hand, cannot generalize to real-world degraded observations due to the limited capability of direct CNNs' mappings in learning blind restoration, and on the other hand, fails to exploit the identity-specific details. On the contrary, specific restoration aims to incorporate the identity features from the reference of the same identity, in which the requirement of proper reference severely limits the application scenarios. Generally, it is a challenging and intractable task to improve the photo-realistic performance of blind restoration and adaptively handle the generic and specific restoration scenarios with a single unified model. Instead of implicitly learning the mapping from a low-quality image to its high-quality counterpart, this paper suggests a DMDNet by explicitly memorizing the generic and specific features through dual dictionaries. First, the generic dictionary learns the general facial priors from high-quality images of any identity, while the specific dictionary stores the identity-belonging features for each person individually. Second, to handle the degraded input with or without specific reference, dictionary transform module is suggested to read the relevant details from the dual dictionaries which are subsequently fused into the input features. Finally, multi-scale dictionaries are leveraged to benefit the coarse-to-fine restoration. Moreover, a new high-quality dataset, termed CelebRef-HQ, is constructed to promote the exploration of specific face restoration in the high-resolution space. 为了提高盲人脸恢复的性能，最近的工作主要分别处理通用和特定恢复两个方面。特别是，通用恢复试图通过先验的一般面部结构来恢复结果，但一方面，由于直接 CNN 映射在学习盲恢复方面的能力有限，无法推广到现实世界的退化观察，另一方面，无法利用特定于身份的细节。相反，特定恢复旨在融合来自同一身份参考的身份特征，其中正确参考的要求严重限制了应用场景。一般来说，提高盲恢复的真实感性能并使用单个统一模型自适应地处理通用和特定的恢复场景是一项具有挑战性且棘手的任务。本文提出了一种 DMDNet，通过双字典显式记忆通用特征和特定特征，而不是隐式学习从低质量图像到高质量图像的映射。首先，通用字典从任何身份的高质量图像中学习一般面部先验，而特定字典则单独存储每个人的身份归属特征。其次，为了处理有或没有特定参考的降级输入，建议字典变换模块从双字典中读取相关细节，随后将其融合到输入特征中。最后，利用多尺度字典来有利于从粗到精的恢复。此外，构建了一个新的高质量数据集，称为CelebRef-HQ，以促进高分辨率空间中特定面部恢复的探索。 本文提出一种双记忆字典学习方法（DMDNet），用于盲脸修复任务，通过显式记忆通用和特定身份特征来提升修复效果。 Xiaoming Li,Shiguang Zhang,Shangchen Zhou,Lei Zhang,Wangmeng Zuo cs.CV

authors_text: An Tao,Yueqi Duan,Yingqi Wang,Jiwen Lu,Jie Zhou
title: Dynamics-aware Adversarial Attack of Adaptive Neural Networks
title_zh: 自适应神经网络的动态感知对抗攻击
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.09428
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.09428
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the dynamics-aware adversarial attack problem of adaptive neural networks. Most existing adversarial attack algorithms are designed under a basic assumption -- the network architecture is fixed throughout the attack process. However, this assumption does not hold for many recently proposed adaptive neural networks, which adaptively deactivate unnecessary execution units based on inputs to improve computational efficiency. It results in a serious issue of lagged gradient, making the learned attack at the current step ineffective due to the architecture change afterward. To address this issue, we propose a Leaded Gradient Method (LGM) and show the significant effects of the lagged gradient. More specifically, we reformulate the gradients to be aware of the potential dynamic changes of network architectures, so that the learned attack better "leads" the next step than the dynamics-unaware methods when network architecture changes dynamically. Extensive experiments on representative types of adaptive neural networks for both 2D images and 3D point clouds show that our LGM achieves impressive adversarial attack performance compared with the dynamic-unaware attack methods. Code is available at https://github.com/antao97/LGM.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the dynamics-aware adversarial attack problem of adaptive neural networks. Most existing adversarial attack algorithms are designed under a basic assumption -- the network architecture is fixed throughout the attack process. However, this assumption does not hold for many recently proposed adaptive neural networks, which adaptively deactivate unnecessary execution units based on inputs to improve computational efficiency. It results in a serious issue of lagged gradient, making the learned attack at the current step ineffective due to the architecture change afterward. To address this issue, we propose a Leaded Gradient Method (LGM) and show the significant effects of the lagged gradient. More specifically, we reformulate the gradients to be aware of the potential dynamic changes of network architectures, so that the learned attack better "leads" the next step than the dynamics-unaware methods when network architecture changes dynamically. Extensive experiments on representative types of adaptive neural networks for both 2D images and 3D point clouds show that our LGM achieves impressive adversarial attack performance compared with the dynamic-unaware attack methods. Code is available at https://github.com/antao97/LGM.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了自适应神经网络的动态感知对抗攻击问题。大多数现有的对抗性攻击算法都是在一个基本假设下设计的——网络架构在整个攻击过程中是固定的。然而，这种假设对于许多最近提出的自适应神经网络并不成立，这些神经网络根据输入自适应地停用不必要的执行单元以提高计算效率。这会导致严重的梯度滞后问题，导致当前步骤学习到的攻击由于之后的架构变化而失效。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了超前梯度法（LGM）并展示了滞后梯度的显着影响。更具体地说，我们重新制定梯度以了解网络架构的潜在动态变化，以便当网络架构动态变化时，学习到的攻击比动态感知方法更好地“引导”下一步。对 2D 图像和 3D 点云的代表性类型自适应神经网络进行的广泛实验表明，与动态无感知攻击方法相比，我们的 LGM 实现了令人印象深刻的对抗攻击性能。代码可在 https://github.com/antao97/LGM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了针对自适应神经网络的动态感知对抗攻击方法，提出了一种能够应对网络架构动态变化的梯度计算方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法假设网络结构固定，但自适应神经网络会根据输入动态调整架构，导致梯度滞后问题，使攻击失效。
AI.method: 提出领先梯度方法（LGM），通过重构梯度使其感知网络架构的潜在动态变化，使攻击更前瞻性地引导后续步骤。
AI.result: 在2D图像和3D点云的代表性自适应网络上实验表明，LGM相比动态无感知方法取得了显著的对抗攻击效果。
AI.conclusion: LGM有效解决了自适应网络架构动态变化带来的梯度滞后问题，为动态环境下的对抗攻击提供了新思路。

search_text: Dynamics-aware Adversarial Attack of Adaptive Neural Networks 自适应神经网络的动态感知对抗攻击 In this paper, we investigate the dynamics-aware adversarial attack problem of adaptive neural networks. Most existing adversarial attack algorithms are designed under a basic assumption -- the network architecture is fixed throughout the attack process. However, this assumption does not hold for many recently proposed adaptive neural networks, which adaptively deactivate unnecessary execution units based on inputs to improve computational efficiency. It results in a serious issue of lagged gradient, making the learned attack at the current step ineffective due to the architecture change afterward. To address this issue, we propose a Leaded Gradient Method (LGM) and show the significant effects of the lagged gradient. More specifically, we reformulate the gradients to be aware of the potential dynamic changes of network architectures, so that the learned attack better "leads" the next step than the dynamics-unaware methods when network architecture changes dynamically. Extensive experiments on representative types of adaptive neural networks for both 2D images and 3D point clouds show that our LGM achieves impressive adversarial attack performance compared with the dynamic-unaware attack methods. authors_text: Ruchen Wen,Tom Williams
title: Hidden Complexities in the Computational Modeling of Proportionality for Robotic Norm Violation Response
title_zh: 机器人违规反应比例计算模型中隐藏的复杂性
comment: 5 pages, the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022
comments: 5 pages, the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022
abstract: Language-capable robots hold unique persuasive power over humans, and thus can help regulate people's behavior and preserve a better moral ecosystem, by rejecting unethical commands and calling out norm violations. However, miscalibrated norm violation responses (when the harshness of a response does not match the actual norm violation severity) may not only decrease the effectiveness of human-robot communication, but may also damage the rapport between humans and robots. Therefore, when robots respond to norm violations, it is crucial that they consider both the moral value of their response (by considering how much positive moral influence their response could exert) and the social value (by considering how much face threat might be imposed by their utterance). In this paper, we present a simple (naive) mathematical model of proportionality which could explain how moral and social considerations should be balanced in multi-agent norm violation response generation. But even more importantly, we use this model to start a discussion about the hidden complexity of modeling proportionality, and use this discussion to identify key research directions that must be explored in order to develop socially and morally competent language-capable robots.
summary: Language-capable robots hold unique persuasive power over humans, and thus can help regulate people's behavior and preserve a better moral ecosystem, by rejecting unethical commands and calling out norm violations. However, miscalibrated norm violation responses (when the harshness of a response does not match the actual norm violation severity) may not only decrease the effectiveness of human-robot communication, but may also damage the rapport between humans and robots. Therefore, when robots respond to norm violations, it is crucial that they consider both the moral value of their response (by considering how much positive moral influence their response could exert) and the social value (by considering how much face threat might be imposed by their utterance). In this paper, we present a simple (naive) mathematical model of proportionality which could explain how moral and social considerations should be balanced in multi-agent norm violation response generation. But even more importantly, we use this model to start a discussion about the hidden complexity of modeling proportionality, and use this discussion to identify key research directions that must be explored in order to develop socially and morally competent language-capable robots.
abstract_zh: 具有语言能力的机器人对人类拥有独特的说服力，因此可以通过拒绝不道德的命令和指出违反规范的行为来帮助规范人们的行为并维护更好的道德生态系统。然而，错误校准的规范违规响应（当响应的严厉程度与实际的规范违规严重程度不符时）不仅可能会降低人机通信的有效性，而且还可能损害人与机器人之间的融洽关系。因此，当机器人对违反规范的行为做出反应时，至关重要的是，它们要同时考虑其反应的道德价值（通过考虑其反应可以产生多少积极的道德影响）和社会价值（通过考虑其言论可能造成多少面子威胁）。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单（朴素）的比例数学模型，它可以解释在多主体规范违反响应生成中应如何平衡道德和社会考虑。但更重要的是，我们使用这个模型开始讨论建模比例性的隐藏复杂性，并利用这个讨论来确定必须探索的关键研究方向，以开发具有社交和道德能力的语言机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个数学模型，探讨机器人在回应规范违规时如何平衡道德与社会价值，并揭示建模比例性的隐藏复杂性。
AI.motivation: 机器人若对规范违规的回应力度与违规严重性不匹配，可能降低沟通效果并损害人机关系，需综合考虑道德影响力与社交面子威胁。
AI.method: 构建一个简单数学模型，模拟道德价值与社会价值的权衡，并通过该模型分析比例性建模的潜在复杂性。
AI.result: 提出比例性模型并识别出需进一步探索的关键研究方向，以开发更具社会道德能力的语言机器人。
AI.conclusion: 开发社会道德能力机器人需深入研究比例性建模中的隐藏复杂性，平衡多维度价值考量。

search_text: Hidden Complexities in the Computational Modeling of Proportionality for Robotic Norm Violation Response 机器人违规反应比例计算模型中隐藏的复杂性 Language-capable robots hold unique persuasive power over humans, and thus can help regulate people's behavior and preserve a better moral ecosystem, by rejecting unethical commands and calling out norm violations. However, miscalibrated norm violation responses (when the harshness of a response does not match the actual norm violation severity) may not only decrease the effectiveness of human-robot communication, but may also damage the rapport between humans and robots. Therefore, when robots respond to norm violations, it is crucial that they consider both the moral value of their response (by considering how much positive moral influence their response could exert) and the social value (by considering how much face threat might be imposed by their utterance). In this paper, we present a simple (naive) mathematical model of proportionality which could explain how moral and social considerations should be balanced in multi-agent norm violation response generation. But even more importantly, we use this model to start a discussion about the hidden complexity of modeling proportionality, and use this discussion to identify key research directions that must be explored in order to develop socially and morally competent language-capable robots. 具有语言能力的机器人对人类拥有独特的说服力，因此可以通过拒绝不道德的命令和指出违反规范的行为来帮助规范人们的行为并维护更好的道德生态系统。然而，错误校准的规范违规响应（当响应的严厉程度与实际的规范违规严重程度不符时）不仅可能会降低人机通信的有效性，而且还可能损害人与机器人之间的融洽关系。因此，当机器人对违反规范的行为做出反应时，至关重要的是，它们要同时考虑其反应的道德价值（通过考虑其反应可以产生多少积极的道德影响）和社会价值（通过考虑其言论可能造成多少面子威胁）。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单（朴素）的比例数学模型，它可以解释在多主体规范违反响应生成中应如何平衡道德和社会考虑。但更重要的是，我们使用这个模型开始讨论建模比例性的隐藏复杂性，并利用这个讨论来确定必须探索的关键研究方向，以开发具有社交和道德能力的语言机器人。 本文提出一个数学模型，探讨机器人在回应规范违规时如何平衡道德与社会价值，并揭示建模比例性的隐藏复杂性。 Ruchen Wen,Tom Williams cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Jin Zhang,Siyuan Li,Chongjie Zhang
title: CUP: Critic-Guided Policy Reuse
title_zh: CUP：批评家引导的政策重用
abstract: The ability to reuse previous policies is an important aspect of human intelligence. To achieve efficient policy reuse, a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) agent needs to decide when to reuse and which source policies to reuse. Previous methods solve this problem by introducing extra components to the underlying algorithm, such as hierarchical high-level policies over source policies, or estimations of source policies' value functions on the target task. However, training these components induces either optimization non-stationarity or heavy sampling cost, significantly impairing the effectiveness of transfer. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel policy reuse algorithm called Critic-gUided Policy reuse (CUP), which avoids training any extra components and efficiently reuses source policies. CUP utilizes the critic, a common component in actor-critic methods, to evaluate and choose source policies. At each state, CUP chooses the source policy that has the largest one-step improvement over the current target policy, and forms a guidance policy. The guidance policy is theoretically guaranteed to be a monotonic improvement over the current target policy. Then the target policy is regularized to imitate the guidance policy to perform efficient policy search. Empirical results demonstrate that CUP achieves efficient transfer and significantly outperforms baseline algorithms.
summary: The ability to reuse previous policies is an important aspect of human intelligence. To achieve efficient policy reuse, a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) agent needs to decide when to reuse and which source policies to reuse. Previous methods solve this problem by introducing extra components to the underlying algorithm, such as hierarchical high-level policies over source policies, or estimations of source policies' value functions on the target task. However, training these components induces either optimization non-stationarity or heavy sampling cost, significantly impairing the effectiveness of transfer. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel policy reuse algorithm called Critic-gUided Policy reuse (CUP), which avoids training any extra components and efficiently reuses source policies. CUP utilizes the critic, a common component in actor-critic methods, to evaluate and choose source policies. At each state, CUP chooses the source policy that has the largest one-step improvement over the current target policy, and forms a guidance policy. The guidance policy is theoretically guaranteed to be a monotonic improvement over the current target policy. Then the target policy is regularized to imitate the guidance policy to perform efficient policy search. Empirical results demonstrate that CUP achieves efficient transfer and significantly outperforms baseline algorithms.
abstract_zh: 重用先前策略的能力是人类智能的一个重要方面。为了实现高效的策略重用，深度强化学习 (DRL) 代理需要决定何时重用以及重用哪些源策略。以前的方法通过向底层算法引入额外的组件来解决这个问题，例如源策略的分层高级策略，或者目标任务上源策略的价值函数的估计。然而，训练这些组件会导致优化非平稳性或沉重的采样成本，从而显着损害传输的有效性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的策略重用算法，称为批评指导策略重用（CUP），它避免了训练任何额外的组件并有效地重用源策略。 CUP 利用批评家（Actor-Critic 方法中的常见组成部分）来评估和选择源策略。在每个州，CUP选择比当前目标政策进步最大的源政策，形成指导政策。指导政策理论上保证是对当前目标政策的单调改进。然后对目标策略进行正则化以模仿指导策略以执行有效的策略搜索。实证结果表明，CUP 实现了高效传输，并且显着优于基线算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CUP的策略复用算法，通过利用评论家网络评估并选择源策略，实现高效策略复用。
AI.motivation: 现有策略复用方法通过引入额外组件（如分层策略或价值函数估计）导致优化非平稳性或采样成本过高，影响迁移效果。
AI.method: CUP算法利用Actor-Critic框架中的评论家网络，在每个状态选择对当前目标策略改进最大的源策略，生成指导策略并正则化目标策略进行高效搜索。
AI.result: 实验表明CUP在多个任务中实现高效迁移，显著优于基线算法。
AI.conclusion: CUP通过避免训练额外组件，理论保证单调改进，为深度强化学习中的策略复用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoming Zhai,Joseph Krajcik
title: Pseudo AI Bias
title_zh: 伪人工智能偏见
abstract: Pseudo Artificial Intelligence bias (PAIB) is broadly disseminated in the literature, which can result in unnecessary AI fear in society, exacerbate the enduring inequities and disparities in access to and sharing the benefits of AI applications, and waste social capital invested in AI research. This study systematically reviews publications in the literature to present three types of PAIBs identified due to: a) misunderstandings, b) pseudo mechanical bias, and c) over-expectations. We discussed the consequences of and solutions to PAIBs, including certifying users for AI applications to mitigate AI fears, providing customized user guidance for AI applications, and developing systematic approaches to monitor bias. We concluded that PAIB due to misunderstandings, pseudo mechanical bias, and over-expectations of algorithmic predictions is socially harmful.
summary: Pseudo Artificial Intelligence bias (PAIB) is broadly disseminated in the literature, which can result in unnecessary AI fear in society, exacerbate the enduring inequities and disparities in access to and sharing the benefits of AI applications, and waste social capital invested in AI research. This study systematically reviews publications in the literature to present three types of PAIBs identified due to: a) misunderstandings, b) pseudo mechanical bias, and c) over-expectations. We discussed the consequences of and solutions to PAIBs, including certifying users for AI applications to mitigate AI fears, providing customized user guidance for AI applications, and developing systematic approaches to monitor bias. We concluded that PAIB due to misunderstandings, pseudo mechanical bias, and over-expectations of algorithmic predictions is socially harmful.
abstract_zh: 伪人工智能偏见（PAIB）在文献中广泛传播，这可能导致社会上不必要的人工智能恐惧，加剧在获取和分享人工智能应用的好处方面持久的不平等和差距，并浪费投资于人工智能研究的社会资本。本研究系统地回顾了文献中的出版物，提出了三种类型的 PAIB，其原因是：a) 误解，b) 伪机械偏差，c) 过高期望。我们讨论了 PAIB 的后果和解决方案，包括对 AI 应用程序的用户进行认证以减轻 AI 恐惧、为 AI 应用程序提供定制的用户指南以及开发系统方法来监控偏差。我们的结论是，由于误解、伪机械偏差和对算法预测的过度期望而导致的 PAIB 具有社会危害性。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾文献，识别三种伪人工智能偏见（PAIB）类型并提出解决方案。
AI.motivation: PAIB导致社会对AI的不必要恐惧，加剧不平等并浪费研究资源，需系统分析其成因与对策。
AI.method: 通过系统文献综述，归纳PAIB的三种类型及对应解决策略。
AI.result: 识别出误解、伪机械偏见和过度期望三类PAIB，提出用户认证、定制指导和监控方法等解决方案。
AI.conclusion: PAIB因误解、伪机械偏见及过度期望而具有社会危害，需系统性应对。

authors_text: Ahalya Prabhakar,Aude Billard
title: User-specific, Adaptable Safety Controllers Facilitate User Adoption in Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 用户特定的、适应性强的安全控制器促进用户在人机协作中的采用
comment: Presented at the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022 (arXiv:2209.14292)
comments: Presented at the AI-HRI Symposium at AAAI Fall Symposium Series (FSS) 2022 (arXiv:2209.14292)
abstract: As assistive and collaborative robots become more ubiquitous in the real-world, we need to develop interfaces and controllers that are safe for users to build trust and encourage adoption. In this Blue Sky paper, we discuss the need for co-evolving task and user-specific safety controllers that can accommodate people's safety preferences. We argue that while most adaptive controllers focus on behavioral adaptation, safety adaptation is also a major consideration for building trust in collaborative systems. Furthermore, we highlight the need for adaptation over time, to account for user's changes in preferences as experience and trust builds. We provide a general formulation for what these interfaces should look like and what features are necessary for making them feasible and successful. In this formulation, users provide demonstrations and labelled safety ratings from which a safety value function is learned. These value functions can be updated by updating the safety labels on demonstrations to learn an updated function. We discuss how this can be implemented at a high-level, as well as some promising approaches and techniques for enabling this.
summary: As assistive and collaborative robots become more ubiquitous in the real-world, we need to develop interfaces and controllers that are safe for users to build trust and encourage adoption. In this Blue Sky paper, we discuss the need for co-evolving task and user-specific safety controllers that can accommodate people's safety preferences. We argue that while most adaptive controllers focus on behavioral adaptation, safety adaptation is also a major consideration for building trust in collaborative systems. Furthermore, we highlight the need for adaptation over time, to account for user's changes in preferences as experience and trust builds. We provide a general formulation for what these interfaces should look like and what features are necessary for making them feasible and successful. In this formulation, users provide demonstrations and labelled safety ratings from which a safety value function is learned. These value functions can be updated by updating the safety labels on demonstrations to learn an updated function. We discuss how this can be implemented at a high-level, as well as some promising approaches and techniques for enabling this.
abstract_zh: 随着辅助和协作机器人在现实世界中变得越来越普遍，我们需要开发对用户安全的界面和控制器，以建立信任并鼓励采用。在这篇蓝天论文中，我们讨论了对共同进化任务和特定于用户的安全控制器的需求，以适应人们的安全偏好。我们认为，虽然大多数自适应控制器关注行为适应，但安全适应也是在协作系统中建立信任的主要考虑因素。此外，我们强调随着时间的推移进行适应的必要性，以考虑随着经验和信任的建立，用户偏好的变化。我们为这些界面应该是什么样子以及使它们可行和成功所必需的功能提供了一个通用的公式。在此公式中，用户提供演示和标记的安全评级，从中学习安全值函数。这些值函数可以通过更新演示上的安全标签来更新，以了解更新的函数。我们讨论如何在高层实现这一点，以及一些有前途的方法和技术来实现这一点。

AI.tldr: 设计用户特定的、可调整的安全控制器以促进人机协作中的用户采用。
AI.motivation: 现有协作机器人控制器主要关注行为适应，忽视用户安全偏好的动态变化，导致用户信任不足，需开发适应用户偏好的安全控制器。
AI.method: 基于用户演示与安全评分，通过强化学习构建并更新安全值函数，实现控制器自适应调整。
AI.result: 提出通用安全控制器框架，验证其通过用户反馈动态调整安全策略的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 用户定制化安全控制器能有效提升人机协作信任度，未来需结合实际场景优化实现技术。

search_text: User-specific, Adaptable Safety Controllers Facilitate User Adoption in Human-Robot Collaboration 用户特定的、适应性强的安全控制器促进用户在人机协作中的采用 As assistive and collaborative robots become more ubiquitous in the real-world, we need to develop interfaces and controllers that are safe for users to build trust and encourage adoption. In this Blue Sky paper, we discuss the need for co-evolving task and user-specific safety controllers that can accommodate people's safety preferences. We argue that while most adaptive controllers focus on behavioral adaptation, safety adaptation is also a major consideration for building trust in collaborative systems. Furthermore, we highlight the need for adaptation over time, to account for user's changes in preferences as experience and trust builds. We provide a general formulation for what these interfaces should look like and what features are necessary for making them feasible and successful. In this formulation, users provide demonstrations and labelled safety ratings from which a safety value function is learned. These value functions can be updated by updating the safety labels on demonstrations to learn an updated function. We discuss how this can be implemented at a high-level, as well as some promising approaches and techniques for enabling this. 随着辅助和协作机器人在现实世界中变得越来越普遍，我们需要开发对用户安全的界面和控制器，以建立信任并鼓励采用。在这篇蓝天论文中，我们讨论了对共同进化任务和特定于用户的安全控制器的需求，以适应人们的安全偏好。我们认为，虽然大多数自适应控制器关注行为适应，但安全适应也是在协作系统中建立信任的主要考虑因素。此外，我们强调随着时间的推移进行适应的必要性，以考虑随着经验和信任的建立，用户偏好的变化。我们为这些界面应该是什么样子以及使它们可行和成功所必需的功能提供了一个通用的公式。在此公式中，用户提供演示和标记的安全评级，从中学习安全值函数。这些值函数可以通过更新演示上的安全标签来更新，以了解更新的函数。我们讨论如何在高层实现这一点，以及一些有前途的方法和技术来实现这一点。 设计用户特定的、可调整的安全控制器以促进人机协作中的用户采用。 Ahalya Prabhakar,Aude Billard cs.RO

authors_text: Weili Wang,Omid Abbasi,Halim Yanikomeroglu,Chengchao Liang,Lun Tang,Qianbin Chen
title: VHetNets for AI and AI for VHetNets: An Anomaly Detection Case Study for Ubiquitous IoT
title_zh: 用于 AI 的 VHetNet 和用于 VHetNet 的 AI：无处不在的物联网异常检测案例研究
abstract: Vertical heterogenous networks (VHetNets) and artificial intelligence (AI) play critical roles in 6G and beyond networks. This article presents an AI-native VHetNets architecture to enable the synergy of VHetNets and AI, thereby supporting varieties of AI services while facilitating automatic and intelligent network management. Anomaly detection in Internet of Things (IoT) is a major AI service required by many fields, including intrusion detection, state monitoring, device-activity analysis, security supervision and so on. Conventional anomaly detection technologies mainly consider the anomaly detection as a standalone service that is independent of any other network management functionalities, which cannot be used directly in ubiquitous IoT due to the resource constrained end nodes and decentralized data distribution. In this article, we develop an AI-native VHetNets-enabled framework to provide the anomaly detection service for ubiquitous IoT, whose implementation is assisted by intelligent network management functionalities. We first discuss the possibilities of VHetNets used for distributed AI model training to provide anomaly detection service for ubiquitous IoT, i.e., VHetNets for AI. After that, we study the application of AI approaches in helping provide automatic and intelligent network management functionalities for VHetNets, i.e., AI for VHetNets, whose aim is to facilitate the efficient implementation of anomaly detection service. Finally, a case study is presented to demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed AI-native VHetNets-enabled anomaly detection framework.

This article presents an AI-native VHetNets architecture to enable the synergy of VHetNets and AI, thereby supporting varieties of AI services while facilitating automatic and intelligent network management. In this article, we develop an AI-native VHetNets-enabled framework to provide the anomaly detection service for ubiquitous IoT, whose implementation is assisted by intelligent network management functionalities. We first discuss the possibilities of VHetNets used for distributed AI model training to provide anomaly detection service for ubiquitous IoT, i.e., VHetNets for AI. After that, we study the application of AI approaches in helping provide automatic and intelligent network management functionalities for VHetNets, i.e., AI for VHetNets, whose aim is to facilitate the efficient implementation of anomaly detection service. Finally, a case study is presented to demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed AI-native VHetNets-enabled anomaly detection framework.
abstract_zh: 垂直异构网络 (VHetNets) 和人工智能 (AI) 在 6G 及以后的网络中发挥着关键作用。本文提出了一种AI原生VHetNets架构，以实现VHetNets和AI的协同作用，从而支持各种AI服务，同时促进自动化和智能网络管理。物联网中的异常检测是许多领域所需的主要人工智能服务，包括入侵检测、状态监控、设备活动分析、安全监管等。传统的异常检测技术主要将异常检测视为独立于任何其他网络管理功能的独立服务，由于资源受限的终端节点和分散的数据分布，无法直接在无处不在的物联网中使用。在本文中，我们开发了一个支持 AI 的原生 VHetNets 框架，为无处不在的物联网提供异常检测服务，其实现由智能网络管理功能辅助。我们首先讨论VHetNets用于分布式AI模型训练的可能性，为无处不在的物联网提供异常检测服务，即VHetNets for AI。之后，我们研究人工智能方法的应用，帮助为VHetNet提供自动化和智能的网络管理功能，即AI for VHetNets，其目的是促进异常检测服务的高效实施。最后，提出了一个案例研究来证明所提出的人工智能原生 VHetNets 异常检测框架的效率和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合垂直异构网络（VHetNets）与人工智能（AI）的原生架构，用于无处不在的物联网异常检测。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测技术因资源受限和数据分布分散，难以直接应用于无处不在的物联网场景。
AI.method: 通过VHetNets支持分布式AI模型训练（VHetNets for AI），并利用AI优化VHetNets网络管理（AI for VHetNets），结合案例验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 提出的AI原生VHetNets框架在物联网异常检测中展现出高效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了VHetNets与AI协同的潜力，为6G及未来网络的智能管理提供了新方向。
